text: It was amazing place with beautiful view amd everything was very clean

This is one of the most beautiful Air BnB’s we have ever stayed at! Thank you so much for sharing your beautiful home with us, we are already looking forward to returning one day. We loved playing games, reading, and doing puzzles in the library room. Our children loved swinging in the swing, sleeping on the top bunks, and playing in the game room. We enjoyed making s’more’s each night on the deck looking out into the lake and making fires in the living room. Overall this is such an idyllic spot with such an attention to detail given to each room. Thank you, thank you, thank you!
Beautiful Airbnb with everything you need! They really thought of everything with toiletries, recommendations, videos how to set the hot tub and record player. Super responsive!!!!

We had a wonderful stay! Beautiful house, beautiful views, and Letizia & Josh have thought of every convenience and comfort to make it an enjoyable visit. Even being welcomed with a personal note and smores kit was such a sweet gesture. The whole house felt new and clean and built for relaxation. We loved each space within the house, from the loft to the game room, and made sure to take advantage of the large hot tub and fire pit. We loved that the location was close enough to visit American Dream mall (or even go into NYC if we wanted), but also far enough removed to enjoy the small town charm of the local area. Highly recommend!
Loved the stay. Can’t wait to come back!

It was awesome! We felt the attention to detail in every corner of the home!
Joshua and Letizia were the most amazing hosts ever! They were always available, patient and understanding!

Letizia and Josh are amazing hosts! From booking and all throughout our stay they provided local recommendations , clear easy instructions and had a very quick response time leaving us feeling extremely welcomed. Their house is absolutely breathtaking and you can tell they really put a lot of thought into every single detail to provide guests with the best experience. The heated bathroom floor, AMAZING! Cozy blankets, comfortable furniture, an entire wall of books and games that we enjoyed while having an incredible view of the lake through the beautiful windows. We are so happy we chose Paddle Point and highly recommend!!

An absolute gem! Josh and Letizia’s home in West Milford is truly impressive — it felt like staying inside a piece of landmark architecture. Every detail of the house was thoughtfully designed and beautifully maintained. We had a wonderful stay and would love to make this a yearly visit. Highly recommended!

Five stars doesn’t feel like enough for this A-frame. ✨
From the second I walked in, it felt like the exhale I didn’t know I’d been holding. Every detail was intentional. Not just “cute cabin in the woods” intentional. Thoughtfully designed, super luxe, nothing overlooked intentional.
The space was spotless and beautifully styled without trying too hard. The fireplace made the whole place glow at night, the hot tub was pure magic under the stars, and every amenity you could possibly need was already there waiting for you. Extra blankets. Quality toiletries. A coffee bar stocked with everything. The kind of details that make you realize the hosts truly care about the experience.
I went for a peaceful solo getaway, and I honestly couldn’t have asked for a better reset. It was quiet, grounding, cozy but elevated. I felt taken care of the entire time.
If you’re looking for a place that blends luxury with warmth and calm, this is it.

We had the best time at Paddle House! Everything was exactly how it looked in the pictures. We were amazed that not a single detail was missed, down to usb plugs in each bunk space. Every amenity was well stocked - there was plenty of firewood, coffee, towels, etc. We also loved using the indoor fireplace, and had such a cozy weekend enjoying the fire and hot tub. The hosts were excellent and provided such detailed information about the property that we had no questions at all. 10/10 stay!

Our stay at Paddle Point was the perfect winter escape. The house is beautiful, modern, and was meticulously cleaned. It features one of our favorite hot tubs of all time, a cozy book nook, an immaculate kitchen, and cute little touches throughout the entire home. Josh and Letizia were very helpful, responsive, and accommodating. We appreciated all of the thoughtful extras they included to make our stay feel like home. We can’t wait to be back!

This home was beautiful! From the grand windows overlooking the lake to the arcade basement and heated bathroom floors, this place had it all. The kids had the best time and their own spaces, which was fun for them. We enjoyed a weekend full of games and fun in the hot tub. This home was so cool and we would come back in a heartbeat!

We had the best time at Joshua and Letizia's beautiful home! They were the most kind, thoughtful, and gracious hosts. We went skiing at Mountain Creek and had a blast! A lot of scenic views, food was fantastic, and there was too much to do in just a couple days. Their home was such a pleasant getaway, we almost couldn't leave the home. A must see and we will definitely be back. Thank you so much for having us again.
特别特别棒的房子！迫不及待期待夏天有机会再来，地下室的惊喜，手写的信件。让我们感觉在家里一样！

This cabin is stunning and an inspiring place to stay for anyone that loves exceptional craftsmanship and beautiful interior design. Everything was spotlessly clean. This is one of those rare airbnb experiences where you can tell the hosts truly love hospitality. We had a wonderful time and plan to return! Thank you so much for having us.

We would give it 10 stars if we could!!!!! Probably the best family vacation we ever took!! From beg to end we enjoyed every second. It was everything we dreamed of for an Airbnb. Game room. Hot tub, fire pits, fireplaces. Cozy beds, tons of board games, books and a reading nook. What a dream. We never wanted to leave. We will definitely be back!!

Beautiful home and a luxurious stay! A group of 8 friends visited for a weekend away from nyc and it was just what we needed to unwind and relax! Everyone slept so comfortably and spoke so highly of the whole house. The house and views were breathtaking. The upstairs library, wood-burning fireplace, hot tub, and full game room were the highlights. Josh provided us with so many local recommendations and was extremely responsive and welcoming, making us feel right at home! We loved our stay for a cozy winter getaway and would definitely return in the summer to experience the lake and surrounding nature spots!

We had an incredible few days my husband and our 2 kids and I had at Josh and Letizia's beautiful house. They really thought of everything - from the cozy blankets to the coffee bar - that made our stay so enjoyable. The craftmanship of the house is beyond amazing, the views are wow (even with the frozen, snow covered lake!) and we are still talking about the heated floors in the bathrooms, the hot tub and the fire place. Highly recommend!!
The house was amazing. The host thought of everything and more. The house didn’t disappoint in any way and the hosts were more than helpful. Would highly recommend.
这是一栋非常漂亮的房子！我和家人在这里渡过了非常开心的假期＾＾！房子用心的设计，干净的环境都让我们非常喜欢！我们会在夏天再次回到这里！因为门口有一片很漂亮的湖
Fantastic . Love this place . My second visit
Joshua’s place was beautiful would def visit again hot tub game room 10/10 thank you again

We had an absolutely amazing stay at this modern chalet. From the moment we arrived, everything exceeded our expectations. The home was spotless, beautifully designed, and incredibly comfortable. The modern furnishings, high-quality bedding, carpets, and thoughtful details throughout made it feel both luxurious and welcoming.
One of the first things that truly stood out was the personalized welcome—we were greeted with a custom-made card featuring a picture of the chalet, welcoming our family. That thoughtful touch immediately made us feel special and at home.
The jacuzzi was a highlight, and the indoor fireplace added such a cozy, magical touch—especially in the evenings. The house is filled with natural sunlight throughout the day, making every morning feel beautiful.
Our kids were absolutely thrilled. The basement and gym area were packed with entertainment, including multiple TVs, darts, board games, and so many games that kept them engaged the entire stay. Our four-year-old kep

Josh and Letizia built and curated a beautiful lake house with so much care and precision-  down to the last detail it’s almost too good to be true! We were a family of 5 and enjoyed every minute of our stay and would have stayed for longer if we could!  The rooms are beautiful, the convenience of the house and its amenities are top notch - we made dinners, lit the fireplace, played in the game room, enjoyed the outdoor snow, and slept super well.  I have been on Airbnb for over a decade and this is one those places you will never forget.  We will be back!

We had such a wonderful stay at this lake house! The home was spotless, beautifully maintained, and truly had everything we needed—from a fully stocked kitchen to thoughtful little details that made it feel like home. The setting was peaceful and perfect for relaxing by the lake.
What really made this stay exceptional were the hosts. They were incredibly kind, welcoming, and responsive, making sure we were comfortable from start to finish. You can tell they genuinely care about their guests.
We couldn’t have asked for a better experience and would absolutely stay here again. Highly recommend to anyone looking for a cozy, well-equipped cabin with amazing hosts!

This place was literally a gem.
Joshua and Letizia were super responsive and helpful in everything. Instructions were clear and concise, and their guide was super comprehensive. Whenever I had questions, they were very responsive I did not have to wait.
My goodness the house was so beautiful I cannot describe how nice it was with my words. The moment we stepped into the house our jaws dropped immediately. Super clean (which is our top priority when selecting where to stay), super nice, and everything in the house were operating perfectly. Literally everything was a highlight in this place.
We did not get to enjoy the neighborhood this time but there were many shops and restaurants nearby as well so if you need something you do not have to travel long to get them. Our next destination was New York City and it was less than two hours away which was great for our overall trip. We will definitely revisit. Highly highly highly recommend!. Thank you Joshua and Letizia!

My family and I had so much fun that no one wanted to leave and they are already planning the next visit!
There were games to keep adults and kids (6-15yo) entertained and the house is beautiful.
This was a terrific stay!! We were thrilled with Joshua’s personalization for our specific birthday. The cabin was cozy and a beautiful vibe. Incredible hosts! Will come again!
We had an amazing time at Joshua and Letizia's wonderful place. Everything was exactly as we had hoped, and we look forward to returning in the future. Thank you again!
A beautiful home with fantastic things to do even in the comfort of the living room. We couldn't believe how amazing of a time we had.

My stay at this A-frame cabin in West Milford was absolutely incredible. From the moment I arrived, the home had such a warm, detailed, and welcoming feel. You can tell the hosts put genuine care into every corner of the space — from the decor to the layout to the little touches that make it feel like a true home away from home.
The lake views alone are worth the visit. Waking up to that peaceful scenery every morning felt like hitting a reset button. Whether you’re enjoying a quiet cup of coffee or winding down in the evening, the view is something special.
What really stood out, though, was the host’s customer service. They were attentive, responsive, and genuinely kind — the type of hospitality that goes above and beyond. Any question I had was answered right away, and they made sure the stay was seamless from start to finish.
If you’re looking for a relaxing escape with comfort, charm, and hosts who truly care, this A-frame is the perfect spot. I’ll definitely be coming back.

We had a wonderful stay the place was perfect for a casual fall weekend. We could tell that the hosts wanted us to have a great stay providing us with so many details. The place was beautiful and everything was so clean! Everything was very easy to use and there were so many games and activities to do around the house. They even left us s’mores materials for the fire pit! Was truly the perfect weekend getaway! Can’t wait to go back!

I actually booked this place for a photo shoot for my real estate business . I chose the place based on the listing photos because it was so well design and furnished. When I actually arrived the attention to detail in the craftsmanship was some of the best I’ve ever seen. It’s a place I immediately felt at home at… and actually wished my own home was more like this one. No detail was spared. Super impressive property and I got some great photos.

We had an amazing time! My wife and I spent our honeymoon here for a quick getaway, and it was perfect. The home was very cozy, spotless, and exactly like the photos. The host were incredibly responsive and attentive throughout our stay, which made everything even better. Highly recommended! We hope to come back one day to enjoy the lake. 🌿✨

I loved my stay at paddle point . I went alone to get uninterrupted work done . Everything was perfect: it was beautifully decorated, comfortable bed and furniture, well equipped kitchen, great grill, and a view of the lake from almost every room on the first floor. I Even got to see sunrise right through the bedroom window .
I was able to sit and work both from the livingroom and the deck with uninterrupted views of the lake and trees . Although I was not expecting the house to be located in a neighborhood, once I settled into the house, I wasn't bothered by their presence .
And Joshua responded quickly to all my questions or need for assistance.
I'm going back in January and looking forward to it.

Had an amazing stay here with my boyfriend.  Perfect way to getaway from the noise of NYC without going too far. The home was absolutely beautiful as well. The owners were very responsive whenever we had a question or needed something. Can't recommend enough!

Beautiful cabin that was exactly what we were looking for. They had such great amenities that we didn't even get to take advantage of all of them. Fantastic family friendly stay! Would come back again and again!

My family and I loved our weekend here. The house was beautiful and we appreciated having the fenced-in yard for our dog. The entire place is super clean and everything seems brand new. We will definitely be staying again.

A beautiful, spacious place for 7 or 8 people.  Love that it is very close to the town of Skaneateles, but it felt like you were out in the country.  The house is so nicely laid out and simple but elegant.
Very nice home!

Debbie was very helpful, reaching out to make sure we were all set, and to check on things to ensure we were happy. The place is wonderful, close enough to Skaneatles to be convenient, but not so close as to be frenzied.
The house is beautiful! Easy entrance, well laid out, with convenient access to everything. The beds were large and comfortable, and the bathrooms were clean. The kitchen had everything we needed, and the fenced backyard was perfect for our dog. It let her run a little with no worries from us.
I recommend this Airbnb for anyone that is visiting Skaneatles, the Finger Lakes, or any close town. It gives you access to Auburn, Geneva, Ithaca and more. We did a self-driven winery tour and visited three wineries easily, and even threw in a stop at Montezuma National Wildlife Refuge.
Thanks, Debbie, for being a wonderful hostess.

The only negative thing I could say is I think it's weird that you have to take care of your garbage and take the sheets off the bed and put them in the laundry room but that may be a normal thing for Airbnb's. 💁‍♀️
We had a great stay at Debbie’s place. The house was beautiful and clean, and so close to town. Would definitely recommend staying here!
We had a wonderful stay for our wedding weekend at Debbie’s place! Highly recommend!
Great house / location and a professional and thorough host!

Our stay at this home in Skaneateles was absolutely perfect. The home is exceptional — great size, comfortable furniture and beds, well equipped and peaceful. Debbie is an outstanding host. Thanks for this opportunity. We will be sure to return.
Great location for Skinistlas area and a wedding at the Lodge, very clean and comfortable.

We spent a delightful month in Debbie’s beautiful house on Old Seneca turnpike, enjoying a lot of what Skaneateles has to offer. Lake views & cruise, shops, the Brewery, the Charlie Major nature trail, and especially the fabulous Community Center-offering an eight-lane pool/extensive gym/ice rink. Deb’s house is amazing, clean, large kitchen, and the ac ran flawlessly (it was definitely needed).  Debbie resolved a kitchen drain issue very quickly. The lawn was mowed neatly every week. The fenced-in portion of the back yard adds safety for small children (fence is not shown in photos).  Good convenient location- caveat: there is considerable noisy heavy-truck and car daytime traffic during our month of July stay (careful when making a left turn out the driveway). We truly enjoyed our long stay and highly recommend renting this property.

We felt safe and comfortable. The house was immaculate. The beds super comfortable. We loved everything about it! The home was so close to everything, yet private and peaceful. Communication was excellent and welcoming.
Would 100% stay there again!

The house was a perfect place to all gather! So close to downtown - Beds very comfy and the house provided all the comforts you will need. We would consider coming back for sure. Thank you Debbie
The Soule Family

All the comforts of home, the place was pretty and cozy-loved the fireplace that was so easy to use. Also appreciated the comfy bed and bedding, always an important aspect for me personally.
Debbie was so friendly and communicative, Helped me out immediately when I made a major mistake on the dates I reserved.
This was a seamless and enjoyable stay. Highly recommended!
Thanks, Debbie!

My family and I stayed a few day's at Debbie's house while we toured Syracuse University. Everyting was adveristed. House is beautiful, clean, and all was as advertised. She was very responsive and answered all my questions. Would definitely stay there again if we are ever in the area.
We were there for a girls get away and we loved it! Very comfy and clean! We loved it and felt right at home. It was 5 minutes to the Spa and to town.
The house was really nice.  Very comfortable and set up well.  Dealing with Debbie was a pleasure.  We would definitely stay there again ‘

We had a great time at this rental home. Our group of friends was able to come together in this space and prepare before attending a wedding. We loved having this space to enjoy each other’s company and reminisce on our college days. The house was conveniently located to the wedding venue, The Lodge, and was close enough to travel even with snow on the ground. It was the perfect space for our group and we are happy we were able to use it for the special occasion. I would recommend this house, and The Finger Lakes Luxury rental company. They were responsive, helpful, and knowledgeable about the area and their properties.
Beautiful place!
Felt extremely welcomed. Debbie was on top of everything throughout the whole process. We enjoyed our stay and can’t wait to return.

Quite possibly the best rental experience I’ve ever had: easy check in/out, super clean, every detail thought out, comfortable, functional and beautiful. My family spent a holiday here and it was perfect. Would stay again and highly recommend. Thank you, Debbie!

Debbie was great - easy to communicate with and answered all my questions.  We loved the house.  The bedroom with the two beds is right across the hall from the queen bedroom - perfect for our kiddos to come get us if they needed anything.  Kitchen is large and has lots of storage.  Any the entryway is very nice to hang up coats, set aside boots and gloves.  We will definitely be back  - thanks!
We enjoyed our stay here! The home was comfortable, warm, and spacious. Everything is exactly as advertised and looks just like the pictures. Would definitely stay here again!
Always a great stay at this property. Very likely to return in the future.
We enjoyed our stay.  The house was immaculate and was in a great location.  Debbie was very responsive.  We look forward to returning for a future stay.

We attended a wedding nearby and this place was lovely!! The fenced in yard was perfect for our pups and the house was spacious and well designed for our family of seven . Very convenient to shops and restaurants nearby which made our stay even more enjoyable!!
We thoroughly enjoyed our stay at Debbie’s! The place is so clean and decorated very tastefully- we felt right at home!

The place was excellent - super clean and accommodating. The house is beautiful and beds are comfy. We used the outdoor fire pit which was a nice addition.
Only wish is that it would have included some of what now feels standard at Airbnb/hotel stays i.e. coffee, shampoo, etc. (though it was clearly communicated these would not be included).
All in, I’d recommend Debbie’s as a wonderful space to stay.

This is a beautiful home recently renovated and nicely decorated. It was spotless and located only a mile from town. Debbie provided all the necessary details to ensure we had a great stay at her home well as recommendations.
We really enjoyed staying here. It was clean and close to things. we greatly appreciated the abundance of towels, blankets and pillows there was. we were very comfortable and had a great time.
Very nice home in a great location!

Here are some minor things we noticed.
Would have liked a rod to hang clothes in the bedroom with 2 beds,the clothes rack for 2 women worked
Would have liked on nightlight in the hall very dark for older women did not want to fall on the lip in the hallway going to bedrooms
Would have liked a hook to hang towels in the master bedroom
Fantastic stay. Debbie made it so easy for us and was very proactive about letting me know what to do for check in. Would highly recommend booking with her! Thank you Debbie!
We love staying at this Airbnb and have gone back to it several times. It is always clean and comfortable and is in a great location!

Debbie is the definition of a perfect host! My family and I cannot explain how beautiful her lovely home is. The decor, extra towels, responsive communication and just so much more! If you’re looking for a place to stay in the area - stay with Debbie!

Lovely home, very comfortable! Exactly what we were looking for!
Beautifully decorated and had everything we needed!
Debbie was very helpful in recommending restaurants and activities! Highly recommended!!!!!

The house was very nice and clean. TVs in each bedroom and above the fireplace in the living room. The location was close to the quaint little town, which has a lot of cute small town shops and restaurants along the lake. Great place for pictures.
A major plus was how organized and accommodating Debbie was for our trip. She was quick to respond and found a solution when our plans changed at the last minute. We would highly recommend Debbie at Finger Lakes Luxury Rentals.

This house was better even than the pictures and description. Place was immaculate, well-appointed, and Debbie was a friendly and responsive host! We had a great time visiting relatives over the holidays, and the house was a great place to chill and relax! Would definitely stay again!
Debbie has a beautiful and modern home that is only a short drive to Skaneateles.  Debbie is very responsive and was flexible in her communications.
Lovely house.  Very clean, comfortable and easy drive into Skaneateles.
What a gorgeous rental!  So spacious and beautifully renovated!  Fully equipped and so easy to drive into quaint Skaneateles.

Our family loved this place. Very clean and cozy. The kitchen was well stocked and contained beautiful appliances.  Our dogs enjoyed the fenced in yard.  My favorite spot was the swivel chair next to the gas fireplace…warm and toasty.

This is a stone’s throw from the village of Skaneatles but incredibly private and easy to get to/park! The beds were incredibly comfortable, the kitchen was spotless and beautiful and the layout was perfect for our family of 4. The fenced-in backyard was also a great asset for our dogs!
A beautiful home. Cozy, comfortable and Debbie was an awesome host. Would go again

My family of four stayed for an extended weekend. The home is identical to the photos but at the same time even better in person. Impeccably clean, super spacious, and still very cozy and comfortable. We could’ve never left and still would have been happy, but we did really appreciate the proximity to town. Everything you’d want to access is just right down the road. Debbie was lovely to communicate with, we’d absolutely recommend and looking forward to returning!
Debbie’s place was beautiful and advertised well. Perfect for 2 families coming to town for lake or holiday weekend!

We had a wonderful stay at this property. Everything was extremely clean, mattresses were comfy, and outdoor space was great for dogs. We loved the decor and layout. This house is super close to downtown, which was convenient.

Debbie was the best and most gracious host. Her property was amazing; exactly... actually better than the photos. It's in a great location near the town center and so spacious and private. The home layout and the decor are so welcoming and beautiful. We felt right at home. Debbie’s communication and check-in instructions were spot on, and she was very responsive. We so appreciate her and the property. We’ll be back very soon! Thanks again, Debbie!

This house was absolutely beautiful! It was so nicely decorated and so comfortable to stay at we didn’t want to leave. Debbie was a wonderful host, so accommodating to us when we had to cancel days due to delay in construction at our house. Would definitely recommend this house , it was like a little oasis, private wooded backyard that was perfect for our dog and us to all enjoy! Thank you Debbie for everything!

My husband, dog and I had a great weekend upstate at Debbie's. We booked last-minute (a few days prior) and Debbie was very helpful, able to accommodate us, and communicative prior to and throughout our stay. She was flexible on check-in time which we very much appreciated. The house was easy to find and centrally located (about a 5 min drive from town), clean and spacious. The kitchen was well-stocked, 2 full bathrooms so no waiting to shower, kind bed was very comfortable, and the yard was well-maintained. One note for others with dogs that the house is off a main road + no fence, so will need to keep an eye on your pup while he's outdoors to make sure he doesn't roam into the front on accident. We really enjoyed our time at the house and would stay here again.
Not only beautiful in itself, the house is located 15 minutes from everything you could need. The space was wonderful

Overall, a fantastic stay in a beautiful home! The location strikes the perfect balance of close to town for convenience, yet it feels like a peaceful mountain retreat. The house was spotless, very well maintained, and thoughtfully stocked with everything we needed.
We would absolutely stay here again. One thing to note: if you need reliable WiFi for work during your stay, the connection was very inconsistent and often froze, and cell service was limited. This made communication challenging for those of us who needed to stay in touch for work.
That said, the owner was very kind, responsive, and respectful of our privacy throughout our stay.

Jonathan’s place was absolutely beautiful. We were very close to high peaks, and hiked Van Hoevenberg and made the short trip to Marcy Dam.  After hiking we got to soak in the hot tub, and relax around the home.  Perfect to be close to Lake Placid and have some privacy.
Lovely stay

A great house in a great location!
Very private, yet also conveniently close to all of the major attractions Lake Placid has to offer. An easy 8 minute drive into town and about 15 minutes to Whiteface Mountain.
The house itself is very spacious and has plenty of sleeping arrangements. It is beautifully rustic and also offers updated kitchen and bathroom fixtures. The washer and dryer was also a bonus for our large group!
My family had a lovely stay here and would highly recommend Johnathan and his beautiful property to anyone looking for a place in the Lake Placid area.

We had an amazing stay at Jonathan's cabin! Tons of space for our family. Gorgeous views from the living room windows. Easy to get to town and easy to get to Whiteface mountain for some skiing. Would highly recommend this place! The cabin interior is also very impressive. We loved every aspect of our stay here and would definitely return.

Johnathan’s cabin is spectacular. Clean, easy to get to. Has all of the comforts of home. It is beautiful and has plenty of room for everyone. The hot tub was a bonus! Nice way to end the day. Great place!
A great stay, and our second time visiting. Only good things to say all around; cabin is comfortable and clean, locale is gorgeous, and the host is receptive and attentive. Can’t wait to come back!

This was our second stay at Jonathan’s cabin.  This stay was as perfect as the first!  The house is immaculately clean and meticulously maintained.  The home is spacious and cozy all at the same time. The views are incredible and Jonathan has thought of absolutely everything to make your stay as comfortable as possible!  Our family loved having dinners at the large table and enjoying the fireplace and beautiful Christmas tree.  We couldn’t have asked for a more wonderful place to get away with our family!  Thank you for everything and we can’t wait to come back!

Incredible adirondack getaway with 4 adults, 2
kids and 2 dogs! Johnathan’s log home is gorgeous, private and spotless. We didn’t want to leave! we are already thinking of booking this again for next year around this time!
Great time gorgeous place
Beautiful cabin, nestled on a mountain top gorgeous views excellent Host

Johnathan's home was beautiful and exactly as described/pictured. The home was very clean upon arrival. The location was perfect for access to hiking trails, shops, restaurants, and downtown Lake Placid. The area was peaceful and private. We would definitely stay at this property again.

The house and location was perfect for our group of six friends. Plenty of space inside and out. The property is very private and centrally located. Johnathan was very responsive to our questions before we arrived. There are several large grocery stores nearby so pack lightly. The house was extremely clean and tidy.
Inside: The kitchen is well appointed. We really didn’t need anything extra and we cooked 7 of our 8 dinners at the house! Plenty of bath towels, shampoo, soap, conditioner, etc. Nightlights included, too.
Outside: Afternoon fires in the fire pit were delightful. Johnathan provided firewood for inside and outside fires, along with a lighter. The grill worked well. We spent time on the deck reading and enjoying the views. Ok - a few naps out there, too.
Local activities: Plenty of bike riding paths, hiking, shops, restaurants and Olympic activities.
Our stay was wonderful and we’d stay again. You won’t be disappointed with this property.

johnathan was the best host we could have asked for. we got married here and his place was the most amazing venue we could have asked for. he took extra time cleaning the deck to make our day even more beautiful. we could not have asked for a more stunning house to stay at! i would stay here a thousand more times!

Beautiful views, immaculately clean and spacious home. The house feels very private but is also close to shops and restaurants. The hot tub was a hit for our group! Johnathan was responsive and easy to communicate with. He also provided local recs for us which was very helpful.

Our extended family had an amazing stay at Jonathan’s house. It was a beautiful house with plenty of bedrooms and bathrooms for all the guests. The kitchen was stocked with everything we needed to cook and bake a few times throughout our stay. In addition, there was ample seating for our group around the dining table. We thoroughly enjoyed all the amenities including ping pong, foosball table and the hot tub. Although the house itself was amazing, the deck with its views was by far the best part of the house. We enjoyed watching beautiful sunsets throughout our stay.
Jonathan was a great host who was very responsive. He provides very detailed instructions and it is clear from the setup of the house he has thought through what is needed to make a stay more comfortable. Would definitely stay again if in the area.

Beautiful home in a stunning setting with excellent proximity to ADK hiking trails. We stayed here with our two dogs and thoroughly enjoyed the home, which is so well laid out with thoughtful details. Perfectly sized bedrooms and bathrooms. The kitchen was great for nightly cooking with everything you need including a great grill outside. The hot tub was a welcome amenity after long days of hiking. We admired the view of the mountains from the huge deck/porch daily. Plenty of games and a nice sized rec room area for rainy days. Location was ideal for quick accessibility for hiking the high peaks with numerous trails within a short drive. Jonathan, the host, was incredibly helpful prior to arrival and available for any needs during the stay. We will absolutely book this home again when we return for more hiking.

Beautiful  and private mountain home! Clean, spacious for our family week in the ADK! Close to everything yet felt like you were in the middle of the forest! Comfy beds! Our family enjoyed the ping pong table and hot tub!

We stayed here with our big family—four kids, grandparents, and my husband and me—and absolutely loved it! The house is beautiful, spacious, and full of thoughtful design details. I even took pictures of the bathroom fixtures for inspiration!
The owner stayed one night but kept to himself—we never saw him, and it felt totally private. Only downside was checkout: it was tough getting everyone out by 10am... Unfortunately, the cleaning lady made us feel pretty uncomfortable. Even though we paid a cleaning fee, she was quite condescending in a very polite rude way.
Honestly, it’s starting to feel like Airbnb is getting stricter than hotels, where checkout is usually 11am.
I really hope Airbnb and hosts reconsider some of the rigid cleaning rules and early checkout times, especially when guests are already paying a significant cleaning fee.
Still, we had a great time and would definitely come back. The home itself is fantastic!

Our family of 6 had a perfect week at Jonathan’s home. It’s tucked away on a peaceful road just a quick drive from Lake Placid with incredible views of the Adirondacks from the living room.
The place easily fit all six of us across its four bedrooms without ever feeling cramped. We spent most mornings out on the porch watching birds and soaking in those mountain views. The kitchen came stocked with everything we needed, so cooking together was really easy.
Every part of the lodge felt comfy and welcoming, and we would highly recommend it to any group planning a trip to Lake Placid or Whiteface area.
The house is stunning - and exactly like the photos.  Every room was spotless.  Johnathan was very responsive.  We had a wonderful stay!

We have been coming to Lake Placid for 15 years and this was by far the best house we’ve ever stayed in. Jonathan has thought of everything. There was no amenity we thought was missing. The house was immaculate. The property is beautiful and spacious; we had no issue accommodating 7 adults. Next time we come back to Lake Placid we will definitely be reserving this house again.
Cet emplacement est une valeur sûr.  Tranquille et avec beaucoup d'espace. Je recommande fortement.  Tout était parfait.
The space was spacious, clean, warm, and inviting. Would absolutely stay here again!
House was beautiful!
Amazing place to stay with the family or friends! One of the most beautiful places I’ve stayed in my 100’s of visits to the ADK’s!!!
Lovely spot for our large group

We had an amazing stay at Johnathan’s beautiful log home for our hockey weekend! The house was spotless, with stunning views and cozy, comfortable beds—perfect for unwinding after long days at the rink. The space was well-stocked and thoughtfully designed, making it feel like a true home away from home. Johnathan was an excellent host—super responsive, helpful, and accommodating. We couldn’t have asked for a better experience and would absolutely stay here again. Highly recommend!
As described

We have booked many Airbnbs. But this is by far the best house. Beautiful view, amazing house. We loved the ping pong table, the hot tub. Sledding in the driveway. Whiteface Mountain was 15 minutes away. The host was very nice, he didn't bother us at all while we were there. The house is much nicer in person than in the pictures. The towel racks, the lamp covers, everything matched the house perfectly. We loved it, we will come back here!

Johnathan is a great host!! Very responsive and quick to help!!  He drove us in a raging storm back and forth to Lake Placid for dinner 2x.  House was great! Ample space!! Great views and cozy!!   The only concern is the driveway is pretty steep and 4-wheel drive is a necessity with snow.   Johnathan sanded and plowed the driveway each day to make it much easier!  Awesome time!  So much to do in the area!
Amazing home and location, Jonathan was very organized & communicative.  We had a blast and will be back!

Booked this cabin for a girls bachelorette weekend and it was spectacular! Looked exactly like the photos. Super spacious for a large group - we were 10. Everyone raved about how comfy the beds were.
The location is ideal - only a quick 10 minute drive to any activities or restaurants in the Lake Placid area.
Would definitely recommend and return!
5 stars

Johnathan’s house was like staying in a fairytale; super clean, all the furniture and fixtures were so on theme and well made, fireplace was cozy, hot tub was great on a cold cold night and kids sledded down the private drive with the provided sleds. Plenty of space for our group of 10, large kitchen and the table fit all of us easily! 10 minutes from Main Street, very convenient!

Communication was great, he set expectations upfront and gave us everything we needed to know without having to reach out for further questions. Since visiting in January, unfortunately the main sitting area was a bit chilly and you did  need to light the fireplace however the rooms were too warm for bed. Regardless we had a very relaxing time and enjoyed our stay.
beautiful place with stunning views. perfect for a whiteface ski trip

Johnathan's place is in an extremely beautiful and private  location, and yet not far from all that the area has to offer. The house was very clean and well appointed, and there was plenty of space for our family. The fireplace and the hot tub (very clean)  were fantastic! Definitely recommend!
Beautiful house with amazing views. House was clean and lots to do. Thank you to Jonathan for being a wonderful host.

Extraordinaire en famille pour découvrir la région
Photos fidèles, je recommande

We don't even know where to start! Jonathan's home is absolutely incredible and beautiful! We loved every minute of our stay and can't wait to be back. Every detail mattered and the pictures are amazing but once you are there it's truly breathtaking. You will want to reserve this place - you won't be disappointed. Thank you Jonathan for creating such an amazing home.
Beautiful place! Location and house itself. Johnathan was very responsive and helpful.
Great place!

River Road Games was outstanding and exceeded all of our expectations. This 4-bedroom log cabin home was comfortable, well-furnished and pristine. Seven of us stayed there for a week. There was plenty of space and gorgeous views of Whiteface Mountain from inside the cabin plus a large wrap-around patio.
When not doing touristy-things in Lake Placid and Wilmington, there was plenty for us to do in the cabin. We had a ping-pong tournament in the basement one evening. Another day, we grilled on the deck and had a birthday party for my 90-year old father. One evening, we had an outdoor fire and made S'mores. The kitchen was modern and well-equipped which was great for people like us who love to cook.
When we have grandkids in the future, we would like to come back. There is plenty of space in the basement bunkroom with games and things to keep kids busy. Thanks for everything, Johnathan.
We had an incredible experience. Amazing house and location.

Me and my family stayed here for the 4th of July and had a great time. The forest surroundings were beautiful and the house was exactly as listed. I would highly recommend staying here to anyone looking for a quiet getaway.

A lovely setting, minutes from town. Jonathan's instructions were clear and helpful. There was a curated list of activities to pursue in the area. The kitchen was well organized and easy to navigate. The living room is a wall of windows, framing a spectacular view of the mountains, and a great place for a family to gather.
Lake Placid is filled with activities to pursue, and Jonathan's home is great venue from which to access this wonderful area.

Absolutely beautiful home and location. There was tons of space inside and the home came with everything. We had such a great time. Drinks in the deck with the beautiful view was a highlight on our trip!

This truly amazing home is set in such a private location with breathtaking views! The layout of the home is fantastic and all of the well thought out detail is amazing! The home has numerous amenities and the homeowner provides several recommendations to utilize during your stay. We would highly recommend a stay at this home! Thanks Jonathan!
Joe and Katy
Great location central to our winter wedding event. Gorgeous, spotless home and gracious and responsive host. Second bedroom with twin beds.   En suite bathroom for each bedroom.

Outstanding property and exactly what my family was looking for in the area. The home is new and modern inside with everything you could need or want. After staying in multiple properties around the area I’ll be returning here without hesitation.

We loved our time over the holidays here! I grew up in Skaneateles and we sometimes need extra space while visiting family. The house was the perfect size for our family of four. The three season room would be amazing in the warmer months. We found the proximity to the village and other areas around town really convenient.

Definitely pick this place!  If you are staying near finger lakes, syracuse, skaneateles, or anywhere near, this is the perfect home. clean. has everything you need to stay many nights. awesome host. can’t recommend this one enough. search no more, this is it.

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
Absolutely perfect for our girls’ weekend! This airbnb was modern, spotless, and beautifully designed. Everything felt brand new and so comfortable — we couldn’t have asked for a better stay! Highly recommend!!

Christopher & Megan's place was fantastic - immaculately clean and somehow even better than the photos which were pretty spectacular to begun with. They left us thoughtful wlecome treats, the house had everything we could possibly need, and we particularly enjoyed the indoor fireplace and outdoor firepit for which they provided all we needed to get a great fire going. Communication with Chris was prompt and friendly, access to the house was easy and smooth, and check out instructions were clear and not onerous. We felt very comfortable and at home and will absolutely return for future stays. Highly recommend this property and these hosts!

Skaneateles is like a second home to me. Since we don't have our own place (yet), when we don't stay with friends we like to check out other properties on the lake. Chris's place did not disappoint & he is a wonderful host. The house felt private yet still walkable to the village. It was spacious while still being cozy, super clean with little personalized touches that made the stay more elevated than your average Airbnb. The bed was also super comfortable. And I REALLY appreciate that the checkout list was not exhaustive, nor did it feel like a chore (especially after a very late night at the Pub). Thanks to the second bedroom, this would be a perfect stay for a small family– or a small group of friends that don't mind a comfy twin bed. If you are looking for a great spot to stay in Skaneateles, you found one. Would not hesitate to book again!
This is the second time we have stayed here ... it feels like a home away from home.
The house was picture perfect and the amenities were superb. The location was great and the host was friendly and helpful. To date I would say it’s the best AB&B I’ve stayed in.
Beautiful home and location.

Christopher’s place was pristine, serene and extremely comfortable. It felt so inviting to step inside upon our arrival to have the beautiful lighting on with relaxing music playing, the AC at a perfect temperature and a bottle of local wine along side a thoughtful note! The home was amply stocked with everything one would need to relax and enjoy! The washer & dryer were an over the top bonus! So appreciated!

Great property in Skaneateles very close to the village. Chris was a great host and the house is lovely - well decorated, cozy, super clean and with a well appointed kitchen (lots of practical supplies for cooking at home!)
We love visiting Skaneateles, my husband grew up here, so it’s always like “coming home.”
Would definitely rent this property again for a future visit to a place we love.
We loved our stay. Thank you!
Five stars for this property. I had an amazing stay in July 2025. The property was clean and well stocked. The hosts were very attentive. I hope to stay in the property again in the future.
Chris is a great host and everything is great.  Place is better than described.
Chris was very helpful and responded quickly to our questions.  The house was beautifully decorated and very well maintained.  We will be coming back soon!

Our trip to Skaneateles was made even better by staying at Christopher's property.
He was very responsive and friendly. The home is perfection!
Everything was thought of from coffee to ample silverware to updated appliances and super comfortable beds. Loved the treats left for us after our very late arrival. The home is spotless. I'm a fairly picky traveler and will 100% be staying at this property again next time we are in the area.
Between the host, the property, the location...there isn't a better option in Skaneateles!!

Everything was EXCEPTIONAL. Even better than the pictures. The hosts know exactly how to host! I’ve stayed in many Airbnbs and this one was one of the best in terms of feeling clean and uncluttered. It was a perfect weekend for a graduation at Syracuse University. We will be back!

Chris was an AMAZING host and he has a beautiful home. From the moment we booked, he was responsive, offered up great local recommendations, and he made us feel extremely welcomed with fresh donuts waiting for us when we arrived. This home has the elegance of being modern and clean while also being cozy and having so much character! We visited in the winter and it was a perfect home to have a warm slow morning in after grabbing coffee close by at the local bakery. We will definitely be returning!

Fantastic house (and fantastic hosts!) in Skaneateles! Walkable to the Village and big enough for our family of five. The kitchen was well-stocked with pots, pans, utensils, plates (etc.). We very much enjoyed the gas fireplace. We stayed during the winter but the back yard looked awesome with plenty of space and a nice fire pit. (There's also a 3 season porch with doubles as a mudroom.) We will definitely stay with Chris again if we visit!
Clean, nicely located property. Good communication
Beautiful place to stay !

We stayed here during the week of Thanksgiving 2024.
The pictures and description are 100% accurate. Our hosts were very welcoming and responsive when we asked a question.
The fireplace in the living room was a very nice 😊.
We highly recommend this Airbnb.
Thank You Christopher and Megan for making us feel right at home.

As an airbnb host and as someone rents many properties I will tell you that this place is amazing. Our hosts went out of their way to make our stay special. Music was playing when we entered we were greeted by great donuts from a local bakery. The house was very clean and nicely furnished with everything that you need. It clearly felt just like home. A pack and play bed was all set up for our 17 month old we brought an extra mattress which did make it even better. The adult beds and pillows were very comfortable as well. The location of this property is ideal less than 1.5 miles from the center of town. I strongly recommend this property

This was our 3rd time we’ve stayed there and each time has been great. Chis and Megan are wonderful hosts and the place has been our gateway with our friends. Chris has given us everything we needed and made us feel at home. We are always looking forward to coming back. Thanks
This place is Cozy and beautiful. The hosts are so accommodating and wonderful.

We went for a low-key girls weekend and this place was amazing.
We were able to make our own meals a few days, because the kitchen setup was perfect and close enough to town to go out for a couple of great meals too.
The living room was spacious and had a nice fireplace which was great.
The space was beautifully decorated and bright.
Definitely on our lists of places to return in the future.

Best Airbnb we have ever stayed in! It was absolutely spotless, beautifully decorated and Chris the host went above and beyond to make sure we were comfortable and provided us with information about the area.

Chris & Megan and their place went above and beyond our expectations.  When we arrived we were greeted with a note, a bottle of wine and Skaneateles Bakery pastries (yum) from Chris & Megan.  Their place was  extremely clean & not one detail was missed.  The kitchen was a dream with all high end appliances.  The beds in each room were very comfortable with each having their own ensuite.  We really enjoyed our morning coffee on the enclosed back porch overlooking the fenced private back yard.  Its within a minutes ride to Skaneatles with tons to do there.  We wished we could have stayed longer but plan to return next time we’re in Skaneateles 💙👍.

Wonderful stay!  Beautiful home where every detail was considered!  We were visiting Syracuse university and it was an easy drive.  Great restaurants within a quick drive.  Wonderful and comfortable beds!  Great space!
Everything was fine ...

We had a great stay this past weekend. We were in town for a wedding, and it was nice to have a clean, bright place to spend some of our down time. We walked to town for lunch on Saturday and spent some time hanging out in the back yard in the evening. When we arrived there were doughnuts from the local bakery, and jazz music was going on the tv. We felt right at home. I would stay here again if the need ever arises. Thanks for being a great host!
Beautiful and comfortable home. Well appointed with everything we needed. Jazz music and donuts were waiting for us when we checked in. Absolutely pristine. Loved our stay and loved Skaneateles!
We had a wonderful stay.  Pristine cleanliness, wonderful amenities and supplies. Everything exceeded our expectations.  Highly recommend.

Chris was a great host, checking in before and during our stay to make sure we had everything we needed and to provide recommendations for places to visit.  The house is beautiful and was immaculate with everything you could need for a Skaneatles stay.  It was close to everything!

The whole place was squeaky clean!
The host was extremely hospitable and asked that we contact him should there be any issues.
If I could have rated everything above a 5, I would have.
Once known as a stress free zone, Skaneateles lived up to its reputation with the help of this host.
Highly recommend!

Best Airbnb we’ve ever stayed in. SUPER clean, new, everything works well. For a smaller cottage style house it feels very spacious — not to mention light and bright. Bedrooms have room darkening shades, uncommon but critical for napping kids. Hosts were communicative and responsive.   Provided a packnplay and set it up with sheets before we arrived. Backyard is fenced directly from house so our little kids could run freely. Not to mention complementary baked goods! The only possible drawback I’d mention is that it is a busy road that sees car and truck traffic throughout the night. They provide sound machines and didn’t really bother us, just something to be aware of. On the plus side it’s a very convenient location with easy access to everything.

Our family of 4 had an excellent stay at this cozy, beautifully designed and incredibly comfortable home. Every square inch of the space is beautifully designed, freshly painted, nicely decorated and incredibly comfortable. The hosts were friendly and responsive, the location is walkable (a long walk on a busy road, but definitely walkable) to town and the living room in particular was perfect for playing board games with the kids, watching movies, working (thanks to the VERY fast WiFi) and just relaxing. But my favorite was the fully enclosed back porch - it is bright, cool, comfortable and clean.
Thanks for a great stay!
I thought the place was beautiful I just did not like the location for the summertime.  I am sure it would’ve been fine for the other seasons.

Thanks Chris! We had a wonderful stay. The home was immaculate, comfortable and great instructions on how to use everything. Chris was very responsive to any questions we had. We wish we had time to use the firepit, but maybe next time!
Chris was a great host and the house was amazing.

We stayed there in February and really enjoyed it so we booked it again. We loved everything about the place and the host Chris was very accommodating. We now have a great place to meet up with our friends and have a wonderful time too just relax and enjoy our time together. It’s a great Airbnb and would be a getaway place for anyone interested in visiting that area. So  keep up the good work and we will be back.

Best air bnb I’ve stayed in. Extremely clean and comfortable and was truly the perfect place to stay at.
Chris was so extremely kind, generous, and responsive.
Anything you think you’ll need in the home, they have and they have thought of.
10/10 recommend (and I don’t say this lightly)

We have stayed in a few different rentals around the Skaneateles area and we all agreed this place tops our list! The host is friendly l, responsive and thoughtful. The pottery was spotless and full of amenities and we were walking distance to town center. We will absolutely be back for another lovely stay!

We enjoyed our time in Skaneateles.  The home was as represented.  A perfect set up for us on our trip.  Everything seems new and well kept.  The entire place was spotless, and the owners should be proud of how they keep their property.  Communication with them during our stay was quick and supportive.  Check in and check out easy and simple.  Thanks so much for sharing your space.  We couldn't have asked for more.

I was visiting my son at Syracuse and we wanted time off campus to relax. This place was perfect. We slept well and had all we needed. Town nearby was great for strolling and exploring. Despite lots of rain we really enjoyed our stay, mostly because this place was so cozy.

We could not have asked for a better place to stay for the long weekend. It was close to the village where we spent the majority of our time. The house was meticulous, and had all modern upgrades. The description and pictures were spot on. Christopher was a great host. He responded very quickly to my messages and provided great recommendations for our family. We would stay at this property again or any property that Christopher hosts.

The house was clean and very well put together. The location is great - a quick drive or walk into town. The hosts were very responsive and provided great information about local things to do. We appreciated the bakery treats upon arrival. Would definitely recommend to others and book again!

We heard that skaneateles was a beautiful place to visit so we thought we’d give it a try! I can honestly say that this Airbnb made a big impact on the pleasant experience we had. The pictures are 100% accurate. In fact, as soon as we walked in the first thing we mentioned was how clean it was. The decorations are adorable. It’s super close to restaurants and bars.  Megan and Chris were so welcoming and helpful with recommendations for our stay. Can’t wait to come back. 100% would book again. This is a prime spot. Thank you!!

Chris and Megan's home was absolutely wonderful. The decor and the cleanliness of the place was outstanding. Everything was so new and thought out. Anything we needed to enjoy a stay was readily available, both the necessary items and all of the unexpected extras as well. A nice touch was arriving to find a box of wonderful sweet delights from a local bakery. The welcome book was loaded with information to explore the area as well as information about the home.
Chris was always very responsive to our questions and requests. He went out of his way to set out the fire pit and get wood so that we could enjoy a fire during our winter stay. We really appreciated him going the extra mile. We look forward to staying again. Perfect location and place to enjoy a few days with our friends who drove up from PA to meet us.
Thank you Chris and Megan !
This is one of the loveliest properties we’ve stayed in. The property is meticulously cared for and so comfortable. We can’t wait to stay again!!

Beautiful, cozy, immaculate cottage with everything you could want for a relaxing getaway.  Scott and Margaret were gracious and responsive.  We so appreciated the fresh flowers and delicious treats.  We would love to return if we have the opportunity.

Scott and Margaret’s carriage house was a fantastic cozy little retreat! We stayed for 2 nights in late February to do a little wine tour on Seneca and Cayuga Lakes for my dad’s 65th birthday. We were located about 5min drive from Belhurst. (We originally intended to stay there but they didn’t have availability for what we needed.) This location was great and we were able to easily get to some favorites including Boundary Breaks and Watershed Brewing. We came back and had a cozy fire and watched some TV. The grounds were beautiful and my dad was able to take a peaceful morning stroll down to the lake. If we’d had been here in the summer, we would have loved to take advantage of the pool, kayaks, and other activities they have available. Overall, exactly as advertised and we greatly appreciated our gracious hosts. ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

Our stay at the Seneca Carriage House was absolutely perfect. From the moment we walked in, we felt completely at home. The space was warm, cozy, beautifully cared for, and thoughtfully designed, the kind of place that instantly helps you relax and settle in.
Scott and Margaret are truly exceptional hosts. They were welcoming, responsive, and made sure every detail was just right without ever being intrusive. You can tell how much care they put into creating a comfortable and inviting experience for their guests.
This was the perfect getaway, and we already can’t wait to return. Highly recommend to anyone looking for a peaceful, charming stay, you won’t be disappointed!
This is a beautiful place to stay. Thank you so much!!!
This place was wonderful. My wife and I really enjoyed our stay. The surrounding area was beautiful and the cottage was gorgeous! I would truly recommend staying here.

This cottage was the perfect place to stay while exploring the Finger Lakes. The property is gorgeous and we loved spending our evenings sitting by the lake. Having the fireplace in November was amazing. Margaret’s home had everything we could have wanted and we appreciated all the extra linens. Her home was super clean as well.   Margaret sent us a ton of recommendations before our trip so we could plan our winery stops before we arrived! If you have an opportunity to stay here you should!

The carriage house is up there with the best stays we have had. Welcoming, cozy and comfy, the space was exactly what we were hoping for. Aside from some rain dampening our outside back porch time (overlooking the lake), the location provided plenty to do. Wineries, hiking and food made for a wonderful weekend getaway for me and my wife. Thank you for sharing your place with us and thank you for the complementary wine, cheese, olives, etc.
Favyan and Michelle

The carriage house is unique and full of character while being totally updated and a great vibe! Kitchen is well-stocked, everything was immaculate and lots of small touches that are appreciated!  Beautiful, relaxing  choice to use as your home base and explore the FLX, we especially enjoyed nearby Keuka Lake, beautiful fall color, overlooks and vineyards!

Margaret and Scott’s cottage was one of the best Airbnb’s I’ve ever stayed at. The grounds were expansive and stunning, with direct access to the lake. The home itself was so cozy with everything thoughtfully put together. The location was perfect for access to Geneva and wineries around Lake Seneca. The indoor fire was a total hit and perfect vibes for Fall. Margaret was very communicative and provided wonderful local recommendations. She even had fresh flowers, wine, and a charcuterie board waiting for us when we arrived. 10/10 for a Fall girls trip, we’ll totally be back!

This cottage was everything and more! The cleanest Airbnb we have ever stayed in and decorated so charmingly! So many little touches that made it perfect. The views of the lake were so peaceful and the sunrises & sunsets were breathtaking. Margaret had wonderful recommendations for us since this was a last minute trip and we couldn’t be more thankful the weather was perfect to enjoy it all! It made for the best anniversary weekend! We will be back!

Always a great stay at Seneca Carriage House.  This is our 5th consecutive annual stay, and there’s an obvious reason that we keep coming back!  The property is lovely, the accommodations are exactly as described and Scott & Margaret have equipped their carriage home with everything you could possibly need, right down to biscotti for your late night cravings!  They’re extremely responsive, and they maintain the property very well.  Be sure to take the time to walk down to the dock to sit on one of the Adirondack chairs with a good book, glass of wine or both!  After dinner, enjoy some time on the back deck sitting around the fire table.  It’s a lovely place with wonderful hosts!

We have stayed at over 30 air bnbs in the last ten years and Scott and Margaret’s place was easily one of our top favorites. The carriage house was beautifully done and has a cozy atmosphere to it. We loved the amenities that were offered- including the pool and kayaks. Their place is located near breweries, wineries, and is also close to town. Our favorite part of the stay was the gorgeous views of the lake. Highly recommend staying here and Scott and Margaret were also such lovely and welcoming hosts. We can’t wait to go back again!

Scott and Margaret’s home was even more beautiful than the photos (and the photos are already great!). This was truly one of our favorite Airbnbs we’ve ever stayed at—from the house itself, to the gorgeous property, to the wonderful hosts. They thought of everything, from greeting us with fresh flowers, chilled wine, and a charcuterie board, to making sure the house was stocked with everything we needed. It was perfect for our family of three—comfortable, well-equipped for cooking, and the ideal place to relax. We loved the pool (so nice that it was open late in the season), the stunning view of Lake Seneca, and enjoying meals on the porch. Scott and Margaret’s thoughtful local recommendations made our trip even better. We can’t say enough great things about our stay and truly hope to return—if you’re visiting the Finger Lakes, this is the place to book!

The carriage house exceeded our expectations. This was our first time renting through Airbnb and it set the bar so high. The house was beautiful inside and out with the most serene views of the lake. We can’t wait to return in the future.

Scott and Margaret’s home is cozy, well equipped and super clean. Views of the lake are breathtaking. We enjoyed hanging out in the pool and also the wine and snacks that were gifted. We enjoyed visiting places recommended by our hosts. We will definitely return.

We loved Scott and Margaret’s place on Seneca lake! We had a fantastic long weekend getaway and would love to come back soon! We enjoyed the lake front view and enjoyed using the pool and  dock to fish and kayak. The home was very cozy and welcoming and met all of our needs. We were lucky enough to meet Scott and Margaret and loved chatting with them about their beautiful property and the things to do in Geneva! We highly recommend staying at Scott and Margaret’s place as we as well will be returning one day!! Thank you for a fantastic trip!
Scott and Margaret are one of, if not the best hosts I have ever come across on air bnb. 10/10 you want to stay here. I will be back!!!

Wonderful stay! The carriage house and gorgeous property is as described and much more. Margaret and Scott have clearly put thought into this Airbnb, making it one of the experiences I have had. We appreciated the welcome wine and charcuterie after a long drive. I enjoyed my morning coffee while watching the sun rise over the lake and deer graze in the yard.  If you book this property, have fun exploring the area but make sure to spend time enjoying the carriage house. I will return for sure!
We had a great stay! Thanks for everything!
Amazing house and one of our best stays at all!

We had a wonderful week in the Carriage House! Scott and Margaret were great hosts and very responsive. The Carriage House has all the amenities you need in a perfect location to many wineries and restaurants. Having access to the pool and kayaks is an extra bonus! We look forward to a return visit!
The home and property were incredible. The instructions and clear communication was superb LOVED our stay !

The carriage house was in the perfect location for our vacation to Geneva and the Finger Lakes.  We loved sitting out back in the morning with a cup of coffee and watching the deer and other animals in the peaceful surroundings.  Scott and Margaret were an absolute pleasure to deal with - friendly,  responsive and even went the extra mile offering recommendations to local restaurants and hidden gems.  I highly recommend staying here.

Scott and Margaret were wonderful hosts who genuinely wanted us to feel comfortable! Their carriage house was perfect for our girls trip. The sleeping accommodations (beds, couches, chairs) were so cozy, it had a beautiful and spacious bathroom and a well designed kitchen. The outdoors were also picture perfect- we spent a whole day on their dock, enjoying the lake and their kayaks. We would highly recommend and have already talked about going back!

There isn't one negative thing I can say about this place. It's was perfect, the location, setup, amenities and most importantly the hosts..all top notch. Thanks To Scott and Margaret for enhancing what was a very special and important trip for us.
Scott and Margaret couldn’t have been better hosts!  The cottage was so cozy and comfortable…. We felt “at home” immediately.

This is a magical place! The Carriage house is a hidden gem full of beauty and serenity overlooking Seneca Lake. The Carriage House is thoughtfully designed making you feel right at home. The Carriage House is full of fun and activities creating memories that will last a lifetime. The Carriage house is perfect for a couple(s) or family with kids. The Carriage House is perfectly located on the west side of Seneca Lake between Geneva-on-the-Lake and Belhurst Castle. Close proximity to William & Mary College, downtown Geneva, FLX wine trail, and Watkins Glen. Scott was an incredible host! Scott was very responsive and communicated clearly to any of our needs. Scott provided outstanding hospitality and even surprised us with wine, snacks, and a charcuterie board from local establishments in the area. If you are planning to stay in the FLX area, I highly recommend Scott place. You will not be disappointed. I will definitely stay here again in the future.

We had a wonderful stay at the Carriage House. Our hosts were welcoming, we enjoyed the charcuterie board, wine and gorgeous flowers. The carriage house itself had been thoughtfully designed. Every detail had been attended to. Beautiful location with a view of Seneca Lake. Scott and Margaret provided information about the carriage house and local recommendations. Cheers to our hosts!

We always enjoy our stay at this lovely accommodation. It’s comfortable, the cottage surroundings are beautiful, and Margaret goes out of her way to make sure that you have an excellent stay! We look forward to returning again in the near future!

We stayed for a weekend and it was perfect. The place was beautiful and location to match.
Fantastic attention to detail made the whole experience that much better.
Can’t wait to come back.

A perfect place to stay. Close enough to all of the things to do but away enough that you can avoid it if you choose to. Gorgeous interior and very comfortable. We cooked and had absolutely everything we could have wanted. We can’t wait to come back in the summer.
Amazing place to stay. Very close to many things.
Beautiful cottage with wonderful views of the lake.

Easy 5 stars
If the carriage house is available when we plan our visit we will book it every time. Everything about this place is high end and the hosts are the best we have ever dealt with through Airbnb.

We absolutely loved our stay and can’t wait to return!  Very clean, comfortable, cozy and just perfect for us! We appreciated the quiet at nighttime and the beautiful surroundings and wildlife. Felt right at home. Thank you Scott and Margaret!
A beautiful, quiet and peaceful location! Scott and Margaret were terrific hosts! Lots to do and see in the area and beyond!

Our stay was outstanding, the host had thought of everything, and went above and beyond with little extras to make the weekend memorable. The place is beautiful and the lake is breathtaking at sunrise. Thank you very much.

Amazing accommodation.  Clean, organized, had everything you could need for a comfortable stay.  The hosts are awesome, wine and cheese upon arrival and extremely responsive.  Lake view and access which was so peaceful and an added bonus to our trip.  Scott and Margaret were so kind to set up the kayaks for us, but unfortunately we didn't get to utilize them as we underestimated our time schedule.  Would absolutely stay here again.

We had a wonderful three night stay. There was absolutely nothing that could have made this time more enjoyable, from the wine, to the deer sightings both morning and night, to the early sunrises, and peaceful surroundings. We only wished we had planned to stay longer!

Such a cute cottage within walking distance to Hobart William Smith.  It was perfect for us when visiting our son.  Really pretty spot with a great view of the water.  Kitchen was well stocked which was perfect as my freshman son wanted a home cooked meal.  We hope to be back

We had a great stay! Absolutely gorgeous spot and Scott and Margaret thought of everything! From fresh flowers in the house, to welcome snacks and local wine/juice, to awesome recommendations, it was the perfect spot to get away for a relaxing baby moon! The house is beautifully decorated and super comfortable! We had the best time!
Thanks so much Scott and Margaret!

Scott and Margaret’s cottage was so cozy and perfect for our fall trip to FLX! The hosts live on site and are available for any questions/help. We spent more time at the home than we intended just because we loved it so much! Will 100% be staying again.

What a wonderful place. I have stayed at a number of airbnbs in the area and this one TOPS them all. Communication from the start was superb. Very responsive during our stay and after.
What wonderful touches. Fresh flowers upon arrival. Wine and cheese in the refrigerator. Plenty of towels and linens. I
Familiar with the area but their recommendations were spot on!
I highly recommend this Airbnb!

This was our 4th stay at Seneca Lake Carriage House, and there's a reason that we return every year!  The property is spotless, well-appointed and has everything you could ever possibly need to enjoy your time.  Margaret and Scott were responsive prior to our arrival, updating us on new wineries and restaurant recommendations.  Check-in and check-out is an extremely easy process.  The home is ready before it's supposed to be, and I can assure you that you'll need nothing that's not already there.  The lakefront property is yours to enjoy, and we took advantage of the Adirondack chairs sitting lakeside during the day, as well as the fire table on the rear deck in the evening.  No need to look elsewhere if you're looking for the perfect spot for your small group to get away... You've found your home in Geneva!

We had a wonderful time at Scott and Margaret's carriage house!  We travel to the Finger Lakes often and have never stayed in a more beautiful location. The views of the lake were amazing, as was the interior of the carriage house. They provided lots of great recommendations for restaurants in the area and were super responsive. We'd love to come back.
Amazing home and generous hosts. Stunning views and sweet touches to honor your visit. Will definitely stay here again.
Absolutely beautiful! The accommodations were wonderful and Margaret and Scott were great! Perfect spot for a relaxing vacation on Seneca Lake!

I cannot say enough about this place. The house is beautiful and cozy. Margaret and Scott have everything you can possibly think of covered. The location on the lake is absolutely perfect. We enjoyed reading on the dock and chatting by the gas fire pit at night. We are so incredibly happy with our stay and will be back within a doubt.

A beautiful Airbnb.  Loved everything about it… the inside was pretty, comfortable, well maintain and fun.  Loved the pool, outside seating by the house and by the lake!  We arrived to a bottle of wine and charcuterie board!  Perfect!

Peaceful, relaxing, and scenic. Cozy, clean and modern interior, amazing view looking down on the lake, and great view of the lake from the hot tub and deck. Great location, close to Penn Yann, and midway between Watkins Glen and Geneva. Great access to wineries and breweries along the lake.

We loved our stay at Seneca Lake Cottage. Monica is the perfect host, really friendly, warm, welcoming and extremely helpful and responsive. The house is in a great location for exploring the area and set on a beautiful lake. It may be on the small side but it fit our family of four easily plus
It is beautifully presented, clean and cosy. The kids loved the hot tub, if only we’d have been there in the summer to enjoy the lake a little more but even still, we had the best stay in the chilly spring and wouldn’t hesitate booking again.
This was a perfect spot for a girls getaway!

My wife and I stayed here for our honeymoon, and it was a great experience! The house is conveniently located within 10 minutes of coffee shops, grocery stores, and restaurants, with several wineries just minutes away as well.
Monica was extremely responsive and helpful with any questions we had, which made our stay even more enjoyable. The home itself was in beautiful condition, very clean, and well maintained. The hot tub was a fantastic bonus and made for a perfect way to relax.
The beds were very comfortable, and the kitchen was fully stocked with everything we needed. Overall, we couldn’t have asked for a better place to stay and would absolutely recommend it to anyone looking for a relaxing getaway.
We had a fabulous and relaxing stay. Perfect for the four of us with beautiful views, lots of privacy and great amenities. We can’t wait to come back!

We had such a lovely stay at The Buttonwood. The views were truly incredible and the proximity to wineries and town made this the perfect place for our girls trip! Meg and Glenn were great hosts, we would totally visit again!
It was as at a perfect location.  Home was cozy.  I haven’t been up there for a few years but there were many wineries close by and not a bad ride to Watkins Glenn.
Location was perfect, close to wineries, and Watkins Glenn. The house had beautiful views of Lake Seneca.
Awesome

The house is in a beautiful location with a view of Seneca Lake from all different locations in the house. The dock was very peaceful. There are kayaks available for your use. I've never stayed at a house that was so well stocked with all the things you need for cooking. It was great. Meg was very responsive and helpful with any questions we had.
We went with 2 other couples, wine tasting then back to hang out on the porch and by the water. It was a wonderful time!
Meg and Glenn's home is flawlessly beautiful, clean, and comfortable. Meg is a super responsive and communicative host. Overall, had an amazing stay! Thanks so much!
Beautiful home. Very clean and tasteful decor. Had everything we needed.  Great location. One of the best places I've stayed on Seneca.
Our stay in Dundee was amazing. We loved the location as it was close to wineries, Watkins Glen, and the Finger Lakes. Meg and Glenn were responsive and the place was beautiful!

Very clean, comfortable and thoughtfully appointed home with beautiful views of Seneca Lake from the house and spacious deck. Steep but  manageable walk to lovely piece of shoreline with private dock. The swimming and kayaking (rented) was amazing! This home is convenient to restaurants, wineries, pontoon rental and more.

Meg and Glenn were great hosts, responsive and caring for their guests.
The area is very secluded and quiet. The house is well taken care of and clean, also stocked with everything you might need and more.
We had planned a lot to do, have actually visited more and had a great vacation.
Try Crossing diner, they cook really good and have great prices. Also, the closest spot for eating out
Thank you Meg and Glenn, we appreciate your hospitality and made great memories 😇
