We brought our family up to Seneca Lake for the Fourth of July week to get away to just relax. The house was perfect and a perfect location. Close to so many wineries and breweries in Watkins Glen was only right down the road. Seneca Lake was Crystal clear and very refreshing. The dock is huge and can support all sorts of. Summertime activities. We didn’t have to go anywhere to see Fourth of July fireworks because they were all around the lake. My kids went and watched fireworks from the dock, and the rest of us watched from the deck or the living room. We climbed Watkins Glen, visited local restaurants on the water and made a lot of meals at the  house on the grill. A very relaxing week, thank you!

Beautiful place with amazing views of Seneca Lake! We really enjoyed our time at Meg's place. Meg was super responsive and very accommodating. The house is beautiful (just like pictures) and in perfect location.

The house is beautiful and comfortable and there are several nice restaurants and wineries nearby. It’s just a short drive to Watkins Glen.
We love the serene view of the lake from the deck and the peace and quiet of the property.

Lovely house right on Lake Seneca and close to many wineries…host was wonderful and offered many recommendations for the area. There was plenty of space to hang out in different areas. Only thing to be aware of is there is only one shower so if you have a larger group, it’s a bit of a challenge to all get showered and ready to go quickly. Also the upstairs space where there are two of the three bedrooms passes right over the living area so there is no real privacy or quiet up there. Altho the bedrooms up there are beautifully decorated. Again, with kids it’s no big deal but if you have multiple couples or adults staying it is something to note. Overall it was beautiful and well appointed!  We had a wonderful time enjoying time with our family!
Most amazing trio ever. Perfect place everything you need to enjoy the lake. Couldn’t have had a better experience thanks to them both!
We absolutely loved the place, it was amazing

Meg's house is maintained in a pristine manner. Everything was clean, organized and the entry process was very easy
The view from the house is beautiful, as well the yard very well taken care of.
Highly recommended place to stay for a weekend or longer.
Place was very nice and where you can relax and enjoy time with your family. Meg was very friendly and responsive.

We had a great time staying at The Buttonwood! Absolutely gorgeous views and the dock was perfect for watching the sunrise over the lake. Our girls trip was amazing with all of the wineries nearby and hiking in Watkins Glen. The home itself was lovely with plenty of natural light and cozy sleeping areas. Would definitely visit again next time we come to the area, which is an absolutely must! The fall was beautiful but now we need to check it out in the summer!! Thanks so much for hosting us!!

We had a fantastic time at this beautiful Airbnb. The view was stunning and there was so much to do in the area. The host was very responsive, flexible, and went above and beyond to make accommodations that made our trip easier and even more fun! I would love to return here in the future!
Great location and nice views, only comment would be the upstairs bedrooms there isn’t much privacy and the one bedroom let in a lot of light in the morning. But the location is perfect!

Absolutely beautiful and convenient place to stay in the finger lakes! Property was spotless and had everything we needed. Only thing to note is the path to the water is indeed very steep (which IS mentioned in the listing!) but was even difficult for a bunch of 20-30 year olds after some wine! However the views made up for everything and the Meg was extremely responsive and helpful! Would definitely stay again :)

We loved this Airbnb from the incredible host hospitality to the perfect location and being fully equipped with everything you could ever need. We truly had a magical time at Buttonwood. The game room was perfect for entertaining kids. From the deck, we could watch the resident groundhog eating berries and 24 different species of birds fly around. The proximity to the lake and having our own dock was awesome too. Kids had an amazing time driving about 15 min to Anchor Inn and Marina where we rented a boat which came with a free tube attached. We also hiked Watkins Glen's gorge trail and ate a flight of ice cream at Shtayburn farm. A perfect family vacation! Thanks so much for your hospitality!

Meg’s place is as beautiful in reality as it seems in pictures. It is calm and so peaceful! The place is perfect for frienfs or family that are comfortable with each other because the top floor as opens up to the first. We didn’t mind at all, and had loads if fun as a group!

Meg's place was pristine probably the cleanest and nicest appointed we have been to. She was a very good host also. Our only disappointment was the water access and steep incline to walk back even after driving our car to the parking area, making you think twice on picking up your pole and fishing. The shoreline didn't have an area for my grandchildren to enjoy playing in.  However, we made the best of it and went to the Watkins Glen beach park where they had a beach and spray park for the little ones. Again, overall the cottage itself excellent and a 5 star, what a view!
Beautiful area to be experienced in any season. We will certainly be back
Fabulous place to stay! Would stay again

Amazing and private property with great hosts. I've stayed in probably 100+ airbnbs and never had one so well stocked with things that you might need. genuinely everything you could need in the kitchen (inc. a meat thermometer for grilling - what an awesome and thoughtful addition!), insect repellent, plenty of paper towels, bin bags and plastic wrap. sounds odd to call that out but having things well stocked and in good condition is so rare in other places - it's indicative of how well thought out the place is.

This Seneca Lake home is beautiful! It is clean and well stocked with anything you may need during your stay. The dock is perfect for swimming and kayaking! Above all, Glenn and Meg are gracious and hospitable!!

We loved our 5 day vacation at Buttonwood!  The view was amazing and the house was great.  Meg and Glenn were really quick to get back to us with answers to our questions and the house had all that we needed.  What a beautiful spot on the Finger Lakes.  Thanks, Meg and Glenn, for sharing your home with us:)

Meg and Glenn had such a beautiful place that was perfect for our long weekend stay! They were super responsive and accommodating with an early check in and great recommendations. The view from the deck was amazing and it was so relaxing. Would absolutely stay again!

My friends and I had such a great time! The house was absolutely beautiful and we loved being able to walk down to the dock! Meg had awesome recommendations and answered all of my questions! We will definitely be staying again!

It was the perfect spot to relax with family and take in the view!  The home was well appointed and close to Watkins Glen.  We will miss sitting down on the dock taking in the stillness-pure tranquility!!!  Thanks for sharing your beautiful home Meg and Glenn!!!
Greatly enjoyed our stay. Was a quiet and nice location with great view of the lake!
Very nice home. Thank you for the wine!

Meg was great host. She was very accommodating with our groups need, and extremely communicative.
It was a bit tight for sleeping space with our group, but everything was exactly as described in the listing.
We enjoyed the game room, peaceful and private space, and the clear instructions.

We had a wonderful stay at The Buttonwood! Meg and Glenn's home was clean, cozy, and bathed in gorgeous natural light. The house had everything we needed and more, and we would love to come back in warmer weather to fully enjoy the dock and outdoor spaces. This rental is ideal for groups that are comfortable around each other and keep similar hours, as the upstairs bedrooms are open to the rest of the house and the downstairs bedroom contains the only indoor access point for the basement game room. Our group of six friends loved the space and would definitely recommend it!

We stayed here for a girls trip weekend and it was absolutely perfect! We couldn't have asked for a better host or a better experience! The house was perfect, the views were amazing, it truly made for a wonderful weekend! Will definitely remember this place for next year when booking our next trip!!

Wow what a find! We had a girls' weekend here and we were absolutely thrilled with the house and the property! What a view of the lake. We kept wishing the weather was warmer so we could really enjoy the large deck and all the lovely comfy looking furniture out there . And we had so much fun walking down to the dock and sitting on the Adirondack chairs with a glass of wine all bundled up. The living room was nice and cozy and the TV worked great to stream movies.
Meg was really responsive, so helpful, never had to wait long for an answer!
Even though it rained and the leaves didn't change as much as we were hoping this season, we still had a wonderful time in the area. We did a wine tour with Crush tours, the South Seneca Lake wine tour which was fantastic. We also drove out to Letchworth State Park, like a small Grand Canyon on the east coast! Worth the hour and a half drive. And of course Watkins Glen Park was amazing as well, with great restaurants in that town! And close!
We loved staying at this location, my far the best rental we’ve stayed in. Very clean and tastefully decorated. Everything we needed was available for our stay and our host was very responsive.

This place is phenomenal.  Upon arrival the first thing that stood out was how clean and cozy the house is. It was clear this property was cared for as a home, not just a rental airbb. The view of the lake and scenery from the wrap around deck is amazing.  Any standard household item that may be needed was on site. The host is very responsive, replied to any questions within 5 minutes, and was kind enough to allow us to have the groomsmen over to get dressed and prepare for a wedding we had at night. It was a fantastic weekend and i look forward to enjoying this property during summer months to take advantage of the deck and outdoor areas. 5 stars all the way around.

We had wonderful stay in this beautiful property, our hosts were very gracious and responsive and made the entire stay very comfortable.
Would love to come back and stay here in future again.

We rented Meg’s place to celebrate our daughter’s 21st birthday with her 3 friends. It had everything we could possibly need! It was also immaculately clean. It gave us a place to just relax and enjoy food together and it was the perfect location for popular wineries. Well worth the money! Highly recommended!
We had a great time. The walk to and from the lake was pretty. Kitchen was well equipped.
Beautiful lakefront views and super easy to find and get to! The home had everything we needed and was clean. We loved it here!

Meg’s home far exceeded our expectations . We felt at home from the time we walked in . The views are amazing , the lake just beautiful . Her home had everything we needed and was spotless . Loved sitting on the deck enjoying our coffee in the morning and wine in the evening . We loved how close we were to the wineries and had great fun exploring them . We cannot wait to book again . Thank you Meg for sharing your beautiful lake house with us !!
Mary

Meg did a fabulous job for our stay
Everything in the home is well planned, clean and new. Easy access to the water and close to a lot of wineries. While there were some cheaper accommodations this home is well worth it. You get what you pay for and this home was everything we had hoped for!

Megs place was amazing!! I highly recommend it. It was beautiful and peaceful and they really thought of everything. The house was fully stocked with anything that you can imagine and anything you might need. The lake was stunning and the house was well worth it just for that. We can’t wait to go back!
We had a lovely stay. The place was bright and airy. Beautiful view of the hillside and lake. Our family enjoyed our stay.
My family really enjoyed our stay here. The home was clean and right on the water. Hosts were friendly and responsive.

This was the perfect house for a weekend girls trip! It’s so close to Watkins Glen state park, plenty of wineries, and so much to see! We loved the peace of being by the water, and had so much fun with the hot tub and fire table. We’ll be back!
An amazing place to stay with beautiful views, quiet neighbors, great accommodations, and easy check in and out. Worth far more than we paid!

Not cheap, but worth every penny. As silly as it sounds, having the water dispenser was such a huge bonus! The view was amazing, the location was very quiet, and it was a very comfortable stay. The steps down from the road are a little wonky, and carrying the bags up and down was not super easy, but we had zero complaints otherwise.

This was our second stay here. The house is beautiful with all the needed amenities.  The outdoor deck is lovely with lots of comfortable seating. The host is very responsive. I would highly recommend if you are looking for a peaceful lakefront retreat.

Great location , beautiful
House

Garrett and his brothers were very responsive and helpful.  Place and location is beautiful.  All the amenities you need and more.  Outside is wonderful with everything you can think of to enjoy the lake.

Our first trip to Keuka Lake and this house is in a great spot on the lake.  The deck is wonderful and the views are fantastic.  Equally distant to the towns of Hammondsport and Pen Yan and very close to some outstanding wineries.  Our family had a great stay and we hope to come back someday!

This was one of the most relaxing vacations we have ever taken with our family. The dock is perfect and the water is pristine.  The house was clean and the linens were crisp. We would 100% stay at this house again in the future.

The cottage was lovely, clean, and cozy. It was well equipped with everything you'd need in terms of kitchen utensils and shower supplies.
The only thing I would mention that I didn't see in the listing or any other reviews is that while the cottage is one level (except for the few stairs on the dock), there are about 25-30 steps from the street level to even get to the house. Once you park, (across the street from the mailbox- this was also a little unclear at first, but Garrett was quick to answer questions) you will have to walk down those steps to get inside the house. It wasn't a problem for us, but if someone has mobility troubles, it's important to know before you go.

The from the house was wonderful. Everything inside was clean and it was a very nice house to spend the weekend. There was one maintenance issue that was handled really before there was an issue. Everything was communicated clearly and handled very professionally. We really enjoyed our girls trip weekend here and would highly recommend this house to others.

Great cozy cottage on the Keuka Lake. Garrett was a great host and the house was very comfortable for my family of 4. Got to enjoy taking our paddle board on the lake, sit by the fire pit during sunset and enjoy the hot tub after a cold rainy hike at Watkins Glen gorge.

Beautiful place to stay. Super clear lake water and great fall colorful view.
Will definitely stay there again.
Perfect spot for a girls weekend!  Peaceful and adorable home on a beautiful scenic lake, centrally-located to the wineries and restaurants around Keuka Lake. Thanks for hosting us!
what an awesome place, would highly recommend. Thank you for the bottle of wine..you guys are the best!!
Great stay, beautiful place and location

Such a perfect lake house experience.  We all had the best time.  Played on the lake all-day long, relaxed on the dock at night and slept like babies.  Then woke-up and did it all again.  Highly recommend.  You won’t regret it!

Beautiful house right on the lake. The dock is an awesome hang out space and the entire area is super peaceful and quiet. The house looks just like the pictures and is super well equipped for any stay.

Garrett’s cottage was the perfect spot for our Keuka getaway. The outdoor space is spectacular; quiet location on the lake; clean, comfortable and very thoughtful amenities/details throughout. Very hard to say goodbye this morning!

This is the second time my husband and I have stayed here and it won't be the last! we come to the finger lakes every year on my birthday and this is our very favorite place to stay! the covered deck is everything. It doesn't matter if it rains, it's covered. It doesn't matter if it's cold, there's a fire. There's an outdoor TV and grill. The outdoor furniture is so comfortable we even took naps outside. When we stay here, we are on the deck from the minute we wake until we go to sleep for the night. This year we didn't even visit any wineries because we didn't want to miss a second of our time on the lake.

Perfect spot for any couple to unwind. We had an amazing time in this cozy, clean and updated cottage. The views are incredible and you can’t stop staring at them. We felt very welcome with the hosts leaving us wine, fresh flowers and eclipse glasses. We hiked and explored during the day and it was nice to come home to a relaxing hot tub. This place forces you to relax. Even the water lures you to sleep. Would highly recommend and would like to come back in the summer to swim as the water is so clear. So peaceful and quiet; it was just what we needed. Hosts were also very responsive as we accidentally locked ourselves out and they sent someone right away.

Nice little cottage on the water. The only part that was a little disappointing was that the hot tub that was supposed to be on the dock with a TV was actually back near the house and no TV. It was still nice.

This waterfront home is outstanding, especially if you are interested in access to the Lake.  Garrett has thought of everything.  The house was spotless, filled with high quality amenities, and beautiful.  Even though our weather was less than wonderful, we enjoyed being in the house.  The kitchen had everything we could need, including a welcoming bottle of local wine.  We would definitely stay here again!
Property is beautiful! We'll definitely stay again.
Garrett was extremely helpful and informative. The house was PRESTINE!! We loved our stay and would 11/10 come back and do it again! Thank you for hosting us!
This house was amazing,  it was exactly the get away we needed!

I stayed here with 4 friends, it was our first time in the area. We absolutely loved the home, very cozy and well equipped home. The view was amazing! We especially enjoyed the details that the owner paid to ensure that our stay was comfortable. Definitely will return!
Great lake house! Right on the water, beautiful dock with outdoor tv, hot tub, updated kitchen, air conditioning and close to fun wineries. We really enjoyed our stay here!
The location, lake access, deck and hot tub were perfect! We loved our stay and would absolutely come back again.
Beautiful spot on Keuka lake!

My wife & I along with our two young adult daughters stayed at Garrett & Michelle’s lake house while visiting the area for wedding.  Garrett was very responsive and wonderful to work with.  As frequent travelers, I’d rank this beautiful lake home among our most favorite AirB&B’s.  Very well equipped, so clean, cozy and comfortable.  The dock area and views are “the icing”’ on this phenomenal cake.  Our two night stay left us longer for more, and we can’t wait to come back!  Thank you Garrett & Michelle for sharing this slice of Heaven on Earth.  (Don’t hesitate to book if you’re fortunate enough to find date availability - you won’t be disappointed.)
Great place, great location. Highly recommend this property.
A beautiful, cozy, well-appointed bungalow on the lake! Every detail was thought of, and the house was immaculate. Garrett was helpful and easily reached. Highly recommend!!

We had a fantastic time at Garrett's place! The home is stunningly beautiful, very clean, very comfy with lots of nice touches like a bottle of wine, cozy blankets, the hot tub and outside dock are incredible. We have stayed at many rentals over the years but this is by far our best trip and favorite spot! We hope to be back next year!

This house is a great location right on the lake. We went for a quiet weekend getaway and the house was perfect. Wonderful large dock with great views and plenty of comfortable seating. Excellent views from inside the home as well. The host provides everything you need including linens and towels. Beds were comfortable. Host was very responsive to our questions.

What a wonderful stay… the house was perfect! very cozy, so much beautiful outdoor space with the most majestic views of Keuka. The hosts were very accommodating, left a bottle of wine and toiletries, responded within minutes. Everything you need was at the house especially for a family of 4. Location is great too! Thanks again! We hope to be back next year!!! 6 stars!!! Emily and Danny
We had an amazing time and will definitely stay again. Home was very clean and well maintained. Beautiful location and lots on amenities.

This is a beautiful home on a beautiful lake.  The view and setting is spectacular. The home is very clean, organized and recently updated. The instructions for check in and for the house were clear and easy to follow so that we didn’t need to contact the owner at all, though I understand from other reviews they are easily contacted. We spent a relaxing, lovely weekend !

Garrett was an amazing host. The house is exactly as advertise and wouldn’t hesitate to book again. Garrett was also extremely responsive, at times within minutes. The location is very close to great Wineries/Breweries and plenty to do at the house with the awesome dock set up.  I would highly recommend booking this place if available!

The lake house is gorgeous! Nicely updated and has everything needed for a small group vacation on the lake. The view and dock amenities are unbeatable. The weather was a little too cool for us to enjoy the kayaks and paddle boards, but so nice to have that option! We had 5 girls stay in the house and was just big enough without feeling too snug. There were some thoughtful touches like a bottle of wine and guide to a winery too. We also had a little mishap towards the end of our stay where one of the girls accidentally locked the bottom door handle lock and got us locked out. Garrett was quick to respond and send someone to let us back in. Overall would highly recommend this location!
Beautiful place, well kept and comfortable with a a great view.

We really enjoyed our stay at Garrett’s.
The property is literally on the water with really easy check-in / check-out process.
Garrett was super responsive and helpful.
Great stay!

Garrett is a wonderful host and has a beautiful home. The view is amazing and is right on the water. He let us check in an hour early (3pm) and was quick in response time.
The pictures of the home are accurate. Our girls weekend getaway included a welcome bottle of wine from one of the local wineries. Trial size samples of shampoo, conditioner, and body wash were a nice touch. The beds were comfortable, and the sheets and towels were both nice quality.
Only recommendations would be to pack some Kleenex if you have allergies since the house didn't have any. In addition, some extra sweeping by housekeeping would be helpful but nothing that would prevent us from staying again.
Location is close to wineries and restaurants. You definitely need a car.
Some of our favorites.
Wineries: Red Hill Vineyards (Penn Yan - close by), Three Brothers Winery (Geneva)
Breakfast: Toni's (Hector), Penny's Place (Seneca)

Checked in without having to meet anyone.  House was right on the water with the covered deck jutting out over the water. There was an uncovered portion of the deck if you want sun. Unfortunately water was too cold to take a dip but it's so clear and beautiful, I totally would. The furniture, both inside and out, was so comfortable. I don't think I've ever sat in comfy deck furniture before. The couch in the house is comfy too, you can totally sleep on it. Beds were memory foam. Neighbors are close but not intrusive. We grilled out all our meals on the propane grill.  Garrett left us fresh flowers and wine!  He also left us toiletries, which we needed because we forgot shampoo! Garrett was also very quick to respond. Would definitely stay here again.
Great stay! Had the most amazing weekend! Beautiful dock and view of the lake from the cottage

It was a beautiful location on the east side of the lake. Very close to the wineries and restaurant. The pictures do not do the sunset justice. It was the most gorgeous view I have seen, and we have been visiting Keuka Lake for the past 6 years. The personal touches of fresh flowers and wine when we arrived were above and beyond! Thank you for sharing your home. My family had a great time!

First, Garrett is a 5+ ⭐️ host! He immediately responded to questions and was always courteous and helpful. Second, the home was just redone and is the perfect place to stay! Loved all the effort to make us as guests feel so welcome. The view is ideal and the deck/dock is perfect-especially having it covered and being able to watch tv outside or just have a drink and relax by the water. Thanks, again, for the great stay!

Garrett’s place was amazing! Great location right on the lake with proximity to a bunch of wineries. His place was very comfortable, very clean, and super cute. The best part is the deck patio where we were able to see the most beautiful sunsets. Garrett was a great host and communication was 10/10. Would love to stay here again!!

This is a great house right on Keuka Lake!  The sunset on the Airbnb photo is for real - I took several photos of the stunning sunsets!  The house is newly remodeled, with tasteful decor, good (well-stocked) kitchen & bathroom, and wonderful views.   The thing that really set this house apart for us was the outdoor space, especially the covered dock/porch.  To sit on comfy furniture with Wifi/TV, right on the water, was a real game changer!  It’s where we spent most of our time, and has raised the bar on what we want when we rent a lake house.  We would absolutely rent this house again.
Nature filled private oasis. Beautiful home on ponds. If you love to escape into the woods then this is your place !!!

The cabin was absolutely beautiful. There was so much for the kids to do. Everything was labeled and easy to figure out- they’ve thought of everything you could need! We had a great time and would definitely book another trip in the future.

This home was absolutely perfect for our extended family of ten. We spent Friday on Keuka exploring wineries and other places we’ve been before and then returned to the peaceful surroundings of their home. We all loved the ponds and the hot tub, and the unexpected early April warmth meant we got to enjoy it all. We spent Saturday morning at the house again enjoying everything it had to offer before venturing to Canandigua wineries and breweries (one offering a grape juice tasting for the kids). At night we relaxed at the house, which had plenty of space for everyone. Before leaving on Sunday, we had time for an Easter brunch and egg hunt. Although a little off the beaten path, the view can’t be beat, and we had a wonderful trip!

We spent a weekend here to celebrate my 40th birthday and it was absolutely perfect! The property was gorgeous and the cabin is spacious and well cared for. The welcome bottle of wine and s'mores kit were much appreciated. Wineries and breweries were only 15-20 minutes away. We definitely plan to come back sometime in late summer or early fall to be able to see the foliage and utilize the backyard ponds.

Beautiful, well-equipped house with many thoughtful details.  The main living area has a wall of windows overlooking the private ponds, which makes for an exceptional morning coffee experience. Lovely, responsive hosts. A wonderful getaway.
A wonderful, beautiful and peaceful getaway for relaxing or enjoying time with friends.

First off, the cabin is absolutely beautiful. The architecture is clearly well thought out, blending rustic charm with modern finishes. It offers amenities you wouldn’t expect for a property tucked away in the backcountry on 55 acres.
The views of the pond and surrounding landscape were spectacular—especially after a fresh dusting of snow. Everything was clean, functional, and thoughtfully designed, making it easy to settle in and feel at home right away.
The only downside was wishing we had more time to stay. This is the perfect place if you’re looking to truly escape the noise of everyday life and suburbia.
Great job, Melissa, Ashley, and Josh
Perfect space for a quiet few days away. Beautiful scenery. The house had everything you could want. We hope to return!

This place exceed my expectations. The photos were beautiful but actually being there was next level. The attention to details, the coziness we felt stying here- it was the perfect peaceful get away. And the view of the pounds right outside the kitchen window was breath taking.
We all left that weekend feeling refreshed and relaxed. Thank you! Hope to come back again!

We stayed here for our work retreat and it was absolutely perfect. The home was beautiful, thoughtfully designed, and had everything we could possibly need. You can tell the hosts truly care about the experience of their guests.
They went above and beyond — wine waiting for us, toothbrushes, toothpaste, razors… literally anything you might have forgotten was already there. And the heated bathroom floors! Such an unexpected luxury that made the stay even more special.
We couldn’t have picked a better place for our retreat. Highly, highly recommend!
The house was perfect! It came stocked with everything you could hope for while away. Clean, cozy, & stunning! We loved the hot tub & Pool table.

Winter wonderland! The house was absolutely immaculate! They provided all the basic necessities including toiletries!! Was so refreshing to have an air B&B that provided cleaning supplies, dishwasher pods, garbage bags, basic cooking essentials, laundry soap, coffee, tea, and even firewood!! We had more than enough towels, and even robes for everyone!! Games for the kids! We were welcomed by a bottle of wine and a s’mores kit!! It was a very relaxing get away!! We had an absolute blast! 12/10 would recommend!!
EXCELLENT Airbnb. Such a cozy weekend :)  beautifully decorated & lots to do

we had a wonderful stay! the property was beautiful, peaceful and fun to explore. The house itself was clean, homey, and perfect. The pool table, darts, Hot Tub and soaking tub were amazing. Ashley was super responsive and helpful. we will definitely be coming back when it's warmer out to fully be able to enjoy nature and the view withiut the snow.. Also as our stay was during the winter they did an amazing job keeping the driveway clear and the porch and steps salted and cleared as well.
Awesome place to stay with friends and family . Beautiful decor spacious and had everything we needed .
Amazing pls

Our group was celebrating our friend's upcoming wedding. This was a lovely winter retreat for a girls' trip! The snow views were lovely, indoors was cozy, and the hot tub was fun! We appreciated the number of bathrooms (3), the full kitchen, the enormous wrap-around sofa, and the fireplaces. Despite significant amounts of snow recently, we were able to get in and out no problem, thanks to the hosts plowing the driveway.

The perfect setting for our family weekend winter getaway! We thoroughly enjoyed snowshoeing on all of the ponds and in the woods surrounding the cabin. Relaxing in the hot tub after with fresh snow falling around us made us feel like we were in a Hallmark movie! The hosts were very attentive to our all of our questions and made sure to go above and beyond to ensure our stay was perfect!
The cabin had absolutely everything we needed to feel right at home. Thanks for helping us make a weekend full of memories!

Had an amazing stay! Can’t say enough good things about this place. Super cozy and relaxing environment. We loved the nature and privacy. We enjoyed cooking and eating meals together in the spacious kitchen. The game room was so fun! The hosts were great and very informative.
Beautiful place to get away!

This is a beautiful house and property. The house had so many amenities including games, pool table, cooking supplies, coffee supplies and extra toothbrushes and shavers if needed. The house has very warm touches and was a pleasure to be at. We had a group of 9 who enjoyed all the games and the hot tub. A 20 minute drive to Naples for wine tasting and food. Owner was very responsive to our messages.

We had an incredible New Year’s staycation at this stunning cabin nestled in the woods. The freezing winter weather made the experience even more magical. The cabin itself is modern, incredibly cozy, and incredibly comfortable. It truly felt like a perfect winter getaway.
Had a fantastic time with friends playing snooker, ping pong, and board games. We even enjoyed a cozy campfire outside in the chilly air. Every space in the cabin was thoughtfully designed, and it was evident that a lot of care went into making it a welcoming and enjoyable place to stay. The overall experience exceeded our expectations.
Ashley, was fantastic. She was incredibly helpful, responded promptly, and ensured that our entire stay was smooth and stress-free. I highly recommend this place and would love to stay here again in the future.
Amazing long weekend with great amenities and spotless house!!! Thank you so much for being such great hosts!!!!

We had the best time ever! There was so much to do inside and outside, and the kids were never bored. The hot tub was awesome, and we even did a bonfire in 10-degree snowy weather because the hosts had everything we needed. The welcome basket and wine were such a nice touch, once we got there and Ashley was super responsive. Would definitely stay here again!

We had so much fun here! Lots to do in the house and it’s very cozy. We went with a group of friends and we all agreed we would love to come back! 15 minute drive to wineries, restaurants & breweries which were all very enjoyable. House was gorgeous and had lots of games to play. We went and it was snowy but we were still able to enjoy the hot tub and views from the house. Hosts were easy to reach and get in touch with for any questions we had. Highly recommend!

This property was WONDERFUL, from the privacy all the way down to the small details which made our stay that much more personal and intimate! We will definitely be revisiting during a different season to experience what the property has to offer. The secluded Winter cabin vibe was beyond our expectations! Cannot wait to stay here again! We felt right at home!

We had a wonderful stay and truly appreciated the host’s hospitality. Communication was excellent — they were responsive, kind, and quick to answer all of our questions, which made the stay very smooth and comfortable.
The home itself was cozy and well-equipped. We especially loved the hot tub, which was a perfect way to relax, and the billiard table, which added a lot of fun to our evenings.
The host was also very understanding and fair, resolving a few minor inconveniences we experienced, which we genuinely appreciated.
Overall, this was a great stay, and we would happily return — especially since we’re hoping to come back in the summer. With a small improvement to address a pest issue we noticed, this place would be an absolute gem. We’d definitely recommend it and look forward to visiting again!

The Pines at Beaver Ponds Lodge is truly a magical place. The hosts went above and beyond—stocking the home with everything we could possibly need. From a full range of pots and pans to condiments, extra toiletries, and so many thoughtful touches, they really made it feel like a home away from home.
They were incredibly communicative, friendly, and responsive, and you can tell they genuinely care about their guests’ experience.
The property itself is stunning—peaceful, beautifully maintained, and perfect for relaxing. And the house… just gorgeous! Spacious, beautifully decorated, and comfortable in every way.
My family and I absolutely loved our stay. There’s truly something for everyone, and we can’t wait to come back.

This was a beautiful property and well-cared for. The space was clean and had many number of inside activities imaginable. We were hosted over the winter, so limited interaction on the outdoors, but they had someone clear out the driveway beforehand and there were some trails visible. For drivers unfamiliar to the area, we recommend driving slow when the GPS indicates being nearby, we accidentally passed the entrance the first time. Once on the driveway, it was straightforward to the house.
Inside it was warm and had a little card for us! We were there to celebrate a birthday. We liked the hot tub was accessible from the main bedroom. The TVs and electronics were easy to use.
The "bar games" were well taken care of and many board games/cards available.
With how cold it was outside, it was warm and had many blanket options for the inside.
I would recommend this space to anyone interested! We're excited about a summer visit to take advantage of the water activities!

From start to finish, this was one of the best Airbnb experiences our family has ever had. The photos truly don't do this place justice—it was immaculate, beautifully decorated, and felt instantly like a home away from home.
Communication with the hosts Melissa, Ashley and Josh was flawless. They were incredibly responsive, welcoming, and provided clear, easy-to-follow instructions for check-in.
If you are looking for a comfortable, stylish, and perfectly situated place look no further. We can't wait to return and highly recommend this listing to everyone! Thank you for the wonderful hospitality

Simply MAGICAL!
This cabin was absolutely perfect for a week away. The home boasts everything you could ever need—from a fully equipped kitchen (we cooked our entire Thanksgiving meal!) to amenities galore. We enjoyed the hot tub, fire pit, pedal boats, kayaks, and nearby hiking trails. And when rain and snow rolled in, the fun didn’t stop. We played pool, threw darts, and snuggled up on the enormous couch for a movie.
What started as a gorgeous fall retreat transformed into a winter wonderland before our eyes. Pack your bags and grab some groceries—that’s all you’ll need. Once you arrive, you’ll never want to leave.
Thank you for the perfect family getaway!

This was a stellar stay! The cabin was clean, organized, and had amazing amenities. The location is a beautiful, private and peaceful natural setting, but also has nearby activities, such as great hiking places, stores, and places to eat. The hosts are outstanding. Very communicative, proactive, accommodating, and thoughtful. They had the place laid out so it was easy to use with instructions and labels for everything. They also provided nice touches such as bathrobes,  food supplies  such as snacks, tea and coffee, and a nice welcome bottle of wine. We were there for an early Thanksgiving with our family, and the cabin had everything we could possibly need to cook and enjoy our meal. We thoroughly enjoyed our time there and I highly recommend this stay.

The hosts were wonderful. They were very responsive, warm, and genuinely kind people. Their house was as described and BEYOND. What a wonderful space to disconnect and enjoy nature and it's surroundings. Went on Wine Trail, which was a close drive to the house and looked forward to coming "Home" each night. A great time was had by all and the house and property were a peaceful escape. Thank you again Melissa, Ashley & Josh. I hope sharing your home with others becomes a Great Success and that your future guests feel the same way that we did when we stayed. We look forward to coming back in the future! Thank you again!

We had an absolutely amazing stay at this beautiful cabin! The house itself was spotless, cozy, and thoughtfully designed — every corner felt welcoming. The highlight, of course, was the private lake — peaceful, crystal clear, and perfect for relaxing mornings with coffee or quiet evenings by the water.
The surroundings were stunning and offered so much privacy; it truly felt like our own little paradise. The host was kind, responsive, and made sure everything was perfect throughout our stay.
If you’re looking for a place to unwind, reconnect with nature, and enjoy some peace and quiet, this cabin is an absolute gem. We can’t wait to come back!
We had thee absolute best time at Azalea! Kate is simply the best with her generosity and hospitality. The house was perfect and we can’t wait to come back!

Absolutely wonderful experience, this is an amazing property with an amazing host! The house was spacious, comfortable and very clean. The view was stunning and we loved being right on the lake. The sunset was my favorite part. Kate was an amazing host, she went above and beyond to make sure we had a great stay. I cannot recommend this property enough and will definitely stay here again when we are back in the area.

Had a much needed February retreat weekend at Azalea House cottage. It was very cozy with the fireplace and the throw blankets. We watched movies and did puzzles. The view of the icy waters changed daily and the sunsets did not disappoint. Really enjoyed sitting in the hot tub overlooking the lake. Kate was super responsive and helpful. Would definitely rent again and have already recommended it to friends.

The Azalea beach house at Seneca was amazing it was clean well maintained
And waking up seeing the lake from your window was priceless
We just couldn’t get over how beautiful this place is
And to top it off Kate was always friendly responsive, and there for us
Absolutely beautiful place! A wonderful family spot!
Kate was there to greet us when we arrived. She was making sure that the walkways were all shoveled and clear of any snow. Very friendly person.

We had an amazing stay over the holidays. Even in winter, this place was wonderful—the location is ideal, close to wineries and just a short drive to downtown Geneva for groceries and other needs. The house itself is beautiful, and Kate was incredibly responsive, making it feel like a truly well-managed property. She even left a welcome bottle of wine and treats for our dogs, which was such a thoughtful touch. There were plenty of linens, towels, and blankets provided, which we really appreciated. We would absolutely stay here again.
Awesome hostess, very welcoming and communicative. The home is clean, well-stocked, very comfortable and in a great location. I would stay here again and recommend.

We thoroughly enjoyed our stay! The house was amazing and the lake view was beautiful. Lots of fun activities in the area vineyards, hiking, and restaurants! Kate was easy to work with and very responsive. Small considerations like coffee for the Keurig and firewood for outside made it feel like a home away from home.

We stayed here for our 4 year anniversary/1st family vacation since having our 8 month old son. We loved it! Our dogs enjoyed swimming in the lake, the views were perfect and the location was great! The house was as described by Kate. Will definitely stay here again next time we are visiting the Finger Lakes!

Great place
Beautiful views
Easy for someone with mobility issues to maneuver main floor and deck
High pet fee not included in price of rental
We had a wonderful time at the beach house! beautiful view

My husband and I enjoyed our stay. The place is right on the lake and provides a beautiful view. We had a minor inconvenience while we stayed due to the smoke alarms going off on our second day. Kate went to Lowe’s for batteries, however we did mention we may need help fixing the problem because after swapping batteries around, it didn’t seem to stop. Kate dropped off the new batteries, and unfortunately had to leave as she had a busy morning ahead. We ended up turning off the power to the room which stopped the beeping, and we weren’t using the room anyway. It was a bummer that she didn’t check back in to fully resolve the matter rather than our bandaid approach. The dock chair was broke and she did promptly offer to replace that, but we managed to take a spare from the other sitting area. All in all we had a great trip, and the house again is beautiful with a great location.

Beautiful home and property, and Kate is a wonderful host- even had a dog treat for our pup! Our family appreciated all the space and amenities making it a great vacation.
Thanks Kate!

This is a great spot -- the location is close to downtown geneva and to all the wineries and breweries and hiking. The house has a great deck for watching the gorgeous sunsets and was very comfortable. My only two recommendations would be to add room darkening shade or curtains because it is really bright really early and for the owner to clear some of the cluttered decor that makes it hard to unpack in the master bedroom -- every surface has a piece of decor on it and even the cabinets that serve as  dressers and the floor of the closet are filled with linens. But overall, we had a great stay and recommend this rental
Kate was very helpful and responsive. House was perfect for our family. Seneca Lake has the best sunsets!

We loved our stay. The house is updated, very clean and right on the lake with everything you need to enjoy your stay. We will definitely come back. There are local wineries 5 minutes from the house. Geneva only 10 and Watkins Glen about 45 min. Lots to do and the dock alone is wonderful. We went swimming, fished and kayaked. It was a wonderful week!

We stayed for a week (June/July 2025) at Azalea Beach House.  It's a lovely lake house in a beautiful setting.  The house was well-appointed (especially the kitchen), tastefully decorated and very clean when we arrived.  Lots of outdoor seating for viewing the lake and enjoying the water.  Catherine was exceptionally communicative and responsive.

The house was beautiful and the view was incredible. It was very peaceful. The house was very clean and had everything we needed. We loved the Finger Lakes area, especially Watkins Glen State Park and Ithaca. Catharine was a wonderful host and you won’t find a more beautiful setting than the Azalea!

We had a great stay here. The house was clean, comfortable, and exactly as described. What really makes this place special is the view—being right on the lake completely changes the experience.
The first part of our stay was rainy and gloomy, but it honestly added to the atmosphere. The mist and fog rolling over the lake created a peaceful, almost surreal setting. Then the weather cleared up and turned into a warm, sunny day, which gave us a completely different experience of the lake.
Being able to see both sides—the calm, foggy mornings and the bright, clear views—made the stay even better. If you’re looking for a relaxing waterfront getaway, this is definitely a solid choice.
Well kept and comfortable
Place was very nice and clean, and a great location!
Amazing home and views! This is our second trip to this Airbnb and we can’t wait for our next! Thank you for everything!

We had quite an eventful stay with some emergent things that came up.  The comfort of the home, peacefulness and Karen’s check in and immediate action allowed us to truly settle in and have a wonderful time.  The pictures on the site truly do not do the property justice.  Even-though they are beautiful pictures the in person is breathtaking.  It was a very sweet home away from home.
Beautiful location. Lovely lake view in the winter time, especially waking up to it in the morning. Very clean.

This was a fantastic stay from start to finish. The place was exactly as described—clean, comfortable, and well maintained. The location was convenient and quiet, making it easy to relax while still being close to everything we needed. The host was responsive, professional, and very accommodating, which made the entire experience seamless. I would absolutely stay here again and highly recommend this property to anyone looking for a reliable and enjoyable stay

It was great staying at Karen's beautiful house. The lake view is amazing. Very quiet and peaceful. Had all the necessary amenities. We will definitely come back. Loved the area, the views, the lake. All together absolutely lovely experience.

We stayed in the winter right after a snowfall and cold spell blew in the night before. When we arrived the driveway and walkway were plowed and the house was heated and warm. Everything was clean. Everything in the kitchen was labeled which made it easy to pick the right drawer or cabinet. Overall, nice place with some awesome lake views.
When you arrive, do know that the driveway/garage is on the opposite side of the street. We arrived at night couldn’t see it at first.
Very comfortable rental. It was nice to have a beautiful lake view to enjoy from the warm family room. I appreciate how proactive Karen was.
Very nice place in a great location! Awesome view right on the lake. The boathouse was a really cool space to hang out in. Close to wineries and breweries. Would definitely stay here again!

Karen’s place was absolutely incredible! The view was somehow even better than the photos. The house was absolutely spotless and Karen kept very clear communication and provided great local recommendations! We will absolutely be back to experience the lakes in the summer!

We have stayed at the Finger Lakes many times and this was by far the best place we have ever stayed at. The cleanliness was immaculate! You felt at home as soon as you walked in the door. Everything was so well organized and labeled, you knew exactly where everything was. This house also has one of the best views of the lake that we’ve ever seen! Can’t wait to come back!
this was our 3rd stay at this house, it's everything you could want in a vacation lake house! we'll continue to return in the future!

Beautiful location right on Seneca Lake with gorgeous views from the living room. We had a wonderful weekend in the Finger Lakes and would definitely stay at Karen’s again- house had great amenities and helpful suggestions for what to do in the area!

We were astounded by the home with its location and views. The sunrises over the lake were stunning. Everything about the place was beautiful. Located right on the lake we had access to so many great places to visit, wineries, restaurants, scenic hikes, breathtaking waterfalls. The home was clean and comfortable, well supplied, easy to access. We were sad to leave.
This place is absolutely perfect for a quiet getaway. The house was setup perfectly to take advantage of the lake views. Will definitely rent again and recommend to friends
Extremely beautiful place on the lake. Would definitely stay again!
We loved our stay. The house was beautiful and the scenery was stunning. Karen was very responsive and I love that she left us a bottle of wine to start off the weekend. Nice touch
Great Lake views, nice location,  nice updated living area inside.  Great balcony lake views.
The house was modern and clean. Kitchen was well supplied with dishes and cooking utensils.  Loved watching the sunrise each morning.
Our favorite part of this cottage was waking up to the sunrise over the lake each morning. Both my wife and I were able to work remotely, including video calls, without any problems.

This place is a total gem.  The extra room above the boathouse was amazing.  It rained one night and it was the perfect location.  The multiple patios are great for dining.  Everything is labeled and so easy to find.  The pictures match perfectly.  We will stay again.  Thanks Karen!

Beautiful lakeside home. Very clean and updated amenities.  Great for families or friends looking for a getaway on Seneca lake. Lots of things to do within a close distance, or just a great house to spend time at and relax. I would book this house again if traveling to the area. Everything was spot on for the pictures and home description. Host was proactive and responsive, which gives the renter peace of mind.
Great lakeside property with beautiful boathouse and dock made this a very enjoyable stay.
Second visit to this  wonderful  home.  We will be back again.  Boat house is a wonderful extra at this location.

My friends & I absolutely loved Karen’s place!! The views from the house were stunning and the boat house below was an added plus. It was so peaceful and serene being down at the dock and the location of the house is perfect — close to all Seneca lakes famous wineries! We would love to stay again — would recommend anyone to stay! Thank you again Karen!

Beautiful location on the lake, cozy and private regardless of close neighbors! Classy minimalistic decor with just enough warmth to feel comfortable and at home! Fully stocked and labeled kitchen making it very easy to prepare meals quickly! All bedding was clean and comfortable! Amazing view of the lake through large windows:) Close proximity to many wineries to visit! Karen’s place was perfect for our 3 night visit to the finger lakes:)

The cottage is like a visit to Eden. Peaceful, clean, 2 bathrooms, and lots to do. The lake is beautiful, great for swimming. The boathouse is air conditioned and perfect for relaxing. The view of the lake is amazing and can been seen from everywhere you go on the property. The kitchen is perfect, well stocked and has all new appliances. I will be back!
Karen’s place was perfect. Super clean, comfortable, and had everything we needed.
Beautiful location and very peaceful. Great space for my family of 4!

What a great place! We enjoyed the house, the boathouse and the dock.  Communication with Karen was perfect. Everything worked as it should, the surroundings were beautiful and peaceful, and there was so much to do in the area.  I recommend this house without hesitation.

I joked with me wife saying I’d leave a bad review just so the next time we go and book it it’ll be available! But alas I can’t do that :). It was great and we loved it! House was in perfect shape and the old school boathouse was a nice addition. And we loved the lake. Fished, floated, jumped in, and just sat on the dock.
Can’t wait to be back :)

This place was absolutely perfect for our vacation. The house itself was spotless and had everything we needed, including a pack-and-play for our infant! The location is less than 15min to Penn Yan yet sequestered off on a quiet street overlooking the most gorgeous view of the water. The sheets, towels, and even provided lotions were actually good quality. Little touches like that made our quiet family getaway here so comfortable and amazing.

Karen and George’s home was the perfect Finger Lakes getaway. The house was extremely clean, comfortable, and had everything we needed. It was super close to some of the best wineries, and they were just a text away—friendly, responsive, and incredibly accommodating. Highly recommend and would definitely stay again! 10/10!

We loved it as soon a we walked in.  The home is comfortable and decorated nicely.  We had everything we needed to cook our meals and enjoyed them  inside and out.  The boathouse was the perfect morning coffee lounge! Lots of wineries, breweries and great food nearby.

The place is right on the waterfront, and the view is absolutely gorgeous—especially on sunny days. Just a heads-up: there are a lot of mosquitoes around the lake (not specific to the property, but common throughout the area), especially before it rains. If not for the mosquitoes, our stay would have been perfect!

Karen was a very gracious and responsive host. We found everything we needed which is in line with top rated hosts. We even found an umbrella anticipating we’d need it when caught in the rain to get ours out of the car on the morning.
Very quite and peaceful location. One of the thoroughly clean properties we stayed at. And my wife’s a perfectionist for cleaning!
Convenient location to the wineries especially.
I would recommend this property to anyone.
Clean, well organized, with good amenities. Excellent location with great view.
Lovely spot and Karen is a super responsive host!

Really enjoyed Karen’s place. She has thought of all of the details that make it feel like home. Above and beyond details and organization that made it great for our stay. For example, bbq tools, ziplock bags, bottle of wine and water, soaps, all of the tvs and remotes worked, sheets and towels were fresh and clean. The view was amazing and the house is designed to maximize the view. I will bring my fishing gear. We will definitely stay here again.
De accommodatie van Karen was ons rustpunt tijdens onze rondreis. We hebben genoten van het uitzicht, het huis was comfortabel en alles wat we nodig hadden was aanwezig.

This home was  perfect for our anniversary getaway. The property was clean, private, quiet, beautiful views, and in a great location to multiple lakes, wineries, restaurants and stores. We enjoyed the walkability of country roads and train tracks as well.

The view is breathtaking! We came here for a little getaway and to explore the finger lakes. It was hard to leave the house. We liked this location because it was an easy trip to wineries on Seneca and Keuka. The kitchen has everything you need and is clearly labeled. Plenty of games that we used. Think this space would be great for two couples or a family getaway.
A wonderful lakeside retreat, we loved the Karen's house and all of the amenities it offered. Highly recommend!
The house is amazing, right on the water, clean, quiet and fully equipped. Perfect location to visit the surrounding area, lakes and wineries. Would love to come back!

Karen’s place was amazing. The home was spacious and had everything we needed. The dock, campfire and boat house was perfect for our stay. Short drive from many attractions. Would definitely recommend!
Great place! Convenient location, close to everything. Karen was very responsive!
This place is STUNNING! One of the most beautiful Airbnbs I’ve ever stayed in, and definitely the best deal. Hosts were responsive and helpful. Would give this place 10 stars if I could!!
Karen’s place was wonderful! The views were amazing and we enjoyed the private area. Would definitely recommend it to others
Beautiful house that is right on the water and super close to the town. The views from the house were stunning and it felt very homey.
We absolutely loved the house and felt right at home!!
Beautiful view of the lake
Stunning view of the lake! Extremely clean as well. Great location to go winery hopping.
Nothing beats the quiet and the view. Great place to go and relax.
Our second time staying. Beautiful place and scenery. Great host!
As we were packing up today, we were already talking about returning next year!

Our second time here in winter. Very comfortable for six adults. Very well stocked for cooking. The house is so much larger than it looks like from the road. We enjoyed watching the people ice fishing out on the frozen lake, very relaxing! The price  is very reasonable as well. Highly recommend!
We love staying here! It is one of the cleanest Airbnb’s we have stayed at. We feel right at home!

We had an amazing stay at Casey’s Lakeview House! The lake view was absolutely stunning and made the entire experience even more special. The house was very clean, well-maintained, and exactly as described in the listing. Everything we needed was provided, and the space was comfortable and relaxing. It was the perfect place to unwind and enjoy the scenery. We truly enjoyed our time here and would highly recommend this rental to anyone looking for a peaceful getaway with beautiful views. Would definitely stay again!

Loved this beautiful lakefront home.  Very clean, free of clutter and tons of amenities.  Kitchen very well stocked.  We were there for wine tasting (in the winter)  and traveling around the lake is very  manageable in 2-3 days so you can visit a lot of wineries. Had a great time.

We had a great extended weekend, the rental was perfect for our stay.
Check in and out was a breeze, house was very clean and had everything you need to cook in.
We enjoyed our stay in the beautiful house with amazing views! The kitchen had everything you could need. It was perfect!

We had a great Christmas vacation. The place felt like home with all amenities.
Had a beautiful snow day with a lake view.
Wish to stay again sometime sooner.
Thank you 😊
lovely location with amazing views even when in bed.

We had a lovely stay.  The view from the home is awesome and the size is perfect for three couples.   Kitchen was well-equipped and I appreciated the ample supply of cleaning products, paper towels/toilet paper and towels.   Very responsive to all our questions.  We highly recommend!
Beautiful place and astonishing hosts

Place was clean and spacious perfect for our family of four and have a couple of friends over during the Thanksgiving weekend. Weather was a bit of a disappointment, but the surrounding locality parks, vineyards was terrific.
I needed appliances to make our Thanksgiving meal, and Casey definitely undersold me on what was available in the kitchen. The kitchen was sufficient for all our meal preparations.
Beautiful home, fantastic view. Home was everything we needed.  Casey was great, very helpful and personable. Will definitely be back.

Water locations are alway preferred; fantastic view. Kitchen stocked with many condiments. Location ideal for exploring and wine tasting. One major issue; downstairs is very cold. Could not want better hosts.
This was our second stay in this lovely home. Everything was great.

We have stayed at many places and this is one of our top places. The house has 3 master bedrooms with king sized beds. The view was beautiful and the place was exceptionally clean. We appreciated the coffee, paper towels, and all the little extras that made our stay so comfortable.
Thank you for a special few days.
The house had a gorgeous view over the lake and was very close to town and wineries! Will definitely be staying again!

We enjoyed a wonderful stay at this Airbnb property this October. The windows in the living room give a nearly unobstructed view of the lake. The setting is private and peaceful. Great amenities and we  appreciated the cleanliness of the home. The hosts were responsive and timely with answering our questions. Would eagerly rebook this property in the future.
It was the best location and the perfect ending to a long day.  It was very relaxing and had everything we needed.   Excellent experience overall!
This place was beautiful. My whole family enjoyed it. Views of the lake were excellent. Driving distance to lots of sights around the finger lakes was reasonable. Would definitely stay here again.
Great place in Penn Yan! We loved taking the kayaks out. We hope to be back!

My guests and I absolutely loved our stay at Casey's beautiful, well-appointed home! The location right on Keuka Lake was stunning, with plenty to see and do nearby. The kitchen was top-of-the-line and fully stocked. All the furniture — including the beds — was stylish, high-quality, and very comfortable. We had lots of space to gather around the large kitchen table and relax in the cozy living room. I highly recommend Casey's home!

This was one of the nicest Airbnb rentals that we have stayed in. The house was clean, well kept, well
stocked, roomy and comfortable for the 3 couples in our group. The location is convenient. The view is gorgeous. Check in and check out were very easy. We all enjoyed our stay!

We thoroughly enjoyed our stay here. The house was well stocked with everything we needed and was very clean.
It's in a beautiful location and is very quiet.
We would definitely return and have already recommended it to friend of ours!
Really enjoyed our stay. Weather was perfect and we were able to kayak. So comfortable to just relax and enjoy family.

We couldn’t have been any happier with Casey’s place for our girlfriends week away.  The house was beautiful with a magnificent view of the lake and easy proximity to so many things!  The house was stocked with every amenity.  Casey was super communicative and answered every question we had.

Casey’s home was just as described! A perfect place to stay while in town for a wedding. The lake is beautiful and the home felt so cozy. Casey was also very responsive and helpful. We had an amazing time and would absolutely stay there again!

Wow! This place is beautiful and well-equipped with everything we needed. We loved the general layout, having 3.5 bathrooms, and the kitchen had everything we needed to prep all of our meals.
The lake and house access were perfect; not too many steps! And the upper and lower decks were so comfortable with gorgeous views. We watched the storm roll by from the protected lower deck, and our daughter napped down there a few times!
We loved going out on the provided kayaks, and made s'mores in the portable fire pit with the wood left there for us.
We enjoyed being so close to Penn Yan, too. We shopped, ate dinner at Parker's one night, got ice cream flights at Spotted Duck, and had the best bubble tea at the Keuka Candy Emporium.
We didn't want to leave!
Thanks to these amazing hosts for sharing this very special spot on Keuka Lake!
Great location. Perfect outdoor patio for lake views. Great for families.
The place was very clean and the pictures didn’t do the place justice. Beautiful views. Would recommend for a nice, quiet vacation. We went to state fair and it was nice to come back to a nice place
Beautiful place, well maintained in a great location . Super close to the park, marina, and Penn Yan. Private beach which is great especially for young kids.

Perfect for our family of 4. Great location and great access to the water. Very relaxing, quiet neighbors, and close to a grocery store. I locked myself out of the house and Casey was quick to remedy the situation.

My family (5 adults, 4 children - ages 8, 5, 3, 13 mos.) and I have been spending a week at Keuka for the past 7 years. Casey's house was by far the nicest we've stayed in. The kitchen was well stocked with dishes, pots, pans, glasses - everything we needed to cook and serve a meal or snacks. The rooms are spacious and well decorated. We spent every day in the water and every evening sitting on the patio. The kids were able to run and play in the yard while the adults relaxed.
The location was perfect for our varied needs - close to some of the best wineries in the Finger Lakes, breweries and grocery shopping in Penn Yan. Casey was responsive before and during our stay. I highly recommend Casey's home for a relaxed, pleasant and enjoyable vacation.

Beautiful House on the Lake
This place exceeded our expectations! From the moment we booked, Casey was incredibly responsive and answered all of our questions quickly. When we arrived, we were pleasantly surprised to find the house even more beautiful than in the photos. It was spotlessly clean, fully stocked, with a well-equipped kitchen and comfortable beds—exactly what you hope for in a vacation home.
Thank you, Casey!

Ideal rental experience at the finger lakes. House was exactly as expected with beautiful, peaceful view of Keuka Lake. We loved waking up in the morning and first thing we saw was the wonderful lake view. We had absolutely no issues and would love to visit again someday!
Very beautiful location.

We thoroughly enjoyed our family vacation at Casey's place.  We ate most of our meals there.  The kitchen was well equipped, which made meal preparation easier.  The bathrooms were spotless.  The view was the best, very peaceful.
Amazing house! We loved it so much. The views by the lake is worth every dollar spent. Rooms are clean, beds are very comfortable. It’s very quiet and peaceful. I would come here again for sure.

Beautiful view of Keuka Lake!  Having 3 bedrooms and 3.5 bathrooms was wonderful.  Watched boats go by and a family of ducks as well as cormorants, diving for fish.  Keuka Springs, Weis and McGregor wineries were all great to visit and do tastings for those who enjoy wine.
We enjoyed our stay. The house was beautiful, plenty to do near by.
Very nice stay. 3 beds 3 1/2 bath, space is much larger than it looks when you pull up. Great open space for family. Well stocked. Very clean. Casey communicated great. Would stay again.
Our family of 6, (4 adults and 2 children), had a wonderful time. Home is beautiful, well appointed, comfortable, IMMACULATE, private and peaceful. We loved every minute we spent here.

Here’s an updated Airbnb review that includes the host’s responsiveness and their handling of a small issue, while keeping the previous points about the interior, exterior, and lovely views without mentioning sunset views:
We had a fantastic stay at this Airbnb! The interior of the house was absolutely gorgeous—beautifully decorated, impeccably clean, and incredibly cozy, making us feel right at home. The host was very responsive to all communications and dealt with a small issue promptly and professionally, which we greatly appreciated. The views from the property were lovely, offering stunning scenery that enhanced our relaxing getaway. While the exterior could use some improvement to match the interior’s charm, it didn’t detract from our overall experience. We highly recommend this place for a comfortable and scenic stay!
Good location, well stocked kitchen, but cobwebs on ceiling fans and wall fixtures, gnats in/out of home, and no dock/easily available kayaks ensured we will choose a different rental next year
Beautiful house and amazing property. It was so nice and peaceful to be able to walk the grounds and just have a relaxing few days away.

I couldn’t recommend this home more. The host Nicholas provided multiple recommendations for me and my children (ages 15-4) for the Easter holiday weekend and truly went above and beyond on top of being incredibly responsive. I highly recommend this house! The property and home were stunning. I slept so well and it was truly the reset I needed. Thank you so much Nicholas! I hope to visit Andes again in the future.

Great place - felt like home for my family of 5 for the weekend. The architectural design of the house is well done (and maintained). I could see myself building a house like this one which was an added bonus. Peaceful location up in Andes for a winter weekend - great looking out at snow over the Andes Valley during coffee and breakfast.  We look forward to a return.

The house was beautiful and had so many amenities!  Great for a family with kids…they absolutely LOVED the bunk bed room.  We adored the master with the most comfortable king bed.  The views and the fireplace…WOW, such a special place!
We loved our stay! This is our second stay at Nick’s place and we really enjoyed ourselves. The views are spectacular and the house is cozy and inviting.
The house is beautiful and the scenery is serene. A great place to relax and enjoy the natural beauty of the area. Nicholas was great! My family and I were happy!

The Andes Valley View home is architecturally impressive with great interior design. It is a great place to escape and relax. We went in the winter and had lots of Catskills snow for great skiing and hiking. The home is walkable into town to visit the local stores and diner. We go to the Catskills every winter and this is the best place we stayed!

Nick’s place is A+ amazing, not only was he great on communication throughout, but the place was pristine level clean and even better than the pics, perfect for a full family…we had a short but very memorable stay and will be back soon! High recommend!

Nicholas' home is truly wonderful - beautifully designed spaces, well appointed and with every amenity one could want. It is a delightfully private getaway space yet conveniently close to town. Its very well cared for and quite comfortable. Nicholas is a gracious host and terrific communicator. We thoroughly enjoyed our stay and highly recommend it to anyone!
This was our 2nd stay a month later because we enjoyed it so much the first time. Very private and peaceful location. You won’t hear traffic or people nearby! Incredible find in the Catskills!

this place is breathtaking!  the views are incredible. we were there for our youngest daughters senior night at college. we were all able to enjoy a big dinner with all our family and her friends on Sunday. so much space and walking around the property was perfect. don’t hesitate in this property. we will definitely be back!

Had a great stay, we loved how close it was to town but because it sits pretty far back from main road it felt like you were off the grid. Beautiful property the home was well taken care of and would absolutely return again!

I was so excited to stay at this house with my husband for our baby-moon. Unfortunately, that dream was crushed once we arrived. The tub had TONS of mouse droppings in it (clearly was there for days before arriving), two mice were seen in the home, mice droppings were scattered in all areas of the house, tons of wasps were in the living room/ flying around the bedroom, and the windows were covered with ladybugs. We reached out to Nicholas via phone call with no response (he was not quick with chat response times on this app). We then had to reach out to Airbnb to get our money back. Nicholas also didn’t give the code for the door until I reached out before I lost service during our 4 hour drive to the Airbnb. The only positive that came from this is that we received our money back from the trip (unfortunately, our long drive and time off from work was impacted).  I’m really disappointment by this house and I’ve been an avid Airbnb user for years. I would not recommend it.
Beautiful location and property- home was as described and had everything you need. We had an enjoyable stay!
clean, comfortable house. outdoors even better. Swim pond is the best. Children forgot to be bored.
We had a great stay in Andes at Nicholas’s place. The grounds were beautiful with so much to explore and see on the property! Will definitely be coming back
Great place to stay if you’re looking for a relaxing time away from home.  Beautiful views of the mountains and definitely worth taking the trip up to the pond!
This is our fifth time staying here. We love it, gorgeous location, cozy home and walking distance to town.

I stayed at Nicholas's property for 1 week with my wife, granddaughter, and dog. We had a great time. First off, the beds were greatly comfortable. The showers are exceptional. Roomy and clean. Even the bunk beds were comfortable. We spent a couple evenings watching kids movies on the projector screen while we all (3 of us) crashed out in a different bunk.
The property is beautiful and massive, yet close to town as we were able to walk to get ice cream.
The pond is where we spent a good part of our days. My granddaughter loved catching the salamanders in her net and trying to catch frogs (to no avail).
All in all a great rental.

Our second stay in less than 5 weeks and we already can't wait to come back. This time we came up with my parents (who are notoriously picky about where they stay), and they loved the house as well! Please see my review from March 2025 for more specifics.

If I could give this AirBnB 50 stars, I would. Nicholas's place is nothing short of magical. He's a great host, and the house has everything you need to feel totally comfortable while being surrounded by the best of nature. We visited with our two boys (7 and 4) and dog, and every one of us can't wait to return. It's three minutes to town if you need to pick up a bottle or two of wine at the wine store or a breakfast sandwich at Ande's Diner, but feels like you're a world way from everything when you're at the house. Make sure you walk up to the pond on top of the hill for even more breathtaking views.

This is a *great* rental, with a few quirks that were not clear in the listing.
The good stuff:
- The house and property are beautiful. Great views of mountains, valleys, and nature.
- Our snowy winter visit allowed a sled run that is over 1/4 mile long!
- The house is very cozy and the fireplace is great! The beds are very comfortable
- The host, Nicholas, was very responsive when we had an issue with the heat upon check-in.
What we wish we had known:
- There is no cell phone service (Verizon network) in the house or in the town of Andes. The house has wifi, but the host messages you the password prior to your arrival. If you have not written the password down, you are SOL once you get there, because there is no cell service. Make sure your cell carrier allows wifi calling.
- The kitchen is well equipped, but there is no microwave or kettle/teapot. Plan accordingly.
- The driveway is steep and was very icy on our arrival. It was later sanded and got a bit better.
We'll be back!

Stayed at Nicholas’ place for a few nights with 7 people total and a doggy. The house was lovely, very peaceful and quiet up on the hill. Just a heads up- if you are traveling here during the winter months, be cautious of the long and steep driveway that can get icy. There is a lot to do in the surrounding areas if you’re an outdoors person, such as walking around the neighboring towns or going snowboarding/skiing (which we did when we visited). Additionally, there are a lot of hiking trails and areas to go fishing in the warmer months. There is no cell reception in the house, however the Wi-Fi is fantastic and you can also enable Wi-Fi calling if you need to. Many of the surrounding towns have cell reception as well if you are driving around. If you’re a newcomer to the Catskills and not staying in a popular area, it is very common to not have cell reception (we knew this because we travel there often).

We stayed here for our annual girls weekend and it was the perfect space for our group or 6. The sleeping arrangements and amenities made us all feel comfortable and at home. Nicholas was an especially kind and accommodating host, always incredibly responsive and willing to help. The views from basically every window in the house do not disappoint. Highly recommend!

I often use airbnb to spend a night with friends around NYC and I would say this is the best house we ever stayed! Host is very easy to talk and supportive.
We would definitely come back when we go skiing early next year at Belleayre mountain. Highly recommended!!

Lovely home in a quiet, peaceful setting. We enjoyed walking to the pond on the property and weather was beautiful during our stay. The Palmer Hill Trail and Andes Rail Trail are nearby and kid friendly.
Kitchen is well equipped, living areas are tastefully furnished and the fireplace is cozy. Nicholas is very responsive and helpful. We will be returning for another stay.
Wonderful house and setting and setting and an easy 2 minute drive to the hamlet of Andes or a short walk. Spacious and lovely. Would certainly come back.
