Gorgeous property with incredible views. Very peaceful. House had everything we needed. Kids loved the projector to watch a movie. Cute towns nearby and festival was going on while we were there.
Gorgeous views. great layout.  perfect for the family.

The house is lovely, very comfortable and well appointed. The grounds are really incredible and you can spend days just exploring them. Nicholas was very friendly and responsive to any issues that arose during our stay. We had a great time and would definitely come back!

We loved this place so much, the house was cozy, and well designed to feel at home without feeling cramped. The private pond was so much fun, it’s a small walk from the house, with beautiful scenic views. At night the view of the star was spectacular, match with a nice camp fire will make your stay memorable. Can recommend more to book this house.
Beautiful place, private, serene, close to town!
Always a pleasure staying here! We’ve come multiple times and have always been pleased with our accommodations. Great location, and the pond on the property is really stunning!
Had such a great time with the family awesome place and nick could not of been more helpful  😃

I stay at a lot of ABNB's, and this might be the best place I've ever stayed. The house seems new (or is just kept that way), is put together with an eye for detail and has many novel design features. The decor is interesting and tasteful. The bathrooms seem brand new, spotless and with what appear to be expensive and unusual fixtures, a giant modern tub, and showers that are also custom, modern and top-quality. The bottom floor has a very interesting and fun quadruple bunk bed feature built into one wall of a large room that kids will really love.  The beds themselves are actually more adult sized, and a full grown man could sleep there without discomfort.  The deck is great, with an unblemished and bucolic viewshed. The furniture and beds are all WAY above average quality. Then there's the little pond a little ways down the property that has a dock and gazebo-like shelter. This is a great place to hang out, and the swimming is great, not too much mucky or weedy. This place is awesome

The house would benefit from new furniture and AC. I get it up on the mountain usually is cool but the house got HOT. Also never mentioned the fact that there is no cellphone reception for many miles. It’s important for someone to know purely for safety reasons…. Check-in instructions were send after I arrived at the property. So, make sure you let them know while you still have reception and can receive texts. The house is fine  the scenery is beautiful and calming and  has enough for a long stay. I would recommend if youre looking to go off grid.

The property was our perfect getaway from the city. With three boys and a dog, the pond and acres for exploring were heaven. The house was well-appointed and Nick was incredibly responsive. It was exactly what we needed.
Amazing location and views, perfect for a weekend getaway.
Beautiful space and views

This is our second time staying at this home because we loved it so much last year. Again everything was wonderful and it’s a such a special house. Nicholas also offered us an early check in and check out which we appreciated so much. The amenities are fabulous (we love the steam shower!) and amazing to look out at and walk the beautiful and huge land the house sits on. Thanks for everything, hope we get to visit again soon!
Such a beautiful place to stay at and definitely interested in booking for the fall season! awesome scenery

We had a very nice stay. The house is well appointed and confrotable. Liked the floor heat and the fireplace is awesome. The top of the property is amazing. We will look to come back in the summer to enjoy the pond house and views more.
Great house on beautiful property with incredible views.
Beautiful home and property with great amenities!
Stayed here for work it was much nicer than any hotel and had all of the amenities for a great vacation as well as daily living. I would consider going here for a vacation too

Absolutely stunning home. Very cosy in the main living room with a huge fireplace. Situated on a beautiful piece of land, with amazing walks right out the front door. The lake plus lake house is another real highlight. Cannot wait to come again
Perfect balance of getting away from it all while feeling at home.  The house is awesome.  Beautiful and comfortable.  Nicholas is an excellent host.
Great home. Thank you.

This lovely house was perfect for our two families. Our boys loved the bunk bed room and the grownups loved the main bedroom and heavenly bath. Beautiful views and lovely property to walk around. The boys enjoyed hiking up to the pond and catching salamanders. The grown ups loved being able to walk to the adorable town of Andes and the fantastic bar hangout: Wayside Cider.

So being a big dog family, typically our dogs have to stay home on our vacations. Nick was gracious enough to permit Silas our 200# Newfoundland to visit the Catskills with us. Due to past surgeries he was unable to tackle the steps to the main floor of the house, so spent his nights on his pad in the mud room. During the day though, he and our other dogs were in paradise! Early morning and evening hikes about the property were wonderful. Everything so peaceful and quiet. Other than some mini-bikes off in the distance, I wondered at times if we were alone in the mountains. Such a cool Airbnb experience, thank you Nick for sharing this magical estate with others. We would love to bring Silas back next fall. Thanks again
Great cozy spot in a quiet neighborhood very close to shops and restaurants downtown!
A great place to stay with very responsive hosts!
David and Karen were fantastic host. They were super friendly. They responded almost instantly. They gave great recommendations. The place was beautiful looked just like the pictures it was so nice.

We had a very enjoyable stay! The house was super clean and perfect for 4 adults. The hosts are very responsive and the house provided everything we needed...and had some hidden gems! It was a great time and a stay we will remember for a long time.

Highly recommend to anyone visiting the Finger Lakes area!  This is hands down a favorite!  We will be recommending to friends/family and will be returning to this beautiful home to enjoy another stay!

Can't say enough great things about Dave & Karen's place.  The town is adorable - we met so many nice people. Vern at Vern's Bakery was awesome and his hot out of the oven cinnamon roll & pumpkin danish were ridiculously good.  Shops were so fun and the whole town was immaculate and so picturesque.  The cottage was so comfy and we loved every single space.  They thought of everything!  The beds were super comfortable.  A fully stocked coffee tea bar made our mornings so easy.  LOTS of extras and I won't give away the best - you have to visit to check it out.  The wineries, Glen Watkins hiking, Timber Stone Grill, Park Inn...I could go on and on.  GO VISIT you will have the most relaxing, peaceful time.  Thanks Dave & Karen for making your AirBnb a home away from home!

Great stay! Every thing in the home is exactly as described/pictured in the listing with thoughtful added touches/surprises that really made our stay!
The home is clean, the beds are comfortable and we had everything we needed to make ourselves at home for the weekend. Also loved that it was just a short 10 minute walk to shops and restaurants.
I would not hesitate to stay again!

We had a great stay at David and Karen's Cozy Cottage . They thought of every way to make their home to feel like home .Home was very clean , had all amenities needed, very comfy bed . Was in a nice neighborhood and was in walking distance to downtown Hammondsport  and to boat docks at the lake ! Would definitely stay here again .

We absolutely loved our stay in Hammondsport. The village itself was a great mix of shops and restaurants. Keuka Lake had a great variety of wineries, breweries and distilleries, all of which are a must try.
The house itself blew us away. From the hot tub on the back back, to the modern kitchen and bathrooms, it was everything you could ask for.
Wonderful home in a walkable neighborhood.  This was our second stay at this location.  Cozy and comfortable with several surprise amenities.

We absolutely loved our stay at David and Karen's house! The house is extremely well done, clean, and has everything we needed to enjoy our stay in the area. From the fully stocked kitchen and extra clean bathrooms to the comfy beds, cozy living room and fantastic outdoor space, it was perfect for our group of two couples. David and Karen are excellent hosts - extremely commuicative and friendly. They've clearly put a lot of effort and pride into this house and it shows. We especially enjoyed the surprise they left for us! I'd recommend this place to anyone looking to stay in the area and will definitely stay here again if we ever make it back! Thanks David and Karen!
We absolutely loved our weekend stay here. The place is clean and super cute. It has everything you need already there, which makes packing much easier. We will be back again!

We absolutely loved staying at the cottage! Not only was the home beautiful, David and Karen went out of their way to curate a special experience for us! They had absolutely everything you needed and could have wanted. Their coffee and tea bar was A+++ with both nespresso and various teas to choose from! We are looking forward to booking again with David and Karen in the future!
Truly such an amazing experience! I wish we could give it more than 5 stars. The location is perfect and the kitchen was so well equipped. We had so much fun and we’ll def be back.

David and Karen leave nothing to chance. They have clearly invested time, money and creativity into making this a special home. What was initially booked as a prime location to Hammondsport and for a local wedding my wife and I were attending, has now risen to a vacation spot for the family in the future. Everything down to the furnishings, fixtures, coffee/tea, blankets, decor, odds and ends was chosen with a close, careful and thoughtful mind. The hosts were proactive, responsive and considerate in all communications. Highly recommend.
Clean and cute house. Close to downtown and the lake. Hosts were friendly, responsive and helpful. We enjoyed our stay.
Wonderful home,  great location and very responsive hosts.   Would definitely stay again.
Beautiful cottage! Well maintained and newly renovated. Easy to get to several finger lakes. Would stay again!
Cute and clean space. Hosts were helpful and responsive. Cool history behind the area.

Such a wonderful place! This is one of our very favorite Airbnbs. The home is tastefully decorated, clean, cozy, and very well appointed. Karen & David thought of everything their guests would need. Nestled in the sweet town of Hammondsport, it’s an easy stroll to restaurants and shops. We celebrated my husband’s birthday, along with my sister and brother in law, and it was the perfect place for a 2 couple getaway to the Finger Lakes. We enjoyed morning coffee on the front porch, and evenings on the beautiful back patio. The hosts are very helpful and responsive, and they even left us a little surprise. We loved looking through the photo album of how you transformed the house. (I’d LOVE to chat more about it!)
Thanks for sharing your home. We’ll definitely be back!
Ben & Susan
The house was beautiful and very nice. Will come back.
Just the perfect place for two couples!  Appreciated all of the special touches.  Probably one of our top rentals.  We will add this wonderful place to the top of our list.

Wonderful place to stay.  From the moment we walked in, we were impressed.  The decor was beautiful, the house was immaculate and a perfect size for 2 couples.  Karen was very responsive when we had a question.  This was our first time to the finger lakes region and if we return we will definitely go back to this house.  The house is fully equipped with everything you would need.  I have rented  many places before and this house is one of the very best we have stayed in.  Although we didn't use the backyard much (we were so busy) it was very relaxing and beautiful.

David and Karen were gracious hosts for their lovely cottage that was very comfortable, quite and full of amenities including some very nice surprises. Thank you . I would highly recommend staying with them for anyone who wants to enjoy the finger lakes or is just looking for a relaxing getaway!

This house was perfect for our visit to Hammondsport.  My husband and I loved being able to walk to restaurants, shops, and the public dock.  The house is well supplied and nicely decorated.  The hot tub and front porch swing were favorite spots for relaxing.  The neighborhood was quiet and it was easy for us to visit various lakes and towns.  We would love to stay here again!

David and Karen have created the perfect lake getaway! Their Airbnb is stunning, with many amenities and much more, they went above and beyond to ensure our stay was great! We appreciated all the small details from the decor to much much more. The backyard space is surely one we hope to return to in the future! David and Karen are quick to respond to questions and truly keep a tidy and entertaining space for guests to enjoy. As someone who makes it out to Keuka each year, this Airbnb is a must!

We loved this house! It had everything we needed for a very comfortable stay for 5 nights. The beds are very comfortable and it’s nice that you can adjust the temp to your preferences in each bedroom. The kitchen had everything we needed to cook and make delicious coffee in the morning.
The location is within nice walking distance to the town and water.
There will be a nice surprise for you when you arrive! Make sure to read the welcome guide and guest book reviews.
The owners are very responsive and helpful if you need anything. We can’t wait to go back!

We loved our stay at the Curtiss Cottage! This cottage is so comfy and cozy and filled with historic touches. Karen and Dave have provided everything anyone could need, and more! Their love for the beautiful Finger Lakes region and it's compelling hero, Glenn Curtiss, is clearly evident and enriches the experience in staying at their gorgeous cottage. Please be sure to read all their notes in the blue binder -- a fun surprise awaits you! We loved being able to walk downtown -- especially for the Service Station FLX coffee shop. We would definitely stay here again. Thank you, Karen and Dave, for a special weekend!

This home was beautiful with a great history behind it. We loved everything about the home before we even arrived. After arriving we fell in love even more. I am a vineyard manager in Ohio and after arriving at the home it became more special to us. We would visit this home again and would highly recommend it to others. It was the perfect getaway for my wife and I while we visited family.
Cute and comfy home in a convenient location. David and Karen were communicative and provided clear and helpful instructions that made check in easy.

We had a wonderful stay at David and Karen’s place! The home was exactly as described- clean, cozy, and beautifully decorated. Everything was spotless when we arrived and check-in/out was smooth and easy.
The location was perfect, close to town and all the local attractions, which made getting around super convenient.
David and Karen were excellent hosts. It really felt like a home away from home. We highly recommend their place to anyone visiting the area. Thank you again for a great stay- we hope to be back soon!
The stay was exactly what we were looking for! We loved our stay here.
Great stay! Clean, welcoming with great views. Close to lots of breweries and wineries. Perfect well kept cottage. Everything we expected, plus more.

My husband and I stayed for our anniversary weekend from Philadelphia,PA. Home is beautiful,cozy,right on the lake and there are many things to do and places to eat nearby. We were very thankful to be able to share this space! If you get the chance, take the trip!

Didn’t want to leave. There were nice welcome gifts, it was very clean.  We were excited as soon as we walked in.  Michelle and Tom answered any of our questions .  They were great hosts very responsive . It really is  a central location for all fun activities in finger lakes . We had never been to finger lakes and said this was the best girls weekend we have had. We are already thinking about next year and coming back.  Thank you for your beautiful home!
Had an excellent stay in a beautiful area, thank you!
Clean cottage. Beautiful property. Everything was as pictured, and Michele was very responsive. We had a great stay on Seneca Lake! We hope to visit again next year!

We had a wonderful stay at Michele's house on Seneca Lake! The house has everything you could need. The kitchen was open and well equipped. The bathroom was very clean and spacious. And the location of her house is just beautiful.
The private dock with a dock side bar was just amazing. And along with the house came plenty of things to use like kayaks, a paddle board, outdoor games and much more. And the private dock right on Seneca Lake is amazing. However, the best part of the experience with renting this house was the host Michele! She was so accommodating and helpful. We cant thank her enough for all her hospitality. We would definitely rent this house again. And recommend any other person looking to stay on Seneca Lake to do the same.

This is a great place to stay. Wonderful location. We spent four nights here and took day trips to explore the surrounding area. The deck with the incredible sunset views and the dock were greatly appreciated. The house was very clean and well stocked. I highly recommend this place.
We loved this lakefront cabin and it was in the perfect area to visit Seneca Lake.
Michele's home was beautiful and relaxing.  The dock and lake access were amazing.  The proximity to hiking and vineyards was perfect.  Highly recommend!

We had a lovely stay with our family of four. Our teenage sons loved swimming and fishing in the lake. We explored the area and parks taking day trips to Ithaca, Watkins Glenn and visited many restaurants and wineries.  We thought everything was comfortable and clean in the cottage and the dockside bar was fun and having a fridge down there was awesome.  We loved the Finger Lakes region!

We loved staying at Michele's place! The deck was perfect for morning coffee and the dock area was just beautiful with plenty of seating and a covered area that was perfect for some of our hot days.  The kitchen had all that we needed, and we used the grill outside for cooking hamburgers.  The area has plenty of wineries and is close to Watkins Glen. We spent most of our time just hanging out at the cottage, swimming, and relaxing. Thanks, Michele!

This was one of our best Airbnb experiences. It made me really thankful that Michelle‘s family would share this beautiful lake house, and all the amenities, with us. The house was comfy. We enjoyed the deck every morning and evening as we drank our coffee or had dinner. We spent our evenings on the dock, swimming or kayaking, and my young adult children were so excited to run out and get s’mores supplies one night for the fire pit. It was a lovely location and a lovely trip for us.
Great place on the lake

Michele and Tom,
Thank you again for allowing us to stay in your beautiful home!
Everything was as expected and much more! Lots of swimming and of course some fishing was involved (apparently my husband missed that huge bass he saw)!
Anyway thank you again- hope to see your beautiful home on the lake in the future!
The Robertson Gang ~~~

Michele and Tom were wonderful hosts. They were very responsive and took the time to make recommendations including doing some research on some requested options for us. The place was clean and fully stocked. We appreciated not having to bring sheets, towels, toilet and paper towels, or soap! They even had some k cups. The view is stunning and worth the stay. We would definitely come back to their home. Not a negative thing to say.

Second year staying at this lovely cottage. The place is a home away from home.
Wonderful place to relax and unwind.
Great views and location. Host is wonderful. Will be back.

We loved this place.  The host provided entry instructions before I asked.  The place was very easy to find.  They left detailed instructions and plenty of information on local businesses and attractions.  We loved the private dock equipped with kayaks, a paddle board, plenty of seating, and a fridge where we could leave drinks and snacks without going back to the main house.  The porch on the house is the perfect place for breakfast and coffee and a beautiful sunset view.  We will absolutely consider this spot if we come back to the Finger Lakes.

The house has beautiful views of the lake and kayaks available for exploring. It was clean and had everything you need to have a relaxing time in the finger lakes wine country.  The welcome gifts were a nice touch. We are already planning a return trip!
Perfect lake view home. We would gladly stay again.
We loved the cottage. Was just the right size for our needs and the large balcony had a beautiful view. I enjoyed many hours with coffee and magazines. Thank you!

Great place, great location, my stay was great, blessed with a few days of nice weather to hike in the area and come back to enjoy the dock bar and lake. And a few cruddy days to enjoy the house itself. Did not disappoint, would come back!

What a great few days we had at Michele’s house.  The dock, bar and lake were the best part and where we spend most of our time. The house was very clean and had everything we needed to settle in and call it home for the days we were there. Michele was very responsive and answered all my messages within minutes. Looking forward to staying there again in the future.

This house was fantastic and perfect for our little get away. Just wish we had more time to enjoy the lake amenities. I’d totally love to stay there again
Thank you

Our stay at Michele's place for the week was so relaxing and enjoyable. The views of the lake were spectacular and we enjoyed sitting out on the deck and the dock watching the amazing sunsets. Having the dock bar was special and we had fun using the kayaks. We like to cook and Michele had every kitchen tool you could think of and the grill right on the deck was so convenient. There is a lot to do in the area and the location was perfect for exploring hiking trails and water falls in the surrounding parks as well as wine tastings in the local vineyards. Michele responded immediately to questions we had and made great suggestions on things to do. It was hard to leave and we hope to return to her place on our next Finger Lakes trip.

We greatly enjoyed our stay at Michele & Tom's place. We wanted a place right on the lake & this place is spot on! Lake views in windows, right out the patio doors to a cozy backyard with a lake view, then it's a quick walk down sturdy stairs to their dock & the lake. This place was quiet & beautiful. Our bed was comfy & we had the best night's sleep in months. The amenities were as described. We really didn't want for anything & there were a few complementary suprizes waiting for us when we got there! It's a short trip back to the roads along the lake with plenty of options for wineries, breweries, distilleries, & restaurants. We can HIGHLY recommend Michele & Tom's place! ***** all the way!

Michele was a warm and friendly host, very responsive. Everything we needed to know was communicated prior to arrival, with additional details upon arrival. The property was even more impressive than the description - immaculate, well appointed with so many thoughtful details. We felt very welcome, as if we were staying at a close friend’s home. The lakeside setting was perfect, beautiful view with great deck at the house and fabulous dock facilities below. Lots to see and do in the area.
We loved our getaway and look forward to a return visit!
Such an amazing, beautiful place with great hosts. a wonderful place to stay!

We had a wonderful time at Michele and her husband’s house! We felt right at home as soon as we entered their clean and comfortable house.
Unfortunately it rained most of the time but their house was so close to the lake we still felt like we were somewhere special. The views from the windows were spectacular and we enjoyed watching the entertaining squirrels on their deck.
The location was absolutely perfect with amazing restaurants and wineries a short drive away.
I have to applaud Michele and her husband’s communication skills. I had a question and they both answered extremely quickly without knowing the other spouse was responding at the same time. That’s some great service!
We would happily stay there again and appreciate that our very wet trip was saved by this wonderful house and hosts.

Had a wonderful stay at this perfect location for a quiet get away. Close to many wineries, breweries and restaurants. The dock was great to sit out and enjoy the beautiful view of Seneca Lake. Firepit was setup so no struggling trying to find any kindling to start the fire. Can't say enough about this beautiful place and the attention to detail that Michele has put into it. Can't wait to stay again!!

Everything about Michele’s place was wonderful. Directions to which house it was on the street were great. House was very clean and we were welcomed with cookies and a bottle of wine. Many thanks for those surprises.
The dock was enjoyed for a short while as the weather was very chilly and rainy. We hope to come back another time to enjoy the dock more.
Many wineries are close by and parks to explore too.
I would highly recommend Michele’s place.

It was an adventurous getaway to hike the  Watkins Glen Gorge & visit a few of the many wineries in the Seneca Lake area. Michele's lakehouse was an amazing bonus to our plans. The home itself & its spectacular views of Seneca Lake were exactly what is needed when visiting the finger lakes. Michele was helpful & quick to respond. Very easy getting in & checking out. Fall Foliage was breathtaking & look forward to visiting again in the summer to enjoy the Lake amenities. This property is the perfect choice for your visit, you will not be disappointed!
Michele’s cottage is such a gem. The waterfront property is stunning and is well equipped for activities and relaxing. Michele was a gracious and flexible host. We will definitely stay here again.
Michele was a wonderful host. She provided excellent recommendations and responded immediately to any questions. Her home was beautiful, charming and spotless.
This gem was all that was described and more.  Being outside overlooking the lake brought serenity and peace.  Just what we needed.  Would do again in a heartbeat!

This stay was incredible! The house is so perfect. Cozy and right on the lake with so many things to do! Kayaks, stand-up paddle board, cornhole, chipping golf holes, a cute little bar on the dock, hammock and ring on the string! The house is stocked with games, and the binder is so detailed with so much information on things to see and do nearby! It was so great being in a place that stocked so many things and clearly spent a lot of time focusing on the details. Absolutely amazing. We had the best time and would highly recommend it to anyone else looking for a great getaway at the finger lakes!
Absolutely perfect! Clean & comfortable. Exactly as described. Beautiful cottage & beautiful surroundings right on the lake. We can't wait to go back again. Thank you for sharing your place 🙏
Exactly what we wanted: great place near our favorite area breweries and direct lake access. Hope to return.
Amazing location. The lake access was very enjoyable.  The places was as described. I would definitely rent this house again!

We enjoyed our stay… the lake access ( make sure you are up to walking many stairs) the sliding glass doors that provide a beautiful lake view and the proximity of the many breweries, wineries and restaurants were my highlights.
Wonderful lake house in a beautiful area. Very well stocked and everything was setup and ready to enjoy our trip. 5/5 would recommend to anyone and will probably use again in the future.
The cottage was as described and lovely.  Very quiet and peaceful with spectacular views of the lake.  Close to a number of wineries.  Overall a great place and can’t wait to go back.

The cottage exceeded our expectations. It was well cared for and the hosts thought of all of those things you may need for the stay. The decor was tasteful and the cottage was spotless. The spectacular view and access to Seneca lake were outstanding. Kayaks were available for our use. Guests can choose from three seating areas: the deck , lawn area with the fire pit or the dock and tiki bar side at the lake.
We'll definitely return!

Michele has an absolutely beautiful place on the lake. We had a fantastic week! The property far exceeded our expectations. The location was so central and convenient to many wineries and attractions. Coming back to the house after exploring the region everyday was wonderful. The sunset views are truly spectacular. They really thought of every small detail you may need during your stay! We will definitely be back!!

Such a great spot! Many nice places to relax and enjoy the lake and your company - the kitchen island, the spacious deck, the fire pit on the lawn overlooking the lake, and of course the dock with the bar. We would definitely rent again.

Great spot!  Great location in Hector!  Toni’s diner and the Stonecat are two of our favorite restaurants in the finger lakes and they are both within 5 minutes of the cottage.  Osmos and Hillick and Hobbs are two of the best winery’s and they also are within 15 minutes.  The dock is great and the view up the lake is amazing!  Being on the East side of the lake affords you the most beautiful sunsets!

Lovely cottage on the lake and a wonderful place to relax.  Cottage was as described.  Located close to Watkins Glen and great wineries.  Enjoyed soaking in the sunshine and cooling off in the lake. Host was great and very responsive.  Will be back!
Absolutely wonderful stay! Such a beautiful property, and wonderful hosts! Super quick responding to questions and very accommodating !
The cottage was beautiful! Michele was very responsive, thoughtful and accommodating! We loved the dock, kayaking, swimming, the hammock, the views and the peacefulness!
Lovely cottage with all the amenities you will need. The dock bar was awesome to have. Nice to be able to use the paddleboard and kayaks. Highly recommend this cottage.

Casey’s place was perfect for our family reunion. Three bedrooms with en suites made for a very comfortable stay. We used the well-stocked kitchen a lot, enjoying leisurely dinners together at her place. We highly recommend this home for vacations.

An absolutely beautiful home with a view to die for.
Well appointed and equipped with all the amenities you need for a relaxing get away.
Ms. Casey is a wonderful host, and always responded quickly to all my questions.
Thank you for making our family get away so memorable.
Gorgeous views! House was beautiful and clean. Very spacious home. Short drive to wineries and downtown Penn Yan restaurants. Had a great Mother's Day weekend!

I have to say that this is one of the nicest clean places we have stayed at.  the views and feel from the house were spectacular and very inviting.  The house was well equipped with daily needed items in both the bathrooms and kitchen.  We so enjoyed our mornings with the provided coffee and creamers!!  Evening sunsets were spectacular as the sky changed many colors with reflections on the lake.  The downstairs king bedroom was absolutely incredible with the windows and views 👍🙂
Casey’s place was absolutely lovely. The view was beautiful and the surrounding area was immaculate. She was a wonderful host!
This was our second time returning to Casey’s place. Great location and very clean!

באנו עם 5 ילדים והיינו במקום שהוא חלום
בית גדול חדרים מרווחים שפע של מיטות שמיכות כל מה שצריך
מרפסת מהממת ישר לאגם
מטבח מצוצחצח עם כל הציוד שצריך
מכונת קפה מעולה
פשוט מקום מושלם
קיבלנו מענה מיידי לכל שאלה ועניין אין יותר טוב מזה
Beautiful place to host a girls weekend!!
One of the best experiences ever

This was our second time staying at this Airbnb, and it was just as amazing as we remembered—if not better! The view is absolutely stunning. The house was spotless, well-stocked, and had everything we needed for a comfortable and relaxing stay. It's clear Casey and John really care about creating a great experience. We’re already looking forward to our next visit!
Beautiful getaway for a girls trip!!
The home is just lovely - directly on the lake with amazing views! The house was fully stocked with anything you would need. It is in an excellent location close to Penn Yan. We had a wonderful stay!

Absolutely perfect rental. The house was extremely clean. Very comfortable beds. Gorgeous view even on a rainy weekend! Close to many wineries and restaurants and a short drive to Geneva. The price was better than many as well. I would absolutely rent this property again!
We loved this beautiful lake house, and will definitely be coming back again! SO many bathrooms which was absolutely magical for our large family!

This home was exactly as advertised, absolutely spotless, in a great location for exploring the finger lakes, and just what we needed for a relaxing getaway. We both said we'd love to come back and stay again during another season. In mid-March, we were able to watch the ice on the lake break up and some waterfowl dive underneath the cracks in the ice to find food.

The house is great and just as listed. It had everything we needed and everything worked. Casey was quick to answer anytime we messaged. All around a great experience. We would definately stay here again!

This is our second girls' weekend at this cottage, we enjoy the location, cleanliness, number of bedrooms and bathroom and it's close to shopping, wineries and restaurants!!!!
Highly recommend :)

This property was absolutely perfect for our group of 6 adults. The house is so much larger than it appears coming down the driveway!  The property was very clean , nicely decorated with a really well stocked kitchen which we used for dinner on several occasions. It’s rare to find a place with three king beds with each having an attached private bathroom. The view over the lake was great as well and the price was very fair. I would highly recommend this property!

This property is beautiful with stunning views of Keuka Lake. With three bedrooms, each with its own full bath, it’s the ideal place to enjoy the area with family &/or friends. The kitchen was very well stocked and we enjoyed cooking a full meal. Everything was clean and comfortable. Casey was very responsive if we needed anything. It snowed overnight and someone was there bright & early to shovel snow and plow the driveway. We’re looking forward to staying here again in the future.

We had a great weekend with friends and was the perfect spot for us. Would definitely return! The house was very nice, for 5 adults. Well stocked/felt homey and was close to Penn Yan. Peaceful and relaxing.

My sisters and I loved our stay at Caseys Place.  The worst part was we couldn’t stay longer.   We hope to return in the summer.   Casey communicated back very quickly when I reached out with questions.  The cottage was clean and comfortable with beautiful views of the lake.

This was the third time that we rented this Air B and B. We rent in the winter and enjoy watching the weather changes, freezing lake and the ducks and geese as well as wine tasting. We like this house because of the three bedrooms with attached bathrooms and the common space. We will rent again if available.
The place was so dreamy. Would definitely visit again

Many thanks to Casey for letting us use her house. My granddaughters and I had a wonderful time at Keuka in the winter. The views are amazing ! We woke every morning to lake views and spent part of the day watching the water. The rest of the day we explored the area and did many fun things . Thank you for your hospitality.

This is a wonderful property for couples and families. Three primary suites, two on the main level if steps are concern. The kitchen is well appointment. We travel with an electric skillet just in case, but no need here. Very clean with plenty of comfortable seating for all. The deck and views are fabulous.  Great location for local restaurants and grocery stores. Check in was a breeze. Hope to return in the future!!

This is the 2nd time we have stayed here and the house is in a great location not far from wineries and restaurants. Having 3 king size bedrooms all with bathrooms is fantastic when you have 6 people staying. There is even 1/2 bathroom near the kitchen and living room for convenience if watching tv on the couch. Beautiful scenery right on the lake. This place has all amenities we needed and we will be staying again!
Beautiful home right on the lake. Open kitchen/living space with deck looking out on the lake.  Plenty of parking and no steps to the front door.

It's a very cute cottage on Keuka lake, and actually quite a bit more spacious than the photos make it appear. The bedrooms all having ensuite bathrooms worked really well for us and our teen daughter. The weather wasn't great over the long weekend we were there, so we didn't get to really enjoy the outdoor space, but there are tons of windows in the main living area which offer fabulous views of the lake.
The house is in a great location.  House was very clean and well stocked! Great view! We would definitely stay again!!
Loved every minute of our stay.   Great view of the lake from the living room and the bed.

The house was spotless. We absolutely loved the place and location.  Casey was great with communications.  The house was very well equipped.  It was a relaxing time staying there. We would most definitely stay there again if we tour the wine country again.

Casey's home was just as pictured.  Perfect for the only 1 night accommodations which the 5 of us stayed for. Having the flexibility of 3 separate bedrooms with their own private full bath was a huge plus for all of us! Only wish that the weather had cooperated more to be able to sit outside on the deck & to enjoy the kayaks out on the lake, but the views from inside looking out were spectacular. Would return for a longer stay during the warmer months to use as a home base with others to travel to local wineries & area sites.

The house was absolutely beautiful, and the location on the lake was amazing. We had a wonderful four day stay. Casey was easy to deal with and very friendly. The house was well stocked with everything we needed and more. I would stay again in a heartbeat!
The house had everything and more!  Perfect location, quiet, great views and of course, close to some really good wineries. Thank you!!

First time in the Finger Lakes and this house was just perfect! Beautiful home..bedrooms and we each had our on bathroom! Lots of space and well stocked with what we needed! The view of the lake was amazing! Being there in the fall was so
Breathtaking! The host was always responsive and helpful for any questions. We will be back!
Casey keeps the place clean and well stocked.  She's got canoes that renters can use.  Nice lake view!  We're coming back!
Our family enjoyed our stay. Beautiful home and great location!

Casey’s place was absolutely breathtaking with beautiful views of lake  Keuka. The house is immaculate with a large and spacious sunroom, big bedrooms, well stocked kitchen and clean bathrooms. We found everything we needed to cook for 2 days while at the house. The house is right on the beach with Kayaks that you can use in the lake. Overall, a lovely place and would definitely visit the place soon in the future!

Beautiful house and setting. There are 2 bedrooms on the main level and a great room with beaufifull views and a well planned out kitchen.  There is one bedroom downstairs which also has beautiful views. Layout and furnishings could not be better.

Our stay was wonderful. The accommodations were beautiful, clean, and well stocked. Each bedroom had an adjoining full bathroom. Each room was spacious and the scenery was lovely.  The entire living room had surround windows for a constant view of the lake.    The only recommendation would be that we wish the slider doors had screens so that we could leave the door open. Overall, it was a fantastic stay. We would definitely stay there again.
Beautiful scenery right on Keuka Lake that is also close to Penn Yan 's restaurants and shops. Comfortable furniture and beds and ideal set up for a relaxing stay.

Casey’s home on Keuka is so beautiful! The kitchen is fully stocked, the beds are super comfy and the deck is lovely to sit on while having coffee and enjoying the lake view. I highly recommend staying here. The 6 of us can’t wait to visit again!

Beautiful area. Quiet neighbors. Casey was extremely accommodating with our sensitivity towards unscented linens and blankets. I really appreciated that she laundered the linens in unscented products prior to our arrival. The nearby town of Penn Yan is great and just a few minutes (6-7 minutes) away from the house. Great variety of local and well known restaurants and grocery stores. Plenty of nearby wineries to explore. My husband and I had a great time kayaking during the day, and spending the nights around the campfire drinking the wine we purchased from a local winery. For those who fish, I recommend renting a boat and trolling out away from the house. The water off the end of the dock is shallow and there aren’t any fish. Highly recommended this home and Casey. Thank you.

It was a lovely setting on the water. We had a relaxing time sitting on the porch in the evenings after a swim. The kayaks were fun to take out.  Casey’s  listing was a great base from which to explore the area. We hope for a return visit in the future.

Awesome setting to call “home” for a week! Spacious accommodations with private spaces made it perfect for couples traveling with others. Loved having 3 masters all with comfortable king beds. The large lakeside deck was perfect for morning coffee to afternoon NY wine-time. The extras like laundry, well-appointed kitchen , and kayaks made it the perfect place to enjoy this beautiful lake! The location is perfect to run into town, visit wineries and explore nearby lakes. Casey was quick to respond and offered some area recommendations. We would definitely encourage others to stay here!

Casey's place is extremely clean and like new. There are 3 bedroom suites with their own private full bathrooms. Also a half bath off the main living room. Extremely comfortable furniture and lovely decor. The deck has stunning views of Keuka Lake. There were 4 kayaks available for our use. There is a covered patio so you can enjoy the lake view even if it rains. Close to Penn Yan, Lakeside Golf Course, and several wineries and distilleries. The deck and patio furniture was plentiful and very comfortable. Kitchen supplied with lovely dishes, pots, utensils, everything you could possibly need. Brand new appliances including dishwasher, washer and dryer. My family of 6 adults (3 couples) had plenty of room. King beds, very comfortable. Smart tv in the main living room. Casey replied promptly to every question. We would love to stay here again, but it is a bit expensive. Honestly though, it was the nicest place we ever rented, and we have been visiting Keuka Lake for over 30 years.

We really enjoyed our stay at Casey's home in Penn Yan! The house was beautiful and clean with plenty of space for gathering or finding a quiet spot to read a book. The view of the lake was stunning and the water was perfect for swimming. There are 4 kayaks available to use and plenty of outdoor deck seating to enjoy the view.
The kitchen is well stocked and the space is perfect for a large group. We really enjoyed our stay!

Beautiful house in a location that couldn’t be more perfect. Fully stoked kitchen and new appliances made it possible for us to enjoy our dinners with the best view ever. Very close to wonderful wineries too! Highly recommend.
Great host and great spot for our family of 4. House was stacked with amenities. It’ll cut down on our list of things to bring for when we stay here again!

Beautiful house and location.  We had a great time.  The house was very clean,  kitchen was well stocked with dishes, glasses and silverware.  Plenty of extra towels, paper towels, toilet paper. The kayaks and access to the lake were fantastic. We felt right at home. Would definitely stay again.

Our stay at the Keuka Cottage was magnificent! We came to visit Keuka Spring Vineyard’s newly remodeled and upgraded tasting room and facilities and the cottage was a great place to stay to have access to the winery and vineyards, tour other lakes in the region, and hike. The best part about the cottage is the hand crafted interior that fills the space in this family home rich with history. So grateful they share this beauty with others. It feels warm the moment you walk inside and just gets better and better as you discover the art-filled rooms. 10/10 would recommend.

Our stay here was one of the most spectacular stays we’ve ever had. Starting with the house…. Wow. I can’t imagine a more perfect place to stay in the finger lakes. You can tell it was built with love and is full of great memories. Each room has a stunning view of the lake, comfortable beds, and feels like home. The outdoor grill, dock, and fire pit area make you feel like you’re in a cozy dream. Allen & Edwin were extremely gracious hosts, very responsive, and provided lots of great information about the area. The area is unbeatable. We enjoyed many incredible wineries all within a very short distance. We enjoyed our stay and will never forget it!
This was a amazing place to stay with our family and we will definitely come back
Don’t even hesitate - just book
Beautiful home and location, excellent communication.

Just a spectacular week in a beautiful setting.  We loved the house, the area and the lake.  Allen and Edwin are very considerate hosts - the house has so many thoughtful details.  The beds were particularly awesome!  We definitely hope to enjoy this house again next summer - we had a wonderful time.
Another great vacation at Allen and Edwin’s lake house. Truly a wonderful spot and a well thought out property with anything you need to have a relaxing vacation. Thanks again!
Cozy and clean property. Host was responsive and thoughtful. Overall a very positive stay.
The place was so beautiful and peaceful! It felt like the house was floating on the lake. We loved sitting on the dock, taking out the kayaks, and exploring the area!
Best air bnb stay we have ever had! The house is stunning and everything is as described- if not better. We LOVED it! Hope to come back for years to come!
Another great stay at Allen’s home. We look forward to it and it didn’t disappoint!
It was really nice! Well stocked kitchen, comfortable beds, and Great Lake view!

So many wonderful things to say about this cottage and its location on the lake. Spectacular views in a space where the love of woodcrafting is evident every where you look. We wanted for nothing but more time.
We had a great stay and would happily rebook when in the area.

Beautiful location directly on Keuka Lake. Perfect location for touring local wineries.
Edwin and Allen very responsive and attentive.
It was a great girls getaway, perfect place to relax.

We had a wonderful vacation at Allen’s home. The house was so clean and beautiful. The kayaks and SUP were so much fun for the kids and adults. Kids absolutely loved feeding the ducks with the duck food in the mornings. Even the pup was thrilled spending his day swimming and fetching sticks! Would definitely stay here again! Thanks Allen & Edwin!

Our stay at Allan and Edwin’s place was magical! Their home is beautiful and the setting couldn’t be more ideal. We visited with our kids and my parents; it was the perfect spot for relaxing and reconnecting as a family. The dock and lake are gorgeous and we spent a lot of time kayaking and just enjoying the peace and quiet. We will definitely be back!
Would highly recommend and definitely visit again ☺️

We loved every minute of our stay! The house is beautiful inside and very comfortable. What an amazing view, right by the water! We greatly enjoyed star gazing on clear nights, the fire pit right by the water, feeding the ducks, and walking/riding bikes around the neighborhood.

You will LOVE this home, which comfortably accommodates six! We were lucky enough to book on a late cancellation! It’s hard to find dog friendly places, so when this came across my Facebook feed, I knew I had to check it out. This home was perfect for our crew, which included teens, a five year old, and a dog. We borrowed a crate from a local family member and utilized the office area for the dog. Perfect!
The dock and beach areas were perfect for playing, fishing, and relaxing. Definitely wear water shoes! The teens thought they could do without, and quickly discovered unhappy feet from the zebra mussels. The kayak and paddleboard were used daily!
The kitchen is stocked with practically everything imaginable, and more equipped than most lake homes. We are many meals inside for convenience and enjoyed the view from the table. The AC was nice on hot days and nights. The owners have recently upgraded beds, bedding, couch, and bathrooms; they’re beautiful! The home is unique and special for sure.
The decks and dock look old, yet are sturdy and functional. We loved sitting on the deck and dock, especially just rolling out of bed in the morning or for the evening sunsets. The deck has a nice glider; perfect for a drink or reading a book. The outdoor space was quite quiet and private compared to other places we stayed. A nice surprise!
We would absolutely stay here again! The owners were extremely responsive to any questions and checked in frequently during our stay. They obviously care about their home and visitors. Thanks!
Great location! Clean! Great owners with great communication. I can’t recommend staying there enough!

We stayed at Allen’s lake house and we were at peace the whole entire time. Everything was so beautiful and what we wanted! The house is absolutely perfect and I admired the decor for sure. They had all of the necessities and my children enjoyed playing with the toys they had put out for them as well. Thank you for a much needed vacation and I’m praying we can visit again soon!
Truly a lovely place on the lake. Didn’t get to take full advantage of the water due to rain, but beautiful when we were able to. Had everything we needed and was a lovely stay on Keuka.

This was the absolute best location for our girls weekend trip. Loved the house being on the lake.  Allen’s attention to detail to prepare us for arrival, amenities, check in and what to expect were beyond helpful. Would definitely stay at this property again.

We had a great time at Allen’s lake house, check in was so easy and the house itself was so beautifully decorated that it became one of the highlights of our vacation. Hearing the waves at night from our bedrooms was so peaceful and relaxing, and having the deck be so easily accessible was a bonus. We enjoyed feeding the ducks and using the paddle board and kayak, as well as grilling out and playing games around the table. I would definitely stay here again! Thank you so much!

Definitely recommend Allen’s property for a family vacation! Perfect location on the lake that is secluded from neighbors. Close to local wineries & breweries. Spacious and comfortable sleeping accommodations as well as perfect access to the lake for swimming, fishing, kayaking, etc.
We also loved feeding the ducks 🦆
Looking forward to visiting again!

We loved our week here! The house is beautiful, and right on the lake. It’s just a few minutes drive to Hammondsport, but it feels completely secluded. The interior was beautiful and well furnished. We particularly appreciated the access to the kayak, paddle board, and peddle boat.

Thoroughly enjoyed our stay!  We were on the go a lot, so unfortunately didn't get to take advantage of all the great amenities Allen's house has to offer. Gorgeous, quaint interior with stunning views of the lake.  We enjoyed watching sunsets from the dock, stargazing from the deck, feeding the ducks, and even a little fishing, but did not get to try out the "water toys"!  The location was great for our wine tasting and hiking excursions as well as for quick trips in to Hammondsport.  The house was also well stocked with many items you don't always find in a rental but sometimes forget to bring along, like toiletries, coffee filters, and spices.  My family would definitely stay at this property again!

I had a wonderful time at Keuka cottage with my girlfriends! The view of the lake was spectacular and the house was big enough to accommodate all of us! The house was close to restaurants and other fun places. Allen was friendly & communicated with us very well. The only down fall is that the shower water did not heat up for us and was very very cold and the linens/blankets were extremely outdated and many of them had stains so I did not feel comfortable using them. Otherwise, our stay was very lovely and the view of the lake made up for it! I would definitely recommend this stay to other guests!

We had such an amazing time at Allen’s cottage to celebrate my wife’s and our good Friends birthdays! To say that this place is beautiful would be an understatement. He is an amazing woodworker and the cottage showcases his handiwork. He was so kind as he gave us a tour and answered all of our questions regarding fishing off the dock. Each inch of Allen’s place is crafted beautifully and we wish we stayed two weeks instead of two days.
We can’t wait till our next adventure to Allen’s Keuka Cottage.

Beautiful house - can’t get any closer to the water than this! lots of wood and windows looking out over the lake. Nice combination of class and casual... Works well for children. A lan was an outstanding host and was accommodating to our requests! Look forward to next year!

My family and I just got back from a wonderful stay at Allen’s cabin. I have stayed at a lot of rentals over the years, but I’ve never encounter a homeowner quite as gracious and hospitable as Allen! Because of Covid-19 concerns, he wasn’t able to greet us at the cabin as he usually does for his guests—but he was very communicative and easy to reach by text, and he even made us a YouTube video introduction to the cabin. He’s even a thoughtful host to his duck guests who visit the cabin a few times a day, as he left a big bucket of corn for us to feed them with (this was my son’s favorite part of the trip).
The location on Keuka lake is unbeatable. The sunsets were out of this world (but a word of advice for parents of little ones—the sun blasts through the windows even with the blinds down, so you might want to bring some blackout curtains from home, unless you want your kid awake until 10:00 pm!). The water is clear and great for swimming or activities.
While there are a lot of luxury homes in the area, Allen’s is a true, rustic cabin, which I highly prefer. Who needs “fancy” accommodations when Keuka is your backyard? I loved the artisan touches throughout the cabin, including all of Allen’s woodwork and his family’s pottery. The cabin was spacious enough to fit 6 people comfortably, although the twin beds upstairs weren’t the best for adult backs—they’re definitely better suited for children. My only other minor criticism was that the cabin, though generally clean, was a little on the dusty side when we arrived (the floors in particular)—however, I think we were the first renters of the season, which explains the dust.
I did a lot of research before deciding on Allen’s place, and I can tell you, you are *not* going to find a better value for the money in this region. If you’re planning a family vacation and are on the fence about renting this property, just go for it—you won’t regret it!

The location was perfect. Right on the water with easy access to local wineries and a few minute drive into Hammondsport. Access to water amenities like the paddle boat, kayak and paddle board was nice even though we only used the paddle boat due to the water temp. The place could use some updating and some nicer touches could be added but we had a great time and found overall trip to be very nice.

Allen’s Keuka Cottage was perfect for our weekend in finger lakes.
The kitchen had everything we needed to cook a few of our meals.
Plenty of blankets and linens. His home is beautiful a wonderful place to relax

Great location right on the water, and convenient to several wineries and downtown Hammondsport. The owner is a master carpenter, so the house is really unique (in a good way!) and fun to explore. The kitchen was well equipped and very well thought out for a small space; we found everything we needed. We loved sitting on the dock visiting and drinking wine. And two bathrooms were a plus! The beds were clean and worked fine for six adults, although it was kind of tough to figure out where to put a large suitcase in the downstairs bedroom. We would definitely stay at Allen’s place again! He communicated well and was very available if needed.

My family and I have stayed at Allan’s lakeside home a few times and have our return already planned. We love the beauty of the lake, the relaxation this home offers and  the fact that it has everything we need for our visit. We always find new places to explore but our favorite is just hanging out at the lake. Allan is an excellent host and we love coming here.

Allen’s place is excellent.
No one on either side during our stay and probably not for yours (north is just a day-location (no house) and south is very infrequently used. The house has on-street access (rare) and easy, easy stairs to midlevel and to lake. Ample linens. Ample+ medicine cabinet supplies - if you forgot your dentist-level tooth probe, there’s one there :).
Completely re-done, professional interior but enough character in the layout/artwork/appliances to make it a lake experience. You’ll see lots of Allen’s family artwork and his own woodworking too.
The basement level has water toys, overstocked fishing supplies (rods, reels, lures, tackle), floaties, chairs, masks, fins, etc. Quite handy were the 6+ sets of loaner water shoes - I forgot mine.
There’s an electric keyboard and amplified system if you play.
Allen has a huge stash of dry firewood of elite species (cedar, maple, etc.) in the shed you can use so don’t bring firewood.
There is a paddle board, a kayak, a rowboat and a two person paddle craft. There’s also a ready-to-go bass boat for an add-on cost.
The location is minutes from Hammondsport’s excellent shops and dining, Bubba’s bait shop in Pultney, and all the wineries up the east branch to Penn Yan.
Be careful of the wind and the umbrella - wind can change within the hour. Use cinder blocks on the base. Also the house gets hot with the evening as it faces west. The AC system (fan-only does fine) is recommended early evening.
Allen’s place exceeded our expectations and we would definitely stay there again.

The house is conveniently located between Hammondsport and Penn Yan.  We enjoyed the quiet tranquil location right on the water.  Our days were spent cycling around the lake and vineyards . We spent our afternoon and evenings relaxing on the dock, SUP, kyacking and swimming.  The house is equipped with all the necessary kitchen utensils, cookware and plenty of place settings.  We've stayed in other locations but Allen's house has been the best!

My family just returned from a week at Allen’s lake home. This was our second stay and we are already planning to return. The lake is perfect. Clear, not too cold and gorgeous. We had amazing sunsets and swam until after 8 every day. Allen’s home is comfortable and had everything we needed from kitchen utensils to spices and lake floats.  The kayak and boats added to our fun. Allen is always quick to reply for questions.  We felt at home and were so relaxed! We love staying here.

This is a prime location combining great views and privacy in a uniquely crafted cottage.
Try it!
This is our second time staying at Allen cottage. We had an even more enjoyable time than before and everything was as expected! You cannot beat the weather at this time of year! Thanks again!

One word: wonderful! From the responsiveness of the host to the location to the many unexpected small and large touches including spices in the kitchen and plethora of on-site activities. My family had a great time, much of it due to Allen’s thoughtfulness. I can’t recommend this home enough!

Allen’s house was more than you could expect! Beyond amazing views, amenities, and location to local spots. Everything was clean and perfect! You really cant find much of a better place in the area that would have everything you are looking for! 100% would stay again!

Allen lakefront home is nothing short of perfect. This is our second time staying here and it was just as great as the first. Allen's home is literally feet away from the shore allowing you 24 hours of relaxing and ambient sounds. It is equipped, and I cannot stress this enough, with pretty much everything you could possibly imagine you'd need - from kitchen/cooking utensils to extra blankets, toiletries, grill, games, paddle board, boat if you want to rent it... we did last year and the afternoon trips around the lake were so great. Allen responds instantly, his home is beautiful... you'd be lucky to stay here.

The location is ideal. Private yet easy to get to with easy parking. Allen has many water toys for use. The kitchen has all anyone could want. It is so nice to have paper products, soap, toilet paper, tissues, foil, etc on hand for guests. Plenty of bedding and towels, too. Love the office area. Plenty of space to be together and yet also have some privacy. Air conditioning works great!

Allen's place is  heavenly. I grew up in Upstate NY and love coming back to the area with my family. Allen's beautiful wood work and TLC are felt throughout the cottage.  Allen was great to communicate with. The swimming is excellent. We enjoyed all of the water toys, floats and boats and rented a motor boat for a few days for tubing. We loved sitting on the back deck with a cup of coffee in the morning and watching the beautiful sunsets in the evening. The kitchen is well stocked and a pleasure to cook in while enjoying the beautiful view of the lake. The Mennonite farms stands are a must for fresh produce and this year we found the Tabora Bakery in Himrod.  The biking and walking are lovely along East Lake Road. The cottage is next to the road which makes it easy to come in and out and there is a fair amount of privacy on each side which we enjoyed. Thanks Allen for sharing your wonderful cottage with others!

The kitchen is well stocked with anything one needs to "eat in", and has great views of the lake; the sunsets are beautiful.  We used the charcoal grill a few times and the house is close to restaurants in Hammondsport and a few wineries and brew pubs.This rental is situated on the lake with access via a nice dock.  Our family enjoyed the lake access and made good use of the owners Kayak and paddle board.  We were able to use the lower level storage for our own inflatable kayaks so that was convenient.  Members of our party brought bikes which we conveniently stored in the wood shed and had a great time biking on East Lake Road and South Lake Road with very little traffic.  All in all the weather was great and we enjoyed the week at the cottage.

This is a fantastic place for families- lotsa room, right on the water with a kayak, rowboat, paddle board, paddle boat, floaters, a great dock, fire pit, and grill. Incredibly well-stocked kitchen. And beautiful woodworking in the house. Highly recommend it! Allen is responsive and welcoming and will make sure you have anything you need.

Allen’s house on the lake is AMAZING. We spent our days swimming and kayaking off of the dock. The house inside is beautifully crafted and all-wooden with a cute kitchen and beautiful views of the lake and sunset. The air conditioning worked wonderfully during a particularly hot weekend. Allen made all amenities in the house available for use, including a grill and charcoal, and firewood which we used for the fire pit next to the lake multiple nights. The kitchen is also fully stocked with spices for cooking. Allen is very responsive and was able to answer messages of our questions right away. Would love to come back again and couldn’t have been better.
No downside to this rental

Stayed for a week at the Andes house. The property was amazing and peaceful with a lovely pond just a short hike up the hill. We loved the coziness of the fireplace after our daytime hikes.
The house is even nicer than the photos. Kitchen is well equipped with quality appliances, bed was super comfortable and all the areas are tastefully decorated.
Nicholas is very friendly and helpful regarding any questions about the house and also had some great recommendations for local places to visit. We especially enjoyed taking an afternoon walk to Wayside Cider.

We had the perfect relaxing week at Nick’s place. The foliage were absolutely stunning and we spent most of our time exploring the property with our dogs and soaking in the views. The kids loved the bunk beds and we had a couple family movies nights using the projector. Some of our favorites in Andes were our lunch at the Andes Hotel and the baked goodies we got from Wilson’s Bread (highly recommend pre-ordering yourself some treats if you’ll be there on a Saturday). Our week away was just what we needed to unwind and enjoy ourselves. Hoping we can make this a yearly tradition!
Beautiful place, we had a great stay! Would go back again!
My friends and I had an amazing time at Nicholas’ place. We can’t wait to rebook for next year :)
Wonderful property, we had a great weekend and look forward staying here again sometime.

Super host! This was a last-minute trip, and Nicholas accommodated us and our dogs. His home is picturesque & artfully designed. The bed was very comfortable with a large TV in the room. The downstairs shower with steam bath was by far my favorite part.
It rained for most of our trip, so we didn’t get to explore the property much, but the views from the house were breathtaking. Rabbits everywhere. Even a yellow speckled newt! The dogs loved it there. The children’s gates provided were helpful.
Nicholas was thorough with communication. He answered all our questions in a timely manner and with added information. We had the sense that he was delighted to have “company”. Very hospitable.
The kitchen is well stocked to make a simple breakfast to a gourmet meal. Lovely cast iron cookware, gas/propane stove, filtered water from the sink, huge refrigerator, plenty of seating. No microwave – but we really didn’t even miss it.
Highly recommend! We would love to visit again.

Amazing Catskills getaway!  Nicholas was a great host and very responsive!  The property was stunning with beautiful vistas and room to explore.  The house is set back 1/4 mile from the road which provided excellent privacy, just be aware the driveway is steep in spots.  The home was clean with a large open main floor surrounded with windows.  The kitchen was updated with high-end appliances although there was no microwave.  The outdoor grill was also large and high-end.  Bathrooms were updated and the steam shower on first floor was a nice bonus!  The kids loved the bunk room with projector to watch movies!  The pond house was not finished at the time of our visit but provided shade and a place to sit while the kids enjoyed looking for fish and frogs.  It is a steep hike to the pond which was muddy during out visit due to rains.  We had a wonderful stay, would definitely stay again!

Our stay was exactly the respite that my family was looking for. The property was beautiful and we spent hours exploring, walking, sitting by the pond and immersing ourselves in the sights and sounds around us. We were lucky enough to be there the night of a meteor shower that we got to enjoy from the deck!
After our daily adventures, we were happy take advantage of the soaking tub and steam shower. The kids loved the projector in the bunk room & were able to easily hook up their Nintendo Switch.
Nicholas was a great host and had recommendations for restaurants that we truly appreciated. We will be back, for sure.

My family and I found the house very cozy.  The kids really enjoyed the double set of bunk beds in the room and and utilizing the projector at night. They also appreciated the board games provided by the host. We loved the property and the scenic views from the balcony.  We would love to come back in the future.

This was a very special place that was just what we needed. The house itself was beautiful and had a rustic luxury; it was comfortable but had high-end features that made us feel fancy. The grounds were totally awe-inspiring. We were so pleasantly surprised by the town of Andes and feel it’s the best little hamlet in that area. Make sure to check out Wayside cider! We had an issue when we first arrived but Nicholas responded immediately and fixed it immediately as well—a great host.

Had a really lovely stay. Home was clean and comfortable. We checked out for the weekend and this was the perfect place to do it. Both dogs and kid had a great time! The pond was a special treat and we hope to visit again soon!

My family (2 adults, 2 young boys + 2 dogs) just spent 4 nights at Nicks house in the Andes and we had a fabulous time. The house was beautiful and spacious - the pond on the property was fun to splash around in and the house was so nice and private.
The town of Andes is super tiny so be prepared to drive 15 mins or so to the closest dollar store or grocery store. There was a little market/deli right down the street but the hours were very limited... I think only open thurs-tues at 2:00. All in all, it was a great trip. I highly recommend renting this house for anyone looking for a quiet getaway :)

This was our second time coming here and it was just as incredible as we remembered! The property is truly spectacular! The house is perfect and cozy! And Nicholas was a great host again! We can’t wait to come back!
If you have the opportunity to come here, TAKE IT!

A great place for a week/end retreat. Perfect for a couple, two couples, or two couples with kids. The property is amazing and probably could be its own ski hill in the winter. The pond up top was beautiful and had it been warmer, I would have gone swimming. The steam room was used many times, and so was the fireplace. A few area restaurants in Andes, but tons of options in surrounding hamlets. I recommend you add a dinner trip to Eighty Main In nearby Delhi.
Great house and location!
It was a wonderful house and stay.
Our stay at Nicholas’ place was perfect. The house is well-decorated and not cluttered. We had everything we needed. The views were amazing and our stay was very peaceful!

We had a fantastic stay at this cabin in Andes. The location was perfect - quiet and beautiful, but also very convenient to get into town. The house itself was fantastic. The views alone were worth the trip! We had so much fun just walking around and exploring the property, especially the pond and the woods.
Nicholas was a great host; always easy to communicate with, very responsive, and very friendly.

This house and location was exactly what my family and I needed! The photos do not do it justice. Our dog loved the open space! The house was also very clean and felt very homey, would highly recommend this location and home to anybody!!

A beautiful getaway! The property was incredible for my dog and I to explore. Inside the house is well designed and the fireplace was our favorite part. Giant bed and bathtub were an extra bonus in comfort and relaxation! Not too far from other towns like Delhi and Roscoe for food and shopping either. Cell service was limited to none but the wifi was working well the whole entire stay. I highly recommend staying here!

We absolutely loved our stay at this house. The house itself is truly better than the photos, as others have noted. The views are wonderful, there’s a ton of luxury like a steam shower and soaking tub and a very well stocked kitchen. The house was so clean and neat without feeling stiff. The bedding was super comfortable. It was truly a restful retreat. Not to mention the property - beautiful trails and views right out the door. We’re already planning our return.
This property was the perfect weekend getaway. There is no shortage of land to explore, our dogs loved it! The house was great, everything was provided and the kitchen had no shortage of cookware.

We were so excited about our stay here and it really exceeded our expectations.  Nicholas was a phenomenal and friendly host-super responsive and helpful.  We had all we could need for our 2+ week stay here and felt right at home.  It was the perfect winter getaway and the house had one of the best fireplaces we've gotten to experience. The house is both in walking distance to the adorable town of Andes, but also feels super private with an incredible amount of land and trails to explore right on the property.  Agree with so many of the other reviews - one of the best stays we've had.  Andes is a special spot.  We definitely look forward to visiting again!

We have stayed @ over 15 Airbnb properties in the last 5 years and this has been the best one we have stayed at.  If your looking to get away and get some privacy this is the place to go.  A ton of land to walk with our dogs, we would definitely recommend this house to anyone.

Nick was a an excellent host, very quick to respond to anything we needed. This house had everything and more. The bedrooms were very comfortable and my kids loved the bunk room. The house is surrounded with endless trails. My dogs and three kids had a blast exploring the property. The pond and covered porch at the top of the property was amazing, the views from up there were picturesque. The kids also loved the swing on the deck. It was great to come back to such a comfortable home after skiing all day. We can’t wait to book again!! We didn’t want to leave.

Decided to book a place last minute in the Catskills to meet up with some business partners and work/relax. Nicholas responded quickly to the booking request from the night before our stay and had everything ready to go for check-in.
We arrived and everything was clean and as expected. The great room was the perfect place to hang out and work with a connected wrap around deck. Also the adjustable lighting was spot on and a nice touch.
The property was beautiful and overlooked the town on the side of a mountain. The weather was not on our side; however the rain cleared a bit in the evening and we got to enjoy a unique misty, but warm and refreshing night on the deck and outside on the patio.
We enjoyed our stay and the town of Andes offered some tasty meals with great service (Rosalino's Diner & The Andes Hotel). I would definitely recommend Nicholas's place for anyone looking for a beautiful and private property to disconnect from the everyday grind.

Overall our groups stay at Nicholas’s property was pleasant and enjoyable. The home is spacious, the grounds are private and have beautiful views, and the location is close to multiple town centers with unique shops.
Our main concern was the level of cleanliness within the home; the bathrooms and bedding were all cleaned as well as most surfaces, however, there was a lot of dust throughout the bedrooms and main living space (easily visible building up on the beams, some of the furniture, etc) which caused issues for the guests in our group with allergies. Due to the height of the living space it was not easy to clean on our own and we did not find the proper equipment to do so. Given the pricing for the holidays, the property was not cleaned up to standards.

It was a magical stay. Nicholas was quick to respond and the house exceeded our expectations. The heated flooring was wonderful to have in the snow, and the property was beautiful to walk around in with snow falling. We woke up to a plowed driveway which was a nice surprise since it’s a long way to the road. I personally loved the left handed scissors (being left handed myself) and I would have given 5 stars just for that! I would absolutely return for another stay.

It was a great stay and it was mostly very nice. The kitchen wear could be improved and there could be a wider and greater assortments of plates/silverware. The furniture could also use an update as some pieces showed signs of wear .
Absolutely gorgeous home and beatiful land. Well worth the stay.
Amazing stay. We will definitely be back
Super Haus; tolle Lage.

Do not hesitate to stay here— it was one of my favorite Airb&b stays yet! The views were lovely and the home itself was extremely comfortable. There was plenty of outdoor space to enjoy and, as a bonus, there was a pond at the top of the hill outfitted with a covered deck for ultimate relaxation.
The location is very short ride to the center of town and easy to access from the main road. I will be back next year!

This was the best rental we have ever stayed at. It exceeded our expectations! Pictures do not do it justice. The property and views are breathtaking, and the house is the perfect mix of modern cabin! We hope to come back soon!

I absolutely love staying in places that feel like a home. And this place DEFINITELY felt like home. Between the beautiful house that is set up to help focus on quality time and the freshly bailed hay fields it was perfect. Abd the wonderful views off the deck helped unplug after the week.  The only regret I have is not staying longer. To future renters start going now. The leaves are starting to turn.  And this is the place to enjoy it!

We had a wonderful stay at Nick's home in Andes. We were in town for a wedding, and everything we needed was either 1. at the house already or 2. close enough to walk or drive to pick up. I would absolutely recommend Nick's home if you're looking for a quiet & beautiful weekend upstate - 10/10 recommend!
Beautiful home on a stunning property. A great place to get away and relax.
Beautiful home!

A lovely home in a spectacular location. Everything was as advertised and the location was even better. We greatly enjoyed the local wildlife, which included kestrals guarding the barn, fireflies dancing in the meadow each evening, and frogs/newts at the nearby pond with a sheltered porch. The hillside location and elevated main floor provided gorgeous Catskill panoramas, including starlit skies, and kept away bugs. Wildflowers bloomed everywhere and shaded woodland paths eased rambling. The house was perfect for our family: new parents with crawling babe on the main floor, grandmother quarters below.
