Nicholas added a desk to an additional bunk room, which we used as a study.  Comfortable and unfussy, all basics were provided and Nicholas was very responsive.

This place is perfect if you want to unplug and relax. The house is perfectly situated atop a hill so you have gorgeous 360 views. It's also a 5 minute drive or a 15 min walk into town (of Andes). The beds were super comfortable as well as the bedsheets. My family had a lovely relaxing time at Nick's place. Our host was super responsive as well. 5 stars all around.
Great stay!

The house and property are amazing, and we had a great time at this woodsy haven! The house has beautiful architecture inside and out, and the setting is very private making it a great place for star gazing, bon fires, and just getting away from it all. We had no luck fishing the pond on the property, but it made for a very scenic adventure (4WD/AWD with decent ground clearance required to continue north past the house and barn with a vehicle) with great views of the surrounding mountains. Overall cleanliness of the home was fair, but a lot of that seemed to be the result of previous guest(s) who may have used/abused the home. The lack of A/C also makes hot summer days a challenge, but you didn’t take a trip to the woods to sit inside all day! Plus the breeze from open windows does a decent job of cooling the upstairs at night (the base floor stayed nice and cool throughout). Overall very positive experience and would consider returning in the future.
Modern and cozy house on plenty of acres of land. Easily accessible off the main road. Exactly as listed. Nick was a great host and easy and quick to communicate with. Thank you!
The pictures don’t do this house justice. It was even more special in person. We loved the property and hiking our way through the Catskills. Such a special family vacation. Can’t wait to go back!

We have stayed on this property second time and loved it. Very family friendly, our toddler absolutely loves running on the property. The house is equipped with pretty much everything you may need in terms of dishes, pots and pans etc. If you traveling with the toddler, this property has pack and play.
Super cozy atmosphere
we will definitely be coming again

great place. We went there with a toddler and they had all the accommodation (pack and play)
great property, very quiet and relaxing
we will def be coming again in the future

Absolutely beautiful home and property. Your kiddos will love the bunk room and the home is well stocked with essentials. The master suite could be out of a 5 star hotel. My only gripe with the home is that there is a looong, narrow, and STEEP driveway which my minivan couldn't make it up in the snow. Nicholas however turned the whole situation around ferrying our belongings up the hill. His attentiveness to us really saved our trip and we are incredibly grateful.
Fantastic stay in a beautiful and thoughtfully designed getaway. Relaxing and practical.

Secluded on beautiful property right off Route 28 but within walking distance to 'downtown' Andes, this was a really great house and wonderful stay. The house is immaculate and has great finishes and decoration and is very practical also - the bunk room is really special.
The whole experience was excellent - great communication throughout.

The house was great, and the property was stunning. It was a great place to spend a week enjoying sunsets off the deck, making fires inside, and taking walks on the many trails across the property. I'll be back.

Michele was so responsive to all of my questions even before I booked. This was my first time doing an airbnb or any short term rental and it was wonderful. She leaves no stone unturned. Not knowing any better, I took many things with me that I did not need. She even had q tips and firewood. I will know better for next time. The house is gorgeous, the dock is amazing and so relaxing. We were there for 2 nights because we attended a family wedding. Because we missed much of our full day reservation, she was kind enough to let us stay a bit longer on our checkout day to enjoy the lake beauty and relax on the dock. I highly recommend this property and host.

This was our first time to the area and being able to stay at this absolutely beautiful lakeside home was amazing.  It is clean, well maintained and very cozy.  The dock bar is a great concept and was very much enjoyed!!  I’d call it Paradise on Seneca!  I would highly recommend a stay at this home to anyone that wants to visit the area.  The only bad part was leaving.  Very Thankful to the Lear’s for allowing us the use of their home.  We will be back!
Michele is a great host! she responds within minutes to any questions we had. Michele’s cottage is beautiful and the view is unbeatable.
the house has so many amenities, a kitchen with everything you need, the deck overlooking the water and sunsets  was so peaceful, and the covered dock was splendid for relaxing by the water.
Absolutely perfect getaway at this beautiful lake house. The pictures don’t do it justice. Perfection!

We went for a visit for our 30 year wedding anniversary. Gorgeous little cottage right on the lake. I especially loved first getting up in the morning and seeing the view of the lake. Very quiet and private

Lovely lake house on Lake Seneca. Definitely recommend the property for a relaxing getaway. Close to some of the nicest wineries. Michelle was the kindest host. We spent a lot of time on the lower deck - kayaking and watching the sunsets. Would definitely love to visit again.

We had a wonderful 2 night stay at Michele’s lake house. Our kids loved the outdoor space - especially the dock! The house was clean, cozy and comfortable. I hope we’ll be back to visit again in the future.

Tom and Michelle have a great house on the water with beautiful views of the lake.  The house was clean and had everything we needed for a great weekend.  The location is perfect as we visited a few parks with amazing waterfalls and fun wineries.  We spent hours on the dock where there is a cool little bar, and we sat out late at night in the peace and quiet of the lakeside.  We enjoyed kayaking on the lake as well.  Thank you so much.

I can’t say enough about Michele and her cottage! She made everything throughout the entire process, from booking to arrival, incredibly easy and stress free. She was a wonderful host, friendly to communicate with, very responsive, provided excellent local recommendations and welcomed us with the sweetest gift upon arrival. Her cottage was perfect for our girls’ weekend getaway and we absolutely loved our mornings and evenings right on the water. Couldn’t have asked for a better view and more relaxing setting for catching up with longtime friends now scattered across the county. We would definitely book with Michele again and stay here!
We loved this cottage!  It was perfect in so many ways. We would happily stay there again.

This BnB was purchased for a weekend get away as a gift to my mother and aunt.  They both said they really enjoyed the stay.  Great location and very peaceful.  Host was spot on with communication and providing updates as needed.  Recommended BnB!

We had an amazing, relaxing trip.  The location was perfect for where we were venturing.  The views were just beautiful.  It was a home away from home.  We would definately stay here again when in the area.  Made lots of wonderful memories.  The lovely note and goodies waiting for us on arrival was unexpected but greatly appreciated.  Thank you for allowing us to enjoy your home and will recommend to our friends.

A wonderful experience, . we would recommend to anyone wanting to visit the Finger Lakes.
Michele is a true "Superhost"! So easily accessible, helpful, and friendly. Thank you Michele. We look forward to seeing you next year., Regina and Bob

We absolutely loved our time here! The house was well stocked with everything we could need and more, from bedding and towels to toiletries, kitchen supplies and electronics. Michele was very proactive in communicating and made the process very easy. A wonderful property with a lot to entertain our time, as well as being in a great location by great breweries, wineries and restaurants. Would stay here again in a heartbeat.
Top notch host, and top notch home. We were very pleased with everything, the welcome gifts were very nice, and appreciated. I would definitely stay here again.

We had a wonderful stay at Michele's home! The home, the view, the amenities, and the location were all top notch. Such a fun area with plenty of breweries, wineries, and live music. The view both from the back porch and from the dock were spectacular! The check in was seamless and Michele was quick to respond when we had any questions.

La maison, parfaitement située au pied du lac, est idéale pour un moment tranquille et au calme. Spacieuse et bien aménagée, elle offre tous les équipements nécessaires pour pouvoir cuisiner, se détendre et passer un bon moment. La vue depuis la terrasse est à couper le souffle. Nous avons également beaucoup apprécié de pouvoir faire du kayak sur le lac.
Enfin, Michele est une hôte sympathique et très réactive.

As advertised! Beautiful, modern and lots to do. Loved the large deck overlooking the lake and the dock bar area was great as well.
Have stayed many places around Seneca lake over the years and this may be our favorite. Michele was very helpful and responsive.
Absolutely wonderful stay!

This charming little cottage is a wonderful experience.  It's local to many breweries and wineries, and about a 35 minute drive to Watkins Glen, Buttermilk Falls, and Robert Treman State Parks (excellent hiking).  The home is very clean and has great amenities - dock on Seneca Lake, fire pit, kayaks, outdoor bar.  Michele is a GREAT host - easy to contact, and provided very useful recommendations as far as food & drink options.  We highly recommend this peaceful lake house for anyone looking for a relaxing getaway.

Das Haus am See ist einfach wunderschön. Wir haben die Sonnenuntergänge am gemütlichen Steg am Wasser genossen. Mein Sohn liebte die Fahrten mit dem Kajak.
Es gibt alles was man braucht um sich wohl zu fühlen.
Diese schönen Tage werden uns lange in Erinnerung bleiben.

Beautiful cottage with a great location. Very clean and comfortable with many amenities included. The dock was our favorite part, we enjoyed the fire pit, kayaks, paddle board, and sitting out enjoying the view! Would definitely recommend this cottage!!!

Beautiful lake side cottage with terrific views and dock access on lake Seneca. It was modern, extremely clean and well maintained.
The location is excellent, within a very short drive of many wineries and brew pubs. Also a short, easy drive to Watkins Glen.
Very quiet & peaceful with a large upper deck, which is a great place to enjoy a bottle of wine while viewing the sunset over the lake!
Note that like many houses on the lake, the house water is drawn directly from the lake and is not drinkable. We were provided bottled water that we used to drink, cook, brush teeth, etc. We had no problems using the house water to shower, wash dishes, etc.
Michele & Tom were responsive and easy to communicate with and made us feel very welcome. Check In was super easy.
We really enjoyed our 4 days there and can't wait to visit again. Thank you Michele & Tom!

Michele’s cottage is an absolute dream. It’s set right by the water and guests are welcome to use two kayaks and a paddle board. I would describe the backyard as having 3 levels: wooden deck area to bbq, lawn area with a fire pit, and a boat slip area with a bar. We had so much fun utilizing the different spaces! Also the cottage was extremely clean.

We loved our stay!  Karen thought of everything!  Special little touches throughout the house were thoughtful and appreciated.  The home was beautiful and the views were amazing.  Would definitely stay here again when we come back!
Very clean place, great central location, beautiful views and an excellent host! We had such a nice time staying at Karen’s!
clean, comfortable private ....
Nice comfortable place, stunning view of the lake. Loved it.

Karen's place is great. It'll be even better in warmer weather. The sunrise was beautiful. So much to do in the surrounding area. We hit the breweries!! : ) Karen was instantly responsive when the heat cut out while we were gone for the day. The place warmed up easily.
Thanks Karen! It was a wonderful weekend.
Kim & Mark

We had a fantastic weekend stay at Penn Yan! The Airbnb was incredibly cozy, and the owner had everything perfectly organized, which made our stay seamless and comfortable. The view from the place was absolutely breathtaking—waking up to the lakeside scenery was a dream come true. My husband, baby girl, and I enjoyed every single moment of this trip. We felt so lucky to experience the beauty of the snow, which added a magical touch to the entire weekend. This stay exceeded all our expectations, and we can’t wait to come back. Highly recommend to anyone looking for a peaceful and picturesque getaway!
Lovely home with beautiful views, and Karen was very responsive.  We would stay here again in a heartbeat.

We had the best time! The house was spotless, extremely well organized, and absolutely beautiful. The views are so beautiful that we spent an entire day just admiring the views from the boathouse. We are so appreciative of how well prepared the hosts were, having literally every utensil you could think of in the kitchen! The beds were also very comfortable! We are already talking about coming back in the summer!

The view from the house overlooking the lake is absolutely stunning. The house itself is beautiful and fully equipped with everything we needed. Our days were filled with skiing at Bristol Mountain, while our evenings were spent unwinding at the house—a perfect way to wrap up the year!

We had a wonderful stay here! The house was beautiful and clean, and the view of Seneca lake from the windows couldn't be beaten. It was a perfect place to relax and enjoy the nature. While we came in the snowy winter, and couldn't make full use of the fire pit and dock, we would love to come back in the summer and experience the beauty to its fullest!

Karen’s house is gorgeous, tastefully decorated and had everything we needed. Location is perfect and the view is just breathtaking. Sunrise on the lake was incredibly beautiful. We would definitely recommend Karen’s place and we’re already looking forward to coming back :)

An absolutely beautiful home to use for a peaceful getaway on the lake! We were welcomed by a perfectly clean home and a complimentary bottle of wine. Everything we needed was there and available to us. an absolutely stunning view! We can't wait to return when the weather is a bit warmer!!

Gorgeous surroundings and incredible lake views! Karen and family have created a peaceful space to relax while visiting the area. Arriving was a cinch thanks to the pictures and welcome info sent ahead of time. Entry also a breeze. We were welcomed with a well thought out guide book and bottle of local wine. The house was clean, well furnished, and had anything you could think of tucked away! The kitchen was easy to navigate thanks to labels on everything (and I mean everything)! There were supplies at hand such as napkins, paper towels, soap, trash bags, food storage bags and I could go on. We had four adults in our party and there was plenty of space for everyone and we never felt cramped. From the kitchen table to relaxing in the boat house there was leg room galore. Bedrooms were comfortable, very soft beds and ample bedding. The views from the back bedroom are stunning! Hello sunrise… Centrally located for most locations, I would say we were about 20 minutes from the major areas i
We had an amazing time! The view of the lake is incredible. Karen was very friendly and responsive. Everything was exactly as described, very clean and cozy. We will come back!

What an amazing place to visit. Although we did not even utilize half of the amenities provided here, this air bnb is nearly perfect. Karen is extremely responsive and never had us waiting regarding any type of communication. The location could not be better with its picturesque view (one of the bedrooms and living room) of the lake. The host has thought of almost everything, to have on hand, for those who stay here short term. Whether you are looking for salt and pepper, aluminum foil, sweetner, shaving cream, bug spray, cards or Monopoly, it's all there (just to name a few)!!! We have utilized quite a few air bnbs, but have to say, all things considered (cleanliness, amenities, host response time, location, view, etc.) this has been THE BEST! We visited during the off season and enjoyed the peace and quiet at the air bnb as well as the surrounding areas.
Location also provides plenty of parking across from the lake house.
Beautiful house with great views of the lake.  Very clean and is in a very peaceful location.  Would love to come back during the summer months
Loved everything about this lake house! Quiet location, super clean, beautiful and comfortable furnishings. It was the perfect anniversary getaway.
The place was in a great location, well equipped, and great views of the lake

Just what we needed. Peaceful, quiet and the sunrises were incredible. The house was as described perfectly, everything was in its place and very accessible.  We arrived later than expected. She had the heat and lights on when we arrived, it was a great first impression.
Great spot!

Our group had another amazing stay at Karen's property! Views of the lake are gorgeous and the property is just a short drive away from local wineries and restaurants. The house was in excellent condition and very clean. Karen is a super friendly & responsive host. Can't wait to stay here again!
Loved our stay!  Perfect location, close to lots of places. Comfortable accommodations!

Karen’s place was exactly as described. Everything in the house had a new fresh feeling. The living areas were very comfortable with a wonderful view of the lake. The location was perfect to enjoy all the wineries and was an easy drive to  Watkins Glen, Geneva and PennYan. Kitchen was very well equipped.

It was a tranquil retreat just 8-10 minutes from restaurants and shops in Penn Yan center of town.  Good location to get down to Watkins Glen and to Hector Falls. There were several wineries within a short drive.  Beautiful views of the Lake from the living area and master Bedroom as well as the main deck and lower dock.  Everything you needed pretty much for your stay was provided.  We loved the fact that you didn’t need to shop or pack for every little item for the kitchen and bath. Karen provided all the necessities you would find in a hotel and a full list of kitchen accessories. FLX holds a special place in our hearts and this gem just adds to the memories.
Beautiful home on Seneca Lake. Located near many wineries and dining options. We stayed here for our honeymoon and had the best time! We hope to return again with family.

Karen’s home is a dream! It was pristine inside and looked exactly like the pictures. The scenery can’t be beat and to have use of the boathouse, dock, and fire pit were a huge added bonus. Also a great location where it is easy to get anywhere on Seneca or Keuka lake. Definitely somewhere we hope to stay again!!
What a great place. We are pretty particular about cleanliness and this beautiful place did not disappoint. Very well equipped as well. Great location to explore the Finger Lakes area.
House was a perfect size and great location. We would definitely stay here again.
It was great to stay at Karen’s cabin. The house was as described and in perfect condition. Good location and great ammendies. Would stay again!

What a wonderful stay.  Location was more than pictures can share.  An easy to find, quiet and relaxing location.  Beautiful view of Seneca Lake from front window, porch or boat house.  Just stunning sunrises.  Location is centrally located to west side of Seneca lake, Keuka Lake and Geneva.  Was one of our best visits to the area, and we have been enjoying the Fingerlakes for over 30 years.  Thanks, Karen, for being a great host.

This waterfront escape exceeded our expectations!
Everything was absolutely perfect, start to finish.
Clear and efficient communication, the property was exactly as described and provided every amenity that you could imagine. The beds were comfortable, the home itself and bathrooms were spotless. The location could not be beat! This immaculate cottage is close to numerous wineries, restaurants and local attractions.
We visited for a family reunion and found it to be the perfect oasis to relax and rewind inside and out.
Many thanks to our hosts for providing this space to make memories of a lifetime.
We will be back next time we travel to this area!♥️
The house feels like home, gorgeous view, comfortable and peaceful.

This property was absolutely amazing for a weekend getaway right on the lake! The pictures uploaded do not do the home justice, the lake view and surrounding nature around the property was our favorite part. Everything inside the home is easily accessible and has everything you can possibly need. The host provides a great guide on local activities and restaurants. This AirBnb was perfect and will definitely be on our list for future trips!
Beautiful quiet lakefront retreat!  Close to several wineries, Oen Yan and Geneva.  Loved it!
Very well appointed home in a quiet location.

The house was as expected/described. The view, perfect! The location is very good, central to many towns/activities. The cleaning fee is quite high, but the house was immaculate. Checkin and checkout was well explained and effortless.  Thank you Karen for sharing your home. We would love to stay there again on our next trip to the area!
Very clean, very easy to get in and out. Plenty of parking, I'm a bed snob so the king bed wasn't very comfy and maybe I'd bring your own pillows but that's my only critique ! Awesome location

Karen,
Thank you for allowing us to be guests at your home. Absolutely beautiful and exactly as described. We will be taking the family there next year for the entire week. Very highly recommended!!
Thank you,
George

We totally enjoyed our stay very relaxing. Very easy to find quiet and private. Loved the room by the water. Very clean and the kitchen was great had everything we needed and all the cupboards were labeled. We couldn’t ask for anything better.

We thoroughly enjoyed our three days on Seneca Lake at Karen's cottage! The cottage had been completely updated and was very comfortable. We TOTALLY enjoyed having meals in the party room above the boathouse with its awesome views of Seneca Lake. The setting was very private, with large bushes shielding you from the adjacent cottages.
The location is terrific! In addition to the tons of wineries in the area (we did tastings at six, with our favorite (Anthony Road Vineyards) less than 2 miles from the cottages. We also drove down to Watkins Glen (about 30 minutes south), the site of Watkins Glen State Park which boasts 19 beautiful waterfalls. It was a great hike up to the top of the gorge with photo ops of the waterfalls all along the way. It's also about a 30-minute drive up to Geneva, where we had lunch at Belhurst Castle.
All in all, a great trip!

We had the most amazing time at Karen's place. The views were absolutely stunning and we loved being able to sit out on the jetty in the early evening, which was so peaceful and beautiful.
We also absolutely loved the little room down on the lower deck which gave gorgeous views and was wonderful to sit in on a rainy day.
The house was exactly as pictured, sparkling clean and there was everything we could have ever needed provided in the kitchen and there were board games provided too which was lovely for an evening in. The location was wonderful too, super easy to get around and visit everything we wanted to do in the area.
Highly recommend staying here! We had an incredible time.

Beautiful house with a wonderful view of Seneca Lake. Sunrises are gorgeous over the Lake. The house had all the amenities and everything was clean. Very peaceful area. Would definitely stay here again.
Thank you very much!
beautiful home and scenery. friendly and courteous host. highly recommended.

We had an absolutely wonderful time at Karen's home. The surroundings are gorgeous. We spent most mornings sipping coffee, eating breakfast, and then working from the back patio. Internet was very good given it being a more remote location. Beds were comfortable, bathrooms were clean with all expected amenities, and the kitchen was well furnished. There are plenty of restaurants around but we were able to easily cook inside. I also recommend making sure to spend some time in the room down by the dock. It's very secluded and relaxing. We hope to stay here again one day.

Karen was super easy to message and had immediate replies.
The house is as pretty, if not better, than the pictures. The views are incredible and the linens and beds were so comfortable!
I would love to stay here longer and enjoy this beautiful home and area. Lots to explore that we didn’t get too
My only four star was the cost of cleaning. We leave our rentals as we find them so paying over $200 for cleaning services for a three night stay is a little high.
The other thing to be aware of is, the half bath is extremely small. Might bother some guests. We weren’t there that long and were ok with it.
Truly a wonderful stay!
We loved staying here for girls weekend. Karen replied quickly when we had a question. The place was beautiful and in a great location!
Great location, we loved the boathouse and the view of the Lake. We will definitely consider coming back.

Wonderful stay!  Well stocked with many amenities, very comfortable furnishings (appliances and decor seemed new!), and a beautiful waterfront view.  Very responsive host, no issues at all with our stay.  We hope to be back - thanks for hosting us!
The view was absolutely amazing with great access to Penn Yan, Geneva, and Walkins Glen! We had a great time and will be visiting here again!

Beautiful home, beautiful scenery and Great wine! We had a wonderful first time visit to the Finger Lakes and would not hesitate to return! The home was a great location making every aspect of the lake accessible.
Had the amazing peaceful Thanksgiving holiday we were hoping for! Wish we never had to leave!
The house and surrounding property was stunning, and internet access was great for working remotely for everyone staying.
Great stay, very comfortable for the 6 of us with an infant. Walkable distance to Main Street to grab food and coffee and great view around around the house!

I didn’t think I could love another house more than Nichola’s other listing but this house is perfect. We had a much needed relaxing stay made even more beautiful with the rain. The house has all the necessities and felt like I was staying in a luxury home! Can’t wait to visit again.

Such a great place to stay with family or friends. Nick was very responsive and easy to communicate with. The place is very well designed, it reminded me of the boutiques hotels in Soho but with much better and views.
I felt very welcomed. Super easy check to check in and out.
No cellphone reception, plan accordingly and remember to get the Wi-Fi password before you get on the road.
The pond was so peaceful - perfect retreat.
I would stay there again. My kids did not want to leave.
Thanks Nick!

Nicholas’ house was perfect for two couples. The property is gorgeous and we love the area. We really enjoyed the open kitchen and outdoor patio/grill. Would definitely come back again. Highly recommend.
Beautiful, modern house on a large property with amazing views! This was a perfect place for a weekend getaway with friends. Also, a really great place for those with kids and dogs.
Nick was a great host and we really enjoyed staying there all around! Would stay here again :)

Wow - what a lovely getaway!  Plenty of space to stretch out and we loved exploring the huge property.  Home has everything you need (kitchen basics, etc.) and Nick was easy to work with and super responsive.  Would not hesitate to return.  Lovely walks in the fields and hills behind the house.  Great bread at Wilsons in Andes.  Would recommend hitting the Blue Bee cafe over in Dehli, too.  Plenty to explore in the broader area - waterfalls, fishing, hiking, biking, etc.  Enjoy!

What a beautiful home in Andes!  The house is perched up in the hills and offers amazing views of the valley.  The pond and cabin up at the top of the hill are incredibly peaceful.  The house is very tastefully designed and comfortable.  We really enjoyed our stay with family.  Nick is also a great host and responds very quickly.  We highly recommend!
A lovely house and property, making for a  pleasant and uncomplicated getaway.

We loved our stay at Nick's home!  The home is gorgeous and sparkling clean.  We loved the steam shower in the guest bath (felt like a spa!) and the soaking tub in the main bath.  The projector screen in the downstairs bedroom was a great amenity and perfect for movies at night.  The house sits on lots of land, so we felt like we were on our own private farm.  There's a lake on the property at the top of the hill with a little fishing house that's perfect for picnics.  We had such an amazing time and can't wait to visit again!!!
Really cool home and property that offers ample opportunity to explore. Close to town with plenty of activities to take advantage of throughout the area.

Nicholas was an excellent host...attentive, considerate, communicative and flexible. His home was the perfect meeting place for our two families, and the interior was exquisite. The views were breath-taking and our stay could not have been more comfortable. Already thinking about when we can return!
Great house!  Nicholas was the perfect host.

The house and property are beautiful.  You can take long walks and encounter deer, turkey and other wonderful wildlife.  The views are stunning and the fire is the perfect place to snuggle up with a book.  We have some issues but Nick was quick to respond and he was accommodating to our early check in request.  There was no welcome manual so figuring out the tv, fireplace, trash etc took a while.   Overall the house could benefit from a bit of organizing and a deep clean but we still had a terrific time.

Amazing place! Very secluded and idyllic. Note there is no cell service.
Would love to go back again, in any season.
The location is outstanding with amazing views, a nice quiet getaway from the city!
Great place in the middle of nature, very stylish yet relaxing, we had a great time.

We really enjoyed our long weekend at Nick's home in Andes. It's situated just up the hill from the town and feels incredibly private and remote. The pond up the hill is absolutely picturesque, so be sure to explore the property to find it! The small downtown of Andes is adorable with some great shops and cafes. Nick was incredibly responsive and a great host overall. My one note for folks before you go is that there's no cell reception at the house or the surrounding town. It was quite nice to be fully unplugged (though the house has reliable wifi), but be sure to load your Google maps before you leave. The closest town with cell service is about 20 minutes away.
This place is awesome! Perfect stay for a small group of friends/family to enjoy the Catskills. Looking forward to come back!

The place and property was incredible. We enjoyed our week away from the busy city- perfect for going off the grid since phone service was limited.  Nicholas always responded very quickly when we had a question.  We will definitely be back and highly recommend this Airbnb!

Andes Valley View is a beautiful property. We really enjoyed the pond and the scenery! I loved cooking in the well equipped kitchen! The house is clean and stylish. Nick was very quick to respond to all our issues/ questions. We will come back again!

We had a great time at Nicholas. The house is in a quiet and remote spot for anyone who wants to relax. The shed by the pound offers great views and even more peace.  It is also refreshing for hot days. Communication was easy.

A beautiful home on beautiful land. The photos do not do it justice! Nicholas was communicative and very responsive.
Andes is a great little town. If you are looking for an idyllic Catskills getaway, this is the place!
Very nice place and it was nice and clean. Thank you for letting us stay here!

My family and I found this home to be a peaceful spot to relax and enjoy time together. The home was exactly as we expected it to be from pictures and we loved all the duck family’s visiting us on the lake! Beautiful spot to recharge after a hectic school year!

We loved staying here! The house was comfortable and clean, and Casey was very responsive to my questions. The location is perfect- close to wineries/restaurants and downtown Penn Yan, but also quiet and private. It was also so nice for our little kids to be able to walk right into the lake and swim/play, and not have to go down a million stairs or jump in from a dock to get to the water.

Very clean bathrooms and king bedrooms. 2 bedrooms off kitchen and 1 on bottom floor. No closets, each had large dresser and nightstands. Lots of fluffy towels, paper goods and soap. Plenty of dishes and utensils. No condiments. Laundry room in basement had musty smell. Front loading washer/dryer with detergent. Ceilings need cobwebs removed throughout house.
Heat and A/C work great, used both during week. Internet was sufficient for remote work.
The house needs screens especially on sliding doors. Tried to open windows/doors but were inundated with insects and bees in house. The window tracks were moldy, and covered with cobwebs and debris in and out.
Deck and outside furniture mildewed & full of cobwebs with dead insects. The kayaks were great.
The dirty outside furniture made enjoying deck and patio difficult.
The location is close to Penn Yan and easy to get to town. Due to mature trees you cannot see down lake.
High price so expected clean outside spaces.

It was so refreshing to stay at a well loved, detailed, cottage that was exceptionally clean, well stocked, well built and spacious. We appreciated the kayaks and general layout of this rental. Well done Casey!

This house was breath taking! The views from the deck outside were amazing! Our driver for the wine tours joked about getting wine and dropping it off, because we had the best view at home! we loved our stay the 3 bedrooms and 3 bathrooms were perfect for the 3 couples we had! Would love to stay again!
What a wonderful place! We spent 4 unforgettable days there and planning to return.
This was a fantastic place to stay for the week.  Would highly recommend to anyone looking to enjoy Keuka Lake.  Look forward to returning sometime.

Had a girls weekend and this place did not disappoint!!! Clean, beautiful views of the lake upstairs and downstairs, comfortable beds, well stocked kitchen and loved that each bedroom had its own bath. would highly recommend and would not hesitate to book again. Thank you!!!

Could not have been happier!!!
Beautiful view, quiet, clean!!!
Enjoyed the 4 kayaks that came with this place!! Met the neighbors who were very nice!! Enjoyed hikes around the area! Casey could not have been a better host!!!
Love the Finger Lakes!! Loved Casey’s beautiful clean, spacious, well stocked home!!

This rental was perfect for a girls weekend spent quilting!
Loved the open space. The kitchen was very well equipped.
Will definitely be back!

What a beautiful place right on the lake. We felt like we were right at home. So comfortable and relaxing.  Very nice that each bedroom has its own bathroom.  The host also brought out the kayaks early for us that we really enjoyed.  Wonderful time and we hope to be back next year. Thank you to the wonderful host.

Beautiful home with gorgeous views of the lake. We couldn’t have asked for a better stay. The home was just as advertised, very clean and spacious. Close to shopping, wineries, and wonderful restaurants. Would definitely recommend staying here.

Great stay! The house and its views are wonderful! The house is clean, and spacious and well stocked with paper and supplies. Casey is an amazing host. Super fast replies and very clear instructions. I would recommend this house for anyone looking, and I would return and visit again!
All 6 of us were extremely comfortable and quite pleased with our stay at Casey’s house. Beautiful views and the house is just as amazing. We will be back! Thank you Casey!

This was the best Airbnb we’ve stayed at so far.  Casey’s home is beautiful, and the view of the lake was amazing! Perfect spot for relaxing after visiting local wineries, breweries, distillery’s, and restaurants. We highly recommend this place!!!

The house was beautiful, clean and well kept. Worked out great for my family , with each bedroom having its own full bathroom.
Lots of room and furniture for everyone to sit down comfortably.
We really enjoyed sitting around and looking out onto the lake.
Very nice wrap around deck and then a lower covered sitting area as well.
Kitchen had everything we needed to prepare breakfasts as well.
Less than a 5 minute drive into Penn Yan for easy access, and about 15 minute drive from Seneca lake wineries.
We would love to revisit in the summer!

Despite the fact that the weather did not cooperate, we had a very enjoyable stay and the view was great, even in the rain…
The house was clean and comfortable. Kitchen table was great for playing games at night. We were able to relax and recharge…
And to boot, had wonderful dinners out every night after visiting many wineries, breweries and distilleries…
Would def recommend and stay here again…

Awesome place to stay nestled in the Finger Lakes region.  We were impressed with the location right on the water. Beautifully decorated and fully stocked with everything you'd need for your stay. Don't hesitate to book this gem.

This has been by far the best Airbnb my family and I have stayed in. You can tell how much love has been put into this home. The kitchen was pristine and well-equipped. Each bedroom had its own bathroom and a king size bed. We all slept like babies on the comfortable mattresses. The views of the lake from the living room were spectacular.  The location is ideal because it is a short distance from many wineries and the town of Penn Yann. We will definitely book again!

Such a wonderful stay! Unfortunately, it was a quick over night visit but we are already making plans to visit again. Lovely location, cozy atmosphere, great views, and just a delightful place to create new memories. Casey, is attentive, friendly, and helpful.

Wonderful home with a breathtaking view.  Every bedroom having its own bathroom was a huge plus!  Lots of room to spread out in the living space.  Casey responded quickly to all our questions. I recommend this house highly!

Casey was very accommodating. The property was amazing, very clean and inviting. The views are fantastic and there was plenty of privacy. We will definitely stay at this property again.
Tom and Kelly
Casey’s home is understated online. It is a gorgeous glass house with marvelous views of the lake. Clean, spacious, and lovely.  Being close to charming Penn Yan is a bonus.

Great location right on the lake. The house with three king bedrooms with ensuite bathrooms is unique and great for multiple couples. The view from the large, windowed living room was outstanding. The kitchen is as well equipped as any rental property we've ever stayed at. Of course, we didn't head to the Finger Lakes just for the beautiful house. The location is also close to numerous wineries and breweries.

This location is beautiful! The views are incredible, the house is well taken care of and its location is amazing for local cuisine and culture. The owners are responsive and check in was flexible which was awesome as we were traveling with our 11 month old. We do plan to return with more family!
Beautiful views!
We stayed here w/ 2 other couples. The bedrooms were comfortable & spacious! The place is extremely clean and the views of the lake are beautiful! Well worth it!

Casey was very responsive and provided excellent recommendations for things to do in the area such as hikes and waterfalls. The house was an absolute dream to stay in and looked even better than the pictures. The house was spotlessly clean and had a spectacular view of the lake. My fiance and I loved every moment here and wished we could have stayed longer! Something I liked was that Casey didn't burden us with a long list of chores at checkout like most other hosts do. Checkout was so easy it felt almost like an unattended hotel stay. Of course we started the dishwasher and consolidated the towels to wash anyway as a courtesy to Casey. But it's the difference between being forced to tip and tipping for a well deserved service. It was an absolute pleasure staying here and we would love to come back some day!
We had a wonderful stay!
Great place in a beautiful location! Casey was very responsive and helpful. Must book for the summer season!
This is our second stay at Casey’s. We love the view of the lake. It was clean, spacious, and well stocked.  We were in the area with family to enjoy the wineries during winter.
Casey’s place was perfect for our girl’s trip. It was exactly as described and had everything we needed to make for a comfortable trip. Beautiful views!
Beautiful on the lake; very clean. Enjoyed a quick getaway!
Casey's house is clean and inviting. The three king bedrooms with own baths makes it a perfect spot for multiple couples.

Our stay in Casey's home was wonderful. The home is absolutely beautiful and spacious enough for the three couples that stayed. It was a huge plus for each bedroom to have its own bathroom. Kitchen was fully equipped for our breakfasts in and the view of the lake was gorgeous despite it being February and dreary out! From reservation to check in and out, the process was flawless! You will not be disappointed with this home.

This was our second time staying at Casey’s place and we’re again 150% satisfied! The home was left to us in immaculate condition and had tons of kitchen and bathroom supplies. It was the perfect house for a perfect weekend. 5+ stars!⭐️ ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

What a beautiful home for a weekend retreat! Everything was spotless and exactly as described. The view of the lake was incredible, especially with some light snow. We can’t wait to go back one day in the summer to take full advantage of the lake! This was the best Airbnb experience I have ever had.
A beautiful home with tons of space. Well furnished and stocked. We loved the big rooms, comfy beds and gorgeous setting.
Beautiful house enjoyed our stay

Great location and clean home.
Spacious with nice kitchen and beautiful view from the living room. Will definitely come back and recommend to friends.
Awesome place with an amazing view!  Modern house, very clean, & host communication was excellent.
Beautiful location. Will definitely be back in the future. Very spacious space. Highly recommend!

Casey’s place was very welcoming and easy to find. Each bedroom had a bathroom which was great. Ideal for three couples. Beds were very comfortable, beautiful views from living room and kitchen had everything we needed. Would definitely go back!!!

The lakefront property is superb, just as described. The house is immaculately clean and well-arranged. The host is incredibly responsive. It's a fantastic spot for a getaway and comes highly recommended.

Great house right on the lake. Close to Penn Yan, Grocery Store, Walking Trail, and of course, wineries. The space was great for 5 friends, loved that there were 3 full bathrooms. The kitchen was full equipped. The view was completely unbeatable!! Would definitely stay here again.

What a wonderful experience! It was like our home away from home. Very spacious, clean and the view from the deck was magnificent!! We were 2 couples and although we were basically out all day long, it was nice to come back to a cozy place to rest!
We were able to get to so many places within a half hour or less and the little town of Penn Yan had some great little restaurants! I would highly recommend Casy's home in Penn Yan!!!!

Casey was a wonderful hostess. She responded quickly to my questions and kept me informed of the basic things I needed to know with her rental. The house was perfect for three adult couples. We felt at home and were thrilled with all amenities and basic supplies that were left in the house if we needed to use them. We visited many of the local wineries and restaurants on Keuka Lake. We will definitely be renting from Casey again, her house is just beautiful.

Casey responded quickly if we had any questions and was very helpful! The house is so clean and has extra blankets and pillows if needed. We all also agreed that the bed are super comfortable! Very close to Keuka lake wineries which is why we stayed.

We absolutely loved our stay here. The house is very roomy with very comfortable furniture including the beds. The multiple master bedrooms was a big plus ! But the location on the lake was the real treat ! Gorgeous view from the large comfortable deck. Nearby grocery, small shops, restaurants,and of course wineries and vineyards ! Can’t say enough good things about the whole experience !!

We had a fantastic vacation at Allen's place. The location and accommodations were great. The cottage is set in a great location and offered all the amenities you would want for a fun time at the lake....rowboat, paddle board, pedal boat, dock, fishing, fire pit, etc... The perfect family getaway! But above all else it was really nice to know you are dealing with a friendly and generous host. It was great meeting Allen and staying at his place. Thanks, Allen!

First, the location is great: just a few minutes from Hammondsport, and a private setting -- no near neighbors -- and the proximity to the lake is magical. We brought our own boats, but Allen's are available, and the access to water is as easy as can be. The lake is a central part of the experience, as the water is always there -- just off the deck, the dock, the windows. It laps at the shore and lulls you into its presence. Allen has done a beautiful job with the house for anyone who appreciates fine woodworking -- a variety of woods feel great under hand and foot. The deck and dock are perfect for morning coffee or sunset cocktails. I recommend Allen's place for anyone looking for a relaxing lakefront getaway, and my wife and I are eyeing the calendar for a return visit. Allen is an extremely hospitable host, and a good guy.

Allen's place was unique and well-stocked with every amenity imaginable. We enjoyed using the kayak and paddle board and relaxing on the dock. The location is great (close by wineries and hiking) and the sunsets are beautiful. Thanks again!
Allen was a fantastic host. The place has more amenities and quirks than you can list and the location can’t be beat.
Love the woodwork and the cool art.

A little slice of heaven. Through AIr Bnb, Ive stayed in a treehouse in Sedona, an off grid saltwater pool house in Colorado and an apartment in the Icandic capital.  This may be the best yet. Its a gorgeous, huge cottage right on the water. Allen, a fantastic and responsive host, is a wood turner, and the place he built is filled with spectacular personal touches and nooks and cranies. Go for the location alone. Stay for the easy use of the boat, kayak and fire pit. And come back, as we plan to, for the peace and quiet, and what may be the most oustanding toilet youve ever experienced (no joke!).
Excellent as always. We're regular customers!

If you can't relax in this unique home, then you will never relax anywhere. We were one week early of the vibrant colors of fall but were not disappointed by the view from the home at all. The morning view from the porch with coffee listening to the waves hit the shoreline is a great way to wake up for a day of plenty to do in the area. The evening sunset lounging on the dock in the Adirondack lounges is a must do as well as enjoying a fire pit on the shore under the stars to finish the day. The basic needs for kitchen, bathroom, and bedrooms are fully available in addition to additional provisions such as wood for both the woodburner in the kitchen area (wonderful to use for our chilly mornings) and for the fire pit, as well as watercraft provisions (kayak, paddleboard, rowboat, and motorboat). We visited several wineries of which there are many but the wineries on the west side of Lake Keuka have wonderful views of the Keuka Lake area (Bully Hill, Herron Hill, and Dr Frank's). Watkins Glen State Park Gorge Trail is a must see (only 1/2 hr away) and is only difficult if you have trouble with steps.
Our group consisted of two couples who were visiting to partake in the Wine Glass Half Marathon which was within 15 minutes to the start line and only 40 minutes from the finish. A perfect get away for a great weekend! Thank you Allen for being so gracious in sharing your home and for the arrival tour. A perfect place for our weekend. We all would return in a heartbeat. Thank you.

Allen's place was wonderful!
He was very accommodating and his place literally had EVERYTHING you could possibly need for your stay! Six of stayed very comfortably for a weekend visiting local wineries. We only wished we had stayed longer!

Allen's lakehouse was absolutely perfect. With so many rentals available, you would be missing out if you didn't choose this one. The location is easy to get to, directly on the water, and the view the sunsets are beautiful. On arrival, Allen gave us an extensive tour of the house, including a quick ride in his bass boat to show us the ropes. His house is definitely stocked with ANYTHING you may find you need. From kitchen ware to bathroom supplies to linens and beyond. Trust us, you won't be wanting for anything. We actually asked to stay an extra day, but the house was already booked. Should you have a chance to stay here, Allen's place is one of the best.

If you're wondering if you should rent this place just do it. We were greeted with a bottle of wine from the vineyard across the lake. The house is not just steps to the lake but pretty much on it including privacy(you have to try real hard to see any neighbors). It has a private dock, paddle board, kayak, rowboat, fire pit, everything.  It's a west facing house so expect a couple of fantastic sunsets.  Also the detail and quality of woodwork(tiger maple, ash, black walnut galore) is matched by his concern for your enjoyment.

We had a wonderful week at Allen's cottage.  There were thoughtful touches throughout - such as use of the kayak and paddleboard, wood for the firepit, and a kitchen well-stocked with pots, pans, and utensils for cooking and dining. The location is superb, with quiet at the lake but just a few miles to restaurants, shops, farm stand, and ice cream.

We enjoyed our time at Keuka Cottage. Allen is a very attentive host, he even checked on us mid week. Everything we needed was there, we even had the use of a kayak, boat, paddle board and paddle boat. The kids had a blast playing right off the dock. Hearing the water lapping the shore was a treat. The location is close enough for day trips to Watkins Glen and Corning. We would stay again.

My husband and I just returned from a one week stay at Allen's Keuka Lake Cottage.  By day 2 we were already discussing our return!  The cottage was lovely, peaceful and right on the lake.  We were in the water every day and the bonus of boats and boogie boards added so much to our vacation.  The house is lovely-it is clear that Allen has put a lot of love and care into his home.  We found everything we needed and had an amazing week with our family.  Allen met us when we arrived and was gracious and attentive and answered every question we had.  We look forward to our return.  I have to add that we have stayed at a number of the Finger Lakes and Keuka is our favorite.  The water was clear and clean!
Great place on Keuka Lake for families,

Allen's cottage was so cute and had a lot of character! He was great at communicating with us and was very accomadating. Our group of girls had a great time using the kayak and paddleboard during the day and the fire pit at night. The location was great and close to several really nice wineries. We would definitely come back and stay at Allen's cottage again!
Our host was super helpful and available. The house was very well stocked and attractive. The water sports equipment was great to have access to. All in all the place was very nice.

The location of this cottage is hard to beat. It's right on the lake and the friendly owner allows access to his boats. There's plenty of towels and bedding in the house as well as a great kitchen table with a view. Definitely recommend if you're in the finger lakes region for a weekend or an event.

Love it! I just stayed at Allen's place for my 30th birthday weekend with 5 of my girlfriends. We loved every minute of it. The place is well-stocked with bedding, toiletries, and everything you could possibly need in the kitchen. We enjoyed the firepit and spent the nights by the lake. Even with the cooler April weather, we got some time in on the paddle board, kayak, and paddleboat - we had so much fun with all of them! Allen is a terrific host! He met us on Friday to show us around the place and make sure we were situated. He also called to check on us when it got cooler and told us how to turn on the heat if we needed it. I'll definitely be looking to return to Allen's place the next time I'm in the Finger Lakes!

The cottage is gorgeous, and thoughtfully maintained. Allen was very attentive to our needs and provided a warm welcome, giving us a quick and useful tour before being on his way.  Almost every window has a million dollar view. We made full use of the amenities at Allen's place, including the kayak, boogie board, and fire pit. This is the place to go for a rejuvenating weekend away from the world. Thanks Allen!
Allen was very thorough to go through all the details of the house. We felt very welcome.

The cottage was great!! Amazing location right on the water front with a paddle board and row boat and even kayaks.
The inside of the house was gorgeous and has everything we could have asked for. We made dinner and didn't find a single thing that was missing for 8 of us!
Extra blankets and sheets everywhere if you need more as well as towels for inside and outside. There was an old barrel to make a fire and tons of wood at our disposal.
It was really great to have everything that we needed including lots of extra chairs and even tables.
Allen was really helpful and showed us the house and helped out when we needed something.
Indefinitely recommend this place and we are looking to come back again!

My friends and I had a great stay at Allen's cottage. Allen was extremely communicative beforehand, and provided lots of suggestions and guidance for activities in the area. Upon arrival, he greeted us with a bottle of local wine and gave us a thorough tour of the cottage and all of its amenities (which are many!). Throughout our stay Allen was accessible and responded quickly whenever we needed to reach him. The cottage itself is lovely - the woodwork in the interior is beautiful and the whole house was sunny and comfortable throughout our stay. The kitchen and common space were especially great for cooking and hanging out together. It's only about a ten minute drive from downtown Hammondsport, and less than 20 minutes from some of the best vineyards on Keuka Lake. We also enjoyed using the kayak and paddle board, hanging out on the spacious dock, and using the fire pit and grill in the evenings. Great experience - I wish we could have stayed longer!

Allen's Lake House is a work of art! A master woodworker, he built the house himself finished in cherry, walnut, maple, oak. Gorgeous kitchen.
He was a wonderful host, greeted us when we arrived, showed us where everything was and how it worked. Beds are very comfortable. 2 levels of porch front to relax and watch the gentle waves directly below, the house is right on the water. It's a very private property given the wide lake frontage. We had use of his kayak, paddle board, floats, life jackets, snorkeling gear. Roomy dock.
Fell asleep quickly every night to the sound of lapping water. Will definitely be planning our next visit.

Allen was awesome. Super helpful and kind and really wanted our stay tonbe perfect. The home was located in a great spot with sunset views every night. It was clean and just the right amount of space. Our trip was great!

We had such a great stay at Allen's beautiful lake house. A perfect place to enjoy Keuka Lake, Hammondsport and the endless local wineries.
Allen was very communicative and helpful prior to our arrival, even allowing us the flexibility of checking in early. He met us on arrival and gave us an extensive tour of his place. He made us feel at home and offered anything we needed to make our stay a great experience.
The lake house was much larger than we expected with beautiful woodwork and about as close to the water as you can be without being on a boat. Nice selection of bedrooms that can fit a variety of different types of groups and families. Nice kitchen with all the supplies and a cozy living room. 2 outdoor decks overlooking the lake give you ample opportunity to take in the spectacular view.
Allen also includes a variety of things to help you enjoy the lake. Fishing equipment, kayak, paddle board, floating chairs and life jackets were all available for use. He even let us borrow some water shoes which he recommended using. He also offers the option of renting his motor boat if you want.
The location is perfect, just a short drive down to Hammondsport. A beautiful area to explore and enjoy the nature and peace of Keuka Lake and it surroundings.
We are already trying to plan a return visit!

This place was fantastic! We loved having access to the lake from the back door, having a great dock and having permission to use the kayak, paddle board and life jackets. The sun sets directly across the lake from the dock- it was gorgeous!

Me and my fiancée had a great time. We went here on my birthday for a much needed vacation. We would love to come back again sometime. Very cozy and private with spectacular views. This place has all you need, and everything is clearly labeled. Definitely would recommend.

Booked a last minute trip with my husband and found Karen's place. Very affordable for the two of us. House was extremely clean and kitchen was labeled, which I appreciate :) House sits right on the lake making it beautiful to enjoy. Plenty of parking. Nicely renovated. Easy to get to Geneva, Watkins Glenn and Penn Yan.

This place was amazing, beautiful home right on the lake with amazing views. Very clean and spaciousness inside also. Felt right at home the second you walk in. Alot of things to do and places to see in the surrounding area also. 10/10 would recommend
Beautiful, peaceful lakefront house with gorgeous views. Spacious home, very clean, modern appliances! A must stay with your family!!

The place was great.  Everything you ever need in a vacation rental was provided. House was spotless.  If I have to say anything negative it would be there was not enough storage for recyclables.  And what didn’t fit they wanted you to take with you.  With a seven hour drive , I find that unrealistic.  We did take them but would like you to think in the fire if maybe a couple of more containers.  Also only being allowed one bag of trash is also unrealistic with Four people for four nights and expect us to bring that with us is asking a little too much.  Luckily we produced more recyclables than trash.  But I still highly recommend this home to anyone.

Perfect location. My wife and I enjoyed our stay. Beautiful views of the lake; very central to a lot of places. House was clean, very spacious and nicely decorated. We enjoyed the games that Karen provided. All the cabinets in the kitchen were nicely labeled; which was a huge help. Karens place was stocked with everything we need. Highly recommended this place!
Terrific house, wonderful view. Cozy and clean, our visit was great!

We loved our stay at Karen’s. The house was beautiful and clean, and we were close to our favorite wineries, including Anthony Road only 1.5 miles up the road. The house was the perfect size for two couples.

Amazing! The place was just what my husband and I needed, a beautiful, peaceful house by the lake. The house was clean, cozy, with everything you need (cooking supplies, towels, linens etc.) to spend a memorable time with your loved one/one’s. The lake view is gorgeous , especially during sunrise (which you can see from the one of the bedrooms). The fire pit outside was our favorite past time at night, where we sat by , drank wine and roasted marshmallows. Karen was very responsive and helpful when we contacted her. 10/10 experience, I definitely recommend it. Can’t wait to go back.

beautiful lake house! amazing views from the living room, bedroom, boat house. the kitchen is well labeled along with the remaining of the house. lots of extra blankets and pillows. it was a great escape. the welcome wine bottle was a pleasant surprise. Karen had great communication.

Welcomed with a bottle of wine & beautiful views! A cozy place to relax after a day wine tasting on the lakes! Well stocked with any kitchen accessories you may need! Made cooking breakfast & meals very easy! Comfy sitting area & beds! Loved watching the views of the sunrise & sunset from the deck & boat house! Great stay!
The place was absolutely beautiful and the views were stunning! Had everything we needed for our stay and Karen was very communicative. We can’t wait to come back!

We had a wonderful stay at Karen’s place. It was pristine clean, comfortable & very well laid out with thoughtful extra touches; the boathouse was clean and such a pleasant place to hang out with morning coffee to watch the sunrise.
It was quiet and private, close to everything we wanted to do and we can’t wait to come back!
Beautiful location, the views are fabulous and house was cozy.
Great view. Very nice accommodations. Would stay again and/or refer to friends and family.
Beautiful place! We loved every minute! Would absolutely stay again!
The house and view were just amazing. Perfect little get away and not too far from surrounding adventures (hiking/waterfalls). Particularly loved the view from the bedroom.
We had a great experience here! The home was beautiful and the perfect spot for a few days in the finger lakes. The view was incredible and had all the things needed for a relaxing weekend.
Great place for a weekend away. Easy to find and check into. The views were fantastic just as the pictures portrayed.
We had a wonderful few days at the lake.. The house was nicely renovated, clean, comfortable beds. Great location, quiet, relaxing outdoor space, we enjoyed the fire pit. Hope to return.

House was immaculate and has one of the best views of Seneca Lake that we've experienced. Was a very peaceful and quiet getaway which was perfect for our group of 4.   Property was easily accessible with a 2WD vehicle. Karen was very responsive and an excellent host!

This was a beautiful home! The pictures were accurate and maybe even better in person due to the great weather that we had. The location was incredible as the home was right on the lake. Home was stocked and beautifully decorated. The boat house was also great as it had an incredible view of the lake! I would definitely recommend!

The cottage is beautiful, comfortable, and secluded. It was a great home base to travel throughout the Finger Lakes. The view is breathtaking.
Great communication from our host as well. Thank you!

Beautiful house right on the lake! Great bonus space in the boat house! Loved having my coffee out on the dock in the morning & a glass of wine in the evening. Would definitely recommend it!! Karen was very responsive to reply.
Plenty of room. Place was clean. Nice decor and a responsive host. Highly recommended
This was our second trip at Karen’s place this n back to back years. We really enjoyed our stay - just as much as we did the first time. He would happily stay at Karen’s place again.

This home is perfection for a little relaxation and breathtaking views. We just loved out time here. Everything was neat, clean and easily accessible. If anything the description of the house didn't rave enough about the space and how nice it was and the great additional asset that is the boat house. The lake is crystal clear and the sunrises are not to be missed. So peaceful and multiple decks to relax and take it all in.

Karen was a top-notch host, super responsive! The home was very comfortable, beautifully decorated, and had a view that was out of this world.  The home was spotless, and bedrooms were spacious.  We had everything we needed. I would definitely recommend and rebook in the future.

The location is fantastic, and the house is very nicely decorated. The boathouse is an awesome additional space.
It’s very nice that there are some staples in the house, Covid ruined so many things that Airbnb’ers used to take for granted.
Karen was super responsive and had an immediate solution for something that came up while we were there. I’m super impressed with our visit, and her specifically as a host. Thank you for having us at your beautiful home.
One small thing, the plumbing, Karen fully discloses that it’s sensitive, and many lakefront homes have this issue. It wasn’t a problem for us, but I can see where it could possibly be for others.
The smallest of all things, the coffee maker, it’s nit-picky to even mention, no k cups, it’s an older standby model, we left 100 coffee filters for the next folks. Seems silly to even mention.
Overall a 10, awesome stay, awesome location, awesome place and host! Thank you. We hope to be able to return again in the future.

This is our second year staying at Karen's place and it is lovely. So peaceful. I loved waking up hearing the sound of the waves from the lake. Access to the lake is amazing but we did have rain for most of the time. It didn't stop us from enjoying the amenities and exploring the area. Highly recommend staying here.

Karen’s place was exactly as pictured. We loved how everything was neatly labeled and easy to find throughout the house. The boat house was a special bonus. It was the perfect place to end the day by listening to the sounds of the waves and enjoy family game nights. Karen was super responsive throughout the whole booking process and was beyond accommodating throughout our stay.
Karen’s place was great - as described and beautiful. Karen was responsive when we had a question. Very pleased and would stay again!

We enjoyed our short stay and wished we could have stayed longer. I would love to come again
and have the use of a couple of kayaks and or canoes. It is a very peaceful location. We especially liked the boathouse and the surrounding deck!
Karen’s place was beautiful and exactly as described. The communication was fantastic and we loved the views of the lake. Would definitely recommend!

Karen’s place by Seneca Lake was the perfect location for a little rest and relaxation.  The house is nicely redone and clean.  The lake was very quiet considering it was the busy season.  Great location for swimming, paddle boarding, and kayaking.  The room on top of the boat house was a nice extra space to have.  Would love to return!

Karen’s lake house is perfect for a relaxing family vacation on Seneca Lake. It’s well stocked, better than an Airbnb that I have stayed at. Karen was responsible and gracious and provided everything my family needed to enjoy our time. We were celebrating our 10 year anniversary and the bottle of wine from a local vineyard was a classy touch.

Karen's place was amazing!  Her cottage was very comfortable and felt like home.  The king bed and the couches and chairs were very comfortable.   Karen is very thoughtful in how she accommodates her guests as you can see in all of the little things she has ready to go including an umbrella by the door, ice packs in the freezer and a Bluetooth speaker to take down to the deck.   The outside and deck areas and boathouse were incredible and we enjoyed sitting by the lake at different times of the day and evening in between different activities including  a concert at CMAC, hiking at Watkins Glen and by Keuka Lake.  Be sure to stop at Macs Dairy Barn for some delicious ice cream and dole whip.  Karen was very responsive and a fantastic host!  We plan to stay again!

Booked this lovely lakeside getaway for a long weekend while doing a triathlon in the area. It was simply perfect. The house was easy to get to, a shirt drive to nearby restaurants and activities and was right in the lake. The main house was well decorated, charming homey feeling and made you feel right at home and relaxed. Karen was kond enough to leave a bottle of wine from a local vineyard which was a kind and wonderful touch. The deck was beautiful and the boathouse was spectacular(although didn't spend much time in the boathouse, down by the lake, because we had what we needed in the main house. The boat house would be a great get hang out for kids and family if you brought them along.
Sunrise was splendidly gorgeous. Highly recommend waking up early and sitting on the deck to watch it. Puts your mind and soul at rest.
Perfect place for a getaway, would highly recommend it. Thanks for letting us have a memorable weekend.
This place is immaculate on the interior, and beautifully decorated. It’s fully stocked with everything you need. The view is top notch and the location is very convenient. Thanks for a great stay!

Can’t say enough great things about Karen and her house-wonderful host-she has thought of everything you will need! Beautiful, clean house, comfy furniture and beds; gorgeous views off multiple decks, and a sweet hummingbird feeder by the kitchen window! We already look forward to staying here again!

Karen’s place was amazing. The entire house is very well organized, and precise labelling. It was very easy to checkin and stay the long weekend. The place is set on the beautiful lakefront. Was very private and cozy. Highly recommended!
Karen's place was amazing,  included all the comforts of home.  This is our second time there, and won't be the last!

This was a beautiful spot.  Very quiet amazing lake views.  House was very clean and well organized everything in the kitchen was clearly labeled.  Beds were very comfortable.  Wineries were very close by as well as Penn Yan.  Very relaxing stay.

Beautiful views and a beautiful home. It was a great location within 15-30 min to everything we did! The home was clean and easy to navigate the instructions. Looking forward to visiting the FLX area again one day thanks to this visit!!

We came with another couple for a long weekend getaway and this was a perfect home and location. Close to Penn Yan, local wineries and a easy drive to Watkins Glen. Love the surrounding countryside and the sunrise view over the lake each morning. Home was tidy, updated and comfortable. Definitely recommend staying here.
Simply amazing we can’t wait to visit again!!!

Karens place was exactly as described and pictured. The view was amazing from the living room and bedroom. All of the furniture/beds were very comfy and the place was spotless. We weren’t there long enough to fully appreciate the outside areas and boathouse but there are awesome places to hang out regardless of the weather. The neighborhood is quiet, neighbors are close on both sides but house is situated for outside privacy.
Karen was extremely fast to respond to any questions we had, although we didn’t need much. Her instructions were very detailed and we had all we needed. We would love to return!

Karen’s house was absolutely beautiful and clean The beds were comfortable and it was so beautiful and peaceful… Our mission when we went there was to chase waterfalls
we went all over the place and there are plenty of choices for restaurants to eat and places to visit... Thank you Karen for sharing this wonderful home 🏡

This modern cottage mid west side of Seneca Lake was easy to get to, was in a very quiet neighborhood. We enjoyed the fire pit near the lake. The family room furniture was comfortable.
The kitchen was clearly labeled so it was easy to find what we needed.
The host left us a bottle of local wine which was a very nice touch.
We did not have any problems whatsoever with the water. However we didn’t run laundry and only used the dishwasher when we were not there.
Fell in love with the Finger Lakes region. We liked the waterfalls and gorges. And visited a few local wineries. This was a lovely home base for our explorations.
Beautiful lakeside house which was very clean and well maintained. We enjoyed the sunrises over Seneca Lake and had a relaxing weekend.
my husband and I stayed with 2 other couples and this place was perfect! it was super clean with a spectacular view. all of the beds were really comfortable and the area was super quiet.
Had a wonderful time exploring the Finger Lakes region.
You will not be disappointed. The place is really nicely done and very clean. The views are incredible you are right on the water.

Great Airbnb experience!  Wonderful property on the shore of Keuka!  Comfortable furnishings, very clean, & excellent amenities.  The ensuite baths & king-size beds were perfect for our crew. Loved the open floor plan and panoramic view of the lake!
The location was beautiful.  The bathrooms and kitchen well stocked with everything we needed from soaps, tp and paper towel. We loved this house!
Beautiful house with a great view.  Loved the kayaks that were provided.  Lots of state parks and wineries nearby.

Can’t say enough great things about our stay at Casey’s Keuka Lake house. It was immaculate. Beautiful spacious rooms.  The deck overlooking the lake was gorgeous. The house was extremely well stocked- really one of the best well stocked air bnbs I’ve ever stayed at. I highly recommend this property. We had a great time.
Wonderful house and location.  Spacious, clean and well stocked home. The views from the kitchen and living room are priceless. The location is great. Overall 5 star rental and stay and great host.

Casey was extremely responsive whenever I had a question. The place was even better in person than what the pictures show. The kayaks were a great surprise and were free to use whenever we wanted. The set-up of the house is great for multi-family gatherings. A separate bedroom and bathroom were downstairs, with 2 full bedrooms/bathrooms on the main floor, with an additional partial bathroom upstairs as well. The place was extremely clean and well stocked. And of course, the balcony and view of the lake could not be matched!!! Thank you Casey, and we hope to return in the future!!

Beautiful place, well appointed.
Casey is a great host.
The house was perfect for our family.
We will definately return
Fabulous host. Lovely home. Felt like home. Would love to stay again.

Great house for 3 couples for a week at the Finger Lakes. You can tell the owners have built and stocked a house they would want to stay in. The kitchen had everything we could possibly need, even aluminum foil, plastic wrap, etc. which you do not typically find at an AirBnB. Ample dish ware and cooking supplies which helped as we had many dinners in during the week. The linens and towels were high quality and plenty of them. It was great that each bedroom had its own on-suite plus a king size bed. Beautiful views of the lake with a private dock to tie up a boat and a nice gravel area to lounge by the lake. Super close to town, wineries, ice cream stands, and the Lakeside Country Club golf course. This was our 3rd weekly rental on Keuka Lake and definitely our favorite thus far.
Beautiful location with fantastic lake front views.
Great place, great location!

We really enjoyed our stay. The house was spacious and comfortable. The area is quiet and peaceful. It was great waking up to the beautiful views. We spent the majority of the time on the lake fishing, kayaking and paddle boarding. We did venture out to a couple restaurants and do some hiking and wine tasting. Everything was less than a 30min drive. Very close to town for groceries, gas, and small shops.
Great place, photos accurate.  Very clean.  Privacy for each bedroom.

We loved our stay at Casey’s place! The views from inside and outside were amazing, and so peaceful. The three master suites were perfect for a little family reunion. Thank you so much for sharing your place with us.
The house was beautiful and extremely clean.  The views of the lake were great and just what we wanted for a quick weekend getaway to the finger lakes!

This was a beautiful home, awesome view of Keuka Lake! Perfect home to relax, enjoy the lake. Convenient to a marina.
The home was just as described in the listing. Our family enjoyed our time and hope to stay again in the future! We would highly recommend staying in this home.

We had a great stay at Casey’s home. It was an amazing stay for a girls weekend away.  The beds were super comfortable, the living room had a great view of the water and the kitchen was well stocked.  It had a deck on the main level  as well as a walk out from the downstairs bedroom. Would certainly recommend a stay.

This is a beautiful, comfortable and spacious house on Keuka Lake with gorgeous views. Three of us enjoyed a relaxing girl’s trip with hiking and exploring Keuka as well as the neighboring lakes. This house was well stocked with everything you need. Hope to be back !
Beautiful and comfortable home! No issues. I would come back.
Wonderful view and accommodations. Having 3.5 bathrooms was perfect.
Great location on the lake, well stocked kitchen, beds were super comfortable. Loved this Air B&B. Hope to return again.

Casey's was a pleasure to deal with. Check in was easy and the house is one of the nicest properties we've ever stayed in. Actually, the pictures don't do it justice as it is way more beautiful in person. The house is modern, clean, comfortable and had everything you need for a stay. And it has a true " million dollar view".
Whenever we go back to the Finger Lakes, staying at Casey's place is at the very top of the list.

This house was beautiful and in a great location. The house was well taken care of and had everything we needed during our stay. The location is close to Penn Yan where restaurants and stores are located and you are a few miles away from some fantastic wineries.  The lake view from the family room is magnificent.  The main room opens up to a large deck outside where you can start the day right with a morning coffee.

I recently had the pleasure of staying at this beautiful lakefront cottage and it was a great experience. The views of the lake were absolutely stunning and made for the perfect backdrop to my getaway (even in the rain!). The location is conveniently close to Penn Yan and wineries, which made exploring the area a breeze.
