The cottage itself is exceptionally clean, newly renovated and tastefully decorated, with a comfortable and cozy atmosphere that immediately makes you feel at home. The owners have done an excellent job of ensuring that the cottage is well-stocked with all the essentials you may need during your stay, from kitchen appliances to fresh linens and towels. And the outdoor deck was the perfect spot to take in the lake views with a cup of coffee in the morning or a glass of wine in the evening.
Overall, I cannot recommend this lakefront cottage enough - if you're looking for a peaceful, comfortable and beautiful retreat, look no further than this property.

We all agreed this was a beautiful, quality place for friends to gather! Location, view, amenities, price, cleanliness, decor left nothing lacking. Our party of three couples agreed this is a “do again”! Thank you!

What a remarkable place and owner! We couldn't of asked for a more dream like home. Lots of siting and remarkable places, and easy to get downtown and wonder around. Hot dog, we are lucky to get some time in a place like this :)

Casey’s place was perfect for us. Had a great location and being right on the river is a super plus. We felt at home when we walked in. When we come back I hope she has availability because it’s the best one we have been to in the last couple of year that we have been going upstate. Thank you Casey! The stay was perfect!

My family and I had a wonderful experience here. I can't recommend this stay enough! The house is so quiet and peaceful with beautiful views of the lake. There's an upstairs and downstairs porch where you can relax right on the water having your coffee in the morning or wine in the evening. All 3 king size beds are extremely comfortable, we all slept so well on this vacation which is a big bonus. Just a mile down the road is downtown Penn Yan where you can enter the Keuka Outlet Trail and have the most magical walk/run (for those who like to get in some exercise). The house is perfectly located for enjoying the finger lake area. We had a great time enjoying hikes, wineries and especially this house. Everything was seamless (check-in, communication with Casey, house was immaculate, had everything you would need). You won't be disappointed!!!

We thoroughly enjoyed our one-night stay at the property. Right next to the lake and beautifully maintained. The amenities provided were more than we expected. And it's close to the town when we had to buy groceries. The house was very clean and well appointed. And the view from the living room and the lower floor bedroom is just beautiful. We wished we had a couple of more days to enjoy the house. We are definitely planning to come back again. Thank you for being a wonderful host

The house is beautiful, very modern. Beautiful views of the lake. Beds were very comfortable. Super clean. Location was excellent - close to wineries and restaurants. Perfect for our girls weekend, but would also be great for couples and families.

we thoroughly enjoyed our stay. it perfect. we will stay again

This is a amazing house. Close to the lake with beautiful views. The bed is very comfortable to sleep on.
Beautiful house and beautiful views!

We loved this place!  Right on the water, beautiful open area with lots of windows to enjoy the view, and plenty of space and bathrooms.  There was a blizzard and the host and family came to shovel us out which was much appreciated.  We would definitely stay here again!
A beautiful home on the lake. This was everything we expected and more.
We love this lake house! Beautiful view and Casey is awesome!!!
Lovely lake house. Clean, comfortable and just as described. I would definitely rent again !

This house was beautiful and in a great location. The open concept and windows surrounding the living room allowed us to enjoy the view of keuka lake. The price was a steal for a house lakeside. The location is close to Penn Yan where restaurants and stores are located.
Second time staying- even easier than the first. Beautiful view, relative privacy even though neighboring house is close.

I have stayed at many Air B and B’s in the Finger Lakes and this was one of the cleanest and relaxing. Casey’s place was beautiful, free of excess clutter and just very peaceful. Even though winter, the view was beautiful.
We would love to stay here again.
We spent a relaxing weekend with friends at Casey's lake house. The view through the walls of windows was lovely. We'll come back!

My boyfriend and I were looking for a peaceful, low key getaway for a night when we found Casey’s listing. A beautiful view of the Keuka lake through huge windows, it was easy to relax and feel right a home. Casey was very prompt with responses to questions and the coffee selection was a delightful treat.
We have decided to make this place our yearly February getaway tradition!
Beautiful, clean home with fantastic views!
Perfect place for a couples getaway.

We had an excellent stay with the two of us and our baby. Absolutely beautiful views, and quite peaceful and serene.  Karen was always available and her correspondence included everything we needed to know for a great stay.

I booked this home for a girls weekend, and it was PERFECT. As soon as we stepping into the house, we were in love with the home and the view. We ended up spending more time at the house and on the dock than expected because the view and the homey feel were incredible.
Karen was a great host! She sent recommendations and responded very quickly to messages. The house was fully stocked too with kitchen supplies, soap, towels, etc. which was another plus for this bnb. The winery that was 3 mins away (Anthony Road Wine Company) was one of our favorites of the trip! I would 100% stay here again.
This is one of the nicest places there is to stay! She was great to rent from and the home was incredible

This place was absolutely beautiful and exactly what we needed for a few days to relax and explore the Fingerlakes. The house was clean and well cared for and right on the water with a beautiful view from the living room and bedroom. A lot of wineries and breweries are within 15 mins and easy to get to. We will definitely visit again!
Karen is a great host and get place is in a perfect location
We enjoyed celebrating this lovely home for our anniversary so much that we immediately booked to come back in a few months for our family vacation.

Karen's home is absolutely lovely - beautifully decorated and immaculately clean. The bed was very comfortable and the kitchen is well equipped with everything one might need. I had to do a couple of Zoom meetings for work while there and the Internet speeds were fast enough and more than adequate for video calls. The house is right on the lake in a quiet neighborhood and we enjoyed watching the beautiful sunrises from the living room (a bit too cold while we were there to sit out on the dock, but that would be great in the summer).
Karen was super responsive and friendly in all our communications. She even left us a welcome bottle of wine from a great local winery just down the road! Check-in and check-out instructions were clear. The house is near many great local wineries and an easy drive to restaurants and grocery stores in the nearby towns. We thoroughly enjoyed our stay there and will definitely stay there again when we come back up the the Finger Lakes region.
The view and home are simply beautiful and grounds are very well kept. It is a gem and we hope to visit again. Thank you Karen.

My sisters and I had a wonderful winter getaway at Karen’s home. The house was incredibly well-stocked, with everything you could need. Everything was labeled, making it easy to find. Location was perfect with beautiful lake views and quiet surroundings. Karen was a fabulous host, incredibly responsive and ensured we were shoveled out and had a safe departure when snowfall hit on our last day! We look forward to our next visit!
Very responsive host. Beautiful and relaxing setting. Comfortable space with plenty of room. Well decorated.

Had an absolute amazing stay! The place was over the top great host gave all the information needed for the stay.  Would highly recommend this place you will absolutely not be disappointed.  The host thought of everything!
I have been to many 5 star rating  abnbs but this place is most completely equipped by far and I can feel owners care at every corner.

The home was clean and comfortable.  The kitchen was well stocked with everything your need.  The view of the lake was gorgeous.  We even woke up to a beautiful sunrise.   The neighborhood was very quiet and serene.  The home was close to many wineries and Cayuga lake wineries are only 1 hour away.  15 -20 minutes to stores and restaurants in Pen Yann and Geneva.  We enjoyed our stay and would love to visit in the summer months when we can enjoy the outdoor amenities such as the deck and fire pit.
We thoroughly enjoyed our stay at Karen's lovely house.  The views of the lake are incredible, and we happened to hit spring-like weather in mid-February, so enjoyed being outdoors as well as inside.

It was a warm and inviting home. We especially enjoyed watching the sunrise from our room and gazing at the moon & stars at night. Being right on the lake was the best! We couldn't have been happier with our stay and our host. Perfect getaway weekend!

Incredible views of the lake - looks like a screensaver across the whole back of the house! Great location with access to wineries, restaurants and towns. Big kitchen, we were also able to cook during our week stay!
nice location, great host, fit the bill...
Great location with an amazing view. Can’t wait to go back!

Karen’s place was great! The views were beautiful, and the surrounding towns peaceful but plenty to do even in winter. Karen was a great host and was very accommodating! We loved it so much we extended our stay. Would Come back in a heartbeat

Karen was a great host! Her place is lovely, spacious and clean. And the kitchen really is fully-stocked! The location is perfect, it's quiet and scenic. Canadian Geese and ducks abound. We had a wonderful winter getaway at Karen’s house. The house was the perfect size for myself, husband and baby. Absolutely beautiful, charming cottage. Super clean. Fast communication and the VIEW!! Would absolutely stay there again!
Everything we could have wanted. Definitely look into this place.

Karen’s house is beautiful. We had a wonderful time. The views are beautiful!! The house was very well stocked. We would definitely stay again. Thank you.

This cottage is absolutely perfect!  Location is almost perfectly centered for travel to Watkins Glen and Waterloo.  Penn Yan is only 5 miles away for shopping, restaurants, or gas.  Also perfectly centered to watch an amazing sunrise.  The cottage is the perfect size for 1 or 2 couples.  Spacious with plenty of storage, but cozy and comfortable at the same time.  Kitchen is fully stocked with anything you would need and clearly labeled and well organized.  We slept in the king size bedroom on the street side and it was very comfortable and quiet.   3 large tvs with lots of streaming options without worrying about packing a firestick or roku.  The decks are perfect for relaxing and enjoying the perfect views of the lake.  They even provide binoculars!  We didn't use the dock, but it looked like the perfect setup for water activities.  The other houses are close in proximity, but landscaping provides the perfect natural barrier for privacy.  The main bathroom is good size, with a big shower.  Having a second half bath is ideal.   Although we didn't use the dining table, it was a beautiful wood table with enough room for a Thanksgiving dinner, game night, or puzzle.  Although I am not one to do laundry while on vacation, the washer and dryer would be convenient for towels or extended stays.  Dishwasher and huge refrigerator were also super convenient.   Will definitely be booking for next year!

Highly recommend this Airbnb! We were 2 couples who came here for a weekend getaway and it was truly everything we hoped it would be. Gorgeous spot right on the water, spotlessly clean, thoughtful touches, well-equipped kitchen, very comfortable beds (and equitable bedrooms which is always nice if you’re coming with another couple). We can’t wait to come back!

We truly enjoyed our stay at this beautiful house on Seneca Lake. The views were spectacular and the house was very welcoming. The complimentary bottle of wine was a nice touch and we would highly recommend this place to our friends and relatives.

Wonderful, peaceful and beautiful! Awesome location l, beautiful house! it was like walking into your own personal resort. The owners definitely take the time to make sure the house is spotless and ready for you. We will definitely be back! I wish I could give 10 stars!

Wonderful stay!  Loved the complimentary bottle of wine!  The location was perfect for wineries, proximity to towns, etc.  Really appreciated the phone chargers that were already in place at the house!  Beds were comfy, house was immaculately clean.  Would definitely stay here again.  The sunrise in the morning from the dock was amazing!!!!

This is an exception Airbnb. The location provides spectacular views, the house is immaculate and very nicely appointed and the kitchen is very well stocked with everything you need to stay in and cook.

The house is beautiful, comfortable,  and clearly labeled. We had an amazing chance to watch a storm march across the lake with two rainbows! Spectacular.  Huge fish were jumping 100 feet out from the deck. Karen was a wonderful and understanding host.
Such a beautiful place. Next to all the good wineries. So relaxing to sleep listening to the sound of the lake at night. Karen’s place is the prefect place for enjoying the Finger Lakes.

Incredible week here! Karen was so responsive with any questions we had before and during our stay. There is so much to do but it was always so nice to come “home” to the house and relax by the lake. We even got 3 mornings of amazing sunrises-just like the one pictured. Highly recommend!!!
Was great!

We traveled to Seneca lake for 5 days and loved it. The house was comfortable and clean. The views were spectacular and the location was perfect.  We rented a boat and docked it at the house. Incredible views, spotless home with all of the amenities plus some. We were in town for a triathlon and this place was a perfect home to relax pre and post race. Exceeded expectations.

this home is fantastic, we had a wonderful experience! karen & george have everything and have anticipated their guest's every need. there's even baby bottle washing liquid under the sink! the appliances are top notch, everything is labeled and easily found, and it's immaculately clean. the views and lake and surrounding area speak for themselves but karen has made her place sing.

We really enjoyed our stat at Karen’s house. The place is very spacious and modern with all the necessary amenities for our week’s stay. Karen’s property is just gorgeous! Beautiful sunrises if you’re a morning person, but if you’re not, open up that patio and listen to those calming lake waves. Karen also had great communication and responded immediately when the water purifier was beeping when we arrived later in the evening after a long drive (her plumber went above and beyond and arrived SO fast). Our first FLX trip and we hope to return soon!

The house is beautiful! Instructions for check in and check out were simple. The view of the lake is amazing! House is in a good location with many wineries close by, Watkins Glen 30 minutes down one road, and 20 minutes to Geneva the opposite way, great restaurants near by.
We spent a lot of time in the boat house which was a really nice bonus to have! House had everything we needed! Would highly recommend staying here!

Clean; comfortable, quiet all you need for a nice getaway. Wineries, breweries and Watkins Glen are a must due to proximity. Karen was a pleasure to communicate with and very responsive.
The view from the deck will keep you home so plan on coffee on the deck!
Got to see the fog roll in over the lake, a memory never to forget!
Perfect set up for 2 couples!
Highly recommended!

The location and the accommodation is incredible. Immediately, felt relaxed after arriving.

We had a wonderful 2 night stay at Casey’s beautiful lake home on Keuga Lake just outside of the town of Penn Yan.  The house has cathedral ceilings with 2 walls of glass windows offering an amazing view of the lake. The house appears to have recently undergone a major renovation and everything is updated and new. The beds and furniture were very comfortable. We especially appreciated how clean the house was. There are hardwood floors / hard surfaced floors throughout. This is a great house for people with allergies! A very nice touch was the coffee she left on the counter for renter’s use. She also was quick to respond to a question we had.  It was a wonderful weekend experience!

We loved our stay in Penn Yan between Christmas and New Year.  The house was immaculate and exceptional.  The view over Keuka Lake was stunning.  expansive kitchen, great location.   case was very responsive and helpful in every way. We will most definitely return.

Temperature wise upstairs was nice and toasty but the bedroom downstairs as per usual was cold lol. but there was a space heater in the closet! great place would highly recommend!

The place would still have been a great deal even if it was much more expensive. Spacious and fun- we could even have had privacy from others staying with us if desired.

We loved Casey’s place. The view from the deck was beautiful and we spent as much time as we could taking in the views. Casey’s place was close to many Wineries and restaurants. We would definitely stay again.

we would love to plan a family vacation to stay there again soon!

Beautiful home, wonderful location, both check in and out easy. Response to any questions was prompt.

Nice house with great views and comfortable sleeping accommodations ..

The house and location is amazing! Having three master bedrooms is perfect for multiple families. The shallow beach is great for kids and swimming. Love this house!  It was the perfect home for our 1st annual family vacation with my sons, their wives and my 2 grandsons 1 years old and 7 months.The open living space leasing to the outside deck is comfortable and has incredible views . Everything about this house was great!

Casey's house is great.  The views were fantastic.  The house was very comfortable, exactly as described.  Casey was quick to respond when we had a question.  The house is close to downtown Penn Yan, filled with great shops and restaurants.  We would definitely stay here again.

We loved staying here.  The house is fabulous and the lake view is beautiful.  Everyone had their own bedroom and bathroom, lots of space!  We highly recommend this home.  We hope to return several times!

Casey did an awesome job in the lake house. We all enjoyed our stay there. Everything is well thought of for the convenience of the guests. She also communicated & responded on time. View is beyond lovely! We’d love to come back again soon & this time for a longer time. Kudos guys!

Casey’s place was amazing! Great location, spacious home and beautiful view. I had the best mornings here just drinking coffee and enjoying the view. We had a great time and are already planning our next trip to Keuka Lake. We will definitely be back!

All the finishes are top quality with attention to detail in the design and layout. The location was outstanding. Very peaceful and quiet. Beautiful home, with a beautiful view. Very close to town as well. Great stay, highly recommend.
Beautiful and clean property! It was very spacious for a group of 6 and close to town and some good wineries. We got to see the sunrise and sunset too that weekend!

Perfect house on the lake.  The house was very clean and the view was magnificent.  Easy check-in with plenty of room for everyone.  Highly recommend this house as a vacation stay on the lake.

Great house with everything we needed. Impressed with the snow removal without needing to ask. Thank you!

We had a really nice getaway — lots of things to do inside and out. We loved the big window looking onto the lake. The deck and fire pit were perfect, too. The only thing that made it tricky was unloading the car across the street. (But to be fair, we had a lot of stuff with two kids.) Other than that, it was perfect. We would love to return someday.

This home has it all! The view of the lake is spectacular. I can only imagine what it is like from the boathouse in the warmer weather. Everything was clean, comfortable, and inviting. It wasn’t hard to feel “at home”. The host is friendly and attentive. I highly recommend this to anyone looking for a relaxing Finger Lake getaway!

My husband and I stayed at Karen's home with another couple. We had a wonderful stay! The entire home was incredibly clean, which is always something I'm pretty picky about and appreciate. We found every kitchen tool we needed to cook all of our meals during our stay. The boat house was a fun place to hang out in the evening and we drank our coffee on the dock, as it was a warm few days in December. It was a 30-45 minute drive to some beautiful waterfalls in the area and just 5 minutes to so many great wineries. Karen even thoughtfully left us a bottle of wine from one of the local wineries! There was an issue with the well/pump and we didn't have water for one night. Karen immediately communicated with us and got a plumber out to the house by 7 am the next morning. We were impressed with her promptness, communication, and quick resolution, especially since it was New Years Eve and I'm sure finding a plumber wasn't easy. The only suggestion I have for fellow guests is that if you're a light sleeper, I would stay in the room with the king bed. I am an extremely light sleeper and we stayed in the room facing the lake (the view was AMAZING), and the pump is in the basement below that bedroom. We would absolutely stay here again and recommend Karen's home to our friends and family!
Tranquil lake house. Beautifully maintained. Would love to come back at another season.

This house was in a great location, with expansive views of the lake from the living room. Since it was December we couldn't go for a swim, but it was warm enough to sit on the decks. The house was very clean when we arrived and the couch was comfortable for lounging and watching TV after a day out at the wineries. An alarm in the basement was going off when we arrived and Karen immediately sent someone over to take care of it.

This is the nicest Airbnb place we have stayed to date. We walked into a beautiful updated, clean home. The views are absolutely breathtaking. Karen has it all thought out down to including toothbrushes incase you forget yours. Love that it had a set of towels and bedding for each room as well as all the kitchen amenities. We met the neighbors at the local bar Dresden’s (the owners there are the sweetest) and had a great time chatting with them all. We can’t wait to return next year!
Great home with beautiful views and close to wineries, restaurants, and outdoor experiences. This is our favorite place we have stayed in the Finger Lakes.

Karen’s cottage is absolutely beautiful. The lake views and the space was perfect for me and my family. Her home was well stocked with all the essentials and her instructions were good. Highly recommend it!
This place is perfect for a relaxing getaway/ vacation . The house is super clean and the view of the lake is breathtaking.  Great location -super close to wineries , hikes and restaurants .

Karen's house was beautiful and clean with an amazing view of Seneca Lake. Her house was within driving distance of Penn Yan and many wineries. The area is quiet and scenic and Karen was really easy to communicate with. I look forward to staying with her in the future!
Lovely cottage in great location! Beautiful view. Very clean.

Our stay was fantastic! The home is beautiful and has everything you could need for a wonderful stay on the lake. The house itself has great amenities, but the location is even better. We loved waking up to the lake and sitting on the deck every morning while we drank our coffee. Would definitely recommend staying at Karen’s home!

Beautiful house in a great location! I absolutely loved the layout of the house and the decor! Waking up to a beautiful sunrise was just amazing. The fire pit was a cozy place to enjoy a relaxing evening. Close proximity to the wineries on the Seneca Lake wine trail.
Feels very private on the back porch while you’re looking over the lake.. we had gorgeous pink sunrises every morning! Highly recommend.

We enjoyed a wonderful vacation at this lovely lakeside home on Seneca Lake.  The home is beautifully decorated and the view of the lake is spectacular!  We found everything we needed in the fully stocked kitchen.  We enjoyed our meals on the deck, and enjoyed playing games in the room over the boathouse.  The host did a great job in keeping us informed about the details of the home, and also gave us suggestions for things to do in the area.

My family and I stayed in this lovely home again this summer.  We had such a nice time last summer, that we decided to book it again, and this time for a longer stay!  The house and property were just as lovely as we remembered!  The house itself is very comfortable and well-appointed.  We had everything we needed.  The deck and backyard area are such a delight, and the grill is perfect for summer cooking.  The standout is the lake, and the dock that leads out to it.  The fire pit right there.  Just so lovely to have the girls be able to safely swim in shallow water.  We built a fire and sat down there with cocktails and low music while the girls were in the water.  The property and the area are very conducive to unplugging, relaxing and getting away from the every day routine.  And the fact that you can see the lake from almost anywhere in the house is a huge bonus because that view is breathtaking.  We highly recommend a stay here.  Karen is very communicative and easy to correspond with.  She is definitely a great host!  We hope to be back again!

The pictures do not do the house and boathouse justice - it was much more spacious than anticipated. The location is great - 15 minutes from Geneva. Lake access from the dock was easy - we were able to go swimming and kayaking.
Karen was amazing. There was a terrible storm and flooding in the area, but we were happy, comfortable and safe in the house and Karen dealt with the storm fallout promptly.

Great location, great house, great view. The house was quiet and clean and well-labeled. Karen was very responsive to questions. The sun rises was gorgeous. The pier is great for fishing. We will be back next time.
Beautiful place! Wonderful host. Thought of everything you could possibly need. Responded immediately to any inquiries we made!

Check in was very easy. The house was in an excellent location, while also on a nice quiet street. We loved having our coffee out on the deck every morning looking out on the lake. We even rented a boat, and it was great being able to dock it right at the house. We would definitely go back here in the future.

The photos on Airbnb don’t do Karen’s place the justice it deserves. The accommodations are lovely, the space is updated and well stocked. The kitchen had all of the tools we needed to cook numerous meals and everything was very well organized. I would recommend bringing a few extra rolls of paper towels if you plan to cook at the house. Karen provides a set of bath towels (bath towel, face cloth, and hand towel) for each guest, but depending on the duration of your stay you may want to bring an extra set.
Unfortunately, we experienced a string of severe thunderstorms during our stay and we lost power to the house one night. We also lost running water as the water system is powered by an electrical pump. Karen didn’t immediately respond to our outreach about the power loss and water issue, but apologized for the delay and allowed us to check out late. The summer storms in the Finger Lakes this year are no joke! Bring a flashlight and candles just in case!
Overall, we very much enjoyed the space and the amenities (boat house, gas grill, dining on the deck on the lake)!

Everything about the house was perfect.  The house was spotless and communication was easy.  The views of the lake from the living room, queen bedroom and boathouse deck are amazing.  There are many wineries very close by to visit-my recommendations include Scout, Prejean and Anthony Road.  Geneva is an easy 20 min drive.  The kitchen was well equipped, with an added touch of everything labeled so it was easy to find.  Big TVs in the living room and both bedrooms.  We will definitely return.

This house was wonderful and just as described. Stunning views from both inside and outside. The house itself was very clean and everything was well organized. The owner communicated promptly which we very much appreciated.
The house is in a beautiful area and we thoroughly enjoyed our trip!

Wow! I highly recommend this Airbnb. Karen is a wonderful host- effective communicator, and extremely accommodating.
The home is meticulously maintained and no detail was forgotten. Each bedroom is very comfortable and nice airy, bright open living spaces great for hanging out.
Everything in the kitchen was clearly labeled and basic spices were available as well as welcome treats (such a great touch).
The property itself is perfectly positioned right on the water, two decks with amazing views.
Additionally, high speed WiFi, which was totally unexpected. Generally you go to a place like this to disconnect, so to not have the WiFi would be FINE. BUTTT It worked out perfectly for us because 2 people in our group were enrolled in online classes and assumed they wouldn’t be able to sit in on the Zoom session, but thanks to Karen doing everything top notch, they were able to!
Great experience, can’t recommend it enough.

This property was amazing! The house was spotlessly clean, well-stocked, and incredibly well-kept. I couldn’t believe the amazing view and the size of the house. Smart TVs, wireless speakers, the fire pit, air-conditioned boat house, and washer dryer all set this place over the top. What a wonderful experience through and through!

Can’t say enough about this place; great host, beautiful home, gorgeous views, soft sheets, comfy beds, great smelling, fluffy towels and SO CLEAN! Lots of extra touches-sad to leave and can’t wait to come back!
Beautiful place, very clean, lots of nice touches and an amazing view! Would definitely recommend!
Amazing view right on the lake. Close to wineries and Watkins glen.   Definitely would stay here again.
It was an absolutely perfect vacation! Beautiful property, extremely well appointed and VERY clean. We are return visitors and plan on returning in the future.

Karen was a fantastic super host! The house was clean, labeled, and had everything we could ever need! The deck, boathouse, and dock were great for taking in the breathtaking view of the lake. Karen emailed us a list of places to grocery shop, eat out, and explore while enjoying our stay. She answered any questions in a timely manner. We look forward to coming back again!

This was the first trip my family took since Covid and it was great to find a spot with such an amazing view and great attention to detail inside. Everything was perfectly clean and clearly labeled. There were very thoughtful details throughout the house, from water already in the fridge, to a blanket at the seat at the window. (That window quickly became my favorite place to sit and drink my coffee.)
The beds were amazingly comfortable which was very welcome after days spent hiking and checking out wineries. There is so much to do nearby, I think we barely scratched the surface. For a rainy day, I highly recommend making it over to Dr. Konstantin (Make reservations before you go). For a sunny afternoon, Climbing Bines is right down the street with lots of great options for beer and a food truck if you get peckish. If you are looking for a nice walk, the Keuka trail leads you right to Penn Yan Diner where you can get your fill of amazing food
Amazing house boat house also really nice.Great views and very quiet. House was really clean over all great experience
Amazing views, host is very helpful and answered any question we had. Would definitely recommend

We had a wonderful fewdays staying at Karen’s. The location is perfect, close to both Geneva and penn Yan but private enough right on the lake. The house was very clean and updated. Size was perfect for our family. The views of the lake are stunning. Great outdoor space with boathouse and dock decks. We had a great time at Seneca lake at this location. Would definitely stay again!

This place is awesome- it’s right on the water, the view is Amazing. The couch is comfortable, the beds are comfortable (very nice sheets!) and it’s right on the Seneca Wine trail. We would definitely stay here again!

The home was clean and comfortable. The pictures really did not do it justice. The like front view is fantastic. There is enough room for 2 couples. Karen was responsive during booking and provided very nice amenities.The location was good for a weekend wine trip.
Had a wonderful stay! Gorgeous views and very homey!
Absolutely beatiful location! Really close to some of our favorite wineries. She had a great list of attractions near by.  Very clean accomodations with a well stocked kitchen.
Beautiful place with amazing views! Space was recently renovated and was sparkling clean with beautiful decks overlooking the lake. Fire pit was also a very nice bonus. Definitely recommend!
Amazing place, pictures don't do it justice!

Me and my wife spent couple of days here and it was better than we expected. The house was super clean and well organized. The location was a quite and peaceful place. The views from the house was breathtaking. My favorite is the kitchen, as I have never seen such a well equipped and organized house. Everything is labeled and well thought out. We couldn’t have asked for something better. Great find and highly recommend to everyone.
One of the best AirBnbs we've been to. Super clean, quiet, amazing location. You can't go wrong here.
Beautiful, clean, comfortable home with gorgeous views from the house and decks. Karen's communication/response time was top notch. Will definitely book here again!
beautiful place in a lovely setting. hope to return, maybe a few times.

Beautiful house with a spectacular view! Recently updated with a nice kitchen, bathrooms, big living room, and awesome deck. Very close to the lake with an added room above the boathouse. Nice and quiet there as well! Highly recommended!
Absolutely stunning views of the lake! We appreciated how sparkling clean the place was, too. Great location. Highly recommend!

This was our first time visiting the finger lakes and we couldn't have asked for better accommodations.  The views of Seneca lake from each room were breath taking!  The home was clean, modern and felt like home!  Conveniently located to so many wonderful local places to visit, we would highly recommend booking a stay here and look forward to coming back ourselves in the future!

We had such an amazing time at Karen’s place! It was such a breathtaking view, especially those sunrises! Everything was so clean, and we really appreciated having the computer there. We would plan our day out, and it was much easier on the computer for sure.
Karen would answer any questions I had very promptly. The rental was a little pricey, but totally worth it! :)
Would definitely recommend!

We really enjoyed our stay! The house was super comfortable, tastefully decorated and the view of the lake was amazing! Not to mention it was spotlessly clean!  Great location for visits to the local wineries and good restaurants nearby. Wouldn’t hesitate to re-book in the future! Great find!
This house is amazing and honestly even better in person than the pictures show.
Wonderful winter stay! Family of mixed ages found camp comfortable, clean, excellent winter views.

My camping friends and I like to getaway in the winter a few times and this place was perfect for the six of us. The house was spacious and had everything we needed. Close to town and a great Amish market.  We visited a few breweries and and the candy store in town. House is exactly as described with everything you’ll need

The property is situated right on the keuka lake with stunning views of a frozen paradise as the lake was completely frozen and we could walk on it right off the property. The house was stocked with all the necessities and was in pristine condition. We couldn’t have asked for a better place to stay. We expect to be back and stay at Casey’s place again during summers!!

We booked this last minute and it is definitely rare to find a 5 star reviewed home and one that meets that expectation. This was a well-appointed home and one that was recently built or renovated. The view from the living room was spectacular. We are avid lovers of snow and we booked this to enjoy some cozy time away from our busy lives to enjoy the view. TV was not turned on during the stay. Definitely recommend this for anyone looking for a lake home with options. Less than a mile away from town everything was close by, especially handy when there is snow storm of 18". Thanks again!
Such a beautiful home! The house was immaculate and had everything we needed. The beds were super comfortable and, and the host couldn’t have been any more helpful. Would definitely stay here again!

The place is beautifully renovated and located right on the water with stunning views of Kueka lake. It’s easy to get to some wineries and is also a very short drive to the Penn yan downtown restaurants. The kitchen and bathrooms are very well appointed. Each bedroom has its own en suite bath which is so nice. We enjoyed our stay here!
Spacious new interior on lake with panoramic views!

Great stay at Casey’s. Lovely, clean large home right on the lake and very close to town. Perfect for 3 couples or a larger family as there are 3 masters with full baths. Nice porch upstairs and outdoor space downstairs. Fully stocked kitchen too which was great. Definitely recommend!

We had a perfect experience renting from Casey.  Her house was very pretty, clean and the kitchen is stocked.  The beds were more comfortable then our beds at home!  I highly recommend this house. Beautiful lake view!

This is an incredibly beautiful home with even more incredibly beautiful views.  This home is everything described!  It was perfect for a quick getaway with our aging parents...everyone had their own room and bathroom.  Two of the bathrooms are located on the first floor so there were no steps necessary for our parents.  The shared living space was spacious and comfortable.  The bedroom below opens onto the lake with a soothing sound of the water and again, an amazingly beautiful view.  It's a great getaway for anyone wishing to appreciate the lake and fine wineries.
Beautiful, modern, romantic!
Great house.  Clean and all nicely updated.  Three bedroom each with its own bathroom was nice.

The house was was immaculate and everything looked very brand new. A huge advantage is that the house has three bedroom suites, each with it’s own bathroom, which is very rare for a lake house. The two patios overlooking the lake are lovely, whether sitting out in the morning to enjoy coffee, or in the evening to watch the sunset.
Very clean and spacious home, right on the lake and close to town.
Casey’s place is definitely an A+++. It was clean and had all the things we need. We enjoyed so much.
Beautiful new home right in the lake!
This rental was by far one of the best we have stayed at.  The home was clean, in a great location, had plenty of space, and was very comfortable.

Casey is truly a super host. This house is clean, modern, and very comfortable. The location is perfect for visiting the local vineyards or just relaxing on the deck and watching sunrise/sunset on the lake. We would definitely rebook upon a return visit to the Finger Lakes.
Jo Sparagna and guests

This place had everything needed for a relaxing lake trip. The home is beautifully redone and in a great location. All of the beds were super comfortable and each bedroom had its own bathroom. The kitchen had everything you needed and then some. The furniture was comfortable and had a great flow to the space. Both decks were comfortable with a great view of the water. The water access was so easy compared to other homes in the area that require a lot of steps to get down to the water. The beach area at the house is perfect for wading and little ones as it is mostly all smooth rock and doesn't get deep for a while. The location was great too. Not super busy but close to several great breweries and the town of Penn Yan.  The host was very responsive and we had no issues with checking in. Everything was very easy which is what you are looking for on vacation! We will absolutely look to stay here again in the future!
Amazing place!  Right on the lake, which was shallow so it was perfect for little kiddos.  Everything  was new and it was very well stocked. We had such a great stay!

Beautiful home with breathtaking views. House was impeccably clean with all the comforts of home!  Modern appliances and special touches made our stay wonderful. Hope to stay here again next summer!! Thanks Karen.

Super cute house on the water in quiet neighborhood street. Nice deck outside with a small table and other seating. Great place to watch the sunrise. The house isn’t big but the rooms are large. Nicely decorated and very clean. Spacious parking in front of garage directly across from house.

The pictures don’t do the views, justice!  The space is clean, with tons of windows to really give great views of Seneca Lake.  Karen was fantastic!  Her list of local activities was great.  We would absolutely recommend this to EVERYONE!  This place is an absolute gem!  Our only regret is that we didn’t book the stay for longer!

My wife and I stayed here several days and enjoyed it thoroughly.  The place is well-updated and furnished, and meticulously clean.  The location suited us perfectly.  Karen's descriptions and communications were comprehensive and timely.  We couldn't have been more pleased.

The lake house was really amazing.  Meticulously furnished and extremely well cleaned prior to our arrival.   The Sunrises were priceless whether we were inside or outside on one of the decks.  Convenient access to wineries, shopping, and hiking.   A special shout out to Karen who is truly an amazing host.  She was extremely responsive and helpful with any questions we had.  We will definitely return again!

This is the cutest lake house! View is spectacular! So relaxing and comfortable. We loved traveling around to hikes for waterfalls and going to wineries but coming back to casual dinners at the house. We were on the deck, dock or just looking out the lovely windows all the time. Great getaway place to meet up with my brother and his wife from Ohio. I would definitely recommend this place.
Really enjoyed staying here. Beautiful views, great amenities and really liked how responsive Karen was. Place was clean. Had a great time.
Karen’s place is wonderful. Her home is modern with a fully stocked kitchen. The location, views, and lake setting were amazing! I recommend to others and would go back some day.

This is the most charming and adorable house, with hands down the most gorgeous view you will ever get! The house was sparkling clean, and full of every amenity we could hope for, plus additional touches such as water waiting for us in the fridge. The beds were so comfortable - I half asked for where the sheets were from so I could buy them! The dock and the view are by far the most gorgeous part of this house - waking up to the sunrise on the dock will take your breath away. Thank you for an amazing stay Karen!

You can tell that the space is loved. If you are looking for a beautiful, inspiring and serene space, this location is for you. I could not stop looking at the lake and how beautiful it is at all times at day from the expansive windows.

From the second we walked in, Karen’s place was nothing short of incredible. The home is updated and very clean, and the kitchen is full of all the amenities you need to make an amazing meal (there’s even a professional blender!!). The full bath is nicely updated and the two bedrooms are well appointed with comfy beds. Perhaps the best part about this house is the amazing view and boathouse where we had a number of our meals while overlooking Seneca lake. There is literally no better view. We had an amazing two weeks and hope to return next year!

This is the ideal Finger Lakes home-away-from-home, with every amenity you would find in a high-end urban high-rise. The location right on Seneca Lake has glorious sunrise and sunset views. We ate on the deck al fresco breakfast, lunch, and dinner, enjoying cooking in the well-appointed kitchen. A very special week enabling us to re-set, re-charge, and re-appreciate our many blessings...

Such an inviting, picturesque, quiet get away!  The house is clean, well equipped and spacious enough to enjoy a family get away or friends vacation!   The boathouse is a wonderful added bonus that just allows everyone to relax right by the lake.  Swimming, paddle boarding, kayaking, sailing, or boating plus just relaxation is a must on the lake.  Karen is very responsive and helpful.

This beautiful lakeside cottage is very comfortable and well appointed.  It has all the ingredients for unplugging and finding a bit of calm.  The lake is by far the greatest amenity.  It is therapeutic to be able to jump in on a hot day.  It was clear and warm, and it offered a safe watering hole for our 6 and 3 year old kids as it was very shallow where the steps to get in are.  Perfect for safe fun swimming with floaties, and jumping into the lake.  The deck is perfect for grilling, eating your meals or just sit with coffee or a glass of wine to look at the lake.  Very close to many wineries and Watkins Glen waterfall gorge.  The host was very responsive and helpful in answering our questions.  We highly recommend a stay in this beautiful home.

A beautiful home in a great location. We appreciated how clean everything was. Karen is VERY responsive if you have any questions. The suggestions of local attractions were helpful. We will definitely be back!

Nice and clean and private. Great views from the house, dock & boathouse. Good for 2-4 people. Kitchen is well equipped and there is a bbq on the deck. The bathroom has a nice shower. Close to many vineyards & Penn Yan is close by for supermarkets.

Laura was an incredible host and our stay was perfect. The property was exactly as pictured (if not better) and had everything we needed for a comfortable, relaxing stay. The home was spotless, beautifully maintained, and thoughtfully equipped with everything we could possibly need.
We came to celebrate my wife’s 40th birthday with family, and it exceeded all expectations. The setting was peaceful, beautiful, and surrounded by nature - a perfect escape from city life and exactly the reset we were hoping for. We especially loved the cozy atmosphere and how easy it was to truly unwind and be present together.
Laura was friendly, attentive, and always quick to respond, making everything seamless from start to finish.
We have nothing but great things to say. Our only regret is not staying longer. We would absolutely love to come back and highly recommend this place to anyone looking for a peaceful, cozy, and memorable escape.

Had an amazing long birthday weekend with my wife and service dog. The house amenities/view and surroundings make this a perfect luxury winter rental. Highly recommend for relaxation, peace, and feeling unplugged.

Great place! My fiancé and I stayed for a long weekend getaway. The sauna and hot tub were amazing. Everything was clean and straightforward check in/out. Beautiful view of the trees off the porch. The perfect place to sit back and relax. 🖤🌲
Beautiful house and great hiking- we had a wonderful time- thank you !
Beautiful house, well equipped. Host was very responsive.

Spent a weekend here with my family and we felt right at home! Laura provided us with local activities and restaurants  to try out. The place itself was a 10/10 - clean, practical, private and unique with what she had on her property. Beautiful drive in to town - we will be certainly be coming back!

This is an amazing cabin in the Adirondacks. The cabin is in a quiet wooded area yet it was still easy to navigate to local restaurants in the surrounding area. Beyond all the outdoors activities this cabin is perfect on its own. From the hot tub and sauna to the pool table and games this is an excellent stay for a family getaway. The kitchen and living room provide plenty of room to cook and relax while watching wildlife out the large back windows.
Great time with family skiing at Whiteface and winter activities LP!

The A-frame is well appointed and tastefully decorated.  It’s close enough to the various towns to be convenient, but also has a private wilderness feel. We really enjoyed our stay and would recommend!

Our stay was peaceful and relaxing. The sauna in winter was amazing, and the views of the snow covered trees were exactly what we were hoping for.
The host was very responsive and helpful.
We were talking about returning before we even left.
This is our second year staying here! It’s super cozy and the hot tub and sauna are a real treat. The location is close to all the winter activities we are interested in!
Had a great time, this house had all that was listed and was a great choice!

Laura’s Airbnb was clean, equipped with all of the essentials and exactly as described on the Airbnb listing. We had a group of 6 stay at the house and we all had plenty of space. It was a perfect location to get to whiteface mountain for skiing and the sauna plus hot tub were perfect post ski days. Would definitely stay again!

We had an amazing stay at Laura’s cabin! From the games to sauna to hot tub and cozy bedrooms and awesome kitchen, we had a super relaxing time! Laura was super responsive and adaptable. Friendly and kind and recommended local places. We went skiing, cross country skiing, and to Lake Placid - and enjoyed the amenities at the cabin after. Our daughter went sledding right in the yard and our dog enjoyed walks through the cute and quiet neighborhood. Perfect way to celebrate my birthday! Thank you, Laura for having us.

Beautiful house, exactly as pictured, about 20mins ride from the ski resort. Laura is a very responsive host and will reach out to ensure all is well. Despite being in the woods, the roads were plowed regularly so no need to worry about snow/ice.

We had a wonderful stay at Laura’s beautiful cabin in Jay. The place is exactly as shown in the photos—cozy, well maintained, and very comfortable. Communication with Laura was smooth and easy from the beginning.
We had a small issue with the hot tub on the first day and couldn’t get it to work, but after letting Laura know, she quickly took care of it and sent someone who kindly helped us get it working properly.
The kitchen was very well equipped with everything needed to cook, including baking paper, condiments, salt, sugar, oil, and more, which made our stay even more convenient.
We truly enjoyed our time here and would absolutely recommend this cabin to anyone looking for a relaxing stay in the area.

STAY HERE!!!!!
My family of 4 had a fantastic stay at Laura’s cozy place! The cabin was sparkling clean, the beds incredibly comfortable, and the kitchen was well-stocked with essentials. Laura was super responsive and gave us amazing and gave us the option of staying an extra night due to an impending ice storm. The location was beautiful and a stunning and short ride to Whiteface for skiing and Lake Placid for strolling. We LOVED the pool table and game room in the basement, the hot tub and sauna as well. We highly recommend this gem and would definitely book again!".

This Airbnb is truly something special. We have celebrated anniversaries, birthdays, and even Christmas here, and each time felt incredibly magical. The space is spacious, warm, and inviting perfect for gathering, stree erasing, and making memories. The hot tub and sauna were absolute highlights, especially in the Lake Placid setting, adding a sense of luxury and deep relaxation to our stay. Everything was clean, comfortable, and thoughtfully designed, making it easy to settle in and fully enjoy the experience. There’s a certain magic to this place that makes celebrations feel even more meaningful. We can’t recommend it highly enough and will absolutely return again.

I would like to sincerely thank Laura Neil for renting her home to us through Airbnb. She was very kind and helpful throughout our stay. The house is beautiful, comfortable, and a wonderful place to relax and enjoy.
Although we were not able to fully figure out how to use the sauna, we truly enjoyed the house overall. We especially appreciate her help and flexibility in allowing us to change and extend the dates of our stay.
It was a very positive experience, and we would gladly recommend her home to others.

Laura’s Black Pine Lodge exceeded our expectations! The cabin is stunning with incredible amenities - the hot tub and sauna were perfect after hiking Cascade Mountain & exploring Ausable Chasm. The property’s cozy vibe complemented our celebrations. To top it off, Laura was incredibly responsive and kind throughout. Highly recommend for anyone looking for a beautiful Adirondacks getaway!

We will definitely be back to Laura's cabin! Upon booking, Laura set such a welcoming response to us just giving us an initial rundown of the cabin and links to info about the house and surrounding area and she was super helpful answering all of our questions.  Check-in was super seamless and intuitive which we were so grateful for after such a long travel day.  The house was spotless and you could tell every room was cleaned top to bottom and in every corner.  Our stay was so relaxing and the house was absolutely perfect for what we wanted from this trip.  I could not recommend Laura's property enough and we hope to come back many more times.

We absolutely loved our stay! Laura was very responsive and accommodating. The kitchen is beautiful- we cooked an incredible dinner with friends on our first night and felt right at home in a stunning space surrounded by gorgeous scenery / nature.  Will definitely return again!

The house was pretty but not the most comfortable, the downstairs has very cold floors and the temperature throughout the house levels varies. The kitchen amenities could definitely use some upgrades, old and dirty, tea kettle, not even a decent pot to cook in. I would also would have felt more at ease if the baby gates had the proper installation at the stairs. Host was responsive and provided us a second baby gate. Sauna was smaller than expected.

Our stay at Black Pine Lodge was absolutely incredible! From the moment we arrived, we were blown away by how clean, cozy, and welcoming the property was. The hosts went above and beyond to make our stay unforgettable—great communication, friendly, and truly caring about our experience.
The location is perfect for families, with Lake Placid just a short drive away, giving us plenty of opportunities for outdoor adventures. Our kids had an amazing time, and the lodge was just the right balance of relaxing and fun. The space was spacious, comfortable, and well-equipped for all our needs.
If you're looking for a peaceful getaway with top-notch service and a family-friendly environment, we highly recommend Black Pine Lodge. A 5-star experience from start to finish! We can't wait to come back.
This place is set up for vacation!
the cabin was extremely beautiful. It was not too far from Jay or other nearby small towns. The distance to whiteface mountain was awesome.
Wonderful hosts and nicely kept home.
What an absolutely beautiful property. Laura was also gracious enough to let me and my now husband have a photographer on-site for a first look before we eloped in Lake Placid. It was a dream!
Had such an amazing and relaxing time with family. Beautiful home and area!

We absolutely loved staying at Laura’s place. The location is super convenient to a lot of scenic hikes and things to do. The Home is so well equipped with everything you would want, lots of great amenities and the kitchen is super well stocked. They really thought of everything you would need . I would highly recommend staying here for a very peaceful holiday. Their deck and outdoor space is to die for!
We enjoyed our stay in Jay. The airbnb had nice amenities and was centrally located to many great hikes.

This was the perfect place for friends to get together and connect.  The amenities made it easy for a quality night in the whole weekend.  It was nicely decorated with thoughtful touches to make you feel at home.  We would stay again!

A perfect getaway close to so many wonderful things to do! The house was immaculate and perfect to unwind after a day of hiking and exploring the surrounding area. I had to force myself out of the house because I could've stayed all day hanging around between the fire pit, the hot tub and the wonderful upstairs upper deck overlooking the property. I can't wait to come back!!
The place is was beautiful, a group of us stayed for hiking in the adirondaks and wanted to never leave the airbnb instead, it had everything we needed and felt cozy, thank you for the great stay!

We had a wonderful stay at Laura’s home.  Incredibly peaceful and welcoming.  Loved the sauna and hot tub and enjoyed camp fires in the evening. Great location for hikes close by and easy access to Lake Placid.  Would highly recommend!

Laura & Neil were wonderful hosts!
Their home was absolutely what we were looking for. It was nestled in the woods, with amazing surroundings and a lake just down the road.
When we needed to message to ask questions, Laura was quick to response and was so friendly and helpful.
We would love to come back someday!

This house is beautiful and was a perfect place for my family to relax and enjoy the outdoors. We watched the deer while we drank coffee on the deck and made s’mores over the fire pit. The hot tub and sauna are lovely perks. Highly recommended!
We loved the home, so many details were thought of and carried out perfectly! Laura was so kind and extremely helpful!
Excellent stay, great location. Would absolutely stay again!
Great place, just like the pictures! Close to some really great areas for kids! Would definitely recommend for one or two families on holiday!

We loved our stay! We were a family of 6. 2 parents, 2 grandparents and 2 kids. The house layout was PERFECT for us! The kids had their own space in the lower level complete with games & pool table. Everyone had their own full bathroom. The kitchen was well appointed. The decor was elegant and comfortable. The sauna and jacuzzi were beautiful. The local pond was so much fun for all of us. Lake Placid was an easy 30 minutes away. Highly recommend for a family getaway.

House was wonderful. Clean, lots of space, quiet and private. Great for a family vacation. Lake Placid is about 20 minutes away so you get the best of both worlds…close to different activities and also the quiet and peacefulness of the Adirondacks. Laura was a great host with fast response times. Would definitely come back!

We had a great escape from the city- perfect for a small group. We had 6 people and it felt like a squeeze at times, but the yard was really big and the house was stunning, so it didn’t dampen the experience. The only issue we had was with Internet connection; it was not stable and remote work or anything with a harsh deadline isn’t recommended. The host was responsive when this happened, but nothing was able to be done unfortunately. Would definitely visit again!

The perfect place for a peaceful getaway.  Everything about this home is well thought out. You will love hanging on the expansive wraparound back deck looking out at the very private backyard. The sauna and hot tub were great features to have.  We will be back!
Beautiful house and they made our stay easy! Would highly recommend
this place was a dream come true. I went with my boyfriend and it was my first time in ADK. there was so many things to do around the location. if you're looking for a great place to stay. stay here!

Great trip to meet up with old friends. Hiking and biking are both really good in this area, but we caught some rough weather. Enjoyed ourselves at the cabin nonetheless making good use of  the sauna, hot tub and pool table. So good!

We were giving great instructions & checking in was easy! There was literally anything we needed from an electric kettle to s’mores sticks. The upstairs bedroom porch was peaceful to open when it was raining outside. The sauna was my fav part! It was close to head into Lake Placid for the day. The only thing we noticed was the photos online make the space look a little bigger than it is. There is PLENTY of room and we were obsessed with it but it does look bigger online. The trees were not full while we were there so the surroundings were also different than the pictures but this is understandable with the seasons. You do have visible neighbors and are not in the woods alone like some of the photos look like. This wasn’t a problem at all but surprised us when we pulled up. The local small hikes are awesome & the house was so peaceful. We had snow flurries our last morning and it was beautiful! Highly recommend!

Our stay at Black Pine Lodge was relaxing and exactly what we needed to rejuvenate after a hectic holiday. Getting to the house was simple and once there, very easy to get acclimated and settled. We appreciated all the clear instructions and amenities available, plus being surrounded by nature was an added bonus. Laura was very responsive with any questions we had and made our trip a lot less stressful. We can't wait to come back and make more family memories!

The best Airbnb I’ve probably ever stayed at!!! It was very clean, had everything we needed and more, and beautifully decorated! Dena is an amazing host and left us the sweetest note and the best local snacks. We enjoyed our time so much and will definitely be back!
We had a great time! The house is beautiful and the host was very responsive. I highly recommend booking a trip here. I will definitely be back!

We had the greatest time at Killercat, celebrating my daughter’s 12th birthday!  The house was very clean, had so much character, and amazing views of Hunter Mountain. Dena was amazingly helpful and provided us with so many special extras that really elevated the experience. The fridge was stocked with local treats and a sweet s’mores package that we enjoyed while sitting around the campfire on our last night. The hot tub, sauna, arcade room and record collection/player are some of the activities that Killercat had to offer and things we definitely took advantage of during our stay! All in all,  it was a great experience and we would definitely return to Killercat, Hunter Mountain again someday!

We absolutely loved our stay at Killercat!! Dena’s hospitality was unmatched. From a comprehensive local guidebook to welcome treats left in the fridge, she could not have been more communicative and welcoming! The house amenities were incredible - everything we possibly could have needed was there for us. The house is in a great location and has a beautiful view of Hunter mountain. We could not recommend Killercat enough!

We had an incredible stay here. From the moment we arrived, everything exceeded our expectations. The home is beautifully designed, spacious, and incredibly comfortable, with stunning mountain views throughout. We were shocked to see all the goodies for us in the fridge - no crumbs left after we found that haha!
The hot tub and sauna were perfect after a long day outdoors, and made for relaxing evenings under the stars. We didn't even realize until the next day, but you get an amazing view of people skiing down the mountain right from the balcony/hot tub. That was cool to see! The game room was a great bonus and made the stay even more fun for our group. Every detail felt thoughtfully curated, and it’s clear the host takes great pride in maintaining the space.
This is the perfect place for a relaxing getaway with friends or family. We would absolutely stay here again and highly recommend it to anyone looking for a peaceful and well-appointed retreat

Had a fantastic stay at Killercat Airbnb—our second visit was just as great as the first. The space was clean, comfortable, and exactly as described, with thoughtful touches that made it feel like home. Dena was responsive and easy to communicate with, and everything was seamless from start to finish. We’ll definitely be coming back!

We had a fantastic stay here! The house has vibes. Beautiful interior design. The home was very comfortable for 2 families with small kids. The kids loved the bunk beds and their own lower level for games, reading, etc. Parents enjoyed the lounge-y living room, hot tub, and deck. It's very conveniently located to Hunter Mountain for winter sports, and we would definitely rent it again.
Everything was excellent!

Such a great house for a big group ski trip! We loved hanging out in the common spaces, cooking and eating group meals together and relaxing in the hot tub. Great proximity to Hunter or Windham. Dena was incredibly communicative, and the place was very clean and accommodating — arriving to a fridge full of local goodies was so thoughtful! Thank you for everything, we’d love to come back!

Can’t say  enough great things about Dena and the property. She was extremely responsive and gave incredible instructions on how to get to the place and local attractions. Not to mention,  when we arrived she had local treats available to us to indulge in! The house was stunning and was perfect for our winter getaway.

Absolutely stunning home with a beautiful view of Hunter Mtn. The home was warm, cozy and great for our weekend getaway. Dena was an amazing host, super responsive and really made us feel welcome. Highly recommend this property to anyone looking for an elevated weekend getaway.
Place was fantastic and host was absolutely amazing in communication, support and recommendations

We had an excellent stay in Hunter Mountain. The home was beautiful, comfortable, and perfectly located. Everything was thoughtfully prepared and made us feel right at home.
A special thank you to Dena for her outstanding communication and truly welcoming hospitality. The little touches, including the s’mores, made the experience extra special. We would absolutely stay here again and highly recommend it!
I’ve been coming up to Hunter for over 10 years and I can easily say this was the best place I’ve stayed yet. It checks all the boxes and Dena is a wonderful thoughtful host.

We had such a great stay here. The host was honestly one of the most responsive and thoughtful we’ve ever had — from pre-planning all the way through the trip. She even stocked the fridge with food like milk, cheese, bread, desserts, and yogurt parfaits, which we’ve never experienced before and really appreciated.
Anytime we needed something, she replied within minutes and even had staff drop items off for us. It made the whole trip feel really easy and stress-free, knowing someone was actually there if we needed anything.
The place itself was beautiful, spotless, and clearly designed with a lot of care. We stayed during the winter and loved using the hot tub. It was also only about five minutes from Hunter Mountain, which was perfect.
The basement was such a fun bonus too — arcade games, darts, and board games, which made it a great spot to hang out and unwind.
Overall, just an all-around great experience. We felt very taken care of and would absolutely stay here again.

The Killer Cat House is an epic place to stay, and the host made it even better. We really appreciated the supplies left in the fridge and the huge vinyl collection. Even with 8 inches of snow, the house was accessible and everything we needed was easy to find (shovel, car scraper, grit, etc). The kids loved the arcade and old school Nintendo. Thanks for leaving towels outside for the hot tub; it was amazing sitting in it during the snowstorm. The house was absolutely perfect and we are all very grateful for your hospitality.

We had an incredible stay over the Christmas holidays. Dana was an amazing host who responded very quickly to any inquiries. She went over and beyond to ensure that we had everything we needed for an enjoyable stay. For example, she felt a For example, she filled the fridge with local provisions so we had some food and drinks before making it to a grocery store. When we were missing a few cookware items to make Christmas dinner, she had them delivered within a few hours. The service was like no other. Our entire family was extremely happy with the house and host. Highly recommend if you’re looking for a ski getaway at Hunter Mountain.

Dena's place was a great way to spend my birthday weekend. The home was just as beautiful as the pictures. We were lucky to arrive shortly after some recent snowfall, so the home was beautifully coated in a layer of snow. It truly felt like a winter wonderland. She also provided us with some treats to enjoy as part of our stay which was a sweet surprise. Dena went above and beyond through communication and ensuring our stay was to our satisfaction. From the very clear instructions on accessing the property and utilizing amenities to the very detailed recommendations of activities around the property, Dena really exceeded all expectations and is one of the best Airbnb hosts I've ever stayed with.
Amazing spot very well curated
Great spot with stylish flair! A very kind host and lots of thoughtful touches throughout. We had a great time!

We had a lovely time at Dena’s place. We were delighted by the treats and local food the fridge was stocked with - what a lovely touch! We appreciated the decor and art, made ample use of the well stocked kitchen, arcade games, and also enjoyed cozy game nights in front of the fire place after an afternoon of enjoying the light snow and hot tub and sauna.
Dena was very responsive and communicative- shared a great guide book and house manual. The location was easy to get to from the NY metro region - and it was great that it was near a full service grocery store not too far from the house. We would definitely stay again!

Dena was the perfect host. The property is clean, well kept and has everything you need. Unfortunately the power went out while we were there and Dena was constantly proactively communicating to keep us up to date. If every Airbnb owner was like Dena the world would be a better place.

I can’t say enough positive things about staying at Dena’s place. We felt right at home as soon as we walked in. Amazing fall views and the house was beautifully decorated and immaculate. The snacks were delicious and a nice surprise. She  reached out to make sure everything was going well while we were there. After a much needed break I couldn’t be happier with our stay there and am looking forward to coming back.

I cannot recommend this place enough. Every little detail was thought out which made our stay one of a kind. There is a reason this place books out a year in advance! I definitely want to come back during ski season. The place was incredible but the real magic was Dena the host!
We loved our stay here and would recommend to everyone!
Dena made our stay more comfortable than expected! Dena went above and beyond and is the best Airbnb experience that we have EVER had!! Thank you, Dena!!
The best AirBnB I've ever stayed in! Dena was an amazing host and helped make our girls weekend so special. Dena left us local treats and the home was a beautiful space to enjoy each other's company!
Dena is a wonderful host! She left an amazing assortment of food for us (bread, cheese, eggs, amazing yogurts!), which we enjoyed all week. The hot tub was nice, and the vibe of the home was amazing.

Truly, this mountain retreat experience is a must! Our group was really pleased with the house (so gorgeous) and all of the amenities included. I'm really happy to have chosen this location to explore the beautiful Catskills. Dena made everything seamless.

Absolutely perfect stay.  Dena couldn’t have been a better host. The house is beautiful and well-appointed. The kitchen had everything we needed. She even stocked the fridge with eggs, dips, breads, parfaits - such a beautiful and thoughtful unexpected addition.  The hot tub and saun were clean and functional and so nice in the clean mountain air.   The games for the kids kept them busy and entertained.  Quick drive to great local hikes and restaurants.  Would absolutely come back to Killerkat.  Such s wonderful stay all around. Not a single negative.
It was a great weekend and Dena was incredibly helpful with anything we needed!!!

The house is “moody” and beautiful!! Downstairs double bunk beds for the kids, main floor full bedroom for the in-laws, private upstairs bedrooms x2. All floors have full bathroom. Second upstairs bedroom I used to hide/protect my wedding dress while it slacked out. Pet friendly, beautiful yard with mountain view! 😍 Dena was extremely receptive and helpful. Fridge stocked with goodies from local businesses. Would LOVE to stay again!!

Dena’s place was so beautiful and perfect for our girls trip! The property was so pretty. Dena is very communicative and was a wonderful host - even leaving us with various treats from a local bakery! Definitely would recommend!

I can’t recommend the Killer Cat House enough! I came here for my bachelorette and was blown away by the house, the amenities and the view. Dena is FANTASTIC, she is responsive, gave great recommendations for food and drinks, and went above and beyond- we loved the goodies and s’mores kit. Our group was blown away by this air b n b and I will be coming back!

Had a wonderful time at Dena’s Airbnb. The house was pristine and we had a lot of fun using all the amenities including the hot tub, outdoor sauna and playing table tennis. Everything was properly explained in the manual and the house was well organized and functional. Location was great - very close to towns and cute shops in the area. My friends and I will definitely be returning to book this Airbnb again in the future.

Dena’s KC home was unique in location, vibe and style.  The designer touches were elegant and welcoming at the same time.  The amenities were all as described. We loved the personal touches that she’s done and the guide she shared was outstanding. It gave details and links for everything from personal chefs to hiking locations to antique shopping to a variety of things geared towards each season so much time and love has gone into making it and making our trip so special.  Looking forward to a return Trip!

We enjoyed a wonderful few days in the idillic Catskills and the house was an excellent place to stay. Dena was very proactive with communication and the instructions are extremely clear. The house is beautifully decorated and very comfortable with excellent amenities and entertainment. We were greeted with some food from Fellow, which was a fabulous surprise and much appreciated. We highly recommend staying here.

We had the best time escaping the city for a few days with friends and our pups at this stunning mountain retreat. The home is beautifully designed and thoughtfully curated - every detail feels intentional. Waking up to the mountain view, relaxing on the deck, soaking in the hot tub and enjoying the sauna made it feel like a true getaway. The welcome goodies from a local café in the fridge were such a thoughtful touch and much appreciated after a long drive. The house was incredibly comfortable and our dogs loved running around the big backyard. We already can’t wait to come back!
Absolutely INCREDIBLE! By far the best Airbnb experience I’ve ever had. Dena and her place are fabulous and phenomenal. You have to stay here!

The property is a described and depicted. Great location and serene setting. Plenty to do on site and locally. Dena is (by far) the most responsive and accommodating hostess I've ever encountered. This one will NOT disappoint!

This place was amazing. Not only was Dena an incredible host with proactive responses & house amenities (she gave us a s’mores kit), but her place is beautiful. It’s cozy and serene at the same time. She left firewood for us to have a bonfire as well. The hot tub and sauna are so nice with beautiful views. We had the best time and hope to come back in the winter. She also had a pack and play for our baby so we didn’t have to bring as much. Thanks Dena!

Everything about our stay was absolutely wonderful. Dena went above and beyond to make the home comfortable. The fridge was stocked with the most amazing goodies, her guide was so helpful, the house itself had such thoughtful finishing touches. It was the perfect house for my sister’s bachelorette party and we simply had a perfect stay. I could not recommend this house more! Thank you Dena!!!!!!

I can not say enough about Dena as a host! I have stayed in Airbnbs around the world, and Dena was the best. We were welcomed with a fridge full of amazing cheeses, eggs, and more. And a lifetime supply of the makings for s'mores. The house was well-appointed and well-maintained. If you're familiar with the Catskills area, you know that most places to stay there require a drive; most things are a bit secluded. Dena was awesome at telling us about restaurants, activities, and local happenings.

We had an amazing stay in Hunter! The place was a decent size for a group of 8 like us, we’re a group of friends who take an annual trip to Upstate. The host is honestly one of the best Airbnb hosts I’ve ever come across. She truly went above and beyond.
Before our trip, she shared a comprehensive guidebook with local recommendations, which was super helpful. During our stay, she was incredibly responsive to any questions we had and made sure everything was well stocked, we never ran out of anything during our 4 day stay. We were also pleasantly surprised to find that she had prepared so much food for us including bacon, eggs, milk, s’mores, and tons of pastries and baked goods from Fellow Mountain Cafe. Highly recommend!!
Very beautiful cozy home, host is very responsive. Highly recommended to everyone!
Great house, well stocked with everything we needed! Thank you!

Amazing Stay for My 30th Birthday Weekend!
I stayed at this house with a group of friends to celebrate my birthday, and it was absolutely perfect! From the moment we arrived, everything was clean, welcoming, and exactly as described. The space was cozy but spacious enough for all of us to relax and enjoy.
