The kitchen was fully stocked, which made cooking meals together super easy, and the common areas were perfect for hanging out, playing games, and making memories. The host was super responsive and helpful, making the check-in process smooth and stress-free.
The location was also great—peaceful and private, yet still close enough to shops and activities. We all had such a fun and comfortable stay, and I couldn’t have asked for a better spot to celebrate. Highly recommend this place for group getaways or special occasions!
Great place, very clean!  Had a great time staying here.

This is the perfect spot to stay and has everything you need to feel right at home. The beds are comfortable, linens are plush, kitchen is stocked. Dena spoiled us with the most delicious treats upon arrival and was so communicative, friendly, and helpful!
Dena is an amazing host and was very helpful...this property is so beautiful and in a great location. You will not regret staying here!

If you, like me,  are tired of rentals that were furnished by Ikea and don’t have most of the utensils that you need to cook a meal, if you value beauty and good design (not to mention having everything you want and need at hand) you will love this beautiful and comfortable cabin. Great location near Lake Placid in a beautiful wooded setting, you will feel like you are borrowing your friend’s cabin - the friend with great taste, who is the best host you know!
Beautiful quiet place in the woods.  It’s just as described.   Nice view of the mountain.  Close to Mt. Van Hoe.  Kitchen is extremely well stocked with cooking equipment.

We love Cynthia’s cozy home, it was warm and welcoming, with all supplies and amenities ready. We had everything we needed and more, her house made our vacation that much more enjoyable. Thanks Cynthia!
This is our 3rd stay at Cynthia’s place and we look forward to coming back again next year!
Fantastic place. Great host. Highly recommend.
Awesome place to stay!
Beautiful home. Not a single complaint.  Book this location if you're able.
Absolutely loved this place! Great location and beautifully decorated. Gorgeous views of whiteface from the kitchen.
Great location, the fall foilage view from the deck was excellent. The place was fully equipped, plenty of room and easy to find. I would definitely stay there again

We traveled from Colorado for the UCI Mountain Bike World Cup races and this location could not have been more perfect for easily going to both Mt. Van Hoevenberg and Whiteface for the events. Beyond that, it was just a lovely place to share with our family for the weekend. It is clean, cozy, and had great views. Also, it feels incredibly secluded but you can be at a great coffee shop or brewery or hiking trail in just a few minutes. We would definitely return.
Totally would stay again. Beautiful, clean space. We loved it

Timber Haven Chalet is a beautiful gem, peaceful and private location. It was perfect for our high peaks hiking trip. Most excellent location for all of our hikes from the ADK loj and also a quick drive to Main Street/Mirror Lake. The hosts have thought of all the details to make it a welcoming and comfortable place. All the rooms are very spacious, kitchen is large & has everything one would need. Our picky kids gave a high five to the nicely remodeled bathrooms!! Views from back deck are amazing. We’ll definitely be back!
We were very pleased with the finishes, space, & cleanliness of this home. Great location, way to find. Beautiful!!

We loved our stay! The house was comfortable and homey.  We enjoyed cooking, playing games and just hanging out.  The house is close to town and minutes away from the adventure park where we did ziplining.  Also close is a great coffee house and hiking at Heart Lake.  We highly recommend and hope to stay again in the future!

Quite possibly our favorite AirBandB experience to date. Great location and a lovely home. Kitchen was great and wonderfully equipped.  Solidly built home (unlike where I am writing from now, I'm afraid!).  We would stay here again in a heartbeat...and wish we were!

We’ve stayed here previously because of the location to great hiking, kayaking, restaurants, and things to do.  Cynthia and Milt are great host…friendly and responsive…and continue to make updates to the property to make things comfortable.  Truly a favorite place of ours.

This place was so charming! Better than the pictures even-location was great, quiet but only minutes from town. House was so cozy! Cynthia was very responsive  and friendly , and gave great recommendations too! I highly recommend, and my only regret is we didn’t stay long enough! Would visit again in a heartbeat!
Great place, great host!

We went to Lake Placid for my sons Ironman.  My family came in for the event.  Cynthia’s place was such a perfect spot to come together with family.   We made all our meals in the kitchen.   She had everything we could have needed.  It was so clean.  The area was very private and beautiful.    When we come back for Ironman 2.0 we will look to rent this place again.
Perfect, Rustic, mountain house vibe. Would highly recommend.
Everything was wonderful!  We would definitely stay here again!  Perfect location to everywhere we wanted to go!

I loved every aspect of staying here.
The home was better than in the pictures! Only a couple minutes to town and mountains. Clean and tidy place with all the essentials! Air conditioners in the rooms make everyone comfortable at night. I really can’t say enough good things. A great place to be if you’re exploring the region!

Cynthia’s place is awesome! It was perfect for our family gathering. Close enough to Main Street but far enough to be in a peaceful wooded area. Amazing host, quickly responded to all our questions. I would definitely return! Thank you

We fell in love with the Lake Placid area and  Cynthia’s chalet! It was the cutest, comfiest and cleanest airbnb we have stayed at. It was so warm and inviting. The living room area is very relaxing with its cabin style furniture. The kitchen was spotless and had everything we needed. The 2 upstairs bedrooms were cozy and perfect sizes. The downstairs bedroom was a perfect retreat, especially the bathroom with the soaking tub. Best of all was how quiet it was. The deck was the perfect spot to enjoy a cup of coffee while enjoying the silence. Would love to go back in the winter to enjoy the chalet with the snow!
Beautiful home. Great location. Cynthia was an excellent host.

What a beautiful home!  We immediately felt at home.  Any questions we had were answered in a wonderful book that Cynthia had put together, complete with suggestions of places and activities.  We were close to everything!  Thanks again, Cynthia!
Great spot! We would definitely stay again!

We thoroughly enjoyed our stay at Cynthia's place! It was very clean, felt cozy and welcoming, and had all we needed. It was exactly as described and the pictures were accurate. Cynthia made it an easy and carefree experience. I would definitely recommend Cynthia's place to family and friends.
Really enjoyed our stay- House was exactly as pictured and in a great location.  Would definitely stay again.
Beautiful house with beautiful views!
Cute house in the wood! Very clean & comfortable. Kitchen has everything you will need plus some extras. Deck is lovely!

This place is great! It is very, very well set up.  Everything was easy and convenient. It is a comfortable, clean, cozy cottage in the woods with easy quick access to the town and region. The hosts handled questions, concerns, and communications promptly, clearly, and very professionally. My whole family loved staying here. We would definitely do it again, and highly recommend it.

This cabin is the perfect getaway, a hidden gem nestled amidst stunning scenery. The view from the deck is simply breathtaking, with Whiteface Mountain as the star of the show.
Inside, the cabin is cozy and inviting. The kitchen is perfect for whipping up a quick meal, and the living room is a great spot to unwind with friends and family. We had a blast playing Mario Party on our Nintendo Switch, testing our friendships and creating lasting memories. The bedrooms are spacious and comfortable, and the bathrooms are clean and modern.
We booked this cabin to explore the nearby hiking trails and charming town. It was the perfect base for our outdoor adventures. We can’t wait to return to this tranquil haven.

This location is within 5 miles of a popular trailhead in the Adirondacks.  This helped me climb mt marcy starting super early. The house is amazing and full of beautiful fixtures and furniture.  The setting is private and yet close to Lake Placid for everything you might need. Love this place!

Cynthia's place was clean and very well supplied with anything you could need.  It was warm and homey and made you feel comfortable right away.  She has a beautiful area surrounding her house and if you like to hike-it is a great location.  We were very satisfied with our stay and hope to return one day.
Awesome house.
Nice quiet spot in the trees. Great deck.
Close to lots of hiking and biking.
This was a perfect place to stay for a high peak hike and a visit to Lake Placid. Cozy and quiet. Cynthia was a great host and we had everything we needed and more.
Cynthia and her place are great.

We have stayed here previously and appreciate the tranquil setting, simple and clean home, and great location to hiking trails, kayaking, and downtown Lake Placid.  Cynthia is a responsive host and communicates proactively and clearly.  Very enjoyable stay.
Cynthia’s place is a perfect distance out of Lake Placid. It is close enough to everything but in a quiet place in the woods. We were very comfortable there.

Very good location!!! everything is near by!
lovely place !!!

very beautiful cabin. very private, nice, well equipped kitchen.
the small bath downstairs is very low water output shower. I did not like it. it will be very difficult to stay warm in winter in that shower.
but the upstairs shower and bath are superb. we will go back again to stay

This was our second stay here and everything was perfect once again! Such a peaceful area while being so close to town and all it has to offer. First time bringing our daughter to our favorite vacation spot and she loved exploring the property! Looking forward to staying again, thanks!

We had a wonderful weekend at Cynthia’s place. The location was excellent very close to Lake Placid and the surrounding hiking paths. The place itself was very clean and welcoming. Spending time at the house made it feel like a true vacation weekend away. Cynthia even left out a few staples for us such as coffee and milk to be sure we didn’t need to rush out and get things for the next day. Looking forward to returning again in the future.

We chose this location so as to be located in totality for the solar eclipse. We were not disappointed. The house was perfect for our needs, allowing us to get into Lake Placid in a blink. The view of Whiteface was also fantastic. Cynthia sent all necessary instructions and everything was as described. Would recommend!

We LOVED staying at Cynthia's cabin!  It was super tidy, super cozy, with a wonderful view of the mountains and everything we needed.  Really close to town, so convenient!  It was exactly what we were looking for and Cynthia was so attentive.  We really appreciate it!

We’ve had the privilege of staying in many nice homes while traveling over the years but this cabin is easily one of the best.  Cynthia’s place is perfectly located near all the great venues and tails for winter adventures and is immaculately clean. However, what we loved the most is that it felt like a home-not just a rental. All the of splendid details and care that obviously went into the house made it a true pleasure to come back to after a day skiing, sledding or hiking in the cold. We definitely hope the cabin is available when we make our next trip back to Lake Placid.

The chalet was perfect for our winter long weekend with friends. The only thing missing was a hot tub! :) The chalet is just the right size,  spacious enough for 3 couples, but still cozy. It has a classic Northeastern cabin feel, with modern touches and a nice kitchen. Great location for Nordic skiing but still a quick drive into town.

It was such an amazing stay! The house is so gorgeous , pictures cannot express all the beauty of the house and the love that the house was built with.. Spectacular front windows view , everything is so comfortable , the space is spotless clean ..
My family and I had the best weekend, relaxing time by the fireplace , peaceful nature ..
Hope we will come back to enjoy this place again!
Great stay! Very clean, thoughtful details, and felt like home. Thank you!!!

This cabin exceeded every expectation we had. Honestly, it’s even more beautiful in person than in the photos, it feels like stepping into a design magazine showroom. Everything was spotless, new, and incredibly well maintained.
The bed and linens were extremely comfortable, which made it even harder to leave. I also loved the lighting system throughout the house, being able to adjust the intensity creates such a cozy atmosphere, and the colored lighting in the bathroom was a very modern and fun touch.
The fireplace was definitely the heart of the experience. We used it all weekend long, along with the firewood provided, and it created the perfect setting to relax and disconnect. We didn’t feel the need to leave at all, which is exactly what we were looking for, a private, quiet place where we could cook, unwind, and just enjoy the moment.
We will absolutely be coming back.
The A-frame is truly such a special place and Jaclyn & Dennis were most hospitable. I will definitely be returning!
Incredible place. Very romantic vibes, great airy space, everything was a dream. A fair bit of lady bugs, but that's just nature.
Excellent and comfortable stay! Beautiful house with a very romantic feeling to it!
One of the best places we have stayed in quite some time ! It was so relaxing and peaceful !
Amazing and cute A-frame in a unique, semi-isolated part of NY. Definitely what I was looking for and highly recommend
Nice getaway from the city!

A lovely A frame built with lots of thoughts. The interior design is nice and welcoming.
Would love to come back.

We loved at our stay at the A Frame! The house is beautiful and the hosts are fantastic. It was so peaceful and the perfect getaway spot. The house itself is spacious but still feels cozy. Would 100% recommend!

This A frame was a really cool stay! The open living room area was beautiful and the outdoor areas are private enough that the glass windows don’t feel like you’re exposed. A few things to be aware of: the driveway is very steep and in the snow, difficult to get up, so you absolutely need 4wd. The curtains in the room are pretty transparent, plus the upstairs have windows that aren’t covered, so the sunlight comes in pretty bright. Lastly, the kitchen amenities were a little bit lacking. Definitely not meant for having any more than 4 people there (we have family in the area that visited) and there was not much to cook with, which is a bit difficult considering there’s not a ton of restaurants available. We would love to stay here again if those little things were improved, but still a fun stay regardless!

Jaclyn's A-frame is fantastic and even more picturesque than the listing. Check in was easy, the apartment was clean and well-designed, and the location was on its own yet close to the main road. We will definitely stay at Jaclyn's again!
Absolutely incredible place to stay at will definitely do it again

Can't say enough of how much we enjoyed this stay. The A Frame is beautiful, and Jaclyn does a great job with keeping this airbnb clean, felt right at home! The area is also so peaceful and a very short drive from cool places. We will be returning!
Beautiful cabin, exactly as pictured and described! very clean and great attention to detail. would very much love to stay in the future!

Jaclyn's place is absolutely gorgeous.  Clean, modern, with all of the amenities needed for a comfortable stay.  A 10-minute drive to the Mohonk Preserve made this a perfect place to stay for a climbing and hiking weekend in the Gunks.

Gorgeous place and surroundings. Very peaceful and serene location, perfect place for a relaxing getaway and homebase to explore the region! Jaclyn was very helpful and responsive when we had an issue with the fireplace (our fault as didn’t know how to open the flue) causing the alarms to go off. Highly recommend!

Jaclyn's A-Frame was gorgeous. It was perfect for two couples to have privacy and wonderful space to hang out together. The home is tucked away in the woods, very quiet and clean. Getting into town and to hiking trails was very quick! Great location to explore Mohonk and Minnewaska. Highly recommend this property!

Absolutely Beautiful Stay!
Our stay at this stunning A frame in Gardiner was even more beautiful in person than the photos! Everything was spotless, neat, and thoughtfully prepared. The setting was the perfect connection with nature—peaceful, quiet, and surrounded by stunning fall foliage. It was the ideal blend of comfort inside and beauty outdoors. We couldn’t have asked for a better getaway and would absolutely return! 🍂

I spent a long weekend with friends and what a peaceful, beautiful home! The decor is impeccable and the views from the deck are exactly what we needed! Lots of fall activists in the surrounding area too. If you’re looking for quiet luxury, this is the home for you.
Jaclyn's place was a perfect getaway during a great time of the year. Very quiet and relaxed, it makes you feel right at home!
Such a great place to stay. The A frame is beautiful, well designed, clean and modern. Surrounded by beautiful nature but still close enough to a few towns - lovely lovely getaway
We really enjoyed our stay at Jaclyn’s A-frame. It was very well-designed and looked as beautiful in person as it did in the photos. Jaclyn was also a very responsive host, which was great!

Great AirBnb. Pictures don't do justice. Jaclyn (Host) was easy to communicate with. Such a lovely space and quiet area. The bed was really comfortable. Loved the kitchen and the space. Highly recommend it!

The place is simply fantastic, a beautiful and cozy house. Everything is extremely clean and tasteful. Jaclyn is always attentive, kind, gave us a bottle of wine and whenever we had a question she answered us quickly. We will definitely be back.
The house was as advertised, extremely clean and peaceful. The hosts provided regular updates and were incredibly communicative and helpful throughout the stay.
Wonderful girl’s weekend, close enough to home, but far enough away to get away from real life for a quick getaway!

A clean, well-appointed, and cozy place in a great location. The Michelle and Leo were friendly, responsive, and made everything easy with clear directions and instructions. We really enjoyed our stay and felt right at home. Would definitely stay again.

We had a magical winters stay at Michelle and Leo’s frozen lake house! It’s so nicely set up and I can’t wait to go back in each season :) Michelle was so responsive and helpful! 10/10 host. Thanks for having us!

We had a wonderful time at Casa Lago. The space was perfect for what we needed, kitchen was stocked with essentials, it was clean, and the hosts were friendly and responsive. We would love to stay here again.
Beautiful spot! Perfect space for a family. Great area. Hosts were extremely responsive and friendly. Highly recommend!

The lake house definitely feels like a home away from home. It has everything you need and the hosts went above and beyond to also provide supplies for breakfast. Our favorite part of the stay was watching the sun set over the frozen lake with a glass of wine while warming up by the fireplace. It is just a short drive to downtown Saratoga where we got coffee and explored the cute shops. Highly recommend the free military museum right there in town for elementary age kids as well. Make sure to grab a meal at Olde Bryan Inn to complete the perfect cozy winter getaway.

Their home was a great place to stay over New Years.  We spent time in downtown Saratoga Springs, about 20mins away, and also at the town of Lake George, about 20mins away as well.   Both had some great restaurants, shops and museums to see.  Being at a Lakehouse on New Years was the perfect getaway for our family especially with seeing the snow coming down over the lake and mountains in the distance.   We also enjoyed the homes amenities like the board games, pool table and gas fireplace.

Michelle and Leo’s place was amazing and was the perfect peaceful getaway that we were looking for over Christmas holidays. The view of the lake was beautiful and the house had everything we needed for us to spend a lot of time indoors. The place had everything we needed to cook and entertain ourselves. The hosts were very responsive and answered a couple of our questions right away. I would highly recommend this place.
Relaxing and the location was beautiful!
Everything we needed. Comfortable. Our favorite thing to do was sit on the deck with our coffee in the morning, beautiful view of the lake, stunning fall leaves, peaceful.

Leo and Michelle were amazing hosts and extremely responsive for anything at anytime. They were the most equipped Airbnb we have stayed at. The views are incredible, the kayaking was an awesome plus, and the home was comfortanle and cozy. Felt like we were at our own home!

Stayed at Casa Lago for a girls weekend! Perfect place for our weekend away, it had everything we needed! Loved the upper and lower decks and views the lake. Close to Saratoga for dinner & shopping but nice quiet place to hang out and reconnect. Very well appointed home with everything you might need from toiletries to kitchen items to games! Would stay again!
Michelle & Leo’s home was beautiful. The view in the morning was simply breathtaking. We thoroughly enjoyed our stay :)

This lake house was the perfect getaway for our group of 6 moms. The house smelled lovely and is well equipped with everything you could need. The location allowed us to enjoy both Saratoga and Lake George. We loved all hanging out on both the lower and upper decks. The lake itself is very quiet and peaceful.  The downstairs shower is very small so we mainly just used the upstairs shower.
Beautiful lake.  Relaxed area.  Surprisingly great pizza in town.

We loved our stay at Michelle & Leo's place! It's located on a private lake that is great for kayaking and paddle boarding (which are kindly provided!) and swimming. We enjoyed our days grilling, having fun on the water, and exploring the nearby areas of Lake George and Saratoga. Would definitely stay here again.
Such a cozy and comfortable vacation spot! We took full advantage of the lake and all the fun water toys. Beds are very comfortable! Would highly recommend this spot.

We loved our stay here and look forward to returning! Cozy living room, beautiful deck and places to sit outdoors even when it’s raining; the kids loved the paddle boards, great location, kitchen was well stocked, great setup all around!

Leo & Michelle’s Lake house is great! Awesome spot with fantastic views off the lake. Close to Lake George & Saratoga Springs. Very quiet and relaxing. There was everything we needed for a lovely stay.

It was a perfect get a way for a spring break. Highly recommend this property !
Cheers ✨
Great responsive hosts with clear set of instructions. The property is well kept and has good amenities for a perfect getaway. Will love to be back.
Great stay, can’t wait to come again in the summer!
We had a great stay at Leo & Michelle's lake house :) The view was beautiful and the house was clean and very comfortable!

Such a lovely and peaceful place with an astonishing lake view. Great place to relax with the family and enjoy the beautiful nature. Some of the highlights were cozy and warm fireplace, extra large sliding door to the patio with beautiful view of sunrise and sunset, challenging pool table and a lovely swing that goes perfect with a hot cocoa.
The host was also great in timely communication. Definitely worth the stay and highly recommend!! :)

Casa Lago was found by chance as we traveled through the area. After seeing the beautiful lake out of the back door and comfortable ambience we wish we could have stayed longer. The light snowfall on the lake was serene and relaxing. All of the amenities needed for a large family.

The house has beautiful views.  It was so peaceful there.  The house had everything we needed for a relaxing girls getaway - thoughtful touches from coffee, tea, and breakfast food to lots of comfy places to hang out both inside and out.  Wish we could have stayed longer.

Leo and Michelle have clearly paid meticulous attention to the details of making this home away from home nothing less than superb. They left us a bottle of wine and a welcome note and some breakfast food. Even rainy weather didn’t taint the experience. The house is cozy, much bigger than it seems from the outside , spotless, and has everything you need. It was well situated between Lake George and Saratoga Springs. The view is outstanding, use of the kayaks and paddle boat were absolute icing on the cake!

Leo and Michelle have created a comfortable space where we enjoyed the beautiful lake view and easy access to the Adirondack Mountains while staying there. They made us feel welcome by leaving a bottle of wine for us and were quick to respond when we needed help with the tv. We appreciated all the amenities provided, along with the clear instructions for arrival and departure. We definitely recommend them and their cabin!

Leo & Michelle were easy to communicate with and provided necessary items needed to enjoy our stay and was clean. Everything was smooth from check in to check out. Ps. Just be careful walking the basement stairs! It’s a tad slippery and juts out a bit more than normal stairs.

We had an amazing time!  The house was perfect for our long weekend with family in town for our wedding.  The home has awesome views and common areas.  Leo and Michelle made our stay even better with personal touches and they stayed in contact to ensure our stay was great.  We would definitely stay again!

We loved our stay at the lake house! Our 6 year olds loved swimming in the lake and kayaking! The adults loved sitting on the 2 decks and taking in the view! The home was super clean and the hosts were super responsive! We also appreciated being right in between Lake George and Saratoga. Great trip all around!

We had a great bachelorette weekend at Casa Lago! Leo & Michelle left a bottle of wine and a card for the bride to be. They were responsive to messages and the house was beautiful. We loved spending time on the many decks and movie nights on the big couch. All the girls loved the house!
Responsive hosts and would stay again

Leo & Michelle were wonderful hosts. I am so fortunate to have found their house while planning a bachelor party for my friend. They made our stay so great & we’re so welcoming. Highly recommend their home to groups in the future!
Great place.   Friendly and available hosts.
Cozy little home, you can stay and just relax or you can be in Saratoga Springs or Lake George in no time :)

We had a magical stay at Casa Lago with two couples and our four kids (9, 8, 6, and 3)--the lake was gorgeous, the watercraft were amazing, we went to the NYC Ballet at SPAC and to Saratoga and Saratoga Historical Park easily. We unexpectedly spent a whole day at Casa Lago too, though, because the decks were stupendous, the lake was warm and refreshing, and the kids loved (and were endlessly occupied) by the water crafts, swings, and beauty at the house. Climate control inside was perfect (and on the decks too)--and Leo and Michelle checked in on us, left us treats (wine and cinnamon buns and cookies!) and little notes, and made us feel incredibly welcome. We had a wonderful time!

Leo & Michelle’s place is so beautiful and peaceful. Lots to do in the area, but me and my family really needed some relaxation away from home. We all enjoyed the lake, the kayaks, and the view. Everything we needed was exactly as listed in description. Beds were all comfy, bathrooms very clean, and we enjoyed the pool table & games. I would definitely stay here again and highly recommend it. Worth the money as well!
Good host and good place.

We had an amazing time at this beautiful Lake Cabin. We were two families with kiddos 1 through 13. Everyone had a great time. We especially loved all the water crafts, the inviting decks and the very easy access to the lake.

We had a great weekend stay at Leo & Michelle's lake house! Everything was as described, we loved the lake activities that were provided and the close drive into Saratoga. Plenty to do even with the rainy weather! Would love to stay again
What an amazing spot on the lake! We loved the kayaks and paddle board, as well as the multiple decks and central air. The great accommodations and special touches were much appreciated.

An easy choice! Incredible view of the lake and more than enough patio to enjoy it! Very clean and had all the amenities you need! Leo and Michelle were simply the best hosts you could ask for! Would love to come back!

Lea & Michelle were very responsive and made our stay in their beautiful home truly enjoyable. Communication was excellent, and the home exceeded our expectations in terms of comfort and aesthetics. Would highly recommend this place to anyone looking for a wonderful Airbnb experience!

This was our first Airbnb. Our family enjoyed it. The lake view was amazing especially first thing in the morning. There was plenty of space for us to spread out. Our hosts made us welcome with a personalized now that was appreciated. We can't wait to do this again.

I would like to express our sincere gratitude and appreciation for the fantastic experience we had during our stay at Leo and Michelle's home. The welcome instructions were very helpful and the home was immaculate, beautifully furnished, and equipped with all the amenities we could possibly need. It truly felt like a home away from home.
The deck truly was the highlight of our stay, offering breathtaking views of the tranquil waters that provided the perfect backdrop for our mornings and evenings. We found ourselves drawn to the deck time and time again, whether it was to savor a cup of coffee or tea as the sun rose or to unwind with a glass of wine in the evening.
We appreciated the bottle of wine along with the eggs and pancake mix left for us in the fridge. Overall, our experience was exceptional, and will definitely visit again in the future.
Beautiful lake house with  detail decoratings, wonderful indoor fireplace and phonamenal back deck. I felt that I was at peace.

I have nothing but positive things to say about this lovely lake house and my experience with Leo and Michelle. The house was clean and vibey with an amazing lake view. Hosts were very communicative, accommodating, and went above expectations. I can wholeheartedly recommend this stay!

My stay at this Airbnb was absolutely magical! During my visit, I was lucky enough to experience the most beautiful snowfall, and watching the snowflakes gently cascade down through the wall of windows overlooking the picturesque lake was a breathtaking experience. The Airbnb itself is a sparkling clean haven of comfort and convenience. It's incredibly well stocked with all the amenities you could possibly need; you can just show up and relax! There's a large selection of board games, movies, books and the four different decks offering a stunning view of the lake. The beds were a dream to sleep in, with comfy Ugg comforters that added an extra layer of coziness. I can only imagine how fantastic it would be during the summer months, with direct access to the lake for activities like kayaking and paddleboarding. It's the perfect destination for a getaway, offering something special for EVERY season.
Thank you for the personalized touches and treats for my partner and I and our pup!

Shauna's house in Lake Placid was the perfect location, size, and setting for our winter vacation to LP & Whiteface mountain. She was responsive and adaptable to any questions or changes our family required. The house is spacious and well laid out. The location on the river is beautiful and a 5 min drive into downtown. We would, and plan to, book again in the future.

Our stay at Shauna's place in Lake Placid was wonderful!
Her beautiful home gave us the perfect location to enjoy an
incredible Olympic stay. Hope to return one day to enjoy
another season there.

We had an amazing stay at Shauna’s gorgeous house. I came with my husband and 3 yr old son, my in-law parents, and my sister in law and her husband. The house was huge and we all felt comfortable with the space. We enjoyed the fireplace and the beautiful view of the frozen river - we even saw deer on it!
Shauna was incredibly responsive and friendly, and I really enjoyed the cabin decor throughout the home and that it was so warm and welcoming as soon as we entered. Location is unbeatable as it’s close to Whiteface mountain and all the restaurants as well! Absolutely loved it and would recommend to anyone.
Great house. Would definitely would stay again

This is my second time staying in this cozy house, my friends and I had a great few days here.
It was very comfortable and had a great atmosphere.
We had an absolutely amazing time at Shauna’s place. It’s so lovely and we really enjoyed ourselves!!
What an amazing home! Great for entertaining the group, relaxing and visiting Lake Placid!

Shauna's house was the perfect location for our family weekend away in the snowy mountains. The modern Adirondack interior decor was beautiful and cozy. The home was super clean and the photos were incredibly accurate. We've been going to Lake Placid for many years and this home was the coziest, most picturesque place we've stayed. We would absolutely stay here again and recommend it to anyone looking for a great getaway. Shauna was so proactive at reaching out to see if we needed anything and provided great recommendations. She was a stellar host!

This is a beautiful home in Lake Placid, located in a private and quiet neighborhood. We absolutely loved how private the house felt. The home is even larger and more grand than pictured. It is beautifully decorated. We especially loved the downstairs room, which is a perfect place to relax, watch TV and allow our little ones to play games. The backyard view was amazing- and it could be viewed inside, on the balcony or from the many options available to sit and enjoy outside. We would love to come back and stay again! It was truly a wonderful place to stay!
The place was so beautiful and peaceful and it was very centrally located to the town. Would love to go back with the entire family!

Shauna’s place was very comfortable, easily accessible to Lake Placid and surrounding area. Stars at night were remarkable. Quiet neighborhood and access to outdoor activities including the fire pit at night were great.

We had a great stay - the house was spotless and well decorated in a rustic style that made it feel like a cabin while having all the amenities. In addition to the large size of the house, the kayaks and canoes, hot tub, foosball in the basement, and the many hangout spaces made it a great place to hang out with friends and family. And the place is a short 4-5 min drive to Main Street in Lake Placid for food and ice cream and a similar distance to the grocery. Would definitely recommend!

We were very blessed to stay at your beautiful home. Everything was great and we felt at home. Thank you!
The Rivoli Family
Incredible spot, walkable to downtown, easy access to the rail trail and the house was absolutely immaculate. Would love to come back!

We loved our stay.  The home was spacious and clean with beautiful view and setting.  It wasn't quite as walkable to town as we expected but was very conveniently located.  The kitchen was loaded with everything you need for meal prep and service.   We would choose to stay there again.

The house was just the right size for our group.  It provided everything we needed to cook our meals, enjoy the property, and relax.  The house was clean and welcoming. The exterior spaces were also inviting and used by all.  The children enjoyed fishing from the rock in the creek. The fish were small of course, and were placed back in the water.  We saw a blue heron and some beavers swimming in the water.   The house is walking distance from the village, and we walked in a few times.  We enjoyed our stay, and found Shauna to be a very responsive host.

Beautiful house situated right on the water. Took a little maneuvering to get the kayaks in and out of the water but there are many rocks in the water to assist with that. The hot tub was great to reset sore bodies after hiking some of the amazing trails throughout the nearby mountains and venturing into town. The house did get warm throughout the day with temps hitting in the high 80s during ourbstay but we brought window fans that helped emensly at night. The bottom floors hangout space was great to use to cool down and we filled many nights with games that were provided. Shauna was very proactive in reaching out to provide information, assistance and to just check in throughout our first night.
Overall, beautiful home that makes you feel right at home with everything you need right there or only a few steps or a 5 minute drive away!
Nice place and river view beautiful

Shauna’s house was the best Air B&B that I’ve stayed in yet. The house itself was clean, spacious and quiet. The outdoor surroundings and patio were breathtaking. They have kayaks and a canoe that you can take right off of the dock attached to the lake. It’s also walking distance to a local park and town. The hot tub and fire pit also overlook the water which was an added bonus. I would recommend this house to anyone looking for a great Lake Placid trip. 10/10!

This home is immaculate, thoughtfully maintained, and packed with amenities, far exceeding our expectations.
Its prime location offers the best of both worlds: close to town yet nestled in a serene setting perfect for peaceful mornings and relaxing evenings.
We wouldn’t hesitate to stay here again, it’s truly a stunning home in an incredible location!
This place is super cute! Being right by the river to do kayaking was a lot of fun. It’s a nice quiet place to stay. It’s gave us easy access to the trails and downtown.

This place is a gem!! Feels very homey yet big enough that you don’t feel right on top of everyone. Very peaceful, Beautiful views, comfy beds, wonderful kitchen and overall a great space especially for a bigger group of people. Close to Main Street and all the restaurants. I would HIGHLY recommend!!

Shauna’s home was well maintained, clean, and well stocked with the essentials. We had a large party, and everyone was able to hang out together but also find smaller spaces for quiet time. It is very close to town, while also being an easy 20 minute drive from Whiteface. We would love to stay again!
Shauna's place was excellent! It's super clean and beautiful. The house looks exactly how it does in the photos and is very spacious. Perfect for a large family or group of friends!

Excellent spacious home in a beautiful setting, close proximity to town and major cross country ski venues. We enjoyed our time here and in the hot tub overlooking snow covered pines and the Chubb river.  We would definitely stay here again.

The home is great, property is beautiful. Exactly as the pictures show.
The home is so clean and well kept and was extremely comfortable. Shauna was so easy to work with. It was a long ride for us with two little ones and the home really made our trip to lake placid worth it! I'm sure it's amazing in the summer too.

Our second stay at Otter Way did not disappoint. Shauna is the consummate host. We arrived a few days into the new year and were pleasantly surprised to see a Christmas tree still standing in the living room. It added to the beauty of the home and the snow falling outside. Very peaceful. As always, The home is clean and welcoming. The kitchen is well stocked. We cooked quite a few meals at the house and had all the tools and utensils we needed.
The hot tub was such a welcomed treat in the evening after spending the days in the frigid temps outside enjoying winter sports.
The use of the garage was much appreciated to be able to park the car out of the very cold overnight temps.
To wake up every morning and enjoy a cup of coffee while gazing out of the big picture window at the beautiful view of snow covered trees and frozen river is pure and simple joy.
The place was great, bedding and towels were comfortable,  kitchen had everything you could possibly need, hot tub was awesome...we didn't want to leave!
The house was beautiful, clean and private.  Shauna was prompt in answering my questions and checked in on us during our stay.

Shauna has made our stay effortless and so very enjoyable! As a group of college friends looking for a nice and comfortable place to catch up and make new memories, this couldn’t have been the better place. Shauna was also very responsive and accomadating, which only made the experience. Would recommend and will definitely be back! Thanks again!

We had a wonderful Columbus Day weekend at Shauna's place in Lake Placid.  The facility has everything you need for a relaxing vacation plus proximity to the heart of the Adirondacks.  The Kitchen has everything you'll need to feel right at home.  Bedrooms are spacious and very accommodating.  There are multiple entertainment areas to suit a larger group.  The outside area was spectacular and the hot tub was an added bonus after our visit to Whiteface Mountain.  Shauna has thought of everything and her instructions are very easy to follow.

We had the best stay at Shauna’s home! The house itself is beautiful, cozy, very well kept and so clean, we truly felt right at home. The amenities, from the kayaks to the hot tubs were an added bonus! We traveled with young kids, and we truly enjoyed just hanging out at the house. The views were astounding, and the location was so close to downtown lake placid. On top of it all, Shauna was an excellent host and went above and beyond to mail us back some items we mistakenly left behind. We are already dreaming of when we can go back!
Great stay! Beautiful house! Enjoyed the privacy of the property and close proximity to the village!

We all enjoyed our stay!
Everything met our expectations and even more!
Would love to return here.
Thank you for everything!

This was our first visit to Lake Placid and Shauna's house was the perfect home away from home. This is the best match to description we've ever had. The home is incredibly beautiful, quiet, clean and updated. We are a family of 5 with 3 kids ages 10, 4 and 2. It is a VERY spacious home with so much room on 3 levels to spread out including a kids basement den with games, Playstation and fooz ball. There are so many areas to sit outside and enjoy the view both on balconies and back lawn. The kitchen is very well stocked and made it easy to prepare meals for our family. The view is spectacular and is steps away from the river where Shauna makes it easy to canoe or kayak with her provided boats. The hot tub is very easy to use. It is a 5 minutes drive to Lake Placid Main St and Mirror Lake and perfectly in between Whiteface Mtn, Mt. Hoevenberg and Tupper Lake areas (all with destinations for kids) We are so grateful to have found Shauna's home. You will not regret booking your stay here!

Terrific house and a terrific location.  One of only a couple of places we've stayed where the place is actually better than the pictures convey.  Host was great.  House was very well appointed and very clean.
A wonderful location and a great property. Loved having access to canoes and kayaks. Also close to the rail trail for great bike rides. Shauna was wonderful in accommodating us. Would stay again.

Felt immediately comfortable and at home in this beautiful house. There were plenty of kitchen supplies, towels etc.
We would definitely stay here again!

This home was one of the best Airbnb choices we've made to date.  It's a beautiful large home with every amenity that you could wish for and more.  We attended during Iron Man to watch 3 of our family members participate.  The location was great, only a 10-15 minute walk from the oval which made trekking back and forth easy throughout the day.  The beds were super comfortable, and the showers were amazing.  We loved the 2 living rooms that allowed the family to sprawl out - kids making noise in the basement while the adults enjoyed the peaceful tranquility of the river from the upstairs.  The kayaks & canoe were a great touch, we enjoyed rowing down to the dam and back during our daily breaks from the Iron Man madness.  We also enjoyed the hot tub and firepit at night.  Shauna was a great host, checking in frequently to make sure that we had everything we needed for a lovely stay. We would definitely recommend this place to others, and we hope to come back!

This is our second consecutive year staying at this property. It is absolutely sublime. Beautiful and spacious. The setting is amazing. The river is both beautiful and calm, wonderful for kayaking. The house and its amenities are excellent. Great decor, pure Adirondack style. Very close to Main Street, but tucked away enough to make you feel like you are all by yourself. Amazing deck and outdoor areas. On too top of all this, the host is gracious and accessible. Worth every penny. Strongly recommended.

Shauna was a wonderful host…very responsive and she offered a lot of great information about the area (restaurants, activities, shopping, etc).  Her home was inviting, very clean, and very nicely decorated.   We loved the openness from the kitchen to the eating area to the family room.   Everyone could do their own thing and still be together!   The view was so peacefully beautiful.  I brought my parents, who are in their 80’s, and  they were very comfortable in Shauna’s house.  My son and I enjoyed the kayaking and hiking trails near by.  My family bonded on this trip in this  beautiful, very comfortable home.  Even though the weather did not cooperate, we made some great memories and made the best of what we could do.
This place was awesome! Great location, great host, great amenities. It was a perfect place for groups, cannot recommend enough.
The house is amazing... even better than the photos!

beautiful property and as expected. attention to details. tastefully decorated.
if only.... 1. the mattresses and pillows were more comfortable - definitely on the soft side. Didnt sleep much all 4 days 2. host could be more generous w the amenities (1 tiny shampoo for all 4 days - we had to go to the market to buy more) but not a big deal 3. surroundings: backyard was gorgeous but the neighborhood was a little blah.
All and all, a great property.
Our stay was excellent

The house is absolutely beautiful, right on the water. Everything in the house is top notch. We had three couples total and the house layout fit our needs perfectly. The hot tub under the stars and was amazing in 32 degree weather. Kayaking was great. The master bedroom with balcony is amazing! Game room lower level lots of fun. The house was easy to find and close to the shops and restaurants (the hungry Trout was fantastic). Thank you Shauna for a wonderful weekend in your lovely home!

Myself and a group of friends went to lake placid for the weekend and this was such a perfect getaway home.
It was cozy but extremely spacious. The home is right on the water which makes it beautiful to wake up too.
Very close walk into town, but also no more than a 15 minute ride too white face mountain.
I would highly recommend this air bnb and would certainly book again in the future.
Such an amazing house! Had a great time! Shauna was extremely accommodating and flexible with our plans! Would def book again!

Excellent stay at Shauna’s place. Photos perfectly represent the space. Furniture and beds were all comfortable, kitchen was stocked with everything you’d need. Hot tub was a highlight. I will say that the house is right on top of neighboring houses- so if you’re looking for seclusion this place doesn’t have much. That being said it still managed to feel private and the close distance to town was very convenient.

Our family loves our stay here. We had beautiful views and snow filled days and nights. The hot tub has created views of the water and is easy to hop into even in the cold weather. The layout way perfect for us to spend time together on the main floor. We would recommend this home for anyone looking to spend some family time in a comfortable environment.
Beautiful home, great host.

Had a wonderful stay in Woodstock.  This was our first time travelling with an infant and appreciated the availability of crib and bathtub.  The first night we had lots of rain and felt very cozy curled up by the wood stove.  Then we had two great days of hiking and walking through town, the location to everything is fantastic.  Met the hosts while walking around and they were very sweet.
beautiful view

My stay at Nin’s place was absolutely perfect. The breathtaking view all around the house, the details of each room, the warm welcome & interaction with him and his family was so very special! I highly recommend this place for anyone looking for a relaxing getaway with family and or friends.
Lovely stay. Would recommend to anyone.

Our stay at this beautiful home was absolutely wonderful 😍The house is stunning . Everything was spotless, comfortable, and thoughtfully prepared. It was the perfect place to relax and enjoy the surroundings.
We were lucky that it snowed on one of our days and the view was breathtaking!!
Everything is very close to house, restaurants and a grocery store are literally a 3-5 minute drive away.
We would love to return in the summer and experience it again. Highly recommend!
The place was beautiful.
Our stay at the Pond House was nothing short of magical. It is a breathtaking Airbnb that anyone would be lucky to experience. It lives up to the hype and more. Can’t recommend highly enough!

We had a really nice stay and truly appreciated how communicative and thoughtful the host was throughout. A couple small things came up during the visit, but what stood out most was how quickly and kindly they handled everything. Their fairness and accountability made us feel respected and well taken care of. That level of integrity goes a long way, and we’d happily recommend this host.
Beautiful view. Very peaceful. Radiant heat on your feet feels wonderful while looking through the windows at a snow covered scene.

Overall, our stay was good. The place was very clean and had all the necessary amenities, which we appreciated. However, we were a bit surprised by how much smaller the space felt in person compared to the photos. Communication with the host could have been better — responses were quite slow, and our questions about a later checkout were ignored despite asking twice. We were open to paying extra in order not to leave so early, but unfortunately didn’t receive any guidance on that. Overall, a decent stay with a few areas that could be improved.
We had a wonderful stay at the property, the setting is fantastic

What an unbelievable spot. Right from check-in we knew that this was something really special. The Pond House is a gorgeous, quiet, peaceful, architecturally rich dream!Nin was wonderful and responsive to our needs, we brought our elderly dog with us …this was her special Christmas getaway. We couldn’t have asked for more, And can’t wait to return.
Place was gorgeous will definitely be staying here again! Host also made this very easy
Fantastic!!!
Dreamy, tasteful, lovely place. Will return for sure
Amazing place! Hard to leave and so beautiful in the summer and winter! Stay here!
I will officially always stay here instead of Woodstock way.  Property is fantastic.  The design of each home is amazing.

We had a very relaxing weekend at Nin’s place. The house is really unique and truly beautiful. It’s very close to the shops and restaurants in Woodstock but feels secluded and peaceful. The kitchen is large and well equipped. It took us a bit to get used to not having curtains on the windows but it does allow for a spectacular morning view.
We brought our dog who thoroughly enjoyed walking through the trails on property. Just a heads up that dogs need to be on leash on property which they let us know after we had already booked.

The cabin was absolutely perfect cozy, peaceful, and full of character. Waking up to a view of the open sky and listening to the beautiful birds each morning felt like therapy for the soul. The fireplace added such a warm, romantic touch, and every corner of the home had unique art that made it feel special and thoughtfully designed. It’s truly a one-of-a-kind place that captures the essence of Woodstock creative, serene, and deeply grounding. I can’t wait to come back. 🌿✨

We had such a great time at the Pond House! The place was beautiful, peaceful, and had everything we needed for a relaxing stay. The host was incredibly accommodating and super proactive with communication, checking in to make sure everything was perfect. We really appreciated the thoughtful touches and smooth experience. Highly recommend staying here — we’d love to come back!
It was great!
Wonderful property and a delightfully unique home.  Heated floors were a nice bonus!

This Airbnb is absolutely stunning. The interior is beautiful & thoughtfully curated. The exterior is peaceful & pure magic. It has me wanting to move to Woodstock!
There are several great restaurants & shops within a 5 min drive. It was the perfect launching out point for going on hikes & exploring the Catskills.
Book this Airbnb if you can!
We loved Nin’s space! Truly so gorgeous and peaceful. The architecture and decor was absolutely stunning, as was the landscaping. We hope to come back again!

We decided last minute to head upstate and make the most of the last of the summer, get out of the city and get some peace and quiet. Wow, we could not believe what we saw when we arrived, heaven on earth, truly. The accommodation was everything you see in the photos, the master bedroom has a view like no other and the living room windows let the light stream in, it's a magical place. The garden is massive, we had friends join us for a couple of nights who had a dog, and he loved ever second of being outside in nature. Every morning and evening we did the short Comeau trail hike, a short 30 minute walk in the forest and along the tranquil stream and the brook at the end of the garden is very swimmable. Winston the house dog is so friendly and came and checked on us every so often. We loved our week here and couldn't recommend a stay here more. We will be back!
One note, there are two toilets and one bathroom, so you will be sharing a bathroom if it's more than a couple visiting.

The house is really incredible. To wake up to a view of clouds of hydrangeas and a pond with tons of wildlife was special. Love all the huge windows looking out the beautiful grounds. We swam in the creek everyday, it was perfect. Kitchen was well stocked for cooking simple or elaborate meals. The favorite place we’ve stayed in upstate.
Third time staying here and it continues to be a magical place! Beautiful grounds to explore and the house itself has a wonderful energy to it such comes through in the unique design.
Another picture-perfect stay at Nin's beautiful home.

We really really had a great time at Nin's house.  It's so beautiful, inside and out.  Outdoors: it's wonderful with the pond and the stream, the trees and flowers in full bloom.  The weather was unseasonably cold (for late Autumn) and rainy.  But with a steaming mug in our hands, looking out the floor to ceiling windows at the rain, we felt nice and cozy.  Indoors: the house is just excellent.  It was so comfortable (the sofa, the beds, sitting around the big table) and aesthetically pleasing.  The hosts were superb: responsive, helpful, friendly.  We couldn't ask for a better experience.

Our stay was wonderful. The property and home are so unique and special. Thank you for sharing it with us.
As others have noted this house is full of windows which contribute to the specialness of it. You feel very connected to the natural beauty surrounding the home. It’s also walking distance to downtown Woodstock if you’re up for a 1mile walk along a road. Driving is also an option and we easily found parking.
I will note the one downside is that there wasn’t an air conditioner in the downstairs bedroom - though they do provide a powerful fan - our travel mates had to leave their door open throughout the night and it was toasty on the first two nights when the temps were hot outside.
If privacy with your travel mates is your thing, this isn’t the place for you, but if you are a nature lover and looking for a unique stay this is it.
Thanks
Thank you for having us. Lovely property.

This house is a marvel. It’s perfectly situated—close to town yet immersed in nature, with hiking trails and waterfalls right on the property. Jaw-dropping views from the bedrooms and bath, thoughtful and beautiful details throughout the house. It was spotless and comfortable and felt like an oasis. We can’t wait to come back.

This place is exactly what this city girl needed along with her family. We each loved it for different reasons. For the kids,  the highlight was the nearby river where we set up a picnic and the kids played in the water. For me, the beautiful views from the large windows in the home, waking up to that every morning was so fulfilling and for my husband, the stocked kitchen as he loves to cook. The host was very responsive and accommodating. We would love to return one day.

The house is beautifully designed, surrounded by nature, and feels super peaceful and secluded, perfect for a quiet getaway. The space was clean, well-stocked, and exactly as described. Extremely close to the town. Thank you, Nin for a great stay.
This visit marks our second year in a row and we have already booked a stay for a third year next summer.  Quite possibly the Shangri-La of the Catskills incarnate.

Spent two wonderful nights at this beautiful home, which feels like an estate on arrival.  The entire place is artfully arranged with plenty of fun whimsy, and a comprehensive PDF is provided to guide the stay. Great instrument-stocked kitchen. The back lawn and creek was perfect for our energetic golden retriever Karl, who was a bit too hype on the host Ralph .. to our chagrin   - sorry again!
Lovely, classic artist setting
Amazing place
very special place, all great!

It’s a great, unique place. The location by the creek is incredible & so peaceful. The house is stylish and quirky, though as the listing says better for 1 family or close friends since there’s not so much privacy between the two bedrooms. We stayed with 2 friends and our 20-month-old. It’s not so great for toddlers, though, due to hard concrete floors, spiky plants & lots of open stairs, including stairs into the kid’s room from the main bedroom. We usually stay in the smaller carriage house, which is more child safe.
Beautiful home, gorgeous location, wonderful host!  We loved our stay and can’t wait to visit again.
Wonderful and most peaceful night away from the city
No notes, incredible escape even in the pouring rain. The ambience, even down to the little things like walking through the door to classical music, was truly top notch.
Fantastic weekend getaway spot. Located just out of town this is truly the perfect nature getaway. Place is very unique and no detail has been overlooked. Great for pets too!

It is very beautiful house and peaceful. The house look like the pictures. My family and I took beautiful pictures and have great time.
However, the place has a lot of windows, there is no privacy. The description has already warn and displayed about the privacy situation. I personally didn’t mind about the window but some of my family is not comfortable which is understandable.
Also the host provided this water that smell a little weird but the host said it was good for our skin.
The host also has this cutest and very friendly dog.

All 4 of us - dogs included had a blast. The hosts were extremely friendly. The photos didn’t do the gorgeous property justice.
Location was perfect, quiet yet a quick drive to town.
Highly recommend!

This place is pure magic.
We had the most peaceful, soul-refreshing stay in Woodstock at this beautifully decorated home. Every detail of the interior felt thoughtfully curated—stylish, cozy, and full of charm. The location couldn’t have been more perfect—right on the pond, where we spent mornings watching deer wander by and birds glide across the water. It was the kind of serene environment that instantly melts stress away.
The whole experience felt like a retreat. Quiet, relaxing, and just what we needed. The hosts clearly care deeply about creating a space that feels special—and they’ve absolutely nailed it.
We didn’t want to leave, and we’re already talking about coming back.
Stylish home in a serene, picturesque location. We plan to return for longer!

The stay was exactly what we hoped it would be! The property was beautiful and the home was so well designed with so many little things done the right way to feel like a home. Fil and Ellie were great hosts and were supremely responsive and helpful. We had an amazing trip relaxing at the house, using the amenities, and enjoying the Catskill mountains. Would definitely stay here again.
Beautiful home in a nice peaceful location. Host was great with communication and recommendations. Would stay again in the future.

Had the most wonderful stay at Fil and Ellie’s cabin. Where to begin - even lovelier than the pictures, spotlessly clean, the cedar hot tub, the movie projector! It was a perfect stay. Fil and Ellie were also so friendly and responsive! Already dreaming of returning in every season. Thank you!!
Everything was great, Fil and Ellie were very responsive and very accomadating! Thank you for a great stay
Beautiful home and will be staying again!!

Had such a great time. The surroundings were beautiful and the cabin itself was so cozy. The wood fired hot tub and sauna was so relaxing. We also really enjoyed watching stuff on the projector.
The hosts were very kind and helped explain everything about the cabin to us. They were available if we had any questions as well.
Thank you for providing us with such wonderful stay!

A great place for a cosy stay. The A-Frame cabin is well appointed with comfortable furnishings and the special touches that makes for a comfortable stay. Games, music, kitchen essentials, throw blankets, hot tub and sauna all contributed to a wonderful weekend stay. Special thanks to Fil and Ellie for being responsive and pleasant hosts!

Perfect little getaway! The place was secluded and private, exactly what we were looking for, and it had everything we needed. It was well stocked and made the whole stay easy and comfortable.
We met the hosts while they were finishing upgrades to the sauna and they were both incredibly nice and welcoming. Communication was amazing the whole time. We messaged them midday with a question and they replied in less than two minutes, which we appreciated.
There are a few small towns nearby that are nice to walk around, but for us it was really all about the Airbnb and how quiet and tucked away it felt. It was exactly the kind of peaceful cabin escape we were hoping for and we would definitely stay again.

Fil and Ellie are incredible hosts! They’re very fast to respond, they have great taste which is reflective with the decor of the house. Everything is so well thought of, right from the check in and house related information to recommendations about things to do around the house! We traveled with our dog and they made it so comfortable to stay at the house with our dog with a little care package for him! The property itself is very beautiful and well designed is truly the perfect place for a little staycation! We’d love to visit again!

Second time coming back. It’s such a LOVELY stay! The pictures are exactly how amazing and chic the stay is. You can grill outside and the hot tub and sauna are such a great perk. You’re right in between saugerties and Woodstock, both small town charm.  Will be coming back again because we love it so much!

Place was truly stunning. No details spared. Linens were great, kitchen was fully stocked, squeaky clean, speaker/projector/games, amazing shower, and they even had a little bar! Everything was beautiful in a “this is an Airbnb” way but done very tastefully and with quality pieces. It’s an easy drive to Kingston or Woodstock (we didn’t spend time in Saugerties but that’s even closer). It was a beautiful place to relax for a long weekend. It was one of those things we’re very few hours my friend and I were like “wow this place is really so nice” over and over. I would definitely go back in the summer because the deck/bbq situation looked so nice. Definitely recommend staying here!

The stay was great. The hosts were very communicative and responded quickly to all of my questions, which made everything smooth from check-in to check-out. The location was perfect, quiet, and exactly what I was looking for. The space was very clean and looked just like the photos, so there were no surprises. Overall, it was a really comfortable stay and I would definitely stay here again.

This was an absolute dream for our honeymoon. The house is stunning and in such a peaceful and restorative setting. The amenities were perfect to relax and unwind in nature! The hosts were such wonderful and responsive people that were proactive about our needs for our stay! We will absolutely come back! Thank you!
Excellent hosts! We had a great time and everything was as nice as we had hoped.

What a beautiful A-frame! I loved all the details in every corner of this home! Fil was very responsive and answered all of my questions promptly. My stay was during a blizzard and Fil came out early the next day to clear the paths on the property. I would definitely recommend this place to others! It’s a gem!!

We had the perfect winter getaway at this cozy cabin in the woods. The sauna and hot tub were absolute highlights — nothing beats warming up after a snowy day and soaking under the stars.
Being able to bring our dog made it even more special, and the peaceful setting was exactly what we needed. The cabin’s design was so beautiful and thoughtful that it actually inspired us to dream about building our own home someday. We can’t wait to return!
Even nicer in person. Quiet, relaxing and peaceful

This place beats all our (already very high) expectations! Absolutely beautiful house with every detail thoughtfully designed. It is quite an experience to sit in a sauna with snow views. Fil & Ellie are very communicative and helpful. Enjoyed every minute of the stay!

Another great vacation at the Highwoods cabin. Fil and Ellie are truly wonderful hosts. They helped with burning wood to keep the hot tub at a great temperature. It was amazing to enjoy it when the snow was falling. The outdoor sauna is a great addition and easy to operate. We had the perfect snowy weather, and they were very flexible with snow removal.
On the inside, they keep adding gadgets to enjoy our stay. We can't wait to come again.

Fil & Ellie’s cabin was absolutely wonderful! They were great hosts! The cabin was exactly as advertised and even better once there. Fil & Ellie offered to start up the hot tub several times for us and gave clear instructions on how everything worked! Would stay here again in a heart beat.

This cabin exceeded our expectations! It was extremely clean, cozy, and had every amenity you could want. The coffee maker was a great touch for mornings, and the hot tub + sauna made it feel like a true relaxing retreat. It was the perfect weekend escape - we already want to book again!

If I had to use one word to describe our experience, it would be “PERFECT”. Before even arriving at the house, the hosts were super accommodating and quick to reply. I was a little worried that with back-to-back bookings there might be some minor inconveniences. However, the house itself was stunning, spotless, no damages, and the attention to detail throughout was unlike anything I’ve ever experienced. Fil & Ellie clearly take pride in their home and work very hard to provide the best experience. The hot tub and sauna outdoors was one of the highlights. The location is perfect as we were able to access everything with ease. Overall, every aspect of this Airbnb was phenomenal.

We had an incredible New Years Eve here. The house is absolutely beautiful, and in the midst of winter it had the ultimate cozy vibe that we were hoping for. The outdoor space is open, yet gives a private, quiet feel. We loved using the sauna and hot tub on the snowy days. Fil and Ellie were great hosts, even reaching out to us after it had snowed some more to see if we needed any assistance, and setting up a dog bowl with water ready when we arrived. The inside decor is detail-oriented and showcases the effort Fil and Ellie put into ensuring we had a great experience. I would love to come back here and definitely recommend.

No shortage of great things to say about Fil & Ellie’s home! We had an absolutely lovely time with our 6 month old son and dog over the holidays. They were so responsive and thoughtful, the attention to detail was incredible. Can’t wait to return in the warmer months!

This A-frame house in Saugerties was a perfect winter escape. The space was cozy, clean, and thoughtfully set up for a relaxing stay, surrounded by beautiful scenery. Despite heavy snow, Fil, the owner, went above and beyond personally digging out snow, clearing paths, and making sure everything was accessible and comfortable. His help made the experience stress-free and welcoming.
The home itself is a great getaway from the city, ideal for slowing down and recharging. Loved that there was a projector! The sauna was a highlight and a must-use during the stay. I would absolutely stay here again and highly recommend it, especially for a solo retreat.

Our stay was absolutely magical! The space was filled with Christmas spirit, making it such a special holiday experience. The design is stunning – it’s so rare to find a place where beauty, comfort, and functionality come together so perfectly, but this home achieves it flawlessly. Every detail was thoughtfully considered, from the cozy touches to the practical amenities, making our stay effortlessly comfortable. The sauna and hot tub in winter were unforgettable highlights we’ll cherish forever. Thank you for sharing such a special place with us!​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​
Don’t hesitate - just book it. Best Airbnb I’ve ever stayed in.

The cabin is beautiful, well-organized, clean, well-equipped, and very cozy. The hosts responded to every question and generously helped us with operating the hot tub, which was a special experience on a freezing evening. We really enjoyed the excellent coffee machine and the games for the whole family. We highly recommend this cabin and would be happy to return again.
We had such a nice stay here. Fil and Ellie have created a beautiful and relaxing space. They thought of everything someone could ever need! We definitely will be back.
Fil and Ellie’s place was amazing!  Super clean and great amenities with clear instructions. Great communication and fast responses. Couldn’t ask for more! Highly recommended!
Excellent house with a beautiful view and fancy facilities. The host is very polite and always tries their best to meet every request.

This A-frame cabin was truly magical. Even better than the photos — beautifully renovated, spotless, and filled with thoughtful touches: plush towels, incredibly comfy bed and pillows, robes, makeup towels, chargers, and every bathroom essential. The Christmas décor made it feel so festive. We loved the bar cart, projector, games, wood-fired hot tub, sauna with eucalyptus oil, fire pit with Adirondack chairs, and the dreamy string lights.
The kitchen had everything we needed, and having laundry was so helpful. Nature was stunning — fresh snow, deer, and even two foxes playing while we were in the sauna.
Fil was an amazing host. We didn’t expect any shoveling, and when he offered we assumed just the driveway — but he did the driveway, back door, paths to the hot tub and sauna, and the entire lane. Completely unexpected and incredibly kind and generous.
One of the best Airbnbs we’ve ever stayed in. We will 100% be back.

Fil and Ellie are the perfect hosts! They’re warm, responsive, and truly go above and beyond to make you feel right at home. The house itself is absolutely stunning- you can tell so much heart has been poured into every detail, and Ellie’s beautifully curated décor makes the space feel both luxurious and cozy.
Starting our first Christmas season with our son here was an absolute dream, and we’ll forever cherish the memories we made. We can’t wait to return in the summer and enjoy all the incredible hiking the area has to offer!
Thank you again, Fil and Ellie, for sharing your beautiful space with us. xx.
We had a really great stay. The house is a perfect peaceful retreat to get away from the hustle and bustle of regular day life

This was such a wonderful stay- the best AirBNB we’ve stayed in. The cabin is beautiful and so thoughtfully appointed- we had everything we needed for a quiet Thanksgiving weekend. It is far enough away to feel secluded in the woods and yet close to great hiking, skiing, and the town of Woodstock with shopping and restaurants. We enjoyed everything about the house, especially the sauna and wood-burning hot tub. The host was very attentive,  checking in with us throughout our stay. We dream of building a place just like this someday- everything about it exceeded our expectations.
Awesome cabin to stay!

We had a fabulous stay. The house is gorgeous and was perfect for a romantic weekend getaway. Lots of luxurious touches. Close to Woodstock, Saugerties and Kingston - so there are a lot of great dining options!

Fil and Ellie were extremely accommodating and communicative hosts. Their response time was always less than 10 mins. I booked this home to celebrate my partners birthday and they set up balloons— at an additional cost. The set up was perfect. The kitchen was stocked with everything you could need to make a good meal, including an arrangement of seasonings. I was actually shocked that the kitchen was truly ready to use. The wood-fire hot tub was divine. We really enjoyed our stay honestly and can’t wait to come back during a warmer month! Perfect upstate getaway.

Our stay at Fil & Ellie’s place was amazing. They sent us a wonderful and comprehensive guide to the house and local surroundings which we used! The house was spotless, perfectly decorated for the upcoming holiday which we absolutely loved. The house had everything you could think of, definitely the most well stocked of any Airbnb we have used. Their suggestion of Falling Waters Preserve was perfect for us and the pups. You’ll want to stay at the cabin the whole time! We were so sad to leave!
Our stay at Fil & Ellie’s property was such a memorable experience.

We really enjoyed our stay at Fil & Ellie's place and will be back again I'm sure. The hosts responded within 5 mins to every question and request, and the property made for the perfect getaway for a few days from the city. The house is well located between Saugerties, Woodstock, Catskill, and Kingston so is the perfect jumping off point for folks that want to do lots of exploring.
Wonderful stay!
We loved our stay! Fil and Ellie were more than helpful and went above and beyond. We were so impressed with the place.

Ellie and Phil’s place was just breath taking. Their attention to detail was literally insane. They have everything you could possibly need to have the perfect stay. They have board games, spices, basic cooking needs, an incredible espresso machine, a hot tub, a sauna!!! This place is truly the perfect place to just get away. Upstairs has its own room, little lounge area and bathroom. I will definitely be coming back very soon!

We had an amazing time at
Fil & Ellie’s A-Frame! Beautiful home. Secluded and peaceful , yet close to town for great shopping and amazing food! Very clean and Fil & Ellie responded with in 5 minutes with any questions or concerns. They are truly wonderful hosts!

Beautiful house for a mid week get away! Everything was exactly as pictured and described. The sauna and the hot tub were so lovely to use after a long day of hiking.  The house was spotless and incredibly well stocked.  Hosts were easy to chat with.
Beautiful place, highly recommend

This was one of the best Airbnbs I’ve ever stayed at! It’s just as beautiful, cozy and serene as the photos - highly recommend! The hosts were responsive and friendly. I would happily stay here again.

My wife and I, along with our two toddlers, had an amazing weekend at Fil & Ellie's cabin.  The entire experience was so thoughtfully curated to maximize relaxation and enjoyment.  Our hosts greeted us a with a crackling campfire and a preheated hot tub upon our arrival.  There are so many little touches throughout this place, including the beautiful outdoor bistro lights that run on a timer, the mid century modern inspired aesthetic, the washer/dryer with automatic detergent dispenser, and the projector you can watch at night on the ceiling.   We think this was the cleanest Airbnb we have ever stayed at, and we also really appreciated the checkout process that requires nothing other than locking up.  Fil & Ellie gave us so many suggestions and were immediately responsive to any questions, even bringing us dry firewood!  This is the perfect place to say to access anything you want in Catskills or just to enjoy this incredible home with all of its amenities.  We can't wait to return.

The A-frame provided a truly luxurious and special stay for our family. The property and interior is beautifully designed and well maintained, and provided so many lovely moments to settle into its comfort. The home is fully prepared with anything one could wish for to have a special retreat away. We enjoyed cooking in the stocked kitchen, making Americanos in the morning, cozying up outside by the fire pit, relaxing in the living room, and soaking up the fall season upstate both inside and outside at the A-frame.
The hosts were helpful and responsive, and made the stay extremely comfortable for us- even providing a nice and clean travel crib and high chair for our baby.

Everything is good Show the
Picture same thing like picture.

Dena’s place in the Catskills was everything we hoped for. Peaceful, beautifully maintained, and full of charm. The home was spotless and cozy, with thoughtful touches that made us feel right at home. Dena was incredibly responsive and welcoming, making the entire experience smooth from beginning to end.
