I highly recommend staying here if you’re looking for a relaxing escape in nature. We would absolutely love to return.

We had a fantastic stay and made wonderful memories. The views were beautiful from the deck, the kitchen was fully stocked and enjoyed all the special treats. Thank you Dena! The hot tub was clean and was very relaxing looking out to the view of the mountain. The sauna is a great addition. Great location with lots of activities in town and near the surrounding towns. Thank you for all the recommendations! Will def come back for another stay!
Dena's exceptional care for this place shines through in every detail, clearly demonstrating a genuine desire to delight visitors.

My recent stay at this Airbnb was absolutely fantastic! The property was **fully equipped** with everything I could possibly need, making it incredibly convenient and comfortable. The included **breakfast** was delightful—a great start to the day. The place was also **spotlessly clean**, which I really appreciated. On top of all that, the **host was exceptionally responsive**, always ready to assist and ensure my stay was perfect. Highly recommend this place for anyone looking for a hassle-free and enjoyable experience!  Thank you Dena.
The place was just as it looks in the pictures and Dena a fantastic, attentive host. Many thanks.

One of the BEST AirBnB experiences and that is an understatement!!! We booked the home for a 40th birthday get away for my husband. We absolutely had a blast!!!
— the home is not only gorgeous but it was one of the cleanest places I have ever been to!
— the surroundings are absolutely beautiful and windows allow for breathtaking views
— the location is fabulous, close to many good restaurants in Tannersville or Hunter. The setting is private and quiet
— The outdoor spaces are just fabulous, so well equipped with comfortable furniture, towels, heaters etc. Very enjoyable!
— But most importantly, the host, Dena is the reason this AirBnb is so amazing!! She is not only responsive but full of great suggestions. She was also incredibly thoughtful! We were spoilt with incredible amenities one could dream of, including some special offerings from a local store. We had an amazing breakfast every day thanks to that and didn’t have to worry about a grocery run. So grateful for a fab time!!!

We had the most wonderful time at Dena’s place. It was perfect for our group of 10 ski trip. The house was stocked with everything we needed. We loved the thoughtful touches from the baked goods to smores and the stocked nespresso machine. Using the hot tub and sauna was seamless. We normally switch up our spot yearly for our ski trip but I have a feeling we’ll be back :) miss it already!

Killercat Mountain House is everything you could want in a mountain retreat. Every detail - from the fully stocked kitchen (seriously, all this for us?), to the hot tub with jaw-dropping views, to the car charger - made our stay effortless and unforgettable. This isn’t just a place to stay; it’s an escape, a vibe, and an experience that leaves you recharged, inspired, and already planning your next visit (we did!). Huge shoutout to Dena, the world’s best host - always there when you need her, never when you don’t. Total rockstar. Killer house, killer host. Don’t walk, RUN to book it. Actually, scratch that - don’t book it so we can come back!
wish I could give more than 5 stars! Such a beautiful space with amazing views, gorgeous decor + the sweetest hosts! If you are looking for a place to stay in the Catskills- THIS IS IT!
Wonderful hospitality from Dena! Made planning my sister’s bachelorette in Hunter an absolute breeze 🐱 Thank you again Dena ❤️
We had a wonderful weekend, beautiful place, close to everything. Great experience overall highly recommend.

Dena was fantastic!! The space is exactly as pictured, just a beautiful! She gave us very detailed information about everything we could possibly need and then some!! There was a personalized note and goodies when we arrived!! Our only regret is not staying longer but we would definitely be back soon for a longer stay! We truly appreciated the hospitality! Would highly recommend!

We visited Dena’s beautiful home for a bachelorette weekend which turned out to be exactly what our bride was looking for - spacious, cozy, modern and fun. The house is decorated so well with every detail taken into account. We enjoyed the hot tub, sauna and stunning views. Dena is a fabulous host and went above and beyond to accommodate our group. She is so responsive and friendly and left us delicious local treats.
I’d love to be a guest in Dena’s home again! Highly recommend!

We had an amazing stay at Killercat Mountain House! The location was perfect – just 5 minutes from Hunter Mountain. The house comfortably fit our group of 6 adults and 3 kids, and was so cozy, especially with the fireplace. The sauna and hot tub were the perfect apres-ski treat. The house was spotless, and Dena was a fantastic host! She was super responsive and even left us a thoughtful assortment of goodies to enjoy. Everything was so well-thought-out – truly one of the best Airbnbs we've stayed in! Thank you again, Dena – we’ll definitely be back.

What a great winter escape. We had a friends reunion here for the weekend and loved the house. Dena was extremely proactive with her host suggestions and advice. The treats that were left were amazing and tailored to our group. We found the house very comfortable and close to skiing. The hot tub overlooking the ski mountain and sauna made it. Highly recommend.

Our stay was even better than expected. The house was clean, comfortable, and set up so nicely for our arrival. The amenities were heaven and the house was well stocked with everything we needed. If you are on the fence about booking this place, do not hesitate. We hope to be back one day!

All we can say is WOW! A rating of 4.99 stars? Absolutely not—this place deserves a full 5 stars! 🤩 Our family, spanning ages 4 to 55, enjoyed an incredible week here. Don’t think twice about booking this charming home!!
Dena is an exceptional host who genuinely cares for her property and ensures your comfort. She is incredibly attentive and quick to respond! From the delightful local treats waiting for us in the fridge to the thoughtful handwritten note upon our arrival, every detail was perfect. She even provided those last-minute essentials we forgot! The guidebook she sends before your trip is packed with everything you need to know about the area and activities available.
The house is ideally situated with stunning views of Hunter Mountain, and it’s spotless—truly has the feel of a designer home! We just returned from our trip and are already longing to go back!
A huge thank you to Dena and Jason! ❤️
Dena is fantastic!

We loved our stay!
It was so easy to communicate with Dena. She made sure we knew she was easily reachable and checked in to see if we needed anything or had any questions. This alleviated a lot of the stress that can often accompany renting.
The house itself was very accommodating. We especially liked the way the rooms were situated.
My husband and I stayed on the main floor, our son and his friend downstairs in the bunk room by the game room and my daughter and her friend had the upstairs two rooms. Each area had a bathroom accompanying it which worked out really well for our group.
Arriving to a refrigerator stocked with local foods to sample was truly an extra special touch that sets Dena’s place apart from some of the other places we have stayed at and
Everyone loved having a Nespresso Cappucino before hitting the slopes.
The guys tried really hard to beat the Galaga top score but to no avail. Maybe they will get it next time!
We would definitely stay again.
Thanks Dena!

Upon arrival we knew this was going to be a fantastic stay. Stocked fridge with local goodies, Smores making kit, firewood next to Fireplace with starters, outside fire pit, Hot tub and Sauna! All 3 couples had beautiful rooms with great beds and linens with ample closet space. The kids downstairs playroom with double bunk beds, allowed the adults to enjoy the deck and Hot Tub with Mountain View’s. Less than 5 min drive from Skiing at Hunter Mountain. Dena’s attentive hosting will definitely have us looking for future stays!

We can't say enough good things about our stay at Killercat Mountain House! From the communication with Dena, her recommendations, the beautiful property, and the amenities... it was an all-around 10/10. From the second we arrived, we were already discussing when we should come back. Thank you for a great and unforgettable weekend <3
Beautiful space and a gracious host. Will most certainly be staying again!

This was one of the best Airbnbs we’ve ever rented! Dena was an exceptional host—kind, thoughtful, and always responsive. She went out of her way to make our stay seamless and enjoyable. The house was spotless, and the garden was a perfect haven for our dog, allowing him to roam freely and safely. Our stay couldn’t have been better. Thank you, Dena, for everything! We highly recommend this place and hope to return in the future!

Definitely a place to book! Beautiful views, wonderful amenities and worth it! The host is sweet and looks into every detail to make your stay the best she can. She responds very quickly and goes out of her way to leave treats for when you arrive! Would definitely be visiting again!

Dena’s place was the perfect getaway for a girls weekend out of the city. Her immaculate taste in decor and house amenities made it so nice to spend quality time resting and relaxing in her cozy home. The house was spotless upon arrival and we were welcomed with local treats to highlight some local producers in the area. She also left detailed instructions for all of the amenities so we never had to wonder how to work anything because she had communicated so clearly. This stay was 100/10 and I will be coming back to Dena’s next time I’m venturing upstate!

Dena's Home was so comfortable and immaculately clean. Dena welcomed us with so many special goodies and the killer cat was exactly as pictured. So beautifully decorated. My friends and I enjoyed such a wonderful weekend! I would definitely recommend this wonderful property if you're looking for a cozy getaway!

Wow! What an incredible experience at the Killer Cat Mountain House! This home exceeded expectations in all regards. It was super clean and the attention to detail throughout was second to none. Dena goes out of her way to make your stay spectacular and is a superb host. Definitely one of the best Airbnbs we’ve ever stayed in. Highly recommend. We’ll certainly be back!
Love, love, love! Highly recommend. The perfect weekend escape.

Dena’s house is everything promised and more.
We had a great time and wished we could have stayed for longer. We will be back.

We loved the house and the incredible attention to details from Dena. From the personal note accompanying the s’mores kit to the quality food she provided for breakfast. The house is beautiful and accommodating. We used the sauna, hot tub and fire pit and felt completely immersed in the foliage
Thank you 🙏

I cannot say enough about Dena and her home. Her attention to detail is spectacular. The home is decorated with divine taste. Every detail is intentional and thoughtful. Dena was extremely communicative, and did everything to go above and beyond! She even left us local treats in the fridge! The home is clean, comfortable, and perfect for a group of people that want to share but enough space that you are not on top of each other. It is a very special place and we can only hope to return again and again!

Had an absolutely fantastic experience. The place is exactly as advertised, super clean and plenty of room. Dena's hospitality was over the top, with a very in depth house manual which included tons of fun things to do in the area, as well as providing tons of delicious local breakfast items.  One of the best Airbnb experiences we have had.

Beautifully furnished, spotless home with all the amenities. Dena is an over the top host; thorough in every aspect plus provided us with fresh baked goods, yogurt, eggs, milk, etc. from local sources that lasted for much of the week. We spent the days hiking the many trails of the colorful Hudson Valley, some recommended by Dena. Would most definitely stay again!

As a family with adult kids and their partners, and 2 dogs this was the perfect getaway. Location between Boston and NYC was ideal. The house isn’t huge but it easily accommodates  10! Thank you so much for your hospitality, our stay was over the top amazing from start to finish! Myself and my 5 closest college girlfriends stayed here for a long weekend away, no husbands & no kids! We stayed in the whole weekend in order to take full advantage of all the amenities this house had to offer -- hot tub, charcuterie board, wine, fire pit/s'mores, board games on repeat. We had a fabulous time staying at Dena's home over the course of a fall week. The home and surroundings are stunning and the house was even better that we expected! It's the perfect mix of close, easy drive to restaurants and stores while being very secluded and private when you are at home. The welcome spread of local treats was phenomenal and very generous.

This was perfect for my husband and I to set up camp with our toddlers and feel like we had room to move while the rest of our party slept in each day. It also meant my kids slept very soundly down in the cozy lower level while the adults enjoyed themselves upstairs in the evenings.
Dena was super responsive and we had no issues while away. Highly recommend!

One word….WOW!!! Killercat Mountain House is definitely one of a kind! What a gem!!!!! What a welcoming surprise to have a delightful spread of delicious food Dena left for us from Fellow Mountain Cafe…yummmmy! We also enjoyed going there for coffee and treats it’s so close! The hot tub was amazing and was offered to be refreshed mid week by Dena :) sauna was amazing and inside relaxing on the super comfy couch with a fire were all such relaxing amenities! Enjoyed going to all the close little towns and enjoying the local restaurants and breweries! Thank you Dena for being the best host!

Dena and her house were amazing!!! She was beyond responsive and checked in to make sure we were good. The house was the cleanest Airbnb that we have ever stayed in and she even had local eggs, cheese, pastries, bread, hummus and a s’mores kit for us in the house upon arrival. Felt like a queen in this cozy lair. The house is very tidy and well stocked with everything a queen could need. Thank you so much to Dena for all the local treats and s’more kit. We enjoyed the hot tub while watching the eclipse. 💫  Nintendo and games kept the boy busy while I relaxed.  Lounged hard on the glorious deck and sauna. Great location with a beautiful view of little Hunter Mountain. Hope to stay here again.

Dena was a fantastic host; very responsive, friendly and helpful.  The house was beautiful and full of design interest creating a unique experience.  Location is private with a really nice view. Very relaxing.  Would stay there again for sure!
Home was gorgeous! We felt so welcomed. It was a great place to unwind from the rest of the world. We loved the hot tub and sauna. They were such a treat after a day of exploring the Catskills!

The most excellent Airbnb experience!
Outside of the place being stylish, having everything you need and more, offering quiet and all you need to relax, cook at home, celebrate, there are plenty of fun things to do around.
Dena was the most hospitable and welcoming host I have ever met. She was super responsive, helpful, easy to interact with, and left us treats to enjoy on our arrival. An experience that I will not forget anytime soon. Thank you Dena!!!

This was the best airbnb I've personally ever stayed at. I've never experienced a host so friendly and communicative. Not just that, she really went above any beyond expectations. The bedrooms and bathrooms were very clean and we all were very comfortable. I'd love to come back here in the future and highly suggest this spot for anyone! Thank you Dena for a great experience, my family loved it!
Me and the crew I went with had a wonderful experience and really appreciate Dena’s thoughtfulness and attention to detail. We wouldn’t think twice about booking this house again. Thank you Dena <3
This property and host exceeded every. single. expectation.   If I was ever to have an airbnb I’d hope to run it as beautifully as this.   So many thoughtful details, and kindness at every turn.

This place was incredible for our girls weekend. When we arrived, there were tons local goodies and a really nice note from the host. The decor and kitchen was stunning, all the guests were really impressed. Anything we had forgotten, Dena had provided. The view was the porch was amazing - the photos do not do this place justice. Dena was proactive and checked in with us during our check in and was super responsive and available - plus omg - a bathroom on each floor was also incredible. It was the best place we've ever stayed - you will 100% not be disappointed.

Beautiful house with incredible location !! The view was just amazing from the balcony and I must say Dena was very responsive and helpful with everything. I would highly recommend if y’all wanna feel the nature and mountains, especially for the large groups and families. We will definitely come back soon and thank you once again for everything Dena. 🙏

The property was a delight to stay in. Was a perfect location to spend time with my family. Dena was easy to get a hold of and very accomodating. It was also very well stocked for our daily needs.  So happy we found this place for our birthdays celebration family mini vacation 😁
Beautiful and comfortable cabin that is conveniently located. The sauna was definitely a bonus.
Beautiful place, close to Placid, Whiteface, hiking, and numerous restaurants. Well worth a visit!

Beautiful stay at ADK A Frame
My family and I would definitely stay again!

Amazing experience. A corner of paradise surrounded by nature.
The house is wonderful, cared for the smallest detail.
Melinda was always present and even from a distance she took care of us.
My friends and I highly recommend for a group but also for a romantic getaway.
If we can we will be back!!

It’s our second visit to the cabin and we absolutely love it.  It’s always perfectly well maintained and cleaned.   The design in atmosphere is carefully thought out and so enjoyable.   The large windows are amazing to watch freshly falling snow.   The sauna super cool given your ski worn out body so much needed he   the coolest part just might be in the laundry room perfect organizing you and your families gear    the rooms are a perfect size. House is quiet and the fireplace is so relaxing.

We enjoyed our stay at this beautiful a-frame house! We were a group of 6, so there was enough space for us to sleep, cook together and hangout! We needed a place mostly to sleep and have evening hangouts since we came to enjoy skiing. Whiteface is around 20 mins drive which was perfect.
Our recommendation is to bring more warm clothes for the house, since the house has a big glass main wall, so it tends to get cold inside. Two out of 3 bedrooms were cold, however host provided extra blankets that we used. The other room was very hot on the other hand. The
Sauna was a great addition to our stay, however some steam gets through the door so you need to maintain the temperature inside while you are enjoying it.
We enjoyed how private was the location! It was a huge plus for all of us!
We want to thank the hosts! They were super nice and allowed us early check in and later check out very last minute!
If you want to have a good time at the private location - we highly recommend this place
Great stay!! So beautiful and exactly what we were hoping for

What a beautiful place to escape and reset! My boyfriend and I have very hectic work schedules so this property was perfect! We were able to stay in the extremely cozy A-Frame with a well kept sauna but also had the opportunity of trying great cuisine close by and visiting stunning Lake Placid. It was a great combination of both fun and relaxation. What also makes it stand out is Melinda & Robert’s ability to accommodate last minute requests such as a late check out and the addition of a night because we just couldn’t bring ourselves to leave! I would definitely recommend this home to any and everyone look for peace & adventure!
Definitely would go back.
One of the best houses to stay

We stayed at the A-Frame to celebrate our honeymoon & had a great time exploring surrounding towns. The home is beautiful and has lots of amenities. Melinda was responsive throughout our stay and we felt comfortable knowing we could message her with any questions or concerns. Perfect for anyone looking for a cozy, relaxing, and recharging getaway!

Wir haben ein wunderschönes Winterwochenende in dem Haus verbracht und hatten eine unglaublich schöne Zeit. Das Haus liegt super ruhig in einem Wald und lässt einen direkt wie Zuhause fühlen. Die Einrichtung ist super geschmackvoll. Der viele Schnee hat das Wochenende perfekt gemacht.
Amazing cabin and excellent host!

We stayed at this home for a short weekend in December to take in all the sights and get into the holiday spirit! The house was pristine upon arrival and entry was a breeze. We were able to settle in right at home and even enjoyed a home cooked meal our first night. The house is placed just outside of the town, which made it easy for us to shop in Lake Placid and visit a few sites, including a gondola ride up Whiteface Mountain. We even used the fire pit and sauna, which were both additional perks during our stay. We will surely be staying here again in the future!

Great stay - perfect set up for two families.  The kitchen was outfitted more than well enough to cook a Thanksgiving meal, and the outdoor area was great for both a fire and some play for the little ones in the snow.  We’d love to return.
Definetely one of my favorite stays! Love the home and location. I’ll have to come back in the spring/summer!
Loved our time in Jay. Super clean place. Great place to unwind. Super peaceful. Hosts have a perfect system -- very well-ran AirBnB. Spa, fireplace, and kitchen were our favorite parts.

The house is so unique and beautiful. Melinda was a great host, super responsive and answered any questions we had. Everything was spotless and we loved the outdoor space with the fireplace and sauna!

🍁🔥Words cannot describe this place. Photos definitely don't capture how wonderful and impressive it is; every detail is handled and cared for with the utmost attention to detail. A truly stunning and beautiful place.❤️
Beautiful place! Attention to detail, incredibly comfortable! Great hosts—-good communication
We enjoyed our stay at the A Frame. We had lots of cozy rainy days and enjoyed the fire and great fall backdrop.
The Aframe was perfect! Peaceful location, sauna was great, had a nice night for a fire under the lights.  I will definitely look to stay here again in the future!
Exactly what hubby and I needed to unplug and unwind.  Clean, beautiful and as pictured. Loved Melinda and Rob's recommendations/responsiveness. Would visit again.
it was a great experience to stay there
Had a very comfortable and fun time at Melinda and Rob’s. A beautiful cabin, every small detail was taken care of. The sauna and the fire-pit were added bonus. Enjoyed every bit🙂🙂
Melinda’s house was lovely and well equipped with everything we needed to cook dinners. The property and fire pit were great as well. Would absolutely come back.

We had a wonderful stay at the ADK Aframe in Jay, NY. We planned a family weekend to do a hike and visit Ausable Chasm, each within a 30 minute drive. The house was very clean and was absolutely gorgeous. We enjoyed having a fire and using the sauna out back. Would recommend this place if you are looking for a peaceful get away!
Our third time here…so nice that even though we had one day of rain and couldn’t do much hiking, this house (including the new sauna) was great to hang out in!!! Love this place

This place is as beautiful and cozy as the photos. Comfy beds and excellent amenities. Sauna and firepit were perfect ways to relax after a day of hiking and exploring the ADK. Melinda was great with communication and recommendations. 10/10- definitely recommend!!

The ADK A-frame is the place to stay if you want a peaceful and serene Adirondack get away! We felt right at home with all of the thoughtful details and amenities this place has to offer. They’ve truly thought of everything! Thank you for sharing your home with us-what a great reset! We look forward to visiting again for a future stay up north!
A beautiful cabin! Definitely remote, but there are neighbors around. It would be gorgeous in the fall with changing leaves!
Amazing location and the house is spectacular. The perfect wholesome getaway from the city noise. Highly recommend.

This is an outstanding and unique house and set-up. It’s designed for comfort and fun. We enjoyed the experience fully, and loved being in the heart of the High Peaks, fairly close and a beautiful drive to Keene and Placid. Melinda is a terrific communicator and super responsive.
It was a beautiful house and a location worth all the sights and serenity.

This A frame was exactly as described and met all my expectations. The hosts were detailed oriented, communicative and have done a great job creating such a comforting environment. I especially loved the sauna for a healthy detox perfectly paired with the nature and cozy surroundings. Thank you!

Melinda and Rob’s A-frame in ADK is a dream home! It is beautifully designed with three spacious bedrooms and tons of natural light. Having central AC was also a huge plus! I highly recommend this home to anyone seeking a restorative and luxurious stay in the Adirondacks!
We enjoyed our stay! As pictured, comfortable space, that’s evidently the product of care and pride. Equal parts pragmatic, cozy and well designed.

ADK Aframe looked just like the photos!  The house was clean, kitchen was fully stocked with spices and other household items from zip lock bags to a salad spinner!  We had fun roasting marshmallows on fire every night we were there.  We were there while it was super hot, so didn’t try sauna.  We are thinking to revisit in the future in winter to ski!

We loved our stay. We took a family vacation to the Lake Placid area. This location was great. Central to all the areas you would want to visit. Loved waking up and opening the doors to the outside and get all that nice weather in. Wish I had that back at home.
Great stay for the Ironman.

The place is very well put together and organized. Very easy to get in . Well stocked kitchen. Make sure you bring your supplies in the way in as there is not a lot within immediate reach. Great place for quiet and relaxation.
Awesome environment, with great amenities.
We enjoyed the stay in the cabin.

We had a great time at Melinda’s place! The A-frame design strikes the perfect balance between cozy, rustic charm and modern comfort. Melinda was a fantastic host—she shared helpful tips about the July 4th fireworks in the Lake Placid area and stayed in touch throughout our stay. Highly recommend for anyone looking for a peaceful Adirondack getaway!
We had a wonderful stay! Beautiful cabin with plenty of space and lovely amenities.
Wonderful stay and a really well kept and equipped house.

What an ah-mazing little spot. Felt tranquil, comfortable and at home. Wildlife, bonfire, sauna… and the delightful gift of quiet. Well styled and comfortably appointed with a host that got it “just right”. Will definitely be back!!

For a comparable price we could have chosen lake houses or something with panoramic valley views, but we really wanted to try an A-Frame and had zero regrets in the end as our stay was wonderful.
This cabin has a lot of character and very nice layout, spacious too. Thoughtful furniture and decor. Fully stocked kitchen. Green and tranquil location. Outdoor sauna was a plus. I'm probably forgetting something else that we liked, but we'll never forget this cabin and the story behind it will be our inspiration.
Nice house in a quiet area, all the amenities were listed properly and the house was very clean. We loved the smokeless fire pit!

Incredible cabin and wonderful hosts. The location is perfect with lots of local hikes and plenty to do! Sadly we had our plans rained out but the space was so beautiful we quite enjoyed our time being spent almost entirely indoors. Gorgeous and intimate space.

Gorgeous cabin stocked with everything we needed for a few days away. Close to great hikes and surrounded by trees. Also, very flexible when we added our dog to the reservation after the initial booking. Highly recommend and would happily come back!
Wonderful place! Cozy, peaceful, and exactly what I needed to feel relaxed and recharged. Highly recommend!
We made ourselves at home the second we opened the door to our cabin... it was a wonderful stay!!! I will be forever grateful for this place... We will come back, for sure! Thank you!!!

This place is a MUST if you’re heading to the Catskills! My boyfriend and I had a wonderful and peaceful stay at Pottsy’s cabin! Pottsy's A frame cabin was in a beautiful location and accurately described. A peaceful place to recharge and immerse yourself in nature. Pottsy was very responsive and helpful with any needs we had. He has a one stop shop resources for anything needed within the Airbnb along with nearby recommendations . A great host, a great spot and about 10-20min driving from any shops, hikes, restaurants, coffee shops. Thanks for a nice stay!
Great location close to Woodstock (great food & drink) and hiking! Sauna and fire pit made the outdoors cozy and amazing views from all parts of the house.
Thank you for having us

Amazing experience at Pottsy’s cabins. Instructions from Pottsy are spot on, and we needed very little help because everything is well documented. The property was beautiful and has state of the art amenities. Sauna, Firepit, deck, stereo system, heating and cooling were all great. Beds, couches, sheets, blankets were all cozy and comfortable. The property is secluded and we had ample privacy. 10/10 will visit again. Great place for a family getaway.

my husband loved this Airbnb so much that he now wants an a frame house. we are planning on coming back in the fall and making this Airbnb one of our regular Airbnbs for whenever we want a weekend getaway. 11/10!

Pottsy's place was STUNNING! We spent the weekend snuggling with our dog, going on long walks, and enjoying the sauna. The place was clean, well-decorated, and situated in a beautiful spot with great walking trails. We had the perfect weekend disconnecting.
Everything was perfect in every way. Thank you for everything. My husband and I really needed a nature getaway like this.

It was what my little family needed. Some quiet family time in the snow. We went sledding in the backyard, more than enough space for adult a children to have fun. Went into town to check out the antique shops. A wonderful time we had
This was a perfect winter getaway. So peaceful and the sauna gave us a nice dose of much needed warmth. We brought the pup too and she felt cozy and right at home. Great spot! We will be back.

We had a wonderful stay at Pottsy's A-frame in the snowy woods! The A-frame is beautiful, just like the photos and all aspects of the home are warm, inviting, comfortable and beautifully designed. Had very peaceful vacation with my family.
We really like here and want to come back again
A beautiful A-frame tucked away in the mountains! It was quiet, peaceful and cozy. We had a wonderful time relaxing in the cabin and shopping around the town of Saugerties!

Our stay at the Charlie cabin was absolutely incredible - Pottsy went above and beyond to ensure we had everything we needed, and the digital app he created had tons of amazing recs and useful info. The cabin itself was immaculate and stunning. Would highly recommend!!

Pottsy was a great host. The place is beautiful, decorated with great taste and has a lot of natural lights + a nice view.
Perfect for a couple with a dog and/or kids.

Pottsy was a great host and the place we absolutely wonderful. We spent a few weeks just enjoying the sauna and truly feeling like we were getting away from the hustle bustle of the city.
Feels like you’re staying in someone’s home vs staying in a generic living space. By that I mean i can tell there was a lot of thought that went into the details. Pottsy was also very accommodating. There was no microwave but he brought one over after we requested one. And further, we left our pillows there on accident and he even shipped it to us.
Overall great stay, great location and great host. Would love to come back some day!

We had an amazing stay at this cozy mountain cabin. The setting is perfectly secluded—quiet, peaceful, and exactly what we needed to unwind. The bed and pillows were incredibly comfortable, and I slept better here than I have in ages. We left feeling completely rested and recharged.
The cabin itself is warm and inviting, and the sauna was truly the cherry on top. Such a relaxing way to end each day. I’d absolutely stay here again and highly recommend it to anyone looking for a peaceful getaway.
This was the perfect getaway for our baby moon, we enjoyed the snow and the peacefulness of being in nature. Would love to come back when it’s warmer.
Beautiful A-frame in a great location. Highly recommend!
What a gorgeous place! We felt right at home. Incredible views, spacious living room, but still very cozy space. Enjoyed celebrating NYE. Would love to come back!

We had an amazing stay at Pottsy’s A-frame over Christmas break. The space is spotless, well appointed, and thoughtfully designed, making for a super comfortable and relaxing retreat. When a snowstorm hit during our stay, Pottsy went above and beyond by clearing the driveway for us even though we were perfectly happy to be snowed in. This is easily one of the nicest pet-friendly stays we’ve experienced -- our city pup was in heaven and didn’t want to leave the snow and deer behind. We would absolutely recommend Pottsy’s cabin to anyone looking for a peaceful, nature-filled escape.

Everything about Pottsy’s place is perfect from start to finish. The home is beautiful and spotless, the lay out is very convenient for a couple or small family, and our small dog!
It’s an easy drive to Woodstock, Catskills, Kingston- small towns with lots of character. And then you come home where it’s cozy - truly a home away from home!
We cant wait to come back! And possibly rent out their other cabins in the property, with family or friends and share wonderful memories !
This was beyond our expectations. Beautiful, peaceful and remote. It was the perfect getaway - we couldn’t recommend this incredible oasis enough.
Very warm and cozy.

This home was absolutely beautiful and so thoughtfully designed. As someone who loves interior design, there wasn’t a single thing I would have changed — everything was meticulously built and curated. We felt so comfortable the entire stay, almost like we were in our own home. The accommodations were more than enough, the beds were super comfy, and we enjoyed every part of the property. The snow, the fire pit, and the peacefulness made it such a magical experience, especially for our toddler. The sauna was an amazing addition, and the entire area was so quiet.. we didn’t hear any neighbors at all, which made it incredibly relaxing. Our dog, Rocko, loved the deck, and one night we even had hot cocoa out there bundled up under the stars. Waking up to the forest views each morning was perfection. Whenever we needed to reach out to the host, he responded within minutes, which we really appreciated.
We would absolutely stay here again. Highly recommend!

Our stay at the “Charlie House” was absolutely wonderful from start to finish. As first-time parents traveling with our 1 year old son, we couldn’t have asked for a better experience.
Pottsy was an incredible host - warm, welcoming, and notably responsive to every question we had before & during our stay.
His thoughtfulness showed in every detail, including the cozy touches throughout the home, amenities for our son & thoroughly amazing dining/activity recommendations for the area. He made us feel like welcomed friends rather than just guests.
The cabin itself is a gem, exactly as pictured but somehow even more charming in person. It provided the perfect sanctuary, with plenty of space for our little one to explore safely. It had everything we needed for a comfortable family stay, and the setting was simply beautiful.
We left feeling refreshed and grateful for the experience, and can’t wait to return! Easiest 5 star review of all time! ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

Pottsy's place was SUCH a pleasure to stay in - the beautiful photos of the listing come to life. The space was impeccably designed, and we could tell no corners were cut (automatic shades, dimming lights, frame TVs..). One bedroom is super cozy, the other loft bedroom opens up to the A-frame view of the Catskills across the way. Beds/ linens were SUPER COMFORTABLE. Living/ dining/ kitchen space was stylish and comfortable. There's a work station which was convenient for WFH. And picture windows everywhere, showing the surrounding woods. Deck is lovely - even with the November chill we used the BBQ to grill. (The propane tank was low - I messaged Pottsy and he responded right away and brought a new tank over immediately. He was super gracious and kind as my parents excitedly chatted with him). The barrel sauna is also great and easy to use. Overall HIGHLY recommend this gorgeous, secluded Airbnb. Just know that you will have to rely on your car rentals as Ubers are a no-go here.
Beautiful place and very private. Had a great time
Nice cabin looked just like the pics
The perfect house upstate for getaway that feels luxurious and cozy!
One of the most beautiful places I’ve been to

A beautiful private A Frame home with minimalist decor. Private setting but not far from local towns. We really enjoyed
our stay and highly recommend!

This beautiful cabin was a great home base to work remotely and enjoy gorgeous fall foliage. The house is close to the town of Catskill, apple picking orchards, and hikes. We would absolutely stay here again!
Peaceful, quiet, beautiful location. Cabin exactly as described. Friendly and responsive host. Will be back!

This is the second time we've stayed here, because it is a relaxing retreat for us and our toddler + dog. Secluded, beautiful, modern, and design-y. The outdoor sauna is great and beds were very comfortable.
Absolutely amazing house , very well kept. We are hoping  to come back soon. We had the best time in the best place🎄🌴🌲
We absolutely loved this place!! The host and the home were perfection. Thank you for everything. We hope to return very soon!
It’s such a peaceful place. I would stay again. Location was perfect for what we wanted.

Highly recommend this beautiful property. It’s the perfect combination of a clean and modern living space with the benefit of a private and relaxing retreat setting. Nicolas provides resources and instructions for everything you may need- however, we ended up needing nothing! Everything was as advertised and couldn’t have been happier to spend our honeymoon here.
Had such a calm and peaceful time with my family at Nicolas’ cabin. Highly recommend!

We had a wonderful stay at Nicolas’s place! The cabin was beautiful, cozy, and in a great location — perfect for a relaxing getaway. Nicolas was a responsive and thoughtful host, and his recommendations for dinner spots were excellent.
Great communication and accommodating . Beautiful inside and out! Loved the linens. Love the fact there is a washer and dryer . Allowed my dog and she loved it!!!Thanks for having us!

If you're thinking about booking a Chaleť cabin experience, book with Nicholas & don't think twice!
The cabin is exact as shown in the photos & truly has such a warm and welcoming charm. With all amenities needed available on site including cooking utensils, spices and even an electric oven, it is the perfect camping experience, with a home feel to it!
I went to celebrate my Mom's 60th Birthday, and my mom was in complete awe of the space and loved every moment of her experience from burgers on the grill, to a rosemary steak dinner in the cabin to closing the night with s'mores, it was a perfect memory created for her special day!
Nicholas was readily available with any guest needs and was so kind from start to finish. A beautiful scenery/home and complete with comfy beds and accommodations, it was the perfect daycation + gift for your loved ones. Thanks a million Nicholas, you were awesome! 5☆ airBnB!
Beautiful place with peaceful surroundings. Would definitely recommend and would love to come back soon.

We are two grownups, two chihuahuas, and a middle schooler who travel upstate from Brooklyn frequently. We had a great stay at the A-Frame and loved how convenient it was to some of our favorite towns and activities.
Amazing house. Had fun there and did tons of activities near by. Dinner in Hudson, yoga in Woodstock, and horseback riding in Windham. Best Daddy daughter’s vacation !!!

From the moment you approach this house from the road, it is stunning, and the interior is just as attractive as the outside. The beds are very comfortable, and the kitchen is functional.  Nicolas was very responsive to any questions we had. As far as the location, the house is in the woods, really beautiful - but still a relatively short drive to anything you might need. The fire pit and sauna really enhanced our experience there.

The Little Green Lake House was everything my husband and I had been looking for in a getaway weekend! The house was directly on a gorgeous lake and was appointed with everything we could need or want for our stay. The provided coffee and tea, record player with records, soaking bath tub, and propane stove were highlights of the weekend. I enjoyed reading my book in the perfectly placed chair with a lake view and laying on the deck at night to watch the stars. We felt right at home in this inviting and well decorated waterfront escape. The beds were comfy, the heated bathroom floor was wonderful, and the provided propane grill on the deck with all the necessary utensils made cooking out easy. We can’t wait to visit again in the warmer months to use the provided boats and swim in the lake! Thank you Ben and Claudia, you truly are super hosts!

Our stay at the Little Green Lake House was perfectly restful and relaxing!!! Initial issues with the door lock were resolved quickly and we truly appreciate the owners responsiveness!!! They were excellent at communication and providing helpful information about the surrounding area!! The cabin was incredibly clean, beautifully decorated, had excellent amenities, super relaxing and perfect for a short getaway!! Even the cold temps and unexpected snow contributed to the relaxing atmosphere!!! We hope to return in the warmer weather and take advantage of all the lake and surrounding area has to offer!! Thanks for a wonderful stay!!!

Ben and Claudia were wonderful hosts. They were kind, responsive, and very thoughtful throughout our stay. Communication was smooth, and they made everything easy and comfortable for us. We really appreciated their hospitality and warm attitude. Thank you both for being such great hosts!
Great place to stay!

Was a lovely lake cabin, accurate to photos. The hosts really took a lot of time to provide recommendations and had a really well curated list of places to see/things to do. They clearly have a lot of love for their home and it’s evident in how they advertise and care for their space.

We booked this gorgeous lake house as our weekend retreat right after eloping Friday morning. From the chaos of the day and traffic, we arrived later than expected in the evening. Our hosts proactively sent a message that they left the porch lights on for our after-dark arrival. It felt like driving to see family!
The moment we walked in, we knew we were home. Cozy, so well decorated, and unbelievable darkness & silence for the most restful sleep.
In the morning, we were in awe of the glistening lake. We could sit out there for the rest of our lives. It felt so hard to leave!
Ben & Claudia are so blessed to have this special home and we feel so grateful to have be able to share it.
Don’t think twice— book it! We will never forget this stay.

Beautiful and charming little lakeside home! My husband and I had a great weekend staying here- everything was so well equipped and decorated so thoughtfully. Such a cozy place to recharge and relax…Had a lot of fun exploring the nearby areas and locals spots for hiking, shopping and food. Thanks for a wonderful stay!

My GF and I spent the weekend up at the lake house for our anniversary and it was absolutely beautiful. The home was cozy and the views off the back deck were stunning. The row boat was absolutely unique and we thoroughly enjoyed an evening lake session. In addition to that we had a fire and cooked some home made meals. The lake house is a gem in the Catskills and it is one of those places that makes you want to come back!
Ben was super proactive and we loved the list of local recommendations for food and shops!
We will absolutely be back!

what a dream the little green lake house is!!! We arrived late Friday night and the directions were perfect (even at midnight). Walking into the cutest, coziest home felt like a hug, but waking up to that view WOW. Truly one of the most serene and peaceful places I’ve ever been.
We ventured out for a hike at Vroman’s, stopped at a farmers market for fresh goodies, and ended the evening cooking dinner on the deck during sunset with a glass of wine. Absolute perfection. 🍷🌄
Ben and Claudia were so kind to offer us a late checkout since we arrived so late, and it made such a difference we loved having a slow morning to enjoy the home before our long drive back. The house is perfectly equipped with everything you could possibly need. I stay at a lot of Airbnbs and usually find myself wishing for “one more thing” but not here!
We truly had the best weekend and can’t wait to come back. You won’t regret booking Ben and Claudia’s home it’s 1000% worth it!

Great place and beautiful home!   Amazing lake front.  I saw a crane land right in front of me (at the end of the dock) one morning.   Amazing.  Very peaceful setting.  Small space as noted but very cozy.  Very comfortable beds too.

We had a wonderful stay! The outdoor space was great- the views, deck, dock, and yard were such a peaceful, relaxing environment. Everything in the house was in great shape and worked well.  There are also a lot of fun attractions in the area, like hikes and farms.  And Ben was very welcoming and responsive.

I stayed at the cottage with a few friends for a relaxing weekend. Ben was a great host and the cottage was welcoming and cozy, exactly as the pictures show. We had several meals on the deck by the lake and made a fire at night. Had coffee in the morning looking out at the lake...just beautiful. We found some great local spots...Scrumpy Ewe Cider and Creekside Collective are highly recommended. Would definitely come back to stay again!

What a place? Five stars from when we showed up. My wife and I used this as base camp for a Baseball Hall of Fame trip. HOF is about 45 minutes away. Easy drive. Cabin is a great place to kick back and relax. Good size yard for our kids to run around. Lake was beautiful and swimmable. Ben’s breakfast and farm recommendations were great.

Our family had a great time at this place. The lake provides for a gorgeous view. Our kids loved jumping off the dock and swimming in the lake. The deck is huge and the perfect place to watch the kids, the sunset, the birds, or just the water. The house is simply yet thoughtfully decorated in a way that fosters relaxation and simple living. The location was a bit remote but that only added to the peacefulness of the setting, and it was still a great jumping off point for exploring the area. Ben was also very communicative leading to and during our stay.
Such a peaceful little lake! We loved our time at the little green cottage.

Great stay at the Lake House - our second time here -  and the amenities, attention to detail, and responsiveness of the hosts are of the highest order. The location and peaceful setting offered the quiet get-away we were seeking, yet Cooperstown and other quaint villages are just a short drive away and great fishing is right off the dock. Highly recommend.
Comfortable home in a great area. We had a wonderful time.
It was a beautiful little green lake house. Much needed relaxing getaway. Thank you again for the experience.
Excellent, relaxing stay with our two children. Will stay longer next time! The house and lake are pristine.

We had a wonderful stay at the Little Green Cabin in Summit, NY! The cabin was exactly as described—clean, cozy, private, and just like the photos. It was perfect for what we needed and offered a peaceful, quiet escape. The host was thoughtful and provided great local recommendations for restaurants and stores, which made our trip even better. Would definitely stay here again!

Ben’s place was awesome!  The location couldn’t be more beautiful.  We swam, used the provided kayak and row boat.  The cabin itself isn’t very big but because the space has been planned out so thoughtfully, it seamed big.  Kitchen was fully stocked with everything you need. Beds were comfortable and the place was spotless. Overall an amazing stay.

We really enjoyed our stay at the Little Green cabin! We loved how the property was right on the lake! We loved seeing the eagle swoop down right in front of the dock! We didn’t realize that the other houses would be so close by, but it wasn’t a problem because nobody was there! The place was immaculately clean and Ben was very responsive to our questions. We loved the decor too, so cute! The lake was really great. My wife swam across and back 2 times! The only small negative was the lack of water pressure in the shower. Also, the kayak was only for one person so that was slightly disappointing. Another kayak or a kayak for two would have been great. (There was a row boat available, but it was on a pulley system that seemed a little complicated for us). Overall, we had a very enjoyable and relaxing stay at this picture-perfect location!

Ben and Claudia's cabin is nothing short of a dream. Thoughtfully curated, you're surrounded by inspiration - from the great Australian Food cookbook to the records player to the comfy reading nook to the gorgeous lake. Highly recommend staying here, probably in any season, if you're looking for an inspiring getaway to unplug.

We loved our short stay at the cabin. It was great having a little piece of the lake all to ourselves, and it was incredibly peaceful. Our family of four fit perfectly, and very much enjoyed our stay. Ben and Claudia did a great job decorating inside and out and were very helpful/responsive with any questions we had. We would highly recommend!
The house was absolutely lovely, great views and cozy vibe!

The Little Green Lakehouse is the perfect place for a peaceful getaway. The view of the lake from the kitchen is amazing, and the house is beautifully designed. The hosts were very welcoming and gave great local recommendations!

I enjoyed my few days at the Little Green Lake House.  Very relaxing.  Comfortable.   Have to say I was really impressed with the way the house was updated and decorated.   Finally caught a couple of fish off the dock once I switched to a smaller size bait.   Using the house as my base, one day I visited the Baseball Hall of Fame in Cooperstown that is about an hour away and on another day I visited 3 covered bridges.
Very peaceful, great place to relax and explore the surrounding area.

What a gem of a place to stay. Beautiful inside and out with such a warm vibe. Perfect place to chill with all the amenities needed for a relaxing spot on the water. Very well maintained and the place was immaculate upon arrival.
Would absolutely stay again!

This was our third time staying at the Little Green House, and it somehow just gets better every time. It’s such a wonderful place to be—calm, cozy, and thoughtfully put together in every way. Everything you need is there, and it all just works. Our toddler even asked for it by name this time, which says a lot. She had the best time, and so did we.
There’s plenty to do, both inside and out, and every part of the house feels considered and cared for. It’s beautiful and just a really special space. The hosts are kind, responsive, and incredibly thoughtful. They always make us feel welcome and are so accommodating whenever we need anything.
We’re so glad we found this place and hope we can keep coming back for a long time.

Staying at Ben and Claudia’s lake house was everything I hoped it would be. It’s absolutely magical!  We were surrounded by beauty and the most comforting sense of peace during our entire stay. The space inside was incredibly clean, comfortable and filled with stunning decor. Ben and Claudia have thought of everything and communicated consistently throughout our stay. Hands down, this was my favorite Airbnb stay I’ve ever had!  We hope to book another weekend in the summer to enjoy the lake fully!  Thank you for sharing your space with us!! 🫶

The lake house was a perfect retreat for a winter long weekend. It was very, very cold and windy during our stay, but we were happy to enjoy relaxing in the cabin. The fireplace, clawfoot tub and heated floors were so nice. Our daughter enjoyed playing the ukelele and we all loved the view over the lake. Hosts were very detailed in giving us information about getting in during bad weather.
The house was adorable and the hosts were great!
The cabin was extremely cozy and we had an amazing time at lake summit!

We very much enjoyed our tranquil stay at Ben and Claudia’s cabin. They hosts were super responsive and helpful, and the place itself is cozy, tasteful and inviting. We went for long walks and had a delicious dinner at the Mill Pond Inn. Would definitely stay again!

We had an excellent stay at Ben and Claudia's Lake House ! We really appreciated the cleaness of the house and the peacefulness of the lake. I would definitely book again to discover the area at a different season :) The well equipped kitchen with all the basic condiments to cook was a real plus.
The house, location itself and the host were perfect. I would definitely recommend and go again myself.

The Green Lake House was an amazing weekend getaway for my partner and I. Everything in the home was very thoughtfully placed, very clean and just as advertised. Ben communicated very clearly and was very accommodating the entire time. 5 stars, high recommend to everyone

The Little Green Lake House was a little slice of heaven amidst the landscapes of upstate New York; an oasis for creatives, a serene getaway to think, love, create, and ultimately slow down to recharge. If you’re looking for the right setting to quietly craft memories, you’ve found it. Ben + Claudia were incredible super-hosts who went above and beyond to craft the space and ensure all our needs were taken care of. My girlfriend and I had an unforgettable weekend celebrating both of our birthdays and we’ll definitely be back when the weather gets warm again Godwilling.

Hit—reserve! This place was perfect for my daughter and I for a long relaxing weekend! The details of this cabin are incredible! We loved the views, the comfortable beds and furniture and the location. We hope to stay there again!

It was a wonderful quiet fall getaway!
Thank you!
Had a fantastic weekend away here. The house was very cosy and in a beautiful setting on the lake. Highly recommend!
absolutely incredible stay at this serene lakehouse. a beautiful little escape, this lake has heavenly sunsets and the house is so cozy and fun. would absolutely come back again :)
The place and area was beautiful. Would love to stay again.

If you are looking for a peaceful retreat in the Catskills, look no further. Wow- this house was perfect. This place is comfortable, well appointed, looks professionally decorated and the views are lovely.  We also appreciated the great communication and comfy bed and furniture.

The “little green house” is the perfect place to relax and enjoy nature!
It’s very welcoming and cozy
There are many amenities throughout the cabin that made our stay extra special
Ben and Claudia are great hosts!

We had another wonderful stay at this charming Airbnb! Having stayed here before, we were so excited to return, and once again, it felt like being welcomed back by old friends lending us their beautiful home.
The location is stunning, and the house is filled with so many thoughtful details that make it feel extra special. We enjoyed every moment—whether we were kayaking, grilling, or just relaxing in the hammock with a good book. The home strikes the perfect balance between being cozy and beautifully designed.
Ben and Claudia are amazing hosts—always quick to communicate and give us the best restaurant recommendations. Staying here truly feels like being at a friend’s place, and we can’t wait to come back again!

This was my first AIRBNB rental, and it didn’t disappoint. It could easily become my new happy place.  It’s surrounded by other cottages, but feels isolated! Communications with Ben couldn’t have been easier. If you plan on using the loft bedroom, please keep in mind the stairs are a little on the steep side (not for those that require assistance with steps).  As to the 4 stars for value, it has nothing to do with the rental property. As stated , it’s my first rental, and the surcharges, taxes, and cleaning fees caught me off guard! Beyond that, I’d definitely rent this cabin again, and would highly recommend it to anyone looking for a nice lakefront getaway.

This cottage is spectacular, the hosts were incredibly friendly, responsive and helpful. The home has incredibly personal touches and is so cozy and comfortable. I can’t say enough about how pleasant this stay was, I highly suggest it for anyone in the area.
Our stay at The Little Green Lake House was absolutely amazing! Two nights of relaxation and beautiful views. The house was clean, cozy and had everything we needed. We can not wait to go back!
Great surroundings, with a beautiful view of the lake.  Great amenities within the AirBnB as well

Definitely loved this cozy home!
Everything went smooth and perfect.
The hosts were also always friendly and attentive with what we asked.
A 5 stars place!
My girlfriends and I had a lovely stay. Amazing and generous hosts who offered us a clean, well-stocked and comfortable stay. Would love to visit again!

Everything about our stay was absolutely perfect. The house was warm and cozy, the views were breathtaking, and the hosts were extremely attentive. Loved the pool table and wood stove. Would come back in a heartbeat!
Great view, nice house, & helpful hosts. Can’t wait to come back in summer.

We thoroughly enjoyed our stay at Leo & Michelle's place. Michelle's friendly responses were almost immediate whenever we had a question. There were so many little extras that created a special personal touch that was much appreciated.  They thought of most everything!  The space was clean, updated, and well stocked.  The view was beautiful.  The only reason I gave the surroundings a  4 star rating is because we didn't realize how close the houses were in the development.  Still, it was quiet and relaxing; exactly what we were hoping for!

I had a wonderful stay at Leo and Michelle's place at Woodland Lake! It was easy to find, a beautiful location on the lake, and a well stocked house with games and pots and pans.  The whole house smelled wonderful when we got in and felt clean. Even with a rainy Saturday, we enjoyed ourselves listening to Spotify on the TV, playing games of pool and other games that we had brought. It was interesting watching the weather change across the lake in front of our eyes, and we didn't even turn on the TV! Overall, a wonderful stay and we would definitely return.  We were honored to be the first guests here, and I'm sure there will be many more.

This is our third visit as a family to Lake Placid, always staying in a hotel close to Mirror Lake.
This time we decided to rent a house since our well-behaved college aged daughters would be bringing their well-behaved boyfriends along with us.
We wanted more room for the 6 of us, to cook our own meals and to be able to have a separate space for the kids to hang out together. Renting Shauna’s house was by far the best decision we ever made! She has thought of everything you’d want/need in a home.
The neighborhood is quiet. The location of the house provides total privacy from the neighbors.
The views from every window are wonderful - especially of the river.
It snowed our entire stay and that just added to the peacefulness and serenity we were seeking.
The house is immaculate and the kitchen is well stocked!
The layout of the house allows for plenty of space for all. Beds and bedding are very comfortable.
We are so grateful, It was the perfect stay!
We cannot wait to return!

one of the best houses where you can spend your vacation well.!!!
+5 Stars

We spent 4 nights in which everyone in our group felt the place was beautiful and homey.  The layout and features are what you would expect in an all-season rental, although we were there for a skiing.  We would highly recommend this home for accommodations.  There were a few minor things that the owner said she would address.    They are not even worth detailing as the issues are not big enough to give a poor review as the owner is responsive.  We are thankful for having had the opportunity to stay in this lovely home!
Shauna’s place is wonderful. Incredibly big and cozy with a wonderful family room and kitchen.
AMAZING stay. Will definitely be booking again! Fantastic house. Has everything you could possibly need. Kitchen was WELL stocked. So comfortable. Absolutely well worth the trip. Will be back!!!

Amazing stay! We loved the home. Immaculately clean and well decorated. Felt like our home away from home.
The location is also incredible. Beautiful, private area on the water. Lots to do in the home. 12 min drive max to everything you’d want to do- hikes, dinner, whatever you like!
Worth it
It is a beautiful and comfortable home, conveniently located. Shauna was very responsive

Shauna, was a wonderful host, made numerous recommendations for the area, and was most accommodating to our late check out request.
The rooms are all large and everything is very clean.All the amenities at this property really make it a must for groups. Our group was 6 adults (3 couples) and we were all super comfortable.
The location and views plus the hot tub, fire pit, canoes/ kayaks, grill etc made this place so great to stay at and enjoy.
Thank you, Shauna!!
very nice

I have only the best of the best review for Shauna’s beautiful lakeside property! This was a dream vacation for our family, and Shaunas place made it a dream come true! Truly a place out of a storybook, and such a relaxing experience! We felt like home the entire time, and the place was in mint condition upon arrival- if I could give this place 10 stars, I would!
We had a great stay at Shauna's. The house and property are gorgeous and spotless. Lake Placid is beautiful. We enjoyed everything the town had to offer. Excellent stay!

Shauna the host was great!  Very responsive with all my questions. Communicated everything very throughly especially in check in day. She even checked in with us mid stay to make sure everything was up to par with our stay. The home was absolutely beautiful!  Everything you could ever need and the location was perfectly placed in Lake Placid. Would highly recommend. And if we ever find ourselves traveling back to Lake Placid we would definitely pick this place over and over again!

What a beautiful place to spend a 4 day vacation with family.  Indoor spaces were beautifully appointed and the outdoor deck and landscaping fit in perfectly with the nature and river that was there to enjoy!  Loved the proximity to the town and restaurants.  Highly recommend this home. -Christa-

What a beautiful home! Our breathes were taken away from the moment we pulled into the driveway. Our host, Shauna, was very communicative and paid attention to every detail. The bedrooms and bathrooms were lovely and spacious accommodating four adult couples. Waking up in the morning, sipping coffee and enjoying the majestic view is what a vacation is all about! Loved our stay there!

We had a fantastic time traveling to Lake Placid for the Ironman!  The house was stunning and had anything we could have thought of!  We were a close walk to the Olympic Oval.  The pictures didn't do the space justice!  Shauna was extremely helpful, responsive, and accommodating.  We were even able to check in a few hours early with our young children.  I would look to rent anytime that we come back into town!  Thanks so much!
Great host and excellent place

We have stayed in several very nice Lake Placid homes and this house was by far the best The home looks lovely in the photos, but it actually exceeded our expectations when we saw it in person. The house mixes both modern and Adirondack styles in the best ways possible. It is a spacious place with three usable floors. The great room and kitchen are amazing and allow for family and community. The outside spaces are as amazing as the inside. The back covered deck/porch is a great place to enjoy the outdoors while shaded. The stone patio is large and delightful. There is a beautiful outdoor dining table, fire pit, and hot tub. The owner also provides kayaks and a canoe. While it is a decent walk into town, it is an amazingly brief drive. It is well worth being a bit away from the commotion of Main Street. We have often stayed right in the village and much prefer this setting due to the privacy, peace and quiet, and the amazing view of the river. This home is outstanding!

Shauna is an excellent host! Beautiful home! We had a wonderful vacation, this house made us feel at home . Everything in the house was exactly as stated in the description. It is an excellent destination for a family vacation!

The house was wonderful and would absolutely stay again! The house does not have AC though so be aware if you are traveling in the summer! Close proximity to downtown for those who don't mind a short walk

This house was fabulous! All you need to bring is clothes and food/drinks. Everything else was provided in the house! From a meat thermometer to plastic sandwich baggies - the kitchen was fully supplied with EVERYTHING you could ever need!
The location was peaceful and beautiful.
Five stars!!!!

The house is very well equipped. Everything you need for the kitchen but also lots of details like games, jigsaw puzzles, movies. Blankets in all the coaches.
Beautiful views and lots of places to enjoy it.
Highly recommended.
Thank you Shauna for sharing your beautiful home.

Beautiful and spacious house in a peaceful location. The kitchen is fully stocked with everything you can imagine, nice touches throughout the house, comfy beds and amazing views. 5 minutes to the town, Lake Placid and beautiful hikes. Hot tub, kayaks and fire pit for you to enjoy. Definitely worth visiting!

We had a great time for an adult get away. The back yard was beautiful and peaceful.  Kitchen was spacious and a great place to hang out and cook. Shauna was easy to contact and friendly to work with. Entire house was clean and the kitchen had everything you needed.

This was the best Airbnb I’ve stayed in!
It was all it advertised and more. Stocked kitchen for people who love to cook, quiet setting on water, close to town and comfort throughout the property! Great outdoor fires had in late afternoons.
Amazing!

A great location in a newer home. Open floor plan was great for the group. One of the better finished homes I’ve stayed in and well-equipped in the kitchen and with serveware. Definitely recommend a stay here and would gladly return.
Beautiful location, well kept home.  Thoughtful little touches, like having a second propane tank for the Weber grill.

Very friendly host. Beautiful house on a dead end street with a ton of little extras. Games, hot tub, kayaks, you name it. Maybe 4 minutes drive from Lake Placid downtown area Great for groups or even a quiet weekend on the river. Would absolutely recommend this stay to anyone looking.
(Same as private comments)

This was a great place to bring the whole family together. We had 7 adults and 2 children and the space was perfect. We loved how close it was to town and nearby trails at Henry Woods. Access to the canoe and kayaks was great. We spent a lot of time paddling right off the dock at the place.

This was the best BnB I have personally stayed at. the location is wonderful and the home itself was incredible! Very close to town and pretty much any location in Lake placid you want to go to is a short walk or drive away! Was the perfect place for me and my friends to stay and I highly recommend staying here!

What an amazing place to stay! Spectacular house in a prime location. The views are amazing, especially early morning. The house provided us many activities to stay entertained. From canoeing and kayaking in the river to playing corn hole out front and playing xbox 360 with some classic sports games. This house has it all. The host are amazing and very responsive with any inquiries. Close walk to town and short drive to the golf course. 10 out of 10 recommend!

Amazing space right on the water. Open floor is great for large groups and the large bedrooms provide privacy. Having access to kayaks and a canoe were a huge plus as well as firewood provided. We could even walk to town! Would 100% stay here again
Our stay was wonderful. Shauna was very responsive and the space is beautiful and quiet. Also it was very clean which is important to us. I highly recommend staying here.

It was a lovely house . Very nicely kept . It was like staying at your home . Very close to the lake and downtown. Lots of restaurants nearby . Wonderful river at the backyard for kayaking and a hot tub . The stay was more comfortable than a hotel . Everything shown at the website is truth . Amazing dinnerware !
I would have given seven stars

What a beautiful clean property. It is set up perfectly set up for a family vacation.
The master suite and bath are huge. The entertainment area downstairs and back patio were very popular with our group.
Great location right on the river but close to town. We would come back any time of year.

The location of this Airbnb couldn’t be any better. The beautiful backyard with river access can entertain just about anyone. The house was meticulously maintained and perfect families and easily accommodated our group of 9. It is an easy walk to all the stores and restaurants. If you’re looking for a nice relaxing get away that’s close to all the attractions you can’t go wrong. I will be recommending this spot to everyone I know.

Had a blast staying here! The house is gorgeous top to bottom with individual heat controls in each room. The sunset views from the hot-tub over the frozen river and snowy landscape was unforgettable.

This is a great option for your stay. The house is  spacious and cozy, the setting absolutely beautiful, and allows for quick access to downtown Lake Placid while also feeling totally private. The house was left immaculately clean. Can't give high enough marks to this listing!
Beautiful home! Perfect for our two families and the house had everything we needed. Loved the hot tub after a long day of skiing. Definitely will come back again.

This was the perfect house for our quiet friends retreat. The hot tub has a phenomenal view, the sheets are choice, and the whole house is thoughtfully organized and so clean. We would absolutely come back again!
A spacious, cozy and clean home with a short distance to town. The perfect home for a long weekend getaway!

We rented Shauna’s place over New Years week and it could not have been more
Perfect. Communication with Shauna before and after our stay was excellent. The house is perfect for a larger family or a few families to stay together. All four bedrooms are spacious and the beds were some of the most comfortable we have ever slept in! Each bedroom and bathroom had everything you would need- extra pillows, linens, towels, etc. The main living room was so cozy with the fireplace and the kitchen had everything you could think of! We never used the hot tub but it is right out the back door and looked perfect. Towels for hot tub use were right by the door. The fire pit out back was perfect for us to sit around and for our kids to make their s’mores! So nice to be able to use the garage for our car and our ski stuff. Close/walking distance to Main st Lake placid and our favorite restaurant, Lisa G’s! Can’t think of one negative except that we were only able to stay a week- we didn’t want to leave! Neighbors are great and the neighborhood is pretty quiet. We loved our stay and will be back!! Thank you, Shauna!

Our stay was great! This home offered the perfect blend of relaxation and adventure. We especially loved unwinding in the sauna and jacuzzi after exhilarating hikes throughout Wilmington. The floor to ceiling windows were my favorite.  It was a joy to spend quality family time surrounded by the peace and beauty of nature. My son said his favorite part was seeing deer from his bed in the upstairs bedroom. We also loved visiting nearby Lake Placid and even trekked out to Plattsburgh. Highly recommend!
We had a great weekend get-away experience at Laura's place. The location is easy to find. The house is clean and neat. All amenities are amazing! Laura is helpful and responsive. Highly recommended!
Highly recommend! The airBnB is perfectly located and has the little things to make the stay extremely comfortable and enjoyable!

We had a wonderful stay at the black pine lodge! Beautiful home in a quiet neighborhood. We loved the hot tub and sauna they were perfect at the end of the day to relax. Laura was responsive and helpful with any questions we had during our stay.
Would recommend to anyone looking for a peaceful getaway!

Beautiful home with lots of natural light and great amenities. I loved relaxing in the hot tub under the full moon with the garden strong lights - very peaceful.
Conveniently close to Whiteface mountain for great skiing.
Beds, linens and towels were clean and felt new.
We'd love to come back - it was lovely!

Excellent house for a weekend away in the woods. Peaceful location with a beautiful 30 min drive to the Mirror Lake downtown area. Host was responsive to questions and requests. I hope to visit again when we can enjoy more of the outdoor space.

We had a lovely time at this vacation house! The location was incredibly convenient for visiting both Lake Placid and Whiteface, making it easy for us to explore the area. The hot tub was a highlight—perfect for unwinding after a day of adventure. We also enjoyed the sauna, though we did feel it could get a bit hotter for the ultimate experience. Everything was super clean and well-maintained, which made our stay even more enjoyable. The power did flicker out for a little bit, but the host was very responsive and helpful, making sure everything was taken care of promptly. We would definitely recommend this place and hope to return!

We are a family of five (3 kids ages 8, 11 and 14) and stayed here for 4 nights. The house was very comfortable and had enough space for all of us. We all slept well (quiet neighborhood, comfortable beds, etc.). One thing to note is that the cell service was almost nonexistent (we have both ATT and Verizon) so the wifi was essential. Laura was super friendly and a great host. We would love to come back and stay here again.

Beautiful cabin! My husband and I were traveling into the area for a wedding and Laura’s place was the perfect spot for us. It was so quiet and private. The amenities were amazing and we enjoyed using the sauna every day. The kitchen was fully stocked and the entire home was very clean. We really enjoyed our stay and would stay here again in the future!

Our group consisted of 3 couples staying at this beautiful Jay cabin. The house is immaculate and the layout is perfect with each couple getting not just their own bathroom, but their own floor. Laura was incredibly responsive to every one of our questions and we had an absolutely fabulous time. The location was very close to Lake Placid, so there were lots of things to do there, but between the hot tub, sauna, gameroom, etc. there was also plenty to do right at the house as well. We would definitely stay here again. <3

Laura's cabin was wonderful. Exactly as described. Such a peaceful location but, only a short, scenic drive from Lake Placid. The setup was perfect for my fiancee and I as well as our friends and their young son with each floor having its own full bath. The sauna and hot tub were easy to use and perfectly located for winter use (not too far from the door 🥶). We have already tallked about coming back in the fall!

We really enjoyed our stay in Laura’s cozy cabin. Fast internet, comfortable bedding and all the important amenities you’d need to really feel at home. The sauna and jacuzzi were fabulous. We would definitely come back again! :)
Perfect family getaway! We enjoyed the sauna, hot tub, pool table, and nice kitchen for cozy dinners at the house. The three bed/three bath set up was lovely also. Would absolutely stay here again!

This house is absolutely stunning and located in a perfect spot—close to everything you could need while still feeling private and serene. The layout and design are fantastic, and we truly enjoyed our stay overall.
However, the home could use a deep cleaning, as it was noticeably dusty in some areas, which affected the overall experience. The water pressure in the master bathroom was also quite low, which was a bit inconvenient. Additionally, the kitchen could benefit from a refresh of its cookware. A few new pots and frying pans would make a big difference for guests who enjoy cooking during their stay.
With a little extra attention to cleanliness and kitchen essentials, this property would be flawless. Despite these minor issues, it’s still a great place to stay, and we’d consider returning 🏠

Laura was an amazing host- clear, professional and proactive communication Thank you so much! The house was amazing, cozy and clean- felt like home. Sauna and jacuzzi were such an amazing extra! Our family truly enjoyed the stay and we are truly thankful to Laura and her beautiful house!

We had a wonderful time at Laura’s place. It did not disappoint; everything looked just like the photo’s. We especially enjoyed how kid-friendly the house was, with plenty of age appropriate toys and amenities. The location was perfect as we weren’t a far drive from local attractions. Laura was a great host!
