We stayed 2 nights to celebrate NYE with our family of 5. The home is beautiful and we really enjoy our time there. The kids especially loved the record player, pool table, games and hot tub.  Short drive to Lake placid where we enjoyed ice skating, restaurants and shopping. We will definitely try to return!

We had a wonderful stay and would definitely return. The surroundings are as beautiful as the photos, and the house was so relaxing and inviting, especially with the Christmas decorations. We enjoyed the pool table, hot tub, and games. Lake Placid offered plenty to do, from the festive town decorations to a spa day, ice skating at the Oval, visiting the Olympic museum, making candles, and skiing at Whiteface Mountain. The host was responsive and accommodating, quickly addressing a minor hot tub issue. An amazing trip overall!

Our stay at Black Pine Lodge was perfect.
The house was beautiful, inside and out. Everything was clean and spotless.
The location was peaceful and incredibly scenic with the snowfall we had during our stay. Laura was a wonderful host. She was very informative and responsive throughout our planning, stay and departure.
My family and I plan to return again in the future.

I can’t say enough good things about my stay here. The space is cozy and gorgeous. It looks so small and quaint from the outside, which made me a bit nervous when I first pulled up. But it is spacious, clean, comfortable, and so well styled. I chose this spot because it’s easily the cutest, most modern place to stay near Lake Placid. Truthfully, I enjoyed it so much I never even left to explore the town! I’m big on cooking and spent most of my time in the gorgeous kitchen, which happened to be exceptionally stocked with tools and appliances. All the amenities were in great condition, no issues enjoying them. Best of all the host Laura was sweet, responsive, and very helpful in the few times I had to reach out with questions during my trip. I’m already planning my next visit!
Lovely cabin, very clean and great hosts.  We would love to come back.

This was an incredible stay and Laura was very attentive to any questions that came up! The sauna and hot tub were amazing, the layout of the house was great with a bedroom on each floor, and there were lots of good walking trails nearby. We would definitely stay here again!
Great stay!

Laura & Neil were very responsive and gave great instructions. While the place was a tad smaller than it looked in pictures, I was very pleased with how nice and clean it was. I would book this place again in a heart beat. The recommendations included with the booking were great. I also recommend to take the 30 minute drive into Lake Placid… cute little town with so much to do.

We absolutely loved the home layout and plan to have another vacation with The Black Pine lodge hopefully in the near future! The amenities were exceptional and much needed for melting away stress and had me in tears with laughter as it was my significant others first time ever using a sauna and he loved it but had a lot of comments about the steam. We love Lake Placid and have come every year for our double birthday + anniversary. We also loved the local recommendations Laura provided in the welcome binder which were spot on exceptional!
We absolutely loved our stay here! It had everything we could have needed and was the perfect place for relaxation!

We recently stayed at Laura’s home in Jay, NY, and it was an amazing experience. The home is nestled in a quiet, secluded area surrounded by nature, offering the perfect retreat for those seeking peace and relaxation. The views are stunning, especially in the mornings, and the setting is ideal for unwinding.
The standout features were the sauna and hot tub. After exploring nearby trails, relaxing in the sauna and soaking in the hot tub was pure bliss. Both are well-maintained and added a luxurious touch to our stay.
Despite the peaceful seclusion, the home is only a 25-minute drive to Lake Placid, where we enjoyed dining, shopping, and the beautiful lake.
Overall, Laura has created a perfect escape with this home. She was a highly responsive host and answered any questions we had during and leading up to our stay. If you’re looking for a place to recharge and connect with nature while enjoying modern comforts, I highly recommend staying here. We can’t wait to return!
Beautiful place, in a great location. Host is very proactive and friendly. Would stay again!
I hesitate to say how amazing this place is because I don’t want people to fall in love with it! Perfection on every level. Can’t wait to come back!
Responsive host with a great property and amenities

Absolutely amazing! Our stay at Black Pine Lodge was nothing short of perfect. This house is beautifully designed, with every detail thoughtfully considered. We all fell in love with this home and it's layout instantly. We especially enjoyed every amenity offered from the fire pit, hot tub, sauna, billiards table, washer/dryer, to the deck. Our only regret was not spending more time at the house! If you are familiar with the ADK, you know driving is a given so don't let this location deter you, just plan your days and meals carefully. A huge thank you to the hosts, Laura and Neil, for putting so much time, energy, and money into this house, and allowing so many others to enjoy!

Laura’s home was everything we were looking for and more. The setting was as beautiful and the house a home. It was a great gathering spot for our family and friends to connect. Laura was always responsive to any question and helpful in troubleshooting minor issues. This was a great experiment and I’d recommend it.

We had a wonderful stay at Laura's beautiful Adirondack home - it was the perfect place to spend a few days in the mountains while we celebrated our  elopement with our closest family. The house was clean, comfortable, bright and had lots of great amenities to enjoy. We would definitely love to stay again! Laura was so kind,  accommodating and responsive throughout the booking process as well. Thanks Laura and family!
Our family had a lovely stay at Black Pine Lodge. Loved the hot tub and fire pit in the guilt back yard. The house was modern and clean.
This cabin was perfect for our bachelorette trip! Laura was very responsive and the place was beautiful! Would definitely stay again. 😊
Beautiful cabin, really comfortable beds, great porch and backyard!

We stayed here for a week and had the best time. The house was clean and had everything we needed. The beds were very comfortable, we enjoyed the porch and gas fireplace during rain showers, and loved the sauna. Laura was quick to answer any questions and we really appreciated all the extra amenities - gas grill, washer/dryer, two fire pit options, hot tub, sauna, nice kitchen appliances, etc.. We were sad to leave and hope to come back again!

Beautiful, clean, and peaceful home with a caring and helpful host. Laura always responded and offered help, and we had a great time using all the provided amenities and essentials in the home. Unfortunately the one misconception (mostly my fault) was that it was practically impossible to get transportation to downtown Lake Placid. We had an absolutely amazing time enjoying our time at the house, and it would be the perfect vacation home if the area could get a reputable taxi company and/or Uber drivers. 10/10 recommend staying here !

We so enjoyed our stay at Black Pine Lodge! The house is beautiful, with so many amenities, and Laura was extremely responsive and helpful as questions arose during our stay. We packed 8 of us into the home, including my 2 young kids and  our German Shepherd, and although I was a little worried about space, it didn't feel crowded at all - in fact, the layout really lends itself perfectly to to a group this size, with a whole floor and bathroom per family. I'd absolutely recommend this beautiful home!

The black pine lodge was a great place to stay. Clean and comfortable with plenty of space for and a large family. Lots of things to do around the lodge and place sights see. Our whole family loved our stay here and  highly recommends it.

My family, dogs and I thoroughly enjoyed our stay at Laura’s airbnb. It was beautiful and well kept and offered everything we could’ve asked for in a cabin. The cabin itself was pristine and very cozy, and the amenities really topped it off. She also kept it really well stocked with anything you may need.

My friends and I celebrated my birthday weekend here and it was perfect. We read in the hot tub and relaxed in the sauna; played pool while listening to vinyls and roasted smores at the campfire. Only 20 minutes from Lake Placid, we were able to rent Kayaks on Mirror Lake which was a wonderful experience among the plentiful recommendations from Laura. The hosts really thought of everything from directions on how to use the appliances to extra towels to an amazing book selection. We truly had an incredible experience here and can’t wait to stay again soon!!

Our family had a wonderful  stay at Laura's house. The house was clean clutter free and had so many special touches. It is close to so many things to do, whiteface summit, Lake Placid, beautiful hikes, golf, cliffside coaster. We had a blast! Plus the deck, the fire pit, jacuzzi, and sauna .

Laura was extremely responsive, accommodating and always available before and during our stay. The lodge is beautiful and provided us with a calm, relaxing atmosphere but within close proximity to everything. The hot tub was great and we were especially grateful that we were able to bring our two fur babies.
We had a lovely stay at Black Pine Lodge! The area was beautiful, the home was gorgeous, and Laura was an incredibly responsive host. It was a very peaceful and enjoyable few days!
Lovely cabin in the ADK providing an elevated experience in the woods

Beautiful place to host a bachelorette if you’re doing a camp vibe. The property is gorgeous, secluded and the I door space is beautiful and modern with a cottage touch. The only downside I will say is that the host said uber would be available to drive our group into town (30 mins away) and when it came time to call the uber / lyft, none were available. If you plan on going out at night, have a dd. Otherwise all was amazing
Definitely a place I will revisit! So much fun for a quick getaway. Thank you Russel Family for your hospitality!

Black Pine Lodge is as beautiful as the photos. Our group loved the sauna, hot tub, and covered porch. The mattresses are the most comfortable we’ve ever slept on in a rental. Laura was a responsive and accommodating host. I highly recommend this home.
Fantastic spot for a getaway.  Loved the surroundings, the sauna and the home was the perfect size.  We would definitely book again.
A beautiful cabin in a serene and scenic location. Host was great, super responsive and gave us detailed instructions for everything ahead of time. We will definitely come back again, we loved it!
Amazing stay! The house is beautifully built, and the surroundings are super peaceful. Nearest town has nice restaurants and is super chill. Totally recommended.

My daughter and I stayed at Nicholas’ beautiful A-frame cabin.  It was a peaceful place to sit back and enjoy nature. His home was immaculate and exceded our expectations.  He is a wonderful, responsive host and we look forward to returning to his beautiful home.
We had such a wonderful stay at Nicola’s place the house was beautiful and surrounded by stunning nature. Everything was peaceful, cozy, and exactly what we needed. Thank you for a lovely experience!
Such a cool cabin in a beautiful setting. Lovely home, comfortable beds, clean and great host! We enjoyed our time and would definitely come back.  Thank you for sharing your cabin!
Such a beautiful place! We had a wonderful time there.
Genuinely a dream come true of a space. Thoughtfully designed, comfortable, and absolutely peaceful. Will definitely be back.

The perfect secluded getaway for those seeking peace and quiet in a gorgeous setting. The home was both cozy and quaint but somehow captured an expansive view of the natural surroundings. Overall, this was easily our best Airbnb stay in years.
absolutely loved our trip and absolutely will book again! thank you Nicolas!

Dear Nicolas, Thank you so much for sharing this beautiful home with us. We had such a wonderful experience! We came to celebrate my fiancé’s birthday, and it truly turned into a memorable getaway.
We absolutely loved the entire home, but my favorite part was the lovely upstairs bedroom with its stunning view of nature—just breathtaking.
Once again, thank you for everything. We hope to come back again soon!
Warmly,
Elizabeth & Chris
Amazing retreat in the Catskills! It was perfect for our two dogs as we traveled through the area.

Nicolas' place is quite literally perfect. The cabin is so beautifully decorated and designed, everything inside and outside is so intentional. You feel like you're in an Architectural Digest magazine. It's so clean inside and the outside feels like a dream. The best place to turn off and relax a bit. It's fantastic for if you need to do work as well. There's a great work space and massive table. Also, if you're a girl traveling alone, it's a great place because you feel very safe there. Can't recommend enough!!
Beautiful modern A-frame cabin tucked away in the woods. Amazing attention to detail on the inside & out. Easy drive to some great hikes & restaurants. We didn’t want to leave!
Beautiful place, well located close to trails and fantastic restaurants in Woodstock, Hudson and saugerties. Great experience. Would stay again!

Nicolas was amazing! He responded very quickly to all our messages, and the house was absolutely beautiful. My family felt very comfortable throughout our stay. Thank you, Nicolas, for an incredible staycation,we truly enjoyed every moment!

Great clean place with a
Great view
A beautiful house in nature, we had a great time. Nicolas was responsive and accommodating.

We absolutely loved our stay here and were kinda sad to leave. It's beautifully and thoughtfully designed and decorated. The entire home exudes a sense of peace and calm - just what we needed on our getaway. Loved all the amenities on site, especially the sauna, grill, a kitchen stocked with plenty of utensils and condiments, board games for kids and even linen sheets! Thank you for hosting us and we hope to come back in the future!

Really enjoyed our stay here! The house was perfect for a relaxing getaway with our pup.
Nicolas has set up the home beautifully with great amenities such as the fire pit, sauna and out door set up, would definitely consider coming back when it's a bit warmer so we could take advantage of the outdoor space even more.
The host provided lots of great local recommendations and proactively checked in to ensure we had everything we needed. Would absolutely recommend staying here.
I absolutely adore this home! It was beautiful, scenic, functional, and comfortable. We really enjoyed our stay in every way.
We loved staying at The Charlie House. It was absolutely beautiful and has everything you need to relax and enjoy nature. Nicolas was very helpful, responsive and friendly. We hope to come back soon!

I booked Nicks house for a quick getaway and birthday surprise for my partner and it far exceeded our expectations. The house is a well designed, modern and sleek space that looked even more beautiful in person. The outdoor sauna was easy to operate and the instructions Nick left were easy to follow. I can’t wait to revisit in the summer with friends! Thanks nick for a wonderful stay!

I had an amazing stay at Nicolas’s place! The home was spotless, beautifully decorated, and had everything I needed for a comfortable visit. The location was perfect—close to everything yet peaceful and quiet. Nicolas was a fantastic host, always responsive and thoughtful, making sure I had everything I needed. I would absolutely stay here again and highly recommend it to anyone looking for a great Airbnb experience. Cheers!

Nicolas has made a custom and authentic experience. The A-frame is filled with natural light and had a view of the catskills through the trees (we visited in mid-March). The sauna worked perfectly, the oven was great, and everything about our stay was fantastic. Nicolas was very communicative. 10/10 experience! Would love to come back!

A beautiful cabin in the woods to wind down and relax. We loved our time here.
The cabin itself was super well equipped and had everything you’d need was also beautifully designed and very cozy.
We loved using the sauna too. It helped make for a spa like getaway!
Nicholas was a great host! Timely and responsive and an absolutely gorgeous A-Frame house. It was exactly what me and my partner needed!
Love the place! We are really enjoyed our stay!
Perfect for my wife, my dog, and myself.   Great location and very cool house!
Great stay ! Perfect location from ski mountains
Extremely comfortable and cozy. Perfectly equipped house for a peaceful getaway in nature. Nicolas was highly responsive, very friendly and helpful. Would recommend to others in a heartbeat.
Such a beautiful place! Peaceful and quiet location but close to a lot of nice places. Nicolas was a great host and responded quickly whenever needed. Would definitely stay here again!
This cabin was very beautiful and peaceful. I definitely look forward to coming back here in the future. Thanks

Our family had a lovely stay at Charlie House!  The home was beautiful and Nicolas was extremely responsive and helpful with nearby activities and restaurants.  We were able to relax and disconnect.  We thoroughly enjoyed our stay and cannot wait to visit again.  If you're thinking about booking, I couldn't recommend this more!

Nicolas has created a wonderful home and compound. It was quiet and relaxing. Nothing else was needed other than ourselves. He was nearby and helpful when needed. Close to town of Woodstock and things to do. We will return.
The house was great same as described on the listing the location is perfect and the host was responsive we are planning to come back soon

We had a wonderful and relaxing stay. The home was cozy and the view of the mountain was amazing. We particularly enjoyed the outdoor fire pit and caught some shooting stars while laying on the deck at night. Can’t wait to visit again!
Wonderful posting. Very comfortable place that is peaceful. Nicolas makes the check in and check out so easy. His recommendations for stuff to do was incredible. Would highly recommend this place!

Nicolas's A-frame cabin was the perfect upstate NY getaway over a long weekend with our family. The place is cozy and modern, with a relaxing feel. Nicolas lives close and was always available during check-in, check-out, or any other times if there's any need. Highly recommended!
Had an amazing time, everything was perfect. Loved the sauna!
Great place to get away. Nicolas is very responsive sending instructions.
The house and the outdoor space were beautiful and we will definitely come back. I can highly recommend Nicola’s place

This A-Frame home is spacious and beautiful.  It is in a quiet, lovely walkable neighborhood.  The host Nicolas is right down the street. He is friendly and eager to make your stay as enjoyable as possible.  The town of Saugerties has some charming, boutique shopping and some delightful restaurants and bakeries.  Highly recommend this property.

Our stay at this charming A-frame cabin was nothing short of magical! I took this trip with my mom and sister, and we all fell in love with the cozy design. The A-frame structure gave the cabin so much character.
One of the highlights of our stay was the sauna, which we preferred to a jacuzzi. It was a great way to relax and unwind. We also relaxed and bonded working on puzzles, making smores, and cozied in the large bed upstairs.
This cabin is not only picturesque but also thoughtfully designed and well-maintained. Every detail—from the inviting interiors to the serene atmosphere—We woke up early and dressed up just to get some good pictures, and took a long walk on the road which was my favorite, overlooking the mountains. Highly recommended for anyone looking for a cozy escape!
Awesome spot
Such a beautiful home and perfect getaway!

We had an absolutely wonderful stay at this beautiful A frame house nestled in the woods! Surrounded by nature, it felt like a perfect escape from the hustle and bustle of everyday life. The house itself is thoughtfully designed, with every detail in place to make guests feel at home and comfortable.
From cozy evenings by the fireplace to mornings spent sipping coffee on the deck with breathtaking forest views, we felt relaxed and rejuvenated throughout our stay. The host was attentive and ensured we had everything we needed, adding thoughtful touches that made our stay even more memorable.
If you’re looking for a peaceful retreat to recharge with family, this is the place to be. We can’t wait to come back!
Absolutely beautiful property with just as gorgeous A frame. We had a great time with our dogs having a relaxing weekend in the woods.

This A frame is a thoughtfully designed retreat. It is perfectly tucked away at the end of a private windy road that provides a peaceful surrounding, while still only being a 15 minute drive from many quaint Catskills towns. Nick’s suggestions for food and activities were spot on as well.
Great fall getaway with our dog and infant! Place has everything you need and the surroundings were beautiful. The outdoor sauna was an amazing amenity to have.
Beautiful place. Beautiful setting and views. Very well maintained and equipped. Absolutely perfect for our stay!

Great host, beautiful home, perfect winter destination!!
Would absolutely stay here again in the future!

We loved Timber Haven Chalet! The house is well-loved, exceptionally clean, cozy, very functional and organized…everything has its place. With lots of thoughtful details. We cooked big breakfasts in the morning, and played games by the fire in the evening.
Great for all kinds of travelers, from families to seniors. Sincere thanks to our hosts! We hope to come back!
Beautiful accomodation in a perfect setting. It was a lovely home away from home for our family of 6
Great cabin. Extremely clean interior. Very functional kitchen and cooking supply. Great view from the patio. Very close to the Adk loj - 15 minute drive to trailhead.

Cynthia’s home was one of the most beautiful homes that I have ever stayed in for my visit to Lake Placid. The location was perfectly situated in Lake Placid but yet also far enough away to be peaceful and private. Cynthia is a very responsive hostess and sent very clear instructions on arrival. I can not speak highly enough about the pristine conditions that we saw when we arrived. There was an abundance of towels,soaps,etc and the kitchen was incredibly clean with every possible thing you would need. The beds are very comfortable and we especially loved the basement bedroom which provided a very romantic atmosphere with the beautiful fireplace. We loved it there so much that we decided to stay in for most of our stay to just soak up the beautiful surroundings and relax by the upstairs fireplace. I highly recommend you book her beautiful home! My husband and I will DEFINITELY be back next year! Thanks so much Cynthia for your hospitality.
Terrific location and a very comfortable, well equipped house!
Everything was wonderful. Easy to find. Close to town.
My family and I had a wonderful stay! Lake Placid is one of our favorite places to visit, and Cynthia's place was perfect for our long holiday weekend. Great location and very peaceful.

Incredible location, very cozy place with easy access to the High Peaks hiking trails! Quick trips into Keene and Lake Placid provided easy access to groceries and good restaurants and Olympic locations.
All in all great place for a long quiet weekend.
My group really enjoyed all the amenities, the proximity to the mountains for some great hiking and Lake placid! I’d recommend to anyone!
Beautiful house. Perfect for our needs. Thanks!
Clean and comfortable with all necessary amenities in a private wooded setting.  Close to amazing mountain views, hiking, and short drive to downtown Lake Placid.  Enjoyable!
Nice and cozy place. Ideal for a few days off. Nice board games to play.
We had a great time & enjoyed our stay in the ADK.
Great location! Close to all but far enough to be peaceful and relaxing!
Excelente alojamiento para familias grandes, todas las comodidades, ambiente super tranquilo para un fin de semana de descanso.
Our favorite place to stay when spending time in Lake Placid. Close to downtown LP by car and just by the IMLP bike loop on Cascade. Perfect for a family or small group of friends.
Wonderful place to stay. Close enough to town but peacefully private and quiet. This was my first air bnb rental and would stay again in a heartbeat
This house was absolutely amazing!  Beautifully decorated.  Wonderful outside gas fireplace.  Beautiful surroundings.  Kitchen was fully stocked.  We truly enjoyed ourselves.
The place was perfect for our weekend trip. It was a good distance from LP and hiking. Very clean. Would definitely stay there again.
Cynthia was an excellent host.  She gave activity recommendations before our stay and was incredibly responsive to our questions during it.
Wonderful place and location

Our small family simply love this place.  It is a bit of peace and heaven.  The size is just right for ourselves and our son. We have stayed several times and everything is always super clean, and they have everything you need for cooking and "shutting down" for some quiet time.  The location is just far away enough from Lake Placid to feel "away", but not to far to quickly go back to town to get supplies forgotten, or to go out for a meal, hiking, skiing..etc.
Cynthia’s place is beautiful, clean, and quiet. The view from the deck is amazing! I love that it is close to Lake Placid but far enough away that it is quiet and private.

You can't go wrong booking this charming place ! will definitely be back!
Thank you Cynthia!

This was my second time staying at Cynthia ‘s home. My first reservation was in February of 2019. Sense my 2019 stay Cynthia has done some beautiful renovations to her home . I’ve stayed at three other abnbs in the Lake Placid area before finding Cynthia’s rental, but the others don’t compare to her location and what she has to offer. I will continue my yearly weekend trips to Lake Placid and look forward to spending the weekend at Cynthia’s Timber Haven Chalet.(5 stars)  Thanks again Cynthia for your awesome hospitality. Gary B. Troy, NY
Cynthia’s home was in a great location to town and whiteface. Cynthia always responded in a timely manner whenever we needed something.
Awesome place with a good view. Close enough to everything in town, but far enough away to enjoy some peace and quiet. I would recommend to anybody.

Great cozy house with amazing location and host . Clean house everything is set up (kitchen stuff ,games etc.) Highly recommend this house for vacation .
Hope we will come back.
Perfect location. Beautiful place. Would love to come back.
Don’t hesitate to book this place. Such a clean home and you’re truly immersed in nature. It’s not far from the main area of Lake Placid or many of the other activities the area offers.
Everything was great with the house

We loved our stay at Timber Haven! The place was super clean, cozy and private. We appreciated that the chalet had a baby gate to keep our little ones away from the stairs (thank you!). Would definitely recommend!

Cynthia was very responsive and polite, easy to communicate with. The cabin was very spacious and easily accommodated 4 adults and 2 preteens. Very well stocked with appliances and plenty of linens. Very clean and nicely decorated. Everyone I’m my group said the beds were comfortable. The cabin sits back in the woods away from traffic and it’s very peaceful. The propane fireplace/table on the deck was our favorite spot. Very short drive into town. We will definitely be renting from Cynthia again!

Place was very cute and conveniently located close to lake placid. It was easy to get into town and easy to drive to hiking locations. Cynthia was very flexible and quick to respond to our questions. We would highly recommend staying here!

Convenient to LP.. convenient to good hiking, kayaking and attractions!  House was clean, grounds were pretty.  Although we had a little trouble with the washer and dryer,  and no fan for the stove it was a great place to call home for a week!

We loved our stay here at Timber Haven! Could not ask for anything more. Grill, gas & wood firepits, comfortable beds and furniture - everything you would want for a relaxing stay. The location was amazing as well. Just a short 6 minute drive to downtown Lake Placid. Hope this place is available next time we visit Lake Placid!
Amazing town, but an even better house. Whenever we go to Lake Placid again, the first place we’ll look to stay if available is Cynthia’s home. Absolutely as good as it gets.
Very nice place in a perfect location for hiking peaks. Me and my family loved it.

We loved staying at Cynthia’s cabin! The location was perfect.. close to town and the trail heads. It was peaceful, comfortable, and clean. For a family of five, we had plenty of room to spread out. We hope to stay here again on our next trip to Lake Placid.

We stayed during ironman weekend and it was set back away from the road so we didnt hear any road noise from traffic. We had a beautiful view of whiteface. Centrally located but far enough away from the village of lake placid. We had an amazing time.
Very nice house. Plenty of room for the 6 of us.

The place looked even better than the pictures. Very nicely decorated with outdoorsy themes, beautiful custom woodwork details, clean & spacious rooms with a lot of closet space. Kitchen is well-stocked with all the necessary utensils, cookwares and tools. No separate dining room but the breakfast bar has enough space with 5 chairs. Location was great too - very close to the downtown area near Mirror Lake. Loved the stay, would stay again if we were to visit the area again. 10/10!

Timber Haven Chalet was great! The location was perfect for getting to the trailheads of the hikes we did and for getting into town for supplies. It is also pretty secluded and it felt like we were all alone in the woods. Our group really enjoyed hanging out on the deck with a cold adult beverage following a long days hike.
Cynthia was a great host and very responsive. The house had all the amenities we needed and we loved the well supplied kitchen.
We would highly recommend staying at Cynthia's place!
Feels like home. Our favorite place to stay in Lake Placid. Comfortable and  close to everything.

Beautiful place in a very nice, quiet neighborhood. Extremely conveniently located to get to Lake Placid and Whiteface.
The chalet has everything you need. It is immaculate and has a great backyard.
Can’t wait to come back.
My family and I very much enjoyed staying at Cynthia's place. The cabin is beautifully cared for, nicely decorated, and well supplied. Incredible view and wonderful location close to great hiking.
Our favorite place to stay in LP. Just by the IMLP bike course, close to downtown , very comfortable and well-equipped kitchen.

Great stay, I would highly recommend! Cynthia was a great host, and had great communication throughout our stay. Everything was exactly as described, very comfortable, everything provided, great location, easy check-in instructions…the list goes on and on! We look forward to coming back in the future!

Excellent place to stay for relaxation and serenity ! Quiet location and pretty view of the lake  surrounded by nature . Cottage was very cozy and pristine . Would definitely return again for some R&R!

My husband and myself had a very relaxing time at Ben’s cabin. The location was beautiful, very clean, very comfortable, felt right at home. Would definitely recommend, we’re looking to come back again. Thank you for a wonderful stay.
Debbie

I spend a weekend with my husband at Ben and Claudia’s cozy lake cabin.  The space has everything you’ll need for relaxation and idyllic time.  I appreciated the yoga matt too, plus wonderful selection of books. With those views you’re feel like in a painting!  We came back relaxed and rejuvenated.  Thank you!

Little greenhouse on the lake was a great place to stay. It was a very peaceful place to  watch and enjoy the lake from inside the house as well as outside. The instructions for use of everything in the house were well organized and communicated before even arriving. Ben the host kept us up to date about everything we needed to know while we stayed. Also listed several local places to eat and go shopping and such. Would definitely go back again.
Magical and peaceful refuge. Hope to return!

I wanted a wonderful experience for myself & my husband for our Anniversary; when Paul pronounced this “idyllic “ I felt so completely satisfied! We loved every moment at Ben’s place, luxurious in the quiet & natural surroundings. The beds & heated bathroom floor couldn’t be beat either!!

Had a fantastic stay in this beautiful cabin. So peaceful being by the lake, and plenty of interesting independent farms / breweries / wineries to visit close by. Ben and Claudia were extremely helpful and flexible regarding our needs. Many thanks! Would happily visit again

We had a wonderful week on Summit Lake. Everything in the cabin was well curated to have exactly what we needed without clutter.  Every detail was considered. The house was very clean when we arrived, and the setting is very peaceful.  The view from the dock is beautiful. The location is surrounded by lovely farmland, and it’s an easy drive to Cooperstown. We hope to return soon!

What a wonderful stay in a perfect and well-appointed space. Ben and Claudia were so friendly and accommodating as hosts.
The lake house had all the amenities and location to make for a peaceful and restorative few days on the lake; we brought our kayaks and had a fine time on the water. In addition, the location was ideal for a day in Cooperstown and exploring the local villages.
Would recommend highly, and hope to return.

The cottage is directly on the gorgeous idyllic lake.  The setting is bucolic, thick with mature trees and well-tended flowers.  I couldn’t stay awake whenever I got in the hammock.  The house is cozy, comfortable and charming - the nice touches suggest the owners spend a lot of time there.  It is a magical place.
Amazing place! Great for a weekend getaway. Communication with Ben was always easy and everything was great! Highly recommended

Wonderful place.  As advertised.  Ben was terrific and very accommodating.  I asked to add on one additional night during stay and adjusted their schedule to accommodate my ask.  I would highly recommend staying at this cabin.  Secluded and quiet.  Clean and well kept.

Ben and Claudia were awesome hosts.  The home and location were absolutely lovely.  Everything was as described and tons of amenities available for a peaceful relaxing weekend.  Ben even had coffee ready to go for us which for me, goes a long was as a small gesture.  We had everything we needed to enjoy the lake front yard and docks.  The kitchen was well stocked and we did cook meals in the kitchen and on the grill with zero issues.  The bathroom was super clean as was the rest of the home. Would absolutely stay here again.
Really nice spot.  Great experience!  Thank you.
Thank you for a lovely stay in your beautiful home!

We had the most beautiful stay at The Little Green Lake House. Such a tranquil, serene setting and a comfortable and beautifully appointed home. So many thoughtful and cozy details. Ben & Claudia were wonderful hosts - dining recommendations via the guidebook were terrific, and we so appreciated their kindness and communication throughout our stay. Would 100% recommend!

This cabin was so adorable, the asthetic was perfect and it was such a nice retreat spot. Nothing was skimped on at this place! Completely worth the money and within a drivable distance to anything we wanted to do. Would 100% recommend this place! #ineverknewineededheatedfloors
It was lovely to look at the water

Ben and Claudia's Little Green Lakehouse was the perfect place for respite. The lake is serene and the wildlife incredible, in the middle of nowhere but somehow still with plenty of recommendations for places to eat and shop. The house has incredible touches everywhere, I would go back again in a heartbeat.

My husband and I had a wonderful relaxing weekend at the Lakehouse. The house was very cozy and had everything we needed. We enjoyed fishing off the dock and going to eat at the Millpond inn. We would love to come back!
Can’t say enough about how perfect this place is. The scenery is fantastic and the house is immaculate. Ben was especially helpful and responsive.
Beautiful home. Can’t wait to stay there again.
Second visit and was exactly as we hoped. Beautiful scenery, simple but elegant cabin, and great weather to observe a solar eclipse! We feel blessed!

We had a great time, it was just what we were looking for, nature, peaceful, relaxing the lake view is amazing. We stayed at the end of March and it was cold but definitely we will be back hopefully in summer so we can enjoy more the outdoor. The place is super clean which I love that. Thanks Ben and Claudia

Had a wonderful time at the cabin for a girls' weekend. It was just what we wanted--peaceful, cozy, with great views and two well-set-up bedrooms. I had to make some changes to dates at the last minute, and Ben was very accommodating. Would love to come back in warmer weather!

I cannot say enough great things about this little piece of heaven.  During my stay I experienced a range of temperatures from 60 to 16 Fahrenheit, rain, snow, intense fog and amazing sunshine.  The lake went from frozen enough that there were people ice fishing on the lake - to being completely defrosted and the last day ducks and even an eagle all made appearances. The little cabin was perfect to comfortably watch all this less than 20 feet from the large beautiful picture windows.   The luxyrious experience of heated floors in the bathroom had to be one of the nicest touches as was the lovely tiny bathtub. The cabin is Incredibly well thought out  regarding both amenities, space designs and aesthetics. I do suggest if possible pick up groceries for your first evening and morning prior to arriving at the cabin - but there are great  grocery stores within 18 minutes of the cabin.  Ben was a gracious host - checking in with me through out my stay and always very responsive.
We had an amazing time there, and we plan to return in the summer. We highly recommend this place, which is worth every penny. we absolutely love it.

We had a lovely winter get away at the lake house! Ben kindly kept an eye on the weather for us and was an attentive host. The recommendations for the area were spot on—we enjoyed dinner at Mill Pond  Inn, brunch at TPs and a visit to the bookstore village in Hobart. The house itself was cozy with thoughtful aesthetic touches. Highly recommended as an inspiring creative retreat!

The stay was incredible. The view was wonderful from the back porch, the log cabin feel the home had, it was hard to even move from the couch because of how comfortable it was. I would recommend this place ten fold, you will not be disappointed. Ben communicated everything effectively and let us know local recommendations.
This was one of the most perfect cabin stays! I would 10000% recommend this place and look forward to coming back!
It was a lovely stay at their Airbnb. It was a perfect, tranquil, and peaceful experience with very responsive and accommodating hosts. We hope to stay again sometime in the near future!

We stayed at the well-appointed Little Green Lake house for six nights including Christmas Day 2023 and had the privilege of enjoying a wonderful view of the frozen lake, having plenty of kitchen accoutrements to prepare a Christmas lunch feast for the four adults and infant comprising our party, and being warm, very comfortable and looked after, and well entertained.  We even had a Christmas tree with lights provided, on which we hung a few Aussie ornaments to celebrate our time together.  There was plenty to do within a short drive;  we can recommend Cobleskill Diner, Mill Pond Inn and Howe’s Caverns.
Really enjoyed our stay here. Beautiful location and space. Can’t recommend highly enough for those looking for a peaceful secluded getaway.

I had an absolutely wonderful experience in this place! The accommodation was not only comfortable but also impeccably clean. The attention to detail and hospitality truly made my stay memorable. The Ben went above and beyond to ensure a pleasant experience. I highly recommend Arnb to anyone seeking a delightful and stress-free getaway. Thank you for providing such a fantastic environment!

It was a very pleasant place to stay and very clean. Every detail was elegant and sophisticated. The majority of the winter experience was spent at home, relaxing. Without a doubt, we would like to return and engage in more outdoor activities by the lake. All in all, highly recommended.
The little green cabin was an amazing, peaceful experience. Everything one could want in a cabin is there. Beautiful inside and out.

What an oasis of calm and comfort! The cottage was charming and the furnishings and decor were obviously well thought out and intentional. Beds were comfy. Loved the heated floor in the bathroom! The gas stove heater kept the place toasty and offered a flickering flame to add to the ambience. There were  interesting books to read, a turntable with LPs (that happened to jive with my taste in music) and a beautiful view of the lake. A friendly and useful guide to the house and nearby amenities/activities was provided. Beautiful rolling countryside to explore. We were there in the off-season and it was very cold, so we couldn’t take advantage of the outdoor amenities, but they looked inviting. Owners responded very quickly to my panicked question about the heater. 😬 I can recommend the Little Green Lake House without reservation!

We had a very nice time staying at the little green lake house. Ben and Claudia were amazing hosts. They were very informative and responsive if we had any questions. The area was perfect for what we were looking for. Quiet, homey, great scenery, and class. If you are looking for a great get away. The little green lake house is perfect.
We loved the lake house,  it was so beautiful and peaceful!!! We had an otter  spotting on the dock while eating breakfast. It was amazing!!

We had such a lovely stay here, so beautiful and peaceful in the fall. The place was super clean and had everything we needed for a relaxing weekend. Great local recommendations and hosts were responsive and helpful. Would love to stay again!

My partner and I recently had the pleasure of spending five days at the Little Green Lake House in Summit, New York, and it was absolutely perfect. The house is beautifully decorated and furnished, with all the extra touches and details that make a place feel like a home. I especially loved the library collection and classic vinyl music collection, which gave the house a warm and inviting atmosphere.
The view from the house is simply stunning. We could sit on the deck for hours, just watching the lake. It was the perfect place to relax and unwind.
The house is also very conveniently located, just a short drive from all the restaurants and attractions in Summit. But, we found ourselves spending so much time at the house that we hardly wanted to leave. It was just so comfortable and cozy.
Overall, we had an amazing stay at the Little Green Lake House. We would highly recommend it to anyone looking for a relaxing and enjoyable vacation. Ben and Claudia designed a space you will love.
The Little Green Lake house was a perfect getaway for a relaxing weekend!  The house was wonderful and cozy!  Loved the tub!  Ben was a great host who was always there to answer any questions!

My husband and I had a beautiful stay at the little green. lake house!  Ben and Claudia are wonderful hosts - the house had every amenity listed and more. The beauty of the region and the property was everything we hoped for! Ben and Claudia were responsive and provided great recommendations! Super clean and well maintained home. We’ll be back!

In one word, spectacular! It’s hard to imagine that one could book a 5 star listing, expect a five star listing and still walk away having had a better experience than you expected! My husband, son and I stayed at this home for “Parents Weekend”. We had a crazy weather weekend but it was delightful because we experienced three seasons in one short trip. The first night we spent cooking a lovely Italian dinner, listening to Van Morrison on the record player with the cozy glow of the fireplace setting the mood. The next morning we were treated to a misty fog that slowly rose from the lake and created the perfect setting for fishing from the dock followed by a hearty breakfast. That evening was warm and the bright sunshine illuminated the lake as we grilled up  dinner on the Weber grill and enjoyed sounds of the lake. The wildlife was wonderful. Chipmunks, Herons, Bald Eagles…it was all there to enjoy! Thank you! We can’t wait to return!
Absolutely, top-notch! One of the nicest and cleanest Airbnb places I’ve ever stayed! I didn’t want to leave.

This was exactly the place I had hoped for! Everything I could have wished for was provided and it was obvious that a great deal of thought and effort had gone into creating a place of tranquility and comfort. I hope we can return someday, but, in any case, I am sure I will think of our time at the Little Green Lakehouse both often and with great fondness. Thanks for sharing your camp with us!

A lovely lakeside cottage, perfect for 4 adults, with a jetty to swim/kayak/row from and a firepit to keep us warm as the summer turns to autumn - there were even some outdoor games to enjoy.
Ben gave us some good instructions and responded quickly to a couple of questions we had, as well as thanking us for a couple of minor things that he might want to address before next season.
We'd definitely like to return.
Lovely spot, easy communication.  Beautiful house: extremely clean and comfortable.  Thanks for a great stay.

If you looked up peaceful, lakeside cabin in a dictionary, there would be a picture of this home. What a gem! So many little luxuries and details that will make you swoon! The vinyl collection was small, but mighty perfect. We opted to not use the larger bed in the loft because the bottom floor bedroom view was so lovely. And the bedding linens smelled amazing. Ben and Claudia are kind and lovely humans with great taste!

This was our first Airbnb experience. It was amazing! I was a bit skeptical going into this, but the little green lake house more than surpassed our expectations. Ben was very responsive, the home was immaculate and beautifully decorated, and the property had everything we needed for a peaceful, relaxing getaway with our grandson.  Little green lake house has a magical charm about it, we highly recommend it to anybody looking for a serene peaceful getaway.

I don’t often say this but THIS IS A MUST STAY!!!
The house was just insanely adorable! It was so cozy, welcoming, gorgeous, I could leave a thousand words here. But you just must check it out!
The host was fabulous!
Loved the stay, the recommendations and the hospitality
Dena is an excellent host and we had a wonderful time staying at her place.  The house was clean, well stocked, and Dena left plenty of local recommendations and guides for us to enjoy our stay.

We had great time staying at Dena home. It felt like there was a lot of thinking when they designed the house. It has great amenities, everything was super clean and Dena was very responsive to any question or request! Well recommended

This place was beautiful! Came here with a group of 9 for a bachelorette party, and it was perfect! Plenty of amenities, exactly as described and in photos, and Dena provided so many great recommendations that really helped our own planning. We used a couple in-house services she listed, including yoga and private chef. Communication was quick and helpful, and there were so many thoughtful details we appreciated, like branding things throughout the house and providing extra things we might need. We loved the outdoor deck and being surrounded by nature. I would definitely come back again and recommend to other groups! Thank you, Dena!

Dena was the most responsive, helpful and generous host we’ve ever had the pleasure of booking with. She was warm and exceptionally communicative from start to finish. Always responded within minutes. The house manual was thorough and clear. And she left the most amazing selection of bread and cheese and dessert in the fridge for my wife’s birthday. Ten out of ten experience. Would book again in a heartbeat!

Dena's place was perfect for my family vacation. It was very tranquil and the views were stunning. The inside was clean and well appointed. Dena is very communicative and she provided a lot of great recommendations - Her hospitality is truly unmatched! If I'm ever back in this area, I would definitely stay here again!

This rental is absolutely wonderful! If I could provide higher than 10/10 I would!! Dena was friendly, responsive, accommodating, and has an incredible eye for interior decoration! The place is beautiful inside and out. From the outdoor sauna, to the hot tub on the deck, to the indoor and outdoor fire pits, game room downstairs, gorgeous kitchen/bbq, stunning outdoor landscape,  and nearby activities (Woodstock, Kaaterskill falls etc.) there’s SO much to see and do! When we arrived Dena left us a plethora of local food goodies in the fridge - baked goods, yogurt/granola, eggs, milk, bread, hummus!  The beds are sooo comfortable. The living room immaculate and spacious. We were a party of 8 but there’s ample space for 10. I can’t wait to return to rent this house in the winter! This was the best place to celebrate my 30th birthday. Thank you Dena!
A Great experience! Dena is a great host . House is super clean and equipped with everything. A great gem .

Dena’s place was stunning! We enjoyed every single second. The house was pristine, with an insane amount of amenities. Anything you think you may need, Dena had thought about it before ❤️. From the moment we stepped into the house we felt right at home. Dena was an amazing host and went above and beyond for anything we needed. Beautiful surroundings, amazing jacuzzi where the kids had so much fun. The rooms, and every corner, were artfully decorated. We celebrated with close family a 40th birthday and the kitchen was super equipped for our birthday celebration. We will definitely return 🤩
Hands down the best place we have ever stayed at in east coast. Very clean property, responsive and friendly host, and outstanding mountain views. Everything was exactly as on pictures.

I could not tell you how much this getaway blew my mind. Dena has thought of everything you’ll need to have an awesome time just staying in or exploring the local nature and antique shops. I’ve never been at an Airbnb where the host was so generous with her welcome basket of goodies. From s’mores to fresh baked breads and pastries, local milk, eggs, and bacon. It was such a surprise to arrive and have such a thoughtful gift waiting for us. The sauna and the Cousy are so therapeutic as this was a Healing getaway. With yoga mats already available and the beautiful weather, we had such a good time doing yoga throughout the day grilling or going antiquing. It is so worth the getaway to hear the magical sounds of nature spotting a few deer and watching the clouds roll by over Hunter Mountain. It’s a shame not to go here in the summer when the crowds are away, and you have all of the parks and swimming holes to yourself, which Dena lists in her guidebook. Stylish, chic, and with a 😉 of humor

Dena has thought of everything! Incredible communication, quiet and peaceful location, beautiful interior space with so many fun tiny details, and gorgeous outdoor views. The hot-tub is heaven. This home is filled with art and so many spaces to relax in. We had an incredible time!

Dena’s place was AMAZING! Perfect location, close to a bunch of small towns and secluded enough to get peace away from the city. Such a relaxing airbnb and she has prepared EVERYTHING you could need. Checked in on us almost daily and was really helpful with local recommendations + super responsive. Could not recommend this place more.
I would book her place again in a HEARTBEAT.
amazing stay. beautiful design and attention to detail. the place is like a spa and home all in one. beautiful and peaceful. highly recommend. and dena was super responsive.

Dena's place was hands down the most fun and thoughtful Airbnb I've ever stayed at. We felt so taken care of from before we even arrived. Dena sent us an incredibly comprehensive guide of things to do and places to go in Hunter, and we arrived to find a fully stocked kitchen with pastries, smores kits, yogurt parfaits, and more. Throughout our stay, Dena was immediately responsive to any questions we had and checked in to make sure we were taken care of.
Dena was very responsive and accommodating, and the level of care and thoughtfulness put into the place is above and beyond. We had a great time and would recommend it in a heartbeat.

This stay was a true gem. Not only was it spotlessly clean, but the host's thoughtfulness shone through in every detail. From the well-stocked kitchen to the cozy living area, everything I needed was right at my fingertips. Communication was smooth, and the peaceful ambiance made for a truly rejuvenating stay. And those local treats? They were so good that we couldn't resist going back for more. Plus, even my kitty seemed content and relaxed during our stay.Highly recommended for anyone looking for a clean, stylish, and comfortable retreat.
Thank You, Dena ! 😌

Dena was the absolute best host our group has ever had. She was above and beyond thoughtful, leaving special treats and gifts to help us celebrate our bride! The home is beautiful and has everything you could need. The amenities and home was beyond well stocked and we all felt extremely comfortable. Dena is super responsive and had amazing recommendations and ideas for things to do in her guestbook! Thank you so much Dena!
Great place for a group cabin weekend!

Our stay at KillerCat Mountain House in Hunter Mountain was nothing short of spectacular!! Truly the best of the best. Dena is an energetic proactive host entirely focused on ensuring her guests have the best  (and seamless) visit. The house is STUNNING. Designed to perfection. This is more like a luxurious hotel than an Airbnb; everything has been carefully considered. Location is utterly desirable. Walking up to a view of the mountain with that giant patio is such a treat. Tons of great hikes, restaurants, bars, activities and much more nearby (all curated and recommended by Dena). We will definitely be back! Thank you for giving us a very special and memorable holiday :)

This is the best of the best @ hunter mountain. Nothing better around. Can't say enough good things about our experience there. The place is clean and everything flows not just random stuff added to a space to make it seem airbnb cool. Going back again for sure.

What a beautiful house, with an awesome host, in a great location. Dena was super responsive, so helpful, and even stocked the fridge and house with items / food that most hosts do not. It was totally not necessary but super appreciative. The house is in an amazing location for skiing/snowboarding on the mountain and was in awesome shape. Highly recommend.

Killercat Mountainhouse exceeded our expectations. The home itself had the most beautiful decor, finishes and design. Dena is the most gracious host, extremely responsive and kind, leaving her home with ameneties  you would find in a 5 star hotel. Even the refridgertor was stocked with local, farm fresh foods. We had an amazing time and will definitely be coming back!

The host literally thought of everything! I’ve stayed in many Airbnb’s and this by far was the best experience. From having some locally sourced items in the fridge for us to the branded house theme embossed on the toilet paper to having items like pain reliever and makeup towelettes- they thought of it all! The kitchen has everything you need to cook a meal without being cluttered. The kids loved the bunk room and separate living space. The adults loved the amazing art, decor and views. Highly recommend!
As advertised, beautiful place. Host was accommodating and responsive.

We had the most amazing stay at Dena’s home! The house was beautiful and had everything we could ever need and was only 5 minutes from the ski slopes. Dena was incredibly responsive and gave us some great recommendations! As a bonus she even left us some local treats to enjoy during our weekend!

This was the perfect airbnb for my friends and I to have a weekend getaway in Hunter. Airbnb was beautiful and in an excellent location. Dena was a great host and made sure we were accommodated. By far one of my best experiences with airbnb!

Our stay at Dena's house was amazing!!! She was the best host. Super super responsive, flexible and helpful with everything. The house was more than fully stocked with all the essentials and way more! Such a great set up and beautiful setting. Would absolutely come back in a second!!!

My friends and I had a wonderful time staying at Dena's place for our ski weekend! This house is incredible and Dena did such a wonderful job making us feel welcome! This is probably my #1 airbnb experience. Dena generously stocked the fridge and left us a smore's kit! The house was full of all the amenities you could wish for, she really has put together a top notch rental and has been very thoughtful of all the things you could possibly need. I would highly recommend anyone to come stay here! Would love to return in the summer to experience the house in a different season. As a host Dena is really responsive to any questions and she also generously allowed us a late check out for free. We had an amazing time!
This house was beautiful thank you for hosting us. We will remember this house forever. This is where we got engaged.

Absolutely amazing. It’s unbelievable to have found such a house in Airbnb. The place has a lot of charm. Everything new. So much appreciation for detail. Truly unique. Highly recommend this house. It’s 5min from Hunter Mtn. It was super easy to go skiing and jump into the jacuzzi straight after. I’ll definitely be coming back.

Great stay with family over Christmas. The open fireplace was well stocked with wood and the spa & sauna were ready to go.
Lots of accommodation & separate spaces for a large group to enjoy.
Dena provided comprehensive, clear instructions for the house and was very responsive.
We particularly appreciated the recommendations for restaurants and activities and the good coffee machine.

What a beautiful stay! Very comfortable for the 8 of us for a pre-holiday get together. Everything we needed in the kitchen to make meals and loved the granola, milk, cheese and fresh bread loaves from a local restaurant. Dena was  a wonderful host. Thank you!

A Purr-fect Retreat on Hunter Mountain - Killer Cat Mountain House was all that and MORE! It was the perfect little winter escape. Dena was beyond gracious and is a TOP TIER host! From the moment we arrived, I was captivated by the charm and unique character of their home. The cozy ambiance immediately made me feel at home, and I couldn't help but appreciate the thought and care that went into crafting such an inviting space.The accommodations were nothing short of exceptional. The highlights of our stay was undoubtedly the stunning view, the hot tub, the fully stocked refrigerator. I was just blown away by Dena's hospitality. Dena is killing it at Killer Cat Mountain House! Go book your stay TODAY! -VB
Excellent home, excellent hosts, excellent memories created. The killer cat mountain house is a killer spot! Worth every penny <3

Stayed here for ~1 week for a team off-site.  Great space with awesome amenities and it was also well suited for co-working.  Very peaceful and private spot surrounded by beautiful nature.  Dena was super friendly and responsive, would recommend!

Our stay was amazing! Dena has mastered the art of hospitality - with an inviting house that also professionally clean and full of charm. The service was that of a high end hotel with the privacy and intimacy of a private home. It was truly an outstanding experience.

This was the BEST Airbnb experience! As someone who travels quite a bit , I’ve never experienced such a responsive host.. Dena made our stay! The home is gorgeous, it is so cozy with great amenities, decor, view and location. The home is like a museum, so thoughtfully decorated with interesting touches.. we loved the moody cat theme! Absolutely recommend and would stay again!

This house was everything we needed! had a beautiful view and great amenities, i will for sure be coming back! highly recommend! Dena was great and very responsive and the place looked even better in person.

Denas place was amazing. So much to do and the view is beautiful. My kids and grandchildren loved the s’mores kit and all the goodies and all the games downstairs! The record player was a huge hit and the fire places! Everything was perfect. We can’t wait to come back soon!
Thank you for a lovely weekend!
Ann

All we can say was wow! and Thank you! What an incredible stay, all of it, Dena, the host, the place, the location, the thoughtfulness and care gone into every part of the experience, from the amazing amenities to the welcome gift and the attention to detail in design and everything in between. We simply loved our stay and will definitely be back, Dena definitely sets the bar very high! Thank you again :)

The house was really nice. The couch was super comfortable. It has all the amenities of home plus some. We really did have everything we needed. The location and view from the house along with the information Dena provided really helped to make the vacation perfect!
Dena is the best host I’ve ever had and have stayed with her twice now! So much dun and so beautiful. It’s perfection.

Dena's home was beautiful, clean, homey and so much to do within the airbnb! My family, extended family, children and pets all had a great stay at Killer Cat! We would definetly reccommend this place!

Phenomenal experience top to bottom- Dena was extremely proactive and helpful at all hours, the perfect hostess. The home was impeccable, spotless, and well decorated. It can be difficult to appease 4 generations, but this experience knocked it out of the park. We really enjoyed the board games, electronic pinball, sauna, soaking tub, hot tub, multiple outdoor areas, ping pong table, hanging chairs, fire pit (with s’mores kits!), etc. This will forever be our go-to in the area!
Dena made you feel at home and made it such a relaxing experience. The house was beautiful down to the finishing touches.

such a great place and Dena is a amazing host !
I had a wonderful time with my family and definitely I recommend this place !
Dena was so responsive and kind! Her home was beautifully decorated, well kept, so clean and so worth it. We had such a great wonderful time and hope to stay there again in the future!

Our family felt like we were in heaven for the two nights  we spent at Dena’s place. There was absolutely no reason to ever leave!  Tons of amenities. And fun . Dena provided delicious treats and healthy offerings.  She was totally responsive. No problems whatsoever. It was an ideal location for a family retreat – we hated to leave.  No sound of suburban gas blowers!  Star gazing at night.  Hot tub a delight! What a great getaway.  Highly recommend.
Such a beautiful home! The attention to detail was greatly appreciated. It had everything we needed and more.  We would love to stay again in the future! Thank you for being such great hosts!

The ADKAframe is a gorgeous home in a beautiful setting. The home is a spacious open concept with lots of areas to enjoy inside and outside. All of your cooking necessities are provided as well as linens and toiletries, games, and a fire pit. We thoroughly enjoyed our stay.

This Airbnb was truly exceptional – a real gem! From the moment we walked in, we could feel the attention to detail. Everything was spotless, beautifully decorated, and equipped with everything you could possibly need. The location was perfect – peaceful, yet close enough to quickly reach bespoke spots of interest or explore the amazing surroundings.
A special highlight was the hosts. So warm, helpful, and welcoming – we felt at home right away. They gave us great tips, even provided some local treats, and were always available without ever being intrusive.
It was more than just a place to stay – it was a true home away from home. We will definitely be back and highly recommend this place to anyone!
Melinda and Rob are truly exceptional hosts.

This place is as described, gorgeous A Frame house in the middle of the woods.
We had an amazing family trip
Melinda is a very good host and was very responsive
All the amenities were there and even more.
I highly recommend this place!
Tremendous location that was exactly what we were hoping for! Will definitely be interested in coming back and telling everyone we know how great it was!
It’s a great place to relax, whether you’re on your own or with loved ones. Perfect for disconnecting and recharging. Melinda was wonderful and responded super quick. We'll be back :)
Overall great stay and would stay again.

Terrific home and experience. The house is beautiful and well stocked. The hosts were super helpful and manage the place like a luxury inn. And it's a great location in the woods with dark skies for stargazing!
I cannot say enough positive words about this charming and extraordinary stay. It is gorgeous, spacious, and fit with all the details one needs for comfort.

We had an amazing stay! The place was beautiful and cozy, exactly what we were looking for. Melinda was super responsive and provided detailed instructions for everything. The space had everything we needed and more. It was a perfect weekend!

The ADK A Frame is a well thought out and perfectly executed
Dream cabin. You’ll be dreaming of building one of your own after spending 5 minutes in this charming and cozy modern mountain retreat. My 2 boys and I visited for a ski/snowboard trip and this place was so cool the boys wanted to relax in the A Frame cabin instead of heading to the mountain. I don’t blame them as the mudroom alone was so convenient and stylish that I found myself taking pictures of all our gear hanging so well organized. It made getting ready to go skiing so much more easier. We had the best time just playing a game and watching some Netflix by the supercool fireplace. The beautiful windows and view of the snow falling outside was literally surreal. A lot of thought and planning went it to building this cabin and making it accommodating for guests as well. Well done!

This place was perfect for a getaway with friends.  Check-in was super easy.  We had an awesome time.  It was close to Lake Placid; but not so close it was full of traffic and noise.  It had all you could ask for and more.  Place is gorgeous inside.  Would highly recommend.  Thank you, Melinda for a wonderful, fun, and peaceful weekend up north.

Melinda and Rob’s A-Frame home was the perfect getaway for our family of four. We arrived during a severe snow storm and they went out of their way (to say the least) to make sure their home was ready for our arrival. It is a beautiful Scandi style house that’s simple yet very Hygge. They thought of every detail and we thoroughly enjoyed our stay.

We had such a wonderful stay at this charming home! From the moment we arrived, it was clear that no detail had been overlooked. The house is brand new, immaculately clean, and so cozy – the perfect place to relax after a day of exploring.
Downstairs, there are two lovely bedrooms and a full bath with a tub – ideal for unwinding. Upstairs offers even more comfort, with a cozy sitting area, another bedroom, and a bathroom with a refreshing shower.
Melinda, our host, was exceptional. Her communication was prompt and clear, and we appreciated the helpful instructions throughout the house. Everything was in perfect working order, making our stay incredibly easy and enjoyable.
Honestly, the only downside was that we didn’t have more time to extend our stay. We would have loved to relax here longer! We highly recommend this place and can't wait to return!
Melinda’s place was great! Looked just like the pictures and had everything we needed!
Gorgeous, thoughtfully designed cottage. Kitchen was very well stocked (beyond expectations) a d the entire cottage was a dream. Close to hiking and skiing -- perfect for a girls weekend!

Our stay here was amazing. The cabin is just like in the pictures and Melinda is awesome at communicating. If you want to have an incredible vacation you should visit this beautiful cabin. I am sure you will not regret it. They have everything you might want or need. Thank you so much Melinda and Rob for sharing this beautiful home of yours with us.

What an absolutely stunning home! Our stay was everything & more. Everything was extremely cozy and clean. Their house is thoughtfully designed, with warm touches throughout, and styled beautifully. It’s well-equipped to make you feel at home, and the perfect getaway spot being located ~30 min from downtown Lake Placid & 20 min from WhiteFace if you’re looking to ski. Most notably: Melinda was an amazing host - amidst a minor waterline break in the area, she was proactive with communicating with me to ensure our stay was uninterrupted. I’d 100% recommend staying at the ADK A-Frame - I’m already planning to visit again!

Amazing home, hosts, and experience! Private street surrounded by trees and very cozy feel. The home design and feel was incredible. There's so much attention detail to the A frame and Melinda was very responsive! Would definitely stay again
What a beautiful home.  We had a great time staying here for Christmas.  The house, surrounding woods, and nearby towns were perfect.
This was our second year staying at Melinda’s house . It’s beautiful . We enjoyed it as much as last year !

Melinda was an incredible host and made the entire Airbnb process from beginning to end flawless. She provided all the information we needed ahead of time and the place was unbelievable inside and out. It was the perfect getaway for our family and is a vacation we will not soon forget. Thank you so much for the accuracy of the location, the cleanliness, the amenities, and the clear instructions. The place was absolutely beautiful and we enjoyed reading through the book of how the place got built! It truly is a special Airbnb and we would love to come back again! <3

What a fantastic place to stay. Everything was exactly as pictured, clean and had all the basics you needed. It was close to multiple towns including lake placid and the North Pole.  It was beautifully decorated and surrounded by gorgeous scenery. We couldn’t have asked for a better place to stay for the weekend. My family and I felt right at home and enjoyed every second of our stay. Melinda was very clear with check in and check out instructions so getting there and inside was very easy. We loved it so much we’re already planning our second weekend away here!

Melinda and Rob’s ADK Aframe was even more picturesque in person than in the photos. The layout is so well though out, and we felt right at home. The kitchen is well stocked for cooking and we really enjoyed the peaceful setting. Clean, comfortable, and just an all around wonderful stay. Such great ambient lighting also added to a relaxing weekend. We wished we were able to extend our stay, and will absolutely be returning for some hiking in the springtime.

We had a wonderful stay at Robert and Melinda‘s place. The cabin is absolutely beautiful, spacious and super cozy. We felt right at home !
The area is breathtaking and so calm. We even saw a few deers :) We had a wonderful time cooking on the outdoor fire pit and chopping our own wood.
The few times we had questions, Melinda answered within minutes.
I highly recommend this wonderful cabin to any nature lover :)

The attention to detail at this Airbnb was absolutely perfect. The kitchen was incredibly well stocked. The space was well set up and comfortable. The space was clean, beautiful, accommodating, welcoming and all around so well thought out for guests. Definitely recommend and definitely will be staying again!
The stay was great. There were no issues checking in and it was very clean with plenty of space for 5 people. Lots of great hikes nearby and the outdoor fire pit area is nice and well stocked.

My family and I loved everything about our stay at this beautiful cabin! The place was beautiful and clean and had everything we needed. The surroundings are private and peaceful. A short drive to Lake Placid which we really enjoyed. Perfect place for a family getaway. We will definitely be back!

ADK frame exceeded our expectations. By far highest quality of air bnb hospitality and comfort with booking and vacationing. Location allows for easy access yet private space allowing us to enjoy the nature around us. We felt as if we were at home and didn’t have to worry about anything else. Highly recommend

Melinda and Rob have created a beautiful oasis getaway in Jay, N.Y., close to Lake Placid - great for a quick day trip or sightseeing around the Adirondacks! Our stay was nothing less than perfect, even if it rained the entire weekend. The pictures do NOT do the Airbnb justice and is a MUST see for an unforgettable stay - worth every penny! Melinda and Rob are extremely responsive, flexible and personable making the stay feel like home away from home.  Thank you again Melinda and Rob, we will definitely be coming back in the future!

We had a small group that stayed here for a long weekend, and we had such a wonderful time. The place itself is wonderful and we had a great experience with Melinda. I certainly plan on returning when I come back to the area!!

Absolutely loved our stay here! The cabin was so cozy and beautiful; we loved the fireplace outside and all the natural light that came into the cabin. Our favorite restaurant from the recs was Forty-Six!
Melinda and Rob’s home is so peaceful and beautiful, and they are lovely hosts. We unfortunately had to leave early due to a situation within our family, but I would love to come back someday.

This cottage was absolutely perfect!  Nice , peaceful site,  very clean, well stocked kitchen, lots of room for 2 couples!   Great location for hiking. We had a wondeful time!  Many thanks to our wonderful and helpful hosts. Would definitely rebook if we plan on returning.  Merci et au revoir!
Great stay would love to come back!
stunning! Beautifully constructed and decorated A frame. The hosts thought of everything to make you feel at home, even down to a s’mores kit to use by the campfire. We cannot wait to visit again!
We celebrated my friends Bachelorette at Melindas beautiful home! Stunning, peaceful, and a quick drive to lake placid.

Rob and Melinda were excellent hosts- very friendly and responsive.  Their cabin was immaculate and everything was exactly as described and posted in the photos.   It was comfortable, quiet, and peaceful.   The beds were comfortable and they thought of everything a guest could possibly need — laundry supplies, coffee, firepit and grill, fully stocked kitchen and baths.  We were thrilled with our acommodations and would definitely recommend staying there!!  It is a beautiful setting in the woods.  About 20 minutes to Lake Placid.  The Country Bear was our favorite breakfast spot — about 10 minutes away.

Our return to Melinda’s place was great..and as an added bonus, great weather. So much to explore on the nature end of things and if you just want to relax, the house is super for that. Overall it’s really ideal.

Staying at ADKAframe was nothing short of magical. Nestled in the breathtaking Adirondacks, this Airbnb is a dream come true for anyone looking to escape the hustle and bustle of everyday life. The A-frame design perfectly complements the natural surroundings, creating a cozy yet modern retreat that feels like a hidden sanctuary in the woods.
From the moment we arrived, we were struck by the attention to detail. The hosts, Melinda and Rob, have clearly put a lot of thought into every aspect of this property. The hosts were incredibly accommodating!
This is a slice of heaven. If you’re looking for a serene getaway in a beautiful setting, this is the place to be.
Cozy place and great host!
Beautiful house, awesome location, great amenities. Hope to return in the future.

I can’t say enough good things about this wonderful property!  Hands down it was the best AirBnb I have ever stayed in.  The hosts were wonderful, anything you would need is available and the property is gorgeous!  Highly recommend!

We love this a-frame cabin so much that we have made this our yearly family trip!
This was our second time here.
Melinda and Rob are amazing hosts and they made sure to pack the house with everything we needed: extra sheets, blankets, soaps, towels and plenty of cooking appliances and condiments to feel just like at home. Can’t recommend this place enough.
Excellent time! Absolutely beautiful.

This is an absolutely amazing new build with amenities galore. Such more than we expected.  The attention to detail was impeccable.  Not to mention the bonus of being given a virtual folio of nearby activities and restaurants complete with an interactive map!  Anything you could ever want is included with your stay here. I highly recommend to anyone wanting the perfect getaway. This place exceeded our expectations and is absolutely beautiful!

We had a wonderful time during our stay, with lots to do around the area. The home was beautiful and peaceful. Communicating with Melinda was easy, she asked about any needs we may have, and was proactive in making sure everything went smoothly, all responses she was quick to reply. Thank you!
Beautiful place to stay and I highly recommend

Absolutely loved our stay at this Airbnb! The accommodation was spotless, comfortable, and peacefully located within the woods with great views and total privacy. The host was incredibly hospitable, and friendly, and went above and beyond to ensure my stay was enjoyable. Highly recommend this Airbnb to anyone visiting the area!

This home, surrounded by beautiful and private grounds, met all our expectations. We felt right “at home” upon arrival and found the accommodations to be excellent. The bedrooms were private and comfy and the living area was warm and inviting. The kitchen was clean and well equipped.
