We would highly recommend Forty Six and The Hungry Trout for delicious dinners.
We also need to mention that Melinda was extremely responsive to any questions we had.
Overall, we would highly recommend lodging at this beautiful and comfortable home
Beautiful house inside and out. Hosts were responsive and helpful. Don’t hesitate to stay here!

We absolutely loved our stay. The place is absolutely gorgeous and was the perfect place to celebrate a special birthday. Thank you Fil & Ellie for sharing your place with us and we’d love to return someday.

My wife and I stayed at Fil and Ellie’s to end a hectic week of celebrating our 25th anniversary. It was exactly what we needed to relax and unwind. The hot tub was amazing, the projector was very cool and the place itself was quiet, peaceful and truly very special.
Randy

Fil and Ellie’s a-frame was perfect for our trip to the Catskills. We had some rainy days and was a good excuse to just relax in their beautiful house. It’s in a great location and was close to all of our favorite spots. Fil and Ellie are lovely and were very gracious hosts. We hope to return!

This is a five-star Airbnb.
From the moment we arrived to our final departure, each detail, moment and experience at Highwoods was outstanding.
The setting of this beautifully design A-Frame is also a star in the show - so peaceful, calm and bucolic. It’s a slice of nature that promotes one’s relaxation and rest - two things we, as tired parents getting away to enjoy our anniversary were in desperate need of!
And boy or boy did Highwoods deliver. From the luxurious showers, delightfully cozy bedding, and lovely living area with awesome projector - we were able to unwind in exactly the ways we wanted.
Our time in the kitchen, enjoying lattes each morning and plenty of space to cook were a highlight as well.
And lest we forget the wood burning hot tub - from building a fire, waiting for the perfect temperature, and finally enjoying a spa like experience - it was simply icing on the beautiful experience Fil and Ellie have thoughtfully crafted.
We can’t wait to return!
Such a beautiful home. Very responsive hosts. Very nice touches they had set up for us like setting out dog bowls and blankets for our dog!
Exactly what you see is what you get! This place is amazing! So homey and the hot tub was amazing! Super close to Woodstock and Saugerties, close to all hiking and dining! 10/10 would go again
Thank you Fil & Ellie for sharing your beautiful home. We had the perfect weekend getaway and truly felt immersed in nature! Everything about your home was perfect 🤩

The A frame home is beautiful inside and out. Inside the home, the interior is well designed creating a serene comfortable and clean space and the outside of the home has great spaces to hangout - the hot tub, fire pit, hammock and bbq grill with a seating and dining area.
Fil and Ellie were welcoming and helpful throughout our stay. We had questions during our stay, and Fil was quick to respond and willing to come by to help us.
My friends and I had a wonderful time staying at the house during our whole stay. We didn’t want to leave so we didn’t!

Ellie and Fil’s
A frame house is absolutely beautiful. The space was spotless probably the cleanest home I have ever stayed in and so peaceful. It felt like a perfect getaway yet it is also conveniently close to a number of charming little towns to explore. Every detail was thoughtful and you can tell how much care they put into hosting. Highly recommend this home if you are looking for a serene pristine stay in a gorgeous setting!

It was a perfect getaway from the hustle and bustle! Spotlessly clean, fully stocked with every amenity, plus a hot tub and fire pit for cozy nights. We loved stargazing from the hammock, absolutely magical. The peaceful wooded setting made it hard to leave.
We left feeling refreshed and grateful for such a beautiful experience.
Fil & Ellie were friendly and responsive. Highly recommend this stay to anyone looking for a serene getaway in nature! 🌲✨

Fil and Ellie’s place is beautiful!
It’s thoughtfully designed and feels both minimalist and completely comfy at the same time. It’s a perfect spot for a peaceful retreat.
Fin and Ellie were on top of everything! Available with immediate answers to any questions we had. They went above and beyond to make sure we were able to make the most out of our short stay and we thank them for that!
We’ll be back!

Fil & Ellie's place was beautiful. Every detail was thought of. Every amenity provided. The home was impeccably designed and super comfortable. Saugerties has ton of fun things to do. Ellie's recommendation to check out North-South Lake and Kaaterskill Falls was spot on. Can't praise the entire experience enough. If you find this rental available, jump on it, immediately! Thanks guys.

Fil & Ellie's home is the gold standard if you need a retreat from the hustle of NYC. The picture's simply don't do justice. Impeccably designed, inside and out. Thought through at the lowest level of detail. You want to disconnect the second you walk into their home. This is before you even see all of the amenities they have to offer. While it's a quick drive to Woodstock & Saugerties for any activity, you could easily do without it. We grilled dinners, drank wine and star gazed. Spent an evening in the hot tub and by the fire pit making s'mores. Everything you could possibly want is right on their property. Fil & Ellie we're also fantastic hosts. Super responsive, easy check-in & check-out, provided a cute Canva deck with info about the house / amenities and always a quick drive away should we need anything additional. From the moment we confirmed the reservation, it was apparent that they care so deeply about us having a good experience. We can't wait to go back.

Fil and Ellie's cabin is a special spot! We had such a peaceful getaway and thoroughly enjoyed all of the thoughtful touches they infused throughout the property. Such a peaceful setting, with stylish yet cozy decor, and well stocked with all you could want from cookware to cozy blankets, robes, and lots of games. They were proactive with their communication and very responsive to our needs. Fabulous hosts! Look forward to visiting again!

We had such a wonderful stay at this A-frame cabin! The design is beautiful and cozy, and it really made our trip feel special. The surrounding area was peaceful and scenic, perfect for relaxing and exploring upstate. Everything was spotless and easy to settle into. Highly recommend for anyone looking for a stylish, comfortable getaway in nature!

Absolutely gorgeous home! Well decorated!!! Lots to do (they have board games, a projector, a hammock, hot tub and fire pit)!!! Peaceful and quiet stay and we were able to drive to towns nearby . Very responsive hosts and we had the chance to meet them in person and they were lovely. We would love to come back anytime we are upstate again!!!!! Cutest Airbnb ever
Fil & Ellie’s home is exactly as described, they were both so responsive, and incredibly helpful throughout the weekend. We absolutely loved staying in their home, and would recommend to anyone.

The Highwood Aframe was an A+ place to stay. Its location is within 20 minutes from many towns one might want to visit. The house is cozy and had everything we needed. We really appreciated the thoughtful design of the home, including the lighting. We stayed during a hot month and the a/c worked well. If we are ever back in the area we would stay here again.
We have a great time at Fil and Ellie’s place. A perfect home based for exploring upstate. Wood fire heater hot tub was a fun highlight!
We had such a wonderful time at Fil & Ellie's place. It looked just like the photos, it was super clean, and incredibly peaceful. We would stay here again in a heartbeat!
Top-shelf, beautiful home!
What a beautiful cabin! If you are looking for peaceful surroundings look no further! The cabin is cozy, clean, beautifully decorated, and well stocked. A hidden gem!

Absolutely gorgeous A-Frame, beautiful views of the surrounding trees, and a stunningly decorated space! Fil & Ellie were more responsive than any other Airbnb hosts we have had, and so accommodating.

My family and I are extremely grateful for our stay at Fil and Ellie’s. The neighborhood was very peaceful and friendly, and the house was spotless clean and well organized. We really liked this Airbnb and would love to come again!
Beautiful space and surroundings.  The cabin itself had everything we wanted and more.  We are looking forward to booking again next year!
Fantastic stay, beautiful house, we had a wonderful time with our family, highly recommend !

Simply perfection! This modern A-frame cabin was an absolute dream. The attention to detail in the design was incredible – every corner felt curated and stylish. Fil & Ellie were great hosts! Then place was as beautiful as the photos and a great location. Accommodated our toddler with a pack & play and high chair which was a huge plus. Thank you!

We had a serene and luxurious stay at Fil and Ellie’s. The inside of the home is comfortable and they seem to have thought of every detail. We so enjoyed the peace and quiet, the views of the beautiful trees, and our soaks in the tub. This felt like a private oasis- a true slice of heaven.
Excellent cabin, peaceful, we will be coming back for sure 👍 😀 😎 👌 🐕🌲🌲🌲🌲

It was an fantastic experience. The house was super clean and thoughtful and just like the pictures. Location is great: very peaceful, green and a great place to relax, while hot tub and barbecue were amazing additions that made this stay unforgettable.

We absolutely loved our stay at Fil & Ellie’s place, it made it the highlight of our trip. From the minute we walked in, it felt so calm. The place is beautiful with all the amenities. Fil & Ellie’s place was the perfect stay for our getaway. Their home is amazing. We were very impressed by the amenities, the cleanliness and attention to detail. This place has everything you’ll need for a great stay. The hosts were also very helpful in answering our questions and assisting us with check-in. I would highly recommend staying here if you have the chance.
Fil and Ellie are great hosts, and the house is charming and has all the amenities! Great spot, and on a quiet road so nice for privacy and spending time outside (especially with our dog).

Thank you for an amazing getaway surrounded by nature but also with all the modern amenities!! Fil and Ellie were so welcoming and friendly, providing us with detailed instructions for any questions we had. Thank you again!

Top tier Airbnb! Excellent space that made us feel right at home… Main living room and kitchen was mellow, minimal and peaceful, outdoor spaces were excellent, bedrooms comfortable, nice drive to and from nearby towns and overall just a great little slice of land to call home for a few days. Amazing place. Every detail taken care of and thought out. Peaceful setting, not a long drive to Woodstock for necessities.
Stay here!!!
The cabin was beautiful, very well supplied, and spotless. Fil and Ellie made us feel welcome, they were gracious and communicative and we had a lovely time!

The beautiful A-Frame was as advertised.  It appeared to be brand new and tastefully decorated.  Great light in the house and very clean and uncluttered. We would definitely stay there again.
Great and relaxing stay. Designed and furnished so beautifully. Great location between Woodstock and Saugerties. Check out alleyway ice cream and get their weirder flavors.

Fil and Ellie were truly exceptional hosts—superhosts in every sense of the word. This was easily one of the best Airbnb stays we’ve ever had. Staying at this Airbnb was an absolute dream! From the moment I walked in, I was struck by how incredibly quiet and peaceful the entire space was – a true sanctuary. We had a great stay. Beautiful cabin, great getaway and location. Thank you to Fil and Ellie for being great hosts.

We had an amazing stay at the cabin. Everything was brand spanking new and very clean. All of the decor was beautiful. So light and airy. The views from the windows of the green trees and blue skies were to die for! The hot tub was also a great plus. Seriously such a beautiful cabin they did a great job designing and decorating it. Would be so nice for a couples getaway but we came with our two little kids and dog and was also great! We def want to come back! Thank you!

I could give infinity stars I would ! Such a lovely place and Fil and Ellie are very nice and super responsive and helpful! This was out of a movie how beautiful the cabin is ! I will definitely be coming back
Gorgeous home and grounds. We had a lovely stay! Very conveniently located as well. Would love to come back!

From the moment I first contacted the host, they were incredibly kind, responsive and accommodating. I had asked if they could arrange for balloons to be on display in the house for my boyfriend’s birthday, and they went above and beyond—working hard to get exactly the ones I wanted. Their attentiveness and thoughtfulness truly made the experience special. The house itself was absolutely stunning. It was spotless, beautifully maintained and came with fantastic amenities. We especially enjoyed the hot tub, fire pit, and fully equipped kitchen, which all made our stay both fun and relaxing. At night, the sky was so clear—you could see a blanket of stars, which added to the calm, magical atmosphere. It’s the perfect place to disconnect, recharge, and enjoy nature. And with Woodstock just 10 minutes away and scenic trails nearby, there’s plenty to explore without losing that sense of seclusion and tranquility. Thank you again so much for everything, and we will definitely be back!

Wow, fantastic place, lovely hosts, great location/area (convenient to Woodstock and Saugerties and beyond), beautifully curated home, amazing kitchen amenities, and most of all ... that hot tub!  Highest recommendation, a  truly lovely peaceful and romantic getaway.  Thanks for having us!

This house is STUNNING! We loved everything about it. Comfortable, spacious, SQUEAKY CLEAN, esthetically beautiful and lots of natural light. Kitchen has great appliances and utensils/pots/pans. Loved the hot tub and fire pit where we roasted marshmallows. The area is very quiet if that's what's you're looking for. Easy drive to Overlook Mountain, Woodstock and other great attractions! Comfortable beds and pillows. STAY HERE!
Thank you to our hosts who were incredibly responsive to any questions we had. We'll be back!
Great view, we had a great memory there. Don't leave any food outside, ants will take them all.
One of the best places I've ever stayed in. Gorgeous house, incredible architecture and great hosts. The town is so cute and the kitchen was well stocked. Will def be back - this was so peaceful
Beautiful stay. This was my favorite Airbnb that I have visited.
Thanks for the great stay!
Beautiful place, one of a kind! 4 minutes from Woodstock center. So calm and peaceful, we absolutely loved it!
I can’t wait to visit again!

Generally, very cool space but prioritizes form over function. E.g. the bathrooms are oddly shaped and organized, toilets are weirdly high up, construction is pretty shoddy, there are ants and lady bugs (??) everywhere, taking the corner stairs from the master to pee in the middle of the night is precarious, etc. Definitely has the wow factor, but also has a wow price so know what you're getting

The Pond House is a work of art, both inside and out. From the timber-framed glass facade to the serene pond views, it feels like stepping into a living painting. The radiant floor heating was pure bliss, and the master bedroom - surrounded by stars - delivered an almost magical connection to nature. The furniture? Absolutely jaw-dropping, though more “style statement” than “curl-up cozy.”
One note: we did encounter some ants in the kitchen, which added a bit of a challenge when it came to food storage, and also in the bedroom upstairs. That said, it wasn’t enough to detract from the beauty and tranquility of this truly unique space. This house is a stunning retreat, perfect for dreamers and nature lovers alike!
Great stay! Beautiful place, highly recommend if you want a relaxing and serine getaway.

Nin’s place wowed us. The design, function, and beauty are world class. I wish I could start every day waking up to that view! The home is comfortable, well appointed, and convenient. This was hands down the best Airbnb experience I’ve ever had. Don’t pass this up!
I cannot wait to go back already! We had such a great time and it was one of the most beautiful homes we have stayed in.

Stunning little house with thoughtful design touches. We enjoyed the cozy living room and stargazing from the primary bedroom. Note that there are no curtains for the wraparound windows, so it's an up-with-the-sun type of experience.
We can’t wait to returned in the hot summer !!

Everything was fine. We encountered heavy rain and icy roads on the way to the town. Thanks Nin’s help, we arrived safely. The house is beautiful and comfortable in every way. It was great to wake up in the morning and see the stream and beautiful woods. In addition, the books on the bookshelf are also great, there are actually several books by Haruki Murakami that I like!

My husband and I had a lovely getaway in Woodstock, New York and The lake house hosted by Nin was amazing! Nin and Ralf were great and easy to communicate with. Their dog Winston is a cutie and loves running around the property. The pictures matched the description and everything was pristine. If you are considering staying, I would recommend it! The home is besides two other homes, but you have total privacy. The land is beautiful filled with hikes and trails to choose from. Nin and Ralf’s recommendations around town were also so helpful! Loved the soothing music as we walked into the home. The house is filled with everything you need. We felt cozy and at home! Enjoy your stay here.

We had a wonderful stay at Nin’s place. We will definitely keep coming back to this house anytime we go upstate. The house has so much charm and is on a beautiful property. The check in process was seamless and the place was incredibly decorated and spotless clean. Nin is a very kind host and extremely responsive. Definitely recommend to everyone!
Really nice place where you feel secluded but still close to the restaurants and shops!
Lovely place with lots of light and tranquil surroundings.  Nin is a great host, friendly and communicates well.
Incredible home. Great host.
Property and views are awesome
We loved this pond house, everything was perfect and Nin was very communicative and helpful, we will definitely be back! Thank you for having us

This home is truly extraordinary. Every detail has been thoughtfully curated to create an experience that is both unique and unforgettable. From the moment you step inside, you’re immersed in an atmosphere that feels like a dream. It’s not just a place to stay—it’s a destination in itself. Words can only go so far to capture its beauty, comfort, and charm—you simply have to experience it to fully appreciate it!

The view was amazing !! Waking up with a ton of natural light looking at a crick with duckies. The house has a lot of style and everything you need for our gateway weekend in nature. Thank you so much.
Great stay and Great house.

House and property were very clean and prepared for our arrival. The game room and arcade was a hit for the kids. All amenities covered, super comfortable, clean, and well decorated.  Would absolutely rent again. Hope to come back again in the summer to enjoy the lake more!

We had an amazing stay here! The house is huge, beautiful, and extremely clean, with so much space for everyone to spread out and be comfortable. The location is super convenient for getting to multiple ski slopes, which made our trip so easy.
The house itself is really nice, and the game room was a highlight. It is beautifully decorated, has tons of games, and is perfect for hanging out and having fun after a long day on the slopes. The kitchen is spacious and fully functional, with plenty of room for cooking and group meals. There are lots of bathrooms, all well stocked with clean towels, which was a big plus for a larger group. We also loved how cozy it felt with plenty of couches, blankets, and overall space to relax.
The host was very friendly and responsive, which made the entire experience smooth and stress free. We would absolutely stay here again and highly recommend it to anyone visiting the area, especially for ski trips.

What a phenomenal house with everything you need to spend amazing time with your family. Our Thanksgiving was so special and wonderful cooking in the huge kitchen, walking to the lake, and our favorite having fun in the game room in the garage. The space was so perfect we didn’t need to leave the house. The host was extremely accommodating and so helpful during the booking process. Thank you for everything!

We loved our stay at the Dockside Manor. This is definitely one of the best Airbnb’s I have ever stayed at. The house is beautiful. The game room is perfect and so much fun. The view from the dock is incredible. We had 21 guys and we were able to fit here. Lake George is about a 25 minute drive and it was so much fun. Would absolutely stay here again and would recommend this place to anyone!!! Also, the hosts were fantastic - thank you Northern Living!!!

Great place to stay a big group. We had a large group and everyone was comfortable and had something do, either swimming, game room, or just taking in the scenery. Host was very helpful and responsive.

We had the BEST time! The house is amazing! Very well stocked with EVERYTHING & ANYTHING you could possibly need. It was also very clean & cozy, we all felt right at home. The game room & hot tub were really the highlight of it all though, we definitely utilized those to the max. We are already planning our next stay! The hosts were also very communicative & responded back very quickly with any questions we had- not to mention they left some goodies for s’mores, for our furry baby & a great bottle of wine. Thank you Northern Living for a beautiful stay!

This house was absolutely gorgeous!! Plenty of space for our party of 12! The game room was a hit with everyone! We all had a great, fun filled weekend! Will definitely be back in the summer when we can enjoy the outdoors more!

I cannot say enough good things about this home! Exactly like the photos portray and stunning. We arrived after dark and all the outside and some inside lights were on which was welcoming and so accommodating. Amazing gift basket with goodies and local recommendations was left for us. The game barn alone would make us book this house over and over again! We loved this place and the host was so responsive and kind. Can only imagine this place in the summer with use of the dock and water access. We will definitely be back!

Thank you for your hospitality. It was so nice to arrive to such a clean and well kept house. The treats were so nice and made our trip extra special, totally forgot s’mores so that was a lifesaver! The house was absolutely beautiful and we felt right at home. We would definitely recommend for anyone looking for a great family vacation!

Great property and even greater host. The house is exactly like the pics. Super clean. It snowed and they were there first thing in the morning to clear the driveway, they even shoveled paths for us to get around to the other amenities away from the house. The house has everything you’ll need. Everything is quality. They didn’t miss anything.
Had a great time! House was very clean and the amenities were awesome.

We had a wonderful stay at Dockside Manor. Beautiful house and grounds with lots to do, quick access to the dock/water, and a super friendly host that was quick to respond and help out with all of our questions. Will definitely be back!
Great place would recommend to stay here

This place is as advertised. Beautiful house with updated appliances and furniture. The game room, kayaks, yard, and basketball court gave us plenty to do during our stay.
Definitely will look to stay here again

We had a wonderful stay here! The property was beautiful and we really enjoyed the amenities, especially the hot tub and game room. The house was nice and spacious and the common spaces were great for hanging out, eating, and playing games with a larger group. The entire space was very clean and beautifully decorated. We appreciated having towels and robes provided for the hot tub as well. Overall, the host was very responsive and accommodating. We would absolutely recommend a stay here!
My friends and I had a great stay at this home. It was roomy and well maintained and lots of entertaining space for all of us!

The space is beautiful and well kept. The house is comfortable for large groups or family. The game room is in a separate building (garage), and is very well equipped. It was odd to receive requests like age of persons in the group,  also requested check in instructions about an hour prior to arrival since I had not received them and these were denied, saying I would get them at check in time. They ended up sending them passed check in time, so not early but yes late? They make you sign an agreement separate from AIRBNB.

Host was amazing.  They left a Happy Birthday Balloon for my father who turned 80.  Everything was well thought out.  Very detailed on what a family would need for the stay. Even the kitchen utensils were surprisingly well stocked and had all different cooking apparatus you can think of.   The game room was amazing and my whole family enjoyed the pool table, foosball, arcade games...  Will definitely be returning to this place in the summer so we can enjoy the summer activities here
Would love to come back.
Great house! We loved it and it was perfect for our group size.

The location and house was fantastic. The access to the lake and facilities were great. Having the lawn, hot tub and game room was incredible. The layout of the house and facilities was perfect for a larger group. Made the location so fun that we didn't want to leave. Would definitely visit again.

I don’t know how to accurately relay in writing how beautiful this AirBnB is with an equally wonderful host! We had an issue with our original AirBnB and booked this the day before check in. What a smooth, smooth process it was considering how short of notice it was.
The property has absolutely everything you need for your stay and MORE! The game room/bar area in the garage is a crowd pleaser, the bathrooms and bedrooms are spacious and everything was clean, clean, clean. And the lake views and waterfront access alone are reason enough to book this space.
The Northern Living Team is top notch, responsive and incredibly helpful and friendly. Everyone in my group raves about this home and we’ve all bookmarked for future events. If you had any doubts on this property, please take our personal recommendation! ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ five star accommodations. No notes 🙌🏼💕
Amazing property, very peaceful. My only regret is that we booked only for 2 nights. Definitely a property that you would want to stay at for 3+ nights.
Beautiful property and home. Very spacious with lots of amenities. The game room in the garage is a lot of fun. The pond and hot tub are fantastic. Responsive and accommodating hosts.
Beautiful house! Ideal for several families with kids.
Fantastic house that exceeded our expectations. Pictures were spot-on. Beautiful views and scenery.

Dockside Manor was everything it promised to be. The weather didn't play along with our outdoor plans, so we made extensive use of the game room. Quite awesome for me to have all those arcade classics come back to life! We hope to return for a longer period next summer so that we can take advantage of the water activities as well.
Beautiful home. Well equipped.

This is an amazing property.  The house is totally new/renovated and open floor plan is great for large groups.  The deck and waterfront area also extremely nice.  The garage turned into a bar/pool table/dart area is great for socializing.  High Recommend this property!
An outstanding property nestled on the shore of a tranquil pond with many amenities to keep our party comprised of four generations entirely happy and content.

Our fall weekend was absolutely perfect! The house was perfect and great for my group of friends. The bar in the garage is such an awesome hang out spot. Fire pit was perfect. We have only good things to say about this place. We can't wait to book again. Thanks Katelyn!

The location was perfect. We took a day trip to Lake George. The hot tub, game room, lake and playground were all on the property. The children, aged 4 thru 15 had a blast in the lake. There were life vests, stand up paddle boards, kayaks and a beautiful large deck for use at the lake. The highlight for the older kids was the poolroom! The kitchen was well equipped, the backyard was beautiful, and the house was welcoming and comfortable.

Tammie and Dave were fantastic hosts and the property was exactly what we needed to get our family together for our Dad’s 80th birthday weekend. The bedrooms and bathrooms were well appointed and cozy for our family, ranging from 80 to 18 months. Although the kitchen was a little small, we were able to prepare many meals as a family and the dining room accommodated us all. The backyard and hot tub were a perfect way for us to get outside and spend time together. We had so much fun!
This place was perfect for a big group of girls! Was extremely easy to get inside and felt super cozy. Tammie was really responsive and reliable. Highly recommend !

We had the best time staying here! It fit a large group of girls comfortably, with a quick drive into town for great bars and restaurants. Tammie was more than accommodating being flexible with check in times and proactive letting us know about upcoming storms. Would happily stay there again and recommend to anyone going to Saratoga with a large group!

We had a wonderful weekend with our college friends. The house was incredibly spacious, giving everyone plenty of room to relax and enjoy time together without ever feeling crowded. It was clean, comfortable, and perfect for a group getaway. The location was ideal — just a quick and easy drive into Saratoga.   Tammy was a great host answering all of our question immediately and offering suggestions for activities.  I would absolutely stay here again and highly recommend it for anyone planning a group trip.

Loved staying here! Great set up, and the amount of beds and bathrooms was such a plus for our group. Location was perfect - everything is about 10 minutes away. Communication was great. Would absolutely book again!

The property is beautiful and very close to downtown! The house is very cozy and clean. I would recommend this property to anyone looking to stay in the area. Tammie is also a great host and very responsive. Thank you!!

Such a wonderful place to stay! Everything was clean, cozy, and well maintained. The host went above and beyond to make sure we were comfortable and even had someone come and plow the driveway when it snowed! The location couldn’t have been better, just a few minute drive from town. We’d love to come back for another trip! Overall a great trip and this home made it even better!

As pictured, beautiful house in beautiful surroundings. Host was very responsive and kind. Bedrooms were separate and private from one another, kitchen has what you need, WiFi worked great, plenty of parking... can't think of a bad thing to say about this listing. Also, Saratoga Springs is a gem.
This was a perfect spot for our family. We loved the seclusion and yet only 5 miles from the great downtown of Saratoga.

Absolutely amazing time at Tammie’s place. The place was stunning ! What a beautiful property inside and out. Not to mention it was also decorated for the holidays with trees, wreaths and lights.
Spacious house, perfect for our party of 15 . The beds were incredibly comfortable. And the bedding in each room was also beautiful and perfectly designed.
The house was immaculate. The kitchen had all of the appliances we needed for our dinners, plenty of glassware and utensils.
Could not have had a better time for our girls get away at Tammie’s place . And it’s true it’s only 5 minutes from downtown which was absolutely perfect.
Thanks so much Tammie !

We had a fantastic stay at Tammie and Dave’s place. It was perfect for a reunion of 12 friends. Plenty of space for everyone to sleep, lots of bathrooms and the multiple living rooms and outdoor space let us spread out and enjoy each other. The kitchen was well equipped for a crowd with plenty of dishes and serving platters etc, there were plenty of towels, lots of parking, plenty of space for trash and recycling and great laundry facilities. It was so close to town but felt secluded with a big back yard. Loved the hot tub and fire pits! The hosts were so accommodating, even letting us get in a bit early. We would highly recommend this home!
Place was great! Will definitely go back!

Our family of 9 adults and 3 kids enjoyed a comfortable stay while attending a wedding at Saratoga National Golf Club.  Location was great for us.  Individual room heat controls was very nice.  Lots of space for our children to play.  Partition of the space was helpful for noise control.  We would stay here again with our family when in the area.
We had the best time at this gorgeous house! Very spacious and clean. Will stay again if we visit the area in the future.
Great stay for 12 guys on golf tournament weekend!
Lovely country setting and yet, it’s also close to the action in Saratoga. Fire pit with plenty of wood was appreciated.
Best place EVER!!!! We will cherish our memories in this house on our wedding weekend. The host was the KINDEST airbnb host I have ever had. We cannot recommend this place ENOUGH!!
Great house and location in Saratoga. Communication was quick and easy from the start. Thanks for a great stay!
The family had a great time. The place was awesome and the host was really friendly and helpful. Would come again
House was perfect for our weekend. Everything was great and we would definitely book again. Thanks again!

Tammie's place was ABSOLUTE PERFECTION for our family! The attention to detail, the cleanliness, and the overall vibe were just incredible. We had such an amazing time and can't wait to come back! Highly recommend to anyone looking for a stress-free and enjoyable stay. Thanks again, Tammie, for making our trip so special! 😊
Great place with great hosts, exactly what we thought we were getting and it was in perfect condition for us. Would go back in a heartbeat

A+
Special shoutout to the air conditioning situation (house was nice and cool at all times!!!).

Tammie’s home was perfect for a large group - spotless, comfortable, private and peaceful yet close to town. Tammie was a great host as well, super responsive and accommodating. We look forward to returning again!

Tammy and David has an amazing place. With 10 of us staying to attend the race track and the a Performance Arts for a concert it was an amazing location. On top of all that, we rented a boat 4 minutes from their place for a four hour cruise on Saratoga Lake. Everyone enjoyed the entire three day stay. With plenty of room for everyone to spread out and enjoy the house, each of them complimented the place. Thank you Tammy and David. Hope to be back next year for possibly a bit longer so we can add some bike riding to the stay.
Tammie was a great host and the house was great!
Great home & location

Tammie & David's place was exactly what our group of 16 was looking for! Their house is beautiful and had plenty of space to sleep everybody. The backyard had plenty of space for fun outdoor activities as well. Highly recommend!
We had a great stay in Saratoga. Meredith responded very timely with the few questions we had! Would recommend
Great house and location! Would recommend staying here if staying in Saratoga.

Had an amazing time staying at this air bnb for my sisters bachelorette party! Hosts were SO responsive and SUPER helpful when need be. This house perfectly fit our large group it was a super quick car ride to get into town. 100% recommend staying here!!

The home was perfect for a group looking to enjoy the Saratoga area. Plenty of space for everyone and easy to get into town. Meredith was an extremely friendly and accompanying host. I would highly recommend staying here.

Great house and awesome location. Meredith was so responsive and helpful with recommendations for the area. We comfortably had 15 people stay here! I highly recommend. Amazing hosts who responded quickly and were very nice!!! 10/10 stay
Had an amazing stay!
We had reserved the location for a team meeting.  It was very lovey and everyone enjoyed the space.
We had an amazing stay! The house was big, clean, well organized, tons of space. The communication, check in, and check out were seamless. Highly recommend staying here, especially for a big group!
It was an amazing place to stay with a large group! So much space and so easy to get downtown. The host was also so quick to respond to us and amazing in helping throughout the weekend!

We had an absolutely incredible weekend. The house was exactly as it was described - all amenities were present, easy to find, and clean. The bedrooms were spotless, and the linens were like new. The property was beautiful, and we had everything we needed. Perhaps most importantly, the host was extremely responsive. We only had a few questions throughout the weekend, but I got responses back within minutes, including when we arrived about half an hour early to the house: the check-in time was adjusted, and we were able to use the code to get in. I would stay here again without a doubt. One of the best Airbnb experiences I have had. HUGE thank you to our host for making our stay so easy!
Highly recommend this place! We had a great time celebrating my sister's bachelorette party. The host, Meredith, was both very communicate and flexible.
We had a group of 9 for a girls trip and this house was perfect! Plenty of room, clean, private  and close to town. Would definitely recommend!
Great stay, the house is beautiful and spacious. The backyard is awesome for a little outdoor getaway. Highly recommend!

The house was perfect size for our group where both adults and kids could have their own space. Overall it was neat and clean, with all the essentials things required for a stay available. The hosts were responsive and provided local suggestions. The location of the house was nice as well, it was close to the main town, and the mountains. Will recommend this house.
Tammie was an excellent host! She was flexible and communicative and he house comfortably fit our big group.

We stayed her with 13 girls for a bachelorette and it was perfect!! So spacious and there was plenty of sleeping spaces and bathrooms for everyone. We really appreciated the large dining room and living rooms as well! The kitchen was well stocked and had everything we needed and more. We loved the hot tub and it was a nice extra feature! The host was very responsive and helpful too! She allowed me and earlier check-in and provided clear instructions on everything. It also snowed a lot while we were there and they had snow removal done for us. The Airbnb was less than 10 minutes from downtown and a great location for us as we went downtown 3 times during our stay. I would absolutely stay here again!!

Very happy with our stay at this house! It was very spacious for our large group, enough seating at the dinner table for everyone to eat together, and looked just like the photos. Beds and pillows were comfortable which is always an added plus! Also very quick drive to restaurants/shops.

This place was amazing! We were here for a girls retreat and the space worked perfectly for our large group. Tammie was very responsive and accommodating to meet our needs.  It was private but close to downtown Saratoga Springs. It was tastefully decorated and such a fun house to just hang out in. It was clean and truly a joy to stay here.

Tammie and David were amazing hosts. Extremely responsive and helpful for all of my family’s needs. The location can’t be beat, beautiful country in the winter months and located within a short drive to anything you could possibly need.

Tammie’s place was an amazing place to stay during our friends and family thanksgiving trip.
There was a lot of attention put into the details from sending us early in advance the list of available tools for cooking, to letting us a small word in the kitchen.
We look forward to come back soon!

We had a large group for Friendsgiving and couldn't have asked for a better time. The house was great and offered comfy sleeping for all!  The kids all had a blast and the woodstove made the house feel so cozy while we were cooking away! The home was nicely decorated, kitchen well appointed, and  the hot tub and outside fire pit we're both enjoyed all weekend! The back yard was excellent for games & scavenger hunts, and a quiet street is nice for walking, yet it is conveniently located downtown.  Ample parking for 7 cars! Tammie and David are 5 star hosts!
We loved her house! It was perfect and extremely spacious. We found everything easily and it had all we could need! It was a perfect location for enjoying the outdoors and the town.
Beautiful, relaxing lake-front home. We had a great stay.

Christie was such a great host ! Her communication & accurate description of the home was spot on.  The kitchen was spacious as described. The home is very well maintained & clean…Now , The view ..The View ..The view , OMG !! Dinner each night in the porch area & what a view !! When it rained on us 1 day we just played games & had fun in the living room and even with the rain …What a View !! Hanging above the boat dock ….. You know it What a View !!

We had an incredible stay and could not have asked for anything more from this rental. The location and views cannot be beat and my kids had the “best day ever” (in their words) every day they were there.
Wonderful week on a beautiful lake!

Such a great location on the lake with gorgeous sunset views. Absolutely loved the dock area. Great view of Fireworks on Thursday night. Good size kitchen with everything we needed. Appreciated the nice laundry area as well.

Overall the house was not worth the price. The photos of the house looked nicer than it did in person. That said the owners provided a very nice kitchen with plenty of utilities and utensils to cook. The views from the living room and the deck above the dock were unbeatable. Unfortunately there were a lot of mouse droppings under the upstairs beds. There were ants all over the kitchen. The upstairs doors had nails sticking out of it. The screened in deck had holes in the screen and rotten wood making it very unsafe for small kids to be around. The banisters on the stairs were very loose. Some of the outlets inside the home are very old and do not function properly. Near the dock there are two exposed electrical wires without conduit just held up by electrical tape which can potentially be very dangerous. The deck above the dock has numerous soft spots when you step on it, showing its age and could also be a safety concern. It also would’ve have been appreciated if the back doors locke

Beautiful home in an amazing location.  This is the perfect place to spend a weekend with friends and family.  The dock/deck out on the water create the ideal setting to unwind. The house has plenty of space for cooking, hanging out, and sleeping.  Rain or shine, you will feel very comfortable and at home at this lake house.  Would definitely stay here again.

Amazing property! We had the best time here and will hopefully be back next year. The house is well stocked with everything you need to cook etc, the linens are provided and are clean and smell fresh, but most importantly is the lake! Having the boat there was amazing and the sun deck is awesome. It was great to keep all the kids closed in up there with the gate and the view is amazing. Perfect spot for a family vacation!!!
Great place!!! Well STOCKED … great location!   Great communication!!

The location is just gorgeous. You can’t beat the view of the lake and mountains out from the living room and the screened in back porch. The week we stayed was a 95 degree heat wave but it felt 10-15 degrees cooler with the water and the shade of the porch. We were very comfortable with the AC units inside the house.
The property is rustic - so let the family know there is likely going to be a few bugs that get in- and to keep the windows shut at night especially. Our stay was relaxing and the host was very responsive. The property had all the tools to readily prepare dinner for 10 people. (And lots of space for 10 people to eat and play board games, watch Netflix, or work without being in each other’s way). Like others said the drive way is very steep compared to what we were used to in the flat Midwest. Altogether my family had an excellent vacation at this home.

Awesome place, super nice, perfect Lake George location, Christie reached out a week before check in and also the day of. We were allowed to get in to the house early, perfect host, perfect house, perfect experience. Thank you!
Perfect spot for a few families with a lot of kids to enjoy a long weekend! Despite a full 24hrs of rain, we had a blast and greatly enjoyed the beautiful views and cozy home. Definitely recommend!

Great location, right on lake with boat slip and deck above!
Very nice and responsive host.
Clean and spacious home.
Thank you for hosting us.

The rustic house on the Lake George was just as described.  Our hosts were responsive when needed.  The lake access, dock and over-dock porch were wonderful for soaking in the sun, the view and of the course the lovely lake itself.  The bedding was comfortable.  The living room had a glorious view and the adjoining screened-in porch shared it and made for a nice room to relax after the sun went down.  We barbecued one day on the water and could have also done so by the kitchen (2 barbecues).  We very much enjoyed our stay and would visit again.
Beautiful views, felt like home, amazing host and highly recommend
This was a great stay. We enjoyed the deck, and screened in porch. Thank you!

Great for family gathering. Plenty of room and different places to hang out including large living room, beautifully remodeled  kitchen with large island, large screened in porch and  large roof over the dock with table, chairs and couches. Beautiful views of the lake from almost every room in the house.

The home looked like it hadn’t been cleaned in months. Upon arrival there were half drank drinks in one of the bedrooms, spiderwebs and bugs in every light fixture and corner, dirt in the sheets of one of the made beds, none of the AC units are sealed properly so there are tons of bugs in the house, the bathroom doors don’t close or lock properly so there is little privacy while in the bathroom, there are holes in the screened in porch which really defeated the purpose of having it, the bannister was broken and had nails and screws sticking out of it, the outdoor cushions were dirty and stained and the new railing on the boathouse was shaky and unstable. Upon bringing these issues to the owners attention she told us that it was a rustic Adirondack home and that was to be expected, but rustic does not excuse the fact that the home wasn’t properly maintained or cleaned. Setting that aside, the kitchen seemed to be recently renovated and was very nice and clean, the location was great and we enjoyed our time on the lake and in the surrounding area.
If you are looking for a Lakehouse look no further! The location, the house and dock are incredible! Less than 10 min to lake George village and the house has everything you’d need! 10/10 recommend

The driveway is very steep coming in and is a little scary pulling out. The house is very nice and clean. The view of the lake from the living room and balcony is very nice. Very comfortable house near the village of Lake George.

Christie, delivered excellent hosting at 14 Fantastic Place on Lake George as promised. Use of the dock was so much appreciated and the weather allowed us to boat and swim the entire weekend! Your property manager Jennifer was always available, although I just needed to reach out to her with a question about parking. We also loved the screened in porch which allowed the beautiful view of Lake George and no bugs! The house was comfortable and spacious and had plenty of towels, soap, laundry use, and everything you would need in the kitchen. Everyone in our family get together had a great time. We would book again.

Location on the lake and proximity to downtown area was really wonderful. The house offers a great space to explore the surrounding areas. The house was very clean and the host was helpful and attentive.

The house is in a mind blowing location on the lake and the views are to die for. The check in process was awesome and smooth with great communication. House could use a deep cleaning and some general maintenance as well. The neighbors were a bit too loud and partied till 230am on a Friday night. You can hear everything unfortunately because they are right outside the window on the lake in a screened in porch area. I’m sure this doesn’t happen all the time. But on one of the nights it kept us up and our kids till 230am when we finally fell asleep.

Absolutely gorgeous spot right on the lake.  Our family had a great time and we hope to be back someday sooner than later!  The hosts were very gracious and helpful.  Super quick responses for any questions we had.  Our family was sad to leave.
This location was the perfect getaway at for a relaxing weekend of fishing and boating. The view from the house and sun deck were amazing!
Great location. We had a nice time. The upper dock patio area needs to be replaced or braced as it moves.

We had a FANTASTIC stay in Lake George. The view was incredible and location super close to downtown Lake George. The house definitely has a rustic feel to it, but was comfortable and opened up to the main attraction of the lakefront.
Christie was very prompt and helpful in communication during our stay. We had a slight snafu while booking and would recommend ensuring that you're speaking with Christie, rather than her brother.
Nice big house that easily fit the 12 of us. Nice views of the lake and close but not too close to the village.

This was my first trip to Lake George and I will not forget it. The house has all the amenities as advertised! Perfect lake house on the water with a dock, great views, grassy areas to grill outside, relax on the hammock or above the dock when you’re not on the boat etc etc. When you’re back from a long day on the water the living room is very large with comfortable recliners and leather couches to relax in with the AC on - all with the backdrop of the lake nestled in the Adirondacks. The kitchen is well equipped and they have tables outside, in the screened in porch or on the dock to enjoy dinner.
The host is very responsive, helpful, and easy going. 5/5
Great place in an absolutely perfect location.  Quiet and tranquil with stunning views.  Wonderful host!

Made great memories with my family. The views, docking the jetski, the deck on the dock, the sunroom all the above made it possible! One for the books! Would def recommended and have already recommended it to people. Would love to go back again.
Great location!!! View is unreal. Boat dock is great. Rented a boat and docked overnight. Not far from town. Great communication. Would definitely stay here again.

The house has plenty of space for accommodating large groups. The host was incredibly responsive and accommodating to our needs.  The location is ideal as it is about a 5 minute drive from Lake George Village. I would definitely recommend!

Usually, when a property shows a view of a lake, you don't actually expect to wake up to and see a lake from your bedroom balcony. Fantastic location with wonderful hosts. Great communication and local information

Great few days with family. Nice size home for group of 9 people. Wonderful location and dock access to the lake. Able to rent a 10 person pontoon boat and used dock at the house. Hosts were helpful and responsive.
Great place!
As described and met expectations! Thank you!

Susan was a lovely host. The space was a wonderful and cozy place to have a reunion with best friends and their families. It has lots of options for kids and felt like a really special home that meant something to the owners.

To say this home and property is beautiful is an understatement…. It’s incredible. Well kept, very neat and clean, along with all of the amenities one could want. Very spacious home. Games for fun (pool table, ping pong, basketball game).Kitchen had everything we needed to cook, coffee pods for the morning. Susan recommended a couple excellent restaurants within 5 mins. Very close to downtown area and convenient to everything we needed. This is a 5 star home and host, I’ll be sure to come back.
This house amazing. Susan was so nice, allowed early check-in and offered a late check out. This is the second time staying in this home and look forward to staying there again.

I hosted a friendsgiving here with 16 friends and it was perfect. We stayed at the house the entire weekend (did not leave once!) We also played a murder mystery in the house and i could not think of a more perfect setting.
We kept alternating between playing the various sports and games on the property, relaxing in the hot tub, and cooking + dining in the wonderful kitchen area.
This is the perfect place if you are not trying to leave the house!
We had a great friends reunion. The house and property were perfect for a large group. We had an excellent stay abs look forward to coming back in 2026!

We stayed at Susan’s wonderful estate over a long weekend with families and children. The place is fantastic and played out perfect. It is secluded enough for privacy but close enough to all local amenities.
The house is spectacular and has such charm. It is large enough to accommodate multiple people/family’s whilst still having so many choices of areas to congregate.
Every room has its own character and we could tell thought and detail were put into the design.
The outside is just perfect. The pool area is private and has so much seating and lounging options for everyone. It has its own bathroom and pool house with fridge you can literally spend all day out there.
The playground is the best I have ever seen and is set up for children of all ages. This was definitely the highlight for the children
Overall this is the best AirBnB experience I have had in my 16 years of using it. Susan was fantastic from start to finish.

Susan’s home is absolutely stunning—the perfect spot for a relaxing getaway with a large group. The house matched the description perfectly and was stocked with every amenity we could have hoped for. I can’t recommend it enough!

The perfect vacation home! We enjoyed every detail! Susan the host was very helpful and responsive. Exactly like the pictures. Endless entertainment for kids and adults on this magnificent property. Highly recommend! Can’t wait to come back!
We had a great experience. The home was well suited for 5 families with young children. We would stay here again. Susan was an excellent host.
Nice family vacation! Grandkids loved the pool!

This is one of the best Airbnbs I’ve ever stayed at! This house is HUGE, bigger than the photos make it look. Although close to Lake George and Glens Falls (both of which you should check out! Especially the quirky Shirt Factory!), you really feel like you’re very remote. It’s very quiet and peaceful. I booked the space for a writing retreat with 8 colleagues/friends of mine, and it was plenty of space for us, with places for us to work separately (the sun room is a dream!) and also together as a big group. Getting to do the initial exploration and pick rooms was so much fun. The house was extremely clean and the kitchen was very well-stocked. The pool and hot tub were both wonderful. The furniture and decor are plentiful and fun, making you really feel at home. Everything in the house is well-loved but in good shape. The one thing that could use updating is the mattresses: some of the beds were not as comfortable as they could have been. Susan was very helpful and easy to reach!

We had a great family outing in celebration of our mother’s 75th birthday. The house was perfect for our large group. Susan was a great host - responsive, flexible and accommodating. Highly recommend!
Great stay! Tons of space and lots of bedrooms. Very helpful instructions from the host throughout the weekend.
Amazing place and house!

This was a lovely property that fit the needs of my team who had traveled in from across the country for our team meeting. There were 11 of us and we all had beds. The bedrooms were all pretty great and everyone was amazed by the space. Very cool house.
Susan and her house were lovely. She is a great host and the house is fabulous. It was so big we didn’t even find some rooms until the morning of check out! Would definitely rent again.
We had a family reunion to celebrate our dad's retirement. We had a great experience. There was a ton of room and everything was very clear. We've already requested to come back and stay for longer.
Gran experiencia familiar. La casa cuenta con todos los espacios para que tanto niños como adultos pasen una agradable estancia.

“My stay at this stunning mansion was nothing short of magical! From the moment I arrived, I was blown away by the immaculate attention to detail and luxurious design. The home is even more breathtaking than the photos, with spacious rooms, elegant furnishings, and every amenity you could possibly need for a perfect getaway.
The kitchen was fully equipped, making it a joy to cook and gather with my family, and the bedrooms were luxurious sanctuaries with plush bedding and amazing decor.
The hosts went above and beyond, ensuring everything was perfect with thoughtful touches and clear communication. This mansion is the ultimate retreat, and I can’t recommend it enough!”

My wife and I, along with our family, felt very comfortable in the house. The setting allowed all of us the relax and enjoy each other along with the amenities and charm of the house. The adults and children enjoyed the recreation rooms as well aa the outdoor play ground and fire pit. Despite the winter weather we were all active and busy throughout the day as there was something for everyone to do. A special appreciation for Susan, our host, for her responsiveness and concern if we had questions or an issue. Highly recommended!

FANTASTIC home!  I cannot say enough great things about this property and host!  Beautiful house! Immaculately clean and maintained! Susan is one amazing host!  The house is in a location private enough to feel secluded but so close to everything you don’t have to go out of your way! 10/10!!!
Beautiful Mansion with All Amenities
kids said it is the best air bnb ever

There are not enough good things I can say about my family’s stay here. After arriving in Saratoga and finding our original accommodations  uninhabitable, we had two hours to find a place for 14 people. While looking at hotels and other rentals we came across this gem. Susan was very responsive when contacted and was able to accept our last minute booking. After looking through the pictures it seemed too good to be true but once we arrived it far exceeded all of our expectations. It was spacious and extremely clean and organized. All weekend we talked about what a great find this was and already started talking about coming back next year for our annual girls trip!
A wonderful place to stay with family!!   Susan was an excellent host, very attentive and pleasant to work with.  Would recommend this beautiful, comfortable home to all!!

Susan was a great host and very responsive. The house was amazing and exceeded the expectations set by the pictures. We felt comfortable the entire time and would definitely recommend this listing to anyone looking for something in the area.

Susan was a great host! Very responsive and helpful with whatever the situation maybe. House had everything we needed to make it feel like our own. Very thorough with descriptions for everything in the house and the surrounding areas. Would definitely stay here again!

Susans home is a home away from home. It’s so nice and cosy and is in a perfect location with perfect amenities. Everyone in the family can enjoy, from parents to grandkids. There is so much to do at her place. And she has made sure everyone has something to entertain themselves with.
Susan was also very accommodative with our requests. She was very responsive and kind. Always ready to help and guide us
Must visit for all

The home was perfect. So much to do, from the pool to the grill to the basketball court. The host was very responsive and the house was great. If you like the pictures, feel confident that the photos reflect the house accurately. 5/5 stars

We found this place to host a very special retreat, and it was everything we could've asked for! I would most definitely be interested in staying at this place again in the future. And the level of communication from the host was phenomenal.

Great house with so many amenities to keep everyone busy, we had a family gathering and it worked out perfectly.
Susan is a great host.

Susan's place is absolutely stunning, the pictures don't even do it justice! one of the best Airbnbs we have stayed in in a very long time and perfect for our group of 12. Would highly recommend to all travelers
Susan did a wonderful job of helping to get settled into the listing and was very responsive the entire visit. the house was as advertised and perfect in every way. I can't wait to come back again
