We rented this beautiful property to celebrate my husband's 50th birthday.  We had 7 couples spend a fantastic weekend together without ever getting in each other's way.  Everyone was impressed by the attention to detail in every aspect of this property.  Susan is an attentive host offering local suggestions.  I can't express how beautiful this property is.  We had a wonderful time enjoying all of the amenities, especially the hot tub and fire pit.  We seemed to congregate in the beautiful kitchen (especially once the guys found the hidden TV).  I look forward to booking with Susan again!

Our family of 16 (grandparents, parents, kids) had an incredible experience over Thanksgiving! The house looked even better in person than the pictures. Susan was extremely responsive and helpful throughout the trip. It was a great way to spend quality time over the holiday weekend and we would definitely recommend going forward!

Susan was an incredible host to work with! My now husband and I used her AirBnB to house our bridal party for our wedding at the Hiland Park Country Club (3 miles away). 16 of us slept very comfortably and had plenty of space for both bridal parties to get ready the day of our wedding.
Susan worked closely with us to ensure we had plenty of time to check in as we were coming from all over the country. There is not a single thing I would’ve changed about our stay at this property.
We all look forward to coming back!!!
Fabulous place for family gatherings..large spacious house…Susan was always helpful and made sure we had a great time.
Susan is a great host. The house is absolutely a beautiful mansion. Classy and luxurious house! My family enjoyed it very much definitely recommend it and I will definitely go back. 5 ⭐ ⭐ ⭐ ⭐ ⭐

We had an amazing stay for our annual women’s retreat.  15 women and there was plenty of space to spread out and be comfortable.  The property is gorgeous and feels park like.  Played pickle ball, watched the koi, enjoyed the hot tub and all of the outside living spaces.  The inside of the house was beautifully appointed and cozy.   I would highly recommended and we would definitely stay here again!

Susan was very accommodating and communicative. Her house is beautiful, great for a group of friends or a couple families. Pool was pristine, and more than once we commented about how thoughtfully the house was set up - everything you could need! Awesome grill and a chefs kitchen.

We had a great time in this house! It was big enough to hold all of us and so many different great parts to the house for everyone to be entertained.. It was clean and spacious and the grounds are beautiful. We also enjoyed the location and all the many things to do near the house.  Susan was very responsive and easy to work with. We highly recommend!

This house is amazing!  With so many things to do in the area and at the house everyone was happy.  Our family likes to be together and there was plenty of room.  We love to cook together and the kitchen is spacious and well equipped.  The backyard is an oasis so close to a bustling city.  Thank you for an amazing family vacation!
The house was perfect for our family vacation. So many great features for both adults and kids. And Susan was super responsive and accommodating throughout.

Susan’s house is somehow both grand and cozy at the same time. It is a mixture of Gatsby, charming country house and magical like a place you’d expect to find a portal to Narnia . The energy of the home is lovely and there is so much to do at the home you find yourself not even needing to leave. I’ve stayed in many grand Airbnbs around the world and this is my favorite so far…
Had a very pleasurable stay. The home is beautiful and had plenty of room for a big group. Lots of outdoor space for activities as well.
Luxurious stay. Would definitely do it again!
Wonderful house!

It was a great place to stay, enough rooms. It would be great if each room has separate bathroom.
But overall worth a trip.
Regards,
Rushabh Shah

We had a wonderful stay! The host was extremely communicative and responsive throughout our visit. The house was well stocked with everything we needed, making our stay very comfortable. The home was clean and organized. The additional game room feature that is separate from the house is an excellent addition especially if you have a larger number of guests. The location itself was amazing as it was on the pond and close to many recreational activities. We spent a day at both Gore Mountain and West Mountain. We hiked Pinnacle Trail at Bolton Landing (amazing views of Lake George) and stopped by some local breweries (Common Roots) and restaurants (Dockside). When we struggled to get the cable to work, they quickly sent maintenance to take care of the issue, which we really appreciated. We would absolutely stay here again and highly recommend it to others! Thank you!
Had a great time with our family at this beautiful location. Host was responsive and we really enjoyed our stay!

Our stay at this lakefront Airbnb was beyond amazing! The property is exactly as described—beautiful, clean, and right on the water with stunning views. Waking up to the peaceful lake every morning was such a refreshing experience. The home was well-stocked with everything we needed, from kitchen essentials to cozy blankets.
The outdoor space was the highlight for us — we enjoyed relaxing on the deck, having coffee while watching the sunrise, and even had a BBQ by the water. The kids loved playing near the lake, and we had so much fun as a family just enjoying nature. It was the perfect escape from the city.
The hosts were wonderful—very responsive and thoughtful, providing clear instructions and some lovely personal touches to make us feel welcome.
I WOULD DEFINITELY RECOMMEND THIS PLACE TO EVERYONE.
The stay truly made our trip extra special. We would definitely come back and highly recommend this place to anyone visiting the area!

We had a wonderful stay!  The place was exactly how it was described and it was very clean.  We had plenty of room for 13 adults, and the open concept of the main floor made it very easy to hang out.  The scenery was beautiful down by the pond.

Amazing home. We are sad to leave and can’t wait to go back. Being right on the lake was beyond fantastic for our group of 12. We had so much to do. When we grew tired of the outside, the game room fulfilled our needs. It was honestly an amazing weekend.

My family and I had an amazing time.  The house is simply  beautiful and fully stocked  with everything you could possibly  want or need. We had such a relaxing time enjoying  by the fire pit and the waterview. The arcade room was the cherry on top. The host responded very quickly with any questions we had. We cant wait to book another stay here soon

You can see from the pictures this place is beautiful. However, the photos do not do it justice! This place is absolutely perfect and we had an unbelievable time! We had 6 couples for a weekend get away and there was plenty of room for everyone. The game room was a huge hit! With all the arcade games, darts, shuffleboard, pool, tv, etc., there was something for everyone. I was worried it would be cold out there because it hit 10 degrees while we were there and it is not attached to the main house, but it was plenty cozy. The house itself was perfect. It’s clean, modern, well cared for, and had great finishing touches (robes in every room, hotel style showers with attached shampoo and body wash). This place is perfect in every way.

The property delivered a great experience the kids had so much fun in the arcade playing darts, shuffle board and so much more. The beds were very comfortable and the room with the bunkbeds was a great place to have fun for the kids with the bored games provided. The property had a big living room so the adults could have fun and the bar in the game room is perfect to make your own drinks and keep the drinks ice cold in the fridge and freezer so you don’t have to move the drinks from the main house. The arcade is in the garage so it is not part of the house so people who don’t  want to play didn’t have to hear the noise of the games being played in the garage and this property is also pet friendly! overall this place is a place that my family really wants to visit again as soon as we got home the kids ask my kids asked when we were going again.
Place was absolutely stunning ! Want to go back… already

Northern living are professional and easy to communicate with. We originally booked 3 of their units lakeside to Lake George, but the space didn’t quite fit our group. We were able to work with the team to find another, more suitable place of theirs in Fort Ann, right in the lake, and it was incredible. This location is updated and has everything you need from a full game room / arcade, to a private dock / dock house with life vests, kayaks, paddle boards etc. and more. Just a short 15-20min drive from Lake George as well. Would definitely book this place again
Excellent property for our big family vacation! So many fun options for kids and adults. Expensive but worth it!
Dockside Manor is absolutely beautiful! The property is very well maintained and there’s a lot to do! We really enjoyed our stay.
Everything in this home was great. From the pillows to the activities.  Highly recommend. These guys kno how to accommodate there guest would leave them a 11 star review if I could
Very spacious for entertaining guests. Everyone had a great time and complimented on how nice this establishment was. Everyone was completely thrilled with our experience. Thank you!!
was a great place for a group of friends.  too many amenities to count. super responsive host. highly recommend.
Perfect place for a big group of friends to spend a weekend. Super responsive team and wonderful property
Had an amazing time at the place. There was always something to do for everyone. Very clean place. Host replies quick if you have any questions as well. I have nothing to complain about!

The location and views was great
A lot of activities to do, the only problem i felt was neighbour’s was next to us if you are a big group and your kid’s going to play all night and make noise then this isn’t for you.
But house was great and location was beautiful..

Nice property, peaceful neighborhood.
Gaming room for kids was nice
More than couple of fire pits making this place warm.
Good experience.
The property was as advertised.

The house was beautifully decorated and had all the amenities that one could hope for. One of the highlights of my stay was the variety of activities and games that were available. Whether we wanted to play board games, arcade games or a game of pool, there was something for everyone.
In addition to the indoor activities, the house also had plenty to offer outside including a fire pit and basketball court.
The bedrooms were comfortable and spacious, and the kitchen was fully equipped with everything we needed to prepare meals.
Overall, I would highly recommend this Airbnb house to anyone who is looking for a fun and relaxing getaway.

We had a great time during our stay over New Years. The arcade room was beyond our expectations! Two comfy couches and tvs in the main house made for great lounging time as well. Beautiful view and access to the lake. We enjoyed some time in the hot tub as well!
We mostly stayed on the property, as walks around the neighborhood weren’t too great. The neighbors were in very close proximity.
Wonder place. We had a great time. Wish we could have stayed longer.

We had an amazing time at this wonderful property. So much to do for the kids, and excellent accommodations for a large group of friends or an extended family! Hosts were great, responsive and flexible. Top notch operation and stay.
This house is absolutely breathtaking. Everything you could possibly need all under one roof. Thank you!
The best house I have ever rented!

The house was absolutely stunning with gorgeous amenities and a beautiful property. Close enough to lake George that you can grab an Uber or a taxi yet far enough for the nice quiet getteway everyone wants and needs! Highly recommended and wouldn’t hesitate to go back
perfect for a large group.  spotless home with plenty of games
Amazing house with so many amenities! We plan to reuse in the future.
Beautiful property and amazing service from the team. A definite recommendation!
This was so amazing we will deff be back it had everything
Amazing home with everything you can think of. Awesome bar and game room. Our family had a great time and are already looking into rebooking this house for next year
This house was beautiful, clean, and all the staff was extremely friendly and inviting.
Great house!  Clean and well kept!  Will definitely book again!!

The house is perfect!! Great location on the lake, spacious and clean. The arcade/game room was a big hit with kids and adults! Beyond that, the host was just amazing, very accommodating and helpful. We had an issue with another house and Northern living saved our thanksgiving trip!!! Super responsive as our plans changed last minute.

The home was exactly as advertised, except for the fact that the sunsets were even more spectacular than we expected! Was great for a large group as everyone felt comfortable and there was always something to do
Great location, awesome view, beautiful house. Would recommend to other friends and family.
We absolutely loved our stay! your property was beautiful and we were so grateful for our time spent there! looking forward to our next stay with you guys!!

Great place and location.  Everything one would need coupled with terrific service.  We had a couple of minor issues that were addressed at lightning speed and an accompanying smile.  Would definitely come back.
Nice and updated. Beautiful spot. Fun “man cave”...plenty to do.  Overall, a great place
Beautiful property & home!

The house and property are exactly as is in the photos. My group and I had the best time staying at this place! Wonderful house, fun garage hang out spot, cool outdoor fireplace and gorgeous deck on the pond. Will definitely be rebooking this place in the foreseeable future!
Great place, unbelievable service.  Highly recommend.

This is an amazing airbnb. We came for a group trip and had the best time! The game room is fun to hang out in, the space is pristine, and the hot tub was a nice touch. Katelyn provided all amenities needed for the entire weekend. We definitely recommend this place for anyone looking for a nice weekend getaway!

My family and I loved staying here for the weekend. Katelyn made us feel at home and she made it very easy to communicate with her. The house is well maintained and very clean. It had every amenity you could think of which made cooking simple. This was the perfect place to stay and the outdoor space was so nice. It offered so much to do which kept the kids busy. The outdoor space by the pond was very nice. The view is beautiful. I love that the game room was in a separate place from the house. The kids loved that room. The location is great and close to Lake George village. We had a lovely relaxing time and highly recommend staying here. We can’t wait to go back!

I stayed here with a large group of 15 people and we all had a wonderful time! The amenities in this house were amazing and we took full advantage of the kayaks, hot tub and game room. We barely left the property all weekend and had a blast. Katelyn was so kind and responsive throughout!
Dwight's home was the perfect place for our family get together this past Easter. Fun and relaxing for kids of all ages!

We had a great stay. The house was clean, comfortable, and exactly as described. It was especially perfect for our ski trip to West Mountain which was super close. It made mornings and end of day trips incredibly easy. Dwight was responsive and easy to work with, and everything from check in to check out was smooth. We would definitely stay here again and would recommend it to anyone heading to the area.

Dwight was the most available and helpful host I have ever had during any stay. He actively encouraged me to call with any questions any time, and when I did call or messaged him, he got right back to me. His place is a great one for a family that likes to play games, swim, and have fun. A beautiful, quiet neighborhood too.

Thank you so much Dwight for a memorable time! My group of friends really enjoyed the space. Dwight was such a great communicator and worked well with us during our stay. Unforgettable moments were made.

This is a wonderful place to stay! Dwight was very friendly and attentive.  He had some supplies that were needed sent right over when asked, with a few bonus snacks! The house is beautiful and spacious. The pool and hot tub were clean and the outdoor area had ample seating and lounge chairs. We made use of the sauna and gym and the arcade in the basement is awesome! Our favorite amenity was the massage chair in the billiards room, great way to spend a relaxing evening! The home is close to both Lake George and Saratoga Springs. Overall a great experience and would stay at Honey Hollow again!

Dwight is a great host. He’s  responsive and considerate. The house is spacious, beautiful, interesting, and fun. As other guests have said, you don’t need to leave the house to have a nice vacation. With the pool, the jacuzzis, the fire pit, the game room, the gym, the sauna, and the home theater, there is plenty for everyone to enjoy. The house was very clean when we arrived. The neighborhood is beautiful and extraordinarily quiet. The neighbors always wave when you drive or walk by. Highly recommend, would stay again.

Staying at Dwight’s home was absolutely wonderful. The best family vacation our family of 10 and 3 generations have had yet. Everything we needed was there and to get to the stores for groceries was a quick drive. We are looking forward to booking Honey Hollow Retreat again. The billiard room was a huge hangout for my family. My granddaughter loved the secret rooms. Pool and Hot tub big hit.  Even got to see a deer in the driveway,  beautiful. Thank you so much for helping us make so many great memories!!!!

From start to finish, my weekend at Dwight’s place was amazing. The house was spectacular, perfect for a big group. Everyone had space to stay and the hot tub and pool were awesome. Dwight is extremely communicative and helped us resolve a minor issue at the house immediately. I’d welcome another opportunity to stay at one of Dwight’s properties. The location can’t be beat. 20 mins in either direction to Lake George and Saratoga Springs.

We stayed over New Years with our family of six kids and some of their significant others.  This was such an amazing home and the perfect fit.  The endless spaces and activities provided such a fun and relaxing environment and gave everyone enough space to just shut off for a few days and enjoy true quality time together.   The area is beautiful and downtown Saratoga only 20 minutes away.  We look forward to returning someday!

This home is like no other place we've stayed at, and we've stayed at some amazing AirBnBs.
It is elegant and cozy at the same time - fairly hard to accomplish. It has a ton of character without feeling overwhelming.
You can spend a full day exploring the decorations and detail of the items in the home - from the artwork to the steins on the piano, from the books on the shelves to the Hummels in the breakfront, everything grabs your attention. We had to tell our kids that the brooms next to the fireplace are for decoration, not for sweeping :)
Long story short, the house is spectacular and fun. The basement is an adventure all by itself, and the shower/sauna is an absolute must try.
I can't imagine what it is like in the summer when use of the backyard is appropriate.
I'll most likely regret writing this review as it will probably never be available to book again :)
Finally, don't pass up an opportunity to stay at Dwight's place!
Fantastic house; exactly as described!

Amazing place with so much to do on the property. Home was beautiful and have everything we needed. Host was very responsive and checked in multiple times to make sure everything was okay and running smoothly. 10/10 recommend

We celebrated our 50th wedding anniversary with our two daughters and their families, 11 in all, at this fabulous house. Between Saratoga and Lake George Village there was plenty to, but the house kept our kids and grandchildren entertained with the game room, gym and outdoor pool. Highly recommended!

Dwight was a fantastic host. Very prompt in answering questions, courteous, friendly, supportive. The house was amazing with room for everyone to hang out without being on top of each other. The game room kept kids and adults occupied constantly with professional like games you would only find in an arcade. The massage chair was a big hit and used by all. The pool and hot tub were very well kept and a nice place for all to relax. I wholeheartedly recommend Honey Hollow Retreat.

Dwight is a super host that has all the checkmarks. The house itself it's absolutely gorgeous. Truly a mansion. My family was very comfortable and enjoyed everything the house had to offer. The basement is off the charts great. So much to do and so much fun. All the games worked great and were well maintained. Besides the basement, there is the billiards room which is absolutely fabulous. You never really need to leave the house.
The location couldn't be better. 25 minutes to Saratoga Springs. 15 to Lake George. We enjoyed our stay and plan on returning one day.

We had a lovely stay at Dwight’s house. There was lots of space for our family. The arcade in the basement was fantastic and we enjoyed the pool. Dwight was a very responsive host and we would stay there in the future.

The property was amazing with sauna , hot tub and the exceptional basement area. Everyone in our group had a great time.
Dwight was a wonderful host ,very accommodating and communicated really well.
We highly recommend this place and plan to come back again in future .

Dwight really is a super host.  Very responsive and very accommodating, and has lots of local recommendations. The house really is as described, and the downstairs blows your mind with the games and gym and sauna. The house is well supplied with first rate products--even the knives are sharp! Our group spanned ages 3 to 93 and all enjoyed the house and we all fit around the expansive dining room table. Easy to recommend.
Had a great time. Weather wasn’t the best but had plenty to do in the house to keep the kids and adults entertained. Will rent again.

everything about the house and area were spot on. Dwight was available and very responsive if needed. Although the weather was fair, being in a home that made you feel as if you lived there for years made up for the weather. We rented a pontoon boat, went for a ride on the pedal railway carts, my grand children went on go carts and played games in the arcade basement of the house. We had great night fires in the fire pit and great conversation was had by all. We also visited and drank wine at the Adirondack Winery which all enjoyed. A great time was had by all 10 of us. Thank you for sharing your house Dwight! Ken Tirone
Huge space, well stocked and cared for, lots for guests to take advantage of on the property. Dwight was very responsive and accommodating.

I cannot say enough about how great this airbnb was. We had a bachelorette party of 10 and there was plenty of space, a beautiful dining room, plenty of bathrooms and even beds. We had plans of being out and about by lake george however spent most of our time at the airbnb due to the awesome amenities. The massage chair, the steam shower/sauna, the hot tub, the huge game room!! My large group of friends had an absolute blast and all want to arrange to stay here again!! We are so happy to have had this opportunity and can’t recommend Dwight enough!! He was phenomenal right from the start and was so kind and helpful with this whole process!

This was our first three-generation family vacation and we couldn't have asked for a nicer place to stay! Dwight's home is very clean, warm and inviting with so much to do! We spent alot of time taking turns in the massage chair (amazing!) and in the basement playing all the games. Even our 21 month old grandson tried his hand at a few of them!
The weather was perfect for our entire stay so we were able to take advantage of the fire pit every night. And every morning I took my grandson for a walk through the neighborhood which is very serene and absolutely beautiful.
Dwight was always quick to get back to me with any questions which I truly appreciated.
I would highly recommend Honey Hollow Retreat for any family or group looking for a special getaway!

Dwight’s place was awesome. So much to do in the house, really spacious. The sauna area was amazing, the game room/basement had endless fun activities. VR headset is really cool.
My group was 12 people and we had a great time.
Dwight was super flexible, communicative and all around a great person to work with. Highly recommend this spot! We hope to come back sometime soon.

3 families enjoyed our stay.  There was plenty of room and plenty to do at the home for our 3 night stay.  Kids and adults enjoyed the arcade games and pool table.  We enjoyed a fire in the living room fireplace and at the fire pit.  West Mountain is very close ad we could watch the fireworks.  The hot tub and sauna were also enjoyable.  The house is in a neighborhood and there are quiet roads to walk on.  Dwight was very easy to get a hold of and answered any questions we had.  We cooked all of our meals there.

Best Airbnb experience I have had. House was beautiful, comfortable, and FUN. Dwight is a friendly, knowledgeable, and very helpful host. Personally, I didn’t find the town of Glen Falls to be anything to write home about, but Saratoga Springs, a short drive away, has fantastic restaurants, bars, and shopping.

We really enjoyed our stay at Honey Hollow Retreat. The house is in a great location, well equipped and has plenty to do for different age groups. Cleanliness gets 5 ⭐️ Dwight was an amazing host and super responsive to all our needs.
Dwight’s house was an amazing time so close to everything and so much to do at the house.  Dwight was also very helpful and a great host.

Dwight was an incredible host. Communicated so well with us in advance. Made sure the place looked great.
And the home itself…wow. It’s insane. Even better than the pictures make it look. It really has everything to accommodate any type of group. I’d return in a heartbeat.
We had such a great time. Thank you!

Robert was a great host! Responded very quickly, and was very accommodating to our needs/requests. Check-in instructions were super detailed and helpful.
The house was very clean and well stocked. Not to mention the huge arcade game room, the gym room, hot tub, the sauna room, the massage chair (and so much more!!) We could not have asked for a better location. Overall a wonderful place; we would stay here again easily!

This beautiful home, with a stunning view of the Great Lake Sacandaga, was a serene place to spend time with family and friends. We can’t say enough good things about the magnificent views on the lake– sunrises reflecting across the lake and an incredible Harvest moon that lit up the night sky.
We enjoyed the beach, dock, and swimming platform, and used the kayaks, canoe and paddleboard available lakeside. We also lounged around in the Adirondack chairs by the firepit, soaked in the hot tub and took in the sun on the back deck. Inside, the house is filled with lush plants and a Scandinavian flair. We found all the amenities and comforts of this well- appointed home, including ping pong and pool tables. Ahne was an extremely responsive and conscientious host. We give this home a 10 out of 10 in every category, and plan to rebook for next year.

We had an amazing week at Ahne's home with our extended family of 9 and our two dogs! It was very clean, nicely decorated and had all the amenities you could ask for. Ahne was a great host and very responsive to any questions or needs we had. It was nice that she lives close by so we even got to talk with her on occasion and learn about the house and surrounding area.
We spent most of our time on the beautiful deck or down by the lake which was easy to get in and out of. Our dogs had the best time swimming and we enjoyed kayaking and swimming to the platform. We had dinner in Saratoga Springs one night and enjoyed that and also visited a local brewery, Zippy's Ice Cream, a distillery and even got a round of golf in. We loved it so much we are looking to book it again for next summer! Thanks for letting us share your beautiful home and allowing us to create some wonderful memories with our family.

Our stay at Ahne’s was perfect - it’s a beautiful location, the house is amazing. The swim dock was tons of fun, we went in the hot tub almost every night, and spent every other waking moment on one of the patios. Sunrises and sunsets from the house are amazing. We had everything we needed, and Ahne was so easy and wonderful to communicate with before and during our stay. I hope we will return soon!
Great place! Very clean and lots of amenities.  The host was very nice and accommodating. Great place for a relaxing family vacation!

It was our first time ever using Airbnb and we hit the nail on the head with this house! Ahne is an incredible host, super accommodating and very focused cleanliness. Her house is top notch and has it all.
I highly recommend to anyone who is looking for majestic views and a stress free week. We had a blast!!
Thank you Ahne!
Jonathan Dubreuil

This is not an investment property rented out by a remote landlord. It is a family’s home that you may be lucky enough to use for a while. A member of the family lives nearby and she wants to be sure you really enjoy your visit. And what a home! Large, clean, and phenomenally well furnished. A rec room with pool, darts, bar, board games, poker table. Outdoor hut tub, next to firepit—with plenty of wood and kindling. Outdoor grill. A dock and jet-ski. Living room overlooking the water, with a fireplace. Deep jetted soaking tub in the master bathroom. Four fully furnished bedrooms and three fully furnished bedrooms. Washer and dryer. A kitchen with servings enough to feed at least twelve people. Keurig machine, toaster, baking sheets, roasting pan. “Honey,” I asked my wife, “what is this?” “That is a steamer for preparing asparagus.” Of course. Count your blessings if you have the chance to stay here and have the chance to benefit from Ahne’s generous hospitality.

everything about our stay was amazing! ahne was a great host and so thoughtful. the house was even better than we expected and extremely cozy. we stayed at the house the entire weekend and didn’t run out of things to do and enjoyed the entire time! i would definitely come back during the summertime to take advantage of the lake. DEF RECOMMEND!
This house is absolutely breathtaking and the small touches make it a piece of art. We had a wonderful time with the family enjoying the frozen lake and snow views. Highly recommend!
Such a wonderful spot, gorgeous location and great house for a big group even if the weather is bad, plenty of space inside. Highly recommend!
Amazing house. Great host. Attention to detail. Very clean.
Wonderful relaxing environment for a retreat away from the hustle and bustle of daily life. Ahne was extremely accommodating and attentive. Will definitely be booking another stay!

Ahne Kristin is a most wonderful host who generously opened up her house to a 10-person family gathering last weekend. The house is absolutely stunning and represents exactly what the pictures show. It is spotlessly clean, well equipped with with all kitchen supplies, bedding and linen, indoor and outdoor towels, etc. We were granted access to all the water sports facilities such as kayak, paddle boards, canoe, plus life vests for everyone - peace of mind for parents. The hot tub, gaming room and pool billiard were a welcome distraction after a day in the lake, too.
We can highly recommend Ahne Kristine's home for a perfect get-away, we would always come again!

Ahne thank you so much again. We really had a great time . You made it feel like it was our home and and we fell right into it all . My family was finally able to see why I love this lake. We loved the view from the kitchen in the morning and being able to eat finner on the deck at night. The projector in the finished basement was amazing as well. Getting in the hot tob after a long day of kayaking was a plus also. My Aunt and Uncle being able to bring Flicker was the icing on the cake for them ! My only wish would have been to stay longer to show them more of the Adirondacks and lake! Thanks again I will be telling everyone who wants to listen about the place.

This space was the perfect spot for our annual family summer vacation. We gathered from CA, NC, CO and FL to spend a week together. The host was so gracious and always at the ready with an extra tank of propane for the grill or an extra oar for the kayaks that are included in the rental.  The kitchen was so well stocked, and there was alot of space to spread out and find a quiet corner to read or chat. Absolutely perfect!!

This house was incredible! I would highly recommend staying there. The house was decorated beautifully and we really enjoyed the hot tub and fire pit. Also the lake access was so convenient and we loved using the paddle boards, paddle boat and kayaks. Ahne Kristin was a great host and was very helpful whenever we needed her! I would definitely stay here again!
Beautiful home for a getaway!

Great house, great location, great host. Very clean with fresh linens, towels, etc. Jacuzzi, pool table and jet ski were significant highlights.
The host was very accommodating and extremely communicative. Would love to stay here again.
Absolutely amazing home. Rented with a friends for my wife's 30th and everything was just perfect. Thank you so much for everything. Look forward to staying with you again sometime.
The house was almost as spectacular as the views.  Absolutely turn key.  Tons of amenities provided.  I only wish my trip could have been longer.  We felt right at home!
We had an amazing weekend! House was beautiful and lake was amazing. Ahne really took care of us and was extremely accommodating.
Ahne was a terrific host. Her home is beautiful. Well appointed. Beautiful view of the lake. Would recommend.
Beautiful house, beautiful area and a ton of amnenities with the house. Ahne is quick with responses and very commutative. My group had a lot of fun

We had a great visit at Ahne’s beautiful home for Labor Day weekend. We cooked every meal and the house is stocked with everything you could possibly need to cook & entertain a big group of people. The hot tub and fire pit were perfect when it got cool at night. The house was clean, comfortable & spacious. We hope to visit again some day soon.
Beautiful home, even the amazing pictures don’t do it justice. Ahne was extremely communicative throughout our stay and easy to reach in case of any questions.

This house is perfect for large or small groups! It is very well appointed and the finishing touches were very much appreciated!
The outdoor amenities were as good or better than the indoors. Lots of gathering spaces inside and out.
Sun rises right off the deck over the lake and it's a gorgeous sight!
I would recommend this house to anyone looking for a wonderful vacation experience. 5 stars!!!!!
The house was awesome. Very good attention to detail. We had a wonderful stay.

Beautiful, spacious house in a great spot on the lake.  Has everything you need to have fun, relax, and enjoy.   Ahne is an awesome host, so welcoming and truly wants you to have amazing time at her house!   Enjoyed every minute!

Thank you Ahne for opening your home to us! It was the perfect place to celebrate my sister before she gets married this summer. We had a fantastic weekend exploring the lake and taking advantage of the beautiful views and great amenities of the home!

Ahne is an incredible host and has thought of everything. Our family from around the country got together at Sacandaga and enjoyed the jet ski, tubing, a tour by her of the lake, smores around the campfire pit, and games inside.  If we had any questions she was quick to answer.  The best review was from our two small grandsons - "this place is really cool"!

Our stay at Ahne’s place could not have been more perfect! The House was beautiful, clean and spacious. It was stocked with anything we could have needed. Being able to use the kayaks and hot tub had us outside for most of our stay, even in the rain! Ahne was so kind and quick to respond. We are looking forward to coming back!!

We had an amazing weekend at Ahne's beautiful house on the lake! The house is huge and there's so much stuff to do. Great deck to BBQ and eat looking out over the lake. Under the deck is a patio with a super clean hot tub. Big front lawn leading down to the lake that is perfect for lawn games, plus a volleyball/badminton court next to the house. All the rooms were clean and comfy. Ahne was really helpful and gave us a tour and local tips. Great experience, would definitely love to come back and would definitely recommend to anyone!
Great place to stay. Our 10 guests all had a fun trip, and there was plenty of space for everyone, and lots of things to do in the house.
The house is beautiful and worked perfectly for our party of 3 families with 6 children under 6. Lots for children to do, even when the weather was less than steller.
The view of the lake is amazing! We had a blast in the hot tub, playing pool & air hockey & spending time with family. It's the PERFECT spacious house for a lot of people to enjoy!!!

The pictures don’t do it justice! Everything about this place was perfect. Ahne is an amazing host and super fast to respond to any question or concern. Looking forward to booking another trip here someday!

We had such a great weekend away at Ahne's home in Mayfield. Ahne was always very communicative, and was always willing to be flexible with our check-in/check-out schedules. Her home was also so lovely and comfortable, we wished we could have stayed when the weekend was over! If I ever am looking to go away for a weekend upstate, I will definitely want to return to Ahne's Airbnb.
Thanks for such a lovely experience!

Perfect house for a group of people. Clean, excellent location, large and excellent communication with Ahne Kristin! I would highly recommend this house for any reason you are traveling to this area, it really felt like home the entire month we were there!

Ahne is the best host we have ever had! We fully intend to return and to tell all of our friends about her amazing property. It’s so comfortable, functional, and with unforgettable views. The house has every single amenity and thing that you didn’t even know you needed or wanted. Thanks to Ahne for making our weekend getaway so easy, enjoyable and relaxing!

This place will meet all your expectations. Stayed with a group of 11, all slept comfortably and the house came with many amenities, we literally could of came with no clothes and she would have had that for us to. Ahne is beyond amazing and  the best host we've ever had. Great neighbor hood and beautiful/ peaceful views. We would love to come back when its warmer out. Already missing this place and the memories.
Great views, close to many activities, and a great basement area for entertaining!

We stayed at the house for NYE weekend and had an absolute blast! The snow and frozen lake made for some beautiful views from the floor to ceiling windows. The house was clean and very well kept. The pictures don't do it justice! The house is beautiful and perfect for groups. Ahne was quick with her responses which made for easy planning and booking. She even left some candy and trail mix dishes out for us which made for a really nice touch. My friends and I would love to book another weekend in the summer!

Great house, great host, amazing view
Not much more to add, worth the trip

Our family had an amazing weekend at Ahne’s place! The house was spacious, meticulously clean, and charmingly decorated. There was ample space for all nine of us, and the common areas are large, so we could all be together and share quality time.
Best of all was the outdoor living space. The upper deck was massive, with loads of seating, so that everyone could enjoy the breathtaking view of the lake – and the lower terrace had a firepit and Jacuzzi, with strings of little overhead lights… It was all so cozy!
We were lucky enough to have beautiful, warm weather on our October weekend, so we were able to take advantage of Ahne’s kayak, pedal boat, and canoe. (Had we known how nice it would be, we would have brought our boating licenses and used her jet ski as well. Next time!) There was plenty of indoor fun too, with a pool table and card table – making this a perfect retreat, rain, shine, or snow. I imagine it would be very cozy in the winter.
The house does have neighbours, but you barely even notice they are there. Knowing that there were other homes around, I was worried that it might be like a suburb, but it isn’t. It is a quiet, country setting, right on the water – very idyllic.
Our hostess was friendly, gracious, extremely accommodating, and available at anytime to answer questions.
Thank you, Ahne, for allowing us to use your lovely home for our very special family weekend.

This is an amazing place!!! We went here for a cousin reunion and had the time of our lives. Great views, great hot tub, plenty of activities in the house itself. Ahne was also an amazingly communicative host and made sure we had everything we needed. Would definitely repeat!

This was one of the best airbnb experiences we have had. The house has been done up tastefully, with a lot of attention to detail. There were trees (pineapple, lime, banana) everywhere. Many activities with never a dull moment. Great place for a reunion of friends. To be clear, this is a luxurious property with classy furnishing and so well maintained that notwithstanding our large group we felt like keeping it pristine.
Ahne is a wonderful host and has made her scenic home spectacular. We had a wonderful time cooking and relaxing in her lovely home. We even took the paddle boat and canoe to the island, which was magical.

You will not be disappointed! The house is extremely comfortable, clean, spacious, and full of amenities. The lake view is tremendous. We enjoyed walks along the rocky beaches of the lake that was super serene. Hot tub soaking while looking out onto the lake is not to be missed! The host is a very nice and accommodating person and communications were easy!

Ahne's home is exactly as advertised: a beautiful, spacious home at the edge of a gorgeous lake. Ahne was a welcoming host, providing us with all the information we would need to have a great time in the home, and in the area. We also felt the home was a fantastic value. We all look forward to coming back at a future date for another vacation. Thanks again, Ahne!

House was just as advertised. Very nice and modern. Big back yard right on the lake. There were many activities at the house including pool and kayaking. Great spot for a larger group of people. Ahne was very hospitable and made her self available if need be.

You will LOVE this place! So much to do for a large party or a more intimate occasion. My family and I have rented several homes and this was the only one that was exactly as described. It was clean, nicely decorated, room for all, with many fun options. Sit on the pretty deck and look out on the lake, enjoy the hot tub, play cards or pool, have a fire and listen to the sounds of nature, or take your adventures to the large lake.  The host, Ahne, is very attentive to her guests too.
The house was perfect for our family Thanksgiving, with room for everyone. Kathleen was a wonderful host.
Kathleen was very responsive, friendly and flexible!

What a beautiful home!  There were 7 of us who stayed for a long weekend.  The kitchen had everything we needed to make a meal in the home.  Lots of space for all of us, including a beautiful sitting area by the pool.  We truly enjoyed our stay, and would definitely stay here again.
Great place !
Great house and an amazing backyard.
We had an unbelievable stay at this home. The property is wonderful, private and well equipped with anything you need. We arrived and the home was very clean and organized.

The house was great for our group of 12 - super spacious, clean, private. We had a blast hanging out in the pool everyday and taking advantage of the grill and firepit. Kathleen responded to all my messages quickly and thoroughly. Everything was very clean and looked exactly as it did in the pictures.
Out stay was excellent! The place is perfect and there were enough beds for everyone in our party. This made it so everyone was comfortable the whole trip. Thank you!

Words can't describe how beautiful this place is! The house was in perfect condition and super clean. The pool was so relaxing and had all the amenities necessary for an amazing pool day. Kathleen was an amazing host, she answered every question and really made us feel at ease and like it was our home for that short  time. We had the best time!
The host was quick to respond with any questions we had  and the house was beautiful! I would highly recommend!
The space was perfect for what we needed. Very roomy and clean. Pool, grill, etc in immaculate condition. Loved the baseball themed rooms and the movie room is very cool!
Fantastic stay
Fantastic place to stay!
Perfect location to the track / downtown and plenty of space for our group of 12.  Kathi was very friendly and responsive.  Highly recommend

We were a group of 6 couples who spent a weekend at Kathleen's house. Everything was top-rate; 6 comfy bedrooms, a great open living area for talking and hanging out; a beautiful and well-equipped kitchen for group meals, and with a dining table large enough to accommodate all of us; a lovely neighborhood for walks, and a very short drive into downtown Saratoga Springs for walking, shopping and restaurants. Kathleen was immediately responsive to any questions we had, and communications in all other respects were great. I can't think of a single negative to say, and would return in a heartbeat (and hope to do so next year).

Kathleen’s property was great for us. We were 5 couples looking for a weekend together. The home had lots of space to chat and play games. The house was well provisioned. Kathleen was very responsive and accommodating. Several of Saratoga Springs sights were closed due to season. This would be an even place during Spring/Summer when the pool could be used.
The house was perfect for a friend’s couples weekend. The house had everything we needed and then some. The outdoors area is as gorgeous as the inside.

A house in a great location, a responsive host, and a beautiful home with great amenities, is the perfect recipe for a great Air BnB experience. Kathleen's home exceeded expectations in all three categories!

Had a get together with a few friends celebrating an upcoming wedding. The house comfortably fit everyone and was flat out amazing. The backyard was the perfect hang out area, and the place had everything we needed to have a nice relaxing weekend in Saratoga.
Highly recommend this rental!

I can’t express how much we enjoyed our stay at Kathleen’s house! The first 30 minutes we arrived we just spent oohing and aahing her gorgeous home! From the formal sitting rooms, to the beautiful open living room/kitchen/dinning room area, to the quaint and unique bedrooms, to the super fun pool and pool house -everything was just so spotless and welcoming! Our group of 10 had plenty of space. Kathleen is the sweetest and very considerate! We were greeted with a welcome basket of goodies. Kathleen was very accommodating and gracious of our timing needs. The neighborhood is also so friendly. One night we ended up having a little impromptu karaoke session around the firepit. The next morning while the neighbors were out for a walk, they greeted us and laughed as they told us what great singers we all are. 🤦🏼‍♀️We of course apologized! But they genuinely assured us they loved it! Our stay was nothing short of perfect and we can’t wait to go back!! Kathleen, thank you for hosting us! ❤️

Kathleen was a terrific host, with everything matching the description. She was nice enough to provide snacks for us when we arrived. The house was beautiful and the pool area was fantastic. Wish we could have stayed longer. Saratoga Race track was only minutes away. Highly recommended!
Great house. Very nice yard with pool and convenient location
Wonderful home. A group of 12 fit more than comfortably. The backyard exceeded our expectations. 10/10 would definitely recommend.
The property, pool area included, was fantastic! We’d recommend to anyone looking for a spacious and comfortable stay in Saratoga.

This house was great for a big group! Kathi is a great host who was very responsive. The house ended up having more beds than we knew which made it even better for our group. The pool house was beautiful as well. We hope to be back!

The house was spectacular! Beautiful and clean. Kathleen was so thoughtful - she left us a basket of snacks and bottled water. What a hidden gem! Would go back again and again!
Great place and great host! I would go back in a second.
Loved the house. Definitely had more room than pictures had shown.

How I wish there were more than 5 stars to rate our experience at Keensland Best!  This space was not your typical Airbnb -- we felt like welcomed house guests in Kathleen's gorgeous home!  The space was beautiful, spacious, and comfortable -- and family members had plenty of room to spread out.  The home was super clean from top to bottom and the amenities (including a big 'welcome basket') were such an extra perk!  Kathleen was so responsive and very accommodating -- we were, and are, so grateful!  It was the perfect spot to call 'home' during our trip to Saratoga Springs to celebrate a family wedding!  We definitely hope to return in the warmer weather and take advantage of the inviting pool and outdoor space!

Beautiful home. Responsive host. Group loved the house and that it was close to everything we went to. Stay was during the off season but house and near by places had plenty to do. Would recommend this house to anyone looking for a place of 8 or more

Excellent house! Kathleen is a responsive host. The home is clean and in great shape. Fit our group of 12 perfectly but woukd definitely fit more if allowed (limit is 12). Great retreat for the holidays or just to get away with a bunch of friends.

A well maintained home, this place fit our large gang of 12 friends like a glove. The kitchen was nicely equipped, the spaces were easy to hang out in, the beds were comfortable, the bedrooms housed our 6 couples nicely, and the pool, though closed for the season, tempts our return in warmer weather. The neighborhood was quiet and peaceful to walk about.Kathleen was very responsive to all my texts and inquiries. A lovely weekend was had by all.
Absolutely wonderful
Beautiful home and Kathleen was a terrific host

Awesome house for entertaining in a beautiful private neighborhood. Incredible home and amazing host. Everything was in great condition and as shown in pictures.

Great house had a ton of fun!

Great home for a large family or two families as we were. Well appointed, clean, everything you need. We visited for a few shows at SPAC which is a short ride away.
Couldn't have been happier with our stay!
Perfect stay for a weekend golf trip. Kathleen was extremely accommodating throughout and easy to work with. Would highly recommend any large group stay here.

Kathleen was an amazing host and provided a beautiful home for our stay in Saratoga. Beautiful location, clean and spacious home, friendly & responsive host. We couldn’t have asked for a better experience.

such a dream! cannot recommend Keenlands Best enough

We had a great stay! The house is beautiful, super clean with plenty of size for 7 of us to hang out and each have our rooms. The location is so close to Saratoga making it easier to get to by a quick Uber for dinner or to walk around and shop. We can't to stay again!
This place is beautiful! Very clean and super nice location! Kathleen was super responsive and helpful with everything. Would recommend 1000000%

The house was perfect for our golf weekend in Saratoga. I highly recommend renting it.
Kathleen was easy to work with & she is very responsive.
An absolute 10! Beautiful home and property! We will definitely be back!

My cousins and I stayed as a long weekend away. There was a total of 17 of us and 3 kids under 2. It was the perfect place for our gathering! There was initially a problem with the ac before we got there, but Jacob and the others were very much on top of getting it fixed and everything worked out! The beds were comfortable and the kitchen had all the basic things you would need! The outdoor seating was perfect for our large group to be able to eat together. We loved spending time by the fire pit in the evening. We would definitely recommend this place to others and hope to come back!!

Went for a bachelorette weekend with 13 ladies. We rented the main house and 2 master suites so we had plenty of room! Great kitchen space and plenty of bathrooms. The rec room was a great space to play games.

We stayed in the main house for three nights and had a wonderful experience. The house was clean, cozy, and spacious enough for our group, with everything we needed for a comfortable stay. Paddle boards and kayaks were included with the house and stored on a clean beach within walking distance, ideal for water activities.
Luke and Tony were very accommodating, responsive, and friendly, making our stay stress-free. We highly recommend this place for couples, families, or groups looking for a quiet getaway near Lake George. 5 Stars all the way around!
