We had an amazing stay for a wedding. Tammie and Dave were very flexible and understanding, their house was beautiful with tons of rooms for many guests. Can’t rave about this gem enough! Thank you for a great stay.

Had a great long weekend of golf and fun at the track with our big group! House was great with plenty of places to sleep, stocked with yard games and cards/board games. Great location very close to lake Saratoga, the golf courses, the racetrack, and downtown which made getting around all weekend a breeze. Tammy was also very responsive and flexible with check in, highly recommend!

Tammie and David were extremely responsive and helpful prior to and during my stay. Their house is extremely clean and has plenty of space for a large group. The backyard is spacious and the close proximity to the tracks is invaluable. There were only two slight hiccups with the house which included the hot tub and the tap water. The hot tub wasn't entirely clean when we arrived and the tap water wasn't exactly great tasting; I'm guessing it is well water. However, this wasn't an issue as I just bought bottled water for everyone in the house, but it's definitely something I wish I knew going into the weekend. Overall, the house and hosts were amazing and made for an unforgettable weekend!

This property was great for our large group and the location was excellent and very close to the track. Tammie was a great host and answered all our questions quickly. The house was private and very clean with plenty of towels and linens. I would recommend this property and would go back!
This was the perfect airbnb for our large group. Close drive to downtown Saratoga was a huge plus. The backyard was great as well for yard games

We had other accommodations canceled due to storm damage and Tammie & David has this ready for us as a last minute booking salvaging our trip to Saratoga. It was the perfect spot for our trip.
We were close to the track for the race day festivities and an easy ride up to Lake George to enjoy some boating. the setting is private but only a short drive to town and other attractions. The home had lots of space inside and out to enjoy.

Awesome house that was as advertised. The backyard was awesome and the house was very clean. Would definitely
stay again.

Had a wonderful stay and would definitely recommend! The location is perfect, it’s super close to downtown but also super peaceful and quiet. It’s a short drive from Lake George and has lots of hikes near by. We had a group of 11 and stayed 3 nights. The only thing I would say is the kitchen is a bit out of date and the supplies/pans don’t make it easy to cook for the amount of people that the house sleeps, but we were able to make it work. There are also multiple entrances so was a bit confusing but Tammie was super responsive both before and during the trip and answered any questions we had. Overall would highly recommend!
Tammie was a great host and made the every step along the way completely seamless! I would certainly look to book this again if visiting the area with a large group.
The house was perfect for our large group. Plenty of space, clean, and the yard was awesome. Close to the state park and town. Would definitely recommend
Tammie was a fantastic host and responded to any inquiries in a timely manner. Highly recommend!

the house was amazing and is perfect for a large party. very spacious and cozy. the house felt private yet was only a 5 minute drive to Saratoga springs.
the owners were very responsive. I would definitely recommend!

This house is magnificent! The water is your backyard and you it is beautiful. The house has new appliances and is very well kept. Also, the main features that really kept my guests occupied were the kayaks that are available, the hot tub, and the fire pit at night. Highly recommended!!! Even great for 3 year old son. He had an absolute blast.
An amazing home and an even better hostess!  The scenery, home, and amenities are second to none. Hope to be back next year. Thanks for helping make this such a memorable trip, Ahne.

Ahne has an amazing host and was a great host. If there was anything we might have needed, we knew she'd be there to get it for us quickly.
The house is even better in person with an amazing view of Great Sacandaga Lake. The house has everything you could want (Sonos system, billiards table, hot tub, and fire pit), with so much space to sleep our group of 8, including the "tiny house". Don't forget to get up and watch the sun rise from the dock.
We ventured out on the lake in the personal leisure crafts and enjoyed tying them together and just floating around for a while. Just be ready for the trip back, especially if the waves carry you.
We're already talking about planning our next reunion after this past weekend and it is safe to say, we are probably coming back. Thanks Ahne!

This place exceeded our expectations. Much better than the pictures. Very organized, beautiful and super clean. A lot of activities in the house so as long as you have enough food and drinks you won't have to set foot outside. Ahne is a great hostess and goes above and beyond to make sure you are having a great time; a very down to earth and genuine person, one of those hard to find nowadays. Everything inside and outside of the house is in pristine conditions, decorated in such a way that makes you feel right at home. The house is right on the lake with great access and close to a little island that adds another reason to get on the water and discover that little piece of land.
We had a perfect time and hopefully we'll be back soon.

AMAZING EXPERIENCE! We stayed in Ahne's home for a family reunion and we have ZERO complaints. The location is right by the water with amazing views of Lake Sacandaga and the Adirondacks. The stay includes a ton of water activities including a jetski, kayak, paddle-boat, canoe, and row boat. Ahne will even take you out to go tubing/water-skiing on her boat (for a fee). The home has soo much to do...relax in the jacuzzi, roast marshmallow on the fire pit, play badminton on the lawn, chill out on her private dock-side bench which happens to also be a great spot for fishing! For the adventurous, I'd recommend taking the kayak or paddle boat out to the little island in the middle of the lake, you'll find a sandy beach! There was so much to do, we never left the premises the entire weekend. If you're looking for a lake house get-away, this place has it all. Comfy and clean home with a genuine host who is willing to go above and beyond to make sure your stay is nothing but spectacular. She even offered us her wine when we ran out! Will be returning here again soon.
Susan is a great host. She was super easy to communicate with.
Amazing Home! Big enough for  our big Family! Place was very clean! Looking forward to coming back in the summer!

Amazing place to stay with your friends or big family! Gorgeous interior is unexpectedly kids friendly. Super cozy and comfortable rooms.
Susan is very warm person! Super friendly and responsive!
It was great to stay there in winter, so could imagine how great summer time!

Susan was responsive, friendly and accommodating.  The house was beautiful, charming, and very clean.  We had an amazing stay.  The grounds are very well kept and it has an amazing playground, pond, and fire pit.  The house has everything you could possibly need, with plenty of great quality towels and amenities.  Susan is attentive to every detail in the house, from wifi, to soaps, throws, refrigerator and freezer space, pillows and blankets, DVD collection, etc.  Our family had a wonderful Thanksgiving weekend and we will definitely consider returning for another visit.  Thank you Susan!
We had the best weekend stay! Susan was a great host and everything we needed was provided. We look forward to staying there again soon.

We had a very special and enjoyable vacation in Susan's property. The house is well stuffed with everything you can imagine. Our kids had a magical time especially in the playground, basketball court and the game room. Highly recommended!
Lovely home, wonderful atmosphere and cherished memories! Thank you for a great stay!

Susan was exceptional. She provided quick communications regarding any questions or concerns we had, and her accommodation skills are top notch!
Everything regarding the house was dreamy. We hosted a company outting there and had so much fun utilizing every aspect of the propert and house.
There’s not much more you can ask for.
This place has got it all!
We hope to continue doing this yearly :)
The house was great, location perfect and the host is an authentic 5 star super host!! Will definitively try and go back next year !

This was our second year staying here with family and it was great again! Quiet neighborhood, perfect for the little ones who we could take onto the playground without having to load them up in the car. House manager was responsive and helpful. We love it there!
We absolutely love this place. It’s well equipped with everything you need. Perfect for families with kids! We’ll be back next year!

We were a group of 11 teachers. Our stay at this home was perfect from start to finish! The house was immaculate! It had every convenience we could wish for! We enjoyed our dinners around the large dining room table and sitting by the fire pit each evening. Best of all, we spent our days relaxing by the pool and hot tub! Thank you Susan for being a wonderful host and helping our group of teachers relax after a long school year! We will be back next June!

A true five star experience. Everything about this house was perfect for our large group that included two grandparents, three couples, and six kids ranging from 3 to 11 years old. The outdoor space was amazing and we utilized every bit of it over our stay. Inside, the house was so spacious, everyone enjoyed their own rooms while loving all the game rooms and exploring the unique spots. The location couldn’t be beat, being 25 minutes from downtown Saratoga and 15 minutes to Lake George allowed us to enjoy all the area had to offer. Additionally, this was the cleanest AirBnB that I’ve stayed in, and that’s really saying something given the sheer size of the home. We left talking about when we can make a stay happen again at this property. 100% recommend.
The house was great! The pool was amazing!  Susan was great with communication- although the listing was so accurate there wasn't much communication other than that needed. Thanks for a great time!
Fabulous. Clean, comfortable, welcoming. Amazing older home that brings you back to another era.

We stayed here for a bachelorette weekend and enjoyed every minute of it. The house alone is a amazing and historic, while being extremely cozy. The property is an estate and would be a great place to vacation with family or multiple families. It more than comfortably fit over 15 people and has every amenity you could need. It is situated in an adorable neighborhood with side walks and within walking distance to a great public park. We visited both Lake George and Saratoga Springs which were easy trips to and from. This home feels secluded and private but is also minutes away from major stores/restaurants.  I would stay here again and recommend booking if you’re considering it!
Just a beautiful home and property. The pool and backyard were excellent. We took advantage of the entire house. From playing basketball to grilling and cooling off  in the pool.

Wonderful two weeks in upstate NY!!  We had an absolute blast with a bunch of kids and never ran out of things to do.   Susan was very responsive and made for a great experience.  We would absolutely return to this home!
Fabulous home, outstanding host! We will absolutely book again in the summer! You will not be disappointed!
The house and grounds are beautiful, and the sleeping arrangements were perfect for a big group. Susan was incredibly helpful.
Highly recommendable house.  They got everything you need. Outdoor as well as indoor everything is perfect.
Great place and property!! Susan was a great host. Communication 11 out of 10.

The house is exactly as described, immaculate,  luxurious, cozy and convenient to everything. It is great for families. Five stars. We hope to be back! I can imagine summers are amazing there! Susan is a wonderful host and is incredibly responsive and understanding.

Susan it is a great host! The house is awesome! It has a lot of space, the bedrooms are very spacious, everything it is very clean! The kitchen has everything you need to prepare a good family meal!
The outdoor it is great, the kiddos really enjoyed playing in the playground and with all the snow! We had a great family time! I can’t imagine how fun it can be in the summer time!
It is a great house for a big family! Great for kids and adults!

Dealing with Susan was an absolute pleasure!  I can see now why she's a Superhost.  Her prompt attention and response made all the difference in the world and I would def stay at any one of Susan's properties in the near future.

Loved it! Susan is wonderfully responsive. We rented it for a team retreat and it was perfect.  The fireplaces were an added touch.  It's a quaint old house, so if going in the winter (like us), bring layers-- comfy clothes. :) But otherwise, it's on our list to potentially revisit it when the weather is warm to enjoy the beautiful outdoor features!
Susan was very accommodating and the house had everything our group needed. Would definitely rent again.

Two thumbs up on this Luxury Mansion in Queensbury, NY. Everything was as advertised, and the accommodations were spectacular...clean, spacious, comfortable, fun. Susan was an outstanding host - very responsive and helpful. We were 15 people and found there was plenty of space for us...ample beds, bathrooms, areas to lounge around, kitchen was great - had a nice flow for cooking and serving meals and we loved the large dining room table for meals. We spent a lot of time playing pool and ping pong and just enjoying each other's company in this beautiful setting. Had we been there longer we would have done s'mores by the firepit. But alas we were too comfy and relaxed indoors and couldn't motivate. We can only imagine how beautiful and fun it would be in the summer months with the swimming pool, patio, BBQ, sunroom, pond and outdoor basketball court! We hope to come back soon to experience that. Thank you Susan!
Susan is a great host. She responded to my questions quickly and went beyond to make our stay as comfortable as possible!

Thank you again Susan for opening up your absolutely beautiful home to us! We had the most wonderful time! Our stay was just magical, being able to spend quality time with our family and friends, making unforgettable memories together under one roof! Five stars for sure!
Amazing house!! Very comfortable and lots to do

Beautiful and spacious home!  I hosted my family for thanksgiving (14 of us) and everyone had a wonderful time.    The home is super clean and plenty of room to spread out.  My wife said a good Airbnb has empty cabinets and lots of hooks, this place checked both those boxes.     The sheets are super comfy and the house is solid so it’s quiet when you close your bedroom door.   This helps when you have some that like to go to bed earlier than others.   As for location, you have any retailer you want 5 mins away or 15 to lake George.     We spent a lot of time outside by fire pit and shooting hoops.   If you get the opportunity to stay here, book it.

The place is amazing and very spacious. This AirBnB  offers a lot of entertainment, both inside and outside the house.  It's perfect for old and young, Some of us get to relax and the rest get to play. The host is amazing, she very responsive when we have questions. We'll definitely come back.

This place has everything you could ever imagine and more. We loved every second of staying here. This group of 12 fit more than comfortably and not a single detail was missed. Susans warmth and responsiveness were the icing on the cake to make us feel welcomed and taken care of. Its also close to local attractions and stores in the event you need to grab angthing off the property (although you probably wont want to). Will def find a reason to come back!

Amazing Airbnb experience! The house was incredible - spacious, immaculate and every amenity you could ask for. Susan was the ultimate host with speedy and clear communication making the stay as seamless as possible.
Highly recommend - we will be back!
Susan was incredible. Highly responsive, helpful and friendly. Cannot praise her enough

Our group of 11 adults and 3 toddlers had an excellent time. The property and house was much larger than we expected, and had everything we could have needed and more. Communication with Susan was always prompt.
Great spot
Susan was a great host and provided a comfortable stay in a beautiful home!

This was the perfect week long trip for our family.  Quiet neighborhood, convenient drive to attractions. The house easily fit our group, and is kid friendly.  Well thought out details for visitors- and Susan was very responsive. we hope to come again.
Beautiful property!  Thank you for your responsiveness Susan... My family and I really enjoyed our stay at this amazing residence! 😎👍

The house is stunningly beautiful!  We had no problem fitting our 13 person party there.  We loved the kitchen and pool area and spent most of our time there.  We wish we had more time there than we had.  We’re looking forward to possibly doing it again next year!

We absolutely loved our stay! The house is very well equipped with everything you could need. We had 10 adults and 4 kids under 5, and never felt like we were crowding each other. The estate is beautiful and the outdoor area has it all. Susan was very responsive throughout our stay and helped with a few things we had difficulty with. Thank you so much, we can’t wait to visit again!

This place was amazing.  We stayed with a few families and many kids and it was perfect. In days we only left the house for groceries.  The playground and pool were great,  and the bonus horse shoe pit kept the dads busy!  Inside had plenty of room to entertain us and the kids and we spent many nights in the basement after hours! Really amazing stay, we would and plan to come back! Susan was also great and checked in on us through out. Can't wait to come back!

The house was an amazing escape from NYC.  We went with two families and grandma and we still had more than enough space.  Great outdoor firepit and the playground is so big it is like having a private park in your backyard.  Friendly neighborhood and beautiful trees.

Everything about this home was 5 star!  We had a large family trip with small kids who had a blast on the playground and in the hot tub!  The adults really enjoyed all the great outdoor spaces and playing basketball.  We made some great meals on the grill and spent time around the fire pit.  Just an amazing time in a great place!

8 bedrooms and 8 bathrooms was great to accommodate our stay of 14 people. None of us felt like we were on top of each other or cramped. There was plenty of space as well as a full playground and basketball court directly on the property which was very fun! The hot tub worked great and many of our guests made use of it. One of the coolest features of the house was the TV in the kitchen that would rise out of one of the counters. Very cool!!! We were also able to enjoy the full bar and pool table/game room downstairs. All in all, this place exceeded our expectations and it was a very pleasant stay for myself and all our guests.

What a find!!
We traveled with 3 families. More than enough space. The kids loved “discovering” new spaces in this amazing house. Outdoor activities were endless. Kids played for hours bears the pond and on the playground. Susan was VERY responsive to all our needs.
A great home and host!  We had adults and children who all had a fun few days.
loved it
Great place to stay.  Lots of space, pool, pool house that has everything you need.  Rooms a large,  and a short drive to Saratoga Springs town area.

Just an absolutely perfect house in probably the best neighborhood in Saratoga. Outdoor space is amazing from the pool, pool house / cabana and even the outdoor kitchen.
Really well maintained and Kathleen has everything set up for her guests so you don’t even have to ask questions!
Would love to return to this house many times! Great experience!
This house was fantastic!  Very family friendly (kids loved the pool) and clean.  Close proximity to everything Saratoga has to offer, we would definitely stay here again.

This place is perfect for a group looking to enjoy the local race track or golf. Spent most of our time outside the pool house stocked with a fridge, sink, grill, screened in tv room, etc. the house is very clean and spacious with tons of comfortable beds. Within 2 miles of the track as well in a very nice neighborhood.
Beautiful property and located just minutes from downtown. House is very well maintained. Kathleen was extremely responsive.

Stellar experience. We were a prepared group but if for any reason you are not, this home will make you feel like you didn't forget anything. The home was clean, stocked, accessible and updated. Not a single guest had a complaint. We might have to make his an annual Saratoga trip. 6 out of 5 stars!!
Good location

Kathleen’s house is incredible. We rented it for a bachelor party and was everything we were looking for. Beautiful backyard with a pool, and great location. 5 minutes to the racetrack and less than 10 minutes to downtown. If I come back I’ll be looking to stay here again
Best place to stay in Saratoga!
Can’t put it any better than that this place is the best! Every part of our trip was perfect and Kathleen was a great host. Highly recommend!!

I booked this place to celebrate my 25th birthday and it was perfect from start to finish. Kathleen was very responsive to many logistic questions and a very generous host. Check in was easy. The place was super spacious for my group of 11. We enjoyed the big dining room for group meals and the movie theater room for lounging. The kitchen is well stocked with supplies for cooking. The neighborhood is super quaint and beautiful. The location is nice because it’s outside of downtown but very short drive to any fun activities or dining. The home itself was stunning. Everyone kept commenting on how gorgeous it was to just look out the windows. Would definitely recommend this spot and would book again in a heartbeat any time of year!
Kathleen was a wonderful and communicative host. Her home is beautiful, extraordinarily spacious and very well appointed. Would recommend to any large group looking to relax and unwind!
We had a wonderful time and Kathleen was an exceptional host.  The house was everything it was promoted to be and then some.  Great location in Saratoga and will certainly be back in the future!

We had a long weekend with 8 friends and Kathleens home had everything we could have asked for and more. It was so very comfortable with lots of room and great amenities like a like a home theatre  and beautiful outdoor pool area. The home is very centrally located to all the wonderful offerings Toga has to offer. Would definitely stay here again!

My family and friends spent a long weekend at Kathleen's home. It was one of the best experiences we have had!!
- Super clean, well organized and equipped with everything you can think of
- Plenty of space for a crowd, pictures depict true setting
- Comfy beds and linens
- Very convenient to Saratoga Race Track and Downtown Saratoga
- Amazing pool and pool house with all the amenities
- Great response time and communication with Kathleen
Kathleen is a super host with a super house! Thanks for the memories and we hope to be back!
What a nice home

If you’re thinking about booking this house, do it. Staying here was an incredible experience - perfect for Saratoga racing season, close to all attractions and the pool and amenities are top notch. 5 stars doesn’t do it justice.
This home was beautiful. The hostess thought of EVERYTHING! The property was extremely clean and so well stocked. My traveling companions have high standards and Kneeland’s Best is a winner!!
Kathleen’s home was the perfect place for our trip to Saratoga. It is in an amazing location. The pool made hanging out at the house so enjoyable. Highly recommend!

The house is awesome! Great lawn space and pool area. The pool house is excellent and really makes the whole space.
The kitchen is fully stocked with everything you need from plates etc to spices and herbs.
We had a great time and would highly recommend!
The house is just as beautiful in person as in the listing. Kathleen was a great host. Communication was excellent throughout. I would not hesitate to book again!
Great house and layout for a group of us. Pool area was terrific. Close to downtown and the lake marina!
Kathleen was very communicable and very nice!!! An amazing host!!

Amazing house for a larger group. Beautiful home, with great spaces to hang out. Immaculate lawn and backyard that was fantastic to enjoy with nice weather. Kathleen was super attentive and so kind. Wish I could’ve stayed longer, cannot recommend this property enough.

Kathleen’s place is terrific. We had a family of eight people with two young children. There was plenty of room for everyone and the finished basement was a real treat for the kids, with plenty of toys and games, and for the adults with the gym equipment.  The house is lovely, and most importantly, it’s warm and homey with great touches. It has a fully equipped kitchen as well. We all had a great time.

Above & beyond the best place to stay in the area. The home was immaculately clean. We were even welcomed with a goodie basket upon arrival. The kitchen had every pot or pan you could think of as well as the little things you forget to pack. Our host was incredibly quick to respond & left us to peacefully enjoy their home. You really must check this place out & enjoy a little slice of heaven.
Excellent house for a get together. Beautiful home and yard, and Kathleen was a fantastic host

Kathleen was an amazing host! We both have the same birthday and she had a balloon and small cake there for me when I checked in! Very thoughtful! She was easy to contact, great communication, house was perfect and very clean! Comfortable beds! I would definitely rent again!

We loved Kathleen's property and her accuracy on the photos and description on the website. She was also quick and clear in responding. We were a group of 5 families with kids and we felt like home far away from home.
GPS was not able to locate exactly, but we were able to see the home number on the mailbox and get to it.
Kathleen is an exceptional host, wherein our kids messed with a tie-dye kit and none of us checked and cleaned the basement before leaving. She was very kind to take care of it. I will come back if I get a chance and availability for sure. I felt like home, thanks for being a great host.

This is a beautiful place located in a lovely setting.  We had 13 people for 5 days for our Thanksgiving family reunion and it was perfect.  The media room was great and our guests loved watching some of the football games on the giant screen.   The house was clean and well maintained.  Everything worked as advertised and Brian was always punctual in responding to all of our questions.  There is a large and well-equipped kitchen which was perfect for our big group.  Overall, i would highly recommend this place - it was a lovely experience.
Amenities were great, surrounding areas were beautiful, and the movie theater was really fun to use! Thank you for letting us stay!

We stayed at Brian's house for three nights over the 4th of July weekend. There were 14 of us: 6 kids ages 1 to 7, 6 parents, and 2 grandparents. The house was perfect for us.  It is beautiful.  It is very large so no one felt crowded.  Each of the seven bedrooms has a beautiful en suite bathroom.. The kitchen had everything we needed.  There are chickens in a coop outside that is viewable from the inside, and they entertained the kids endlessly.  The kids put on shows for us in the theater.   The property is very private, yet only a 5 minute walk from a beautiful municipal pool that sells day-passes. There is a pool table. I will finish this review by quoting one of our grandchildren after we left: “They should put in the ad, if you really want to feel at home, come to this house.”

Everyone loved the accommodations! We felt like we were in a mansion. The theater was a great hit, as was the outside space. The little ones totally loved the hidden playhouse under the staircase. What a special treat!
We had 15 guests and there was plenty of room for everyone. We especially appreciated the private bathroom for each bedroom. Brian, it is a great house and location, thank you for allowing our family to share your home.

Excellent property, great amenities and very clean - on several acres of property with back patio to relax outdoors. A few nice personal touches include: pool table, media room with projector that includes 12 reclining leather chairs, and each bedroom has its own full bathroom. Perfect for our group’s weekend getaway.
We had the best weekend! House is wonderful - host are great at communication. Would def rent again!
Awesome place.  We were a group of 6 couples, so it was particularly nice for everyone to have their own bedroom and bathroom.  House and grounds are great.

Lovely spacious place for large gatherings; ensuite baths a bonus.  We were 11 adults.  The unique, private location at the end of the road has access to open walking trails.  Farmer markets and Frenchtown nearby.  Host very responsive when we needed propane gas for the grill.  Appreciate the double washer / dryer units but we didn't stay long enough to need them..  Wish we stayed longer.
Thank you for a wonderful stay!

We rented Brian and Brittany's home so that we could attend our son's wedding with all our family members together. Given that we came from out of state their home provided us with a way to all be together for the entire weekend and take care of each other in a peaceful, safe and beautiful environment. It fit the bill perfectly. Brian and Brittany were very responsive to any and all questions we had and their caretaker, Pete was friendly and helpful as well. We would definitely recommend these hosts and their home.

I am so glad I came across the Historic Riegel Ridge Estate when looking for a place to stay with my family, my two friends, their husbands, and their children. We enjoyed the fact that each bedroom came with its own bathroom, the entertainment the house offered for our kids in the form of a cinema room and a huge trampoline in the garden. That the kitchen was well equipped for home cooking and that the owners helped find us a local chef to cook for us for a night off. There was also a playground within walking distance and we regularly found deer in the garden. The host was very responsive and even came within 20 minutes when we experienced a small plumbing issues. My friend also left something behind that they send to her in the post! All in all, we had a great stay and had a great experience interacting with the hosts. I could not give the hosts and the home anything less than five stars..
We stayed at Brian and Brittany's place for a staff retreat. It worked well for us because each of us had our own bedroom and bathroom. And the movie theater was a nice treat.
Perfect home for a large group. Brian and Brittany were responsive and accommodating. Home was spotless.

Absolutely stunning place! The hosts are also very kind, accommodating, and responsive. I would absolutely love to stay again!! The house was huge in addition to being clean and filled with plenty to do (the movie theater was insane). Highly recommend this place.

Brian and Brittany’s place was absolutely perfect for our girls getaway weekend. It was quiet, peaceful, had everything we needed, and had plenty of space for us to be together or spend time alone. I would highly recommend it!
This home is amazing. Brian & Brittany were great hosts. They have kept the house very well maintained. We had really good time during our stay.

Brian and Brittany's villa was outstanding! From the minute you drive up, the house is breathtaking. The main entryway is stunning. The furniture and decor is beautifully appointed, and we especially enjoyed the gorgeous kitchen with plenty of room for our family. The whole house offered a restful retreat with each bedroom beautifully decorated with their own squeaky clean private bathrooms. We also enjoyed their large media room with big comfy chairs for viewing a movie on the big screen. We wish we could've stayed longer in this beautiful respite from the busy world, and I would definitely stay here again! This Airbnb is it a 10 star home!

As an avid Airbnb user I am very happy to recommend this place. Not only was the house spacious and clean. It was decorated in such a way that you felt personally invited by the host. Bathrooms in each bedroom, entertainment rooms, a massive kitchen and comfortable bedrooms you really can’t ask for much more. Brian and Brittany were so communicative and clear about checking in and checking out and even inquired about a particular set up before we arrived (very considerate as it’s their space). Thank you again for sharing your space with my guest and I. We have an amazing time. God bless
Breathtaking home and view!  Peaceful retreat.

We had an absolutely fantastic time during our stay. We had 7 couples and everyone had their own spacious bedroom and even better, own bathroom. The home, grounds, decor, appliances, you name it, everything is top notch and a cut above many other airBnb's I've stayed at. All of the appliances operate flawlessly and we had ample supplies of everything in the kitchen, bedrooms, and bathrooms. The movie theatre is a fantastic option as well as any of the very large and open rooms. Everything inside and outside was clean and presentable and we enjoyed a few walks around the local township trail as well as park/open space. At any moment myself and my guests had plenty of space to relax on our own or altogether. Everyone absolutely loved this location and asked me when are we coming back! Ha!
Thanks again for hosting us and making it a memorable stay.

My group of 13 had a wonderful stay here. Brian was very responsive throughout the entire process, and we never had any trouble reaching him at all.
The house is very well-kept, spacious, and clean. We loved the kitchen island and theater room as well! This was also the first Airbnb we stayed at that had en suite bathrooms for all of the bedrooms.
Thank you for hosting us, Brian!
just a beautiful place!

Brian was an absolutely terrific host! Really great communicator, very upfront and honest, and was so helpful providing local recommendations, answering questions, and making sure we had what we needed for our stay.  Our family spent the weekend at the house for my Mom's 70th birthday.  The place was absolutely clean and incredibly well maintained.  The bedrooms and beds were very comfortable, and each with its own clean FULL bathroom.  Everyone felt like they were in their own suite when they needed privacy, and yet there was plenty of places inside and outside to congregate and spend time together. Wow! This is a gem!

I stayed at the Honey Pond Farm recently for a long weekend. If you have a group of 16 guys that love to golf and have fun, this is the place. Having the private course, along with awesome views, is well worth the money spent here. The course itself was very fun and had a few really cool tee boxes up on the mountain. The house has plenty of room for everyone to sleep as well as a really cool bar in the basement, that is where we spent most of our time. If we weren’t down there at night, we were out by the gas powered fire pit. We never had an issue with the house or the course. We met the course caretaker, Richie, and he was very nice and never bothered us at all. I would highly recommend staying here.
A very beautiful and and unique property. Our family had a fantastic time. Getting a tee time was extremely easy.
This house and everything that comes with it is amazing.  We spent a lot of time on the golf course.  We had low and high handicappers and everyone enjoyed it...especially "The Heckle Box"!
The pictures did not do this place justice. It was beautiful.  The course was in great shape too!  That paired with great weather made for a memorable weekend.
Amazing
Trip of a lifetime.

This is an absolutely gorgeous location with so many amenities. The private golf course was amazing and perfect for golfers of all ages and skills. The house has tons of cool historic features and the large deck overlooking the property is great for morning coffee and relaxing with a book.

The house and property were incredible. The golf course was in great shape and it was great to hang by the fireplace and in the bar area to close out our evenings. Our stay certainly exceeded our expectations!

Our stay here was incredible. The house is beautiful and spacious. The bar room was a huge hit - as was the large gas firepit right outside the house. The golf course was in incredible shape - and was so much fun to play. Kerry was amazing and texted us to make sure everything was going well. Honey Pond Farm is an incredible spot to spend time with friends and family. Highly recommend!
No matter what you’re expecting or how high your bar…you’ll still be blown away. Honey Pond Farm is every adult, child, sports lover, nature lovers dream come true.
This house is amazing! Truly one of a kind. Kerry is a tremendous host as well.

It is very hard to express how amazing this Airbnb is. For a property this large, everything is was extremely clean and even better than expected. It was heartbreaking to leave this paradise, but we all hope we will be back soon!
Everything about Honey Pond is amazing

Amazing home and property with plenty of activities for everyone of all ages. The host did a great job of communicating and recommending a perfect caterer for our stay. The superintendent, Rich, was very friendly and made sure the course was in shape for our stay. The view from the top of the mountain is unbelievable with a fire pit and grill. Definitely worth every dollar spent there.

Let me first start off by saying… WOW!! My group and I just had some of the best times of our lives. Lots of fun memories were made at Honey Pond Farm. Could not have asked for a better location to celebrate my 40th with family & friends. I really cannot say enough good things about the massive house, the beautiful property grounds, and our host, Kerry. All were super incredible, and Kerry was communicative and accessible. She was quick to answer any and all questions we had. Our stay was for 10 days in February, and we had 16 in our group. At no point did the house feel small. The lower level was by far the go-to spot. It was perfect for entertaining all ages. We spent much time there drinking at the bar, lounging out with cards near the TV throwing down winning hands, sinking 8-balls at the pool table, and sliding to a win playing shuffleboard. The two kids absolutely loved the Harry Potter reading nook under the stairs. Grateful to have experienced this magical place surrounded by those I love. The property views were off the charts and we barely put a dent in the hiking trails. We wound up using Kerry’s recommendation for catering. Her name is Corey, and I also recommend her. Corey and her food were perfect. We all want to book here again. And as a photographer, I should say that pictures really don’t do this house or property justice.

Perfect home for a large group with activities for everyone. The host went above and beyond to make sure we enjoyed your stay, including connecting us with a great caterer for a pig roast. The golf course met exceeded expectations and was beautifully maintained. Worth every penny for the best Airbnb out there!

Amazing property and team.  We stayed over a long weekend to relax, play some golf, tennis, cornhole, hike and enjoy the "game room" in the house.  Kerry was amazing (and Corey was as well!).  Can't wait to go back!

We spent a long fall weekend at this beautiful farm.  The house is outstanding and the view is spectacular.  So many outdoor activities to do followed by drinks around the fire pit.  The hike to the top of the mountain in not to be missed!  The owners were so quick to all our questions.  Highly recommend Honey Pond Farm!!

There is no real comparison to this property/home. Private golf at your back door... and an incredible house to go along with it! Immaculately clean inside and out, I would happily recommend this property to anyone who may be looking. We had a great time here and hope to be back soon!

This house and property are incredible.  The house has so many activities which kept all guests busy for the duration of our stay, and the golf course was fantastic.  From cooking in the wood fired pizza oven, to bocce, horseshoes, cornhole, pool, shuffleboard, golfing, hiking, and more, I couldn't recommend this place more.   Also, the mountaintop is an absolute MUST see.  10/10 recommend this rental, and will be back!

Without a doubt the best airbnb I've ever stayed at. The property is beautiful and has something for everyone. Kerry was extremely attentive and made sure we had everything we needed for our stay. Looking forward to booking another trip here!

Kerry was extremely communicative, answering any questions I had very quickly. She also was helpful in recommending places and services in the area. Finally, she would check in to make sure we didn't need anything and just to update us with any important things about the property.
The house itself was clean, spacious, and the property it's on is gorgeous. Pictures really don't do it justice. We were able to play golf on the private course which was beautiful as well, the grounds crew did a great job.

What an amazing property! The house is beautifully decorated and fully stocked with everything you could need for a stress-free and relaxing vacation. The golf course is amazing, fun, and challenging for all ages. We had everyone on the course from ages 2-68, and everyone had a blast. The golf carts are great to tour the property and get around, and they provide all of the equipment you could need for the various sports that are offered. We had some rain during our stay which really didn't impact us, because there was so much else to do! The gym, pinball machine, shuffleboard, pool table, relaxing nooks to read a book, and even throwing on some rain boots and walking around in the rain was fun! Great for all ages. We had a great make-your-own pizza night using the outdoor pizza oven, and plenty of kitchen supplies and equipment for all of our meals. Kerry was super responsive to any questions and suggestions. You can't go wrong booking your stay here - plenty of room for everyone, and lots of fun for all ages! Hope to visit again!

This is the best AirBNB experience I’ve ever had. The stay exceeded every expectation. The property is stunning and there is nothing more fun than having a private golf course with incredible views and true privacy. Kerry was incredibly responsive and we will most certainly be back.

Honey Pond was absolutely beautiful - more so than the pictures made it out to be. Felt magical at times. Spent our days riding around in golf carts, picking berries, grilling pizzas and s’mores and just enjoying the grounds. Would love to come back and enjoy again during another season. Clean and with friendly staff. Thanks so much for a great stay
Amazing house great for families of multiple generations with so many activities to enjoy. A highlight was the mountaintop barbecue - don’t miss it!

Amazing house and property. Pictures don’t do it justice.

The one very small thing that could be improved is the walk from the parking to the stairs, since there is no walkway and it was icy/snowy and on a slope, it was just a little treacherous for a pregnant woman and older folks to walk up/down and carry luggage. But overall a 5 star stay.

Upstairs unit was spacious, clean, comfy, and just what my toddler and I needed for a few nights away. Game room was a hit. A-frame had nostalgic camp vibes. Sauna and hot tub were perfect for when the little one went to bed. Forgot sound machine for the kiddo and was thrilled they were already in each room. Nice touches like this throughout. Would totally stay again. Up the road from everything you need in Wilton and short drive to Saratoga. Thanks so much Shane! Loved it!

We stayed at the Yay! Frame and loved it! It was large and spacious. The beds were comfortable and warm. The location was easy to find and the host was great. There were directions on all of the amenities for ease of use. Host Shane even came out right before we got there, to check on the heat and to make sure everything was set up and ready to go. We really enjoyed this location and will definitely be back.
Très beau chalet

We had a great stay at the Yay Frame. Tons of space. Lots and lots of beds. Great location. We came up for a few days from Virginia to ski Gore and Whiteface. This was a reasonable distance and exceptional price. We loved the house and the plethora of stuff that was stocked at the house like coffee and body wash. We did have a bit of trouble finding where to park because the sign described in the listing had been plowed over but only because the driveway is so large and spacious, we just wanted to make sure we didn’t block anyone in (the lower apartment was also rented during our stay). The host was very quick to respond anytime we had questions. The hot tub and game room were awesome touches and we really enjoyed them, particularly the hot tub with how cold it was at the slopes. The one “complaint” I had was the rules everywhere and on everything. Quiet time, shoes in the house, food in the dining room, don’t touch the hot tub buttons. All reasonable, and obeyed. But posted everywhere

The YAY Frame was nothing short of amazing. There was plenty of space for my whole family. So many things to do, card games, arcade games and my family’s favorite - The Hot Tub!!! We will definitely be back.
loved it
We had such a great time there and so did the kids can't wait to go back again Shane was an amazing host

We were looking for a getaway from urban living and found Shane's place. At first there was confusion about the listing as we thought we were booking a whole house but Shane quickly clarified (and now specifies on the listing this is an apartment in a shared house).
Shane is super friendly and attentive, responding to our initial concerns quickly. I'd imagine this apt is good for some guests (the arcade is great!) however we were hoping for a quiet rural getaway and didn't really get this as the sound proofing is poor and we could hear the downstairs guests most of the time. They also had a dog off leash which meant we couldn't fully enjoy the outdoor space.
The connecting door to the downstairs apt was open when we arrived; we spent the first night sleepless with a chair against it as we were worried someone could access our apt. Shane rectified this and other concerns the next morning.
It wasn't super clean (dishes, linens/towels, food crumbs on carpet) but it was ok.

We had a wonderful stay at this Shane's place! The space was clean, comfortable, and well-equipped, making it easy to settle in and enjoy our time. We especially loved the spa and sauna—such a perfect way to unwind and relax during our stay.
We really enjoyed our stay and appreciate the host’s attention to detail. Highly recommended for anyone looking for a relaxing getaway!
Shane’s place was perfect for our overnight getaway. It’s spacious, very clean and the hot tub was awesome. Shane is a responsive and friendly host.
if I could rate this place a 10 I would!  The indoor dry sauna was amazing, the live plants all over the home make it so beautiful and homey. Will definitely be returning

We overall had a fine time at Shane's place. One thing is that the description does not say "apartment" clearly anywhere. I even selected "house" or "guesthouse" on the search and this place came up so I assumed this was a house and not an upstairs apartment. We were hoping for a private spot in the woods. Unfortunately this was not it. The house is located on a main road and car traffic is constant.
The apartment is clean but furniture is a little dated. And unfortunately the hot tub has rust spots, so we didn't use it at all. For the price, this is a great place but for us we just wanted something more private and quiet. Thanks for the host though, a lot of folks will love this spot!

Our stay was absolutely wonderful!!! The house was perfect for accommodating our family - fully stocked with amenities- quiet surroundings - spacious - extremely clean - the property manager took care of snow removal right away - we had the best time feeling right at home! Davide was very accommodating with any questions or requests! We will highly reach out for another stay in the future! Thank you so much you made my dad's 80th birthday a memorable one!
Enjoyed our stay! Ideal location, and lots to do at the house
Very helpful with everything I asked for and very beautiful home. I would definitely book with Davide again.

We had a great time at Davide’s place. Communication and check in were straight forward and the property itself was very spacious and accommodating of a large group. Rob, the property manager, dealt with any issues that came up quickly and professionally.
Amazing place!
He was amazing! Would stay here again!
great stay, beautiful property!

David was a great host, was extremely helpful and responsive. On the hottest day of the summer it took some time to cool down the house and David and the property manager were on top of it and working non stop to make us comfortable. Overall it was a great experience in a beautiful home!

This is our second stay at Davide’s beautiful home.  He is an amazing host, incredibly responsive and helpful.  The house is immaculate.  Additionally, the kitchen is well -stocked for a large party.  We cannot wait to visit again next season!
Great spot. Had a wonderful time with our annual family winter getaway.  David’s was very responsive to all of our needs.  Great space to accommodate multiple families. Would highly reccomend it

The house was perfect!! Reserved for my husbands 40th birthday with our friends and it was perfect and comfortable for all of us! The whole home was clean beautiful and able to accommodate all 14 of us comfortably!
Thank you so much for having us and we will be back!

I can’t imagine a better property to host a large family or group. Our occasion was my brother’s milestone birthday and the 16 of us,  friends since childhood in the late 70s, were absolutely thrilled with our accommodations. The house is spacious with multiple areas to gather or getaway, parking was plentiful and essentially everything we needed was available. One night we Uber-ed into town and back to catch some live music, but most of our time was spent “at home,” cooking, soaking in the hot tub or celebrating being together. There’s a Stewart’s just down the road for any forgotten food items and a lovely Bog walk nearby we enjoyed. Couldn’t be more delighted with our stay!
It was a perfect spot for an extended family get together. Great back yard and open floor plan great for groups

We’ve come to this area for the last several years and this was the best stay by far. David was an amazing host. Very responsive without being intrusive. The space was exactly as described and he and his staff went out of their way to make us feel welcome and taken care of. We had a fantastic trip.
My group and I thoroughly enjoyed Davide’s house! Davide was an extremely responsive host - I would highly recommend!

The home was great. We used his home for a work trip for 9 people. Everyone had their own bedroom, and plenty of bathrooms for everyone. The team and David were awesome. We experienced a nasty thunderstorm and mid storm we had David's team on the phone making sure we are ok. A few basement alarms went off due to the heavy amount of rain and within 1hr his team was there to check the basement and reset the alarms, clean the pool due to some mulch flooding into it, and checking on us. Highly recommend working with David and his team.

This Air BnB was very accommodating for our group of guys. There was plenty of room for everyone and the house was extremely clean upon arrival. The best part was the pool/back yard where we spent most of our time. Would stay here again

David’s place was perfect for our girls weekend getaway!
Lots of room for everyone. Great deck for dinner. David made sure we had everything we needed from pool towels to soaps and shampoos and even a surprise welcome basket.
Ice maker wasn’t working, within 10 minutes David made sure we had plenty of bags of ice.
The chef David recommended was great!
Huge house, great location! Highly recommend.
Great spot, great host!
We loved staying at Davides home and would definitely recommend for a large group!
Great house. Great stay!

David's house is spectacular.  Accomodations were spotless and unlike many other houses I have stayed in, Kitchen was fully equipped with all necessary items, bathrooms were fully stocked with more than enough towels and necessary items, even the laundry room was fully supplied.  David was very responsive to all questions before our stay.  I would highly recommend this property for you vacation.
Gorgeous house, in immaculate condition, with a super-responsive host!  Looking forward to our next visit!
I would stay here every time I came to the area!

Davide's house was beautiful, clean, and comfortably accommodated my large group of 17 for a bachelorette party. It was only a 10 minute drive into downtown Saratoga where there are great restaurants, bars, and shops! I appreciated how Davide was extremely responsive to all my questions before and during the stay (and I had a lot!), always getting back to me within 5 minutes. Would definitely recommend staying here.

What an absolutely beautiful home this was. Communication with Davide was smooth, and he was super responsive. I would book this airbnb again in a heartbeat. I recommend this home to anyone looking to get away with a group of friends or family!
We enjoyed our stay in Saratoga springs. House was spacious and clean. Owner was friendly and responsive.

House is beautiful, and a beautiful backyard with pool and hot tub and can accommodate a lot of people. Host always answered right away if there were any questions or anything. Everything was very clean and house looked brand new. Would highly recommend the house to anyone!!

My family and I stayed at Davide's Saratoga home for the weekend (Mix of adults, kids, toddlers and an infant.)
The house was perfect. All bedrooms on the second floor, spacious with adequate space for bags and personal items. Families were able to fit play pens in their bedrooms for their small children/infant.
The kitchen was stocked with everything we needed from dishes to paper towels garbage bags etc.
The house was extremely clean and in perfect distance from the downtown.
The house included a welcome binder which included recommendations and specific instructions for any questions you may run into.
I would recommend this home to anyone trying to have a nice vacation with a large group but also wanting their own space to settle down in at night.

We stayed at Davide’s listing for my husband’s 40th birthday and I cannot say enough about how amazing this house is. When we walked in everyone’s jaws dropped. The kitchen is palatial, the living room spacious and inviting. The master bedroom is spectacular. All of the other bedrooms are beautiful as well. It was like staying at a 5 star hotel with added benefits of privacy and gorgeous outdoor space.
Davide gave clear instructions leeding up to check in and was responsive all the way through check out. We will definitely be back. Thank you Davide!

This house was absolutely perfect for our stay and was above and beyond the pictures in the listing. The home was extremely clean and Davide had immediate responses for any questions/concerns.
The outdoor area is perfect for enjoying games, and the heated pool was nice and comfortable (even in mid-September). I would highly recommend staying that this location for any groups traveling to Saratoga.
Overall, great experience from start of search process to check-out. Davide was extremely responsive and I found the property as represented.
We LOVED this home! It was beautiful, clean, incredibly comfortable beds, and the best backyard and pool! Highly recommend.

This property was perfect  for our large family reunion. The house was immaculate and the layout was perfect. The pool and backyard was incredible. The location is wonderful. I would  highly recommend this property for a large group.   Our stay was awesome!
Awesome stay! Had a fun weekend and everything here was so perfect.
Beautiful home!  I would highly recommend staying here for large group outings!
Davide was a very responsive host. The property was exactly as described. Would recommend this house to any groups traveling in large parties.

This was an absolutely beautiful house and we absolutely loved our stay. The space was amazing and would love to stay here again. An easy Uber/drive into town and the house itself felt very quiet and private for hanging out by the pool. Davide was very responsive and helpful for everything we needed

Davide was an excellent host! The house was as advertised and had everything we needed. Davide was extremely quick to respond to an questions and was proactive to resolve an issue with the internet when their was an outage one of the afternoons we were there. I would stay in his home again in a heartbeat and recommend to anyone who is visiting the area!

This house was simply beautiful. It was very close to the main town, where Uber and Uber eats were no problem at all. The house was beyond spacious. My family of 12 fit very comfortable. The house was fitted with great speakers and massive TVs!
One of the best part was the house is off the road in a quiet area. This was great for privacy! The rooms were a great size, kitchen was massive and the kitchen island was very spacious. Can’t forget how great the hot tub was.
Davide was an amazing host and very response through the whole process. I would strongly reconsider going back to this house! Very beautiful and has everything!! Thank you Davide!!!

Place was great for gathering family. We were in the area for a funeral and family was ablt to stay and be together.  There were large and small areas available to mingle.  Huge open kitchen, well equipped.   Plenty of bathrooms.   Huge yard.  Kids were able to play in the snow and had a ball.  Driveway and paths were well cleared of snow.  Will definitely use this house again.

We've stayed at this home for the second year and it was as beautiful as the first time.  Dave was a wonderful host and responsive immediately after any message I sent.  I would recommend this house for sure!

Went here for a weekend with a group of 12 friends.  The house exceeded expectations and was extremely spacious and clean.  It had everything we needed and was also convenient for getting to town.  Would strongly recommend for any large group.  The master bedroom was especially massive and even had its own fridge.  Davide was responsive and the house was stocked with everything said on description.

The house was in great condition and stocked with all needed supplies (soap, linens, towels, trash bags). Everything was very comfortable. The kitchen was open and very generous space. Hot tub was great. The heated garage was a nice bonus.
We were a few families with kids. Would have been nice to have a basement to send them to play but it worked out great that we were all together.
This house would be amazing for a group of adults as double/queen/king beds would generously accommodate.
The host monitors the open windows and garage and notifies you if concerned.

This house was beautiful. It was so spacious and so clean. Davide was very responsive and helpful with anything we reached out about. We had no issues with anything in the house and hope to come back during the summer so we can use the pool!

We had an outstanding stay. Davide was extremely helpful from reservation to check out. The house was beautiful and just a fantastic place for my family to spend Christmas. We really appreciated all the extra furnishings including paper and laundry goods. Davide thought of every item including small appliances that you could possibly need for your stay. In addition, for a house this size, I thought it was really nice to have 3 ovens and 3 refrigerators!!! If a house this size meets your needs, I highly recommend booking a stay here.
We had the best weekend at the house - it was clean spacious updated! The outside was impeccable a perfect entertaining house. The hosts were so helpful!! Cannot recommend enough

Davide's house is fantastic! The house is huge and perfect for a larger group. It is a great location, close to the track and downtown. It also has amazing amenities- we loved the pool and hot tub! Would definitely recommend anyone to stay here.

Nothing but great things to say about Davide, his home and his management team. The house was wonderful. Minutes from the track and all that downtown Saratoga has to offer. We went with a group of 14 for a reunion on a HOT long weekend and quite honestly, barely left the house because it has it all. We spent almost our entire stay in his great pool. The house was clean and perfectly maintained. Overall, very well appointed as far as kitchen, grill and all of the accessories you could need for a large group. He and his team responded in minutes to any questions we had before and during our stay. Overall 10/10. We’ll be planning another reunion trip to Davide’s house next year.
Amazing place to stay!

We couldn’t have enjoyed our stay any more. Renee ans Alex were wonderful responsive hosts. The house had everything you could
Possibly imagine. There was nothing we needed. They provided everything. The house was so cozy. The beds were the most comfortable I’ve ever slept in! Everything fully stocked. My kids really enjoyed the hot tub, games, basement, and private space to place outside! We cannot wait to return. It’s a little slice of heaven!

We had a great stay at this Lake George place.  The place was spacious and easily accommodated 5 of us + a dog.  The fireplaces + the hot tub were especially great for keeping warm during the cold days.  Renee was very responsive and kept us updated on snow shoveling.  We would definitely return the next time we're in Lake George.

Beautiful house for a wonderful winter family getaway. Renee and Alex were extremely responsive and helpful and the home had every amenity that we (including our dog) could possibly need. Awesome new finished basement and hot tub were great. We will be back for sure!

We had a Girls Getaway Weekend & Woodlands Retreat was just perfect!  The place is beautifully decorated, clean & spacious.   The beds are really comfortable. Easy to find located in the Adirondack woods & so peaceful. Had everything we needed to enjoy a relaxed & fun weekend. We will be back!

The Woodlands Retreat was an absolute treat! From the moment we walked in, it felt so welcoming. Communication with Alexander and Renee was effortless, and entry was a breeze. The entire space was incredibly beautiful and comfortable—from cooking in the well-equipped kitchen to a great night’s sleep.
We especially loved the peaceful yard and made full use of the well-stocked fire pit. The hot tub was such a bonus—perfect for relaxing on a quiet Sunday and after our hikes.
Everything we needed was just a short drive away. Our family enjoyed exploring Lake George, Oktoberfest and attending a family wedding. We’ll definitely choose to stay here again the next time we’re in the area!
Great place. Quiet

Enjoyed a lovely weekend at the Woodlands Retreat. Alex and Renee were great hosts, both proactive and responsive. Everything is well-stocked and cozy enough to make you feel right at home. We are already planning a return visit next season!

This was a return stay for us. We absolutely love the location, close enough to everything, but when you arrive back, it feels so quiet and relaxing. The hot tub is a huge plus, especially after a full day of being on your feet exploring! They have everything you could possibly need or want throughout your stay. The beds and furniture overall are comfy and it’s very easy to feel right at home! Thanks again for another great stay!
Super place great  amenities. Wry  quiet Alex and Renee has  a beautiful home our family enjoyed it,!
My family had a lovely stay!

We LOVED this house! By far one of the best AirBnbs we have stayed in. The house was clean, well stocked, and very comfortable. The decor made it all the more charming. The amenities were great and the hosts friendly and responsive. We can’t wait to come back!

Renee and Alexander's house embodied the essence of the Adirondacks. It was clean, comfortable, and accurately represented. Everything was fully stocked with many amenities and extra add ons that made this rental stand out. In addition to a wonderful home, the hosts were very responsive, proactive and eager to suggest fun experiences for our family. Knowing we had children they went above and beyond to get us in early which was also appreciated. We definitely will be back!

We loved staying at the Woodlands Retreat!  Renee and Alex were the host dream team! Truly, you couldn’t ask for two better hosts. As for the home, it was so welcoming and peaceful without going anywhere time to time. From the decor, living space, comfy beds and amenities including all the details such as the S’more kit and wine. As for the outdoor space, this was beyond perfect for us. It truly couldn’t have been more suiting for our group ranging from age 20 months - 44 years. We hope to come back to make more memories! 🙂 Thank you for the wonderful stay and experience!

Such a wonderful location with great amenities. Everything was clearly as described and Renee and Alex were both very responsive and accommodating. They made us feel like we were at home. They had excellent and thorough recommendations for the local areas. We truly enjoyed our stay and my kids already said they want to come back to that exact location again.

Third time my group has stayed here. The house and property are VERY well kept, comfortable, cozy, peaceful and inviting. Renee and Alex are wonderful to deal with, friendly, cheerful, quick and easy communication. I highly recommend them and their property. I am sure we will be back!
What a great stay at Alex and Renee’s! A beautiful home, well-located, with all the amenities we needed. It was quiet and cozy, close to the lake. We had a blast!

Loved our stay! Everything was perfect and had all the comforts of home and then some!
Can’t wait to go back.

We had a wonderful time at Lake George and Renee’s place was perfect.  It was clean, tidy, and very welcoming.  The location was exactly what we wanted.  It was nearby to everything but also far enough away to be private and quiet.  The hot tub was a bonus!
Woodland retreat was such an inviting space to relax and unwind.  Close to the downtown area but secluded.  Beautiful area to sit outside with plenty of seating.  Would recommend to friends.

Woodlands Retreat was the perfect escape! The setting is peaceful and surrounded by nature, offering a true sense of relaxation. The cabin was spotless, beautifully decorated, and had all the essentials for a comfortable stay. One of the highlights was definitely the hot tub!!
Renee and Alex were incredibly responsive and welcoming, making check-in and communication smooth and stress-free. You can tell they’ve put a lot of thought into creating a cozy, inviting space. We wouldn’t hesitate to return and highly recommend this spot to anyone looking for a quiet, well-cared-for retreat in the woods.

Celebrated my daughter’s college graduation and had wonderful family time at Renee and Alex’s  place! Their home was cozy, clean, beautifully decorated and had everything we needed. Loved the convenience to the outlets, restaurants and the Village. Nights were fun filled with board games, hot tub time and relaxing by the fire! Thank you Renee and Alex!
Renee’s home was amazing. Fully stocked and beautifully decorated. The king size bed was just like sleeping in my own. The gift, wine and smores just added to an already perfect place!

Our family thoroughly enjoyed our stay! The home was clean and cozy; it was well decorated and fit the description and surroundings! It’s clear the owners truly care about the experience of staying in their space, lots of great little touches that made our stay perfect!
The owners were proactive in letting know how to check in, as well as letting us know they were ready for the winter weather that was to arrive, with a plow guy arriving to clear the snow.

Renee’s place was perfect for our group of 5. It was warm and cozy and had all the amenities. The hot tub was terrific and the location was perfect for exploring the Lake George area. Renee was super responsive the entire time and was especially helpful the morning of our check out when it had snowed 8 inches over night. They had the driveway plowed early for us so we were all able to easily get out. It is really a great spot!
beautiful place!  everything was clean, kitchen had everything we needed to cook.  well taken care of and very comfy.  we would love to book again and revisit in the warmer months

My husband booked the woodlands Retreat for a weekend getaway with our dog Maui. We really enjoyed our stay and look forwarding to coming back in the summer with our family. Renee and Alex were very responsive hosts and were so friendly and accommodating. We loved how close we were to Lake George, about 7 minutes, but far enough away in a beautiful retreat. We loved seeing the stars from the hot tub with slight snow fall. We really appreciated the wonderful ammenities and the asthetic/theme of the home. The minute you walk through the door, you feel right at home.

We had an absolutely wonderful stay at this Airbnb! The space was spotless, beautifully decorated, and exactly as described in the listing. Renee and Alex were incredibly welcoming, providing thoughtful touches like lots of fresh towels, local recommendations, and even a bottle of wine to help us settle in. They also sent a beautiful bouquet of seasonal flowers — very classy! The location was perfect—quiet, yet close to everything we wanted to explore. I couldn’t have asked for a better experience and would definitely recommend this place to anyone looking for a comfortable, relaxing mountain getaway. Can’t wait to return!

This Woodland Retreat was everything and more. Private, quaint, and so homey. We stayed over thanksgiving and were lucky enough to get a beautiful snow. The kitchen had everything we needed and the yard was the perfect place to unwind. We highly recommend!

We came to the area for our sons states cross country meet and Renee and Alex's place was perfect. We were close to Saratoga and Queensbury. The house felt like we were in a quite Adirandack cabin despite being close to main highways and the hottub was a bonus! Their communication was great the whole time, I would highly recommend staying here!
Extremely beautiful!! Renee goes above and beyond with special touches throughout the home. I highly recommend this AirB&B and would stay here again when we are in the area.

We had an amazing time! The house was in the perfect location, a short drive to town but secluded enough to feel like you were camping in the middle of the woods! House had everything we needed from extra towels, sheets and pillows to plenty of kitchen supplies! Would definitely stay here again! Host was very quick to respond to any questions we had!

Renee’s home was the perfect weekend getaway! Minutes from downtown and  Million Dollar Beach on Lake George! The house is nestled away in a wooded location which makes the place feel cozy and safe! The hot tub was the perfect way to end a busy day at the lake and the electric fireplace in the living room made it so easy to cozy up for a movie! We can’t wait to stay here again!

This was our first time renting near Lake George! The house was perfect, the hot tub hit the spot after long days of walking around downtown area next to the water. The paved driveway had ample room for all our vehicles! Very clean and had everything you could ever need! Would ABSOLUTELY rent here again!

This is the second time we have stayed at Renee’s home (last time was winter). We had everything we could need for a great time both in and out of the house. We enjoyed the hot tub fire pit, and backyard patio. The location is perfect for absolutely anything you could want to do in the Lake George area with kids; Six Flags, mini golf, great restaurants, boat rides, local beaches, you name it, are all within a 15 minutes drive. Plenty of space and privacy for our three kids. We cooked a couple of meals in the house, but also you have loads of options if you want to have your meals out. We had a couple of questions while we were there and they were answered asap. We would recommend Renee’s home to anyone who asks! Our kids didn’t want to leave.
We had a great trip, and highly recommend Renee’s home! It was quiet, and Renee thought of everything! One of the best places we’ve stayed!!

Whatever you are choosing to do for your stay, this home is a great fit! Quiet, private, peaceful yet minutes away from town.
It was such a wonderful week with our family and the dog! From the moment we walked into this beautiful house, it became our home. It was nice to come back from our busy days and just relax. Our nights were filled with board games, the hot tub or fire pit, lots of talking and most of all love and laughter!
Every inch of this home was so well thought out that there wasn’t anything more we could have asked for. Renee & Alex were so kind and great hosts! Thank you for sharing your home and doing it right!
Great location and wonderful cozy house.  Fantastic hot tub and very close to amenities.   Thanks so much for hosting us!

We had the best time at Renee and Alex's cabin  - our kids did not want to leave! From the moment we stepped foot into the cabin, we felt right at home. Renee clearly took the time and paid attention to all the little details, from the decor inside the house, to the peaceful & relaxing outdoor area. The welcoming bottle of wine and s'mores kit (which our kids devoured) were also such a nice touch. Both Renee and Alex followed up to make sure we found the place OK/made sure we checked in with no issues and were very responsive. The location couldn't have been better as well, we were a 5-10 minute drive away from almost everything we wanted to do. We would love to come back again - our kids are already talking about next year!

So I came to Renee's place for a lil Bachelorette party with my 2 girls and WE LOVED IT!  Renee's place was so welcoming and warm, it is so peaceful and very private which is what I looove. Everything was clean,  she had the hot tub nice and ready for us! The bedrooms were great! TV in all rooms! The outside area was everything, beautiful landscape, plenty of area outside to hang out; meaning she has an area with the hot tub, area for hanging out by the fire, area for family style eating AND a area for just lounging! Now who can beat that?!! Renee and Alex, your spot was the best air bnb spot hands down I've ever been at. So thank you once again for such a wonderful place cause we had a WONDERFUL time!!! Thank you Renee and Alex. My girls and I WILL be back!
Great stay for a boys weekend. Renee was very communicative throughout. Loved the nice little touches in the house. Close to restaurants and lake George
One of the best locales at which I’ve ever stayed. Hope to be able to stay here again in the near future!
So happy to be able to return to this beautiful place again this year!  So close to everything but feels like you’re away in the woods! Great hosts, always responds with any questions!
Had a great stay! Beautiful house!
great place great host, ya gotta love that! all around a fantastic experience. booyah baby!

Beautiful home located right off the interstate.  Close to town.  If you’re looking for a place to unwind and feel like you’re in the comfort of your own homes this is where you should stay. My girlfriends and I enjoyed are weekend away from the craziness of our day to day lives.

We absolutely loved our stay. My guests have been raving about it. We already cannot wait to return! Renee and Alex were very accommodating — they provided us an early check in and late check out as there weren’t scheduling conflicts. The house was well stocked with everything you could need for a party of 6. Recommendations were provided which was extremely helpful. The house is located in the perfect area with a balance of privacy while maintaining close to activities nearby! 10/10 would recommend.
My family and I had a great vacation at the Woodlands Retreat. The location was perfect and the hosts were very responsive. We would definitely stay there again.

This place will make you immediately feel at home! Between the cozy welcoming feeling of the house and the genuine kindness of Renee and Alexander, the whole family felt the love in this special place and we can not wait to get back! Great memories are made here! Thanks you two for a lovely birthday and holiday celebration! You went above and beyond with all your thoughtful touches.

Renee & Alex were the most generous and kind hosts I have ever had. They went above and beyond to give me and my family an unforgettable Christmas. The home was beautiful and decorated for Christmas, there were plenty of amenities and the home had everything we needed, including a cabinet full of games the whole family enjoyed. The location was also perfect and close to stores, Main Street and a number of hiking trails. I highly recommend Renee’s home!

Loved our stay here! The hosts were proactive leading up to the stay, even offering local recommendations. They were also responsive as I asked several questions during the trip. It snowed one evening while we were there and the driveway was plowed out before we even woke up the next morning. We’ve stayed in this area many times before, so my favorite aspect of this property specifically is its peaceful & private location, while still being accessible right off the highway. We brought our toddler and dog and both enjoyed the house.
Davide was very quick and responsive to any questions we had.  The house was as described.  It had all the necessary equipment for cooking and for going into the pool. It was a great stay.
We had a great time during our stay in Saratoga Springs. The house was great and had plenty of room and amenities for my group. I would definitely recommend staying here!
