The home is wonderful and spacious! Very clean. The host is very responsive for any questions! The house had everything you needed and more ! It was the perfect size for our larger group. Highly recommend !

Absolutely loved the property. Loved all of the kitchen supplies and the cute touch of the Welcome Gift! Everyone had a nice comfortable bed and CLEAN bedroom as well. The backyard is perfect for sun bathing!
Davide was an excellent host and great at communication!
Would 10/10 recommend for all future guests!

Might be hard to believe but Davide’s house looked even better in person!All the amenities were fantastic and everything inside the house was very high quality. The backyard was huge and all the land back there was beautiful; it made me feel like I was in the middle of a forest. The location was great and it was so easy to get to everywhere we needed to go. Davide was a great host with prompt responses and made checking in and out extremely easy. Overall I highly recommend staying here if you’re looking for one of the best places to stay in Saratoga!

Couldn’t have been better! The house was beautiful and equipped with everything we needed. Davide was very helpful and the location was great. I would recommend this home to my friends and family without hesitation. Thank you for everything!

Awesome experience!! The house was absolutely beautiful and communicating with Davide was easy. He was readily available to promptly answer any questions before and during our stay. I stayed with a group of 12 women for a girls trip! The area is beautiful and the house has everything you need for a great time! I hope to return!!

I can’t say enough about how beautiful this house was.  We all had more than enough space to enjoy alone and group time.  Everything was extremely clean, from the dishes to the sheets and towels. The TV, Alexa and WiFi set up was all great as well.  Thank you for an amazing time and we look forward to visiting again!!!

Ours was a group of 16 including several kids. We had an excellent time. The house is spacious, very well maintained, and tastefully decorated / furnished.
David is a great host and very responsive.
Highly recommended!

We had a fantastic time at Gratitude and Grace! The property is so peaceful and relaxing. The pool area was thoughtfully designed with places for shade and sun. The grounds were expansive and absolutely gorgeous. Our family had so much room to spread out and plenty of places to come back together. Our host was so proactive in communicating and making sure we were comfortable and taken care of. We would definitely stay here again.

We went for a family vacation and everyone had the best time, the adults and the kids! We couldn’t have asked for a better host and home! Beautiful, unique, plenty of room, and homey! The history of the home was great and the kids loved exploring all the rooms and the huge grounds! Thank you Ron for a vacation to remember.
What a fantastic vacation! Ron was a great host. The house was beautiful and comfortable and the grounds were just gorgeous. We loved the whole trip!

Wonderful LARGE rustic farmhouse. Yes, the place is older, but well maintained and was clean when we checked in. Plenty of space between the multiple bedrooms and living areas. Huge backyard. Good sized pool and great hot tub. Easily accommodated our family of eight.
The location is secluded, so if you’re looking to walk to anything, this ain’t your spot. It is about 15 mins to Ithaca proper, and only two turns to get there. It is a good central location to get to the myriad of wineries in the region.
Def recommend and would stay there again. Ron and his associates were attentive hosts without being intrusive.

Our stay at Ron's Airbnb was absolutely phenomenal – truly one of the best experiences we've ever had! From the moment we arrived, we were completely captivated. The house itself is even more beautiful and charming in person than the photos suggest, which is saying a lot because the pictures were already stunning.
Everything was impeccably clean, from the sparkling interior of the house to the crystal-clear pool, which was a joy to use. What truly set this property apart, however, was the landscaping. It was breathtakingly beautiful and meticulously maintained, easily some of the nicest we have ever seen at any rental.
Ron was an excellent host, and the entire experience was seamless and delightful. We cannot recommend this Airbnb highly enough and would absolutely love to stay here again on our next visit! Thank you, Ron, for allowing us to create such great memories here!
Excellent home, spacious for three couples and two dogs!  Easy access to the lake area.  Quiet and great backyard!
House was clean and a close drive into town. Host was very helpful and responsive.
Beautiful home and was a wonderful location! Would def stay again!

We loved our stay at Debbie’s! It was spotless and lovely. One tiny suggestion. We couldn’t find an electric water kettle or a teapot. An easy way to boil water quickly would have been appreciated. Otherwise, we had everything we needed!
Very clean. Owner thought of everything. Main room has an open airy feeling. Good use of space in the bedrooms.
House was well appointed, clean, and very comfortable. Excellent place to stay while visiting Central N.Y.
The stay was wonderful, house smelled fresh and clean when we walked in.  Had a lovely time.

We loved staying here!
Space was beautiful, clean, organized and spacious!
Excellent location!
Would recommend to anyone!

We had a lovely stay at this home. It is newly renovated and is close to Skaneatles village. Our host was very responsive. The instructions for checkin and checkout were clear. We felt right at home, the beds were so comfortable. The place is very light filled and clean. Excellent property with the privacy of a backyard and secluded road. We really enjoyed the deck off the kitchen, great for having morning coffee.

Beautiful newly remodeled ranch house with a private backyard. Quality remodel - feels like new with a beautiful furnished deck. My only concerns to share with a potential Renter are that the backyard isn’t fenced (we knew this but a fence would be a tremendous addition!) and the beds are very hard. Otherwise it’s ideal.
Everything was very smooth. It was as described and Debbie was in constant communication. We found the home very clean and close to town. We had a great time.

Super maison très propre et très fonctionnelle, au calme!
Debbie est une propriétaire très réactive.
Je recommande cette maison sans hésiter

The house was great; very clean, modern, and recently updated. The kitchen and outdoor deck were particularly nice. The house is spacious and the beds were high quality and comfortable. Skaneateles village is only a 6 minute drive. When I reached out to Debbie with a question, she was immediately responsive. Would definitely stay here again!
The house was very nice. It was clean and updated. We were very happy
We had a great family vacation. Debbie was amazing, very helpful. Can’t wait to come back again next year!

We absolutely enjoyed our stay. This felt like our home away from home which keeps with the theme of Skaneateles. We stayed here for my daughter’s wedding weekend with our two dogs and we couldn’t have been more comfortable. And the adorable ice cream shop which was walkable was a sweet bonus.
We will be back!
We were two couples and had a great weekend here. The home was very clean, the beds comfortable and we were very close to town. Would definitely stay here again.
My partner and I stayed for a long weekend with our two dogs. The house was comfortable, clean, and spacious. The location was perfect, quiet rural surroundings and just a 5 minute drive to town.
We loved it! Clean, easy to get to, huge kitchen, modern decor.

My family had a great stay and enjoyed everything the home and Skaneateles had to offer. We even watched fireworks from the family room as we rang in the New Year. Thanks Debbie for providing an excellent Airbnb. We would be happy to return the next time we visit the area.
Regards,
Brian

We are from Upstate ~ familiar with area.  The house was perfect, cozy and honey.  Great location to town.  Debbie is a consummate professional. Gracious and proactive… highly communicative.  Thank you very much. Will definitely rent from her again. So easy.

We spent 4 nights at this home and it was a perfect location for our little reunion of 4 girlfriends. We enjoyed the fire pit, views of the lake and catching up while sitting in the numerous sitting areas! A perfect weather weekend as well. Combination of old and new in the house was delightful. The steep stairs to upstairs were intimidating at first but we were used to them by the end of the trip. This would be a gorgeous location for a family get-together too. Loved, loved the outdoor spaces and size of lawn.

We really enjoyed our stay and will likely come here again when visiting Skaneateles. Dave is a great host who is always responsive and helpful. The home has a number of great features, including a screened in porch with an amazing view of Skaneateles Lake, a perfect spot to have a morning cup of coffee.  Awesome place that is perfectly clean and has all amenities in working order. I highly recommend Dave’s place!

Dave was a great host, any time we had questions or concerns he responded immediately throughout the whole trip. Will definitely be returning if I am ever in this area. Great sound system throughout the house, very nice fire place in the living room with its stand alone surround sound system. Huge windows facing the lake that create a great vibe in the morning. Biggest thing is that the place was spotless.

Dave’s place was absolutely beautiful! The pictures do not do it justice. It was everything we’d hoped for and more - quiet, peaceful, relaxing, and beautiful! The house has everything you could possibly need and the hot tub was an added bonus. We hope to come back in the warmer weather to enjoy the fire pit and outdoors! Highly recommend this property!
Beautiful home. It’s was exactly what we hoped.
Dave’s place is so comfortable and spacious. Dave reached out to us and made us feel right at home, even before we arrived.

Our stay exceeded our expectations . Dave was responsive, friendly and helpful. The home was well appointed with everything you would need for a pleasant stay. There is a beautiful view of the lake. We loved the home and hope to be back again soon! We highly recommend this home.

Widewater is a comfortable, beautiful house overlooking Skaneateles Lake. Our family of six adults and two kids appreciated the layout that provided both communal and private spaces, the gorgeous landscaping, and the appropriate renovations to an historic structure.  Watching the kids play on the extensive lawn with their cousins will be a sight that I remember for a long time. We would definitely stay here again. Guests should note that the house is on East Lake Rd, which is a somewhat busy two-lane road, and traffic noise is audible in the front upstairs bedrooms in particular, though not in the main rooms downstairs (since I am familiar with the area, this was not a surprise). Dave was a VERY responsive host and we look forward to his continued improvements to the property.
Dave was a great host, very responsive and available to help when we needed. The view from the house is beautiful!

Thank you so much for sharing your beautiful home!  Your home absolutely exceeded my expectations. From the breathtaking view to the warmth and peace inside the house.  Our family was very comfortable and pleased. We can't wait to stay again!

This is a great house if you have a large group (8) if you have a couple of kids.
The common rooms are large and comfortable and the kitchen is well equipped. The view is awesome
Great home and host!

We came for a wedding in the area with a bunch of cousins. The house was a great place to hang out together.
This is a stunning house in perfect shape. It’s hard to describe the feeling. It’s a modern house with a cabin in the woods feel. The kitchen is in fine shape and is in process of an upgrade. The house feels sprawling like a one room cabin in the woods that had lots of well done appendages added to it over the years. A long narrow staircase here, a small step connecting two rooms there, a secure unused front door leading into a bedroom on the top floor. Plenty of private space for 8 people so we didn’t feel swished. But also at least 4 totally separate congregate areas so we could hang out together.
Dave was super responsive, helpful and pleasant and stayed reachable the entire time we were in the house.
This was a new area of New York State for us, but we aim to return and look around.

We totally enjoyed staying at Dave’s place for our first time family visit to Skaneateles, New York. The view was beautiful, and the house was lovely. Dave is very responsive and easy to get in touch with. We definitely would stay there again.
A beautiful home, the scenery was beautiful.   We  had plenty of room for 6 people.  There was outdoor seating to look at the lake. The kitchen  was well stocked

Our family stayed very comfortably at Dave's beautiful home for three nights while attending a local wedding.  Beautifully restored building, comfortable furnishings, interesting art, functional kitchen, extraordinary grounds overlooking Lake Skaneateles.  Absolutely pefect!
This home was absolutely perfect for our family vacation, lots of space, nicely decorated, and great views of the lake!  Would definitely recommend booking this place for your next family vacation!
Perfect spot! Gorgeous view! The home was spotless, and even better than the photos. Dave was very responsive and helpful with any questions we had. Highly recommend staying here!

Our family had a relaxing time at Dave’s;  a roomy home with a beautiful view.  Dave was very helpful and responded quickly with all our questions. The home was clean, and well stocked with kitchen supplies.
Very nice lake house.

The house was absolutely beautiful and the view even more so. There is plenty of space, while still feeling cozy. The house had anything we needed. Dave was incredibly responsive, helpful, and personable. My family and I will definitely be coming back and will highly recommend to anyone visiting the area.

This house was a beautiful house with a wonderful yard .  We are a family of seven and we fit perfectly.  The house seemed a bit quirky to get around in but we loved it and it seemed to be part of its charm to us.  Dave was an excellent host who got back to us immediately when we had a problem with the internet .  Talking and walking us through it all.    The problem might have been caused by one of my little ones , I’m really not sure but Dave stayed on the phone with us for quite awhile to fix it.  We can’t say enough.  This is a house that we are hoping to go back to and enjoy all that is offered in the area.  We were immediately greeted with fresh peony flowers from the yard in a vase.  I enjoyed sitting on the deck taking in the beautiful view from the back yard

The house is unique, interesting, and the setting is very beautiful. The view of the lake and expansive lawn are gorgeous along with a lovely side garden which had blooming poppies, lilacs and rhododendron when we were there. One should be aware that the house is on a busy road, which can be noisy in the front of the house, or if windows are open, and it may be a safety hazard for children.  This was an excellent value and Dave was easy to work with.  While there were some glitches, the rental is new, and I’m confident Dave will address those for the next guests.

A beautiful home with incredible views, in a hidden gem of a location.. I hadn’t heard of Skaneateles while booking this home, but so glad we decided to stay here! Perfectly located from key cities such as Rochester, Syracuse etc.
Dave was a great host and extremely communicative.. would certainly recommend this place to anyone looking for a place to stay in upstate New York.

I visited the house with 2 friends and we couldn’t have been more pleased with the place.  Lovely views from almost every room.  The property is beautiful and the house is immaculate.  We loved the screened-in porch and the 2nd floor balcony overlooking lawns and lake.  The kitchen could use an update but everything works and it is well equipped.  Dave is a great host and we will be sure to book this place again.
The house is lovely and well appointed. Just a short walk into Skaneateles.
Our stay was great. The place was very comfortable and clean. Plenty of linens and comfortable beds. Close to town, easy parking. We will be back!

My friends and I enjoyed a Spa weekend while staying at Debbie's house, which was walkable to Mirbeau Spa, so very convenient for us. The house had everything we needed and was very comfortable, we spent a lot of time enjoying the fireplace in the living room. We would definitely come back again.
Beautiful home, perfect location

We have stayed at this location a number of times and it is always A+. The location is fabulous with an easy walk to downtown. The house is very comfortable, spacious, and beautifully decorated. Debbie provides very clear and helpful directions for check-in, our stay, and check out. We look forward to returning.

We loved our recent stay.  The house is just as pictured and is warm, welcoming and comfortable.  It’s also in an ideal location that is  just a short walk to all the shops and restaurants downtown.  We were in town for a family wedding and lucked out with a perfect, fall weekend and a great place to retreat to!
Great spot

This home near the village of Skaneateles needs to remain a secret!It is conveniently located in a nice quiet neighborhood. The village, with its’ many  boutiques, shops, restaurants was very near. The home with a fenced yard was beautifully and tastefully decorated. We were in the area for a dog show with our dogs, and this home was so comfortable for all of us! The kitchen was very well stocked, lacking absolutely nothing. Should we come to Skaneateles again, we will definitely look to stay here again. I’m hoping that this home and host Debbie, do not get too popular; otherwise it may not be available to us!
Look no further than one of Debbie's properties for your stay! She is an amazing host, and her homes are beautiful!
Great communication with host and nice walkable location.

Our stay was very comfortable and felt like home ! It was warm and cozy and we had the fireplace just in case. It was perfect distance to Mirbeau (literally behind the backyard) and was seconds drive to the town! There were so many delicious places for food and drinks and take out ! Everyone was friendly in town as well. Our pup had a great backyard he was able to enjoy the snow in and loved the space just as much as us!
Thank you and can’t wait to be back!
Absolutely gorgeous and spotless inside! We all had a great stay and would book again with her for sure!
Debbie was a great host. We really enjoyed our stay and felt right at home. Beautiful home in a great location. We hope to stay again soon!

This was such an amazing place to stay for our 10th anniversary! We brought our beautiful dogs with us and they were welcome with open arms!
We definitely will come back and recommend this to anyone who asks us.
Simply a great relaxing experience!
Debbie was a great host!
We walked everywhere with our dogs, and never needed to drive the car once after arriving. Only had to get in the car to drive home!
What a blessing this was!!
Great place to stay for a long weekend. and Debbie is super!

Absolutely beautiful property, neighborhood was peaceful and quiet. Walkable to downtown and  the water. Came for a wedding and the property gave us a relaxing place to come back to. The place was clean and pristine and felt like a home away from home.

Skaneateles is an expensive town so the price of the rental was commensurate. The renovations were well done. There wasn’t anything I wished we had. (maybe the 2 missing puzzle pieces…but there was a note in the box!) Most appreciated was the abundance of paper products…especially Kleenex!  It was very easy to work with Debbie.
Beautiful home.  Short walk to town.  Great communication.
Love the house and the area of Skaneateles

Great house, very comfortable and super clean. We had everything we needed. Our check in code wasn’t working upon arrival and Debbie responded within 60 seconds and gave me the updated code. She was kind and responsive to all of our needs. We also appreciated an earlier check in bc we had a wedding rehearsal to get to and Debbie was so helpful. Would definitely stay here again! Thank you Debbie!
Loved our stay at this AirBnB - highly recommend!!

A+ rental. Beautiful home with everything you need for a comfortable stay. The host was so helpful with instructions and being available for questions. The location is fabulous..very close to downtown with restaurants, stores, etc. We will stay again.

This home is impeccably decorated. It’s extremely clean and instructions are very clear. Debbie is very communicative and the location is superb and just a couple of blocks from the center of town, but also on a quiet street.
I love this place!
Fantastic! Great time, great house!
Loved the decor and the home was pristine!!!
Great stay

Debbie’s place was perfect! It was a girls’ weekend for 5 of us coming from three different states. It rained the entire time we were here, but it didn’t matter. We walked to Mirabeau Spa around the corner, and Rosalie’s just beyond the spa. We walked into town for a bit of shopping and drinks and nibbles. Every room had a tv, but none of them were turned on as we spent most of the time at home in the living room and kitchen talking, laughing and just rejuvenating our souls and spirits.
Debbie was great, and responded within seconds of any texts we sent, which were only a few. But, she reinforced that should we need anything, to let her know. Honestly, we needed nothing because she had thought of everything! Thank you for that. ☺️👏🏻
Our group loved Skaneateles and this house, and already talked about a return trip.
A wonderful place!! We loved the space - 3 of us traveling for work. It had everything we needed.

We loved our stay at Debbie's place and would stay there again. Debbie was extremely responsive and accommodating.   House is extremely nice, super comfortable and exactly was pictured (or better!)  We highly recommend.   Great house and great host.

We had a beautiful and relaxing stay in Skanateales! The special touches , decor and furnishings made us feel at home. Skanateales was within an easy walk and a pleasant surprise of a pristine community on a scenic lake.  We hope to visit again. Definitely, I would recommend a stay here to friends and family!

We really enjoyed our stay at Debbie’s property. We needed our own space close to my family’s home and this fit the bill. Perfect space for our family of 4. Larger parties would also be comfortable. On site laundry was great! The location is close to town and walkable distance if you are so inclined. You can see Mirbeau from the back deck and can even hear the spa music! The fenced yard was perfect for our dogs and we were able to let them out without worry.  The gas fireplace made it cozy during our holiday stay.  We had a great time!
My stay in the house in Skaneateles was fabulous. It is close to everything and so clean and fresh. Loved the polo theme! Thanks Debbie for doing such a great job!
Wonderful visit!!
The workmanship of the recent renovation was outstanding. Perfect distance for stroll into town. Nice Tops grocery 3 minutes away via neighborhood streets. Nice back deck with afternoon sun.

Debbie's place is beautiful and has everything you may need for your stay. The house is in a great location, close to everything.  The yard is fully fenced for pets and our dogs really made themselves at home.  The back deck was great for our morning coffee.  The neighborhood is quiet and peaceful.  Highly recommend staying here.  We will definitely be back.
Lovely house, great location close to town, and very responsive host!
The place was great! Comfortable, very clean and our dog loved the yard. The location is also perfect to get to town and the restaurants. Thank you!

The cottage is perfect for a night or weekend away to Skaneateles. A 2-minute drive into the village area with many shops, restaurants, etc. Could be walkable in the summer months. Very close to a Byrne Dairy & Tops, as well, for any last minute supplies for your stay. The area was fairly quiet & felt safe.
It was a very clean & updated space. We did notice a slight musty/old wood smell, but nothing that would prevent us from staying again or giving it 5 stars. The beds were fairly comfortable.
The hosts offered many options of things to do in the area. They also left a few local beers in the fridge for us, as well.
The hosts were easy to get in contact with & responded fairly quickly.
We would recommend this to anyone coming for a visit & will definitely consider staying again next time we are in town!

This was the perfect cabin-like getaway for the weekend. It was spotless, cozy and close enough to walk to nearby shops and eateries. The hosts were very responsive about check-in/out and gave great recommendations for things to do ahead of time. Would stay here again - especially in the winter!

We had a wonderful stay at The Chapman House. Perfect for a fall weekend and time spent with our daughter who goes to Syracuse. Thank you for everything.
Leslie
We loved the stay. It was very relaxing. Nice shower, nice kitchen

Absolutely loved our stay! Beautiful and tastefully renovated place, super comfy beds, peaceful and quiet. Well equipped kitchen and lots of xtra bath towels! A two minute drive to the lovely lakeside town of Skaneateles, which was a total pleasure to explore. Lynn and Seth were super responsive to our messages/ any questions, and flexible on our check in time.

A true gem, this precious cottage was the perfect location for my getaway! It was clean, cozy, and very comfortable. The location was perfect and so silent while being in the heart of the the sweetest community with all it has to offer. Thank you Lynn!
Clean cozy place! Perfect for a weekend in town for a wedding

We were in town for a friend’s wedding and really enjoyed our time! The home was not far from the venue and very easy to get into town! Home was clean and had everything we needed for a short weekend visit. We also appreciate the host let us check in a bit early when our flight landed!
Great air bnb !! Close enough to walk into town. Just a little confusing which unit / house it is but the space was beautiful and well equipt.
Lynn and Seth are great hosts.  The Chapman house was perfect for our group.  Charming, peaceful and clean.

We loved this place.  It was so clean, cozy and inviting.  It was in a great location in the midst of so many different activities and places to visit.  We would definitely stay there again!  Absolutely recommend staying here!
Great stay. Thank you!

This Airbnb made for the perfect bridal weekend. Lynn was very responsive, flexible, and always willing to help. It is in a great location, walking distance to downtown, and easy to find. We had the best time here!

Lynn’s place was exactly as described. It is conveniently located, less than a mile walk to all of the shops and restaurants in the heart of Skaneateles! The place itself is clean and well stocked and Lynn and Seth are very responsive hosts.
I enjoyed our stay. The house is very cute and homey

My husband and I had a great stay! The hosts are extremely responsive. Unfortunately the a/c had broken the day we arrived. However, hosts were very responsive and on top of having it fixed! We understand things happen and appreciate that these hosts took care of it and communicated well about the situation. They even made sure to bring some fans to help cool the place down.
Bathroom was very clean. I would highly recommend staying here! Very close to the downtown area. We loved exploring and even left with a food items from one of the antique shops.

We had a great syat at Lynn's place. Location was perfect as we could walk into town. I really appreciated the decor, it's super cute, loved the little coffee/breakfast nook. The beds were really comfy!
Beautiful place and had a great time!

The house was perfect for our needs, and we loved the character of the furniture and the space! In a safe community walking distance from the main town, we were also given great recommendations for dinner, brunch, and wineries! Would gladly book here again!
Nice cottage, very clean, and the town is beautiful!
Beautifully decorated.  Very intentional design.  Comfortable beds, nice linens, fluffy, clean towels.  Very nice bathroom/shower.  Photos don’t do the space justice!
Lynn’s place was very cute and clean. Perfect for our weekend girls trip!
Very nice

Wonderful space! The location was perfect. It was clean, updated and cozy. We love to go into Skaneateles once a year at least for a night so we will definitely be staying again & looking forward to it!

We have stayed at many Airbnb’s across the country and this is by far one of the best! Clean, quiet, well stocked, and in a perfect location (in walking distance to town). Lynn was very responsive and gave us recommendations for things to do in the area. Our hosts thought of everything. We highly recommend staying at The Gate. We’ll be back soon!

What a wonderful stay!  Location was ideal with it's easy walk-in to town.  Since my friend were meeting in town to catch up after having not seen each other in a few months, we were happy to such a comfortable and cozy space for long chats over coffee and wine.  Thank you to our host, Lynn, for welcoming us.

My family of 5 stayed at Lynn’s place over Thanksgiving while we visited family in the area. It was clean, comfortable and just the right size for us. Also close walk to town and easy to get around. Would definitely recommend!
Great place!

Was a quick stay but will definitely be coming again.
Very nice town and Lynn and Seth’s place was very cozy!
The cottage was very cozy and nicely decorated. We had a great time!

Lynn and Seth were incredible hosts, and we had an amazing time staying at their beautiful little cottage a few mins drive from Skaneateles!
The interior was fully renovated, cozy but modern, and was perfect for a place to stay close to the action but quiet and secluded enough to feel like we weren’t so close to the road — a lovely, peaceful retreat/base to make day trips in and around the Finger Lakes!
Lynn and Seth were very responsive, friendly, and proactive, and we felt right at home from the moment we arrived.
10/10 would recommend!!
House was beautiful and clean.  We stayed here for our daughter's graduation from Syracuse.  it was about 40 min away but it was worth it.  very serene!
Great cozy cabin with amazing views!  Perfect fall retreat!
Such a peaceful place to stay on a Fall weekend. Clean. Plenty of linen and the kitchen has everything we needed
Thank you for everything!

This lake home was a perfect fit for our family trip.  The house and grounds had everything we needed, including a paddle board and two kayaks!  The view from the home is beautiful and the lake is clean and refreshing.  Bring your water shoes. The steps to the shore are many, but we liked the workout.  The area offers lots of great wineries,  restaurants, shops and historic places to visit. The host gave easy instructions and was very responsive.  We would definitely stay here again!

The hosts were extremely conscientious, and we’re great communicators always getting back to me quickly.
The location and the view were amazing
We had a great stay at Albert's place on the lake. The location is excellent- not too far from the town of Skaneateles with its restaurants and stores, but secluded and quiet at the same time.
My family of 5 had an amazing time at Albert’s! It was a relaxing and much needed break from the city.

This is a lovely home. We were so lucky to be able to gather in this little paradise. The lake is absolutely stunning, and we spent a lot of time on the covered patio. The kitchen is very well stocked, and the dining and living space are very comfortable for our group.
For those wondering-the King bed is downstairs with lake view and there is another Queen downstairs. There are two bathrooms downstairs. The upstairs rooms are a Queen and a Twin room and they share a bathroom.
The downside for some in our party was the sulfur smell of the water. I wouldn’t let it stop you from enjoying this incredible home-just perhaps plan for it. We purchased some bottled water for drinking for our more sensitive family members. The drive down from the main road is also rather steep and when you reach the bottom there is some attentive navigation needed. It’s totally manageable but good to be aware of if you arrive very late at night as we did.
Thank you for having us!!!
Albert and Evonas place is in an amazing location. Right on Skaneateles Lake and close to the village of Skaneateles. We are looking forward to staying again in the future

We were extremely pleased with everything about the house and our stay. The bedrooms are all quiet and comfortable with quality linens and the ability to control the temperature. Towels were plentiful and also of good quality, and the bathrooms were clean and in great condition.
The kitchen and dining area were a highlight, as we were there over Thanksgiving. The kitchen is well equipped with cookware, cutlery, plates, cups, etc... and the appliances are all full size and in good working order. The lighting is also very good.
The living room is comfortable with a large couch and recliner, and there are plenty of extra chairs (rocking and dining) to pull up for additional seating.
The communication with Albert and Evona was always clear, timely and hassle free. All instructions for check-in and check-out were prompt and easy to understand. No hassles! Oh, and the Apple TV and wood burning stove top it all off nicely, not to mention the stairs down to the water. Beautiful!

An absolutely wonderful place to visit. The home was huge for the square footage and the view was amazing.
We were 5 gentlemen. Each had their own bed, 3 full baths, w/d, fully applianced kitchen.
Everything was exactly as advertised!

Albert’s place was very clean and spacious, easily accommodating four adults with three bathrooms. The view of the lake is beautiful and location is private and peaceful. The drive to Skaneateles for groceries and restaurants is about 10 minutes.
We noticed that hot water for the shower smells of sulfur. Albert responded to our concerns immediately but was unable to resolve the problem during our stay. The cold water doesn’t have a problem.
I also recommend driving to the location in daylight. We arrived on a late flight and the turn off the main road is hard to see, and the road to the cottage is a steep curved gravel road. I appreciated the easy to read sign with house number that makes the house easy to find.
Overall, this was a very comfortable and peaceful place to stay.
Beautiful location and cozy home!

Love it. Lots of stairs down to the water but I loved the workout so no worries there. It was amazing the beds were very comfortable. There’s even a pull out couch on the deck. Love love planning to come back in the summer!

Albert & Evona were super responsive. Their home was off the beaten track, in the woods, on the edge of the beautiful lake Skaneateles. Well stocked and clean. Get the wood fire going. We had friends from Syracuse over for dinner - they all loved the evening. We will be back.

Beautiful, peaceful home on the always gorgeous Skaneateles Lake.  Great swimming and kayaking available right from the dock. Bedrooms were comfortable.  Kitchen had everything we needed.  Very responsive hosts came to the rescue with a replacement propane tank for the grill.

What an idyllic spot for our family to get together! Being able to go down to the lake multiple times during the day, using the fire pit, plus the proximity to Skaneateles - it was just perfect. The dock is a great place to hang out, sun in the morning, nice shade in the afternoon. The kayaks and paddle board were much used and our time on the lake was perfect.

A nice house with lots of space a huge yard! A beautiful property. The only aspect that was a bit difficult was the stairs going down to the dock… they are a bit scary and wouldn’t be possible for small children or older folks.

Albert's cottage was cozy and well-appointed. There were plenty of linens and extra towels available for our group. We enjoyed access to Apple TV after a day of visiting wineries. The surrounding area is very quiet and peaceful. The outdoor deck was a nice addition. We could catch up with work during the mornings on the front porch while enjoying the breeze through the screened windows. The cottage is located about 10 minutes from Anyela's Vineyards (recommended for the beautiful property) and 15 minutes south of downtown Skaneateles.
Unfortunately, we could not enjoy the kayaks since they were full of water, dirt, and debris. Perhaps, a cover could eliminate this issue. Also, vehicles with low ground clearance could experience problems driving to the cottage off the main street and back. We did not have any issues with our SUVs.

Perfect location for our small family get together. Everyone enjoyed the visit. The beds are comfortable and clean. Just bring food and beverages and prepare to relax and enjoy. Your hosts are very responsive, but you won’t need anything they’ve provided it all.

A beautiful cabin with lovely grounds and right on the lake. The water is crystal clear like something out of a dream. We started every day with a swim and it gave us life!
The little town close by is also very cute with excellent soft serve custard at Doug's.
why go anyplace else?
A true gem! We had a blast. A must see ,if ever considering staying in the area. Albert reached out numerous times to make sure we had an enjoyable time

Beautiful home away from home in a gorgeous setting!
The hosts were responsive, communicative, and helpful. The binder is full of useful information and great recommendations for enjoying the Finger Lakes region. The lake house was comfortable, clean, well-appointed, and well-stocked with all the pots and pans you need to prepare a meal or an afternoon cup of tea. Watching the sunrise over the quiet, pristine lake while sipping my morning coffee on the back porch was my favorite part of the day.
I highly recommend this special property on Skanneateles Lake.

We had a fantastic stay! It was right on the water and very quiet. We had a few appliance issues, but Albert was down to fix them within five minutes of me contacting him about the issues. Some of the pans were very greasy and dirty, but we just wrapped them in tinfoil. My tip for this house is to bring your own water as the water there is really stinky of sulfur.  The fireplace and the wood available to use was an amazing touch and made our stay so amazing and cozy on a cold November weekend. There is plenty to explore if you like walking through the woods! We would absolutely stay here again!
We had a wonderful time at Albert's place. The view of the lake was gorgeous! Albert was a great host and made sure we were okay and had everything we needed. We would stay here again.
Great place. Highly recommend!!
It was a very nice house. It was well stocked with clean towels and other amenities.
We had a great time at Albert’s place!!  Absolutely beautiful view and very clean house!  Great supply of firewood, everything you could need in the kitchen,  and wonderful screened in porch !

Beautiful location for a peaceful vacation. We used the kayaks, the paddle board and the fire pit. If it's raining there is an interesting escape puzzle in the house. The puzzle itself is straight forward, but we did not manage to solve the escape challenge. Give it a try!

This cottage was just an amazing stay for me and my family! We each had our own space, and our own bathrooms, which was lovely. The doors are all solid wood, so we couldn't even hear each other (which is great when you have both a four year old and an infant in the house!). The house had everything we needed to cook our meals each day, had plenty of seating for us, and the outdoor grill and fire pit were great amenities! The lake access was awesome as well! We used the kayaks and hung out on the dock a lot. For those with kids, this house has safety in mind. It sits on a rather high cliff above the lake, but there's great fencing, good railings on the stairs down to the lake, and there's even a security system in the house that has a chime letting you know which door has opened as well as chain locks on every door high above so kids can't unlock them (so you can lock them at night and feel good knowing your littles can't get out if they are up wandering around, as they do...). Just a wonderful place to stay, highly recommend it, and the host is super easy to reach out to if you need anything at all! We'll definitely be back!

Lovely house, well worth the visit:) stunning views of the lake and secluded:) Skaneateles is about 15 minutes drive to the north, gorgeous little town:) the house is super comfortable and homey; the hosts responsive and attentive:)
Albert and Evona’s place was cozy, comfy, and clean with great views of the lake and a beautiful private dock. Looking forward to visiting again when it gets warmer!

We had a wonderful stay.  There were 4 couples, beds were very comfortable and we had plenty of room.  The house is high above the water with gorgeous view of the lake. The steps down to the lake are not for anyone scared of heights- they were sturdy, but extremely steep.  Had a lovely outdoor fire in the fire pit, plenty of wood available.  I would stay here again.
Good place to stay. Was able to watch the storms in the 3 season room. And have a great weekend with friends.

The views of the lake are the highlight of this cottage and it's very close to downtown Skaneateles as well as the lovely Anyela's winery. The biggest downside was the cleanliness. Considering the steep cleaning fee we paid, we expected the place to be spotless. However we would not sit on the dirty living room couch and encountered dirty dishes, cobwebs in the ceiling, and poor drainage. Also had issues with check-in/entering since we were given the wrong passcode. Due to those issues, I don't think I'd stay here again for this price (lots of fees baked in).
Another thing to note is that the steps down to the dock are extremely steep. I was ok with walking them very carefully, however my 70+ year old father was not able to go down for fear of falling. For those who are younger, fit, and able-bodied, it's not a problem. We also enjoyed the kayak and stand up paddle board.
The lake house was the perfect place for a weekend getaway of nine people. Highly recommend for anyone looking to experience the finger lakes.
Thoroughly enjoyed our time here. Beautiful view of the lake and everything we needed for a relaxing trip including grill, firepit, kayaks,  and other lake “toys”.  Definitely recommend

The hosts are very kind. The house is lovely. I would suggest arriving before dark because it can be tough to navigate in the dark. However, the hosts helped us out which was reassuring.
Perhaps the cleaning fee should be lowered? Based on the cleanliness of the house.
This was a relaxed vacation and we had a good time in Skaneateles, enjoy your stay y’all.
X

This was a last minute trip with friends. We chose perfectly. The hosts were amazing and very quick to respond with requests we had above and beyond (I asked if they had a KitchenAid and they made it appear). They even had laid out salt for us on the snow laden steps.
The lake view is amazing. We enjoyed swimming in the clear waters. We also relied heavily on the fire pit (to recover from those icy swims).
This was the perfect locale for our three person jaunt!

My family and I had a wonderful time at Albert’s lovely cottage. It is the perfect peaceful getaway for a party of two or the whole family.
Our hosts were very responsive and kind. We were given some great suggestions on local sites and fare.
I would recommend a stay here on the rooftop lake of the Finger Lake region.

Our week+ in Skaneateles was fantastic.  The house was clean and the property was fantastic.  It was March/April and ranged from a 75° day to 25° and snow, but we enjoyed the views, fire stove, outdoor space and stairs/deck to the lake.

This place is a winter wonderland! So much of snow and open space around. The views are amazing. The short walk down the cliff to the lake is just breathtaking.
The house had loads of firewood to keep the 9 of us toasted for 8 days and probably had enough to keep us toasted for longer than a month.
The water smelled of sulfur but the owner was quick to take care of it within a couple hours.
They have a huge doggo that did not come with the place though :(
There's kayaks and snorkelling gear as well.
Will definitely want to check out this place again in summer.

I thoroughly enjoyed my time at this lake house Airbnb. I would definitely recommend it to anyone looking in the Finger Lakes region for a peaceful, fun place. In order to best review my stay here, the review needs to be split into three parts: 1) The house, 2) The lake, 3) The town and surrounding area of Skaneateles.
1.) The house - The place slept all seven in my party very comfortably and had plenty of bathroom space. There is a terrific view of the lake from the back yard and a nice covered patio seating area. The kitchen was lovely too with all the appliances and cookware we needed for the week. The dining room table seats about 8 so we could have nice dinners together. The house a fireplace in the living room which warmed up the house on the cool fall nights we were there. There is also a grill available for use which was a great added amenity to have some fun cookouts.
The only down sides of the house were first the living room only really sat 4 people. The sofa sat three along with a chair by the TV. It wasn't really a problem during the day when we were out, only at night when we were watching movies did we have to pull some chairs in. Second, the tap water had a sulfur odor to it. This is due to a drought in the area when we visited causing the well water to have a smell. It isn't harmful or anything, just a nuisance. The hosts did stop by to treat the water to help with the smell which I appreciated because they were doing everything in their power to make our stay as nice as possible.
2.) The lake - The reason most everybody comes to Skaneateles! The house is right on the lake which is such a great view. I really can't emphasize enough how beautiful it is during the fall. There are kayaks, a paddle board, some blow up balls, and everything else you need to have a fun lake day. The stairs to walk down to the lake are pretty steep. Nobody in my party had a problem with them, but small children and the elderly might need some assistance/supervision.
3.) The town of Skaneateles - What a lovely town it is! I was pleasantly surprised as to how nice everything is. it's only a 10-15 min drive and has plenty of great restaurants, bakeries, stores, and anything else you could possibly need. In the surrounding area there are a ton of wineries, cideries, and orchards to do fun activities. I highly recommend Beak & Skiff, Izzo's White Barn Winery, and Anyela's. There are also some nearby hiking trails (I recommend seeing Carpenter Falls), golf courses, and the lake has some good fishing as well. Just how much there was to do and all the great food options definitely brought our stay over the top!
Again, I would definitely recommend this Airbnb to anybody and everybody.
Beautiful home in a spectacular location. Enjoyed a quiet and wonderful week here grilling in back yard, swimming and kayaking off the dock, and watching the leaves change. Very special place.

My family and I decided to take a somewhat spur of the moment trip to beautiful Skaneateles Lake. This was my first time using Airbnb and I wasn't too familiar with the area so I was not sure what to expect from the cottage and the cottage location. All sounded good with the description and location of the cottage but you never know until you get to your destination. Turns out that place was a homerun for us. The accommodations were great, the host was great and the location was great. The description of the place and location are very accurate.
The place was spacious, spotless and very well equipped. The location was a short scenic trip to town and conveniently located close to the marina. The wine tasting at beautiful Anyela's Vineyard on the way to town is highly recommended. Our host was great. We had left a couple of items behind and they quickly notified us and graciously shipped back our belongings.
The cottage is set up high atop the lake. The sights are spectacular, but being high up means you have some stairs to climb up and down to access the water. I believe I counted 60 stairs. The stairs seemed sturdy and safe and looking at some of the rock walls on the way up and down was very cool. My 8 year old granddaughter had no problems using the stairs, but I am sure my 80 year old parents would have struggled.
I would recommend this place and would book again if I go back to the area.
Very well situated home right on the Lake, responsive hosts, and well-stocked with everything from life vests to a toaster oven. Would recommend!

The stay was worth the drive. We loved everything about this house. The host made sure we had everything we can possibly need. Our private lake was stunning super clean!! We spent the majority of the day there.
I highly recommend this place for anyone looking for a great time.

Beautiful, quiet, tranquil spot for any summer but more so for this time of "Covid -social distancing". Property has a private "beach" at the lake with kayaks. A great viewing area with grill and campfire.  Welcoming house with all you need to be super comfortable and options to read or relax: a sunroom, deck, all with views to the lake.     If you do want to get out, Skaneateles is a lovely village to take a walk. There is also a great ice cream place (outdoors) in the way to Auburn, a nice hiking trail 10 minutes from the house (though not for little kids). We use the time to visit Syracuse and Cornell with our teenagers. Weather was great in July:   warm, sunny AND dry,  so we were able to keep windows open most of the time. Highly recommended!
Beautiful and comfortable home with plenty of room for our family of five!
Beautiful home! Debbie was a great host and very accommodating to my family and I.

We had an amazing stay in Skaneateles. The Airbnb itself was clean, comfortable, and thoughtfully put together — you can tell the hosts really care about the details. It had everything we needed and felt welcoming from the moment we walked in.
Beyond the home, the area is what really makes the experience special. Skaneateles is one of the most charming towns we’ve visited. The lake is absolutely beautiful, and the downtown is full of great restaurants, boutique shops, and cozy spots to grab a drink. It feels peaceful and relaxing, but there’s still plenty to do. We spent time exploring local wineries, walking the town, and just soaking in the atmosphere.
If you’re looking for a getaway that’s equal parts relaxing and picturesque, this is it. We’d absolutely stay here again.

We had a wonderful stay at Airbnb listing in Skaneateles, NY! The home was incredibly comfortable and provided everything we needed for a relaxing getaway. The space felt welcoming and thoughtfully laid out, making it easy to unwind after a day of exploring.
One of the highlights for us was the location. It’s just about a mile from downtown Skaneateles, so we were able to enjoy the shops, restaurants, and waterfront without a long drive. We also loved how close it was to the Skaneateles Field and the resort spa, which made adding some extra relaxation to our trip effortless. The fenced in backyard was so helpful for our dog too.
Overall, a very enjoyable stay, comfortable, conveniently located, and a great home base for experiencing all that Skaneateles has to offer. Highly recommend!

We really enjoyed our stay! The house was beautifully decorated and we felt right at home. The fenced in backyard was terrific for our golden retriever to play in. Our host was responsive and friendly! I would highly recommend this property for a stay if you are visiting Skaneateles, New York!

We stayed here for Christmas to avoid overcrowding relatives during the holiday. Great location just outside town. We came with grandparents, kids, dog. The house was perfect for us with plenty of bathrooms and a super convenient fenced in backyard that was great for our pup. We had some cooking to do for the holiday events we went to and the kitchen was well equipped. We would definitely stay here again.
Came here for a girls weekend. Beautiful place with plenty of space for 7 of us. The place was clean and beautifully decorated. It also wasnt far from town. We felt right at home throughout our stay.

Debbie was an exceptional host. She was very pleasant and responsive. Very seamless process from the beginning to end. The house was very clean and had a beautiful layout and yard. I would highly recommend this place!!! Kudos to Debbie! Thank you for a lovely stay!

Really beautiful home. It's a unique house that makes it fun. It was roomy for our 6 adults and two kids, and the bedrooms were great. The downstairs bedroom and bathroom were great for my mother-in-law who doesn't do staircases easily..
The house was so, so clean with plenty of towels, blankets, and kitchen basics. We felt right at home - in fact, we wished we were staying longer! The living room gas fireplace was perfect for a cozy atmosphere.
The house is close to Skeneateles and other places, like wineries and farms.

House was very clean, kitchen was well stocked with good cooking & baking supplies. The house is right beside a busy road, so noise bothered some of us that are used to quiet night time!  Appreciated the accommodations & all worked well for our stay, thank you!  Especially thank you for the clean house, considering it is a pet-friendly rental.
Property just as described. Home is clean, tidy, and pleasantly decorated. Debbie is very responsive and provides for a seemless check in and check out.
We had a wonderful stay in Skaneateles!  The Airbnb was just as described and was a great place to stay. I definitely recommend to anyone looking to travel to the area!

Debbie was so communicative and so flexible with us & u knowing we had young kids & needed a few extra things. The location is also great being a mile from the little village area (which was beyond adorable and fun to explore). We can’t wait to come back!
My family has a fantastic stay! The yard was beautiful and perfect for the kids and everything in the house was thoughtful and well cared for.
We truly enjoyed the stay! The house is very comfortable, has a great backyard patio area for fires and smores, has ample space for adults to gather, and is located close to town.
Great place to stay with my parents, two teens and our dog. Thanks so much, Debbie!
Very nice stay at this house, was as expected and very clean! Good communication and easy arrival instructions.
Great communication, peaceful location, clean home. The location, host, and the home are all amazing. Highly recommend.

Debbie was very communicative, replied right away,  gave explicit instructions about caring for and exiting the house. Linens galore, lots of towels, good cold A/C,  and the house was in a pleasant grassy area with lots of wild and seasonal flowers growing everywhere. Overall we had a very pleasant stay.
Our stay was excellent. The home is beautiful, clean and met our groups needs perfectly. The host was exceptional from beginning to end.

Our stay at this property couldn’t have been any better. Debbie communicated everything we needed to know. The house was very nice on the inside. Nice kitchen, large dining area, very nice and clean bedrooms and bathrooms. A very good value.

We loved our stay, the house was perfect for us and very nicely appointed and decorated, the layout was also excellent. We loved the fenced back yard and Debbie's willingness to let us bring our dogs, who also loved the stay!
The town is a lovely spot as well. Everything was handled in a timely and professional manner and Debbie is very easy to work with. We were there for the collie National and staying at Debbie's really was one of the highlights of our trip.
Thank you!!!!

Fantastic and unique. This house was so clean and well appointed. Our weekend was a cold on and the fire place kept us warm and comfy. I LOVED my bed and there were many extra blankets for cuddling. 5m from town/ spa.

The home was great! It easily accommodated our group, and we had plenty of room. The fenced in backyard for the dogs was a bonus! Debbie was an amazing host, very responsive and very thorough with directions and descriptions. Highly recommend.

The home was a perfect retreat for our long Thanksgiving weekend with nearby family.  We had a clean and comfortable home not too far from where our adult daughter lives.  We would return in a heartbeat if we have enough people to fill most of the rooms.

The house was clean and comfortable with the perfect amount of space for a girls weekend in Skaneateles. Close to town but not walkable, we had no problem getting an uber. We really enjoyed our stay and look forward to returning in the future.
The house was is a wonderful location, super close to town. It was spotless and well stocked! Debbie is very responsive and a great host!
A charming and cozy home with a gracious and responsive host. We were visiting for a wedding in nearby Skaneateles and this space was the perfect homebase for our crew.
Beautiful house and property. Great location!

This house was exactly what we needed for a wedding weekend with my family and our dogs. The house was close to the venue (The Lodge) and we loved the home-away-from-home feeling. Plenty of room for 6 people and 2 dogs. Debbie was very responsive and accommodating, and we will be back in the future!

Beautiful rural home in a gorgeous part of the world. The house was great for several couples visiting and well located to beautiful  Skaneateles and Auburn. Some excellent places to eat and shop nearby, and extra points to the hosts for providing ample towels, dishwasher tabs, paper towels etc as many hosts are stingy in these areas. Extra extra points for the wild bunny rabbits in the yard and super comfy beds!

Our group (5 retired co-workers) on a “girls trip”. The accommodations were outstanding!! Beautiful home - stocked fully with all basic needs- comfy beds - can’t say enough!
Debbie was always accessible by text or phone!
Great experience! Highly recommended!
We had a great time at the house.  The house is spacious, clean, updated and very comfortable.  Close to town and convenient.  Great house!!!

Beautiful home full of charm and all the necessary amenities. The kitchen was fully stocked with everything for cooing, the bed linens and towels were fresh and home was very clean. We enjoyed spending time in the fenced in backyard with our pup too!
Debbie was the best. Made our stay so easy and felt right at home

We were in town for our daughter’s wedding at the Sinclair.  Great layout for our children/grandchildren and us. Comfortable, spacious home with all kitchen appliances and amenities. Fire pit was just perfect for relaxing in the evening. Would definitely come back again. Debbie always responded to our inquiries. This house made our visit just perfect.
Great stay!

We loved this house. It was perfect for a cozy weekend away! It was so close to Skaneateles. We went for shopping, the spa and dinner. Debbie was super responsive and helpful. I highly recommend this house and hope to return!
Debbie was very responsive and helpful. Her home was immaculate. Her home was one of the best places we stayed.
Was perfect for our adult family and the dogs.   Fenced back yard was perfect to let the pups out
Beautiful place! Met all our needs.

Debbie’s place was the perfect get away spot for a girls spa weekend, plenty of gathering space and also space for everyone to sleep and feel comfortable. The decor was impeccable and we felt right at home!

Beautiful, updated farmhouse just outside village. Immaculately cleaned; tasteful, cozy decor and comfy beds. The landscaping is lovely . It is not walkable, ( on a main road, but not noisy) but everything in the village is less than five minutes drive.
We had a wonderful stay.

We loved our stay here!  It’s a very comfortable and private house, well equipped with thoughtful touches like both hard and soft pillows on each bed, extra linens and games.  Each room is beautifully decorated and we prepared all our meals on site as we were here for a week.  The kitchen had everything we needed and we loved the open concept layout.  We will definitely return!
Debbie was quick to respond to our questions.  Place was super clean and comfortable for our family of 6. Nice trail a short walk from house.  Had a great time, thank you, Debbie!

We loved our stay.  We were in town for a wedding reception.  Debbie's house provided a wonderful space for my kids and their Grandparents to get some quality time together in between the busy wedding weekend schedule.  The home was beautifully curated, every detail considered.  We instantly felt right at home.  Debbie, and her team, were responsive and excellent at communicating everything we needed to know prior to, and during, our stay.  We highly recommend Debbie, and this space to anyone who wants to have a worry-free, comfortable, and relaxing stay in Skaneateles.  Thanks for everything.  We will be back again...for sure!

We loved our stay at Debbie's house.  We were there between Christmas and New Year and the house was super cozy and warm.  It is a short drive into the Village.  The kitchen is well-stocked and the house is even nicer in person.  We would stay there again.

The place is gorgeous and so uniquely laid out. We went during the Dickins Christmas event which was very charming. Debbie was responsive to my texts and very accommodating. I had a bit of trouble looking for the check in email cause it wasnt through air bnb but a quick text to Debbie sorted that out. The check in email is from Tyler so if you rent this look for his name in your email. All and all it was an amazing experience and I'd do it again!
This host requires that you sign a contract, separate from AirBnB. Make sure you have the door code before you arrive.
We had a great stay at Paul’s cabin. It is in a beautiful area and the property is gorgeous with lots to do. Would definitely stay again!
The place was really outstanding. We had a beautifulweekend! We were even able to go into the lake in October.

We had an absolutely amazing stay at Paul’s Lodge this past weekend! From the moment we arrived, the breathtaking views of the lake set the tone for a relaxing getaway. The house itself is beautiful and well-kept, with every detail thought of to make the stay comfortable.
The highlight for us was the combination of the hot tub and sauna right in the house—perfect after a day of enjoying the outdoors. It felt like having a private spa retreat with a view.
Paul was a fantastic host, quick to respond and made sure everything was smooth from check-in to check-out.
If you’re looking for a peaceful escape with stunning scenery, great amenities, and the perfect balance of relaxation and fun, I can’t recommend Paul’s Lodge enough. We’ll definitely be back!

The house and environs at Paul’s Lodge are stunning. The house was spotless, the caretaker Mike was wonderful, and it was the perfect location for our family get-together. The tram was helpful for those who found the stairs challenging, the deck views were gorgeous, and we were even able to swim in the lake. The fireplace patio was a lovely spot for dinner and hanging out. We couldn’t have asked for more.

It’s beautiful and high from the lake, but lots of effort to get to the lake if you don’t use the tram. The dock is in rough shape and stairs going directly down to dock are wobbly. Other than the covered deck, no place in the house large enough for 7 to gather in comfortable seating. Piano room was fantastic. Covered deck with a fire was where we gathered the entire time at the house. Very cool house, but we were disappointed in the cleanliness and how certain things weren’t stocked up. Not enough hand soap in bathrooms. Behind nightstands and beds haven’t been dusted or cleaned in a very long time.  Bedspreads smelled musty. Lots of dust around. Several lights were not working. Primary bath was not particularly clean. Toilet seat downstairs was broken.  These are a few examples of things that could have been better. We always love our getaways and had a wonderful time. The house is really cool, but I wanted to mention ways it could be better and more comfortable for guests.

A wonderful place to relax and hang out with friends or family. We have come back to this location a number of times over the years. Comfortable and flexible for family gatherings.
The addition of the tram for travel to the lake waterfront is a nice feature. It allows for older and less mobile to enjoy the waterfront without navigating a number of stairs.
We really enjoyed our stay!  The Tram was convenient and the fireplace was a nice add

Really nice place. Accurate description and thorough instructions.
We had a couple of minor issues that were dealt with almost immediately.

This was our second stay at Paul’s Lodge, and once again it did not disappoint! You simply cannot beat the location - just a tram ride down to Skaneateles Lake, with easy access for swimming, relaxing, and soaking in those incredible views. The house itself is comfortable, clean, and had everything we needed for a relaxing stay, but it’s really the setting that makes it special.
One of our favorite parts of coming back is spending time at Paul’s legendary Piano Bar with the player piano. Fun times singing to classic tunes were had by all!
If you’re looking for a laid-back lakeside getaway with charm, character, and the best location on Skaneateles, this is it. We will definitely be back!

We loved our stay at Paul’s lodge.    It was beautiful and peaceful. We enjoyed going into town for the shops and dining. We had a few hiccups, but the care taker/grounds keeper was pretty quick to respond.  The tram was slightly wonky as it did not fully level out at the top or bottom so we just used the stairs.  The hot tub also leaked/drained so we could not fully use it.  Other than that, the house is as pictured and was fully equipped.  My favorite feature was the outdoor fireplace.

Really enjoyed staying here! Beautiful view. Driveway was steep like he describes but we parked accordingly especially with the rain. Would recommend!! House was just like the pictures and they amenities were great! Thank you
Pullout bed broken, outdoor shower not working, hot tub broken and dirty, wet mattress in other bed, and blocked when emailing owner issues.

Paul’s lodge is a beautiful, peaceful escape on the lake. The outdoor spaces are fantastic. We traveled with 2 families of 4 (four kids ages 10-13) and the kids found plenty to do with exploring, hiking, polar plunging, and using the hot tub. The kitchen is well stocked with everything you need. We spent a lot of time on the deck with the fireplace, which was wonderful in the evenings and at night! Definitely recommend a 4 wheel drive car… the access road is steep and slippery when wet! Just take your time and you’ll be fine driving in or out. The hike to the mailboxes was a fun little challenge! We spent one day in the adorable town of Skaneateles, and Mike recommended a great place for us to eat (Sherwood inn). The town is quaint and lots of nice shopping! Overall we had an excellent time and would come back again!

Pauls lodge was absolutely amazing! We were so happy we stayed here and will definitely be back! The views are beyond gorgeous and the hot tub and sauna were a bonus! We loved listening to the piano playing while we had coffee. I would say if you’re contemplating booking this place just BOOK IT! You won’t be disappointed!

Paul's Lodge is a truly beautiful retreat on the lake. It was perfect for our wedding party. The house is gorgeous, the hot tub was amazing but the real star of the show was the outdoor waterfall shower. Don't wait, book it, I promise you'll fall in love like we did! We had such a nice time. Thank you to Paul for providing this getaway for my friends.

Paul’s place was incredible. We lucked out with a last minute reservation and Paul was able to accommodate us on quick notice. He and Mike, the caretaker, were very responsive and helpful.
Paul’s Lodge is a special place. We enjoyed hanging out in Paul’s Piano Bar and listening to the player piano. The tram down to the lake was really cool and we enjoyed stargazing on the dock.
My husband got in a hike from the house up the road and it was a great workout.
Overall, we had a great time and would return.

The Lodge was beautiful, plenty of space for all 10 of us to spread out!  We loved coffee on the deck and sunsets on the dock!  The new tram was an unexpected treat for getting to the water!!  We did have an adventure… a big storm resulting in no electricity or water  for 20 hours!!   Paul was very responsive and is going to refund us for that day. Thank you Paul

Paul’s place is an absolute dream. The space is cozy yet luxurious with tons of natural light and amenities. Our group had an amazing time. Mike, the property manager, was extremely responsive and helpful. I’ll definitely be back!

Paul’s home is absolutely breathtaking, so much better than the photos (they just don’t do it justice)! Mike was totally wonderful and extremely helpful/proactive. He was available for any text sent or assistance needed. The four wheel drive is def necessary (in my opinion) so I’m glad we took that recommendation seriously. We only wish we had more time to just take it all in. We hope to be back again, it was so worth the drive and every penny.
Awesome property!, beautiful secluded location, very clean and set up for entertaining! I would definitely vacation here again!

What a great find in the middle of the woods! The driveway is definitely an adventure by itself. The pontoon made it the complete package. Be sure to rent that as well. Be aware that there is only one master bedroom. Could be awkward if you travel with another couple. The kids loved every inch of the house. The outdoor fireplace was our absolute favorite. But I know the hot tub was a favorite as well. And don’t forget to visit Doug‘s seafood restaurant. A local hotspot! Fantastic!!!

Paul's house is fantastic.  Watch sunsets every night from the deck or dock.  Right on the lake for great lake activities.  The home is big and great for two families.  Also, there is great outdoor living space with multiple decks, seating areas, fireplace, hot tub, etc.

What an incredible home!
Absolutely stunning!
As beautiful as the inside of the home is, the outside is even better. What a layout and design, with incredible views of the lake and stars at night which are breathtaking!
To find the place is a bit of an “adventure” to say the least. Not for the weak, as you are driving through forest and woods with tight winding roads and near 90 degree verticals (make sure you have 4-wheel drive). It all adds to the magic and majesty of this place. Breathtaking and one of the best Airbnb’s I’ve stayed at.
Beautiful location! Loved the outdoor fireplace.

This place was magical. It truly was like stepping into our own private spa. The view, particularly during sunset, was outstanding. One of my favorite aspects of this place was that there were so many interesting nooks to enjoy. At any time you could enjoy time alone in a quiet spot or enjoy company around the outdoor fireplace or one of the many tiers of decking that overlooks one of the most beautiful lakes I have ever been to.
The road is very intense so if you don’t have four wheel drive, and even if you do, you need to be a confident driver.
The internet was weak, but Paul is upfront about that and it was barely missed.
Probably the best way to enjoy this experience is to do all your shopping ahead of time and plan on NOT leaving (at least using the road) and just enjoying all that this amazing place has to offer.
The pontoon boat was also a nice addition.
I would definitely book here again. Well worth it.
It’s beautiful.  But Paul and his Team made it easy and seamless. You need a 4 wheel drive! But it’s so worth it once you get there

Incredible outside space with great views and lake access. Comfortable fit for large families with room for people to spread out a bit. Paul was very responsive. Make sure you have 4-wheel drive to get to the house!
Beautiful house! A bit off the beaten path, but well worth the trek. Definitely will come back in the summer months.
Top notch host! Exceeded expectations. Great view with great amenities.

Wow! This is exactly what we were looking for. I’ve never seen a more crystal clear lake and the location and amenities of the lodge really lets guests soak in all this beautiful space has to offer. Traveling with families (some with kids, some without) we all had a blast. There were multiple deck areas to unwind in the stunning foliage overlooking the lake. We hiked, wined, grilled, s’mored with the outdoor fire and couldn’t resist a dip in the lake (cryotherapy?)! The bedrooms allowed private space and bathrooms on each floor were appreciated. We had Pam come for a relaxing massage with the massage table provided on-site.
Property manager, Mike, was super nice and responsive. Hope we make it to this magical place again!
Great place to stay, mike and Paul are very helpful!
It's a beautiful oasis tucked deep in the woods. The outdoor living is spectacular and the views are wonderful!

Thank you for sharing such a wonderful place with us, Paul! My girlfriends and family visited for my bachelorette this past weekend. On top of the beautiful views of the lake, the cabin was truly a work of art. Much of our entertainment throughout the weekend revolved around exploring what the cabin had to offer - the hot tub, outdoor fireplace, and deck down by the lake were our favorites. Our large group fit very comfortably inside and the large patio was perfect for our big dinners. The property manager, Mike was also fantastic. It is no joke that you cannot get out of the lower parking lot without 4 wheel drive! Unfortunately, one of us forgot, but Mike was there within 20 minutes to help out. This was not part of his job description, so it was very much appreciated. Thank you again for your hospitality and quick responses to any questions that popped up. We are looking forward to visiting again sometime soon!

This house is quite a lakeside retreat... set right on the lake! Peaceful and quiet! It truly made you feel like you were off on your own.
House is 100% off the main road. 100% need 4 wheel drive to get up and down the hill! It’s a rocky road and very very steep. Be aware!!
A few amenities that were amazing and a few we were disappointed in. This is a great home but not as modern and as up-to-date as some other air bnbs we stayed in.
Paul was great to deal with and his property manager Mike was available all weekend for us.

Paul’s lodge is gorgeous! It is a great spot with wonderful views. I’d say four wheel drive is a requirement for getting down the road to the lodge but once you’re there it is definitely worth the ride. I only wish we had come here in warmer weather, swimming and boating in the lake would have been a ton of fun; but we were able to relax in the hot tub during some spring snow showers. I found this lodge for my friends bachelorette weekend. There was plenty of room for 9 of us to sleep comfortably. Had it been a bit warmer, the seating area with the fireplace on the upper deck would’ve been a wonderful place to gather around. Highly recommended! (As long as you have a car big enough to get you up and down the road.)

Gorgeous, private, quiet.  This stunning home nestled in the woods provided a beautiful backdrop for a family reunion. Spent the days sunning on the dock or lounging in the hot tub and sauna, nights by the fireplace on the deck.  Paul's Lodge far exceeded our expectations.  Hopefully I'll be back soon.
Extraordinary place to stay - very hard to leave.

Lauren’s place was absolutely perfect!! It was just a wonderful  house for my birthday weekend  with friends! It was equipped with everything we needed for people to have privacy, and then the large living room/kitchen with tv and fireplace was a great space where we could gather. The view of the lake, the comfy beds and private bathrooms, and the gas fireplace made for a serene retreat. The location was so convenient - close to the town of Skaneateles, Mirbeau Spa and all the shopping and restaurants. We made wonderful memories there !!
Just book it! I mean this home id absolutely breathtaking. It’s so big and spacious the views are absolutely phenomenal.
Amazing kitchen and master suite!

Beautiful home in a great location. The kitchen was huge and beautiful! Loved the cozy fireplace too. Lots of bedrooms, mainly in the basement level. Lots of common spaces to gather and hang out. The views were gorgeous and it’s a quick drive to downtown. The lake access would be wonderful in the warmer months. Missing some basics like shower staples and sheets for pull out couch.

The home is spacious with a partial lake view, and the kitchen was well equipped with utensils, cookware and tableware.
The deck was spacious and plenty of seating. Linens were clean, smelled fresh, and the beds were cozy. The host responded quickly to my emails and thoroughly answered questions.
Something worth mentioning so you can come prepared: There are no storage containers for leftover food, and no shampoo/soaps in bathrooms. It isn't listed as such, but I am used to these amenities in other rentals so my fault for assuming.
It showed a picture of a hot tub, but disappointed it had broke months prior to our arrival and was no longer available, however with all of the other wonderful things about the house, we enjoyed the weekend and were very pleased with the peaceful location, quietness, and the indoor fireplace gave it a relaxing ambiance that was enjoyed by all. We definitely would rent again- Lauren is a very pleasant host.

This is a lovely rental, convenient to all the amenities of Skaneateles. We enjoyed walking down to the lake, sitting around the fire pit and cooking together in the fantastic kitchen. Highly recommended.

Our group of 8 friends enjoyed a wonderful long weekend in Lauren's beautiful home.  We had plenty of room and enjoyed the large kitchen and gathering area on the first floor.  The house and beautiful property were lovely.
The house was gorgeous! Perfect weekend getaway. Beautiful kitchen, plenty of space and comfortable. The pool was so nice and loved being by the water. Definitely would love to come back!
