Everything at the house was great! Whether it be friends or family, it is very spacious. Beautiful pool, large yard, huge kitchen.

This was our second time staying at Lauren’s home and we love the house. Plenty of space for our group. Utilized the fire pit for some late night s’mores. We look forward to staying again in the future.
Excellent time at house and location.
Great stay

We had such a lovely time with our three adult children and our grand baby. Just what the doctor ordered for a busy family!
The surroundings were so peaceful and it was just a very short walk to the water where there are kayaks for your use and chairs to relax in right by the water.
We loved the view of the water from the living room/kitchen/deck. The pool was amazing...we got lots of swim time in. The house was wonderful. So much room to spread out; comfy furnishings; a gourmet kitchen to cook in; an AMAZING master suite; the list could go on.
From the moment you walked in the door, you felt relaxed and refreshed. This was definitely one of our favorite airbnbs so far.
Lots to do in the charming town of Skaneateles. We found some great restaurants and shops! A plus was that the town is just a 6 minute drive from this superior home!
The house on Skaneatles Lake was gorgeous. Our family enjoyed our stay so much. I would recommend this property to all.
This was perfect for a family of ten with 3 little kids

We had a lovely stay at this house. We were in town for my son's wedding and had 7 of us stay very comfortably. The main floor was so spacious and great for entertaining a large crowd. We enjoyed having lake access and the pool was delightful also. Lauren and her husband were very responsive to any questions we had and even came quickly to replace a beeping smoke alarm battery that was only reachable by a tall ladder. I would highly recommend staying here.   Thanks, Anne

We stayed at this home to celebrate my daughter’s college graduation. This is the perfect home for a group to enjoy. Great common areas throughout. Beautiful location only 5 minutes from restaurants and shops. Lauren was extremely responsive to all of my questions.

The house was very clean, organized and spacious.  Family of 6 had plenty of space and the kitchen/great room was very inviting to hang out.  Very close to the village of Skaneateles and a good home base to see other finger lakes/hike etc.  Only 25 Mins from Syracuse U.  We will rent here again.
What an amazing trip go Skaneateles Lake!  The home was gorgeously appointed with the best of appliances and comfy beds.  They thought of every detail!  Beautiful home and wonderful memories!

We had a wonderful stay at Lauren’s house. It is was the perfect place for us to get together for a family celebration.  It is spacious, modern and so comfortable. Lauren is a fantastic host and very  responsive.  I highly recommend Lauren’s house and look forward to staying there again soon!

Our stay was absolutely perfect! From the moment we arrived, we felt welcomed by the cozy yet stylish decor and the thoughtful amenities provided. The Skaneateles lakefront location was ideal—just a short drive into the village of Skaneateles. The large space was immaculately clean, well-stocked, and comfortable, making it the perfect retreat. We loved the tall ceilings and modern updates throughout - especially the kitchen. The basement and main floor walkouts were also great. Lauren was an exceptional host, responsive and accommodating. We can’t wait to come back and highly recommend this gem to anyone visiting the area!!
This is a beautiful home and a short distance from the village.  Highly recommend!

Second time staying here and again we were extremely satisfied and had a wonderful time. House is spacious clean and fully stocked from kitchen, towels and supplies. Once again Lauren was kind , helpful & responsive. I’m sure we will be staying again.

We had a wonderful stay at this beautiful home.  It was perfect for our large family to get together.  Plenty of comfortable rooms, amenities and a gourmet kitchen.  We hope to be able to rent it again.  Great place to stay!
The cooks in the group loved the kitchen and cooking utensils. The house handled our group of 8 women easily.
Spectacular luxury home with all that a family requires for a great weekend or week at the lake!  Incredible kitchen and accommodations!

Absolutely wonderful stay this weekend. Beautiful chef's kitchen with everything you could need to cook meals for a big family! The pool, hot tub,  firepit, and large deck with plenty of seating kept us entertained all weekend. The beautiful lake view peaking out through the trees was so nice. We couldn't have asked for more than what was offered. We hope to stay again next year!

Lauren’s home was perfect! I was visiting my hometown to celebrate a milestone birthday with a group of my friends and family in town… and being able to have my close friends from out of town stay with me - and also be close to my family was perfect.
Plenty of space for us - the open living space was perfect - the pool, the hot tub, deck, fire pit and opportunities to be with the group or not was so wonderful functional.
The fridge was amazing - and we used the kayaks to embrace the beautiful of Skaneateles lake. The linens and beds were super cozy too.
We loved it. I would definitely go back.
Endless thanks to Lauren for sharing your home with me and my loved ones.

Beautiful Lakeside Home in a Great Location!
We had a fantastic stay at Lauren's stunning lakeside home in the charming town of Skaneateles. She was incredibly accommodating to our family, which included two infants, and we thoroughly enjoyed our time there. Here are some highlights from our stay:
Pros:
- Excellent location, just a 7-minute drive to downtown, with a walkable distance to the lake.
- Perfectly spacious for families and larger groups.
- Gorgeous backyard with a pool, plus a well-equipped kitchen.
- Infant-friendly: the home provided 1 crib and 1 pack-and-play, complete with mattresses and sheets!
Cons:
- No filtered water available, so we ended up going through multiple cases of bottled water and jugs.
- We noticed quite a few bugs and flies indoors during our stay.
- There was a large ice machine, but it wasn’t working so we had to purchase multiple bags of ice.
- No soap/shampoo were provided in the bathrooms. Just an FYI for anyone renting the home.

This was our second year visiting this home as we loved it so much the first time.  House layout is great for multiple families as there are very separate bedrooms on each of three levels.  Very private and beautiful setting.  House is very modern with every convenience and great big kitchen.  Our only wish would be that the pool was heated as it is very "cold" for swimming in August.

Lauren’s place was amazing! Beautiful, spacious and the perfect lakefront vacation house with luxury comforts. Lauren was a great host, quick to respond and gave great local recommendations. We will definitely be back!

This is our 5th family lake trip and this house has everything we have wanted! The house is beautiful, has a ton of rooms and space. The hot tub and pool is perfect and clean. The walk to the lake wasn’t far at all and the lake is gorgeous! Lauren was friendly and available when I texted for any questions.  The whole family loved it and we plan on booking again!

This was our second stay at Lauren’s beautiful home on Skaneateles Lake. Mike and I graduated from Skaneateles High School and are thrilled that we can bring our kids and their families to enjoy the fabulous place where we grew up! Just a few of our favorite things - fishing and jumping off the dock, kayaking to BAB, swimming in the pool, making s’mores around the campfire, Mr Pudder’s mini golf, the Bakery, SkanEllus, Roland’s, working on puzzles on the gigantic island, making meals in a kitchen with two sinks and two (three) ovens and so much more!!

All I can say is WOW!  Lauren’s house is just what we needed to enjoy a peaceful and relaxing week with extended family!  House is beautifully updated and was a 2 minute walk to the clean lake!  We enjoyed the pool and hot tub, and the basement was a perfect hang-out spot for the teen boys in our group.  We had a couple of issues come up during our stay (that was nothing due to the fault of the homeowner), and Lauren and her husband were responsive and did immediately what should have been done.  Home is a 5-minute drive to beautiful Skaneateles and we rented a pontoon boat to enjoy.  Thanks Lauren for a beautiful week.  We will be back!

Our family loved this home. It was so spacious and had everything any family could ask for.
If you love cooking, this kitchen is for you!! I There is room for everyone in the large open kitchen/dining room/living room. Eat outside on the top deck, or at the table or the kitchen island. If you get need a break from some in your group 😉, just head downstairs to the game room down there. This house keeps going and going!!!
My favorite? Noone in our group had to share a bathroom; everywhere you turn, there is a bathroom!
The house is updated and beautiful! The laundry room is a huge plus and the garage perfect to keep the cars out of the sun!
Did I mention the pool and the lake??!!! The pool was fabulous after a day at the lake, or the wine trail, or just a lazy day with family. There was a dock to use, just a short walk down the lane and we loved the peek a boo view of the lake from the house.
You can't beat the location and Lauren was very helpful and always responsive.

Lauren’s home is absolutely spectacular. It has luxurious elements but also homey touches. The pool is absolutely beautiful and so refreshing. The house is roomy and spacious - perfect for a big group. The six bathrooms were a huge plus. Everything was extremely clean, organized, and well maintained. Lauren was responsive and helpful throughout the whole process. We had an absolutely wonderful trip at this house and hope to come back again! Highly recommend!

A beautiful home with beautiful views! We loved this home, the pool, the lake views! This was the perfect space for our family reunion. The layout was great for family time together on the main level with big meals prepared in the beautiful kitchen and plenty of space to eat at the table and on the deck. We enjoyed the pool and hot tub too. We all slept well on comfortable beds and the layout of the bedrooms was nice too.  Location was perfect! Private but close to the village for lake walks and restaurants. And Lauren was very responsive, a great host! We will be back next summer!

We absolutely loved this home. This is my first Airbnb experience where the pictures matched the quality of the house. Lauren was a fantastic host. Any minor issue that came up with resolved extremely quickly we love the pool and being able to walk directly down to the lake. We definitely plan on making this a yearly tradition.

Lauren was an amazing host. She was extremely accommodating and responsive. Her property is gorgeous and had all of the amenities you could want as well as access to the lake.  Cannot wait to visit again!

Our family loved Lauren’s home! It is clean and beautifully decorated. Large kitchen was great for our family and was very well stocked with essentials. We definitely made use of the pool during this heat wave! Lauren was a great host! Our only regret is that we didn’t stay longer. Will definitely be back!

Beautiful home. Great location. Water access and short drive to town. Would stay there again when visiting the area.
Host was responsive when addressing one issue.
It was a very good experience from start to finish. Thank you for the great place to stay.

We had a wonderful stay. The home was beautiful and clean. Location was perfect ... peaceful with lake, trees and firepit while also close to town and the lovely village.  Lauren was a great host. Thank you for sharing your amazing home with us! We would love to come back some day.

This property is a gem! We stayed over the long weekend for my son’s wedding and from the time I booked till we checked out Lauren was extremely kind, responsive and very accommodating to our big family. The house is beautiful with plenty of rooms &bathrooms for everyone. Kitchen is an absolute dream and fully equipped with pots pans etc. The pool and grounds were great too. We will definitely be staying again!

We had a wonderful stay at Lauren’s place to celebrate our daughter’s birthday and graduation from Syracuse. The home is in a great location (about 1 mile from downtown Skaneateles) with nice views of the lake. The home is also nicely outfitted with games, 4 kayaks, a SUP, pool toys, etc. our only disappointment was that the kitchen wasn’t as well outfitted as we had hoped. The sensor button on the fridge was broken and the fridge kept beeping until we hacked it closed. There were 5 forks and 4 wine glasses, sparse dishware, no dish towels or sponges, etc. The owner did bring more flatware when we asked and she was very responsive overall. I have provided feedback re the kitchen and I imagine that she will make some improvements. Overall, our family had a wonderful stay and the home accommodated our group very well.
Lovely house. Great host. Great fun times. Thank you!

Fantastic house & location with an extremely helpful, courteous, and attentive host. When an unexpected issue arose, Lauren and her husband were right on the ball and helped us get everything sorted out quickly and to our complete satisfaction. We were lucky to find such a great place to stay and such wonderful people to make it happen.
What a magical weekend! The house was everything and more…. House had everything you need and Lauren was very responsive to outreach during our stay. We’ll be back for Summer!
Lauren was an amazing host and her home was immaculate. The views of the lake were amazing! Will be back for sure!
Ann was extremely friendly and helpful and had lots of great suggestions. I can recommend this to anybody.

The view, the view, the view was absolutely beautiful!  The one morning we woke up to snow we took advantage of the comfy chairs by the fire place and I cracked a book open and read for an hour. Simply lovely. It is close to downtown, the Sherwood Inn is amazing for dinner and the bakery there is wonderful to grab breakfast to go in the morning. Anne's place is very clean, well stocked with cooking essentials and bathroom towels, etc. There is a winery across the main street from the house. It had music one night although we did not make it there. We visited Brown Dog Antiques about seven minutes down the road. Our main reason for staying there was to enjoy the views of the lake and visit Syracuse University but we would return just for the lake view!
This was our second trip to the cottage and it was just as we remembered it. Beautiful home with amazing lake views. So many wonderful shops and restaurants right in town.

This is a beautiful house and worked perfectly for a cozy winter weekend. The kitchen and bathrooms are lovely, the beds were comfortable, and there is also plenty of comfortable seating in the living area. Everything was high quality, including the dishes and cookware. The house was spotless when we arrived. We appreciated having covered parking and made a lot of use of the gas fireplace. The house was nice and warm despite temperatures in the teens. The views are beautiful and the house has a large deck and nice flat lakefront, so I imagine it would be even better in the summer. Communication with Anne was easy. We would happily return!

This home was absolutely Beautiful
It was well stocked with anything you might need
It was immaculate and we thoroughly enjoyed our stay
Would highly recommend this place
Furniture and beds were so comfortable
This was a Girlfriend’s Getaway trip and we all decided we would definitely want to come back again
Nice spacious, well-kept and well-appointed home. Would definitely rent again.
What a beautiful place and a lovely host!
Beautiful house in an amazing location, would 100% recommend!

From the moment we arrived, we felt at home. Every single detail was perfect and Anne has created the perfect place to relax and unwind. The home was pristine with comfy furniture, a beautiful kitchen, gas fireplace, and plenty of living space to spread out and enjoy. Even the bathroom floors were delightful, offering radiant heat. A garage was available for our vehicle and the neighborhood was quaint and quiet.
The weather was chilly so we didn’t venture down to the dock but the views were spectacular and the fall foliage was the perfect backdrop each morning as we enjoyed coffee on the deck.
The location provided us with easy, drivable access to cute shops and restaurants in Skaneateles and even a winery across the street.
Anne checked in with us prior to arrival and during our stay to ensure we had what we needed and even called to thank us after checkout. She is the epitome of what a host should be! Thank you Anne for sharing your beautiful place! We’ll be back for sure!

This was our second stay, and it was no less pleasing than the first time. The home is beautiful and fantastically equipped inside and out. Fresh, open, and airy with a gorgeous view of the lake from both inside the house as well as the ample size deck. Sunrises from the deck or the dock are divine. The furnishings are top end and the kitchen is fully equipped for preparing gourmet meals. The bathrooms are sparkling with beautiful tiled glass showers. There are lovely sitting spaces both at the water’s edge and out on the small dock. The fire pit is a real plus in the cooler weather. And the place is just minutes from town (and across the street from a beautiful winery!) Anne is a wonderful and responsive host who truly cares about her guests. I can’t think of a better place to enjoy Skaneateles lake with family and friends.

This was one of the most beautiful  places I ever stayed at through Airbnb. stunning water views. the house was immaculate and close to everything.  The host was exceptional in all ways. I will be going back.

We felt completely relaxed and comfortable. Anne was there when we arrived , making sure everything was perfect for us. She is delightful! Very warm.
The house was perfect. We wanted for nothing. Total upgrades throughout the house. I wish my kitchen was as incredibly stocked !!
We will go back for sure.
Town of Skaneateles is very charming !
The house was spotless and had a very comfortable layout. The property was beautiful with a gorgeous view of the lake. Would definitely stay again!

What a beautiful spot, we enjoyed our weekend away. I found myself envisioning what it would be like to stay at Anne’s during other seasons, as well! The house was immaculate, the view, the deck, and Anne’s hospitality make this an absolute keeper next time we are visiting Skaneatles or the surrounding region. A great place for getting together with family or friends. So happy we found this home.

We had such a great weekend at this beautiful house on the lake.   The house had everything we needed, was spotless, and the views of the lake breathtaking.    It was a short drive to the village where we shopped, ate and saw the Dickens carolers.   It was a perfect holiday get away.  Would definitely stay here again.
We had a wonderful weekend in Skaneateles. The property is very clean and has great views of the lake. We would definitely stay here again.
Absolutely beautiful cottage and Anne was a gracious hospitable host. Would definitely recommend.
We loved our weekend stay at Anne's house. The views were absolutely stunning and beautiful outdoor space. Everything was clean and well stocked. We hope to visit again next year!

Anne was very helpful and responsive to our questions. Her house is right on the lake with easy access to the shoreline - about 25 steps down.
We love Skaneateles Lake! It's waters are pristine and offer excellent sailing/boating and fishing. It's only a short drive to downtown with amazing restaurants/bakeries and quaint shops.

The home was beautiful; kitchen was spotless and updated, living area was comfortable and the deck with perfect lake views was large and looked right down on the lakefront with dock. Beds were comfortable - we will definitely stay here again when we return.
We had a great week! A beautiful property and home! Thank you!

Anne’s home is simply amazing. From the moment you walk in, you can’t help but be wowed by the lake view from all the windows. Then you actually notice the rest of the house, and it’s stunning! So clean, spacious and open kitchen/dining room/living room, with a super cute reading area in front of the fireplace! Then large open living room with vaulted ceilings and again, the lake is right there! Private shoreline, long private dock, and lots of seating outside and in make this one of, perhaps even the best rental home we’ve ever stayed in! Can’t wait to make Anne’s home a regular vacation spot.
Wonderful lakefront home that was also convenient to town . Beautiful views from every window. Highly recommend!

We really enjoyed our stay! The home is beautiful and has a beautiful view of the water. I wish we had better weather to take advantage of being right on the lake. Cleanliness is very important to me and Anne’s house was spotless. I also like to cook and the house had plenty of pots, pans, dishes, and utensils of every kind. Extra blankets, sheets, pillows, and towels, too. It’s not one of those rentals with limited amenities… it has everything you need to be comfortable.

Anne’s place was beautiful! We loved our time there! She was so kind to let us check in early since the house was available!  She called once we checked in to make sure everything was ok! We would like to come  back again!

Literally right on the lake, beautiful and airy open floor plan, tastefully furnished and decorated, and an extremely well-outfitted, well-stocked, and comfortable home. Ample outdoor space (and seating) to take in the lake, from the deck above or lakeside in Adirondack chairs around a fire pit. 9 minutes to town. Across the road from a lovely winery (Anyela’s).  Anne’s place exceeded all of our expectations (which doesn’t happen often in my AirBnB experience).

A group of us girls had a wonderful time at Anne’s house celebrating a bachelorette party! The house was extremely clean, beautifully located, and the perfect setting for our weekend. The house is conveniently located across the street from a winery and only about 8 minutes from the village is Skaneateles. We had so much fun and would highly recommend.  I’ll be back!

Erin's home was beautiful, the views of the lake were lovely. The home accommodated 6 adults comfortably. The house was clean and cozy. We enjoyed Dickens christmas in the amazing town of skaneateles, with pretty shops and great restaurants. We also had the opportunity to see The Nutcracker in Syracuse and had dinner at Kitty Hoynes. It was definitely a great time had by all. The most important part was spending quality time with family. Thank you for allowing us to stay at your home. Life is enjoyed spending time with the ones you love.

What a beautiful spot - the view was spectacular.  Very close drive into town - shops and restaurants are lovely.  Erin was very responsive. The home is very comfortable and has everything you need.  I would go again!

We absolutely loved our stay at Erin's place. From early mornings on the dock to sunsets on the deck, we enjoyed every minute of our trip. Erin's family home is as described but what isn't so easy to put into words is the feeling of being in a very well loved and cared for home. You can feel years of memories made at Erin's and it is truly a gift that she shares with all of us! Our family was in town for a wedding, and we have already talked about returning during the summer months. The accommodations were perfect for our older children and brother who came with his fiancé. The bungalow was such a treat! Yes, we all took turns using the steam shower! LOL! If you're hesitant to book, don't be. The price is well worth it, and you are a 10-minute, GORGEOUS drive from downtown Skaneateles.
Beautiful Lake views.  Clean and comfortable.
Great place and location.

This is truly a 5-star place. My family and I chose this as the venue for my mom's 70th birthday celebration. We were 6 adults occupying 5 beds and all had comfortable accommodations. We had a wonderful time and especially enjoyed all the outdoor deck spaces. We hope to be back next summer!
Our family had a great time at Erin’s place.  The house was very cozy and homey.  The lake views were spectacular and the house was close to Town.
We had a great stay at Erin's beautiful lake house. This is an incredible spot on a beautiful lake. Great communication and everything exactly as advertised. Would stay again any time. A+

We absolutely loved staying at Erin’s home and enjoyed the many deck options (all with beautiful sunset views) and the open living room/kitchen concept. The parking is limited as she described in the listing, so carpooling if you have locals visiting is a must. Had an issue with the bungalow on the last night, but Erin did everything she could to make it right. We definitely will be back!

Erin’s place was peaceful and beautiful, just what we needed. The bungalow house was very nicely done and perfect for young couples needing privacy from the activities at the main camp. Had all the amenities as listed. The docks and waterfront access were wonderful, fun for swimming, fishing and kayaking . I would recommend this lake house to anyone interested in the Skaneateles Lake getaway. We would certainly book this camp again!

This place was exactly what we were looking for. Plenty of room for our number of guests. The amount of deck space is really something special and allowed us to spend almost the entire time outside. Erin was extremely responsive to any questions we had about the home as well as what to do in the local town of Skaneateles. I would highly recommend this place to anyone looking to escape to a lake for a few days.
Amazing stay at Erin's place. Incredible location right on the water - we did so much kayaking and swimming. Would absolutely come back again. A+ Thanks Erin!
We had a very short stay but enjoyed every minute of our time at this beautiful and unique lake front property.
Great place for a weekend get away.
We really enjoyed our stay!
We loved staying at Erin’s house, it exceeded our expectations!!! The perfect relaxing weekend away! Thank you so much Erin!

This place is truly a gem. The layout is perfect for family vacations and the deck was beautiful to hangout and watch the sunset. Everything was organized and had its own spot. I was skeptical of the non scented soaps but the ones provided actually smelled really good and I may look into for myself.  This place felt very clean and cozy.  We were so sad to leave and will miss the view. We hope to come back soon. I would 100% recommend this home to anyone looking for a private family vacation with a view.
Beautiful organic home. Soft sheets, comfortable mattresses. Quiet, calm, serene. Feels like you are on a boat. Very close to water edge. Gorgeous home. Check out Mirbeau Spa. Fabulous and close by.
Erin was a great host and the house is truly bucolic. I'd stay again.

This was the second time that we stayed in Erin's beautiful home. The setting on the lake is gorgeous and comfortable.  There is room for everyone to gather comfortably. Erin was helpful and responsive whenever we had questions. We hope to return for another visit.

We loved our stay. The house is charming and cozy with lots of amazing details. We stayed in early fall and the radiant heat from the bathroom floors was my favorite unexpected extra.
The setting is so peaceful and Erin’s home is clearly well loved and cared for.

We very much enjoyed our stay. It was a comfortable home with great outdoor decks, with stunning views. The bungalow was darling with its own private space. Erin was so helpful and so responsive. We would stay again without question, and highly recommend it to all!

We thoroughly enjoyed our stay! The home is beautifully appointed, warm, bright and there is everything you could possibly need available. The property is lovely and welcoming and the views are stunning.
Erin is a fantastic host as well as a friendly and caring person. She is absolutely delightful to deal with.
Honestly, we couldn’t imagine a better place to enjoy a fun and relaxing vacation. Thanks Erin!

Beautiful house with private access to a gorgeous lake. Looks just like the pictures and the host is very responsive. Despite the weather not cooperating, my family had a blast kayaking and swimming in the lake. It would have been nice to have extra towels for use when lakeside since we were a bigger group. Also since we were a bigger group, we had to be mindful of water usage with the septic tank warnings. Would recommend bringing your own beach towels. We did have plumbing issues in the bungalow on our last day, but the host was quick to address the issue. Had a great stay!

From the moment you walk in the front door, the lake views cannot be beat. That and the wide variety of outdoor deck spaces (some covered and shaded, some sunny, some up high, some right by the water) are one of the best I've ever experienced in the Finger Lakes. I really appreciated that I could bring my three dogs and loved that the main deck level kept them contained.  I also appreciated the presence of eco-friendly products, especially cloth napkins and a compost bin. Interior is cozy and comfortable. A few things to be aware of: There are a few (somewhat wobbly) metal spiral staircases connecting the decks, which aren't great for little kids, older folks, or anyone who has mobility issues. We had a few folks w/mobility issues so it was harder for them to take advantage of the waterfront but they still enjoyed the view from the main level. Two of the bedrooms in the main house do not have A/C; not a problem for us as we had cool nights.
Great stay. Outdoor deck space is really special. Fun area/community where home is. The garage / extra house is beautiful. Great home!
Everything was great, thank you for renting us your wonderful relaxing lake house.
We had a great time at this lovely home

Perfect place to stay to relax and enjoy time spent with family/friends.
Enough space for everyone and the kayaks and paddle board added to the fun.

Erin’s space is remarkable. We relaxed lake side when the weather cooperated and enjoyed the deck or views from inside when the rain or wind approached. This was our second year at Erin’s and we’ll be returning again!

For example, I let her know that there weren't any beach towels and they arrived via Amazon the next day :) We will be back!

Wonderful place by the lake for relaxation and enjoying the water. Very well equipped for water activities at the lake, cooking and board game nights. Close to town. Beautiful sunsets. Will highly recommend!
We had a great week at Erin’s lakefront home. The place was well stocked and very nicely decorated. The location was amazing right in the lake with beautiful sunsets. We hope to come back soon!

great house!

location was peaceful and private but very close to town with many attractions as well as grocery, drug store etc.  very convenient for a wedding weekend in Skaneateles.

This Airbnb provided a beautiful and tranquil place for rest and relaxation and to spend quality time with loved ones. The house was clean and the interior was warm and welcoming. Being only 15 minutes from the adorable town of Skaneateles, it provided access to both good food and fun shopping you would need for your stay. My husband and I stayed here after our busy/ hectic wedding week and it was a perfect place to reset. We would happily stay here again and recommend this house to anyone.

This was an absolutely perfect stay for my birthday weekend with 6 adult friends! A peaceful location with great views but very close to activities in Skaneateles and surrounding areas - it was only about 15 mins to the main street and we also went to a nearby pumpkin patch and winery. The house was spotless and had everything we needed and more plus design/tech features that made it feel super luxe. It exceeded our expectations/the pictures. We especially loved how well designed and spacious the bathrooms were, and enjoyed quiet time with nature on the deck and loft bed area. We had plenty of space for our group and all of the bedrooms and living spaces were very comfortable. Cannot recommend this place enough, my only complaint is I wish we stayed longer! Thank you for a beautiful stay!

This Airbnb was absolutely gorgeous. The entire place felt very relaxing and cozy. The kitchen had even more amenities than were listed including- full spice rack, tupperware,  Keurig, and my favorite part was the Culligan water filtration system installed right at the sink! We both slept soundly here on the most comfortable beds and linens. Host was very responsive if we needed anything or had questions. We love being able to bring our Golden Retriever with us on vacation and the little fenced in area off of the kitchen was such a nice addition. Would definitely recommend this place and hope to be back soon!

What a weekend!!  Absolutely, beautiful home!!  Clean, well-stocked and everything that the pics showed and more.  Not far from the village for a nice stroll and dinner.  Will definitely come back to this lovely home again.

We had a great family time at Nick’s place! The host was incredibly responsive and welcoming. The property was just as described in the picture, cozy and well-equipped with everything we needed to feel at home! I must say the host has a very sophisticated taste. I hope the host will take care of the cleaning side
Literally it’s the best place I’ve ever stayed. Highly recommended

Our group just had a short stay in Nick's beautiful place. We loved everything in there, great and spacious house, clean and bright. Beautiful outside and stunning surrounding views, my grandson especially enjoyed the trampoline. We are definitely coming back in the future.
Thank you. Nick!
House and location are spectacular.  We will definitely stay again when back in the area.

We got exactly what we were looking for when we booked with Nick!! The hosts were quick with responses. The home is beautifully updated, decorated, spacious, and the views were breathtaking!! The attention to detail all around the home is amazing!!! We were looking for a quiet little getaway to spend much needed time with family. The home came complete with everything we needed. We loved the added touch of towels and slippers per person! The beds were very comfortable, too!! We only stayed a few nights and wished it was longer!!
Recommendation: bring a gate for the stairs. we have a 1 year old interested in climbing and wish we brought a gate to block it off. We improvised with moving the coffee table in front of it - worked well!
The place is very cute and close to the lake, about 15min drive. Overall good experiences, when i had some issues Nick and his team was responsive and kept me informed and updated.
Cozy and comfortable cottage. Peaceful and lovely setting.

I absolutely loved this stay! The house was beautiful, clean, and had everything I needed for a relaxing getaway. The location was perfect, close enough to town for convenience, but far enough out to enjoy the peace and quiet of the countryside. The loft quickly became my favorite spot to start the day with coffee and a book. The bed was super comfortable, and all the amenities made the space feel like home. Communication with the host was excellent, and I only wish I had more time to stay longer. I’d 100% recommend this home to anyone visiting Lake Skaneateles. Bonus: it’s also a short drive to grocery stores and the wineries on Lake Cayuga!

We (2 adults, 2 kids, 2 dogs) absolutely loved our stay here. The place is stunning and really comfortable. Kitchen was well-stocked to cook at the house. We had a blast using the trampoline, checking out the pond, reading in the loft, and playing in the yard.
*I would note, those with physical limitations would likely struggle with the stairs, both to get inside the house as well as to the 1 upstairs bedroom. We have an old arthritic dog whom the steps to get inside were tricky for but thankfully, there’s a small fenced in area off the kitchen door with only a couple steps that was perfect for him to use during our stay. Also super convenient to let any dog out early in the morning or late at night.
*Fabulous restaurants in downtown Skaneateles.

Great Airbnb. It feels very private, there’s a lot of cool architecture in the house. There is a small fenced area if you have pets which I’m sure would be helpful. Barbecue and fire pit were great. Huge showers and a quick drive to SK
Nice, clean and private. We enjoyed our stay.
Nick is a phenomenal host. He's very engaging and helpful. His listing was spot on and enjoyable
We recently visited Pauley’s and had such a fabulous time. The property is immaculate and has spectacular views. We will definitely visit again!

What a special place, you feel secluded but safe and the lake views are fabulous from every angle. Pauley’s place is everything you could ask for in a lakeshore vacation home. The interior is even more stunning in person and we found ourselves looking forward to “going home” after wine tasting (Anyela’s Vineyards is just 10 minutes down the road). We loved drinking coffee on the lower deck, chilling in the sun room, cozying up by the fireplace and riding the funicular down to watch the sunset on your own, personal beach. Skaneateles is a picturesque Finger Lakes town for cocktails, great eats and boutiques. Pauley is a thoughtful host,  spot on check-in instructions and very attentive. We definitely will be back with friends.

We had a wonderful stay! This is our third year coming to Skaneateles and we will definitely stay at this house again next year given its location near the town, gorgeous lakefront, perfect size home for our family of 4, and great kitchen for cooking every night!

My friends and I had a great stay at Pauley's place. Fresh, modern digs that were well stocked and very clean. Comfortable beds and convenient lake access. Skaneateles is an amazing lake, super clean and surprisingly warm in late August. The house provided tranquil vibes for a group on an annual retreat looking for exactly that. Thanks Pauley!

From the moment we walked in, we felt comfortable and at home!! Everything was in order and very clean! The kitchen was well equipped and had everything we could possible need. The bedrooms were perfect for our family and beds were very comfortable. We really appreciated the trolley to the dock and it was a real novelty!!! The dock was great and we spent a lot of time there and parking our boat was easy. Thankfully there was little wind and it was perfect weather week! Thanks to Pauley and Joseph for answering all my questions🤣they were super hosts!!!

This home is fantastic.   7 of us  stayed a week and had a fabulous time.   the home is beautiful, well equipped and comfortable.   plenty of space..3 bathrooms made it perfect for a big group.   Quite, peaceful and the lake was glorious.   highly recommend.. would rent again in a split second.

Peaceful! Private! Sweet Sunrises! Spotless! And the swimming, oh the swimming!
What a reset for the nervous system!
My family of four had a dreamy stay at Lakewood Vista! We had plans to explore the area but, the house was so comfortable, the weather was so great and the swimming area was so ideal, that we just hung around played board games and swam for hours each day! We did head into town one day but quickly realized that we’d rather be paddle boarding or jumping off of the water trampoline!
The lift was really easy to use and very convenient. We quickly appreciated the buffer between the house and the lake being we have young children ages 9 and almost 5.
What a fun family trip!

10/10 perfect rental perfect week. This house is incredible, it’s even more beautiful in person.
I haven’t seen any other reviews really get into the swimming availability with this rental. We were graced with perfect weather all week so we spent an extraordinary amount of time on the dock, on the deck, and in the water. This beach is extremely swimmable. A little past the dock the water is about 5 feet deep. It’s a gradual increase so wading into the lake is extremely easy. I haven’t swam this much on vacation in ages, not since I was a little girl and it was absolutely glorious. We swam every single day for hours. Everybody used the kayaks and the paddle boards too every single day and had so much fun.
We were so happy the moment we checked in. Initially I had some questions for the hosts and they were immediately responsive, friendly, and helpful! And for the rest of the week we were on our own and living it up. The house was beautiful, comfortable, spotless and felt like home!

This is our second summer at the house! It is a wonderful setting for relaxation and family time! The home has everything you need and the lake access is perfect! Skaneateles is a short drive and offers wonderful restaurants and shopping.  We plan to come back!

Great place to stay. Whole family had a great time! Watched the sunrise from the master bedroom. Had coffee on the deck off the dining room. Watched the kids in the lake from the lower deck. Watched a thunderstorm from the screened in deck. If you wanna live the peaceful lake life…this is the spot!

Pauley was an incredible host. The house and surrounding lake was even more beautiful than expected. The town was fun with great restaurants and shops. We had a wonderful time. Winery nearby was lovely.
Pauley was responsive and the accommodations were wonderful. We had a great vacation and would love to stay there again.

We loved this warm and cozy home and felt right at home. The decor is beautiful and it has all the comfort one could ask for. We enjoyed using the funicular to go down to the lake. Very safe and convenient! Pauley was super responsive and friendly and would love to come back in future.

Pauley’s place was wonderful. Very private and about 15 mins to downtown Skaneateles by car. The views are amazing! The home is quiet and so peaceful. The kids loved the funicular down to the beach. Pauley was very responsive and quick to respond to any questions.
Very clean house in a quiet and beautiful location! Beds were very comfortable!
Absolutely beautiful home and breathtaking views.  We hope to be able to come back one day!

Pauley’s lake house was such an incredible place to stay for our girls weekend! Check-in was a breeze and the house was very clean. It feels very private and it’s so peaceful and quiet by the lake. It’s not too far from town either. Pauley is a great host and very responsive as well. Such a beautiful place to stay and felt like home!

Just returned from a wonderful week long stay at Pauley’s house. Very comfortable for four adults and two kids and the house was just as we expected based on pictures and description. The lakefront location was fantastic and we loved the kayaks, paddleboard and trampoline - tram to get down to the lake was a great and convenient bonus. Pauley and Joseph were wonderful hosts - when something came up in the house, they were incredibly responsive and proactive to get it addressed as quickly as possible. We would all love to return!
Beautiful house with prime lakefront setting. Large deck and walk in beach area were both great for kids. Would highly recommend!
We enjoyed our stay!
Beautiful spot . Loved the front decks and screened in porch . The waterfront was beautiful !! The house was very comfortable . Thank you !!
Beautiful home to vacation on one of the most beautiful lakes I’ve ever experienced. I will definitely be back again.

Communication between myself and the host was excellent, any concerns or questions I had were responded to immediately.   The decor of the home and the size of the home was perfect for our family.  Thank god for the tram, we had guests with some knee and back issues and the tram was wonderful.  The pristine water of Skaneateles is a joy and something we have missed since moving to Texas.  We would stay here again!

My family loved our time here! The house is very clean, beautifully decorated and filled with everything you need. Being on the lake was magical and we loved using the dock, kayaks and paddle board. The hosts were very responsive and communicated very clearly about use of the home!! We will certainly be back!

This house is actually better than the photos and description make it out to be! My family and I had an amazing week - it is exactly what we were looking for:  breath taking views, easy access to the lake, beautiful stone beach and dock, tons of water activities (my kids lived on the water trampoline). We'd definitely go back.
Pauley’s place was amazing. Perfect location, and the house had everything you could possibly need. Pictures do not do it justice. We cannot wait to come back!
Perfect accomodations in a beautiful location!

We stayed at Pauley and Joseph’s for my stepson’s graduation from Skaneateles High School. What amazing memories we made! The house was beautifully remodeled and the amenities for the beautiful lake were perfect for our family! We were even treated with a sweet little Skaneateles Lake bag, which was a super thoughtful touch! Highly recommend this sweet cottage for beauty, comfort, family fun, relaxation and a wonderful host family that goes over and beyond to make sure the renters are enjoying their stay! Thanks so much Pauley and Joseph!

Pauley’s beautiful lake house was the ideal location for a relaxing girls weekend. The house is in pristine condition, and the view is just gorgeous. The quiet surroundings made for an especially peaceful getaway from the chaos of life. We loved taking the tram down to the water, and the paddle board and kayaks were so fun! Plus, the location makes for easy access to town for dinner and shopping. I would recommend Pauley’s place to anyone in search of a Finger Lakes vacation.

This house is stunning. The photos do not begin to do it justice! Our family stayed here for Syracuse graduation weekend, and it was a perfect and peaceful respite. There was plenty of sleeping space, a beautiful open area for gathering and dining, and very generously appointed outdoor spaces. We will be back here for sure! Thanks so much to our gracious hosts!!
A beautiful place. Felt pampered - hosts thought of everything. The property was exactly as described - really gorgeous and relaxing. I'd definitely return!

Pauley’s place was perfect for our family getaway! The home was just as described and had everything we needed. The view of the gorgeous lake was stunning from the house, and the water trampoline was so much fun! Pauley was very communicative and responsive & we would most definitely return again.
Thanks! Looking forward to coming again!

This was our first rental in quite some time and we felt like we hit the jackpot!  Place was beautiful inside and out.  We went with our two children, 11 & 13, who loved swimming off the dock and the large trapoline inflatable.   Two kayaks and a paddleborad kept us busy as well.  Very peaceful place.   Mornings were so quiet and beautiful from the front deck or screened in porch.  Everything inside the house seemed brand new.  I highly reccomend this home for families or couples  - it really was great in every respect.

What a beautiful gem this is tucked away by the lake.  The surroundings are incredible.  The babbling waterfall next to the property adds to the ambiance.  There are several sitting areas where one can sit and have coffee or wine.  The decorating is right out of a magazine.  The place is so cute.  It's all new and clean.  We highly recommend it.  Note that the driveway is very hard to find if you are arriving in the dark, however, once you know where it is, you won't have trouble.  It's a long and rocky driveway so be cautious if you have a low clearance on your car.  The price of the place is a splurge but it is worth it for the beauty and serenity you will enjoy.  We would definitely recommend it and would stay there again.  Loved it!
We had a great stay and loved the property views and location!

Great place. Lots of room for 3 babies and 5 adults!! We loved the layout, the outdoor space and water access. The lift to the water was a lifesaver with the kids. The location is beautiful- not a lot of yard though. Walking was uphill to the main road if that’s important. House was pristine and very welcoming. I would highly recommend this location!!!

An absolute gem nestled in a peaceful and scenic area of the lake. The home is thoughtfully designed with modern furnishings, plentiful amenities and beautiful finishes throughout. Comfortable indoor & outdoor seating for our family of four to enjoy gathering all together or relaxing in our own favorite spot to take in the gorgeous views. We especially loved watching the sunrise sparkling on the water each morning. Substantial beachfront area and dock provides excellent access. The kayaks, paddle board and large trampoline provided our family with many hours of enjoyment and memorable moments on the lake. Pauley & Joe are fabulous hosts that provide a top notch vacation experience with seamless communication and we will plan to return as well as highly recommend this “home away from home” to others!

Pauley’s lake house is absolutely perfect in every way. Not only is it right on the water, but the interior design is also magazine worthy. Everything is brand new, clean, spacious, and comfortable. My family of 5 had the best long weekend—would recommend to anyone!

Beautiful place with a stunning view. The house looks much better than what the photos convey. The hosts are very friendly, responsive and went out of their way to ensure our stay was comfortable. The house is squeaky clean & lots of attention paid to small things. Highly recommend this place.

This clean, peaceful lakeside home had beautiful views, lovely enclosed porch and outdoor spaces, comfy beds, WiFi, one person kayak and paddle board. The owners provided all basic necessities as well as prompt and accurate communication. It was a convenient 15 minute drive along the lake to the town of Skaneateles where there are options for groceries and many restaurants. Overall, we were impressed with the area and the lovely accommodations. We would certainly stay here again!
The house was clean and spacious for our family of five.
Beautiful home in Skaneateles. Stayed for a wedding at the lodge.  Easy commute to the lodge and downtown! Owners were very responsive!
Great place to stay! very clean and easy to get to skaneateles!

Perfect location.
Close to Skaneateles.
Comfortable and spacious.

We loved our stay 5 minutes south from Skaneateles. The property is beautiful and as described with the main en-suite bedroom with adjunct daybed room on the main floor and the other 2 bedrooms and bathroom on lower floor.
It was just 4 (all adults) of us and we were able to enjoy the enclosed porch on our last morning when the weather warmed up.
FYI the upstairs TV has a Roku we didn’t turn on the TV in the living area downstairs.
The view to the lake on sunrises and sunsets is wonderful.
Plenty of towels and throws if you wanted to sit outside.
We even used the waffle maker one morning ( BYO waffle mix).
Tip: once you make your reservation read host’s note on driveway location as GPS maps are wrong.
Area is full of activities and good restaurants: nearby Auburn
Willard Memorial Chapel - Tiffany designed
Seward House museum
Harriet Tubman House/ visitor Center
Memorable experience hoping to return next year 😊
Wonderful place, beautiful views and close to events.

We are grateful for this beautiful home that was well equipped for a family including an infant and toddler. Lovely big yard, with a lake and sunrise view.  The house was clean and extremely well organized making  finding what we needed so easy. The floor plan’s multiple living spaces  worked well for our wee ones and adults both. The hosts were very responsive and helpful answering our questions before our stay. Thank you for a wonderful stay!
The house was even more beautiful than in the photos! Amazing views (great sunrise views), very clean, and very peaceful. Would definitely book again!

My family loved our stay!  I felt that the photos did not do justice to how spacious and lovely Cassandra and Paul's place is.  The views of the lake are beautiful,  and there is ample room to gather together or seek some privacy.  The kitchen is lovely and has everything you would need if you wanted to prepare a meal.  The home is beautiful and squeaky clean.  Skaneateles is right down the road when you want some of its charm.  A terrific place!

This home is gorgeous with so many spaces to gather or be alone. The view is lovely and peaceful. We loved hanging out on the enclosed Sun room. Kitchen well-stocked with quality dishes and pans. Beautifully updated home with a gorgeous kitchen. Furniture is clean and in great condition. Hosts were extremely responsive and helpful. 7 friends enjoyed a lovely weekend! We would definitely stay here again!
Great stay near the lake
Beautiful house, responsive owners, great view of the lake. We’ll be back and will recommend it!
Went for Syracuse graduation - worth the drive to get away from the bustle of the city. Quiet, clean, surprising roomy inside with a 3 season porch that overlooks the lake.
Outstanding, roomy house with a lovely view. Will gladly return.
The house has really beautiful views! It had everything we needed! The location was perfect!
Great mid-century style house.  WINDOWS GALORE AND GREAT VIEWS!  Five minute drive to all that Skaneateles has to offer.  Plenty of space for my family of 7 to sleep and gather.
This house is beautiful. We had so much space. Plenty of places to relax and socialize. An incredible view of the lake. We hope to return again next year.

Our family enjoyed a fantastic stay where a glorious view of the lake greeted us each morning. The home is clean, welcoming, well stocked with pots, pans, linens, blankets - all you need for a restful get away. The property is close to town but quiet if you’re spending evenings at home. Beds are super comfortable and the hosts are responsive and most accommodating.  Highly recommend!
Had a wonderful weekend at Cassandra's place while I was in town with family for a wedding. I would definitely consider booking again if I'm ever in the area.

Cassandra's place exceeded our expectations! It is VERY spacious and modern. The view of the lake was spectacular. All of our needs were met with the spotless well-appointed kitchen! Highly recommend!

This was my first Airbnb experience. My 2 friends who joined me have been in one or two before.  Cassandra and Paul were wonderful. I found this location online and decided to go here. We cannot say enough how  Great this Experience at Awake on West Lake was. The pictures looked just like what was being offered. The location is beautiful and everything and everywhere in the house was so clean and taken care of. It was so relaxing and comfortable and we all felt safe staying there. We also felt very much at Home. Thank You for letting us into your home and for the wonderful time that we had while we were there.  I will Definitely call and stay there again. You also maybe hearing shortly from one of the friends who fell in love with your home and wants to come back with her family. Again, Thank You Both.
The view is as spectacular as the pictures suggest. A very relaxing setting in a clean and well appointed home. Wonderfully responsive owners.
Beautiful views and a very comfortable home with everything we needed for a long weekend. Quiet & convenient to Skaneatles.

It was a nice Airbnb , spacious, clean , nice location . The only thing why I would not go back is the terrible room air fresheners that were in the basement. It was very overpowering that It gave me such a headache And my asthma kicking in.

It provided just what was needed for our 2 night stay. Would have loved a tea kettle but we managed just fine.
Sometimes we gathered and the large dining table, around the bar or in the sunroom to soak up the light and view.

We had the best time at Cassandra’s home. We were in town for wedding with a few friends, a toddler, and grandma (our lovely traveling babysitter) and there was plenty of room for everyone to have their own space and for the little one to explore. The place was even bigger than expected, although the photos capture it perfectly. Our only regret is booking it for one night instead of the whole weekend! I hope we can go back, and would definitely recommend staying here for anyone wanting to be a short 5 min drive to town, but with plenty of room for everyone and a beautiful view!

Highly recommend this Airbnb! Perfect location close to anyelas winery and near the  town of skaneateles. The home is in pristine condition and the screened in patio is stunning. All bedrooms were beautiful and the kitchen was perfect, too. We will definitely be back and highly recommend!

This Airbnb was one of the most lovely places I've stayed in. There was plenty of room. My favorite place to relax was the sun room which overlooked the lake. The living room and 3 bedrooms also had a lovely lake view. I had a few problems (my fault, not Cassandra's) and either her or Paul responded very quickly. It was close to Skaneateles village. If I was in the area again I would definitely come back to this Airbnb.
Cassie and Paul were absolutely awesome.  The house was great! The few issues/questions we had were addressed right away. They are good people and terrific hosts!
We came for a long weekend and fell in love with the house.  The house was immaculate and we had everything we could need.  we will definitely visit again!

We loved staying here! It was super well maintained and clean with lovely towels and bed linens which is always a nice touch. The house is a modern style lake house with amazing views and very spacious. Loved the screened in deck (in addition to the open air one too). And the hosts are super responsive and accommodating. We’ll definitely stay here again if we’re in town!
It was a very comfortable place...very nice for hosting a family gathering. Watched beautiful sunsets over the lake everynight.

A great place for a family getaway.  Beautiful and modern (recently updated) home with everything you need.  Big and roomy with great views of the lake, with big windows and a home layout that creates a nice airflow to keep as cool as you'd like.  Lots of little nooks and tucked away areas too, if you want some quiet time for yourself.  Comfy beds and couches for relaxing and napping, and Roku TVs for entertainment.  The check-in and check-out was easy, no fuss, and Cassandra was friendly and responsive to the few questions we had.  Big driveway and garage, so having 4 cars on-site was not an issue.  The town nearby had a couple different restaurants that we tried - pizza, italian, mexican, bakery - all great.  Easy access via car to the whole Finger Lakes region including Syracuse & Rochester with plenty to do.  We would definitely consider staying here again!
Really loved the mid century vibe of the house.  The view is amazing.  Short drive to village.  Would stay again for sure!

A gorgeous place to stay and was perfect for the family. The kids had space to play and there was tons of space for cooking and relaxing. Cassandra was wonderful and quickly responded to my messages. 100% recommend!

This place was as described…breathtaking! The house was absolutely beautiful and the views were picturesque! Open floor plan and kitchen was perfect for entertaining. Loved everything about this place and would love to visit again in the summer! Lauren was very responsive and communicated clearly - an easy host!

Great location that is a quick drive to downtown shops and restaurants.  The kitchen is huge and has all the bells and whistles for a family dinner.  The hot tub worked great and has a nice view of the lake through the trees.  We were here off season so I can only imagine how nice it is when you can enjoy the pool and lake.  Lauren was quick to respond and very helpful.  Overall, a very good experience.

This home was a dream getaway for us!! It is even more stunning in real life if that is possible. We went during the off season and still had a fantastic time enjoying family in such a beautiful atmosphere. The hot tub and town close by still gave us plenty to do. Lauren was an amazing host who is so accommodating, friendly, and was sure we had everything we needed. I hope to come back again soon!

Gorgeous home in a peaceful, serene town. The host listed accurate amenities
and communicated very well. Highly recommend this home for your future stay in NY!
We had an amazing weekend at Lauren’s house.  The house was beautiful and she was a wonderful and responsive host!

Exactly what my family was looking for in a post-holiday get together in the Skaneateles area. The home was well equipped and clean with everything we needed. The kids room on the lower level worked well as adults could still stay up in the evening on the main level without disturbing the sleeping children. Communication by the host was extremely responsive and pleasant. Overall I’d recommend.

We had an amazing Thanksgiving at Lauren's beautiful home! There was plenty of space and the location was convenient but private! Our family couldn't stop complimenting how wonderful the home is! Thank you Lauren!
It was wonderful! Really can't say enough about what a nice place it was. A perfect weekend getaway for the six of us, definitely hope to come back!
Amazing home! Would stay again and my girlfriends loved the space. 5 minutes from town. Many restaurants, shopping, and beautiful sights.

In a word - FABULOUS! We stayed at Lauren's home for a gals college reunion weekend and just loved it. The home is so spacious, yet warm and cozy, and the kitchen made us all jealous! The home is really well located - easy stroll down to the lake and we walked into town a couple of different times. Lauren was responsive, even alerted us to a band playing the Saturday night we were in town!
Thank you for your hospitality Lauren!!

We had a wonderful girls weekend at this beautiful property!!   Even though the weather did not cooperate we still enjoyed all the indoor amenities of this gorgeous property.  The location was not only beautiful but super convenient - less than a 5 minute drive to town and the spa.  Would love to come back during warmer weather and enjoy the outdoor amenities!  I would very highly recommend this property!

Our stay was truly INCREDIBLE! We left with cherished memories that will last a lifetime. The house had all the necessary amenities to accommodate our family. We were absolutely blown away by the stunning beauty and breathtaking atmosphere of the house. It exceeded all our expectations!
Lauren was a fantastic host! Quick to respond and made sure our stay was comfortable and provided us with a cozy, relaxing experience! Thank you, Lauren! We can't wait to come back and stay again! It was such a wonderful experience.

We had a great stay! The location was perfect and the space was great. The power went out one evening due to a storm and Lauren had flashlights and a lantern sent over promptly. Would definitely stay again.
Weekend away with family - something for everyone!  Great fishing, the water is so clear!  Enjoyed kayaking, drinks out in the village and my girls loved the private pool!

We had the best time during our stay! The house looked just like the pictures which doesn’t always happen with a rental. It was perfect for our two families with young children. We were able to rent a boat two days and dock right down the little road from the house. The proximity to town was also ideal for going out to dinner or doing a little shopping.
Lauren was wonderful and the most responsive host! She answered all questions we had almost immediately. We will definitely be staying here again!

Lauren's home was beautiful and in a very private location just a few steps from the lake.  My children and grand children made good use of the well appointed kitchen, pool and hot tub. The house is set up perfectly for multiple families as there are bedrooms on every level for extreme privacy. A big plus is that the home is only 2 minutes from Skaneateles Village which is one of the nicest towns in the Finger Lakes. The quaint lake side town offers many nice shops and good restaurants. Lauren was a very responsive host. Highly recommended.

This wonderful home was a perfect place for our family! I loved the kitchen with two sinks, two dishwashers and two ovens! The pool was beautiful and the three kids under 7 spent hours in it - just the right size and lots of space to relax! A few favorite things - S'mores at the firepit, early morning kayaking, wading and swimming at the dock, the landscaping abloom, walks up and down the lane, able to tie up our rented pontoon boat, bedrooms for all, very close to town so trips to the Skaneateles Bakery and Doug's were easily done! Lauren was great - super communicator and so responsive. We had a terrific time!
Place was great - water access - convenient to town.

We were in Skaneateles for our son’s wedding and this fabulous house became the weekend hub and haven. The location was fabulous, it was peaceful and lake accessible. The home’s layout accommodated group activities while also having places to read quietly or catch up with someone one-one. The appliances were top-notch, which matters because we like to cook.
Maybe best of all, though, was Lauren, our host. She was incredibly responsive, warm, easy to work with, flexible… all the things that made us feel comfortable on the home.
The weekend was perfect and Lauren helped make it so.

Beautiful home near the lake. We enjoyed the expansive kitchen, outside decks,  pool and hot tub. The home was very clean with new appliances. We had plenty of room to spread out and relax. Only a few minute drive to Skaneateles. Lauren was a very responsive host.
This place is phenomenal and worth every penny.

We enjoyed our stay and the house was perfect. The house is beautiful and super clean. Lauren is an excellent host - super responsive, nice, and helpful. Cannot recommend this home more. Hoping to stay again soon! Thanks again Lauren!
This home is absolutely stunning! I cannot recommend this enough. Everything was so open and spacious!

Lauren's home was just as advertised.  The home was beautiful and in an amazing location.  We would love to come back and spoil ourselves with this home.  We had a terrific visit and the enjoyed all the amenities.  The deck and view of the lake were so wonderful!

This house is beautiful and perfect for a crowd.  Tons of space to spread out, but also felt homey at the same time We were a group of 6 girls.   The kitchen is definitely the highlight of this house, but most of the cabinets were empty. There were only 2 wine glasses, no wine opener,  and there was no ice.  The size of the kitchen and seating for eating doesn’t match the amount of items in the kitchen.  We also weren’t able to locate the iron.  We would definitely book this house again, but would know to bring some things that weren’t there. (foil, plastic wrap, sandwich bags,)
We have now stayed at Lauren’s beautiful listing twice and definitely plan to be back. This home is gorgeous, location is perfect and host is friendly and responsive. Highly recommend!

I cannot recommend Lauren’s place enough! It was absolutely stunning, just as described and looked exactly like the pictures. The house was clean and had all the amenities. Lauren was always super responsive to any question I had and was very accommodating. This house was great for our group of 10 and we didn’t want to leave. We can’t wait to stay again!

We enjoyed our stay at Lauren’s place so much that we are already booked for another stay in a few months. The house is gorgeous, the views and beautiful, the kitchen is a dream and the host is responsive and friendly. Ten out of ten would absolutely recommended to anyone and everyone!

Really enjoyed our stay at Laurens house.
The home was spacious with an amazing Master Suite as well as 4 other well appointed Bedrooms.
The kitchen and entertaining area was great for our family and cooking on the high end appliances was a joy.
The hot tub worked great and had plenty of nice massage features.
We did not use the pool but it looked beautiful
The walk to the lake was less than 5 minutes.
Distance to the city and restaurants was quite short, only about 5 minutes. We found a wonderful coffee shop in town that we had to visit every morning.
Distance to Cayuga and lake Seneca wineries is manageable with good planning.
Distance to Ithaca breweries and waterfalls was manageable.
Lauren was a wonderful host and responded to our questions quickly
Highly recommend this beautiful home for a family vacation. It has everything you could dream of.
Great house! Tons of space, loved our stay.

My family had the best time together at this lake house. It was shockingly beautiful right when you walk in and every single inch of the house was completely clean and finished. It was setup perfectly for family time.
Absolutely loved this spot. looking to book it again soon!
Wonderful home and location.  We greatly enjoyed our stay, and Lauren was fantastic to deal with.  10 out of 10.

Lauren’s house was absolutely beautiful - huge spaces for group fun, perfect distance to town, and breathtaking view. We came for a girls trip and on several occasions talked about “how we can rent this place all over again.” Absolutely excellent! Lauren was great and communicative as well (and a fellow Buffalo Bills fan to boot) - an all around incredible stay. Thanks, Lauren!

Great updated house with plenty of room and great location to town. We had 7 adults and the living room could have used additional comfortable seating for all of us. There were also not enough seats at the large dining table. We were looking for instructions for the TV cable operation, the garbage & recycling and the WiFi info and never found them.
I'm giving this a very positive review, these were just a few thoughts for the host.
One thing breathtaking pure happiness an peace the house made us remember what family is love
We loved our stay! Everything was clean and Lauren was very communicative.
Enjoyed our stay in this wonderful home and the host was super responsive and helpful.  The space was clean, airy and comfortable—exactly as described.

The house was absolutely amazing, beautiful and well stocked. The property is breathtaking with a beautiful pool lawn and lake. Lauren was incredible during our stay answering all our questions and offering help in every way. I even booked my next stay before we left!

This house was absolutely beautiful.
It was clean and right near the lake, beautiful pool + hot tub!
Lauren was very helpful and quickly responded to all messages.
Definitely will be returning!

Our stay at Lauren’s lake house was fantastic! The property was immaculate and the house itself was phenomenal! My family enjoyed all of the amenities inside and out. The pool was clean and the house was well stocked. We especially enjoyed the comfort of the beds and the high end furnishings. We would not hesitate staying there again next time we are in the area. Thanks for everything! We really appreciated your kindness and hospitality!
This place was AMAZING! We loved everything about it! Lauren was an incredible host and she made us feel very welcome. We’re looking forward to returning soon !!!
Wonderful stay, beautiful clean house in an amazing location. We brought two small kids with us and it was perfect for them! Thanks Erin
Erin’s place was perfect to ring in my college graduation! The three decks had plenty of options to gather and the sunsets are unbeatable. Close to town but still felt private, thank you Erin!
Beautiful views comfortable house!

This house is beautifully unique…there is so much to see beyond the listing photos. It is peaceful, homey and in a great location. We visited the town (8 min), Lakeside Vista (5 min) and the Cayuga wine trial (30 min) from here. We spent an evening on the back deck, eating dinner, playing games and watching the sunset. Some of us took out kayaks. It’s a beautiful view. There’s about 50 pics in my camera roll of every time of day from every deck. Some of the decking is in need of an uplift, but we didn’t mind. The bed in the master was very comfortable, but all of the bedrooms get bright early even with shades. Very big towels were provided. There are soooo many classic books on the shelves that I loved looking through. The kitchen had everything and more that we needed to cook breakfast and dinner. Some things we weren’t as used to, but weren’t a problem—composting, not flushing #1, linen napkins, the cable and streaming services never worked for us either. Overall I highly recommend

The house has a beautiful view of the lake from the master bedroom, downstairs living room and the 4 decks. Many windows and skylights give lots of light.
Erin was very personable and gave us great suggestions of restaurants and hikes.
The house is beautiful and quite comfortable with a well equipped kitchen and plenty of interesting books and games. We had a most enjoyable stay!
Great location. Parking can be difficult.

Erin, your childhood home is truly a gem!   We had such a wonderful time on Shady Bend Lane.  The entire home was certainly crafted with loads of love and attention to every detail.  Very clean, comfortable, and well equipped. Decking was amazing, allowing outstanding views of the lake. Erin herself, just a quick phone call away!

Our family gathered in this home as we had an internment for my husband's father.  It was a wonderful place to gather after the ceremony. Several of us stayed on to enjoy the place for the weekend. The home is lovely, comfortable and well supplied. The location is amazing with beautiful lake views. Erin was accessible and helpful with any questions that we had. We look forward to staying again with family and friends.

Erin’s Lakehouse was everything we hoped for and would want in a Lakehouse of our own someday. The expansive outdoor decks were really great and it’s just under a ten minute drive into the village. The house was very well appointed with everything we needed, including a high chair for our little girl. We hope to stay there again soon.
We had a wonderful time staying at this property. It has a perfect location. The deck was amazing. We can’t wait to go back.

This property is absolutely amazing! The pictures are beautiful, but I was absolutely amazed when we arrived at how much more beautiful the home is in person! The decks and the lake views are gorgeous. You literally get a different view of the lake from each deck. It truly is a special place! And Erin is wonderful, I had the pleasure of meeting her and she is so kind and such a great host. My family loved it here and we cannot wait to come back

Beautiful spot on the lake with multiple decks, great swim area, dock and kayak. House is spacious and room for everyone. Morning walks up/down the lane. Everything you need. Host easily accessible and responsive.
Beautiful home and beautiful surroundings! Perfect location with amazing views from all of the decks. Home was very well stocked and comfortable. Had a fabulous stay and plan to come back!
Perfect home with an excellent vibe.
Perfect!

Amazing place! Plan on spending a lot of time on the deck - it's outstanding ! Plenty of good spots for sunlovers and shadelovers alike. We thought we'd go out to dinner each night, but ended up getting lots of takeout and eating looking over the lake. It was just beautiful! Loved the natural, waste-free style of living there, and the natural products provided. This was a really memorable trip for me and my family, so grateful that Erin and her family shared their lovely home with us!

Gorgeous family home with soothing healing presence! We rented this place for a summer staycation for ourselves and some friends & had a most wonderful weekend enjoying the beauty of the lake, all the art, in this cozy home that greets you with open arms and love!
Perfect for an R&R lake holiday. We hope to make this an annual tradition- highly recommended!
Good location, house in need of some upkeep and polish.

The house was even nicer in person than the pictures. The kitchen was very well equipped and well laid out with tons of countertop space. We had an amazing long weekend visiting with family from Syracuse. The tiered deck was nice for outside meals and relaxation. Our kids had fun playing on the small beach space on either side of the lower dock and wading in a bit. The house is only ten minutes from town and 30ish to Syracuse, but really it’s such an oasis you don’t want to leave. We were lucky with great weather and spent most of our time outside, but the house is spacious enough to hangout inside very comfortably. We will definitely plan to return. Thank you!

Erin’s home on the lake is as advertised, spectacular! Well appointed kitchen, comfortable rooms, a beautiful garden, and the decks are spacious. An incredible view! Close to town. Be on deck to see the sunset-wow!

Had an excellent and comfortable stay at Erin's beautiful home amidst natural surroundings. It's much thoughtfully and meticulously set up homely comfort, highly recommended for anyone who's looking for a peaceful stay in a tranquil, rustic and calm environment.
Perfect location, gorgeous house and a short drive to town.  We’d love to come back! Perfect for a relaxing girls weekend but I’d love to come back with my family.

Erin’s place is lovely. Family of 7 stayed a long weekend for a Syracuse graduation . A nice place to relax on the deck for morning coffee or a bbq. We loved the decks. Well appointed kitchen and the washer dryer a big plus. All soap, shampoo, conditioner provided. It was hot (80’s) and only the master had air conditioning but fans were provided. Erin was extremely responsive to all inquiries.

This place is already gorgeous in pictures, but even more breathtaking in person. We happen to arrive as the sun was setting and the view of the lake from the living room was incredible. If you’re looking for a place with views, this is it.
The house comes fully stocked with everything you need to cook, clean, and even grill out. The views from the master bedroom are worth waking up early to watch the sunrise. Our dogs spent the majority of the trip sunbathing on the deck.
The neighborhood was very quiet and safe. I recommend taking a drive to the little village area 3 miles away. There’s a beautiful pier, cute stores to shop for gifts, and plenty of restaurants.
We decided to check out Anyela’s Winery which is located directly across the lake ( about a 15 min drive.) The drive is also scenic and lined with gorgeous homes. If you go, you must try the medium-dry Riesling, the Pinot noir rose, and the Shiraz. Don’t sleep on visiting this Finger Lake.
Gorgeous views and decks. Lovely hosts!

We had the most wonderful weekend at this beautiful home! We can’t decide which was better - the stunning views or the home’s overall coziness.
