The many decks, the quiet road, being right on the water, and the other thoughtful touches the hosts have added, made this home an ideal place to stay. The local town was also such a relaxing and fun place to hang out. We would absolutely love to return.
This house has beautiful lake views and plenty of space.  We enjoyed our stay and appreciated that we were able to bring our dog!

I have stayed at several Airbnbs. All have been very nice. But this place…this place is next level. Beautiful scenery, beautiful home, and so many little extras and amenities that just made it all absolutely perfect.
Thank you, Erin! Perfect house on a perfect lake. We will be back.

Be prepared to be WOWed.  Words do not adequately describe the decking and views from Erin's place.  The rooms are larger than they seem from the pictures, and the kitchen - top of the line stove, pans, utensils, "gadgets".  Lovely, quiet neighborhood, close to lots to do.  We all had such a marvelous stay - we hated to leave!

We chose this house because of the pictures — it’s easy to see it’s gorgeous and the views (wow) — all amazing.
But from the moment we entered, it was so much more. The rare Airbnb feels like a home (rather than a house), and Erin has accomplished just that. The small details are there; local organic coffee, hot teas, everything you might ever need in the kitchen (and I mean everything), cozy nooks, and a myriad of books to sit in the books with (ohhh, the book collection — there’s something for everyone!), the soaps, the towels, the thoughtfulness for the environment — I could go on!
Bottom line — you will sink right in and feel at home here. Thank you, Erin! We will be back.

Erin was a great host and the house was amazing! We loved the decks off the living room and the master bedroom. We really appreciated all the little touches that made our stay great. We would highly recommend Erin’s lake house on beautiful Skaneateles lake!

This is a wonderful house!  The views of the lake are beautiful; even in March, we put on parkas and drank coffee on the deck.  The inside is lovely, too--plenty of space for us to cook together (a REALLY well-equipped kitchen), gather around the dining room table for dinners, and relax and play games.  We enjoyed the surrounding area, too--lots of charming shops, an excellent winery (Anyela's), and a fun brewery in Skaneateles.  Erin and Peter are quick to communicate and ready to offer assistance if needed.  It was a great way to celebrate our daughter's 21st birthday!
Amazing.

Everything here was above expectations.  The second you walk through the front door you're met with breath taking views.  Erin and Peter are great. They have thought through everything you could possibly have questions with, and make your time here relaxing, tranquil, and filled with peace and good vibes.  Would definitely recommend, and most certainly plan to come back.

This is a stunning place on the water. We instantly felt at home, at peace and happy in this cozy spot. Fireplace, views, piano and amazing kitchen to cook in really made this property stand out. Would happily return in summer or winter!
Very nice little Christmas getaway.

We had a fabulous family gathering at Erin and Peter’s lovely lake house! Even though it was December, the lake views were spectacular even while relaxing inside. The kitchen was well equipped to host a nice dinner and to enjoy cozy breakfasts. The home has an abundance of beautiful artsy touches, and lots of board games and puzzles for family fun! The village of Skaneateles was only a few minutes away. Erin and Peter were very accessible as questions arose. We would highly recommend a stay here any time of year!
Erins place was very cozy and beautiful with the view. We are planning to go back in summer.
This well-stocked home is cozy, comfortable, and inviting. The views of the lake are perfect. We loved staying here and would again in a heartbeat.
Beautiful lake house a short drive from restaurants and shops. Perfect spot for a relaxing weekend away.

This home was absolutely gorgeous. We thoroughly enjoyed sitting out on the deck watching the sunsets and relaxing. We also enjoyed flipping through some of the home's impressive library, and looking at the old photos on the wall. Communicating with Erin could not have been easier, and the house is in a great location convenient to the village. I would highly recommend this AirBnb. Thank you Erin!

Erin's house is a spacious, comfortable lake house with plenty of room for 3 couples to cook, relax, and enjoy the amazing view. It was a little too cold to take advantage of the fabulous deck and water access, but we were only a 10 minute drive from downtown Skaneateles. Beds are comfortable, location is peaceful, and the place is very clean; expect eco-friendly accommodations like composting and fragrance-free products. This was Erin's childhood home, and you do get that homey sense, and the sense that she wants to preserve it as is! We would definitely stay at this location again.

The views here are absolutely beautiful and the multi level decks and waterscape garden setting give this a spa like feel. The beds were so comfortable and the main living area with a baby grand, fireplace and views of the lake make it a real winner. Erin was awesome for staying in communication with us before and during our stay. A+

Great house for a great getaway! We enjoyed the house, the decks and lake views! Easy access to Mirbeau Spa and downtown. So fun and we had a great weekend. Erin is a great host. House was clean and comfortable. 5 stars!!

The pictures don't do this home justice - it is so roomy, homey and beautiful. You'll fall in love with its little quirks and feel like you're in a little sanctuary with all of the beautiful plants, garden pond and deck space. It's a great place to get away and relax in peace and quiet with beautiful views. The amenities are great and you truly have everything you need. It was very clean and welcoming - I truly have no complaints.

Met friends from HS for a long weekend in mid October, house and lake were beautiful as was the surrounding area. Spent a lot of time cooking, eating, hanging out and playing games all with a great view of the water. Only got to go out one day on the lake but if we had come just a couple of weeks earlier I'm sure we would have gone out a lot more. Highly recommend the house if you have a larger group as there's plenty of space especially out in the deck area. Neighborhood was nice and very quiet which is always a plus, and the town is close which helped if we needed anything.
Great house - location, furnishings, kitchen equipment and beds all top notch and very clean and well kept up.  Communications A1 too.  Thanks.
Great house, with a beautiful view!! We will definitely be back!!
Great hidden gem of a house, the view was to die for and the house is just beautiful, even more so than the pictures online.
Great location, good amount of space in the house
Such a beautiful place!!
My family and I had a wonderful stay. Great house with lots of room.
A nice getaway with our friends!

The house was clean and adequate for what our needs were. The “game room” area was essentially the garage. The floor in this area were warped, and loose,  and there were signs of water damage. The pool table was not level, and essentially unable to be used. The house in general could use a few fixes (very muddy yard- but fire pit useable, outside drainage was a concern in driveway , steps to upstairs  from garage were warped). Overall this was a great place close to downtown Skeaneateles, with a partial view of the lake. Kitchen, bedrooms, bathrooms, living room were all clean and comfortable. The house was priced appropriately, but with BNB fees, it turned out to be rather expensive for the value.
hosts were very accommodating, house had alot if nice extras, fun game, towel heaters. beautiful bathrooms.
Thank you for an amazing weekend.  Our first girls weekend together was one to remember.
Very nice and clean place
The was responsive and a great place to get together with friends!

The house had lots of parking and fit our group of ten adults comfortably. The kitchen had everything we needed. We ended up having dinner locally in the center of town, which was conveniently located less than ten minutes away. We enjoyed the game room with pool table and darts. All in all, a great time!
It was a great cozy place for the family. The house was clean and had great surroundings. The host was really friendly and helpful. I’ll definitely go again for a stay.
Great place with an amazing area to have a girls weekend spacious kitchen area and plenty of rooms with ample bathrooms !!!

This did not start as a 5 star review as there was a little mix up with the property upon our arrival. However - Hazma worked swiftly to correct it despite the late hour. Jessica and Taylor who came to take care of things were so awesome, kind and efficient and the issue was corrected fully the night we arrived.  Other than that this house is perfect for a two-family get away. The generous 4 bed 3 bath size, TV den and garage converted to a heated playroom gives everyone space during the stay. I agree with the review that there is no table to fit Everyone in the house but our elementary school aged kids were more than happy to sit at the oversized kitchen island at meals. The area is great - don’t miss Good Sips and Eats right in town which will welcome your dog indoors as well! ( other recommended restaurants do not allow dogs); starlite bowl in auburn is also classic family fun. Hazma and team are amazingly responsive, clear and fair hosts and we’d gladly work with them again!
Thank you for hosting us!
We had a great stay and will definitely return.

Great spot for a group of friends to get together and have a relaxing and comfortable night. Only complaint was that they were more well stocked than they let on which means we bought more supplies than necessary in advance. Would stay again. Great vibe

The house is comfortable and beautiful. Exactly as described.  Great for a family or friends get away. Was a little disappointed we could not use the recreation room since it had a busted window. The host offered to fix it but we didnt want him to bother our doggies. It is about a 5 mile ride to center of town.  Overall we had a wonderful time. Definitely recommend staying here.

We had a wonderful autumn weekend at this lovely home within 5 miles from beautiful "downtown" Skaneateles.  What a great get-away for me and my girlfriends.  We enjoyed the outdoor fire pit, the privacy of the home (no neighbors!), the spacious kitchen/living areas and the modern bathrooms and simple but spacious bedrooms.  When it rained, we retreated to the basement area and played pool and foosball.   We caught a Syracuse University football game on the large screen tv in the den.  So we really used every part of the house!  The owner is super responsive and friendly.

We had a great stay at the house! The kitchen and bathrooms are very clean and modern. We were a little disappointed with the basement. There is significant water damage with the floor springing due to separation in the lamination. We didn’t use the game room due to the mold smell. Also the driveway is a safety hazard with the crumbling asphalt and dead leaning trees over the driveway. Overall though, good stay and Hamza is a great host!

We had an amazing stay at Hamza’s place. Our family felt right at home. There was lots of space, the kitchen is huge & beautiful and the game room was tons of fun for everyone. Best of all, Hamza was extremely responsive and easy to reach. All in all - a wonderful stay! We would love to come back again
Everything was great. The house was as described and they were wonderful hosts.
Hamza is a very responsive host.  When we had issues during our stay, he responded quickly and resolve them.
Great place, great time.  Definitely would go again!

My family which included my wife, two kids and my older parents stayed at Hamza’s place for two nights. He was very responsive to my questions before we arrived, but our experience was mixed. The bathrooms and the kitchen were great. Nice touches and with great appliances. The bedrooms were spacious with nice beds. My kids enjoyed the game room.
The condition of the exterior is a problem. There were cigarette butts left on the back patio. The landscaping was rough. Weeds everywhere. Some of which were partially obstructing the front walkway. There are steps leading to the back yard, but the 4th step is extremely loose and is definitely not safe. The driveway is in terrible condition. All of this made it difficult for my parents.
While we liked the kitchen, we had to properly clean the Keurig water tank and there was no sponges or brushes to clean pots/pans, etc…. It just made things awkward. This house has lots of potential. I’m sure Hamza will address.
Great spot and plenty of room. Heheh house was very clean and the kids loved the game room. We will be back. Thanks !

We loved this airbnb. It was very close to town which was so great! We had small kids so the stairs were a little scary  but we bought a baby gate in town so all was good. everything was brand new which was amazing. we loved the layout. the host was really responsive which made things super easy. Highly recommend!
Hamza got back to us super quickly on all questions and concerns.  There were plenty of supplies in bathrooms, kitchen etc… and the place was very clean.

Enjoyed our time in Skaneateles! Couple of the kitchen appliances were broken, so informed Hamza about that. Small dock that is accessible is not a dock and instead a gravel path which was at first difficult to find. Completely lost water on the Saturday of our stay (for ~8h) due to faulty water tank, but Hamza was very responsive and quick to find plumbers. Inconvenient, but also understandable that thinks do break! Overall, house was a great meeting place for my friends & I would stay there again!
Hamza is a great host with a great location. He’s very responsive and clear in his communications.
It was very beautiful place,we enjoyed very much, the fire place made the home very special and unique and seeing the nature all the time was espectacular!!!
Our stay was wonderful! We would definitely think about going back!
Peaceful quiet location, nice outdoor space. Good communication by host and simple instructions.

This place was perfect for my wedding weekend! Plenty of room for me and my bridesmaids to get ready, the rooms and bathrooms were very clean and great for those who stayed, and the lighting was perfect for photos. Hamza was quick to respond and very friendly. He even let me check in early and check out late to make sure we had plenty of time for our wedding weekend. It was 20 min from our venue, but worth the drive to have this place!
Cute house and area
Hamza was a great host, Thanks again!

Plenty of room for 8 (or more) people.  Two nice indoor gathering areas.  Perhaps could use a few more chairs in the dining area.  Perfect for a large family or group of friends. LOVED the radiant (floor) heat!  Very close (8min drive) to shops & restaurants in cute Skaneateles.
Great location, extremely conducive to relaxing and had everything we needed and more.
Great spot, had a good time great location and the house was nice
Hamza was extremely responsive and we had a great time.
Great place.....perfect location and easy to access.   Place is exactly as described and host was always responsive.

Hamza was a great host. He was super responsive with communication and he was willing to work the needs we had for arrival and departure.  The house was clean and spacious. We enjoyed the fire bit and the wide open kitchen. It was just 8 minutes away from town, which has great shops and restaurants.

Note: The 2376 East Lake Road is actually East Lake STREET. Don't go 41A if GPA instructs. This is the west side of the lake. Go Route 41 (instead of 41A), the East side of the lake. Then it's 4.7 miles down on your left heading from the village.
Pros - Nice house close to town- great fire pit area, great beds and linens and wonderful rain showers! The kitchen/dining/living area are open concept so plenty of room to hang out with a large group. Washer and dryer. Heating/Air wall unit in each bedroom/living area that are separately controlled. Host was very responsive!
Cons - The house sleeps 10 but the dining table only fits 4. 4 have to sit at the counter. No kitchen linens. Had to grab hand towels from the bathroom to use in the kitchen. Bedrooms/Bathrooms were cleaned but the couch in the family room was full of crumbs and the windows were not cleaned. No cleaning products were in the house. Host was apologetic so I'm sure that will change.
We would stay there again
Had a great stay and Hamza was a pleasure to work with
House is modern and very nice! We enjoyed the fire pit outside. We had a great stay at the house for a girls weekend!
Nice and spacious!

Excellent space
Convenient to family situation on short notice
Very responsive and accommodating host
Stairs can get icy with wintry conditions
Great place with great views around! The house was cozy and just wonderful. Would definitely recommend to everyone and will be returning.
Beautiful house in a great location!
Great spot!

Spacious home in ideal location close to town and activities. The bedrooms and bathrooms were updated and very clean. The kitchen was updated but unfortunately there were dirty dishes and pans in the cupboards. Placemats on the table were very dirty. When we notified the host, he was very apologetic and accommodating. Also, we tried to do laundry but the wash machine was full of dirty water and wouldn’t drain.
Hamza was responsive and communicated well throughout our stay addressing our concerns.
We enjoyed the game room, playing pool one afternoon when the weather was bad.

We love skaneateles! Our daughter lives there and it’s a great place to visit and now we have a wonderful house to stay at when we are too large a group to stay with her family !!
The house was great -plenty of room to hang out ! No complaints at all !
This house was a real find for us. It was on the same street as our relative so the location was unbelievable. It’s close to the village and the lake.
We stayed here with two families (4 adults and 4 toddlers) and had a great time! Loved the area and the kids loved the huge yard and swing. Would definitely stay here again!

This Airbnb was wonderful with its close  proximity to Skaneateles and cleanliness. The house was stocked with brand name and large size shampoo and body washes across the two full size bathrooms and plenty of towels were supplied for our party of 7. The house was super cute and had plenty of parking. We enjoyed our stay and would happily return if in the area again.

Was so happy to find such a beautiful, relaxing, comfortable place to stay with the women in my family for a bridal shower in the village.  The accomdations were spectacular: comfortable and stylish bedrooms and relaxation spaces, modern kitchen and bathrooms (shower pressure was fabulous!), all in a peaceful setting that was so convenient to the village. Excellent communication with the hosts.  Top notch and would recommed to anyone! Exceeds the descriptions!
Ronnie saved us from an awful Airbnb we booked previously! This home was so cute and SO CLEAN! Would definitely stay here again.
We had a wonderful stay with our family of 8! We were in town for our daughter’s graduation from Syracuse. Everything was just as pictured and Ronnie was very responsive. Would 100% stay here again!

A lovely get-away for our family of 8 while we were visiting the area. Ronnie was very friendly & responsive to my questions.
Location is closer by to the town for restaurants & shopping.
The Air B&B was clean, roomy, & tastefully decorated, with special touches of personal towels displayed on each bed.
I recommend for others to stay here!
We had an awesome time celebrating our daughter’s wedding.  The location and space were perfect!
Ronnie’s place is a gem, the area is peaceful, the house is cozy and clean, and a short drive or walk into town. If we are in the area again, we would stay again without hesitation!

A perfect location for our Christmas holiday. The house was stunning and warm and cozy and only a short walk from the most picturesque village imaginable. We loved every minute of our stay and would recommend it to everyone!
Beautiful home close to downtown that was warm, welcoming, and perfect for our weekend getaway!

I have rented this house for overflow family at Thanksgiving for two years and it has worked out perfectly.  Clean, clutter free, spacious interior which looks out over rustic countryside.  There is plenty of space in the driveway for multiple cars, and the location is walkable to Skaneateles.  So pleased we have found this great spot!
Great vacation rental!
The house was perfect for our family of 5! Was beautifully decorated and had all the necessaries from games, comfy beds, linens and towels. Can’t wait to come back.
Amazing home and location
Great home, perfectly appointed for our girls weekend getaway. A short drive into downtown Skaneatles, perfect location.

It truly was the most quintessential house for our ladies weekend! It's tastefully decorated and has plenty of space for it's guests! We were very comfortable and we enjoyed our stay! This home is a GEM!

The house was just as beautiful as shown in the photos. It was very clean, well decorated and was the perfect set up for 8 people. Ronnie was also very communicative and helpful. I would love to come back and stay at the home again.
Beautifully decorated house, everything was extremely clean. Wonderful stay for a wedding weekend!

Ronnie's house was the perfect girls getaway trip.
We had a great time exploring Lake Skaneateles renting a pontoon boat and shopping in town.
We hiked, hit the winery and had a delicious dinner at Sherwood Inn. The area is spectacular and can't wait to come back!

We stayed at Ronnie's house for a weekend of cycling in the Finger Lakes.   The house has been beautifully renovated and easily accommodated our group for meals and relaxation. The bedrooms, linens and towels were all first class. The kitchen had everything we needed. The air conditioning and the smart TV were big pluses. We love cycling in this area.  We'll return to Ronnie's house again.
We really enjoyed our stay!
We had a great stay.  The home was very clean and as advertised in the description and photos.
We really enjoyed our stay at Ronnie's! House was clean and as-described, and the backyard was beautiful. Ronnie was very easy to communicate with as well.
Such a cute place! We truly enjoyed our stay.

My family and I came from all over for a wedding weekend. The Airbnb was unbelievable, everyone couldn’t stop raving about its location and quaintness. It was perfect. Ronnie was great to communicate with and very welcoming.
Clean modern home. Our stay was very comfortable.

The pretty town of Skaneateles is right on the lake with amazingly clean and clear water. The chic farmhouse is about a mile outside town - walkable or a short drive. The location is quiet and almost rural feeling but still feels very safe (we did a lot of walking and running in the local streets). The house is a very practical space with a well stocked kitchen and great dining and sitting areas in the sunroom (important to us traveling as a family). Bedrooms are a good size, lots of room for parking. There were seven of us and we never felt on top of each other. Our host, Ronnie, was very responsive and checked in throughout. Overall a great option for staying in this area.

Great place to stay to enjoy Skaneateles any time of year.  Our crew of 5 adults and three small children felt right at home as we traveled together to enjoy a family reunion nearby.  Immaculate housekeeping and two large bathrooms made morning and evening very manageable.  Appliances were great as was the deck and large back yard.  The owner failed to mention the large paved driveway, which was an unexpected bonus.  No trouble juggling three large SUV's and errands to pick up things we forgot at nearby stores!  Air conditioning worked well. The first floor bedroom is a plus if you are traveling with someone who has difficulty with stairs.  The full bath on the first floor makes living on this level very easy. Clean, comfortable and convenient says it all!

If I could give Ronnie more than 5 stars, I would. The house is spotless, tastefully furnished, cozy and comfortable.  The location is convenient to town, but far enough away to be quiet. And lastly, Ronnie is a very responsive host.
Ronnie was a great host and the house was exactly as described. Everything was clean and the location was very close to all of the shops and restaurants. Would definitely recommend!
Perfect place to stay for a family with children.  Great yard space and the deck was great.  I would highly recommend.

Such a lovely place to gather with friends! Plenty of space for hanging out and plenty of privacy too. Two full bathrooms made getting ready uncomplicated. The back deck was lovely and the bedrooms were comfy and quiet. The town of “Skinny Atlas” was very cute. Loved GOOD Eats & Sips for breakfast and The Krebs for dinner. We hope to come back again in the future!
Great house! Super clean and family friendly! Lovely location easy/short drive to the town of Skaneateles. Ronnie was a super responsive host and I would absolutely stay here again!

We used Ronnie’s place as a little work retreat - the living area had a great table for the 3 of us to connect up our laptops and storyboard. Great internet for a rural location too! Place was spotless, the no shoes rule was great - we knew the place would be clean!
Had an excellent stay, thank you Ronnie!

Beautiful and peaceful place! Looks exactly like the pictures. The place was spotless when we got there! There were 8 of us and we all fit perfectly. We didn't feel like we were limited in space. The bedding was incredibly comfortable. Ronnie was also a great host. He was proactive, communicative, and friendly. Thank you for a great stay!
We loved our stay and would definitely come back! Perfect for our trip.

This house was exactly as described. The house was clean when we arrived and it was easy to get inside since the host left detailed instructions. The host wants the house shoe free but there wasn’t ample space to put all of our shoes. An additional shoe rack would’ve been nice. The kitchen was very clean and had what we needed. The rest of the house was clean as well except for the upstairs bathroom floor. It needed a good mopping. The host provided large bottles of shampoo, conditioner and body wash. A few extra bath towels would’ve been nice. The beds were extremely comfortable and all the fans were on when we arrived making the rooms a comfortable temperature. I  would’ve been a bit of a walk to town so we drove. Overall, this was a great house and I would highly recommend it.

This was our second stay at Ronnie ‘s home. We rented it for our family of 6 for my son‘s graduation from Syracuse. We loved it just as much this time as our first! It felt like we were coming home. The house is immaculate and so well appointed and the deck & backyard are beautiful and inviting.
Ronnie is always incredibly responsive and so thoughtful. We arrived to find a beautiful cheese board & wine, as well as flowers and a lovely card for our graduate! We were very touched.
Skaneateles is a peaceful alternative to staying in the crazy congestion around the university, especially over family weekend and graduation. We loved being able to spend time in this charming town, take pics at the water and easily drive back-and-forth to the University (30 min) which we did pretty much every day over the 5 days. We will most certainly be back again!

Our group had a wonderful experience in Ronnie’s home. The home was beautiful, comfortable, and easily accessible to restaurants, shopping, etc. We enjoyed the deck in the morning and evening. The kitchen had everything we needed for our stay. Ronnie was incredibly helpful and responsive to our questions. We will definitely plan to stay in this lovely home again if we have the opportunity to return to the area. Thanks, Ronnie, for your hospitality!
This was a great family get away! It's very child friendly. We had a toddler and infant with us and it was safe, and a great time! It was extremely clean and bright!
We had a wonderful stay.  Very clean and comfortable.  Close to the village and its great restaurants.
Great place and great host. Would 100% recommend

Just stayed there for a girls weekend. The house was clean, beautifully decorated. Plenty of space. The patio was an added bonus as we sat out and ate dinner there with a nice backyard view one night. 5mins from the town of Skaneatelas. We will definitely be back!
Extremely clean, beautiful peaceful setting

We had a wonderful visit.  Start to finish everything was perfect for our family of 6 adults. It was way to find, super clean and cozy and close to downtown.  The home is beautiful and very spacious. Ronnie was quick to respond and helpful.  We definitely look forward to coming back and booking again with him.  Skaneateles was great to visit and we were so impressed with how friendly kind and helpful everyone was.  We especially enjoyed the Elephant and Dove restaurant and the brewery in town.  Can’t express enough what a perfect weekend we had !!!

Stop scrolling and book this fantastic cottage! Our family of 5 (including three kids 7 and under) were very comfortable here visiting family for Christmas. The cottage was spacious, spotless, beautifully decorated, and had everything we needed - including a Christmas tree, which was such a toughtful touch! Ronnie was SUPER responsive and flexible when weather disrupted our travel plans. It's possible to walk downtown from the cottage; otherwise all the attractions of Skaneateles are just a short drive away. (Skaneateles does not allow most short-term rentals in the Village per local ordinance, so we were thrilled to find Ronnie's cottage just outside the Village limits but super close to everything!)

We had such a great time at Nick's house! It was super spacious and had everything we needed to feel right at home. The outdoor space was a huge highlight — lots of room to run around, and our kids especially loved the playset, trampoline, and all the games outside. It was the perfect spot for a family getaway — peaceful, comfortable, and just really easy to settle into. We'd definitely come back!
Had a nice stay with family! It had all the things we needed and location was great.

Nick's home was beautiful as the pictures indicate. It was private and comfortable and well-stocked for our arrival. We did have a couple of challenges related to our check in, but Nick and his team were incredibly responsive and attentive to getting the issues addressed very quickly.  The nature--birds, bunnies, deer, and mink were all great to watch from the beautiful wrap-around deck!  We would definitely return again next time we are in the area.

I said every morning, “this is exactly what I wanted!” To sit on the deck, with a cup of iced coffee. I also enjoyed laying on the trampoline and listening to the birds sing, the trees blow, and the stream flow. My family and I chose this place due to the amenities for the kids, and the relaxing nature for mom :) the trampoline was a perfect addition to the space, as allllll kids love this.  We enjoyed the outdoor space and the serenity.  If you meditate, the loft space is perfect. One thing to note especially is the stairs to the upstairs bedroom. They are treacherous (in my opinion) for anyone with bad knees, and younger kids. My young kiddos stayed downstairs with the grandparents.  Truly a spectacular find, and will be back!

5/5 Stars – A Perfect Family Getaway in Skaneateles, NY!
We absolutely loved our stay at this beautiful, upgraded home in Skaneateles! From the moment we arrived, we were impressed by how clean, comfortable, and well-maintained everything was. The house had everything we needed, and the thoughtful touches made it feel like a home away from home.
Our kids especially had a blast with the trampoline and playhouse in the yard—they couldn’t get enough! In the evenings, we enjoyed the serene campfire in the backyard, making s’mores and relaxing under the stars. The front pond added such a peaceful, picturesque touch to the property.
We also appreciated how safe and family-friendly the house and neighborhood felt. It was the perfect setting for a memorable family trip. We would definitely stay here again and highly recommend it to anyone visiting the area!
Thank you for such a wonderful experience!
Great stay! The home was spacious and beautiful. Would definitely stay again.

This is a lovely, comfortable, and welcoming home.
Communication was easy, fast, and helpful.

Even Better Than the Photos!
I can’t say enough good things about this Airbnb in Skaneateles! From the moment we arrived, we were blown away — the home is even more beautiful than the photos, which is saying something. Every detail was thoughtfully designed, and the space was spotless, cozy, and incredibly welcoming. The views were stunning, and the setting offered peaceful seclusion.
The hosts were responsive, friendly, and made sure everything was just right for our stay. Whether you’re looking for a romantic getaway, a relaxing retreat, or a base for exploring the Finger Lakes, this place is a gem. We’re already talking about when we can come back!

Beautiful, large, very
contemporary and luxury decorated home in picture perfect setting. So close to the village of Skaneateles and our
dear friends south of the Lake. Will
definitely stay here again. Everything you need is in this home and reading selection procured is fantastic!!! Can't say enough about host responding to general questions- I missed a couple things reading the check-in- he was right there to clarify. THqnk you Nick and team!

Nick was quick to respond to any questions, though there were not many because most things were very clear from the posting and instructions. The house is better in person- while cute in the photos, it is very warm, welcoming and clean in person. Its about a 15 minute drive to the town which had great restaurants and is very cute to walk around. All in all, we had a very enjoyable and peaceful weekend away. No complaints or complications with this stay at all.

Great stay at a fabulous house!  This property and house are absolutely beautiful.  We rented it for a weekend with family.  Unfortunately, the rainy weather did not allow us to make use of the amazing property and expansive deck, but the house itself made up for that.  the house is spacious and very beautiful.  The kitchen and bathrooms are great.  The open floor plan allows for easy socializing.  The house is very well equipped and set up extremely well.  I highly recommend this property for a friend's reunion or a family getaway.  Also, Nick (the property manager) is very responsive and friendly - he made the whole reservation, planning and check-in great.

our stay in Nick's house in Skaneateles was beyond our expectations! the house is even MORE beautiful in person than the photos. the house was pristine clean, had all the necessities we needed PLUS more than we could imagine. fully.stocked kitchen with beautiful modern items, bathrooms had plenty of towels and soap and even shampoo and conditioner. beds and linens were very comfortable! the grounds around the hosue were beautiful and well kept and a gorgeous deck with many chairs! we loved everything about the house and would not hesitate to go back

We were the first guests at this rental, in town for the Syracuse graduation weekend.   House was better than the photos.   Furniture is modern and updated.   All new appliances in kitchen.   Gorgeous bathrooms.   Comfortable beds.   Beautiful, comfortable dining table seats 8.   Comfortable, cozy sectional couch in living room.   TV with all the bells and whistles.   Primary bathroom upstairs has 3 windows looking out onto the yard.   I could get used to looking out at beautiful scenery while taking a shower!   Kitchen is spacious.   Weather didn't allow us to sit out on the deck, but the rocking chairs out there would be wonderful for relaxing while looking at the pond.   Super quiet location.   Would definitely rent there again.   The large, bright primary bedroom has two skylights.   Early morning light didn't bother my husband, but I used a mask.   Just a heads up for those who like to sleep in.   Easy drive to quaint town of Skaneateles.   Really enjoyed our stay.
Great place to stay!  Cozy efficient home with a quiet and beautiful back yard.  I rented the home for overflow family & guests and it worked out perfectly.

We had a wonderful stay in Ronnie’s home. We were in town for a quick stay for a wedding and the location was great, very close to town.
The house was welcoming and had all modern amenities. We had one question and Ronnie quickly responded to provide the answer.
Check in and out went smoothly and there was not a laundry lists of asks for checking out. Overall, I highly recommend this home!

The farm house was absolutely spectacular in every way. The property is private and beautifully maintained with thoughtfully appointed rooms and furnishings. Crisp, white bedding and towels are plentiful. Each room and bathroom is updated with modern fixtures. Aside from the beautiful home, the host provided detailed instructions, was responsive for our entire stay and checked in frequently to make sure everything was perfect. A five star rating is well-deserved.

We loved our stay!  Ronnie's home is SO well located to the village!  Literally a mile from town. Ronnie was incredibly welcoming and communicative throughout our stay.  He reached out to check on us after arrival and to offer any recommendations we might need.  The home is new, beautifully appointed and spotless!  We are VERY picky about cleanliness and Ronnie's home is immaculate. The furnishings are new and very comfortable and beds are firm, which we prefer.  Linens and towels are cozy and luxurious. We appreciated the extra touch of providing bath soap, shampoo and conditioner.  We enjoyed our stay so much we have already booked our return trip!

Enjoyed the house for the weekend.
The owners always communicated back with our questions. I would highly recommend this rental.
Very accommodating host. Great communication. Lovely & spacious home. Quiet neighborhood very close to the village.

We had a wonderful stay. Ronnie was really easy to communicate with. The house is gorgeous. My wife’s favorite part was the modern decor. My favorite part was the High quality linens, towels, pillows, and appliances. Located on a quiet street. Plenty of parking. Big yard. Only three minute drive to downtown Skaneateles.

Amazing hosts and house! So welcoming........ from the special birthday balloons and card, to the wine and charcuterie board chilled upon arrival, to the great accommodations (clean, comfy, stylish, well equipped), and helpful hosts (quick to respond and helpful answering questions about the area and home). So grateful we discovered the perfect place to stay while celebrating in beautiful Skaneateles! Thank you! :)

Great stay. Everything we needed.
Thank you
Loved the house, the decor is amazing, so much space.
Adorable farm house near lake S. Newly remodeled perfection. The hosts even provided us with a welcoming charcuterie board. Nice touch!
The house was absolutely perfect…close to town, immaculate, comfortable and had everything we needed. This home made our visit to Skaneateles to pick up my daughter’s wedding dress even more special.

Ronnie is a fantastic host and great communicator! His replies are quick and thorough. He is knowledgeable about the property and surrounding area. We felt safe at the house and in the community. 5-minute drive from downtown Skaneateles (about 20-minute walk).  We enjoyed Anyela's Vineyards close by as well as several restaurants in the area. Perfect location for a girl's weekend! I would recommend to any friends or family looking for a place near the Finger Lakes!

Very clean, everything brand new. Well furnished, and spacious. Great location, close to town. Nice yard and porch. Host was very responsive and easy to get in touch with. Had a great stay with the family. Would recommend to others.

My friend and I stayed here for a quick weekend getaway. The minute we walked through the door it felt like home, we could not stop gushing over the beautiful decor, and set up. It was perfectly clean, had everything we needed, and oh so comfortable!! Only a 4 minute ride into the village as well. Ronnie was so friendly and quick to get back to me anytime I had a question. We will definitely be back and wouldn’t even dream of staying anywhere else!
Ronnie was great at communicating and making sure everything was okay. House was very clean fantastic and just as described. I would highly recommend this place to anyone looking to book.

Great renovated property! Perfect location to local shops and the finger lakes. Owner is very responsive with answering any questions or helping along the way. We’ll definitely be booking again in the future!

The location can't be beat. The waterfall and pond on the property are so peaceful. There is a nice little road to walk your dog. They allowed us to bring our dog, which was wonderful! Very tasteful and cute.

This house is everything and more!  What a perfect location to the shops and Anyela’s Vineyard.  The multilevel deck gave lake views from every level of the house.  The kitchen was fully stocked with everything you could need.  All of the amenities  of the house give you everything you need to sit back and relax and enjoy the lake!  This is a must!
Beautiful home ! Gorgeous views of the lake . Prime location . Comfortable and clean .

Erin Lived up to super host rating. She provided detailed instructions for checking in and out. The website description is accurate. In addition the kitchen contained cooking supplies included oils and spices. The house also contained interesting artwork, brochures, beautiful gardens, books, binoculars￼, outdoor seating, and room for family members to have space.
We truly enjoyed staying at this gorgeous lake house.

This perfectly situated cottage has everything.  Amazing views, big and well-equipped kitchen, lush gardens and multiple outdoor spaces both shady and sunny.  The charming artwork and eclectic collection of books adds a personal homey touch.  The cottage is only a 10 minute drive from the charming town of Skaneateles, with many shops and restaurants.
Beautiful location and view. So many amenities! Super clean.
Erin and Pete's home was beautiful, comfortable and allowed for so much joy. It was clean, comfortable, beautiful and the perfect place to be joyful. I highly recommend and would stay again!

Fantastic stay! We celebrated my boyfriends 30th birthday with family. Outdoor deck space can’t be beat. We also went in to town one night for Dougs Fish Fry after an afternoon at Skaneateles brewery. Would stay again and will be recommending to friends and family in the future.
Great house, beautiful location. really enjoyed the stay

Erin's home is in a perfect location and is beautiful and comfortable. The views from the deck are gorgeous and the home is inviting and Erin has created a really wonderful place to enjoy a relaxing vacation. It's easy to get to and from town if you so desire, but you may not want to once you see how pretty the views are!!
Erin was a great host and the house is perfect

Such a cozy, cool house, with incredible views!! The lake was so beautiful and clear. We loved that there was private access to walk right into the lake... our dog loved it the most though! We had a great time and would definitely go again :)

Erin's home is lovely with many special decorative touches and things to make the home comfortable.  The views of the lake are stunning - from the decks as well as the house.   We just enjoy being there - reading, talking, watching TV or looking at the lake.  This was our second visit and we definitely plan to go back.
Great house, great location, great views! Will hopefully come back!
Amazing location and beautiful view from all of the porches. Great communication from the host. We will definitely be back.
Perfect location, house and stay!
Wonderful stay! bright and homey, with a fantastic water front location and views! Highly recommend!
BEAUTIFUL decks and lakefront views! Also very quiet and peaceful, and perfect for a relaxation vacation.

Perfect stay- check in and communication was so easy, the house was clean and had everything we could have possibly needed, and the view is incredible. I only got the chance to speak with Erin, but she was very nice and explained everything we needed to know for our stay and answered any questions we had. Can’t recommend enough! We’ll definitely be trying to book again.

The house was really lovely - everything we needed. The rooms were spacious, the kitchen was well stocked (lots of spices, pots/pans, dish-ware, coffee, etc). We wish the weather had been nicer to have enjoyed the deck, but the views the lake were gorgeous. If we ever need a place in Skaneateles again, we would definitely stay here!
Amazing decks with a stunning view! Great place to relax

Erin's home is welcoming, thoughtful, and was sparkling clean upon our arrival. The kitchen and bathrooms are extremely modern and well equipped with items you would purchase and use in your own homes. Erin is very ecologically mindful and encourages her guests to be as well. We were there in early April; so too early to experience all the flora, fauna, and outdoor lighting, but I expect in summer and full, the grounds are beautiful. The deck is as expansive as shown in the photos. You truly are 'right on the lake'. We brought our own linens, in deference to Covid, but the linens and towels in the house are lovely quality.
We were fortunate to have beautiful weather for early April; with a couple days in the low 70s. As Erin states, there is only one wall unit A/C, in the master bedroom, so I suspect it gets warm in the home in the height of summer. The only other thing I would note, which was not a issue for us at all, is that there is one full and one half bath on the second floor. The second full bath is on the first floor. There were only three of us, so this was not an issue in the least. Sharing the upstairs shower/tub was fine for us, and it is nice the 2nd and 3rd bedrooms have the half bath for night time use.
I absolutely highly recommend Erin's home; we would love to go back again one year during the fall or winter.

Erin’s home is beautiful and was just what we needed for our escape from Brooklyn! The location was perfect too - super close to some amazing restaurants and shops in Skaneateles! Highly recommend and hope we can return again soon :)

Erin’s place is beautiful! It is right on the lake and has gorgeous views.  The house is very clean and decorated nicely.  Beautiful views of the lake from inside the house as well.  The kitchen is well supplied with pots, pans, dishes and cutlery.  We were a group of five with two adults, two teens, and one child and there was more than enough space for everyone.  Would love to stay again!

This lakehouse has everything you need for a relaxing getaway. Spacious living room and kitchen, plenty of outdoor space, kayaks and paddleboat, etc. The space itself was sparkling clean and everything in it from appliances to furniture felt very high quality.
With all the amenities, seamless check in and check out, and prime lake location, we are definitely going to stay here again!

Very nice & extremely clean house for a getaway. Half an hour drive to Syracuse, 10 minute drive to town, 25 ish minutes to song mountain.
We enjoyed the house a lot. It was very relaxing to just sit on the decks and watch the sunset. The sofa is large & L shaped, not like what the pictures show; multiple people can sit together. The hosts were very quick to respond to our questions. 100% recommend!

The Humphrey house is great. It checks off many boxes and more. The view is amazing and has private access to the lake. There are a lot of things to do and with good company, you will not realize time goes by. Erin has a great collection of books if you like to read and good collection of utensils if you like to cook/host. Very kid friendly place and big emphasis on sustainable living. We really enjoyed our stay and look forward to more trips there.

Beautiful quaint little cottage. Beautifully decorated. Right in the lake with AMAZING views. Erin and Peter were very attentive and only a phone call away if needed. Would definitely stay here again!

Absolutely loved this lake home. It has everything you could possibly need for your stay. The view of the lake is breathtaking. Short drive to local wineries and state parks. If you’re looking for a quiet getaway with incredible views this is the place. Can’t wait to visit again.

As mentionned in a lot of comments, the pictures do not make justice to this gorgeous and warm house (temperature wise yes but above all the decoration and set up that make you feel at home in their home).
Erin was always helpful and quick to reply.
Would totally recommend!

This place is absolutely amazing. We came for a girls weekend and were blown away. The pictures do not do this place justice. There has been many updates within the house that aren’t shown in the pictures. The view of the lake was breathtaking along with the amazing deck. Wishing I could come back in summer but it’s already booked up :( The hosts were beyond helpful. We ended up leaving a wallet there after check out and the owner went out of his way to come unlock the house so we could get our belongings. Only thing I recommend is to bring an AWD/4WD vehicle if visiting in the winter. Literally the most amazing stay I have ever had and was so sad to be leaving. Hoping to be back next year!

Superb location and amazing home with everything you’ll need for your stay. Thank you so much for an amazing experience; can’t wait to visit again! Erin was amazing, and the home was so warm, inviting, and sparkling clean! Thanks again!
Very Clean place. Host was very responsive! Amazing view!
Awesome!!!

We had a wonderful stay at the Humphrey house! Beautiful view and amazing deck! The place was very clean! Being unable to travel for our actually honeymoon, this was a good quiet, relaxing place to recharge after a stressful few months planning a covid wedding!

I looked through probably hundreds of places in the Finger Lakes region to find the perfect spot for a girls trip and without a doubt we picked the perfect place! Only 10 mins from town and 30 mins from a bunch of great wineries. How have I forgotten the DECKS?! They are gorgeous and pictures don’t do it justice. We are already booking this place again. Also—the kitchen was fully stocked and we’re able to cook nearly every night! Win!
Very nice, clean beyond. View amazing, very nice host and hostess. Perfect location to town. Thank you❤️

Beautiful home for relaxing by the water, enjoying the view of the lake from the living room and master bedroom, and cooking & dining with a group of family/friends. Erin and Pete were very quick to respond and hospitable when we arrived. Easy check-in. Pretty quick drive into town.
This is very lovely comfortable home!  The views are beautiful.  We would stay again !!
Great place! Make sure you bring your own washcloths. Beautiful views. I would come back.
Erin's home is cozy, clean, well appointed with great location.  We enjoyed the indoor/outdoor living it offers.  Wish we could have stayed longer. Hope to go again!
What a beautiful house!  The decks and views were absolutely incredible.  One of the nicest homes I’ve stayed at.
Great views great location very well equipped
Erin’s place is outstanding. Her home was very clean and comfortable. The views are absolutely breathtaking. We will DEFINITELY be back!
Amazing place to stay!
Feels like a loved home with good energy, not just an impersonal rental. My family and I had a lovely stay.
Beautiful spot right on the lake

Our family had a wonderful, relaxing stay at Erin’s place. The location on the lake was perfect and the 4 decks had a lot of seating where we could talk, read and enjoy the view. The house was attractive with many interesting touches - beautiful gardens, potted plants, books - and a very comfortable place to stay.
We hope to return !

A place to relax, connect with the people you love and remember what is most important in life.  The views of the lake from this house look like a painting.  Each deck offers a unique perspective to be appreciated.   Our family enjoyed sunset dinners on the deck, swimming in the lake and kayaking.  The inside of the house is comfortable and amazingly clean.  It is fully stocked and has been thoughtfully prepared with everything you need so you can enjoy your time.  Erin made our stay easy providing details about the house for our stay and was easily available for any questions we had. We were scheduling our return trip before we even left!
Great location, beautiful and clean house, communicative hosts. Would highly recommend.
Great experience, nice spot. Would recommend!
A beautiful spacious home in a great location! Thanks for hosting us!

Hamza’s place was a perfect location for a wonderful girls weekend! Gorgeous new bathrooms, a roomy kitchen with everything you need (the crockpot came in clutch for dinner one night!), and a gorgeous backyard complete with a fire pit were among the highlights, along with the incredibly convenient proximity to town. Seamless check in/out process and Hamza was extremely communicative and available for any questions.  Don’t hesitate, book this one for sure!
Loved the house. Close to Skaneateles town. It has a cool garage with lot of games.

Gorgeous rental! The AC was amazing! The beds were beyond amazing! We loved the mattresses!!!!! The extra blankets were so soft. Great nights sleep!  Internet was strong. I loved everything about the decor choices -island color, the paint color, fixtures and the bathroom choices.  The light switches were labeled which made it easy to turn on the lights we wanted on or off. The weather was rainy which made it great to have such a great space to spend the day and evening. Played some pool and darts. Bathroom were beautiful with “rain” shower heads.

We had a lovely stay at this Airbnb, tucked in to a charming small town. The Airbnb had very nice modern furnishings and decor and was kept very clean. Hamza was also very responsive about any questions we had during our stay. The backyard is perfect for a bonfire and the bedrooms were very comfortable.
Incredible house great place for a long weekend!
Perfect family location.
This is clean and great place to stay. My kids also enjoyed a lot. I highly recommend this house.
Great house to stay. I highly recommend this house.

Stayed here the night before my wedding, and it was wonderful. Tons of space for the guys and I to relax and kick back. Very modern feel with some awesome walk in showers. Exceptional sheets and pillows on the bed I slept on.
close to town, beautiful lake, place newly renovated, quick communication if there's any problem, full pool table
Everything we'd hoped for. amazing communication and willingness to help

Hamza is a wonderful and caring host. His response to any questions we had was always immediate. This was a very peaceful and relaxing vacation for my family. The house was immaculate and had every amenity we could possibly need. The kitchen is well stocked with pots, pans, dishes and whatever else you need for cooking.
It is very close to the beautiful Lake Skanteatles, where we rented a pontoon boat for the day. Everyone enjoyed the day on this beautiful lake.
We are definitely planning a vacation here next summer.
Christine
Thanks for everything. We really enjoyed the beautiful house. A nice , we’ll maintained typical American colonial town. We loved everything about the house. We played at the play room the whole time.
Awesome space for a crowd! Very peaceful and quiet! The host was very accommodating and helpful when we ran into a few problems!
Amazing place to stay and enjoy all the Skaneateles Lake has to offer with easy to reach other Finger Lakes. Super Host 😍
House was fantastic and couldn’t be any better. Would love to come again.

We had a fabulous stay! The host was terrific. Available to answer any questions we had. The different levels of decking was great. We were able to congregate when we wanted but also had spaces to do our own thing. One of us even worked from the top deck!!  We spent most of our time on the bottom deck jumping in and out of the lake!! Beautiful sunsets!!
Erin was a great host and this was the perfect weekend getaway for my dads 70th birthday

This is a very spacious, quiet, and beautiful property. The view of the lake and sunset is BEAUTIFUL. It has a nice blend of elegance and charm with some modern updates included. The beds were comfortable and the shower was hot. Would be beautiful year round with many options for entertainment. Kayaks, paddle boat, sun bathing, quiet reading, board games, grilling, cutout cookies, music/small entertaining (minimal parking), or a quiet stroll....and if that’s not enough, it’s only 5 mins into the charming town of Skaneateles. You WON’T be disappointed with your choice to stay in this home!!!
Erin's family home on Skaneateles Lake is gorgeous, immaculately clean, and the right on the water.  It's the perfect place to go and relax and enjoy the finger lakes.

Home is spectacularly located on the lake  with beautiful deck space; even during our visit in the winter it was surreal. Erin was so easy to get ahold of and responded quickly. The place has everything you need for a getaway.
Erin's place was exceptional.. the view was breathtaking and the home is very comfortable.  If we had gotten snowed in we would have been just fine!!  We would definitely go back.

there are wonderful lake views - a multilevel deck down to the water - large open kitchen, cute eating nook for breakfast - or lunch - open diningroom and living room with lots of light and windows. All very close to Skaneateles - one of the most beautiful and interesting villages in Central NY, great restaurants - pizza places and parks - quaint shops - close to Syracuse, and other attractions in the CNY area.

Our stay was wonderful. It is the perfect location for a vacation or weekend trip. The house was more than enough space for 5 people. The house was very nice and clean. Everything was provided that we needed. Gorgeous views of the lake and an awesome deck near the water. I would love to go back in the summer time when we could use the deck and Lake access.
Beautiful home. Incredible view! Woke up to the view of the lake while in bed!

Erin's lake house was just what I was looking for a weekend winter get away.  There were newer upgrades in furnishings and they were a pleasant surprise.  We all loved the house .  The bedding was so comfortable.  Everything we needed was there.  The nearby town was adorable and we had a nice meal there and walked around the shops.  We really appreciated Erin's ability to have the fireplace/stove serviced for us so we could use it.  It was so amazing to have a fire as it was snowing out and made for a great experience.  We hope to return during the warmer months to take advantage of the lake activities!

Erin's home is perfectly located on the edge of the lake... The large windows and sliding doors afford the most incredible view. And then there's the decks... three levels of huge wooden decks, whimsically designed, interconnected with spiral staircases... I've never seen anything like it!
The interior - most of which has been thoughtfully renovated - has unique features.. always a surprise as you walk to another area of the home. Artful touches everywhere.
Staying here was a wonderful experience.

A beautiful place right on the water and such incredible views! We were there in the winter  and the house felt cozy and very comfortable even with the chilling weather outside. Erin has the house so nicely decorated. It has everything you need and was sparkling clean.  Great kitchen for preparing and enjoying meals in.  She responded quickly to a couple questions we had both prior to and during our stay.  I hope to return and experience this marvelous place in the summer as well!
View of the lake is awesome
My family and I had a great stay at Erin’s place! The location and wonderful and the house is just the same, we hope to return in the future!
Erin’s place was very nice and the views were beautiful. It was colder when we went but still enjoyed being right on the water.

Absolutely gorgeous views, so relaxing to just sit and watch the waves and catch a breeze. Very close to the cutest little town of Skaneatles, a class act winery at Anyela's, and close enough for a day trip to Ithica or Syracuse. Perfect for a couple's getaway, but would be awesome for entertaining as well.

Feels just so much like a home away from home. It’s a beautiful place especially the deck right on the Skaneateles Lake! Everything was sparkling clean! Able to enjoy also preparing a meal in Erin’s functional kitchen for a formal dinner!Communication with Erin was great! Will definitely go back to stay longer!!! Rating?  more than a 5 star!!!

We were a group of 7 women who are friends from high school.  We found Erin's place to be perfect for our weekend getaway.  The house feels like your own home, lots of personal touches to make you feel welcome. We would all come back again.
Immaculate, great view, neat place that we can't wait to return again to soon!

The house was a perfect home base for our long weekend in town for a family wedding, the location is amazing and the house is so charming and well maintained. I hope to come back to spend more time lounging on the decks and exploring the lake!
Please feel free to use my review given to Erin

Erin's place is spectacular, the decks and view are wonderful. The house is so comfortable, so many lovely touches. I love that Erin has clearly marked compost & recycling, beautiful gardens and comfy beds. This is a house to return to for sure!
Great price for the amazing views and outdoor space!

The place was stunning from the decor on the inside to the breathtaking on the water setting outside. My family and I felt right at home it was such a wonderful experience!!! Thank you so much and we cannot wait to come back.
Erin was a great host and very responsive to any questions we had.

Pictures do not do this place justice. We rented Erin's home for the girls in my best friends bridal party to prepare for the wedding and we could not have asked for a better place to do that. The deck is the best part about this home and took all of our breath away when we saw it in person. The bride was so happy with the home she did her first look with her father here. It will always hold a special place for her and for all of us. Thank you so much Erin!
Amazing. Definitely would stay here again !

We had an amazing stay at Erin’s house! It’s was a beautiful house and in an awesome location. The view was amazing! The house was very clean and they had all the amenities we needed. I highly recommend you stay here when you plan your next trip!

we enjoyed Erin’s home inside and out...The big tree next to the deck, all the decking, the gardens, the bedding (softest sheets), the views from the family room, the kitchen was such a cool/smart design. And the jigsaw puzzle had all the pieces!
Wowww. Simply amazing
Great stay! Our toddler and our dogs loved the water. I loved the relaxed style and comfort. Beautiful home with excellent location.

This is a beautiful home on a stunning stretch of one of most serene and pleasant lakes in all of NY. Erin and Peter clearly care about offering an inviting, comfortable, relaxing experience for their visitors, with amenities far beyond that of nearby alternatives. Pictures cannot do this property justice.
Visitors are able to hop out of the lake and be standing in line at the Skaneateles Bakery in 10-15 minutes. Their home is suitable for all ages, with toys and books (and gates on the deck stairs) for the little ones. There are plenty of spots to sit and reflect tucked in and around the house, including several nestled in along the impressive water feature and surrounding gardens. Most importantly, enjoy extremely easy access to the clear, gorgeous lake, complete with water toys for young and old and plenty of deck space to entertain or just lounge.
If they will have us (and it's available!) we will definitely be back. A wonderful vacation spot.

Great place to enjoy family time with amazing lake views from multilevel decking . The covered portion of deck allows all day enjoyment. Kitchen is well equipped to entertain large family. Erin has decorated her home tastefully and has wonderful outdoor spaces with flowers and plants.
Erin is a wonderful host who responds to inquiries promptly.

The photos don't do justice to this incredible home!!! We spent most of our time on the many docks and decks, taking in the breathtaking views, swimming, kayaking, and just having a wonderful time. Thank you for an unforgettable experience!

My parents and I booked a few days to enjoy the lake and had a great time.   The house was as nice as in the photos, with the exception that the deck was even better!  We’ll try our best to get back again.
Our stay Erin’s place was fantastic. The view is beautiful. The terraces and dock are great to hang out on. The kitchen is roomy enough for multiple cooks. We would be thrilled to return.
What a lovely home. Erin was super fast to respond. The home is clean and well supplied with everything.
Beautiful home and location.

A truly picturesque and relaxing setting right on Skaneateles Lake where you can relax: both inside the house or outside on any of the three decks. This house defines “lake living”. The house includes many features and extras that add to its special nature. Erin is “Super”, and not only by AirBNB standards. She was an incredible host, greeting us upon arrival, giving us a walk through to point out various amenities and making herself available at anytime during our stay. Erin and her home made our long weekend a memorable and wonderful experience.

What a lovely place to spend time with family and friends. Erin is an awesome host. Everything in the house is so nicely organized to perfection. Location of the house is impeccable. My 4 year old didn’t want to come back at all. I will definitely recommend this place to friends and colleagues and will come back if I visit the finger lakes again.

Erin’s home is luxurious, welcoming, comfortable. There’s tons of sleeping space, gathering space, and still nooks for you to get away and do your own thing. The views are also incredible, and you can enjoy them while you’re reading a book from her library or playing any of the number of games they have stocked.
WiFi worked great (but I barely spent any time on it, too!), everything in the kitchen and utilities worked well,
We couldn’t have had a better time.
A great relaxing environment with outstanding deck spaces to enjoy your first cup of coffee, any dining option, or refreshing beverage.  Loved our time there - wish we were able to enjoy it longer!

I can’t even begin to describe how amazing this place is. The home is immaculately clean, it’s comfy, it has absolutely everything you could need. I must say I don’t think I’ve ever enjoyed a stay as much as I did this one. Check in and out were a breeze. I will be back to this home ASAP!!! Btw the lake is beautiful and the pictures do it NO JUSTICE!!!! I have never seen such clear water.

Skaneateles is a fantastic location with beautiful houses sitting on the edge a lake in the Finger Lakes area. Erin’s property is one these beauties with great views, in a quiet location and comfortable ammenities. The property is great for couples or families. Highly recommended.

Erin was such an incredible host during our weekend stay to celebrate my sisters graduation from Syracuse. Erin was fast at responding to any questions which was incrediblely helpful! The house was perfect for our needs and the location was just enough away from Syracuse University. The distance to downtown Skaneateles was great and allowed us to go out and celebrate minus all the crowds.
Erinsplace was beautiful!   The house is spacious, stylish and you can’t beat the view.  Thanks for letting us celebrate my sisters 50th birthday at your home.
Erin and Pete have a fabulous place with amazing lake frontage and 4 levels of decking to relax lakeside. The house is outfitted with everything you could possibly need. Can’t wait to return!

Relaxation~ beauty~ coziness~ and cleanliness. We loved the privacy and lake and also being 8 minutes from town.
The lake is magical and the decks are incredible. We felt at home there and it’s a very special , well cared for environment.

Erin’s house is tucked away right on the lake with amazing views. The property is cozy, quiet and safe and is on a privateish block. The house was thoughtfully decorated and very clean. Many tips on local things to do and restaurants. Fully loaded kitchen, grill and smoker which was very clean. All the bedrooms had plenty of space and were clean. Outside if you are into kayaking or hanging on the lake there is plenty of seating and access to her kayaks. Outdoor lighting is available. Overall great stay for us and my dog.

Our stay at Erin's house was amazing. The three levels of decks was very convenient and we were able to enjoy the lake views from all areas even on rainy days. The lake itself is superb! I can't remember the last time I saw anything cleaner.
When we first arrive, Erin welcome us and gave us suggestions for local restaurants that we may want to try. Thank you for the great experience, my son didn't want to leave!

Clean quiet place nicely decorated. Really big kitchen and plenty of room inside and also on the deck. Beds pillows linens and towels all very good quality.  The kitchen was great, nice assortment of condiments and things you need but always forget.
A perfect get away. Thoughtful hosts who leave you wanting for nothing. Spectacular views!

Fantastic house on the lake.  Great views.  Very comfortable.  We came Thanksgiving week and enjoyed the wood burning stove after a polar plunge in the lake.  Thanks for sharing this wonderful space with us!

Erin's house was a perfect place to stay while visiting the area. The house is clean, spacious, cozy with lots of character.  There is plenty of extras with a full kitchen, games, nooks for alone time and great spaces for friends/family to be together.  The view and decks are amazing and although there are other houses very close, the house is situated forward on the lake so you have a sense of privacy. Erin was amenable and attentive. Would highly recommend to anyone and would love to be back someday!
Great location, quaint and cozy with amazing views of the lake and surroundings.

Absolutely gorgeous location! Perfect place for a family get-together. Plenty of indoor and outdoor space with everything you could possibly need, but also just a short drive to the restaurants and shops in town. The multi-level decks overlooking the lake are spectacular!

Erin’s home was everything we could have hoped for and more during our short time in the Finger Lakes. Erin and Pete greeted us upon arrival like they were old friends and showed us around the house. The photos are an accurate depiction of the house; in fact, the outdoor photos probably don’t do it justice — you have to see it for yourself. The personal dock with kayak and paddle boat were perfect day activities and the view of the lake was spectacular. At night, we enjoyed building a fire and watching a movie on the TV. The house was also conveniently located near the town and other activities. Would definitely recommend this place to others and we’ll definitely be back again. Thank you Erin and Pete!

We had a wonderful time at Erin's place on the lake. The decks and views are amazing, and the interior is beautiful, spacious, and well-equipped. The location is ideal for getting to Skaneateles and Auburn, and an easy drive to Syracuse. We could not have been happier.
Excellent house and great location on the lake!
We truly enjoyed our stay at Erin’s Home on the lake! The views of the lake and outdoor space were everything we hoped for. Our girls weekend was one we won’t soon forget!

We spent a wonderful 2 days at Erin and Pete's place.  Erin and Pete were there to greet us upon arrival and we loved that personal touch and hearing the history of the house.  The 2000 sq ft of decks are amazing and offers the choice of spending some time either alone or with company to truly take in the view.  My husband and I prefer very firm beds and we found that in the full size bed in the bedroom that also includes the twin size bed.  The location was quiet and secluded but only about 7 mins from the heart of Skaneatles.
This is a wonderful place for a lake house experience with family and friends. Erin and company were great, and we have some great memories.

We loved our time at Erin’s House. Our favorite part of the House was the multi level porches overlooking the lake.  The location of the house is perfect for easy access to town. Erin was a wonderful host who was very responsive and easy to work with.  We also enjoyed using the kayaks each day.  We will definitely be back!

Such a great getaway! The lake is a constant presence in Erin's home, and we so appreciated that. From boating to bathing to the lake's changing moods, the visual and aural presence -- Erin's house takes full advantage of its lakefront location. The house itself is a comfortable place to relax. Really felt like we were away!

This was our second stay in Erin’s home, and we will certainly be back. Erin remains friendly, responsive, and accommodating. We love how cozy and tidy the house is, and you can’t beat all the deck space. This year, we especially appreciated how easy the house was to toddler-proof! A few zip ties on cabinet doors and deck gates, and we were all set.

Erin is nice and friendly, and the outdoor facilities are as described with direct access to the lake. However, not well kept. Lots of spiderweb all over and a couple of ponds with green water, which attracts mosquitoes. The water in the lake is clearly not clean at least near the shore, as waste water from dishwashers and washing machines from the houses run directly into the lake. The house itself is comfortable, but it was not clean. One member of our family has an allergy to cats, she had an allergic reaction while in the house. All in all you can find better alternatives for half the price in the Finger Lake District.

We had an amazing time on our stay at Erin’s lake house. Erin and Pete met us there to show us around. They were welcoming and very easy to contact. The house was clean and very well prepared for us. We spent most of our  time out on all of the 4 decks which are even bigger than they look in the pictures. I would highly recommend this place for anyone looking for a get away on the lake.
We loved staying here. The house is fantastic and the views of the lake are unbelievable. Erin was extra nice.
You are missing out not grabbing this space!!! The view is unbeatable, lots of places to take in the breathtaking view (both shady and sunny) and home is very comfortable.

The lake is spectacular, location could not have been better.  We rented a boat and the water was clean, clear and cold!  The home was comfortable, really enjoyed having cable during the world cup.  Thanks for a terrific stay.

This lakeside home is perfect for groups and families. This is clearly a beloved home and the many opportunities for enjoying the view and breezes make this a standout. The town is about five miles away and is an easy drive. We loved Moro’s in Skaneateles and the Valley Inn in Marcellus. Don’t be deceived by the exterior of the latter—the breakfast food and especially the French toast is spectacular!
I hope to visit “Skinny Atlas” again!

Sunsets were fantastic..
Finding the entrance road off Rt. 41 is a bit difficult. Believe your GPS and slow down.
This place was amazing. They had extra every day items in the house so if you forgot something simple you were find.
Erin was a very hospitable host. She communicated fast and was very helpful. The place was beautiful and near a nice town. The view from the place was also amazing. Would recommend to anyone!

Super weekend for our extended family of 7 celebrating our daughter’s graduation from SU. Very comfortable, amazing views, great amenities - and we enjoyed every minute of it all! Certainly hoping to stay again! Erin is a wonderful host!

An amazingly beautiful home... beautiful inside and out. Every detail perfect.  The multi level decks allowed us to relax and enjoy the lake and the natural beauty in sun and shade.  Can’t wait to go back.
Absolutely gorgeous view and great space!

Amazing views, great house. There is a ton of room, so much deck space, and beautiful views. There are so many little touches with the house that make it so warm and comfortable. It was a very relaxing time during a week that wasn't a very fun one for me, so I will be ever grateful to Erin and Peter for sharing their wonderful space.
This house has character, charm, and an amazing view of the lake.

This place was exactly what we wanted for our family vacation. Secluded but close enough to downtown and right on the the lake. The back deck was incredible as was the view from it and I would recommend the place whole heartedly.

My husband loves to cook, so he was happy to discover a kitchen with plenty of cookware. The living room and bedrooms were comfortable and calming. The decks are without a doubt the best feature. I  can't think of anything it needed.

Great location on the lake, beautiful property and house, and a fantastic deck!! Loved our stay, and hope to be able to go back next year!! Would recommend this house to anyone. Erin was also great and responded to all communications quickly.
Beautiful place. Comfortable and quiet with every amenity. The only issue for us was the plug wasn't working on the tub so we couldn't use it. Enjoyed our stay
Wonderful location, spacious, nice amenities and an awesome multi level deck on the water.
Awesome location and great space for a gathering. Had a great time!

Beautiful house on the lake! It is an older home with lots of character and unbelievable views! Sadly we weren't able to swim because of the algae in the lake and also had to drink bottled water, but hopefully that won't continue to be an issue. We would definitely stay again and it comfortably fit 7 of us in town for a wedding.

We visited Erin's beautiful home on 11th Sep 17. Jessica gave us a warm welcome and a quick tour of the house...the views are so amazing from all the decks.
The house has each and every thing that we could think of and need...
We could really feel the love and care they have given to this home...fresh small flowers kept at the dining table, near the sink just brought smile on our face
