Lots of books to read, relax and enjoy the view of the stunning Skaneateles lake
We had a really good time staying at Erin's place!!!!
A flawless weekend at a delightful place, immaculately maintained by charming hosts.
Great rustic vibe. Wonderful kitchen generally well-stocked. Comfortable beds. Beautiful spot on gorgeous Skaneateles and nice outdoor space to enjoy the setting.
Great location, beautiful view from the decks, awesome spot on the lake. Nice hosts - would definitely go back!

Our family had a lovely stay at Erin's place.  The house was was very comfortable with breathtaking views of the crystal blue lake.  The house was well-equipped with everything you need for a great time at the lake.  From board games during the night to kayaks during the day, this house had it all.  We particularly enjoyed watching the stunning sunset from the top balcony.  We look forward to returning to this house next summer.
Great property on the lake!!

Erin's home is beautiful and its location on the lake is spectacular! We had a fantastic week staying there! Our grand-daughter loved going in the water and playing on the little beach area. We all thoroughly enjoyed ourselves, and the sunsets are incredible! The house is very well equipped and very comfortable. I would highly recommend this home!
House was immaculate when we arrived and we were extremely pleased with the location, the size, and amenities. Very quiet and relaxing.

The house was beautiful. Scenic views, comfortable accommodations and friendly neighborhood.
Erin was incredibly helpful and personable. Couldn't ask for a better experience, and would recommend again and again.

We had a great time at the lake house! My wife, our 1 yr old and my in laws stayed here over Memorial day weekend. Erin is very responsive and quickly answered all my questions. The house is great with a fully equipped kitchen and beautiful dock and outdoor multi level patio overlooking the lake. The house is just a few minutes from downtown Skaneateles where we picked up our groceries. The grill works great and we used it for a meal as well. Very relaxing, enjoyable trip!

Erins house is wonderful, fantastic location on the lake, close to town. Very nice   inside, beds are comfy, master bed has the most amazing view! Everything you need, and lots of great books to browse through. I can't wait to go back!

This is one of my favorite airbnb houses! Erin is extremely nice and has given us really good food recommendations. It's an ideal place for a weekend getaway. The view is so pretty especially during the sunset. I really wished that I can stay for several more days.

We stayed 4 nights in this beautiful lake front house for my son's wedding in Welch Allyn, we were warmly welcomed when we arrived and everything was as nice as described except Erin has the best WiFi in her house which we did not expected and made our stay even more enjoyable. Thanks Erin, and we will come back for the baby shower.

Great location in a summer community.  Huge 4 level deck on the lake which is great for entertaining.  The water is crystal clear and the charming town is just minutes away.  Well worth the price, I think they could even charge more for the location.
Great view. Great service
Spectacular! Such a wonderful home!

I spent 5 days with my family at Erin's house over the Chrismas holiday. AND WE LOVED IT! It's an incredible two-story house that sits directly on the water. Everything we needed and more was supplied from the kitchen to the bathrooms. The design and decor were super cute and the layout was very comfortable. Jessica was there to greet us when we got in and she was super kind and accommodating. She'd even made a fire for us! The house is really close to town, which is so pretty and very unique - if you've never been. All in all - I honestly couldn't have wanted for more. I 100% recommend this as a place to stay - no matter the season. We had a great Christmas and felt right at home. THANKS, ERIN and JESSICA!
Beautiful location and quality fittings. Would recommend to anyone 5 stars
The house is charming, absolutely spotless and in a great, quiet location on the lake! Would definitely stay there when visiting the Finger Lakes again!

The house was exactly as described and was perfect for our girl's weekend.  Everything we needed was provided and Erin was very quick to respond to all questions.  The weather did not cooperate for our stay so we didn't get to enjoy the beautiful deck, we hope to rent her house again when the weather is nicer so we have a chance to enjoy it.  Thank you Erin, we enjoyed our weekend.
